-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Intro [PartA]
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
This is a translation guide for Blaze Union. It will include the entire story, 
and pretty much all the extra contents. Currently the guide covers through the
first ending some character quotes, and some items.

I would like to inform everyone that I am still learning Japanese, so the
translations of some lines may not be entirely correct. If you think that I
translated something incorrectly send me an email at Lexy_ler@yahoo.com telling
me why and or how you think it should be.

I have also 'translated' some of the English lines, such as the ones you get
after completing an objective, and am using my own romanizations for some of
the names. I find some of them pretty bad, and since I was changing those, I
decided that I may as well improve the others I found bad. I will, of course,
provide the original romanization for the things that have romanizations extras
section as these are merely my own opinion.


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Walkthrough [PartB]
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Notes:
The walkthrough section will include, in order:
       Title
   01. Intro
   02. Story before the battle 
   03. Story during the battle 
   04. Story after the battle 
   05. What the characters say when you put them next to a boss
   06. Locations
   07. Items and towns
   08. Loss screens

If you want to jump to a specific map, use Ctrl+F, and type Map# in []. If you 
want to jump to a specific section of the map type Map#.## in []. As an
example, for the first map type Map1, for the first maps losses type Map1.08.

Often there are several parts of mid-battle story in the game. You can only 
search for the first one, but they should all be there on order separated by 
line breaks.

The loss screens are often repetitive: the line character says is the same no 
matter the map number , and the actual loss screen is written as '(what the
battle was about), (consequence based on loss condition)'. I've shortened it so
that it would be less repetitive, so while I'm not listing all the loss 
conditions for each map, you're not actually missing anything.

The locations are done the order you'd get them when pressing the R button (the
chapter 3 and 5 maps are actually also this way, some are just unavailable at 
the start of the chapter).

The items and towns are done in columns from top to bottom, going from left to 
right.

                    ========================================
                        ***        Chapter 1        ***
                                  希望の名の下に
                        ***   In the Name of Hope   ***
                    ========================================


=========================================================================[Map1]
義賊団参上！
Appearance of the Virtuous Outlaws!
Tiera, Western Nesar District


--------------------Intro--------------------                         [Map1.01]
The Bronquian Empire......
Having gained power through a contract with the demon dragon Bronga, its 
emperors rule the country through military might.

Bronquia's current emperor, Soltier, having succeeded his younger brother, 
began imposing heavy taxes and rapidly amassing military strength.

Emperor Soltier's misgovernment caused tremendous distress among the people.
Public order deteriorated, and sparks of rebellion, crime and corruption spread
throughout the country.
In the hands of this unreasonable tyrant, the peace people once enjoyed was 
cruelly destroyed.

Located in the western part of the Empire is the trade city Tiera.
The city, split between those who built a fortune exploiting others and those 
struggling in poverty, serves as a symbol of what the empire had become.

It is in one corner of Tiera, a place where the oppressed live, huddled close 
together, the Nesar district, that the curtain rises on our story.


----------------Before Battle----------------                         [Map1.02]
Well-built Merchant:
Hmm. This sure is troubling.
It's past the payment date, yet you've no intention to return the money you owe
  me...

Young Man:
It's not that I don't want to; please, just give me another three, no, two more
  days!

Well-built Merchant:
It's past the payment date! You there, bring out anything that that looks
  valuable!!

Merchant's Guard:
Got it, master Nolan.

Young Man:
P- Please! Have mercy!!

Merchant's Guard:
Boss! I found this girl inside.

Young, Red-haired Girl:
No! Let go!! Help, mister, save me!

Young Man:
...............

Nolan:
Perhaps this could pay off your debt? If I were to sell her in town......

Young, Red-haired Girl:
This has nothing to do with me! I don't live here!

Nolan:
I see, that is quite unfortunate. Hey, bring her along!

Young, Red-haired Girl:
Let me go! No! Nooo!!

|-------------------|
|       SNIPED      |
|-A Technical Shot!-|
|-------------------|

Merchant's Guard:
Guaa!

Nolan:
W- what? An arrow? W-who's there!?

Girl with Golden Hair:
Stop right there, Nolan.
Garlot, is the little girl okay?

Garlot:
She's fine, Shiskia. Now we can fight as fiercely as we want.

Shiskia:
Get ready, Nolan! You corrupt merchant!!

Nolan:
Garlot..., Shiskia? Could it be, you two are from the Blazing Outlaws group...

Garlot:
You got that right.

Nolan:
Hahahahaha!

Shiskia:
Gee, Nolan, was being cornered a bit much for your mind to take?

Nolan:
No, no. It's just that when I think of how lucky I've gotten, I can't stop
  laughing...
Hehehe. If I were to defeat this hypocritical Blazing Outlaws group that
  threatens us kind merchants,
I would become even more famous.
I'll beat you at your own game!

Garlot:
I'll bring you to your knees for saying that.

  /--Victory--------------
 / Defeat the corrupt merchant Nolan!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
     Any of your units die...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Garlot:
Let's go, Shiskia! If you don't hurry, you'll get left behind.

Shiskia:
You don't have to tell me! And you too, don't let your guard down!!


------------------Mid Battle-----------------                         [Map1.03]
Nolan:
They're just bandits, why have you not beaten them yet!
I am paying you lot a lot of money! Now, hurry up and defeat them!


-----------------After Battle----------------                         [Map1.04]
|    |
|    |        DRIVEN BACK THE ENEMY
| /\ | Repelled the corrupt merchant Nolan!!
|/  \| 

|------------------|
|      RETREAT     |
|-Time to Regroup.-|
|------------------|

Nolan:
Gyah! What an awful group! You've gotten my clothes muddy! I want nothing to do
  with you anymore!

  -----------------------------------------------------
Shiskia:
That takes care of everyone.

Garlot:
No, not yet. Nolan got away.

Shiskia:
Yeah, but...

Garlot:
We've chased him for half a year already, and we've finally cornered him.
We will make him pay...
Let's go, Shiskia. At our pace, we'll catch him before he reaches the nobleman
  district.

Shiskia:
Hang on, what about Jenon?

Garlot:
Don't worry about him. I'm sure that when he sees where we're going, he'll
  figure out what to do next.


---------------------Vs.---------------------                         [Map1.05]
--Garlot vs. Nolan
| Nolan:
| You're just using justice for your own selfishness! It's sickening!
|
| Garlot:
| I told you, if you want to prattle, save it for later!
-----


------------------Locations------------------                         [Map1.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
A district in the western part of the provincial city Tiera, where the poor 
live huddled close together


--------------------On Map-------------------                         [Map1.07]
--路地裏の片隅 - Corner of a Back Alley
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|     Protato     |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| Huh, this is...
| This'll be good for emergency rations. We'll take it.
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| Ah, it's a wild potato. Looks like it grew up here without anybody's help.
| I'll take this bit of wisdom along as well, so don't curse us, okay?
-----


---------------------Loss--------------------                         [Map1.08]
Defeat - Out of Cards (1st)

Garlot:
Hey... There aren't any more tactics cards left...
Now the troops can't move anymore.
I messed up...

|    |
|    |   OUT OF CARDS
| /\ | Strategy failed...!
|/  \| 

In the conflict with the merchant Nolan in Tiera's Nesar district, the Blazing 
Outlaws were scattered due to a flaw in tactics, and were forced to disband...


=========================================================================[Map2]
テンガロンの女！
Girl in a Cowboy Hat!
Tiera, Center of Nesar District


----------------Before Battle----------------                         [Map2.02]
Shiskia:
I guess it's true that bad guys can run really fast. I don't see Nolan
  anywhere.

Garlot:
Hm? Hang on, Shiskia, did you hear that?

Shiskia:
You mean the person following us? Wait, did you just notice that?

Garlot:
......I noticed some time ago, they just didn't seem threatening.

Shiskia:
Ah, this again!

Garlot:
Hey, you there! Get out here, and don't make any sudden movements!
If you do we'll kill you before you can make a sound!

???:
Wait, don't hurt me!

Young, Red-haired Girl:
I only wanted to thank you guys for saving me...

Shiskia:
Ah, you're the young lady from before.

Young, Red-haired Girl:
It's not 'young lady,' my name's Amy.

Shiskia:
I see, Amy. You know, there are some bad guys nearby, so you should hurry home,
  okay?

Amy:
I don't have a home so I can't.

Shiskia:
What about that man you were with, isn't he your dad?

Amy:
No, he was just someone who helps out travelers.
'Cause, you know, I'm on a journey to find my big brother.

Garlot:
Hey, pipsqueak! Go find somewhere to hide, right now!

Amy:
Eh? Eh!? Pipsqueak? You mean me?

|---------------------|
|        AMBUSH       |
|-Unexpected Enemies!-|
|---------------------|

Garlot:
I can hear the footsteps of a few light units. They've got to be Nolan's
  soldiers.

Shiskia:
They're probably here to buy time...
But they took a while to try and stop us. Think this might be some sort of
  trap?

Garlot:
Does it matter? I plan to break through anyway.

  /--Victory--------------
 / Crush Nolan's private army!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
     Any of your units die...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Garlot:
Let's go Shiskia! Is the pipsqueak safe?

Shiskia:
Yep, I told her to hide off the side of the road.


------------------Mid Battle-----------------                         [Map2.03]
|-------------------|
|  REINFORCEMENTS   |
|-Help has Arrived.-|
|-------------------|

Freckled Girl:
Hello everyone, attention please.
Knowing the basics of battle is a surefire way to victory. And a basic way of
  winning is a pincer attack.
And look! Cerica and her gang have snuck around behind you unnoticed.

Cerica:
The reward money for beating you guys ought to buy a lovely dinner. Just
  thinking about it makes Cerica feel faint.

Shiskia:
This is supposed to be a pincer attack? They're kinda far away...

Garlot:
If the employer's an idiot, I suppose the rest of the unit would be as well.
Besides, if they're just gonna mess around like that, I'll finish them off no
  problem! 

Shiskia:
Hang on, Garlot! While they are obviously stupid, they still use axes. 
You've got a spear so you'd be poorly matched against them. How about you just
  leave them to me.

Cerica:
Hey, you scanky girl over there! Cerica is not stupid, you take that back!

Shiskia:
Really! Who talks in third person; it sounds dumb!

Cerica:
What's this, what's this, is someone jealous? Well, whatever, Cerica will get
  you first then.

  -----------------------------------------------------
Cerica:
Ow! What's that for!
Ah, enough, enough. Cerica got hurt, so Cerica's heading home for today!
But don't forget! Next time you'll pay for treating Cerica like an idiot!

|------------------|
|      RETREAT     |
|-Time to Regroup.-|
|------------------|


-----------------After Battle----------------                         [Map2.04]
|    |
|    |       ENEMY OVERWHELMED!
| /\ | Successfully repelled Cerica!!
|/  \| 

Garlot:
What's wrong with her? She was a mess.

Shiskia:
Yea, but they bought Nolan a lot of time. Let's hurry!

  -----------------------------------------------------
Shiskia:
Amy, it's okay to come out now.
But this neighborhood is kinda dangerous, understand?
How about you go back to that nice man's house for now?

Amy:
Okay, I got it... I'll go do that.

Shiskia:
And good luck on finding your brother.

Amy:
Yup, thanks.

Garlot:
But they caught me off guard attacking us here.

Shiskia:
Well, we got lucky that they were idiots. 
But Nolan's had a lot of time now. 
They must have set something up up ahead... 

Garlot:
Don't worry so much, Shiskia. Whatever is up ahead, as long as we can beat them
  none of it matters.

Shiskia:
You shouldn't take them so lightly, Garlot. It can get you in big trouble.

Garlot:
There's got nothing we can't break through...
Let's hurry Shiskia. We've got to catch up to Nolan!

Dark-Skinned Warrior:
Blazing Outlaws, huh... There are people with some interesting ideas. 
But as fighters they're still pretty green... 
Well, since I'm already here, I may as well watch them for a while longer.


---------------------Vs.---------------------                         [Map2.05]
--Garlot vs. Cerica
| Garlot:
| Could we make this quick? I don't have time to spend with you idiots.
|
| Cerica:
| You know, now that Cerica's had a good look you're pretty sexy.
| If you say you're sorry Cerica will let you join her gang.
|
| Garlot:
| Will you stop joking around!
|
|---VICTORY
| Cerica:
| Ehehe, I went too easy on you.
|
| Garlot:
| You held back an awful lot.
|
|---DEFEAT
| Garlot:
| You're not too bad at this.
|
| Cerica:
| Cerica hasn't even started yet.
-----

--Shiskia vs. Cerica-----------------------------------
| Cerica:
| Cerica will make you regret calling her an idiot!
|
| Shiskia:
| What is it with that speech pattern? It sounds really stupid!
|
| Cerica:
| Aah, you really are jealous of Cerica's beauty.
|
|---VICTORY
| Cerica:
| What's with the bow, you coward! Real girls fight with their charms or an
|   axe!!
|
| Shiskia:
| What is she talking about...
|
|---DEFEAT
| Cerica:
| There, now apologize for calling Cerica an idiot!
|
| Shiskia:
| So what, you only won one round.
-----


------------------Locations------------------                         [Map2.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary 
A district in the western part of the provincial city Tiera, where the poor 
live huddled close together

   --ショップマキナ - Makina Shop 
One of the few shops in the Nesar District. It sells basic necessities.


--------------------On Map-------------------                         [Map2.07]
--ショップマキナ - Makina Shop - FIRST TIME
|
|--------------------|
|     ACQUISITION    |
|-Received Treasure!-|
|      Goat Milk     |
|--------------------|
|
| Shopkeeper:
| You guys are with the Blazing Outlaws...
| What!? You're fighting the guys from Nibel again?
| In that case take this! No need to pay me!
| Smash in those arrogant faces of theirs! I'm counting on you!
|
|---AFTERWARDS
| Shopkeeper:
| Smash in those arrogant faces of theirs! I'm counting on you!

---------------------Loss--------------------                         [Map2.08]
Defeat - Unit Death (1st)

|-----------------------|
|    KILLED IN ACTION   |
|-A Warrior has Fallen.-|
|-----------------------|

Unit death quote (See PartC)

|    |
|    |         DEATH OF A HERO
| /\ | Their defeat came far too soon...!
|/  \| 

While chasing the merchant Nolan through the Nesar District of Tiera, the 
Blazing Outlaws lost a crucial member and never recovered...


=========================================================================[Map3]
傭兵団対義賊団
Virtuous Outlaws vs. Mercenaries
Tiera, Eastern Nesar District


----------------Before Battle----------------                         [Map3.02]
Garlot:
There he is! Nolan!

Shiskia:
Hang on, Garlot! Look around, there are so many soldiers.

|---------------------|
|        AMBUSH       |
|-Unexpected Enemies!-|
|---------------------|

Nolan:
Ah, here you are. The young lady and gentleman of the Blazing Outlaws. I was
  getting tired of waiting.
Thank you for giving me more than enough time to set up a warm reception for
  you.

Garlot:
Looks like we've got no choice. Shiskia, let's go greet them. 

Shiskia:
W-what? You mean to fight with these odds?

Garlot:
These guys are nothing but numbers. I doubt they're any stronger than the
  others.

Shiskia:
No way, Garlot! We should wait until Jenon gets here.

Garlot:
And you think they'll just let us wait around? Either we take them, or they'll
  take us!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Defeat the corrupt merchant Nolan!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
     Any of your units die...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Nolan:
David, time for you to earn the money I'm paying you.

David:
I got it. But, you sure about this, boss? They're just kids.

Nolan:
They may not look like it, but they are the Blazing Outlaws group. You'd best
  not take them lightly.

David:
Oho? I've heard of them recently...... In that case I see no reason to hold
  back.


------------------Mid Battle-----------------                         [Map3.03]
David:
Alright then... It's been a while since I've had some fun.

  -----------------------------------------------------
Nolan:
Ku ku ku, despicable lowborn thieves! Accept your punishment for angering me!

Garlot:
The one who should be punished is you! Give back the money you've taken from
  everyone!

Nolan:
What? Are you saying that exploiting peasants is a crime to be punished for?
Things such as exploiting and being exploited are merely part of nature's food
  chain; they are roles set by god.
If you hate being exploited so much, you should just join the other side. 
That's all I'm saying.

???:
Oh, in that case things should be fine if all the exploiters are defeated. 
That's what we've decided.

Nolan:
Mmn? Who's there!

|-------------------|
|  REINFORCEMENTS   |
|-Help has Arrived.-|
|-------------------|

Garlot:
You're late, Jenon! And what's with the self important attitude!

Jenon:
I don't think that someone who does nothing but recklessly charge in has any
  room to talk.
Besides, girls love a guy that arrives in the nick of time.

Garlot:
Unfortunately for you there aren't any girls here. You're wasting your time.

Jenon:
I see, that's a shame...

Shiskia:
Hey! I'm a girl! What about me!

Garlot:
Anyways, Jenon, save your jokes for later. There are still quite a few of them
  left!

Jenon:
I see.
In that case, Garlot, Shiskia, let us fight using unions.
In cases where there are so many enemy soldiers, fighting individually will
  only drain both our time and energy.

Garlot:
I see, unions, huh...... Alright then, let's do it!

  -----------------------------------------------------
David:
I see, the rumors of your strength are true... I can see why Cerica had such
  trouble.
In that case, I'm not prepared to fight you guys now.
Well, so long as I'm alive I can always try again, so I'll pull out for now.

Nolan:
David! What's this about you running away! Do the job I'm paying you for!

David:
Boss, how rude. I've already worked the amount you paid me for, make no
  mistake.
Well then, boss, stay well!

|------------------|
|      RETREAT     |
|-Time to Regroup.-|
|------------------|


-----------------After Battle----------------                         [Map3.04]
|    |
|    |     THE EVIL FALLS BY ALL MEANS!
| /\ | Crushed the corrupt merchant Nolan!!
|/  \| 

Nolan:
Kh! To think I've been brought down by these mongrels!
Why you! One day I'll make you pay for this! You can be sure of that!

Jenon:
No! Nolan is heading through the gate!

Shiskia:
Leave this to me!

|-------------------|
|       SNIPED      |
|-A Technical Shot!-|
|-------------------|

Nolan:
Gua! M- my leg... Someone, someone get this arrow out!!

Jenon:
Nice shot, Shiskia!

Garlot:
Give it up, Nolan.

--DAVID REMAINING
| David:
| I see, the rumors of your strength are true... I can see why Cerica had such
|   trouble.
| In that case, I'm not prepared to fight you guys now.
| Well, so long as I'm alive I can always try again, so I'll pull out for now.
|
|------------------|
|      RETREAT     |
|-Time to Regroup.-|
|------------------|
|
| David:
| Well then, boss, stay well!
-----

  -----------------------------------------------------
Nolan:
H- hey, enough, I'll change, I'm sorry... Th- that's right, money, I'll pay you
  money!

Garlot:
Who'd forgive you! You'll change, huh, how dare you lie to us so easily.

Jenon:
Wait, Garlot. Maybe we should let him go.

Nolan:
Ah, someone reasonable! Ah, looking closely, you're a very handsome man!

Garlot:
What gives, Jenon, what do you mean let him go!

Jenon:
I'm not saying to do it just like that. But perhaps we can be lenient if he
  were to return everything he stole.

Shiskia:
I see, like a ransom.

Jenon:
Exactly. We should talk with those guys that fled as soon as possible.

Nolan:
Return all of it! That's impossible! Damn it, I changed my mind, you're not
  good looking after all!

Jenon:
Perhaps you've not considered the position you've been left with, Mr. Nolan.
If you disagree, I suppose we'll just take your life instead.

Nolan:
H- hey, wait a minute, I got it. I'll pay. I'll pay whatever you'd like...

Garlot:
No way, the moment we let him go he'll just go back to his old ways.

Nolan:
I- I'll change, I promise! I won't do anything bad ever again.
Y- yes, I'll even put it in writing! Yes, isn't that a good idea.

Garlot:
And you'll pay 3000 pieces of gold.

Nolan:
3000!? T- that's...

Garlot:
Well? That money's been gotten through foul means, right.

Jenon:
Yes, it might have made little girls cry.

Shiskia:
Garlot's right. Don't give up, Nolan, just think of it as interest!
And this will set a good example! When people start talking about this, the
  other merchants will get scared of us and abandon their evil ways.

Jenon:
Unfortunately the villains who prey on the weak are as numerous as the stars.
And examples like this and their own bad reputations have not been enough to
  change anything so far.
Anyways, we should start our negotiations, don't you think?

Garlot:
Right. I'll leave it to you.
(Not enough to change anything, huh?
If I think about it calmly, that is true...
But will changing things little by little like we've been doing really work?
No, it doesn't look that way at all.
What do we have to do to fix this messed up world...)


---------------------Vs.---------------------                         [Map3.05]
--Garlot vs. David
| Garlot:
| You! You're one of Nolan's lackeys!
|
| David:
| Hey now, don't misunderstand me. I'm merely a laborer trying to put food on
|   the table.
|
| Garlot:
| That doesn't change that you're working for him!  I'll clear you all out
|   together!
|
|---VICTORY
| Garlot:
| See this!! This is our power!
|
| David:
| Hey, not bad there, kid. Good job.
|
| Garlot:
| Tch, stop making fun of me...!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Garlot:
| Tch, I messed up! Still, next time...!
|
| David:
| You seem so sure of yourself. However, I hope you don't expect 'next time' to
|   continue forever.
-----

--Shiskia vs. David------------------------------------
| David:
| What's this, I'm up against a girl? Pay attention now, or you might get hurt!
|
| Shiskia:
| Don't underestimate me!
|
| David:
| Oo, scary...
|
|---VICTORY
| David:
| Hm. Not a bad show, kid...
|
| Shiskia:
| What a weak finish! Is that all you've got?
|
| David:
| You'd best not make grownups too angry.
|
|---DEFEAT
| David:
| Don't take grownups lightly, brat!
|
| Shiskia:
| Don't call me that! And don't get cocky just because you won one round!
-----

--Jenon vs. David--------------------------------------
| David:
| Such young and spirited brats, playing a game of virtuous outlaws! Youth sure
|   is nice...
|
| Jenon:
| If you think we're just playing, you won't mind leaving, right old man!
|
| David:
| Sorry, but I've got a job to do. I can't just pull out whenever I want.
|
|---VICTORY
| David:
| Not bad, swordsman. You've got some talent there.
|
| Jenon:
| You are quite skilled as well!
|
| David:
| Heh, if you want to be respectful, go ahead.
|
|---DEFEAT
| Jenon:
| Kh, I took this too lightly...
|
| David:
| You're not bad. How about you come back after you train some more, little
|   swordsman.
|
| Jenon:
| You've merely caught me off guard!
-----


------------------Locations------------------                         [Map3.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary 
A district in the western part of the provincial city Tiera, where the poor 
live huddled close together


---------------------Loss--------------------                         [Map3.08]
Defeat - Unit Death (1st)

In a fight with the private army hired by the merchant Nolan, the Blazing 
Outlaws lost a crucial member and never recovered...


=========================================================================[Map4]
大人達のルール
Grownups' Rules
Tiera, Northern Nesar District


----------------Before Battle----------------                         [Map4.02]
Shiskia:
It's past time, they're late......

Garlot:
Nolan, it looks like you've been abandoned.
Oh well, we'll hang him up on the castle walls as an example.

Nolan:
Ghiii! Wait, please! They'll come, David will definitely come!!

Jenon:
Garlot, let's wait a little longer. No matter how evil someone may be, that
  should be our last resort.

Shiskia:
Garlot, Jenon! They're here.

|-----------------|
|      SORTIE     |
|-Follow my Lead!-|
|-----------------|

David:
Yo, if it isn't the ambitious youths, we meet again! Now then, is our employer
  safe?

Garlot:
As you can see, he's just fine. Though if you had been a little later I
  couldn't say the same.

Nolan:
David! Hurry up and give them the money!

Jenon:
As was written in the letter, the terms of his release are all the things he's
  stolen and 3000 gold pieces.

Garlot:
And then all of you have to confess to your crimes and reform. And you have to
  swear to do so in writing.

David:
I see you're still sticking with that nonsense from last time. That's fine, but
  I've got nothing for you.

Garlot:
What do you mean by that?

David:
Really, think about my situation for a minute.
If we give you guys our boss's fortune, when are we gonna get paid?

Jenon:
......Then you mean to break your promise?

David:
I don't remember promising anything. This was all decided without us.

Jenon:
We won't release Nolan.

David:
In all honesty, I'm quite grateful for that.

Nolan:
What? What are you saying, David! Save me, that's an order!

David:
Sorry, boss. Honestly, we thought you had died already, so we helped ourselves
  to some of your fortune.
Hey, do it......

Mercenary:
Yes sir.

|-------------------|
|       SNIPED      |
|-A Technical Shot!-|
|-------------------|

Nolan:
Ugaaaaaaaa!

David:
Aaah, our boss, master Nolan was killed in an ambush by the Blazing Outlaws.

Nolan:
De- David... w- why you.........

David:
Rest easy, boss. With this money you paid us, we will show these villains your
  revenge.

|------------------------|
|      LOSS OF LIFE      |
|-One Mere Common Death.-|
|------------------------|

Nolan:
Gh, ughaa......

Garlot:
H- hey, Nolan!

Shiskia:
No way! I don't believe this!!

David:
Hey now, what's this...... We just killed a horrible person. You guys should be
  thanking us.

Jenon:
What! Are you saying we should just accept this senseless cruelty...?

Garlot:
No way, Jenon. This is unforgivable. We'll defeat these guys.

David:
Oh, the allies of justice have appeared. Aah, youth really is nice.
Alright, come on. I'll show you what the world is really like.

  /--Victory--------------
 / Don't allow David to get away with his wrongdoing!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
     Any of your units die...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Garlot:
Damn, you've got to be kidding me!

Jenon:
Garlot, calm down! We all understand, right. We have to use unions to win this.

Shiskia:
Why can't grownups ever think about anyone but themselves......


------------------Mid Battle-----------------                         [Map4.03]
David:
You guys really are quite talented. You've got a bright future ahead of you.
So, how about we all just call this off, so that you can keep that future.

Garlot:
What happened to defeating the villains who murdered Nolan?

David:
Don't misunderstand me, as a rule, I always finish my work, but I've taken
  liking to you guys.

Garlot:
You think we want someone like you to like us!!
We're fighting to put an end to all the senseless cruelty in this world!

David:
Yeah, but, with so many people to fight, don't you think you'll lose?

Shiskia:
Justice cannot be defeated!

Garlot:
That's right, even if we lose our lives, if it's for our ideals, it's okay.

David:
Ouch, wow, are you really that naive...... Tch, you guys suck.

???:
Agh, I can't watch this anymore. Once you die, that's it; you don't get to talk
  about ideals ever again!

|------------------------------|
|            ASSAULT           |
|-An Elite Battalion Appeared!-|
|------------------------------|

David:
Huh? Who are you?

Dark-Skinned Warrior:
The name's Medoute. I'm a traveling warrior.
Unfortunately, whenever I see some nasty guy I really want to clobber them. It
  may be a bit immature, but...
You guys are the Blazing Outlaws, right, I'll back you up!

  -----------------------------------------------------
AFTER MEDOUTE'S FIRST ATTACK

Shiskia:
Wow... she swings that big axe like it weighs nothing!

Medoute:
Leave these guys to me! You guys focus on the enemy in front of you!

Jenon:
Tanned skin, long hair, such skill with an axe, beautiful......
Hey, Garlot! Who is she, an acquaintance of yours? Can you introduce us?

Garlot:
......There goes Jenon's bad habit again.


-----------------After Battle----------------                         [Map4.04]
David:
Damn, we've lost considerable numbers!

|    |
|    |         DRIVEN BACK THE ENEMY
| /\ | The traitor David has been repelled!!
|/  \| 

David:
Retreat to Cattle Bridge! Everyone stay sharp and gather over here!

|------------------|
|      RETREAT     |
|-Time to Regroup.-|
|------------------|

Mercenary:
Commander David!

  -----------------------------------------------------
Garlot:
Damn, now you run, David!! Shiskia, Jenon, quickly, after them!

Shiskia:
......R- right.

Medoute:
Will you hold on just a minute. If you rush in without a plan, they'll just get
  away again.

Garlot:
Look, I'm grateful for your help just now.
But, this fight has nothing to do with you. Don't get in our way.

Medoute:
Unbelievable... Often before now you guys could barely manage to survive.
"Justice can't lose," just what were you saying!
Because you were losing, you felt like you could say something so insincere
  without concern.
But what exactly is justice?

Shiskia:
T- that's......

Medoute:
And answer me one more thing; had I not helped you, what would have happened?

Shiskia:
That's......
That's right...... most likely we'd all have been killed.

Garlot:
...............

Shiskia:
Sorry Garlot, but it really felt that way.

Jenon:
I agree with Shiskia. If it were just us, most likely......

Garlot:
I was... David, he......

Medoute:
Not forgiving the senselessness of the world. Not accepting such ideas. I
  understand your feelings all too well.
However, you must have the power and wisdom to back up your will. You can
  understand that.
Plainly speaking, your tactics are a mess. Up 'til now you've merely gotten
  lucky.

Garlot:
I don't know about any of that...... but we have neither power nor wisdom for
  that.

Medoute:
I may have over spoken a little. If I offended you I apologize.
Oh, yes, umm, you......

Jenon:
Jenon. I am called Jenon.
I am the Blazing Outlaws' behind the scenes strategist. The tactics and
  planning are all my......

Medoute:
Right then, Junon...

Jenon:
It's Jenon.

Medoute:
Jenon, when they fled they said they'd be heading for the Cattle Bridge, yes?
Is the narrow road they ran down the quickest path there?

Jenon:
No, it's quite the roundabout way......

Medoute:
If I were them, I would organize the troops once I was near the bridge, and
  only then cross, don't you think?
After which, if no pursuers showed up, I would relax a bit, maybe lower my
  guard.

Jenon:
I see! If we hurry ahead of them, we can set up an ambush for them there.

Medoute:
This is your fight. The rest you should decide for yourselves.
However, you must not fight purely on emotion. Become stronger and smarter.

Jenon:
Amazing! Just amazing! The heavens have bestowed upon you valor, wisdom and
  beauty all at once!
Ah, Lady Medoute?

Shiskia:
Smooth as always, eh, Jenon.

Jenon:
Ahaha, you think so? Anyways, what should we do, Garlot?

Shiskia:
Someone got back on track real quick!

Garlot:
I......
If I think about it, I've gotten this far just following my feelings, and then
  saying that we'll manage somehow.
She's right.
I'm just frustrated...... Lend me your strength and wisdom, guys.

Shiskia:
Of course.

Jenon:
You needn't even ask, Garlot.


---------------------Vs.---------------------                         [Map4.05]
--Medoute vs. David
| David:
| What do you want; this is none of your business.
|
| Medoute:
| ...It's true that I'm an outsider.
| However I am a traveler. I don't pick the reasons that tie different groups
|   up in fights with each other.
|
| David:
| Yes, yes, I'm jealous...
|
|---VICTORY
| David:
| This woman is a really experienced fighter...!
|
| Medoute:
| What's wrong? Where'd all that confidence go!!
|
| David:
| You bitch!! I'll show you right now!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Medoute:
| Not bad. Very mercenary-like.
|
| David:
| What's with the posturing... Losers are supposed to pathetically beg for
|   their lives!
|
| Medoute:
| ...That's your preference. But even if I am not in a presentable state, I
|   have my own principles to uphold.
-----


------------------Locations------------------                         [Map4.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary 
A district in the western part of the provincial city Tiera, where the poor 
live huddled close together

   --石組みの小屋 - Stone Hut
The residence of a wizard highly knowledgeable in items

   --木組みの小屋 - Wooden Hut
Residence of a formerly famous map maker


--------------------On Map-------------------                         [Map4.07]
--街角の暗がり - Shaded Street Corner
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|    Hero Badge   |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| Hm? There's something on the ground...
| What's this...? Some kind of child's toy?
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| Hm? This is...
| Ah, these badges have been popular lately. Let's take it with us.
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| Oh? This is...
| ...If I pin this on will it look like my tastes are too childish?
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| Something's fallen here...
| ...A hero badge. Although it's man-made, finding it in a place like this...
-----

石組みの小屋 - Stone Hut-------------------------------------

Wizard:
Keh! ...Again my experiment failed.
Just what am I missing? The theory behind this is flawless...
As I thought, it must require the purest of elements...... Mumble, mumble...

--木組みの小屋 - Wooden Hut - FIRST TIME---------------------
|
|--------------------|
|     ACQUISITION    |
|-Received Treasure!-|
|    Treasure Map    |
|--------------------|
|
| Map Maker:
| I was once an adventurer who traveled all over the world.
| My dream has always been the same! To make a complete map of the world!!
| But now that I'm an old man that dream will never be realized. Boo-hoo-hoo...
| ...What? You say you'll take on that dream for me?
| ...No, no, youngins like you should have your own dreams. Your concern is
|   enough.
| Thank you for listening, young people. In return I'd like to give you this.
| Hm? No need to thank me. That map will be happier with you youngins.
|
|---AFTERWARDS
| Map Maker:
| When you youngins leave Tiera, you will realize the importance of knowing the
|   lay of the land.
| At that time, I am certain that a map will come in handy.
-----


---------------------Loss--------------------                         [Map4.08]
Defeat - Unit Death (1st)

In a fight with the mercenaries led by David, the Blazing Outlaws lost a 
crucial member and never recovered...


=========================================================================[Map5]
決戦、デイヴィド！
Decisive Battle with David!
Tiera, Eastern Nesar District


----------------Before Battle----------------                         [Map5.02]
Shiskia:
Jenon's taking a while to get in touch with us, don't you think.

Garlot:
...............

Shiskia:
What's wrong, Garlot?

Garlot:
I've been thinking about it since back then. She, Medoute, is right. I really
  am weak.
And we've just gambled through all our battles so far. That's why David was
  able to get away too.
I want to get stronger. Strong enough to topple the senseless cruelty that
  rules this world......

Shiskia:
Stronger, huh.
You've been saying that ever since we were little.

Garlot:
Having to rely on myself to survive, I had no choice but to get stronger if I
  didn't want to forget myself.

Shiskia:
......You're talking about your dad?

Garlot:
...............

Shiskia:
He was a horrible person. Every time we met you'd have more bruises.

Garlot:
...I wanted more power so that I wouldn't lose to his hatred.

Shiskia:
...Hey Garlot, do you remember back when we met?

Garlot:
I remember... We'd pretend to be virtuous outlaws. Only back then you were the
  leader and I was a follower.

Shiskia:
Isn't it nostalgic. We'd always sneak into the nobles' district, Nibel.
Thinking about it now, catching merchants because of how evil they were really
  influenced what we're doing.
It's a bit funny. Ehehe......

Garlot:
...............

Shiskia:
Garlot, you're you. I'm sure you'll get stronger.

Garlot:
Stronger, huh......

Jenon:
I've spotted David on the other side of the bridge! I get the feeling that he
  and his people are all exhausted.
Hm? What's wrong, Shiskia? Your face is red.

Shiskia:
It's nothing!

Jenon:
What are you getting mad for......

Mercenary:
Today certainly didn't make any sense.

David:
It's all you guys' fault! It's because you were careless that we've been beaten
  back this far.

Mercenary:
Huh? Just ours?

David:
Exactly! Tch, tonight we'll have to review your performance.

|---------------------|
|       ENCOUNTER     |
|-Enemies Just Ahead.-|
|---------------------|

David:
Hm? Who's there?

Garlot:
This time you won't get away......

David:
Come on, you guys again? Good grief, you're persistent. How about we all just
  stop fighting.

Garlot:
There's no way I'd let you get away with this! Get ready, David!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Crush David!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
     Any of your units die...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

David:
Just what is it you're after!? Money? Fame?

Garlot:
You killed your employer without a second thought. I'll never agree with such
  treachery!

David:
And what's wrong with treachery? It's the dishonest who survive. If you cheat,
  winning is easy!
That's the way the world works! You must understand at least that much!

Garlot:
So I'll just get stronger! And then I'll change these rules of the world!


-----------------After Battle----------------                         [Map5.03]
|    |
|    |     THE EVIL FALLS BY ALL MEANS!
| /\ | Crushed the mercenary leader David!!
|/  \| 

David:
I- impossible...... Am I really gonna die here?
No way...... Killed by these brats, damn it all......

|-----------------------|
|    KILLED IN ACTION   |
|-A Warrior has Fallen.-|
|-----------------------|

  -----------------------------------------------------
Garlot:
Did we- did we win?

Jenon:
Yeah, we managed somehow.

Shiskia:
Well, Medoute did give us good advice.
But you know, Garlot, I don't think you're weak at all.

???:
I congratulate you on defeating David.
Watching the way you fight has taught me of your hearts and your troubles.

Garlot:
Who's there...?

Sharp Eyed Man:
I believe you called yourselves the Blazing Outlaws. Well done.
Your excellence has surpassed all that I've heard of you.

Jenon:
I recognize him. He's a nobleman from the upper class district, by the name of
  count Velleman.

Shiskia:
Hmph, a noble. Alright then, your greatness, what need have you of a lowly
  outlaw gang like ours?

Velleman:
There's no need for such coldness. I merely wish to talk.

Shiskia:
We're not interested in what you have to say. C'mon, let's go.

Velleman:
Then, you've no desire for strength?

Garlot:
...............

Velleman:
Was it not you who said that you wish to become strong enough to change the
  world?

Garlot:
What's this......

Velleman:
I would like to hire all of you.
Work for me as my army. If you do that, you will be able to obtain all the
  strength you need.

Shiskia:
W- what are you saying......

Velleman:
Stand by my side and change this world! Young lions Bronquia!

Garlot:
Change... the world.

Velleman:
That's right, the world. This world infected by senseless cruelty.
No matter how righteous your objective may be, if you can't realize it, it is
  meaningless.
And if you have the power, if you are not ready to change the world, you may as
  well stop calling yourselves virtuous outlaws!

Jenon:
Count Velleman, I understand what you're saying, but first we'd like to...

Garlot:
Your name was count Velleman? I'm Garlot. I'm the leader of the Blazing
  Outlaws.
I'd like you to tell me some more about your offer.

Shiskia:
Garlot...?


------------------Locations------------------                         [Map5.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary 
A district in the western part of the provincial city Tiera, where the poor 
live huddled close together


-------------------PC Items------------------                         [Map5.07]
--橋のたもと - Foot of the Bridge
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|   Healing Herb  |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| Oh? This is...
| If I remember right, this plant is used in some medicines.
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| Ah, by any chance is that plant there...
| As I thought, these are medical herbs! They'll be useful if someone gets
|   hurt. Let's pick some.
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| There were some herbs around here when I looked around before...
| That's it! I've definitely seen this herb in a reference book before.
-----


---------------------Loss--------------------                         [Map5.08]
Defeat - Unit Death (1st)

In a fight with the mercenaries led by David, the Blazing Outlaws lost a 
crucial member and never recovered ...


=========================================================================[Map6]
力をこの手に
Grasp this Strength in Your Hands
Istraka Wilderness


----------------Before Battle----------------                         [Map6.02]
Shiskia:
Really, making us meet in such a sweltering place. A noble's thoughts don't
  make any sense.

Jenon:
It seemed to me that he just wants to talk somewhere where we can't be
  overheard.

Garlot:
That's it, most likely......

Jenon:
By the way, Garlot, what made you want to listen to count Velleman?

Garlot:
It's what David said. About those who deceive others being the ones to survive.

Shiskia:
Ehm, he did say that, but...... wasn't that just an excuse for all the bad
  things he's done?

Garlot:
I think that what he said is true.

Shiskia:
Eh? Well......

Garlot:
We can keep on defeating villains like Nolan.
But if that's all we do we'll be protecting nothing more than a section of
  Tiera.

Jenon:
We can't protect any other town much less the whole country. Is that what you
  mean?

Garlot:
If you don't sever the source of a stench, it won't disappear.
If we can't change the world, then our justice is nothing more than a lie.

Shiskia:
And to do that you want power from that nobleman?

Garlot:
Yeah.
Sorry guys. I acted before hearing your thoughts......

Jenon:
On the topic of count Velleman, I checked up on him a little, and he sure is a
  strange one.
He fashions himself as a reformist, and has been steadily gaining power. He's
  got quite a few enemies among the old nobility.
He's not necessarily lying when he says he wants to change the world.

Shiskia:
Sorry, Garlot. I don't have a good opinion of nobles, so I got a little
  emotional......
But if you want to do this I'll support you. We'll do it together, Garlot.

Jenon:
Yeah, I'll lend you my strength as well. And wisdom, of course.

Garlot:
Thanks, you two.

Velleman:
Sorry to keep you waiting, ladies and gentlemen of the Blazing Outlaws.

Garlot:
If we could get straight to the point, can you tell us more about making us
  your army?

Velleman:
I would have preferred to take more time, however it seems we must keep this
  short.
We have uninvited guests.

Garlot:
What?

|--------------|
|    ATTACK    |
|-Under Siege!-|
|--------------|

Velleman:
There are many enemies on the road I follow. Your job, if you become my
  soldiers, will be to remove them.
In doing so, you will gain the strength you desire. But first, I would like to
  give you this in greeting.

|--------------------|
|     ACQUISITION    |
|-Received Treasure!-|
|      Ace Guard     |
|--------------------|

Garlot:
I see, that's what you want from us. It's certainly easy enough to understand.
And, if our opponents are all bad guys, I can fight without worrying!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Protect Velleman from the bandits!!
/----------------

     ----------------------Defeat--/
        Any of your units die...  /
  The enemy reaches Velleman...  /
      Use up all your cards...  /
          ---------------------/

Jenon:
Listen up everyone, protecting count Velleman is our first priority! If we stay
  close, we can make sure he's safe.
The enemy's numbers are great. Watch for reinforcements, and move carefully.


------------------Mid Battle-----------------                         [Map6.03]
Shiskia:
There are too many of them......

|-------------------|
|  REINFORCEMENTS   |
|-Help has Arrived.-|
|-------------------|

Medoute:
You guys really are something. First you're outlaws, then you're a noble's
  army.

Jenon:
Such a beautiful, confident voice! Lady Medoute!

Garlot:
You said it yourself; if we have no power, we can't achieve our ideals.

Medoute:
I see...... Then you thought of my words when you made this decision.
In that case, I've an obligation to see this through to the end.
Well, that seems fun too. You can count me in!

Garlot:
Thanks, Medoute, you've saved us again.

Medoute:
By the way, I don't think I've caught your name.

Garlot:
It's Garlot.

Shiskia:
I'm Shiskia.

Jenon:
U-um......

Medoute:
Your name was Junon, right?

Jenon:
It's Jenon!

  -----------------------------------------------------
|    |
|    | PROTECTED AT THE RISK OF ONE'S LIFE
| /\ |     Defended count Velleman!!
|/  \| 

|-----------------------|
|    KILLED IN ACTION   |
|-A Warrior has Fallen.-|
|-----------------------|

|-------------------|
|  REINFORCEMENTS   |
|-Help has Arrived.-|
|-------------------|

Cerica's Unit:
Miss Cerica, it's them! The redhead and his gang!

Cerica:
Aaand, made it! At last we found you!
Commander David, Cerica will avenge you!

Jenon:
Reinforcements?

Garlot:
Isn't that that stupid girl......

Cerica:
How dare you call Cerica stupid again!!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Drive away the revenge seeking Cerica!!
/----------------

     ----------------------Defeat--/
        Any of your units die...  /
  The enemy reaches Velleman...  /
      Use up all your cards...  /
          ---------------------/

Cerica:
Cerica will definitely never forgive you for murdering commander David!

Garlot:
You're one of David's soldiers?

Jenon:
Hey, just a minute, Garlot. What's going on here?
First lady Medoute, and now this girl. How did you get surrounded by so many
  girls while I was gone?

Garlot:
How should I know! Can't this wait until after the battle!!


-----------------After Battle----------------                         [Map6.04]
|    |
|    |  THE FIRE YET BURNS BRIGHTLY!
| /\ | Successfully repelled Cerica!!
|/  \| 

Cerica:
What is this, why can't Cerica beat them?
That's it, we must have rushed into this, we weren't prepared. Yes, Cerica's
  sure of it!

|------------------|
|      RETREAT     |
|-Time to Regroup.-|
|------------------|

Cerica:
D- don't you forget! Cerica is definitely gonna beat you!

Medoute:
That girl, are you sure you want to let her go? She will target you again.

Garlot:
Leave her.
I don't want to chase someone with such sad eyes.

  -----------------------------------------------------
Velleman:
Your skills truly are wonderful. There is no doubt in my mind.
I would like to officially make you my private army. Will you take my offer?

Jenon:
First, count Velleman, I would like to know what your objectives are. Please
  tell us honestly.

Velleman:
The answer is simple. Once I firmly establish my status within the Empire, I
  can change this country.

Shiskia:
Then, you want to change the country?

Velleman:
Poverty, discrimination, draft, public unrest... all these things are a disease
  on the current Empire.
If things are left as they are, one day soon our Empire will crumble.
Someone must change these things from the ground up.
However, with change, there are sure to be those who oppose it.
The courtiers who cling to their interests, wealthy merchants, and of course
  the nobleman class!
In preparation for the clashes with political enemies that I expect will come,
  a military force is essential.

Jenon:
And that would be us. I see.

Medoute:
The speech was quite long; however, it really was simple. Brute force too is
  important.

Garlot:
Can you tell me one other thing.

Velleman:
Hm?

Garlot:
If I go with you, will I be able to change the world?

Velleman:
That will depend on what you do, Garlot.

Garlot:
...............

Velleman:
Will you come with me?

Garlot:
Yes, let's do this.

Velleman:
You call yourselves the Blazing Outlaws, am I right?

Garlot:
Yeah, we do.

Velleman:
My army calling themselves outlaws would be strange. It's best if from now on
  you take on name Gram Blaze.

Garlot:
Gram Blaze... An angry flame. Alright.
We'll show everyone how brightly our will burns. To change the Empire, we'll
  burn out all the senselessness in the world!


------------------Locations------------------                         [Map6.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
A vast beltway of exposed rock located northwest of Tiera


--------------------On Map-------------------                         [Map6.07]
--露出した岩肌 - Bare Stone
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|     Ogrenium    |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| The bare rocks here look tough...
| It looks to be good material for weapons. Let's take some along.
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| ...What's this, it looks like a normal rock, but it's got unusual strength.
|   Am I just imagining it?
| At a time like this it's best to trust your instincts! It could be useful for
|   something so let's take it.
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| Hm!? By any chance, is this what I've read about...
| That's it, I'm certain! It's natural ogrenium!
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| Ah, this is...
| It's natural ogrenium. I'll secure some.
-----


---------------------Loss--------------------                         [Map6.08]
Defeat - Reached Velleman (1st)

Velleman:
...You allowed the bandits get this far.
My own poor judgment is the cause of this, no more, no less.

|    |
|    |               IMPEDIMENT FAILED
| /\ | Count Velleman has fallen to a bandit's blade!
|/  \| 

In the battle with bandits in the wilderness, count Velleman was assassinated, 
and the Blazing Outlaws lost the opportunity to enter the world's stage...

Defeat - Unit Death (2nd)------------------------------

In a conflict with Cerica, who was seeking revenge for David, the Blazing 
Outlaws lost a crucial member and never recovered...


            =======================================================
                ***                Chapter 2                ***
                                腐敗する帝国に差す光
                ***   A Ray of Light in a Decaying Empire   ***
            =======================================================

=========================================================================[Map7]
フレアヴェルク上洛
Journey to Flarewerk
Ether Canyon - Eastern Part of the Plank Road


--------------------Intro--------------------                         [Map7.01]
The Blazing Outlaws led by Garlot, became employed by the nobleman, count 
Velleman, and were remade as his private army. And thus, Gram Blaze was born.

Once back in Tiera, they received their first orders; to protect count Velleman 
on his journey to the capital.

Along the way of what they expected to be a simple mission, Garlot learned that 
Tiera was not the only place affected by civil unrest, but that it spread 
throughout the whole country.


----------------Before Battle----------------                         [Map7.02]
Shiskia:
It's our third day on this plank road. I've even gotten used to how far away
  the ground is.
The problem just my feelings. It's because you can see over the cliff here.
But I don't feel like we're high up, so I'm not scared.

Jenon:
There are books that say that talking a lot is a sign of nervousness.

Garlot:
I see.

Shiskia:
What was that, Jenon! Don't talk about unnecessary things!

Jenon:
Ah, was I spot on?

Velleman:
They certainly are lively......

Medoute:
Should I get them to quiet down?

Velleman:
No, I don't mind. So long as they focus when it's time to work they can do what
  they want.

Medoute:
Everyone, quiet!

Velleman:
I said I don't mind.

Medoute:
It's not that, the work you spoke of has shown up.
Garlot, I hear rough footsteps coming this way! It's bandits!

|---------------------|
|        AMBUSH       |
|-Unexpected Enemies!-|
|---------------------|

Bandit:
What's this? Looks like we've caught some dangerous prey.
Are you by any chance bodyguards?
Hehehe, surrender peacefully if you value your lives. Drop all your valuables
  and we'll let you go.

Velleman:
Garlot, do you understand?

Garlot:
Hm...? What do you mean?

Velleman:
Right now the empire is teeming with this trash.

Garlot:
That's something that can't be helped, I suppose......

Velleman:
Gram Blaze, forward! Show these brigands the punishment for their crimes!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Drive away the bandits!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
     Any of your units die...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Medoute:
But, this is a bit of a problem...... It's a bit narrow to fight here.

Jenon:
In the case that the terrain is narrow, we must think carefully about how we
  want to form unions, and only then move.


------------------Mid Battle-----------------                         [Map7.03]
|-----------------------|
|    KILLED IN ACTION   |
|-A Warrior has Fallen.-|
|-----------------------|

Bandit:
N- no way......

|    |
|    |          ENEMY OVERWHELMED!
| /\ | Successfully destroyed the bandits!!
|/  \| 

Garlot:
That was no big deal. Honestly, I'm disappointed.

Velleman:
If mere brigands were a challenge for you, there would be no point in hiring
  you.

Shiskia:
Wait, Garlot! The enemy's presence hasn't vanished.

|-----------------|
|      SORTIE     |
|-Follow my Lead!-|
|-----------------|

Cerica:
I found you! Garlot and all you other guys!
Today Cerica is totally ready. Now, how about you die for Cerica!!

Shiskia:
That girl's showed up again......

  /--Victory--------------
 / Drive away the revenge seeking Cerica!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
     Any of your units die...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/


-----------------After Battle----------------                         [Map7.04]
|    |
|    |  THE FIRE YET BURNS BRIGHTLY!
| /\ | Successfully repelled Cerica!!
|/  \| 

Cerica:
Why can't Cerica win...... Are Cerica's feelings not strong enough!?

Medoute:
You'd best stop seeking revenge. It will create nothing but a chain of misery.

Cerica:
Be quiet! What do you know about what Cerica is feeling!

Shiskia:
Cerica, you...

???:
What is all this commotion?

|---------------------|
|       ENCOUNTER     |
|-Enemies Just Ahead.-|
|---------------------|

Jenon:
The twin blade banner... That's Emperor Soltier's personal guard!

Cerica:
Aah, someone else is getting in the way... We'll back off for today!

|------------------|
|      RETREAT     |
|-Time to Regroup.-|
|------------------|

Cerica:
Garlot! Cerica will have your head, be sure of that!

  -----------------------------------------------------
Medoute:
Emperor Soltier, due to a pact with a demon dragon, he stands at the summit of
  this country.

Shiskia:
Demon dragon, hmph... He's certainly got the face of a villain.

Jenon:
Sh! Shiskia, he'll hear you.

Soltier:
Well, well, if it isn't Velleman. What happened, I heard the sounds of a
  battle.

Velleman:
Yes, your Majesty. We had encountered some brigands.

Soltier:
I see. By the way, is this your army?

Velleman:
That is correct. Lately there have been brigands just like these along the main
  highways.

Soltier:
And from what I saw, the red-headed one is the leader. What is your name?

Garlot:
......Isn't it good manners to give your name first?

Imperial Guard Leader:
Why you! How dare you speak to his majesty in such a way!!

Soltier:
It's fine, Lapis. It is merely his poor breeding showing.

Garlot:
What did you say!

Soltier:
I wouldn't be surprised if this one started out as a bandit himself. I won't
  bother to ask for his name again.
Anyways, back up, Velleman. I am busy inspecting the western area.

Shiskia:
Wait, wait!

Velleman:
As you wish.

Shiskia:
What was that, Velleman! Don't bow down to someone like that!

Velleman:
What do you think would happen if we oppose the emperor now? Such a lack of
  tact would get us executed, and nothing would change.
This is different from my letting you address me without a title.
At the moment we must have patience.

Shiskia:
Agh! It's this attitude that makes you guys nobles.

Medoute:
We understand your feelings, Shiskia, but for now, control yourself.

Shiskia:
I know! But if it's something I don't agree with, I'm not gonna agree with it!

Jenon:
Good grief, Shiskia and Garlot... You two are so energetic even in this
  heat......

Garlot:
What's that supposed to mean, Jenon.

Jenon:
It doesn't mean anything!


---------------------Vs.---------------------                         [Map7.05]
--Garlot vs. Cerica
| Garlot:
| You're really persistent, you know.
|
| Cerica:
| Cerica doesn't mind! As long as Cerica can kill you, nothing else matters!
|
|---VICTORY
| Garlot:
| Stop this already. You can't beat us.
|
| Cerica:
| Shut up! Cerica's already decided to take revenge for commander David!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Cerica:
| Cerica's not satisfied yet... Cerica will make you suffer slowly!
-----

--Shiskia vs. Cerica-----------------------------------
| Cerica:
| You're disgusting! You're just an idiot trying to attract boys!
|
| Shiskia:
| I don't want to talk to you! Do you think you're special!?
|
|---VICTORY
| Cerica:
| Uugh, disgusting! You're really disgusting!
|
| Shiskia:
| No one likes insistent girls like you!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Cerica:
| Feel the pain commander David felt!
-----

--Jenon vs. Cerica-------------------------------------
| Cerica:
| Ah? You're also one of Garlot's friends! In that case, Cerica'll get rid of
|   you!!
|
| Jenon:
| I don't really want to fight with girls...
|
| Cerica:
| Don't ignore Cerica!!
|
|---VICTORY
| Cerica:
| Cerica's not done yet!
|
| Jenon:
| Honestly, fighting with girls makes me look bad......
|
|---DEFEAT
| Cerica:
| Cerica will never, never, never forgive you!
|
| Jenon:
| What's with her......
-----

--Medoute vs. Cerica-----------------------------------
| Cerica:
| She's always got that big axe...
| ...T- that's fine! Fighting is not about size, it's about substance! And
|   talent and technique!
| Carrying something so big must make her shoulders stiff. Yes, Cerica is sure!
| That's Cerica's conclusion!
| Don't get cocky just 'cause you can carry something that big!
|
| Medoute:
| ...What exactly are you angry about?
|
|---VICTORY
| Cerica:
| Cerica won't stand for that kind of attack!
|
| Medoute:
| Such a tough guy.
|
|---DEFEAT
| Cerica:
| So, how's that big axe working for you. Is it just for decoration?
-----


------------------Locations------------------                         [Map7.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
A key route connecting the imperial capital to Tiera, overlooking the Ether 
Canyon


--------------------On Map-------------------                         [Map7.07]
--渓谷の岩壁 - Cliff Wall
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|     Obsidian    |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| A pure black rock, how unusual...
| It looks quite strong too. Let's take it.
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| A black mineral.
| I bet with a bit of work, it could be made into a weapon.
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| The rock face here is black... It looks like it's made of different stone.
| A workshop may be able to make it into a weapon.
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| Ah, this wall here...
| As I thought, it's made of obsidian. If we sell it to a merchant we could
|   make quite a fortune.
-----


---------------------Loss--------------------                         [Map7.08]
Defeat - Unit Death (1st)

In the battle with the bandits terrorizing the plank road above Ether Canyon, 
Gram Blaze lost a crucial member and never recovered...

Defeat - Out of Cards (2nd)----------------------------

In a conflict with Cerica, who was vehement on revenge for David, Gram Blaze 
was scattered due to a flaw in tactics, and was forced to disband...


=========================================================================[Map8]
駆けてきた姉妹
The Sisters that Came Running
Marquis Albert's Dominion - Downtown


--------------------Intro--------------------                         [Map8.01]
Forcing his way through the company's third confrontation with Cerica was the 
man standing at the summit of the Bronquian empire, emperor Soltier.

His rude and arrogant attitude irritated the members of Gram Blaze but it was 
obvious that before his overwhelming authority, there was nothing they could
do.

Later, once count Velleman finished his business in the imperial capital 
Flarewerk, he commanded his army to protect him on the return trip to Tiera.

On the way they stopped by the territory of the nobleman Albert, and Garlot's 
path crossed with that of two girls.


----------------Before Battle----------------                         [Map8.02]
Velleman:
What did you think of the capital? I believe it was your first time there?

Garlot:
The constant stink of money was exhausting. Even if I could I wouldn't want to
  live there.

Shiskia:
That city was full of people I didn't like, along with that emperor.

Jenon:
You really hate the emperor that much, Shiskia?

Shiskia:
Huh? Well, there's nothing likable about him. Or do you not think so, Jenon?
I mean, just thinking about it makes me mad.

Girl with a Crutch:
Hah..., ha...... h- help, save my sister......

Medoute:
Hm? What happened?

Jenon:
Looks like your leg is injured, are you alright?

Girl with a Crutch:
I'm fine......
More importantly, my sister! Please! My sister took up a sword to allow me to
  escape, and is fighting even now!

Garlot:
Where can we find her!

Velleman:
Wait, Garlot! Don't get involved carelessly without knowing who the enemy is!
To start with, who are you? Why are you being targeted by these assassins?

Girl with a Crutch:
I am called Luciana. But for now, more importantly......

Luciana:
At any rate, Please hurry! Save my sister! Save Aegina!

Garlot:
You heard her, Velleman! We can't abandon them.

Velleman:
Hey, I said wait!!

   /--Victory--------------
  / Rescue Luciana's sister, Aegina!!
 / (Place a unit next to Aegina)
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
               Garlot dies...  /
       Aegina is defeated...  /
   Use up all your cards...  /
       ---------------------/

Luciana:
My sister likely moved alongside the river during the fight.

Garlot:
I got it...... Saving her is our first priority. Let's go!


------------------Mid Battle-----------------                         [Map8.03]
Aegina:
Hah, hah... I hope Sis escaped safely......

Assassin:
...............

Aegina:
If I manage to break through here, I must meet up with her......

  -----------------------------------------------------
|----------------------------------|
|               RESCUE             |
|-Valiant Blade Delivers its Lord.-|
|----------------------------------|

--APPROACH WITH - GARLOT
| Aegina:
| You are?
|
| Garlot:
| I'm Garlot. Your sister is fine, come this way!
|
| Aegina:
| ......Thank goodness. Big Sis is really alright.
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| Are you Aegina! You look just like your sister......
|
| Aegina:
| You are?
|
| Shiskia:
| I'm Shiskia. But we'll leave the introductions for later. We're here on your
|   sister's request.
|
| Aegina:
| ......Thank goodness. Big Sis is really alright.
|
| Shiskia:
| Don't worry. Now, let's finish up here!
|
|---JENON
| Aegina:
| You are?
|
| Jenon:
| We're here to save you at your sister's request. My name's Jenon, pleasure to
|   meet you.
|
| Aegina:
| ......Thank goodness. Big Sis is really alright. Thank you so much.
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Aegina:
| You are?
|
| Medoute:
| Are you Aegina? Your sister has asked us to save you.
|
| Aegina:
| ......Thank goodness. Big Sis is really alright. Thank you so much.
|
| Medoute:
| If you wish to thank us, help us clear this place out!
-----

|    |
|    |          THIS LIFE TOO CAN BE SAVED
| /\ | Successfully rescued Luciana's sister, Aegina!!
|/  \| 

Garlot:
Alright! Aegina's safe!

|-------------------|
|  REINFORCEMENTS   |
|-Help has Arrived.-|
|-------------------|

Assassin:
Master Zilva, someone has assisted the target.

Zilva:
The sisters won't escape. ......They must not.

  /--Victory--------------
 / Drive away the assassins surrounding Aegina!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
     Garlot or Aegina dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Garlot:
Who the hell are these guys? Why are they after Aegina?

Aegina:
...............

  -----------------------------------------------------
|------------------|
|      RETREAT     |
|-Time to Regroup.-|
|------------------|

Zilva:
......An error?
Continuing any longer on this front is impossible. Everyone, we retreat this
  time.


-----------------After Battle----------------                         [Map8.04]
|    |
|    |          DRIVEN BACK THE ENEMY
| /\ | Repelled the assassins chasing the sisters!!
|/  \| 

Garlot:
What was that. I've never met anyone like them before. Were they even human?

Aegina:
...............

  -----------------------------------------------------
Luciana:
Thank you so much for your help.
Now, let us start over. I am called Luciana. This is my younger sister, Aegina.

Shiskia:
Are you two twins?

Luciana:
Yes.

Shiskia:
When you stand next to each other, I can't tell you apart.

Luciana:
Now then, let's go Aegina. We should gather our belongings and be ready to
  leave.

Aegina:
Wait, Sis! There's no way you'd be able to travel with your leg in such a
  state.

Luciana:
Yes but, now that Lord Albert has died, we have no place to stay.

Velleman:
Wait, you don't mean the marquis Albert that owns these lands.

Luciana:
......Yes. Marquis Albert was our foster father.

Aegina:
Lord Albert was the one who protected us from the Divine Order.

Garlot:
The Divine Order... I've never heard of them. Are they the guys we fought with
  back there?

Jenon:
Lady Luciana, I must agree with your sister. You will not be able to travel in
  such a state. You should reconsider.

Shiskia:
That's right. The next time you're attacked there's no way you'll escape.

Luciana:
Unfortunately we have no other alternative.

Velleman:
In that case why don't the two of you join Gram Blaze?

Luciana:
What are you suggesting?

Velleman:
If you're surrounded by troops they can protect you from an attack. And in
  exchange you can add to our strength.

Garlot:
Are you sure it's alright?

Velleman:
You are surprised?

Jenon:
I see, that's what you're after. Count Velleman, am I correct in saying that
  you are after this city?

Velleman:
That's right... you two were adopted by the marquis. In other words, you are
  naturally his successors.
If you join Gram Blaze I will become your guardian.
Thus, until you come of age, the marquis's lands will in reality be controlled
  by me.
That is my condition in exchange for your protection. Well, do you accept?

Shiskia:
Ummm, that's kinda dirty, and yet at the same time...

Aegina:
......Sister.

Luciana:
Yes, we will accept your proposal. But we have a condition of our own.
Could you please call us just Luciana and Aegina, without adding any titles?

Medoute:
Then it's decided. But now let's get Luciana off that leg so that it can heal.

Velleman:
Answer me just one more question. Who are your real parents?

Luciana:
......My apologies, we don't know that either.

Aegina:
...............


---------------------Vs.---------------------                         [Map8.05]
--Garlot vs. Zilva
| Garlot:
| That armor, and the way she moves. Who is she...?
|
| Zilva:
| ...............
|
|---VICTORY
| Garlot:
| She's totally different from anyone I've fought until now......
|
| Zilva:
| ...............
|
|---DEFEAT
| Zilva:
| ...I will remove this obstacle.
|
| Garlot:
| Kh, that's some strength! Everyone, stay on your guard!
-----

--Shiskia vs. Zilva------------------------------------
| Shiskia:
| You're a girl?
|
| Zilva:
| There are no men and women in battle......
|
|---VICTORY
| Shiskia:
| I was right, you are a girl!
|
| Zilva:
| What about it......
|
|---DEFEAT
| Shiskia:
| What accurate aim... I don't really want to follow your example, though.
|
| Zilva:
| ...............
-----

--Jenon vs. Zilva--------------------------------------
| Jenon:
| I don't know why you're doing this, but going after two girls with such
|   numbers is crazy!
|
| Zilva:
| And who exactly are you? Why are you getting in my way?
|
|---VICTORY
| Jenon:
| Aren't you a girl?
|
| Zilva:
| ...............
-----

--Medoute vs. Zilva------------------------------------
| Medoute:
| Such cold eyes...... You must have been killing for a long time now.
|
| Zilva:
| ...............
|
|---VICTORY
| Medoute:
| I can't feel a purpose behind her fighting...... Is she really human!?
|
| Zilva:
| ...............
|
|---DEFEAT
| Medoute:
| She's got no fighting spirit or bloodlust... I can't read her attacks.
|
| Zilva:
| ...............
-----

--Aegina vs. Zilva-------------------------------------
| Zilva:
| Target Beta captured. Eliminating......
|
| Aegina:
| I will not die here! We'll definitely survive!
|
|---VICTORY
| Aegina:
| You're a pursuer from the kingdom, aren't you!
|
| Zilva:
| ...............
|
|---DEFEAT
| Aegina:
| You're a pursuer from the kingdom, aren't you!
|
| Zilva:
| ...............
-----


------------------Locations------------------                         [Map8.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
The territory of marquis Albert, located west of Tiera

   --中枢都市ダーム - Central City Darm
Composed of garrison offices, the city is a place of gathering for the 
territory's important organizations

   --鍛冶屋オヤカタ - Master Blacksmith
Shop built by a blacksmith who sold his name

   --デシの家 - Apprentice's House
The home to the youth studying under the blacksmith


--------------------On Map-------------------                         [Map8.07]
--北の路傍 - Near the Northern Road
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|    Shiny Coin   |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| Hm...?
| Isn't that a coin? I guess I'll take it.
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| Ah?
| A coin!
| N- no one's watching, right... I'll just pick it up.
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| Oh? Something's lying over here...
| ...Selfish. Sheesh.
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| Hm?
| A coin? It would be of more use if we picked it up, rather than leaving it to
|   lie at the side of the road.
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| Oh, there's something here...
| A coin. It couldn't hurt to take it along.
-----

--西の往来 - Western Highway-------------------------------
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|    Hair Band    |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| Oh?
| This is something girls put in their hair... I guess we'll take it.
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| Ah?
| A hair band. ...It's beautifully decorated.
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| Oh?
| A girl's hair band. It's unfortunate we don't know who it belongs to so that
|   we could return it.
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| Hm?
| A hair band. It must belong to someone in town...
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| Ah, this is...
| Sister's hair band. She must have dropped it trying to get away.
-----

--西マーケット - Western Market------------------------------

|----------------------|
|      ACQUISITION     |
| -Received Treasure!- |
|Imperial Warfare Earth|
|----------------------|

Merchant:
...Ah, you look like a pretty swell guy.
Alright, I'll give you something nice. They do say it is difficult to be a
  soldier.
Hm? You're asking if it's really alright? Well, of course.
Weapon merchants like myself like to have some live coals. One or two tactical
  guides are cheap. Kukuku...

--船宿の路地 - Road near Boathouse--------------------------
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|  Religious Coin |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| Oh? There's something here...
| A strange coin. I suppose I'll take it.
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| Ah, someone dropped something...
| This coin's got a funny emblem... I'll keep it for now.
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| Hm...? This is...
| I've never seen this emblem before... Where is this coin from?
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| Hm? This is...
| ...This coin has a curious pattern. It would not be widely accepted.
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| This is...
| The emblem of the Divine Order... They made this coin.
-----

--船宿の軒下 - Under a Boathouse Overhang-------------------
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|       Rope      |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| Hm? There's something rolled up here...
| A rope for anchoring ships... Maybe it'll come in handy for something.
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| This sure is a big boathouse...
| There's a hemp rope lying around. Maybe it'll come in handy for something.
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| The water flows through a channel here. I see. That's really clever.
| And then, these ropes are used to secure the ships to land.
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| This is quite a large boathouse. If we use this building as a shield, we can
|   effectively scatter the enemy.
| Oh? This is...
| An anchoring rope. I wonder if we could find a use for it.
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| There are quite a few ropes here...
| I wonder if we could use it for something. Shall we borrow some?
-----

--東マーケット - Eastern Market------------------------------

|-----------------------|
|       ACQUISITION     |
|  -Received Treasure!- |
|Imperial Warfare Heaven|
|-----------------------|

Priest:
The city has gotten quite turbulent...
Eh? You are fighting with the group that has snuck in? I see...
...We cannot fight, so we leave it to those who can, and hope for peace as soon
  as possible. 
If you could, please take this.
I cannot thank you enough. In your eyes I have seen the flames of justice.
I will entrust you righteous ones with this power. May fortune favor your
  battles...

--デシの家 - Apprentice's Home - FIRST TIME----------------
|
|-----------------------|
|       ACQUISITION     |
|  -Received Treasure!- |
|Obsidian -> Black Brand|
|-----------------------|
|
| Apprentice:
| Hmm!? This reaction... You, you have obsidian, don't you! Yes, you do!!
| See, I was sure you had some! Wait just a minute and I will make a weapon of
|   a superior quality!
| Don't worry! It's sure to be good! How about it!?
| ...It'll be fine, I said don't worry!
| Finished!! Here, take this!
| I feel the magic surging from this... I'm a sinful craftsman to complete such
|   a sword so quickly...
|
|---AFTERWARDS
| Apprentice:
| Ah, thanks for last time! It was good practice!
| If you have other raw materials, how about visiting my master's workshop?
| ...My master is a pushy character, but he is very skilled.
|
|---NO OBSIDIAN
| Apprentice:
| For this weapon to have magic... How about this material, maybe this one...
| ......It won't work! As I thought, the material must be able to resonate with
|   magic!
| ...Aah, who would have some good material I could use?
-----

--鍛冶屋オヤカタ - Master Blacksmith - FIRST TIME-------------
|
|----------------------|
|      ACQUISITION     |
| -Received Treasure!- |
|Ogrenium -> Ogre Blade|
|----------------------|
|
| Master:
| Oh!? You. You've got some good materials with you!?
| Let's see, let me borrow it! I'll be able to make a good weapon!
| So, will you lend it to me! I promise you won't regret it!
| ...It'll be fine, give it here!!
| There, done!
| There you go! You can't regret such fine craftsmanship!
|
|---AFTERWARDS
| Master:
| I've not had such a satisfying job in a long time... I'll sleep well tonight!
| If you have other materials visit my apprentice. He may not be an expert yet,
|   but he is quite skilled.
| ...His main flaw is that he doesn't listen to others well.
|
|---NO OGRENIUM
| Master:
| Kh, I'd like to make weapons, but there's no good materials anywhere...
| Ordinary materials won't work! Someone of my skill must have superior
|   materials!
| ...Sigh, No use crying over this. It won't get me materials... Sniffle...
-----

--ミリアの廃屋 - Miria's House-------------------------------
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|  A Girl's Diary |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| There's no furniture or anything else in here, but the floor and walls are
|   new... Did this family move out recently?
| Hm? This is...
| They must have forgotten it while moving out.
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| There's no one here... And no signs that anyone lives here. Looks like it's
|   an unoccupied house.
| Ah?
| What a cute journal. They must have forgotten it.
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| The stove is covered with dust. This house must have been abandoned.
| What's this?
| What a cute diary. It must have belonged to a girl.
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| I was right about this place being unoccupied. I'd best not stay here long...
| Hm? This is...
| A girl's diary. It must have belonged to the previous owners.
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| If I remember right, this is where Miria lives.
| There's no one here... Did they move out?
| A diary... Looks like they forgot it.
-----


---------------------Loss--------------------                         [Map8.08]
Defeat - Aegina Annihilated (1st)

|-----------------------|
|    KILLED IN ACTION   |
|-A Warrior has Fallen.-|
|-----------------------|

Aegina:
If I fall here... what of out revenge...?

|    |
|    |                IMPEDIMENT FAILED
