| /\ | Aegina has fallen at the hands of the assassins!
|/  \| 

The group moved to save Luciana's sister from assassins, yet Aegina's life was 
lost. The Gram Blaze, crushed one by one, was annihilated...

Defeat - Garlot Defeated (2nd)-------------------------

|-----------------------|
|    KILLED IN ACTION   |
|-A Warrior has Fallen.-|
|-----------------------|

Garlot:
D- damn...!  I took them too lightly...

|    |
|    |             DEATH OF A HERO
| /\ | Gram Blaze's captain, Garlot, has fallen!
|/  \| 

While fighting the mysterious assassins after Luciana and Aegina's lives, Gram 
Blaze's captain, Garlot, lost his life, and Gram Blaze vanished from history's 
stage...


=========================================================================[Map9]
戦士と狂気
A Soldier and Madness
Remote Northern Territory - Imperial Garrison


--------------------Intro--------------------                         [Map9.01]
Having been rescued from mysterious pursuers in Marquis Albert's domain, the 
sisters Luciana and Aegina joined the Gram Blaze in an arrangement with count 
Velleman.

Despite the unexpected increase in troops, Count Velleman did not think that 
his private army was yet strong enough.

Therefore, he chose his next target: the previous commanding officer of 
Flarewerk's garrison, who had been demoted by the current administration. The 
man was currently leading the army in a remote northern garrison, known to his 
soldiers as "The Mad Knight".

With a man so knowledgeable in the arts of war so their side, Velleman's troops 
would receive much better training.

Heading for the remote garrison by the northern border under the pretence of an 
inspection by the nobleman, count Velleman, Gram Blaze was ordered to find out 
if the man would make a valuable asset, and if so pressure him to join.


----------------Before Battle----------------                         [Map9.02]
Shiskia:
I've heard of the northern border before, but I never expected it to be this
  far away...

Jenon:
We are pretty close now. We should be able to see it soon. Hm, are you getting
  tired, Shiskia?

Shiskia:
Not tired, just a little cold......

Garlot:
But we've come quite far...... Won't we reach the end of the world if we keep
  going like this?

Medoute:
Hmhm, far, you say...... Garlot, this country's territory makes up only a small
  part of the world.
And besides, there's no end to the world.

Garlot:
No end? How does that work?

Medoute:
Strictly speaking, there is a limited amount of space. However, our world is a
  sphere. That's why I said there's no end.

Garlot:
Sphere? You mean it's round?

Jenon:
You didn't know that, Garlot?

Shiskia:
Hold on a sec, isn't the ground flat? There's no way it could be round.

Medoute:
Actually, I've sailed around the world once in a ship.

Garlot:
I see, round, huh...... And, around the whole world; you're really something,
  Medoute.

Shiskia:
Agh, Garlot! Don't believe everything so easily!

Medoute:
Oh? Isn't that the imperial army?

Garlot:
Way to change the subject......

Shiskia:
Agh!!

|-----------------|
|      SORTIE     |
|-Follow my Lead!-|
|-----------------|

Commander in Black Armor:
Hey, you there in the right flank! You're advancing too slow!

Private:
M- my apologies......

Commander in Black Armor:
Your weakness has thrown the whole group off! Come up front and face judgment!

Officer:
......With all due respect, supreme commander Leon, after such hard training
  every day the soldiers are nearing exhaustion.
And, is it not excessive to judge someone for a single mistake?
Please, give the soldiers a chance to rest...

Leon:
Moron! There's no rest on the battlefield! Only a weakling would think this is
  hard training!!
I'll make you regret trying my temper like this! Go die in shame!!

Jenon:
......Hmm. He is quite the stern man.

Medoute:
Maybe, but his ability as a commander is somewhat questionable, don't you
  think? He might end up killing his troops.

Garlot:
I agree, we can't just leave this be... Let's go stop him.
That's enough, supreme commander Leon!

Leon:
Huh, who the hell are you......

Garlot:
We have come to examine your training on orders from count Velleman.
Wasn't that soldier just a bit slow? Isn't it too much to judge him just for
  something like that?

Leon:
What did you say...... What would a nobleman's dog like you know about military
  training.

Jenon:
Garlot, what do you think about him?

Garlot:
It's pointless. I wouldn't trust him. I won't ask him to join.

Medoute:
I agree, this isn't worth worrying over.

Garlot:
Supreme commander Leon, sorry for bothering your drill. We'll be going now.

Leon:
Hang on.

Shiskia:
Eh? What now?

Leon:
You came to watch the drill, right? Why not stay and see the results of our
  training.
How about it, have a mock battle with us.

Jenon:
Do you realize what you're saying......

Leon:
What's wrong? Are you scared, little nobleman's pets?
You're all trash. Relying on a noble's authority and mistaking it for your own
  strength!

Garlot:
What did you say!

Shiskia:
Garlot, calm down.

Garlot:
Our strength is nothing of that sort!

Leon:
In that case come, prove to me that you've got your own power!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Defeat Leon's Black Knight unit!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
               Garlot dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Leon:
Don't break ranks! Show these nobleman's pets a real fight!


-----------------After Battle----------------                         [Map9.04]
Leon:
N- no way... I've been beaten by a pack of nobleman's dogs...?

|------------------|
|      RETREAT     |
|-Time to Regroup.-|
|------------------|

|    |
|    | WHAT BROUGHT FORTH THIS VICTORY?
| /\ | Defeated the Mad Knight in black!
|/  \| 

Jenon:
What overwhelming power......

Medoute:
If the enemy wasn't exhausted, we would likely have lost.
Their morale may have been low, but still, with so much training...
There is a lesson to be learned from this.

Shiskia:
We don't need anyone with that personality though.

  -----------------------------------------------------
Jenon:
Now then, we'll be heading back to Tiera.
By the way, where's supreme commander Leon?

Officer:
Please accept my humblest apologies. Ever since the battle ended, he has
  confined himself to his quarters, and refuses to leave.

Aegina:
......Is he in shock over losing the battle?

Shiskia:
If he is, he's surprisingly sensitive.

Elena:
Um... Excuse me......

Officer:
Ah, Milady Elena.
Allow me the honor of introductions. This is supreme commander Leon's younger
  sister, Milady Elena.

Shiskia:
Sister? Th- there's no resemblance at all......

Elena:
I would like to ask for forgiveness for all the trouble my brother has caused.

Garlot:
You shouldn't be apologizing. This is something he should be saying himself.

Elena:
Yes, you are right. My apologies.
My brother has been this way ever since our parents were killed. He has refused
  to open his heart to others.

Garlot:
Your parents were killed?

Elena:
My parents served as the members of His Majesty the Emperor's personal guard.
However, before the foreign campaign, they broke military regulations, and were
  suddenly executed by the Emperor.

Shiskia:
Eh... Just like that!?

Elena:
My brother's name was sullied for that as well. He was given the mark on his
  forehead, and lost his position at the capital's garrison.

Garlot:
All because of that emperor...... I see.

Elena:
Ever since, my brother has refused to believe anyone, and has lost himself in
  loneliness......

Aegina:
He must have been hurt too, having lost the parents he respected...... It is
  not strange to lose faith in people after that.

Leon:
Elena! Stop telling them useless things!!

Elena:
B- brother!

Garlot:
(This guy... He's just like me.
He was hurt by the world's senselessness as well.
If my life had been even a little different, I might have ended up like him.)

Leon:
Hey, you! Don't look at me like that! It makes me want to vomit.

Officer:
Supreme commander, where to next?

Leon:
I'm sick of leading in this backwater place! I quit!
Until my replacement comes, you can be in charge. Now good riddance.


Garlot: 
Hey wait, Leon!

Leon:
What do you want, nobleman's dog?

Garlot:
...............
......No, it's nothing.

Leon:
Keh, I told you to stop looking at me like that.

Shiskia:
Elena, are you going too?

Elena:
Yes. I cannot allow my brother to be alone anymore.

Officer:
......The supreme commander has left. His presence was much like that of a
  tornado.

Medoute:
Mad Knight Leon...... I wonder whom that fury benefits.


---------------------Vs.---------------------                         [Map9.05]
--Garlot vs. Leon
| Garlot:
| Don't insult us!
|
| Leon:
| Ha! I'll show you just how weak you are......
|
|---VICTORY
| Garlot:
| Your troops are exhausted.
|
|Leon:
| ......Maybe a little, but they won't stay that way forever.
|
|---DEFEAT
| Garlot:
| No!
|
| Leon:
| You think you can beat me with so little strength? Pathetic!
-----

--Shiskia vs. Leon-------------------------------------
| Leon:
| You'll regret agreeing to fight me.
|
| Shiskia:
| Just keep thinking we'll lose!
|
|---VICTORY
| Leon:
| Tch! I only lost 'cause of that bow!
|
| Shiskia:
| Aren't those the words of a sore loser?
|
|---DEFEAT
| Shiskia:
| No, I can't do it at this distance......
|
| Leon:
| Don't give them any space! Our opponent is faltering!
-----

--Jenon vs. Leon---------------------------------------
| Leon:
| Nothing but girls and girly guys... You really know nothing of battle.
|
| Jenon:
| Don't judge people by how they look!
|
|---VICTORY
| Jenon:
| This is the strength of the previous leader of the capital's garrison?
|   Honestly I'm disappointed.
|
| Leon:
| This is the only time you'll get to talk like this!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Jenon:
| What powerful blows...... I must form a plan if I want to win.
|
| Leon:
| Hahaha, planning on playing a few tricks? It's all useless before my power!
-----

--Medoute vs. Leon-------------------------------------
| Medoute:
| Your tactics and skill are brilliant. However, there is nothing but
|   sluggishness to your spear!
|
| Leon:
| What a waste of breath... Alright, let's see how you do against this
|   brilliance!
|
|---VICTORY
| Medoute:
| What a bull headed man. Do you know no tactic other than a direct assault?
|
| Leon:
| Just keep on preaching so self-importantly...!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Medoute:
| I left myself open!? No good, I must compose myself!
|
| Leon:
| You're not too bad. But it looks like you're still worse than me!
-----

--Aegina vs. Leon--------------------------------------
| Leon:
| Hahaha...  It looks like there's a deep hatred to your sword......
|
| Aegina:
| ......What a ridiculous man.
|
|---VICTORY
| Aegina:
| What overwhelming strength! I barely managed to win...
|
| Leon:
| I underestimated you for being a woman. But I can't hate a sword swung with
|   such fire...
|
|---DEFEAT
| Leon:
| You're just like me! You desire to kill someone, eh!?
|
| Aegina:
| Don't lump me in with the likes of you so freely!
-----


------------------Locations------------------                         [Map9.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
Location of the imperial garrison deployed along the northern border of the 
country

   --鉱夫の安息所 - Miners' Rest House
Residence of the miners working on Mount Jiccard

   --旅人の宿 - Travelers' Inn
Small inn located near the border

   --傑士の家 - House of a Great Man
Residence of a man famed for his knowledge of military arts


--------------------On Map-------------------                         [Map9.07]
--鉱夫の安息所 - Miners' Rest House - FEMALE - FIRST TIME
|
|--------------------|
|     ACQUISITION    |
|-Received Treasure!-|
|    Fox Fur Coat    |
|--------------------|
|
| Miner:
| It sure has gotten noisy outside. Is that commander in black running drills
|   again?
| Huh? You're fighting against him? That sure is brave of you girls...
| Do your best! I'd love to see him shut up for once... Just don't take on more
|   than you can handle.
| Oh, yeah. You can have this if it makes you happy.
| This coat will keep you warm even in snow storms. It'll come in handy if you
|   ever climb a snowy mountain.
|
|---MALE - FIRST TIME
|
|--------------------|
|     ACQUISITION    |
|-Received Treasure!-|
|      Big Foot      |
|--------------------|
|
| Miner:
| It sure has gotten noisy outside. Is that commander in black running drills
|   again?
| Eh? You guys are fighting him? That's some challenge...
| Do your best! If he gets beaten up maybe he'll quiet down some.
| You can have this if it makes you happy.
| I'm sure it'll come in handy on snow covered roads.
|
|---AFTERWARDS
| Miner:
| The garrison placed here to reassure the citizens does nothing but cause them
|   worry ...
| The ores that miners like myself find are constantly being used to make
|   weapons and armor. And there's more...
| That army is scaring the people. What are they doing...
-----

花畑 - Flower Garden-------------------------------------

|--------------------|
|     ACQUISITION    |
|-Received Treasure!-|
|   Meimel Bouquet   |
|--------------------|

Child:
Looks like the people from the army have started fighting again, so I'm picking
  some flowers right now.
But I can't carry them all by myself, so you can have some.
Don't they smell nice? Take good care of them.

--旅人の宿 - Travelers' Inn - FEMALE - FIRST TIME----------
|
|--------------------|
|     ACQUISITION    |
|-Received Treasure!-|
|     Mermaid Fin    |
|--------------------|
|
| Traveler:
| What a heavy atmosphere. Is the imperial army fighting again?
| Ugh, such shady guys.
| Agh. I wanted to wait for the snow to melt before heading north. Looks like
|   I'll have to speed up my plans.
| Oh, yes... You can have this!
| If you put this on, you'll be able to move freely in water. I'm sure it'll be
|   useful!
| The water in snow country is very cold, so I won't have any use for it. Feel
|   free to take it.
|
|---MALE - FIRST TIME
|
|--------------------|
|     ACQUISITION    |
|-Received Treasure!-|
|    Quicksand Orb   |
|--------------------|
|
| Traveler:
| What a heavy atmosphere. Is the imperial army fighting again?
| Ugh, such shady guys.
| Agh. I wanted to wait for the snow to melt before heading north. Looks like
|   I'll have to speed up my plans.
| Oh, yes... You can have this!
| If you ever get the chance to cross a desert this should come in handy.
| There's no need to thank me. I'm heading to snow country now, so this item is
|   nothing but extra baggage.
|
|---AFTERWARDS
| Traveler:
| This garrison was originally formed in case of problems with the country to
|   the north.
| In other words, they are meant to protect not only the people of this region,
|   but the entire country.
| But the garrison's daily training is disturbing the people's peace.
| What is going on with those troops?
-----

--川辺の草地 - Riverside Meadow-----------------------------
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|   Elemina Mint  |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| There's a peculiar smell here...
| Is this a mint? We could get a good price for it at the market... I'll take
|   it.
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| Sniff... What's that, it smells nice.
| Wow! An Elemina Mint! Putting this in bath water is good for the skin.
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| Oh? This is...
| The mint is the source of this smell. I bet Shiskia will be happy if I give
|   this to her.
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| Hm...? What's this scent...
| A mint? It may not be useful as food or medicine, but I think I'll take some.
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| Ah, what's this...
| It's a mint... It smells quite nice.
-----

--森の奥の湿地 - Wetlands Inside a Forest--------------------
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|       Trap      |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| Hm? What's this feeling...
| Ah, it's because of this trap. I bet we could catch an animal with this.
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| ...I'm getting goose bumps, what's this strange feeling?
| Ah it's because of this... I'd hate for anyone to get caught in this while
|   marching, so I'll remove it.
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| Hm? What was that?
| Ah, this trap went off. I'll remove it.
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| ...............
| ...This trap is quite crude. Still, it was armed, so this is for the best.
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| ...Ouch!
| What is this? Is this someone's idea of a prank... Good grief...
-----

--傑士の家 - House of a Great Man - NIGHT - FIRST TIME-----
|
|------------------------|
|       ACQUISITION      |
|  -Received Treasure!-  |
|Imperial Warfare Mankind|
|------------------------|
|
| Great Man:
| Oh? You must be quite studious to come visit me at this time of the night.
| I would love to personally instruct you in tactics, however, at my age
|   staying up this late is difficult.
| Please take this book. It is one that I have learned much from as well.
| I hope you use this knowledge for the good of the people.
|
|---NIGHT - AFTERWARDS
| Great Man:
| ...............
| You've come again...... That's quite some zeal you have.
| Honestly, I would like to go to bed. Please leave.
| ...I'm very tired. I envy you young people...
|
|---DAY/EVENING
| Great Man:
| Oh? You have the aura of a troop leader around you. Perhaps a noble's or a
|   merchant's unit.
| This is nothing to be surprised about. When one has deep knowledge of the
|   arts of war, he can tell such a thing from a troop's attire alone.
| Oh yes, how about I give you a bit of advice. I'll teach you about terrain
|   effectiveness.
| Among different terrains there exist opportunities to limit the damage of
|   battles.
| For example, a "Fort" terrain and a "Town" terrain have high advantages.
|   Especially during long battles.
| Also, some units have special bonuses when standing on specific terrain.
| Knights are stronger on roads, and hunters are a menace in the forest.
| Fighting a foe on superior terrain leaves you at a great disadvantage.
| Luring the enemy off that terrain is a beneficial tactic.
-----

--草むら - Thicket----------------------------------------
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
| Four-Leaf Clover|
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| Such peaceful scenery...
| Oh? It's a four-leaf clover...
| ...When we were kids Shiskia used to collect them. But that's all in the past
|   now...
| I doubt giving it to her now would make her happy...
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| It's kinda calming here...
| Ah? A four-leaf clover!
| No matter how many I get, finding another one gives me this happy feeling...
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| Oh?
| How unusual, a clover with four leaves. I feel kind of lucky right now.
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| This is a tranquil thicket.
| Oh, a four-leaf clover. If it weren't for fighting, this would truly be a
|   tranquil place.
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| Ah?
| A four-leaf clover. This is a bit heartwarming.
-----


---------------------Loss--------------------                         [Map9.08]
Defeat - Garlot Defeated (1st)

During the mock battle started by the black knight Leon, Gram Blaze's captain, 
Garlot, lost his life, and Gram Blaze vanished from history's stage...


                    ========================================
                         ***       Chapter 3       ***
                                  戦う、という意味
                         ***   A Reason to Fight   ***
                    ========================================


========================================================================[Map10]
夜盗を追え！
Chase Down the Thieves!
Tiera - Nibel District


--------------------Intro--------------------                        [Map10.01]
In the Nibel district of Tiera, the disappearance valuable things in the dead 
of night was a common occurrence. Rumors spread of well organized thieves 
carrying out a thought out plan.

Therefore, Count Velleman has instructed Gram Blaze to patrol the city at
night. His orders were to see if there's any truth to the rumors, and if so,
capture the bandits.

In lending the group's aid to the noblemen, count Velleman's true goal was to 
imply to them his owning a private army.

And so, Garlot's group patrolled the city at night.


----------------Before Battle----------------                        [Map10.02]
Shiskia:
Hey, even if there are thieves around, why do we have to patrol here for the
  nobles and merchants?

Medoute:
Now that you mention it, you guys used to be thieves before. Does this switch
  in status weigh on your conscience?

Shiskia:
Yeah, that too probably......

Garlot:
None of these bandits have any honor. They're just scoundrels stealing for
  their own profit. There's a big difference between us.

Medoute:
But it's also true that because you were successful at being honorable thieves,
  guys like these have started to appear.

Garlot:
Medoute, I'll say it once more. We are different from those guys.

Medoute:
I am not saying you're not. I wish you'd try to understand what I'm saying a
  little more.

Jenon:
Do you mean the difference between intentions and actions?

Medoute:
Not exactly. I'm saying that it's difficult to convey that your actions and the
  meaning behind them are righteous.

Garlot
...............

Aegina:
In any case, a patrol is not a bad thing.
Let us stay alert and try to locate the thieves.

Shiskia:
......Hm? I hear footsteps. There are quite a few people.

|---------------------|
|       ENCOUNTER     |
|-Enemies Just Ahead.-|
|---------------------|

Thief Leader:
Mn...? Who're you guys?

Medoute:
We're the ones who should be asking that. You don't look like a vigilance
  committee......

Thief Leader:
Hm? Hey, aren't you Garlot? Which would mean you guys are the Blazing Thieves.
  You guys are allies, hehehehe.
We were afraid you might have been some nobleman's army or a self-defense
  force.

Garlot
...............

Thief Leader:
By the way, what do you think of our haul today? We're planning to go a little
  deeper into town with this job.

Garlot:
We're Gram Blaze...... The private army of the nobleman Velleman.

Thief Leader:
I- I see...... we've heard rumors of that as well...
But you used to be thieves like us before. You can just pretend you didn't see
  us, okay?

Garlot:
We've never stolen for our own sake, not even once! Don't lump us in with you
  guys!

Thief Leader:
Stealing is stealing, isn't it all the same? We can be enemies after today,
  can't you let us go just this time?

Garlot:
You're all trash! I'll cut you down until not one's left!!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Defeat the encountered thieves!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
               Garlot dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Garlot:
Don't let a single one escape, got it!

Thief Leader:
This is how you get when you gain status! Ah, whatever, let' take them down
  Everyone, form ranks!


------------------Mid Battle-----------------                        [Map10.03]
Thief Leader:
Tch! Everyone scatter! We're gonna reorganize!

|------------------|
|      RETREAT     |
|-Time to Regroup.-|
|------------------|

|    |
|    |              THE BATTLE CONTINUES!
| /\ | The thieves are retreating in the streets of Tiera!
|/  \| 

Garlot:
Think you can run! Corner them and take them out!

|---------------------|
|       ENCOUNTER     |
|-Enemies Just Ahead.-|
|---------------------|

Cerica:
Haaaaaaaaaaaaaaa-! Garlot!!

Garlot:
Her again, at such a time!

Cerica:
We came here to steal a bit of money, but this is an unexpectedly big catch.
This time Cerica will get revenge for commander David!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Drive away the revenge seeking Cerica!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
               Garlot dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Garlot:
I've no time to waste on you!

Cerica:
Heh, Cerica doesn't care about your circumstances. Now, come on!

  -----------------------------------------------------
Cerica:
No matter how many times we fight Cerica can't win...... Why, Cerica......
At this rate all Cerica's troops will be gone... Everyone, we're retreating!

Jenon:
That decision is little late......

Cerica:
Cerica will never, never forgive any of you!!

|------------------|
|      RETREAT     |
|-Time to Regroup.-|
|------------------|

|    |
|    |            THE FIRE YET BURNS BRIGHTLY!
| /\ | Successfully repelled Cerica who appeared suddenly!!
|/  \| 

|-----------------|
|      SORTIE     |
|-Follow my Lead!-|
|-----------------|

Thief Leader:
Heh heh heh, thanks to that little interruption we managed to put together some
  more fighting power.
Now, how about we pay you back for earlier.

Garlot:
You were still here, you trash......

Thief Leader:
Well, eh... I bet if we get rid of you now, our future jobs will go a lot more
  smoothly.
It's too bad, you know. We had a lot of respect for the Blazing Thieves.

Garlot:
Don't make me say it twice. We've never done anything to be called thieves!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Annihilate the thieves!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
               Garlot dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Garlot:
Not one of you will escape! Let's go!


-----------------After Battle----------------                        [Map10.04]
Thief Leader:
Keh... Looks like this is the end......
Eh, can't be helped...... In the world of thieves it's the strong who survive.
  So the saying goes......

|-----------------------|
|    KILLED IN ACTION   |
|-A Warrior has Fallen.-|
|-----------------------|

|    |
|    |            DRIVEN BACK THE ENEMY
| /\ | With the leader slain, the thief troop falls!
|/  \| 

Garlot:
Damn it, still calling us thieves!

  -----------------------------------------------------
Medoute:
The bandits have been slain...... After we report to count Velleman, this will
  all be over.

Jenon:
Yes, but... They knew about us......

Garlot:
We're not like them!
All we've ever done was help the poor people by returning the things unfairly
  taken by the bad guys.
But they really were thieves. They're trash! They didn't have any feelings of
  responsibility.

Shiskia:
It's difficult to convey that the meaning behind your actions is righteous...

Garlot:
That's not it, Shiskia! There's no more to it than dirty people caring about
  nothing but themselves.

Medoute:
It's for that reason, I believe, that having power cannot be easily detached
  from that meaning, and that's why it must be used.
While I do believe that it's the goal of many people to have power, that's not
  the problem. It's when they get it that the fighting starts.

Garlot:
...I think I'm starting to understand what you wanted to say, Medoute.

Shiskia:
It's okay, Medoute.
I'm sure that with everyone's support, even if we get really strong, we'll use
  that power for good.

Medoute:
Yes, I believe you.

  -----------------------------------------------------
BAIFU JOINED

Medoute:
At any rate...... This fluffy thing sure startled me.

Jenon:
Baifu here is a beast man. I've read about them in a book before, but I didn't
  believe they were real......

Baifu:
You've got books too?
Let Baifu read them. The book Baifu's looking for might be there.

Jenon:
Yes, yes. We'll do so the next time we're there.

Medoute:
But, this fluffy thing...... It certainly is big; we can't just leave it alone
  in town like this.

Shiskia:
This fur is so soft and fluffy. It feels so nice. Can't we take him with us?

Jenon:
He's not a pet, you know......

Garlot:
He'd definitely be useful in battle with that superhuman strength. Let's talk
  to Velleman, then he can stay at the army housing grounds.
Baifu, do you wanna come with us? We'll search for the book together.

Baifu:
You guys are reliable! Baifu will go with you!

Garlot:
Alright, it's decided.

|--------------------|
|     ACQUISITION    |
|-Received Treasure!-|
|       Rauher       |
|--------------------|


---------------------Vs.---------------------                        [Map10.05]
--Garlot vs. Cerica
| Cerica:
| This is how you get caught! Because Cerica found you!
|
| Garlot:
| Caught? How did you get to that conclusion?
|
|---VICTORY
| Garlot:
| I don't have time to fight you now!
|
| Cerica:
| Darn it...... Cerica won't forgive you for ignoring her!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Cerica:
| What's this? Is someone weak today?
|
| Garlot:
| Damn, weirdo......
-----

--Shiskia vs. Cerica-----------------------------------
| Cerica:
| Do you have any idea what it's like to have someone important taken from you!
|
| Shiskia:
| Do you think no one else understands that? What a worthless assumption! What,
|   are you now the heroine of a tragedy!?
|
| Cerica:
| W- w- what did you say!!
|
|---VICTORY
| Cerica:
| A nuisance as usual......
|
| Shiskia:
| Will you figure it out already! Even if you beat us nothing will change.
|
| Cerica:
| Shut up, shut up, shut up! Cerica won't listen to enemies!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Shiskia:
| I shouldn't have given her time to attack......
|
| Cerica:
| That's the speech of a sore loser! If you were strong, it wouldn't matter!
-----

--Jenon vs. Cerica-------------------------------------
| Jenon:
| If possible, I'd prefer not to draw my blade against a cute girl.
|
| Cerica:
| W! What are you saying, stupid!
|
|---VICTORY
| Jenon:
| Rather than that axe, a fan of feathers would suit you much better.
|
| Cerica:
| What are you saying! Is that all you live for!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Jenon:
| I went too easy thinking you were just a girl.
|
| Cerica:
| Aah, but Cerica went easy too, thinking you were some useless guy.
-----

--Medoute vs. Cerica-----------------------------------
| Medoute:
| Your purpose for fighting will one day end on your own unhappiness......
|
| Cerica:
| Stop talking like you know everything!
| This unhappiness will end when Cerica defeats you!
|
|---VICTORY
| Medoute:
| You'd best call off your soldiers right now.
|
| Cerica:
| Darn it, one day Cerica will get revenge for commander David......
|
|---DEFEAT
| Cerica:
| Just because something's big, doesn't mean it's good. Got it, big axe girl!
|
| Medoute:
| Isn't that the bias of someone small?
|
| Cerica:
| What!
-----

--Aegina vs. Cerica------------------------------------
| Aegina:
| Come near me and I will strike you down!
|
| Cerica:
| What's with that catchphrase! Do you think you sound cool?
|
|---VICTORY
| Aegina:
| You may have some skill, but that is all your strength, in the end.
|
|---DEFEAT
| Aegina:
| I was caught off guard......
|
| Cerica:
| Get out of Cerica's way! Beating you is not what will make Cerica happy!
-----

--Sleip vs. Cerica-------------------------------------
| Sleip:
| Uuhic... Ueh......
|
| Cerica:
| What's with this undine... S- so dirty......
|
|---VICTORY
| Sleip:
| ...Hic...
|
| Cerica:
| Uuh, she stinks of alcohol......
|
|---DEFEAT
| Sleip:
| ...Buargh, I feel terrible...
|
| Cerica:
| N- nasty...... She's disgusting......
-----

--Eudy vs. Cerica--------------------------------------
| Eudy:
| I don't care if you fight for your own sake, but you're a stupid girl. 
|
| Cerica:
| You think Cerica only fights for herself!? Cerica's after revenge!
|
|---VICTORY
| Eudy:
| Did you really think I'd lose to a stupid girl who uses nothing but suicidal
|   attacks?
|
| Cerica:
| S- s- s- stupid!? Cerica won't forgive you!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Eudy:
| You... Don't get too excited!
|
| Cerica:
| You're just a weakling!!
-----


------------------Locations------------------                        [Map10.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
District in the eastern section of Tiera where the wealthy live

   --豪奢な屋敷 - Luxurious Residence
A conspicuously large residence in the already extravagant Nibel district

   --エリス居住区 - Eris Neighborhood
Neighborhood where many middle class people live

   --夜の街 - Night Street
Shops catering to outlaws line this street

   --ひとけの無い館 - Deserted Mansion
A large, ominous mansion with no illumination or people


--------------------On Map-------------------                        [Map10.07]
エリス居住区 - Eris Neighborhood

Nibel District Citizen:
These thieves are making a racket tonight as well?
Mmu! You there, aren't you count Velleman's army?
To think that such nasty youngsters are the ones protecting the town. Well, go,
  you're not working hard enough!
You understand, go fight, quickly! Protect the Nibel district!

--豪奢な屋敷 - Luxurious Residence - GARLOT-----------------
| Garlot:
| What an awfully big mansion. Is this someone's personal residence?
| ...Well, the lights are on, but now's not a good time to visit them.
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| ...What a big residence...
| I bet it belongs to some newly rich noble or something. Yuck, let's go
|   somewhere else!
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| There's light shining through the window. Are they still awake?
| I thought I wouldn't feel anything by now, even coming here......
|
| Woman's Voice:
| Who is it?
|
| Jenon:
| !!
|
| Man's Voice:
| What is it, Samantha?
|
| Woman's Voice:
| ...It's nothing. I just had a feeling that Jenon was nearby......
|
| Man's Voice:
| How many times must I tell you not to talk about him!
| He's gone. He has no reason to come back here. You hear me!
|
| Jenon:
| ...............
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| That's a large residence. It must belong to someone really wealthy.
| ...But, I'm on patrol right now. I'll visit some other time.
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| Even in a nobleman's part of town, this is a conspicuously large residence.
| Even if we were to visit, we would be turned away. Let's keep going.
|
|---SLEIP
|Sleip:
| Uuhic... what a big house...
| Maybe they'll share some sake... Hic...
| Ah, we're in a fight right now... I really can't ask. Hic...
|
|---BAIFU
|Baifu:
| Such a big house... There'd be books here, right?
| Oh, whoops, Baifu is in a battle night now. Now is not the time to take a
|   side trip.
|
|---EUDY
|Eudy:
| I didn't know there were mansions this big. The lights are on too...
| This isn't the kind of place one could visit while leading an armed group.
|   Let's just leave it alone.
-----

--領主の館 - Feudal Lord's Mansion-------------------------
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
| Pure Dragon Coin|
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| Hm? Something's fallen here...
| Oh, a coin... There's a strange crest on it.
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| ...I feel like there's something here I shouldn't overlook.
| Ah, a coin is lying here. I'll get it!
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| Ah? Someone dropped a coin...
| ...Hm? I remember seeing this crest when I was little...
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| Oh, there's something over there...
| It's a coin of the late Emperor. It's just a bit nostalgic...
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| Hm? There's a coin lying here.
| ...There's a dragon on it. Is this someone's family crest?
|
|---SLEIP
| Sleip:
| Hic... Hmmm? Something got stuck to me, what's that...
| Ah, it's a coin. But it's not normal money, so I can't buy more sake with it.
|
|---BAIFU
| Baifu:
| Mn? A coin has been dropped!
| It has a picture of a dragon... It's not like the coins you buy things with.
| Eh? Why does Baifu say that, you ask? Because there's not two dragons... How
|   was that!
|
|---EUDY
| Eudy:
| Ah, something's on the ground...
| This looks like a commemorative coin made during the previous emperor's
|   reign. During Emperor Ike's time...
------

--ひとけの無い館 - Deserted Mansion---------------------------
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| The lock on the door of this house is broken......
| Some thief may be hiding inside. I'll check to make sure...
|
| Large Framed Beast Man:
| ...............
|
| Garlot:
| What the!
| Where exactly did this beast man come from? And so big......
|
| Large Framed Beast Man:
| Baifu will answer your question. Baifu came from the north. How was that.*
| *(Baifu makes a lot of puns. In this case the 'north' and 'came' are the same 
|  (kita). Most, if not all his puns are like that, so I'm not gonna point them
|  all out. If he says na-n tsutte (how was that), you can bet that there was a
|  pun there.)*
|
| Garlot:
| It talked! It understands speech... What intelligence. But, puns?
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| Ah, the lights are out, but there's someone inside this place...
| Could the thieves have gotten here!
|
| Large Framed Beast Man:
| ...............
|
| Shiskia:
| Eh!
| U- umm, a person? A creature? Um, who would you be?
|
| Garlot:
| Where exactly did this beast man come from? And so big......
|
| Large Framed Beast Man:
| Baifu will answer your question. Baifu came from the north. How was that.
|
| Shiskia:
| Wwwaa, it talked! The fluffy thing talked! And it talked in puns!
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| There's no doubt... A large shadow moved in this building just now. Could the
|   thieves be in here?
|
| Large Framed Beast Man:
| ...............
|
| Jenon:
| !!
| Hii! Is that, a beast man!? They really exist......
|
| Garlot:
| Where exactly did this beast man come from? And so big......
|
| Large Framed Beast Man:
| Baifu will answer your question. Baifu came from the north. How was that.
|
| Jenon:
| ......A beast man that makes puns......
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| There's an unusual presence coming from inside this building.
| It may be an ambush. I'd best check it out just in case.
|
| Large Framed Beast Man:
| ...............
|
| Medoute:
| ......Ng!
| W- w- wait, stop! Umm, someone explain this situation to me.
|
| Garlot:
| Where exactly did this beast man come from? And so big......
|
| Large Framed Beast Man:
| Baifu will answer your question. Baifu came from the north. How was that.
|
| Medoute:
| It spoke like a person...... Enough, this is too confusing for me.
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| What a big mansion......
| Oh, if we lure the thieves in here, we may be able to defeat them in an
| _ ambush.
|
| Large Framed Beast Man:
| ...............
|
| Aegina:
| H- hii!
| T- there's a monster in here!!
|
| Garlot:
| Where exactly did this beast man come from? And so big......
|
| Large Framed Beast Man:
| Baifu will answer your question. Baifu came from the north. How was that.
|
| Aegina:
| Hii, i- it talked!
|
|---SLEIP
| Sleip:
| Hic... uuh, I'm done for today, I drank too much.
| Ah, hic... That's a big place. I think I'll sleep here for a while... hic.
|
| Large Framed Beast Man:
| ...............
|
| Sleip:
| Huh, I see some animal. Hic... I must have drunk way too much...
|
| Garlot:
| Where exactly did this beast man come from? And so big......
|
| Large Framed Beast Man:
| Baifu will answer your question. Baifu came from the north. How was that.
|
| Sleip:
| Hic... Hahahahaha~! It talked, it talked! Hahaha!
|
|---EUDY
| Eudy:
| Geez... This is too much trouble for just some bandits...
| It's so boring when I can't do anything flashy. I think I'll skip out for a
|   while.
|
| Large Framed Beast Man:
| ...............
|
| Eudy:
| Mmn, um... who would you be?
| Or rather, are you kidding me......
|
| Garlot:
| Where exactly did this beast man come from? And so big......
|
| Large Framed Beast Man:
| Baifu will answer your question. Baifu came from the north. How was that.
|
| Eudy:
| Ah, it can talk? Could this be a beast man?
| And, came from the north? Is that supposed to be a joke? It's not funny,
|   whatever it is.
-----

AFTERWARD

Garlot:
You said your name is Baifu? What are you doing in this house?

Baifu:
Baifu's master is wants a certain book on magic. Baifu has gone to look for it.
This city is big, it has lots of books. But, Baifu can't find the book......

Jenon:
A book? I believe count Velleman had a large library.

Baifu:
Library? That's the place to put carriages, right?*
*(Baifu confused the word for library (shoko) with garage (shako).)*

Jenon:
That would be a garage. A library is a room where lots of books are kept.

Baifu:
A library has lots of books! Baifu has gotten smarter! And also, plums are
  really sour.
Then, you have a library where you live!
In that case, Baifu will help you out! So, show Baifu the library!

Garlot:
What? You want to go with us? We're in the middle of a battle right now.

Baifu:
Battle? Baifu knows what that is! There are enemies, and if you defeat them you
  win.
Baifu can help! Baifu will defeat them!

--夜の街 - Night Street - FIRST TIME----------------------
|
|--------------------|
|     ACQUISITION    |
|-Received Treasure!-|
|    Dowsing Rods    |
|--------------------|
|
| Suspicious Man:
| Oh...?
| Ufufufufufu... You lead a troop that is quite attentive in their training,
|   fufu...
| Could you, possibly... ufufu, ufufufu...
| I will give you this. It is a magical item that will lead you to something
|   great...
| You will be the ones to find it... ufufu, ufufufu...
|
|---AFTERWARDS
| Suspicious Man:
| The human who can manage to use the dowsing rods possesses a very special
|   power...
| No, possibly not a human......
| Either way, there may come a time when you are able to use these rods......
| Fufufu, ufufufu...
-----

--夜の街の片隅 - Corner of the Night Street------------------
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|   Sage's Stone  |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| Could this spot be, by any chance...
| Yes! It's the same as on this map. Then...
| Found it! Is this something valuable...
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| Ah? This place...
| Yep, it's the same as on this treasure map! Now let's look around!
| ...Is this treasure? It looks like a normal rock...
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| Hm? What's this, it feels like deja vu...
| Ah, I get it! This is the spot shown on the treasure map!
| Then, this is that treasure!
| ...Is this stone treasure?
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| Hm? This terrain...
| It's the same as on the treasure map. I'm close...
| This is it! Although... it looks like a regular stone to me...
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| Ah? This terrain...
| Right! This is the spot the treasure map was pointing to!
| ...Is this treasure? It doesn't look like anything more than a stone...
|
|---EUDY
| Eudy:
| Hmm... Somehow it feels like I've been in this place before...
| Ah, I see. This is the spot indicated on this treasure map.
| Then, this would be that treasure. Hm... I feel an indescribable power coming
|   from this stone.
-----


---------------------Loss--------------------                        [Map10.08]
Defeat - Garlot Defeated (1st, 3rd)

While out to eliminate bandits to protect the peace in Tiera, Gram Blaze's 
captain, Garlot, lost his life, and Gram Blaze vanished from history's stage...

Defeat - Out of Cards (2nd)----------------------------

In a conflict with Cerica, who was vehement on revenge, Gram Blaze was 
scattered due to a flaw in tactics, and was forced to disband...


========================================================================[Map11]
変わり者、募集中
Enlisting, an Eccentric Girl
Ellrok Mountain Range - Side Road


--------------------Intro--------------------                        [Map11.01]
Though the private army was becoming stronger day by day, that strength tended 
to lean towards brute force, so Count Velleman looked into organizing a 
magician squad to fill that deficiency.

Garlot, charged with finding a capable leader for the new squad, heard rumors 
of a an eccentric yet capable magician who commanded a powerful cannon, living 
in seclusion beyond the towering Ellrok Mountain Range to the north.

However, as Gram Blaze departed Tiera, they had not noticed a certain group 
creeping up after them......


----------------Before Battle----------------                        [Map11.02]
Shiskia:
Uuhhhh, it's cold!

Jenon:
We have gone quite far up.

Aegina:
But... Does someone really live this deep in the mountains?

Medoute:
This magician is certainly an odd one.
Hey Garlot. Where exactly is this magician supposed to be living?

Garlot:
It should be somewhere around here...... I'm not sure exactly where. That's why
  we brought along soldiers.

Aegina:
Then the plan is to divide and conquer? In that case I will search over here.

Jenon:
This isn't smart...... Wouldn't it have been better to wait until we had more
  information before coming here?
Sigh...... We can only do this if everyone splits up. We'll have to search over
  the whole mountain.

Garlot:
By the way, we've had more chances to get away from Tiera......
Aegina, aren't you worried about leaving Luciana at the army housing grounds?

Aegina:
There are usually many soldiers there. I will feel relieved when we return.
I am grateful that you would go so far as to worry about my sister, master
  Garlot.
I will do my best to repay this debt of gratitude with this sword.

Garlot:
Both you and Luciana are friends. It's nothing special to worry about you two.
But once I become strong, I hope you two lend me your strength to do the right
  thing.

Aegina:
I promise you that, master Garlot.
......Master Garlot.

Garlot:
Yeah, something's coming......

|---------------------|
|       ENCOUNTER     |
|-Enemies Just Ahead.-|
|---------------------|

Divine Order Soldier:
......The target has spotted us. All units, end plan 'sneak.'  Commence attack.

Aegina:
The Divine Order!

Garlot:
We've noticed them too late. This is bad, we're surrounded......

  /--Victory--------------
 / Drive away the Divine Order assassins!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
     Any of your units die...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Garlot:
Aegina, you're the one they're after! Don't get separated, got it!

Aegina:
First we should join with the others. We can fight them afterwards!


------------------Mid Battle-----------------                        [Map11.03]
|-----------------------|
|    KILLED IN ACTION   |
|-A Warrior has Fallen.-|
|-----------------------|

|    |
|    |          HAS THE FIGHT ENDED WITH THIS?
| /\ | The assassins of the Divine Order are repelled...!?
|/  \| 

Garlot:
All the enemies in sight have been defeated.

Aegina:
This is the Divine Order we are up against. Do not think that this is over.

Divine Order Soldier:
......Target located. Commence attack.

|----------------------------------|
|         SURPRISE ATTACK          |
|-Bewildered by a Surprise Attack!-|
|----------------------------------|

Medoute:
Reinforcements, just as Aegina said. And so many too......

Jenon:
For the time let's retreat into the mountains. We can regroup there!

   /--Victory--------------
  / Regroup the troops!!
 / (Move all units to the flags!)
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
     Any of your units die...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Divine Order Soldier:
......Corner them.

  -----------------------------------------------------
|-------------------------|
|      PULLED THROUGH     |
|-Arrived at Destination!-|
|-------------------------|

--ARRIVED FIRST - GARLOT
| Garlot:
| This looks like a good place for everyone to gather.
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| This looks like a suitable place to meet up.
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| Everyone, gather over here!
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| This spot is suitable for gathering.
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| This seems like a good spot for gathering troops
-----

--ARRIVED SECOND THROUGH LAST - GARLOT
| Garlot:
| Here should be fine.
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| I'm here, Garlot.
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| I've reached the target area.
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| Alright, I've made it. Tell me no one's hurt.
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| I seem to have made it somehow...
-----

  -----------------------------------------------------
Garlot:
Is everyone present!?

Shiskia:
Yes, somehow!

Jenon:
Yep, no problems here.

Medoute:
I'm fine. Now let's take care of the ones chasing us!

Aegina:
We are all well, master Garlot.

|    |
|    | READY STEADY GO!
| /\ | Done regrouping!!
|/  \| 

Garlot:
Alright, form ranks and move to counterattack! We'll cut through the
  surrounding enemy!

|---------------------|
|        AMBUSH       |
|-Unexpected Enemies!-|
|---------------------|

Zilva:
......Objective confirmed, target captured. Commence attack.

Garlot:
No way! They had an ambush ready here as well!!

Aegina:
All means of escape have been cut off......

  /--Victory--------------
 / Survive the assassins' attack!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
     Garlot or Aegina dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Zilva:
Move in...... Squeeze them in and crush them.

  -----------------------------------------------------
Garlot:
Damn it, there's too many of them! Isn't there a way to break through them...!?

Aegina:
Master Garlot, I am the one the Divine Order wants.
Allow me to be taken. In that moment, everyone, please break free.

Garlot:
Luciana is waiting for you! You can't do this!

Aegina:
At this rate we will all be destroyed.
Please, take care of my sister.

Garlot:
Stop this, Aegina!

|    |
|    |          UNTIL THIS LIFE BURNS OUT
| /\ | Aegina risks her life in a suicide attack...!!
|/  \| 

???:
Hey! What is with this racket!

Spectacled Girl:
So noisy...... Aah, you're bothering my beauty sleep.
Truly, no one around here thinks of anyone but themselves! How about being a
  little more courteous to your neighbors!

Zilva:
...............

Garlot:
There's a person this deep in the mountains? Could she be the magician we were
  looking for!?

Spectacled Girl:
Ah, there are so many people. This looks like a good chance for a test fire.
Just thinking about it makes me shiver! I, the great Eudy, can try out the
  results of my research at last! Kyahaha!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Drive away the Divine Order assassins!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
     Garlot or Aegina dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Garlot:
What is that, some sort of artillery? What's she planning to do!?

Eudy:
Now then! It's showtime! Kyahahaha!

  -----------------------------------------------------
|-------------------|
|      BARRAGE      |
|-Fire in the Hole!-|
|-------------------|

Eudy:
Loading shells complete... Here we go! Kyahahahahaha!!

Garlot:
What is this power!? It's overwhelming...

Eudy:
Aah, such beautiful explosions! I'm so amazing to have invented this!

Garlot:
Is she really a magician?

Divine Order Soldier:
Kh... Gah!

Zilva:
......Regroup quickly.

Garlot:
The enemy are being shaken by the gunfire! Everyone, go now!

  -----------------------------------------------------
|-------------------|
|      BARRAGE      |
|-Fire in the Hole!-|
|-------------------|

Eudy:
Kyahahahaha!! Such a good firing rate! My cannon and I are so lovely!
Let's bang them up some more!! Reload!!


-----------------After Battle----------------                        [Map11.04]
Zilva:
......I made a mistake.
Continuing further on this front is impossible. All troops retreat for now.

|------------------|
|      RETREAT     |
|-Time to Regroup.-|
|------------------|

|    |
|    |                        ESCAPED DANGER SOMEHOW
| /\ | With the help of the cannon, successfully repelled the assassins!!
|/  \| 

Garlot:
The enemy has been driven back somehow......
But, this fight was certainly terrifying.

Aegina:
We should thank that girl...

Eudy:
Kyahahahaha! Aah, I feel all better!!
Although... A movable cannon has second rate power and accuracy.
It will need a lot more improvement and experimentation.

Garlot:
A bizarre person and a cannon user... Looks like she's the one we've been
  looking for.

  -----------------------------------------------------
Eudy:
Hmmm. In other words, you want me to join this private army called Gram Blaze?
Uuh, uumm, I see. Alright. I'll join. However, I have two conditions first.

Jenon:
And they are?

Eudy:
First I would like to continue to study firearms. If I can't I'll have to
  reject your offer.

Garlot:
You'll have to discuss that with our employer. Most likely though, he won't
  have a problem.

Medoute:
Or rather, he'll be more than happy to let you, I bet.

Jenon:
And your other condition?

Eudy:
There's a certain item I want. It's necessary for the cannon I am currently
  developing.

Garlot:
I see. Then, once we find it we'll give it to you.

Shiskia:
Then, what is it? And where can we find it?

Eudy:
It's called Ur's Tear. It's almost never found whole when excavated. It's a
  most valuable hidden stone.

Shiskia:
Huh, I've never heard of it.

Eudy:
Most of the general public does not even know it exists.

Shiskia:
What's that! Then, where is this stone?

Eudy:
It's famed to be on the necklace of a man of the Meria church, by the name of
  Juvelon.

Shiskia:
Then there's no way we can get it!

Eudy:
How about this? The mines of the next country over, despite the considerably
  large size, have been mined out.
According to rumor, there is a secret trafficking project in those mines.
Well, do you wonder how I know of this project?

Aegina:
The next country over... You mean the trafficking is from the Kingdom of
  Fantasinia...

Eudy:
Very insightful. What I want is for you to attack the traffickers and steal
  their cargo!

Jenon:
...Even for a capable magician, this is still a really reckless plan.

Eudy:
It'll be fine! The trafficking group will pass really close to the border.
  We'll only be crossing the border by a bit.
Besides, with a bit of disguise no one will think you're a nobleman's army at
  all. You'll look like common thieves!

Medoute:
What you're saying seems really complicated......

Eudy:
Oh, yes. I expect this attack will happen in the desert. These cards should be
  useful there.

|--------------------|
|     ACQUISITION    |
|-Received Treasure!-|
|      Sandstorm     |
|        Flame       |
|--------------------|

Eudy:
Now let's go! So that my lovely cannon can play the sublime melody of
  explosions!

Garlot:
Is this really a good idea......


---------------------Vs.---------------------                        [Map11.05]
--Garlot vs. Zilva
| Garlot:
| Why are you after Aegina!!
|
| Zilva:
| This is my mission. No more needs to be said.
|
|---VICTORY
| Garlot:
| If we keep this up we can beat them!
|
| Zilva:
| Gather a few soldiers! Beat back their power!!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Garlot:
| Damn, she's a tough one... I can't lose focus!
|
| Zilva:
| One more attack......
-----

--Shiskia vs. Zilva------------------------------------
| Zilva:
| Why do you aid the target......
|
| Shiskia:
| You guys are chasing girls! It's only natural we'd help them!!
|
| Zilva:
| Their deaths are inevitable...... Helping them is pointless.
|
|---VICTORY
| Zilva:
| I made a mistake...... I should not have taken a bow user lightly......
|
| Shiskia:
| We won't let you touch Aegina!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Shiskia:
| I can't let her beat me... I can still fight......
|
| Zilva:
| ......This is pointless.
-----

--Jenon vs. Zilva--------------------------------------
| Jenon:
| My opponent is a girl...... I really hate to do this.
| But this isn't a situation where I can go easy.
|
| Zilva:
| ...............
|
|---VICTORY
| Jenon:
| What do you guys want? Why are you after Aegina?
|
| Zilva:
| We have orders. Nothing else needs to be said.
|
|---DEFEAT
| Jenon:
| Uwah...... I went too easy on her.
|
| Zilva:
| You did nothing of the sort......
|
| Jenon:
| Ahaha, really......
-----

--Medoute vs. Zilva------------------------------------
| Medoute:
| From now on, if you break formation...!
|
| Zilva:
| Stay vigilant, this woman can fight......
|
|---VICTORY
| Medoute:
| Still want to fight? I won't go easy on you!
|
| Zilva:
| We will not be lenient either......
|
|---DEFEAT
| Zilva:
| We can do this... We will turn this victory into strength......
|
| Medoute:
| Keep talking.
-----

--Aegina vs. Zilva-------------------------------------
| Zilva:
| Target captured.
| Do not wonder about life or death. That is the will of the Order.
|
| Aegina:
| The Order...You really are from the kingdom......
|
|---VICTORY
| Aegina:
| I will not be defeated by you! I will definitely survive!!
|
| Zilva:
| Next time I will kill......
|
|---DEFEAT
| Aegina:
| Gh......!
|
| Zilva:
|Accept your death. This is God's will.
-----


------------------Locations------------------                        [Map11.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
Side road winding through the mountains as if to avoid the peaks

   --メガネ女の大砲 - Spectacled Girl's Cannon
Looks like the magician Garlot's group was searching for is operating a cannon 
at will...


--------------------On Map-------------------                        [Map11.07]
--古木の森 - Forest of Ancient Trees
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
| Mountain Grapes |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| ...All the trees in this forest make an overwhelming atmosphere...
| Oh, mountain grapes are growing here. Let's see, I'll take a few.
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| Hm? There's a faint scent...
| These grapes are the ones behind it. I'll get some.
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| The forest there has a mysterious feeling to it.
| Oh... This place is covered in mountain grape bunches.
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| ...This smell...
| ...It's grapes. They may taste good, but they're difficult to carry around...
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| Something smells sweet. I wonder what it is...
| Ah, there are grapes. They were what I smelled.
-----

--りんごの木 - Apple Tree-----------------------------------
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|    Blue Apple   |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| Hm? What a huge tree...
| It's got apples growing on it. But, this sure is a strange color... Are they
|   really eatable?
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| This is a big tree...
| Ah, a blue apple, how strange. I'll get it.
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| The design on this tree's trunk... This is an apple tree.
| Looks like it's got fruit. It's really blue, looks like it might be
|   poisonous...
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| This is... Hmm. Looks like an apple tree. I wonder if it has fruit.
| ...Wow, a blue apple. This one is poisonous.
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| What a big tree...
| ...Ah, a blue apple. Is it eatable?
-----

--岩の台地 - Rocky Plateau---------------------------------
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|   Rune Crystal  |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| ...Hm? What's that over there...
| It's a differently colored stone. I wonder if it has some special power.
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| Ah, what's that...
| What a strange colored rock.
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| Hm...? Something is shining.
| This beautiful stone has no impurities.
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| ...Hm? This is...
| A natural crystal... It must have some sort of power to have formed in this
|   rocky area...
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| Something's shining over there... I wonder what it is.
| What a beautiful stone, but why is it shining?
-----


---------------------Loss--------------------                        [Map11.08]
Defeat - Out of Cards (1st)

Having encountered the Divine Order while on an expedition in the Ellrok 
Mountain Range, Gram Blaze was scattered due to a flaw in tactics, and was 
forced to disband...

Defeat - Unit Death (2nd)------------------------------

While attempting to fend off the Divine Order's offence, Gram Blaze lost a 
crucial member and never recovered...

Defeat - Aegina Defeated (3rd)-------------------------

Before the carefully planned siege by the Divine Order, Aegina's life was lost. 
The Gram Blaze, crushed one by one, was annihilated...

Defeat - Garlot Defeated (4th)-------------------------

Even with the cannon helping them against the Divine Order's attack, Gram 
Blaze's captain, Garlot, lost his life, and Gram Blaze vanished from history's 
stage...


========================================================================[Map12]
砂漠に拾え、一滴の涙
Search for a Teardrop in the Desert
Nilrud Desert


--------------------Intro--------------------                        [Map12.01]
Due to a sudden encounter with the Divine Order, Gram Blaze found themselves in 
a pinch. The one to come to their rescue was Eudy, the magician they were 
searching for.

To Garlot's request to enlist, Eudy had one condition. To attack a neighboring 
country's transport, and steal their cargo.

In that cargo was a magical item called the Ur's Tear, needed to make the 
cannon she was developing stronger.

In secret, Gram Blaze traveled to the most remote part of transport route, the 
Nilrud desert, and awaited the arrival of the traffickers......


----------------Before Battle----------------                        [Map12.02]
Garlot:
The desert is really cold at night. The heat of the day seems like a lie.

Medoute:
Maybe, but count Velleman was really accepting of an attack on Fantasinian
  traffickers.
How exactly was he convinced of this?

Garlot:
Eudy was the one to convince him.

Eudy:
"These traffickers are not at all affiliated with the kingdom. They transport
  their goods in secret, so there should be no problems."

Jenon:
Then, you're sure they're not connected to the Kingdom?

Eudy:
Eeh, probably.

Jenon:
Probably......?

Aegina:
Even if that chance comes to be, we can silence the kingdom's troops without
  worry.
The kingdom is evil. There is no reason to feel guilty for robbing them.

Shiskia:
That's not like you, Aegina.

Aegina:
...............
......I!

Medoute:
Sh! Quiet! There are people coming......

|-----------------|
|      SORTIE     |
|-Follow my Lead!-|
|-----------------|

Jenon:
Yep, as far as I can tell, the griffon rider unit is the one carrying what
  we're after.

Medoute:
I see...... A thousand to one, if they're attacked, their tactic would be to
  run.

Jenon:
If they manage to get across the desert, it's very likely that they will meet
  up with other traders.

Medoute:
Then, if they get across, we may as well concede defeat......

Garlot:
In that case, let's hurry!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Annihilate the traffickers!!
/----------------

             ----------------------Defeat--/
                   Garlot or Eudy dies... /
The enemy reaches the Miner Road flag... /
               Use up all your cards... /
                  ---------------------/

Garlot:
Okay, if the griffon squad escapes, it's over!
Let's go!

Trafficker:
C- commander! There's an armed unit up ahead!!

Trafficker Leader:
So the thieves have shown up! These greedy bastards are after the cargo!
All units, focus on the enemy's blockade! Make a way through it!

Eudy:
Look, you see! The guards are not from the kingdom's regular army! Looks like
  my information was spot on.


------------------Mid Battle-----------------                        [Map12.03]
Garlot:
Now! Beat them back in one hit!

Trafficker Leader:
Damn, is breaking through impossible......

|    |
|    |           KEEP UP THE FORCE
| /\ | Persist with this strength of attack!!
|/  \| 

|-----------------|
|      SORTIE     |
|-Follow my Lead!-|
|-----------------|

Zilva:
Secure the safety of the cargo, promptly. All troops move in.

Garlot:
That's the Divine Order! That girl's name was Zilva, I believe.
Did they come after Aegina again?

Eudy:
That's not it, captain. That girl is here to insure the protection of the
  cargo.

Garlot:
Then the Divine Order is mixed up in this matter too......

  /--Victory--------------
 / Annihilate the traffickers and steal their cargo!!
/----------------

            ----------------------Defeat--/
                 Garlot or Eudy dies...  /
The enemy reaches the Miner Road flag.../
             Use up all your cards...  /
                 ---------------------/

Trafficker Leader:
Thanks for the help, master Zilva!
Alright! Now's the chance to break through! Let's try to get through over here
  instead!

  -----------------------------------------------------
Zilva:
I've been beaten three times...
This continued failure is a sin. When the leader hears of this, will I really
  be alright......

|---------------------|
|      WITHDRAWAL     |
|-Escaped from Peril!-|
|---------------------|


-----------------After Battle----------------                        [Map12.04]
Trafficker Leader:
Wardric...... I wanted to tell you my feelings when I returned...

|-----------------------|
|    KILLED IN ACTION   |
|-A Warrior has Fallen.-|
|-----------------------|

|    |
|    |             DRIVEN BACK THE ENEMY
| /\ | Successfully destroyed the trafficker leader!!
|/  \| 

--ZILVA REMAINING
| Zilva:
| What is this... Not only are we blocked off from taking back the cargo, but
|   this group had to be the ones to steal it.
| This continued failure is a sin. When the leader hears of this, will I really
|   be alright......
|
|---------------------|
|      WITHDRAWAL     |
|-Escaped from Peril!-|
|---------------------|
|
-----

Eudy:
Out of the way, out of the way! Where's that Ur's Tear!?

  -----------------------------------------------------
Eudy:
I found it! This is it!! This glowing gem of destruction...... There's no
  mistake, this is Ur's Tear!
Now my dream of having the weapon with the most destructive power in history
  can become a reality!

Garlot:
Then, you got what you were looking for?
So what are we supposed to do with the rest of these things? They look to be
  various precious metals......

Eudy:
Isn't it all just luxuries for the rich? I've no interest in that.

|---------------------|
|       ENCOUNTER     |
|-Enemies Just Ahead.-|
|---------------------|

Minister of the Kingdom:
W- what is all this commotion? It sounded like fighting!
......You! I bet you're robbers after the caravan!
I, the royal courtier Alanjame, will not quietly overlook this!

Medoute:
This is bad, Garlot! This man is the kingdom's internal affairs minister.

Eudy:
Why not leave this to me?
Ah, if it isn't his Excellency, minister Alanjame. I'm afraid this is all a
  misunderstanding.
We are a mercenary group hired by the transport unit. We were protecting this
  cargo from some bandits calling themselves the Divine Order.

Alanjame:
What? The Divine Order you say?

Eudy:
That is correct.
But we've somewhat of a problem. As you can see, we too have suffered
  casualties, and need to bury our dead companion.
Oh yes, your Excellency! Would you mind if we were to entrust this cargo to
  you? 

Alanjame:
Hm, I see. If that's your problem I can take care of this.
Then this is the end of your job. What was the salary you were promised?

Eudy:
We've received our pay in advance, your Excellency.

Alanjame:
Hm? I see. In that case, good work.

Aegina:
...............

Alanjame:
What are you doing! Prepare the cargo for transport! Quickly, quickly!

Minister's Trooper:
Yes sir!

Medoute:
That was well played. It looked as though they were the ones expecting to
  collect these things in the first place.

Eudy:
Phew, that's good.
I thought that minister might have been with those who came after the cargo, I
  guess I was right.
It seems to me that the Divine Order and that Minister are somehow connected.
Well, that's of no use to us now.

Garlot:
Eudy, we've fulfilled your conditions. From now on work as hard as you can.

Eudy:
Of course, I keep my promises. Well, if you can handle me, that is.

Garlot:
Alright then, we've no more business here. Let's head back.

Aegina:
...............

Shiskia:
Aegina? What's wrong?

Aegina:
...It's nothing. Let's go.
(Alanjame, the kingdom's internal affairs minister.
To hear that unpleasant name and see him once again......
Having met master Garlot, the destiny Sis and I had forgotten is starting to
  move.)


---------------------Vs.---------------------                        [Map12.05]
--Garlot vs. Zilva
| Zilva:
| Why are you here......
|
| Garlot:
| That should be my line!
|
| Zilva:
| Offence is the best defense. Were you looking for me in order to defeat me?
|
| Garlot:
| That's also my line!
|
|---VICTORY
| Garlot:
| The advantage is ours! Keep pushing them back!!
|
| Zilva:
| Kh! We will not back down. Protect the cargo.
|
|---DEFEAT
| Garlot:
| Damn! Such precise aim, even in the middle of the night!
|
| Zilva:
| Next I will take your life. If you wish to leave, now is the time......
-----

--Shiskia vs. Zilva------------------------------------
| Shiskia:
| Are you planning to steal the cargo? Or are you protecting the smugglers?
|   Either way, don't get in our way!
|
| Zilva:
| ......You are the ones in the way.
|
|---VICTORY
| Shiskia:
| We're taking the goods!
|
| Zilva:
| These damn thieves......
|
| Shiskia:
| Uugh, this is making me feel guilty......
|
|---DEFEAT
| Shiskia:
| Ouchie, she sure hits hard!
| But no! We can't lose this!!
|
| Zilva:
| You will not advance on feelings alone.
-----

--Jenon vs. Zilva--------------------------------------
| Zilva:
| You, out of my way......
|
| Jenon:
| Ah, then, I don't worry you?
|
| Zilva:
| What...?
|
|---VICTORY
| Zilva:
| Why you......
|
| Jenon:
| It's not like I'm here because I wanted to see you again. Sorry but, this is
|   because of the battle.
|
| Zilva:
| ...............
|
|---DEFEAT
| Jenon:
| Good, as always...
|
| Zilva:
| I warn you. If you get in my way, I will do whatever I have to......
-----

--Medoute vs. Zilva------------------------------------
| Medoute:
| I see the Divine Order has ties to a private smuggling ring...... Why is this
|   so?
|
| Zilva:
| ...............
|
|---VICTORY
| Medoute:
| Looks like you didn't manage to corner us this time......
|
| Zilva:
| Think what you want.
|
|---DEFEAT
| Zilva:
| My next shot will go through your heart......
|
| Medoute:
|She's skilled...... And her aim is highly accurate. I must move quicker!
-----

--Aegina vs. Zilva-------------------------------------
| Zilva:
| I've no use for you now. Leave.
|
| Aegina:
| You are not after me this time?
|
|---VICTORY
| Aegina:
| Weak!
|
| Zilva:
| Kh, is that all you want to say?
|
|---DEFEAT
| Aegina:
| No......
|
| Zilva:
| Nothing but luck has prevented death from coming for you......
-----

--Sleip vs. Zilva--------------------------------------
| Zilva:
| I did not expect to see an undine in the desert......
|
| Sleip:
| Hic...... It's not like I wanted to come here, hic......
|
|---VICTORY
|
|---DEFEAT
| Sleip:
| Ueh, tchhh! That was a close one. I'm drunk real bad today......
|
| Zilva:
| The next shot will go through your skull. This is your warning......
-----

--Eudy vs. Zilva---------------------------------------
| Zilva:
| You are that cannoneer......
|
| Eudy:
| What? Do you have a problem with that?
|
|---VICTORY
| Eudy:
| I suggest you leave like a good little girl. Otherwise you're going to die.
|
| Zilva:
| Compared to my mission, my life means nothing.
|
|---DEFEAT
| Eudy:
| Agh, that hurts!
|
| Zilva:
| I avoided your vitals this time. Next time I will not show such a mercy.
|
| Eudy:
| ...That's too bad. I'm not the kind of obedient person to withdraw just
|   because of such a threat.
| Even if I have to flatter or kneel to others, in the end, I always get what I
|   want! That's the way I live.
-----


------------------Locations------------------                        [Map12.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
A large beltway of a desert to the west of the of the neighboring country's 
royal capital, Paltina

   --ソネッタの街 - The Town of Sonata
Large town on the way to the Meria Church

   --ライネの街 - The Town of Raine
A new town that has recently been gifted with an artificial oasis.

   --ミネルロード - Miner Road
Road leading directly to the capital. Obstruct to prevent the trafficker leader 
from reaching it!


--------------------On Map-------------------                        [Map12.07]
--バハラの荘園跡 - Ruins of the Bahara Mansion
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|   Desert Rose   |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| This spot looks different from the surrounding desert...
| ...Is this a rose? You sure are a tough one to grow in such a dry land.
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| This place seems different from the rest.
| ...Ah, a rose. It must have grown up strong to survive in such dry soil...
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| The map shows that someone's mansion used to stand on this spot.
| Oh? A rose that grows in the desert. It's pretty romantic.
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| It may be tough, but plants still live here.
| ...A rose. What amazing life force...
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| The soil in this spot looks to have been displaced...
| Did this used to be a flower bed? There are flowers that grow in the
|   desert...?
|
|---SLEIP
| Sleip:
| Hic, uegh... Hmm? Did I drink too much...
| I must be hallucinating... A rose blooming in the desert...
|
|---EUDY
| Eudy:
| Ah? There are plants growing here.
| This looks like a rose... It's done well to grow in a desert.
-----

--ソネッタの街 - The Town of Sonata - NO ROPE----------------
| Skeleton Youth:
| ...Ah? My body is in a bad state. The joints of my bones are loose...
| I used to cry a lot when I was young...
| It feels like that was just the other day. Time has passed me by so fast.
|   Boo-hoo-hoo~...
-----

--オアシス - Oasis-----------------------------------------
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|   Power Fruit   |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| A lake...? I'll refill our drinking water just in case.
| Oh? These trees have fruit on them. Let's see, I'll take one along.
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| Fuu... The desert is really cold at night, but the shore here is really calm.
| Ah, there are fruits here. No one'll get mad if we take one, right?
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| Yep, I thought that a desert highway would run by an oasis.
| Oh, there are fruits growing here... It's all thanks to the water's blessing.
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| An oasis. I'll secure some water right now.
| Ah? ...This is a power fruit. These are highly nutritional.
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| It's a pool of water... I should secure some drinking water since we're
|   crossing the desert...
| Ah? A fruit. I can secure some food as well. What good luck.
|
|---SLEIP
| Sleip:
| Hic! Uegh... Hm? What?
| A fruit... Not the best snack with sake. Uh hic!!
|
|---EUDY
| Eudy:
| An oasis...? I'll get some water just in case.
| Ah, what a tasty looking fruit.
-----

--ミネルロード - Miner Road----------------------------------
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|Coin of Affection|
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| Hm? Something's fallen on the highway...
| It's a coin with a strange design. Eh, I'll take it.
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| ...Mmn. Something stinks of money... I wonder what it is...
| Found it! ...But, this is a strange crest this coin's got.
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| Huh? What's this?
| Someone's dropped a coin. This crest looks a little familiar......
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| Hm... it's a coin.
| ...This coin has the crest of Fantasinia's royal family on one side.
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| Ah? Looks like someone's dropped a coin.
| This is... The kingdom's crest......
|
|---SLEIP
| Sleip:
| Uuh, hic... Hnm? I ran over something...
| A coin, eh... Got pulled along by my tail fin.
|
|---EUDY
| Eudy:
| ......Ah, someone's dropped a coin.
| ...It has the crest of the royal family on it. Was it a souvenir or
|   something?
-----

水面が光る湖 - Sparkling Lake - SLEIP------------------------

|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|     Stardust    |
|-----------------|

Sleip:
Hic! Uegh...... ...Hmm? The water's surface is shining?
Is there something at the bottom of the lake? Let's look around for a bit...
...There's a funny stone at the bottom. Why's it shining?

--ライネの街 - The Town of Raine - EUDY - FIRST TIME--------
|
|--------------------|
|     ACQUISITION    |
|-Received Treasure!-|
|     Misty Coat     |
|--------------------|
|
| Bar Girl:
| Ah? A member of an organization visiting us this late at night? How unusual.
| But anyone who's paying is a guest! Please, relax and enjoy yourself.
| But, you've quite the unusual appearance... I got it! Could you be a
|   magician!?
| A long time ago, a magician from the east forgot her coat here...
| Since you went to the trouble of coming here, why not take it with you!
| It's fine, it's fine! I've no magic myself, so I can't use it.
| It's not likely that its previous owner will come back for it, so please take
|   it!
|
|---EUDY - AFTERWARDS
| Bar Girl:
| The coat I gave you before looked to be of good quality, so please use it
|   with care.
| ...Eh? Its last owner? She was a magician that came from the east.
| She was wearing all white, and acted like someone from a respectable family.
|   I'm sure she really likes white.
| I heard that she war on her way home after searching for some magical item,
|   but I don't know the details.
|
|---NOT EUDY
| Bar Girl:
| Ah? A member of an organization visiting us this late at night? How unusual.
| But anyone who's paying is a guest! Please, relax and enjoy yourself.
| Hm? You are not from the kingdom or the church, but from a different country?
| ...I'm sure you have your reasons. It's okay, I won't ask.
| If you get some free time, how about going sightseeing! I'll show you around.
| Eh? An attraction around here? You've heard right!
| It's the lake near the town. At night, you can see a light shining from the
|   bottom of the lake. Isn't it mysterious!?
| I wonder if there's something at the bottom of the lake. Well, I don't really
|   know much about it...
-----


---------------------Loss--------------------                        [Map12.08]
Defeat - Eudy Defeated (1st)

|-----------------------|
|    KILLED IN ACTION   |
|-A Warrior has Fallen.-|
|-----------------------|

Eudy:
Aagh...! There are still... so many things... I wanted... to test......

|    |
|    | DEATH OF A HERO
| /\ | Eudy has fallen!
|/  \| 

While the Gram Blaze assaulted the trafficker squad in hopes of getting the 
Ur's Tear, Eudy's life was lost. The Gram Blaze, crushed one by one, was 
annihilated...

Defeat - Flag Reached (2nd)----------------------------

Garlot:
No, they got through!

Trafficker Leader:
Too bad! I'm not so slow as to be stopped by some common bandits!

Garlot:
We won't get another chance at this, huh...

|    |
|    |                IMPEDIMENT FAILED
| /\ | The trafficker leader has left the battlefield!
|/  \| 

The Gram Blaze assaulted the trafficker squad in hopes of getting the Ur's
Tear, but with the help of the Divine Order, they managed to get away...


========================================================================[Map13]
貴族の心、そして。
A Nobleman's Heart, and...
Jiccard Mountain - Central Camp


--------------------Intro--------------------                        [Map13.01]
In the snowy region of Mount Jiccard towering over the northern part of the 
empire, count Velleman lost contact with an acquaintance of who planned to 
visit the provincial city Tiera.

Because the boundary with the neighboring country is very vague around the 
summit of Mount Jiccard, smuggling and theft of smuggled items is frequent and 
the region has become known for its danger.

Gram Blaze, together with count Velleman, hurried to the area to search for the 
missing person. However, their way was obstructed by a violent snow storm.


----------------Before Battle----------------                        [Map13.02]
Shiskia:
......uuuuu.

Jenon:
Are you okay Shiskia? Do you want to borrow my jacket?

Shiskia:
I'm totally fine, really...... These clothes are surprisingly well
  insulated......

Jenon:
......Liar.

--HAVE BAIFU
| Shiskia:
| Baifu! Stay right next to me!
|
| Baifu:
| Baifu has seen snow a long time ago. The snow, it is nostalgic.
|
| Garlot:
| Oh yeah, you did come from the snowy country to the north, right Baifu?
|
| Baifu:
| Baifu is good at fighting in the snow. Trust Baifu when fighting in the snow,
|   and when fighting with words.
|
| Jenon:
| Baifu being good at verbal battles... Somehow I doubt that.
|
| Medoute:
