| But having come to such a cold place, I'm jealous of that fur of yours.
-----

Garlot:
At any rate, you came with us to rescue your friend.
That's surprisingly sympathetic of you, Velleman.

Velleman:
He is not a friend, he's an acquaintance.

Jenon:
Count Velleman, isn't it next to impossible to find someone if they become
  stranded on a snowy mountain?

Velleman:
This mountain is dotted with huts made to be used by those in trouble.
First focus on searching for those huts. Let's hope he's taken shelter.

Garlot:
That's right. We've managed to get this far. We definitely have to at least try
  to find him.

Medoute:
I would expect that due to these huts, this place would have become infested
  with bandits.

Velleman:
I have heard that as well. Be on alert for encounters while searching the huts,
  Garlot.

Garlot:
Don't worry, Velleman. It takes more that some petty bandits to take us down.
Alright, let's make a base here, and start the search!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Find Velleman's stranded friend!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
               Garlot dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Velleman:
I will wait in the central cabin. If anything happens, send a messenger to
  inform me.

Garlot:
Everyone, watch out for bad footing and blizzards!


------------------Mid Battle-----------------                        [Map13.03]
Medoute:
It's a race against time in such cold. Let's hurry, Garlot.

Garlot:
Yeah, got it.
But, you and Shiskia are quite something, Medoute. Doesn't this cold faze you
  at all?
I didn't think that anyone could bear to be on a snowy mountain in those
  clothes......

Medoute:
(It's not like I'm not cold!! I'm just trying to endure it!)

Shiskia:
(Aaah! Why did I wear these clothes!)

  -----------------------------------------------------
Bandit:
Uuh, cold... This year's gotten even colder...
Hmm? I think someone's marching through the snow. All units, hold your
  positions!

|----------------------------------|
|         SURPRISE ATTACK          |
|-Bewildered by a Surprise Attack!-|
|----------------------------------|

Bandit:
A guest has made it here. Everyone, come greet them!!

Garlot:
Kh, the bandits had a trap set in here. Looks like we've got no choice!!

  -----------------------------------------------------
Bandit:
Are these guys a search party or something? They're armed, though...

|----------------------------------|
|         SURPRISE ATTACK          |
|-Bewildered by a Surprise Attack!-|
|----------------------------------|

Bandit:
And it's not the equipment for climbing in the winter either. In that case,
  these guys are enemies!

Garlot:
Looks like we got caught in these bandits' web. Oh well, I guess we'll have to
  scatter them!!

  -----------------------------------------------------
Bandit:
...I'm tired. I'm past the age when I was excited to be a bandit...
If peace got restored in the cities of the empire, I'd like to move to a warm
  one...

|----------------------------------|
|         SURPRISE ATTACK          |
|-Bewildered by a Surprise Attack!-|
|----------------------------------|

Bandit:
...Hello there? We have a guest. Please stay and keep me company for a while!

Garlot:
Tch! They've shown up! Destroy them!!


-----------------After Battle----------------                        [Map13.04]
|----------------------------------|
|               RESCUE             |
|-Valiant Blade Delivers its Lord.-|
|----------------------------------|

Young Merchant:
W- who!?

--GARLOT
| Garlot:
| Calm down. I'm Garlot. A member of Velleman's personal army, Gram Blaze.
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| It's okay. You're an acquaintance of Velleman, right?
| We're here to help you. It's good that you have such a good friend, don't you
|   think?
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| You're an acquaintance of Count Velleman? We've finally found you.
| I'm Jenon, the strategist of the count's private army, Gram Blaze.
| We've been searching for you.
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| I am Count Velleman's subordinate. Calm yourself.
|
| Young Merchant:
| Master Velleman's...!
|
| Medoute:
| It appears that you were the one stranded. You can relax now.
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| I am a member of Count Velleman's private army.
|
| Young Merchant:
| Master Velleman's...!
|
| Aegina:
| I am not mistaken then, you are the one we were looking for.
| You must have been cold... Everything should be fine now.
-----

|    |
|    |       THIS LIFE TOO CAN BE SAVED
| /\ | Velleman's friend is under protection!!
|/  \| 

Garlot:
Velleman, we've found the person we were looking for.

Velleman:
Good. Is the merchandise safe?

Garlot:
Merchandise?

Young Merchant:
Yes master Velleman, all the goods are secure.

  -----------------------------------------------------
Young Merchant:
Master Velleman, thank you for coming to save me. Really, if I had been there
  an hour longer......

Velleman:
And you're certain that all the merchandise is alright?

Shiskia:
Wait, what's this about! You've done nothing but worry over some merchandise
  ever since we got here. A person's life is more important!

Velleman:
Jenon, this is the inventory. Make sure that everything's there.

Shiskia:
Hang on, hang on! Don't ignore me!

Velleman:
Quiet! This is a business transaction. Checking over the merchandise is most
  important!

Garlot:
A business transaction! What are you talking about! Weren't we here to rescue
  your acquaintance? Does that mean you tricked us!!

Velleman:
This man is both an acquaintance and a merchant. I did not trick you.

Jenon:
T- this inventory...... it's weapons. This merchandise is weapons. And so many
  too.
Bows and arrows, swords, axes, spears...... And also, high efficiency gunpowder
  the import of which is forbidden.
You're smuggling these things, Count Velleman.

Garlot:
What the hell is this!

Velleman:
Yes, these are weapons. I am involved in arms smuggling.
To strengthen an army weaponry is essential. However, buying so many arms from
  within the empire places one under suspicion for rebellion.
Therefore I requested that this man, a merchant from a neighboring country,
  smuggle these in for me.

Young Merchant:
Master Velleman offered to buy these arms on better terms than any of my other
  customers.
He pays well, so he is a frequent customer of mine.

Velleman:
And of course, the arms that your subordinates use are also replenished by him.
  Do you have complaints, Garlot?

Garlot:
......Then, you could have said that from the beginning.

Velleman:
If I had done so, you may have decided not to go, or not done your best.

Garlot:
...............

Velleman:
I don't think I was wrong when I made this choice.
Indeed, I'm sure you are quite capable.
However, it is also true that in the past you've recklessly run off without
  listening to my orders.
I had to be certain that today's smuggling would be a success.
That's why I didn't give you this information. That's all.

Garlot:
Velleman, you really are selfish......
But that's the source of your strength. I understand that completely.
But despite that... No, because of that...
I was really happy when you ordered us to do something like helping a
  friend......
But it was a lie. You tricked us......

Velleman:
That's enough, Garlot.
You wanted strength? If so then you'd best quickly come to terms with these
  feelings.
......We're leaving. Medoute, take command in place of your captain.

Medoute:
......Understood.

Garlot:
...............

Young Merchant:
Mister Garlot, if you look at the end result, Master Velleman did save me.

Garlot:
I know. Velleman isn't wrong.
I understand that. It's just my feelings that are the problem...

Shiskia:
......Garlot.

Garlot:
Agh, damn! What the hell! Why do I feel like this!!
...Damn!


------------------Locations------------------                        [Map13.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
Camping ground on the highest mountain of the Jiccard Mountain Range in the 
western part of the empire

   --山小屋 - Mountain Hut
A small hut meant as shelter in emergency situations. Might have become a 
bandit stronghold...

   --監視小屋 - Observation Cabin
A tall building. During bad weather it completely fails in its role

   --山小屋 - Mountain Hut
A small hut meant as shelter in emergency situations. Looks like it's become a 
bandit stronghold...

   --山小屋 - Mountain Hut
A small hut meant as shelter in emergency situations. Are there bandits here!?

   --山小屋 - Mountain Hut
A small hut meant as shelter in emergency situations. Bandits may be lurking 
here...

   --奥深くの山小屋 - Hut Deep in the Mountains
Found deep in the snowy mountains, a hut buried in the snow

   --奥深くの山小屋 - Hut Deep in the Mountains
Found deep in the snowy mountains, a hut that looks to be buried in the snow


--------------------On Map-------------------                        [Map13.07]
--奥深くの山小屋 - Hut Deep in the Mountains
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|   Force Apple   |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| This shelter looks uninhabited. And there are no bandits either...
| There's an apple... How long has it been here? Is it still eatable?
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| ...There's no one here. This isn't the place either...
| Ah, an apple. It looks fresh. It won't give someone a stomachache, right?
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| An uninhabited cabin...
| ...There are fruits in here. And thanks to the cold weather, it's still
|   fresh.
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| There are no signs of anyone here. The hearth has no traces of use either.
| ...There's an apple, even in this cold. Is it still eatable?
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| This cabin is uninhabited... Our target isn't here either.
| Ah, an apple. Is it okay to eat? There don't seem to be any bad bugs in it...
-----

山小屋 - Mountain Hut-------------------------------------

Adventurer:
Your appearance... Have you come from the base of the mountain?
There are many dangers on a snowy mountain... Be sure to take precautions.
Eh? What kind of dangers?
Let's see... Be most vigilant of bad weather.
Particularly the blizzards at night. Standing on snowy terrain at night is
  extremely dangerous. Please be attentive.
Then there are the snow fields that can trip you up. You can't just march
  through those.
If you carelessly walk into one, you can freeze to death if you're there for
  too many nights.
Make sure to be careful.

--モヴの木 - Mov Tree--------------------------------------
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|  Mov Mov Fruit  |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| There are fruit bearing trees even here... It sure is sturdy.
| Maybe it'll share that strength with us. I'll take one along.
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| What a big tree...
| There's fruit on it... I wonder if it's tasty.
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| This tree... I remember seeing it in an encyclopedia before.
| The fruit are very nourishing. I'll take one with me.
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| What an unusual tree. Even I've never seen this kind before.
| I'll bring one of the fruits along. When we get back to the grounds I'll do
|   some research on whether it's eatable.
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| What an incredibly thick tree... It must have great vigor to live on a snowy
|   mountain.
| ...This tree has fruit on it. I bet they would be good for one's health.
-----

--底見えぬ雪の原 - Deep Snow Field----------------------------
|
|------------------|
|     DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!- |
|Thousand Year Snow|
|------------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| The snow around here doesn't melt, huh...
| Could it be that it can't melt? Let's take a little back with us.
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| I've gotten used to seeing the snow by now. Still, it's quite unusual.
| Since we've come all the way out here let's bring some back in memory of this
|   day.
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| ...Oh yeah, magical energy gathers in snow when it lies for a long time, or
|   so I've read before.
| If that's true, then it shouldn't melt even at higher temperatures. Let's
|   take some back as a test.
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| Thousand year snow... I've heard that it won't melt even if taken somewhere
|   warm......
| I wonder if it's true. I'll take some back to test it.
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| This snowscape seems to go on forever... I'd like to at least show some snow
|   to Sis, since she stayed at the grounds this time.
| Yes, let's bring some snow back. There's so much of it, I'm sure it won't
|   melt right away.
-----

--監視小屋 - Observation Cabin - FIRST TIME----------------
|
|--------------------|
|     ACQUISITION    |
|-Received Treasure!-|
|      Blizzard      |
|--------------------|
|
| Old Watchperson:
| A survivor? You are going to look for him?
| For those who live below, the mountain is ruthless. I believe it would be
|   better to wait for information from the search party we sent out...
| ...You still plan to go? If so I won't stop you...
| ...You are courageous people... Please take this along.
| It was found in a field where snow never stops falling, a tactics card made
|   by nature, with the power to bring forth blizzards...
| ...Hm, don't worry about it. It is rather difficult to use such a power on a
|   snowy mountain.
|
|---AFTERWARDS
| Old Watchperson:
| The snowy mountain is dotted with cabins for survivors to take refuge in.
| The cabins may be watched by thieves wanting to take the survivors'
|   possessions. Please be careful.
-----


---------------------Loss--------------------                        [Map13.08]
Defeat - Out of Cards (1st)

While marching through the snow on an unfamiliar snowy mountain, Gram Blaze was 
scattered due to a flaw in tactics, and was forced to disband...


========================================================================[Map14]
奪う者、奪われる者
The Robbers and the Robbed
Domain of Count Anise


--------------------Intro--------------------                        [Map14.01]
The domain governed by Count Anise, a distant relative of Count Velleman, has 
recently come under repeated assault by a gang of bandits.

Count Anise, having heard of Gram Blaze's fame, pleaded for help from Count 
Velleman who dispatched Garlot and company, deciding to do him a favor.

Gram Blaze departed westward from Tiera, to the territory of Count Anise......


----------------Before Battle----------------                        [Map14.02]
Shiskia:
You're very eager today, Garlot.

Garlot:
That's because this job's got no complicated politics involved.
And since our opponents are just bandits who hurt people, I can fight as much
  as I want.

Shiskia:
I can't stomach coming here at the request of some count, though...

Jenon:
Well, that's just how it is.
Gram Blaze has been getting famous. Nobles are starting to ask for us by name.

Medoute:
Looks like Count Velleman's done well advertizing us.

Jenon:
Looks like. Our name, along with the amount of bad guys we're removed, has been
  spreading around the nobleman class.

Shiskia:
Wait, so it's good for Velleman that we're getting famous?

Medoute:
If we defeat the evils that soldiers and guards just stand back and watch, we
  will be the only ones the nobles are talking about.
And in the nobles' sphere, those who are talked about are the ones who win.

Shiskia:
Keh, that's why the nobles are so disgusting.
But, you know, if we start to stand out too much, won't people start trying to
  get rid of us?

Medoute:
Right now we're just trying to help maintain public order. We should be fine,
  don't you think?

Shiskia:
Sigh, if you say so......

Scout:
Reporting, Lady Shiskia! A corner of the town is in flames!

|-----------------|
|      SORTIE     |
|-Follow my Lead!-|
|-----------------|

Shiskia:
What!? No way, are thieves attacking the city!?

Garlot:
All units prepare for battle! Move quickly!!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Exterminate the thieves!!
/----------------

     ----------------------Defeat--/
                  Garlot dies...  /
All the villages are destroyed.../
      Use up all your cards...  /
          ---------------------/

Garlot:
We were right, those are thieves!

Thief Leader:
Who are they? Soldiers? No, that's not it.
At best they're some worthless mercenaries, hired by the nobles for loose
  change.
None of you guys falter! Meet them head on!


-----------------After Battle----------------                        [Map14.04]
Thief Leader:
These guys are strong!?
Damn it!! We're pulling out, guys!

|--------------------|
|     WITHDRAWAL     |
|-Forced to Retreat.-|
|--------------------|

|    |
|    |             THE VICTORY WITH SORROW
| /\ | The thieves attacking the city are retreating!!
|/  \| 

Garlot:
You're not getting away! After them!!

Medoute:
Let them go, Garlot! First we must put out the fire.

Garlot:
......Yes, you're right.

  -----------------------------------------------------
Shiskia:
I've gone around the city once, and it's in really bad shape.

Garlot:
It's like this town didn't put up any resistance at all before we got here.
  Doesn't this town have any guards?

Shiskia:
It looks like there used to be a nobleman's private army, but they were
  dissolved about a month ago.

Jenon:
I looked in the lord's mansion, but it's long since empty.

Garlot:
What!? Then...

Jenon:
This town's been abandoned by its lord.
It's clear that that's the reason we were involved in this.

Garlot:
Damn! What the hell is this!!

Shiskia:
Aah, really, nobles are so lazy.

Garlot:
Then we've got to protect this town.

Shiskia:
I sent a scout after those guys that ran away, so I bet we'll know where they
  are soon.
According to the townspeople, they've got a base in Crade Forest to the west of
  here.

Garlot:
Alright, as soon as we know where their base is, we'll begin our attack!

Medoute:
I thought Velleman's order were just to drive back the bandits.

Garlot:
I know that!
Like I said, we're gonna protect the town!
Don't stop us, Medoute!

Medoute:
Ah, well, it's useless to try and stop you. That's just the kind of guy you
  are.

Jenon:
Yep, this is how things'll work out in the end anyways.

Shiskia:
What, you're not interested in this, Jenon?

Jenon:
I'm interested. After all, we're fighting to protect all the beautiful girls
  that live in this city.

Shiskia:
This again!


------------------Locations------------------                        [Map14.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
Town to the west of Tiera, governed by Count Anise

   --自警組織詰め所 - Town Guard Office
Office of the unofficial town guard that defends the territory

   --アライク孤児院 - Alike Orphanage
Orphanage where children with no relatives live huddled together

   --トリゼデの村 - Town of Trizette
A town near the castle walls. It seems to have fallen into ruin...


--------------------On Map-------------------                        [Map14.07]
自警組織詰め所 - Town Guard Office

Injured Soldier:
By any chance, are you the private army we've been expecting?
You really came... I don't know whether to thank you or apologize...
This is the town guard office, but there are only three of us here.
The other two went out to guide the people... I'm holding down the fort here.
...That's too few, you say?
There's only the three of us left to protect the town and the people. That's
  all there is to it......
But now's not the time for a detailed explanation.
...We are the ones who should be protecting the city, so it may be shameless of
  me to ask, but please! Protect this town!
The way I am... I just don't have enough strength. ...Please......!

--広場 - Plaza-------------------------------------------
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|   Sealed Purse  |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| Hm? Something's on the ground...
| A bag? Let's see what's inside... It won't open! W- what's going on?
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| Hm? Someone dropped something...
| It's a bag, but... I can't get it open... Is it locked from the inside?
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| Oh, someone dropped a bag...
| Hm? What's with this bag... It won't open! Am I really that incompetent?
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| Mn? Something's fallen here... A bag?
| Mn, hmn... What's with this bag! It doesn't open!?
| S- strange... I can't open a simple bag...
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| Someone dropped a bag...
| Ah? The opening is tightly closed and refuses to open.
-----

--領主の館前 - In Front of the Lord's Mansion---------------
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|   Silver Badge  |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| Is this the lord's mansion?
| Oh? Someone dropped a sparkling badge. I think I'll take it.
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| ...What a stupidly big mansion.
| Really, it's like it's standing here to tell how rich its owner is. Gees, I
|   hate these things...
| And this badge, is it a belonging of the guy who lives here too? Hmph! I'm
|   taking it.
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| This looks to be the region's lord's mansion.
| Oh, someone dropped a badge. Should I take it?
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| Mn? Something's lying over here...
| It's not a very good medal, but I suppose I'll take it.
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| Am I in the heart of the city now?
| Ah, a badge. I think I'll take it.
-----

--アライク孤児院 - Alike Orphanage - FIRST TIME---------------
|
|-------------------------|
|        ACQUISITION      |
|   -Received Treasure!-  |
|Hero Badge -> Insect Cage|
|-------------------------|
|
| Girl from the Orphanage:
| Every year around this time I go to Crade Forest to catch bugs. I go to catch
|   butterflies.
| It's really fun, but... The priest here said we can't go outside, so I can't
|   go...
| Ah! Is that really a hero badge?
| Wow, that's so cool...
| Eh? I can have it, really? Waah! Thank you!
| Then you can have this in exchange!
| Take care of it!
|
|---AFTERWARDS/NO HERO BADGE
| Priest:
| ...Who would you be? You do not look like mountain bandits...
| You came to protect the town at the request of Count Anise? Oh, what does
|   this mean......
| No, we really are grateful. I was merely surprised.
| How could I ever thank you...
|
| Girl from the Orphanage:
| Father, you sure I can't go outside yet?
|
| Priest:
| You must not. Not until I tell you that it's alright.
|
| Girl from the Orphanage:
| Tch, aw well. I wanted to catch a butterfly...
|
| Priest:
| I do not care what happens to me, but please, for these children...!
-----

--離れの物置き - Lost Item Storage---------------------------
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|      Beads      |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| Hm? What's in this pouch?
| Is this some toy for girls? I suppose I'll take it, but only this time...
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| Ah? What's this pouch?
| Wow... These beads are so pretty. What a lovely shine...
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| Mn... What is this thing...
| It's shiny... is it a material for making toys?
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| ...I wonder what this pouch is for.
| There are beads inside. ...I've never played with these before.
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| I wonder what's inside this bag...
| Ah, there are beads. They have a brilliant shine.
|
|---MIZER
| Mizer:
|
|---SLEIP
| Sleip:
|
|---PAMELA
| Pamela:
|
|---BAIFU
| Baifu:
|
|---EUDY
| Eudy:
-----

--トリゼデの村 - Town of Trizette - FIRST TIME---------------
|
|----------------------------------|
|            ACQUISITION           |
|       -Received Treasure!-       |
|Meimel Bouquet -> Meimel Potpourri|
|----------------------------------|
|
| Old Man:
| I make my living working with flowers...
| If the thieves were to attack, I've no strength to fight back...... It's
|   disappointing of me.
| Oh? Is that a bouquet of Meimel flowers you have there?
| Could you let me borrow it? Hm, I won't do anything bad to it.
| There, here you go. The smell of this potpourri should fill you with energy.
| No need to thank me. As long as the potpourri I made can help you, I'm happy.
|
|---AFTERWARDS
| Old Man:
| Those thieves always come from the west...
| I'm sure they must have their headquarters in Crade Forest.
|
|---NO MEIMEL BOUQUET
| Old Man:
| I make my living working with flowers...
| If the thieves were to attack, I've no strength to fight back...... It's
|   disappointing of me.
| Those thieves always come from the west...
| I'm sure they must have their headquarters in Crade Forest.
-----

--町外れの排水路 - Drainage Outside of Town-------------------
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|       Rag       |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| ......Hm? Is there something in this ditch? This is...
| ...I thought it might be something worthwhile, but it's just a dirty rag.
|   What a waste of time, sigh...
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| Ah? What's this? Something's submerged in this canal...
| Uegh, it's a worn out cloth. ...Eeh, why did I bother getting this thing...
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| Oh, there's something...
| I thought it might be a map or something, but it's nothing but a rag. Too
|   bad...
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| ...There's something submerged at the bottom. Let's salvage it!
| Hmm, I've pulled up something worthless.
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| Ah? What's that; there's something submerged...
| ...T- this is! Just a rag...
-----


---------------------Loss--------------------                        [Map14.08]
Defeat - Villages Destroyed (1st)

Garlot:
I couldn't defend the town. Me of all people...

|    |
|    |      IMPEDIMENT FAILED
| /\ | Failed to defend the town...!
|/  \| 

In the battle with the thieves assaulting Count Anise's territory, the central 
city was destroyed; Gram Blaze failed to save the town...


========================================================================[Map15]
それぞれの事情
Every Circumstance
Crade Forest - Thief Hideout


--------------------Intro--------------------                        [Map15.01]
Gram Blaze, having arrived at Count Anise's domain, encountered the raiding 
thieves, and drove them out. However, Count Anise had already abandoned the 
town, which had fallen to ruin, and its citizens had given up hope.

While resenting the ruler's attitude and the bandits' actions, Garlot once 
again keenly felt his own powerlessness.

According to the scout Shiskia sent out, the thieves, having fled, looked to 
have taken refuge in Crade Forest to the west of the town. On his own judgment 
Garlot mobilized the private army, and marched into the deep forest to 
eradicate the group of thieves......


----------------Before Battle----------------                        [Map15.02]
Shiskia:
The scout's come back. The thief base is just up ahead.

Jenon:
Garlot, I'd like to take some time now to think of a strategy.

Garlot:
Rather, you want to tell me not to just attack from the front?

Jenon:
Exactly.
Honestly, you never change. Really.
According to the info we got from the scout, the thieves have made headquarters
  of the fortresses abandoned by the feudal lord.
Although the enemy's fighting is amateurish, it'll be problematic if they hole
  up within the fortresses. So, I propose a surprise attack.

Medoute:
Sorry, Jenon, but that plan would likely be useless.
Look at the fortresses. The thieves probably figured that we'll be coming to
  attack, and already prepared for a siege.

Jenon:
What's with that......

Garlot:
Too bad, Jenon. Looks like a frontal attack is the only way to go.

Medoute:
Our only consolation is that they are in fact amateurs.

Jenon:
Hm...? They've split their fighting strength up between the three fortresses.
  That's stupid......
They certainly don't have a very good strategist.

Garlot:
Okay, enough already. Don't say anymore.

Jenon:
Eh? Are you saying that it's a good thing that Gram Blaze has me?

Garlot:
Yes, that's it!

   /--Victory--------------
  / Seize the first thief stronghold!!
 / (Place a unit on the fortress!!)
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
               Garlot dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Thief Leader:
I see. I was right, those guys did come.
According to our friend Pandra, this rabble belongs to a nobleman by the name
  of Velleman.
They are no more that a group of thugs, after all.
Send a messenger to the front fortress. Have everyone strengthen their
  defenses!

Jenon:
Garlot, the enemy's formation is weak. A sudden advance should lead to certain
  victory!

Garlot:
Alright then, don't let up! Attack!!


------------------Mid Battle-----------------                        [Map15.03]
|-----------------|
|     CONTROL     |
|-Seized Control!-|
|-----------------|

Garlot:
Alright! That's one fortress captured!

Private Army Soldier:
Master Garlot, we found women and children and elderly inside the fortress.

--HAVE BAIFU
| Baifu:
| Thieves are dreadful. They even eat people?
|
| Garlot:
| I doubt that's it. Are they people taken from the town?
|
|---??? (OTHER?)
| Aegina:
| I bet they're people the thieves have kidnapped from the city. They cannot be
|   forgiven!
-----

Private Army Soldier:
Well... they said that they are relatives of the thieves.

Garlot:
What!?

Private Army Soldier:
It doesn't look like they will defy us. What should we do with them?

Garlot:
What to do, you say. Gather them in one place in the fortress, and make sure
  someone keeps watch.
(Thieves have families too? Well, that's obvious if you think about it. Tch,
  this is getting complicated...)

|    |
|    |          OCCUPIED THE FORT
| /\ | The first thief fortress as fallen!!
|/  \| 

Thief Leader:
The first fortress has been taken!?
There should have been women and children in there! What of them!?

Thief Messenger:
They had no chance to escape. I would guess, they've been killed by now......

Thief Leader:
Damn it...! Those nobleman's dogs!!

|-----------------|
|      SORTIE     |
|-Follow my Lead!-|
|-----------------|

   /--Victory--------------
  / Seize the second thief stronghold!!
 / (Place a unit on the fortress!!)
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
               Garlot dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

  -----------------------------------------------------
|-----------------|
|     CONTROL     |
|-Seized Control!-|
|-----------------|

Garlot:
We've got this fortress too......

Private Army Soldier:
Master Garlot! The thieves' families are here too!

Garlot:
Again......?
Gather them together somewhere. Be sure you don't scare them!
Damn, what's going on! At this rate we'll look like the bad guys...

|    |
|    |          OCCUPIED THE FORT
| /\ | The second thief fortress as fallen!!
|/  \| 

Thief Messenger:
The second fortress has fallen! It's just a matter of time until the enemy gets
  here...

Thief Leader:
Again!
It doesn't matter, no matter what happens to us! But we must protect the
  towns!!

|-----------------|
|      SORTIE     |
|-Follow my Lead!-|
|-----------------|

   /--Victory--------------
  / Seize the third thief stronghold!!
 / (Place a unit on the fortress!!)
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
               Garlot dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/


-----------------After Battle----------------                        [Map15.04]
Thief Leader:
Damn it!  The nobles are stealing from us again!
If that's how it is, I'll go to our friend Pandra and have him send
  reinforcements!
Don't you forget me, Red! I'll come back, and take revenge for the villagers!

|------------------|
|      RETREAT     |
|-Time to Regroup.-|
|------------------|

Private Army Soldier:
The thief leader's escaped! Shall we send pursuers?

Garlot:
Yes, go ahead.

  -----------------------------------------------------
|-----------------|
|     CONTROL     |
|-Seized Control!-|
|-----------------|

Garlot:
All the fortresses have fallen.

Private Army Soldier:
Master Garlot! We've captured the thief leader!

Garlot:
I see... Bring him here!

|    |
|    |          OCCUPIED THE FORT
| /\ | The third thief fortress as fallen!!
|/  \| 

Garlot:
You're the thief leader?

Thief Leader:
That's right, and what the hell is your name?

Garlot:
I'm Garlot. The captain of Gram Blaze.

Thief Leader:
Gram Blaze? Those nobleman's dogs? I've heard of you.

Garlot:
Answer me one thing, why did you attack the town?

Thief Leader:
Before that you tell me, what were your thoughts when you killed women and
  children!!

Jenon:
You mean your families? They're all fine. We protected them.

Thief Leader:
What! W- what... I see... thank god.
...The reason we attacked the town, hm. That's so that we could feed our
  families.
We didn't become thieves because we wanted to.
With the nobles' heavy taxes there was nothing else we could do.

Medoute:
Do you really think we'll believe such a stupid reason?

Thief Leader:
It's true that we've done some bad things, but this our defiance of the nobles'
  taxes! It's justice! Is that really so wrong!

Garlot:
Shut up! If that's your reason then why did you set the town on fire!! Why did
  you kill the villagers!

Thief Leader:
......The only ones who live in that town are people trying to suck up to the
  count.
And you guys too, before you became dogs to the nobles, didn't you kill and
  steal as well?

Garlot:
The only ones we went after were bad guys who preyed on others! Such as guys
  like you!!

Thief Leader:
Keh, you're calling us bad guys... Well, nothing to be done about that.
You guys beat us. Do what you want.

Garlot:
That's fine. The punishment for one commanding thieves is death! That's the
  law!!

Thief Leader:
Do it, I dare you.
But one day you'll see things as I have. When you meet the one who'll defeat
  you......

Garlot:
Shut up! I'll kill you myself!!

|---------------------------|
|         EXECUTION         |
|-Because it is Punishment.-|
|---------------------------|

Garlot:
...............

Shiskia:
Garlot, are you okay?

Garlot:
......No problem.

Shiskia:
The reason they became thieves, huh.
Somehow, society's a lot more complicated than I thought. It makes me feel ill
  sometimes......

Garlot:
What those guys did was not due to some reason, just evil. They can never be
  forgiven.
But, I see what you mean too, Shiskia.
The reason is surely somewhere else.

Jenon:
If you go back to the root of why they became thieves, the reason is this
  country.
Of course, that doesn't mean they're not responsible as well.

Medoute:
Well, isn't that why Count Velleman is trying to change the country?
I think he's got some chance to succeed.
With us as the means of that reformation.

Garlot:
...............

Medoute:
That commander that you executed, you can't forget about him.
We must fight so that none of his children end up becoming thieves again.

Garlot:
......That's right, isn't it. I'm sure we'll change the world. And we'll do it
  in a different way than these guys!
Now, let's head back to Tiera.


------------------Locations------------------                        [Map15.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
Deep in the forest, the fortresses of a gang of thieves

   --盗賊団第１砦 - First Thief Fortress
Fortress serving as advance guard. Responsible for surveillance

   --盗賊団第２砦 - Second Thief Fortress
A fortress standing deeper in the forest

   --盗賊団第３砦 - Third Thief Fortress
A fortress functioning as the thieves' headquarters. Protected by overgrown 
trees

   --森の中の集落 - Village in the Forest
What kind of people live in a region used by thieves as headquarters?

   --森の中の集落 - Village in the Forest
Village in the region serving a thief headquarters


--------------------On Map-------------------                        [Map15.07]
--茂み - Thicket
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|    Sweetberry   |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| Hm? Something's growing here...
| A sweetberry plant. Let's see, I'll take some.
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| Ah? What is that, it smells sweet...
| Aah! There are sweetberries growing here! I'll take these with me!
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| Hm? What is that, there's a faint, sweet smell...
| I'll pick some of this fruit.
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| Hm. Something's growing here...
| Sweetberries? They can be used for rations. I'll pick a few.
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| Oh? What is this scent?
| Aah! Sweetberries! This is the first time I've seen them in the wild... I'll
|   pick some.
-----

森の中の集落 - Village in the Forest-------------------------

Old Woman:
I have lived a long life, I care not if you take it...
...If we do not resist you won't kill us? I see.
But are you not a nobleman's soldiers come to pass judgment upon us?
What? You're not here to pass judgment?
I see, in that case there is an old story that I would like to tell you.
Everyone here previously lived in a peasant village.
But, unable to bear the heavy taxes, they abandoned their village, and came to
  live, hidden, deep in the forest.
However, inside the forest one can't make enough land to farm.
To eke out a living with their families, they had no choice but to become
  robbers...
Then a few years later a man by the name of Pandra came and supplied us with
  weapons.
And our young ones mistook those weapons for power, leading to the current
  situation.

森の中の集落 - Village in the Forest-------------------------

Mother:
S- spare me! Please, just my life!!
I don't care what happens to me, but for my daughter......
Ah? If I don't resist, you won't kill us? I see......
Yes, if we didn't rebel against the nobles, everything would have been fine.
After all that happened, the neighboring town calls us thieves......
What should we do...

--森の中の暗がり - Dark Spot in the Forest--------------------
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|   Poison Viper  |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| Uah! What's this...!!
| Tch! Don't take me lightly! There!!
| Caught you... Man, that was close.
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| Eh, what? What?
| Kh... Don't get cocky!
| A viper? Ah, you startled me...
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| Whoops! And what is this...
| Girls hate abrupt strikes like this, you know!!
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| ...............
| There!!
| ...A viper? These guys are a nuisance due to their poison. Let's tie it up
|   while it's stunned.
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| Kyah! W- what was that?
| If you take me lightly, I will get angry! Tah!
| ...A snake? It jumped out so suddenly, anyone would be surprised.
|
|---BAIFU
| Baifu:
| ...............
| Gyah! Something bit Baifu!! Why you!!
| A viper... Well, Baifu can ignore it this time. How was that.
-----


---------------------Loss--------------------                        [Map15.08]
Defeat - Garlot Defeated (1st, 2nd, 3rd)

Having met with great resistance while trying to occupy the thief base, Gram 
Blaze's captain, Garlot, lost his life, and Gram Blaze vanished from history's 
stage...


========================================================================[Map16]
帝国の生み出したモノ
That which is Born of the Empire
Mount Tokino - Mountain Stronghold


--------------------Intro--------------------                        [Map16.01]
The city of Tiera is the heart of commerce and the second largest city of the 
Bronquian Empire.

The region from Tiera and westward is geographically far from the capital. With 
the public order deteriorating from before, those rising in revolt have once 
again come to gather here.

With the west in such a state in the last few years particularly, the rebel 
force has been gaining power. And an abundance of funds, rumored to have been 
provided by a neighboring country, and a detailed system of management has 
allowed their sphere of influence to gradually spread.

Considered organized criminals in the capital, the rebel force urged 
sympathizers from all lands that faced subjugation. And so, naturally, the 
powerful and spoken of private army of Count Velleman too was contacted.

If war were to break out, Tiera would be the first in the line of fire. So 
Garlot began advancing on the rebel army's frontline base on Tokino Mountain.


----------------Before Battle----------------                        [Map16.02]
Garlot:
Since when is this place a front base?

Medoute:
This is a strategic location from which one can directly attack Tiera.
Letting it get invaded is proof that the empire is losing its control.

Velleman:
As you said. And because of that lack of control, these men could get power.
Though recklessly raising a rebellion is something that an incompetent person
  would do, it is one way to establish reform.

Jenon:
Count Velleman, the reason you've come to the front this time, could you
  be......

Velleman:
You want to know if I am here to try and gain allies?

Garlot:
H- hey, you're not serious!

Velleman:
Don't get confused, Garlot. The chance of that is near zero.
According to my information it looks like the rebel army leader has taken
  command at this front.
If these men fight with any kind of creed, I want to know their motives.

Medoute:
You want to confirm if there is any value in using them, then?

Velleman:
That's correct.

Jenon:
A thousand to one, if you can use the rebel army, then Gram Blaze......

Velleman:
I expect you are the stronger force.

Shiskia:
Hang on a sec! Are you saying that if you can use the rebel army you won't need
  us!?

Velleman:
The chance of that is slim.

Shiskia:
That's not an answer!

Garlot:
Stop it, Shiskia. It's obvious that those with no power are unnecessary. Right?

Velleman:
Then you understand.

Garlot:
If we're the best, we've nothing to worry about.

Shiskia:
That's true, but......

Medoute:
Sorry to interrupt in the middle of a conversation, but the first fortress has
  come into sight.

Lazy, Leaderlike Man:
If it isn't Gram Blaze. I've been hearing rumors about you.
Hm...? What's this, what's this, the count has personally come along. Or maybe
  a double?
But I should get to the introductions. I am Pandra, leader of the rebel army.

Velleman:
So you know what I look like. You wouldn't happen to be former imperial
  soldier, would you?

Pandra:
Very observant, count.
By the way, you there with the red hair. I've heard rumors that you used to be
  an outlaw, is that true?

Garlot:
What about it?

Pandra:
In that case we're comrades, so to speak.
I'm disappointed that you're a nobleman's dog now.
How about it, why not destroy the empire with me!

Garlot:
What!?

Medoute:
He's trying to provoke you, Garlot.

Pandra:
Of course, first you'd have to get rid of Count Velleman, well?
Even a lapdog can bite. Show me if you still have fangs.

Velleman:
But a wise dog chooses what he bites. A foolish stray has nothing besides his
  fangs.

Pandra:
You're saying that I'm a stupid stray?

Velleman:
If not that, then a defeated one. On a mountain so far from the capital all you
  can do is howl.

Pandra:
......How dare you insult me.
I'll cut you into pieces for that nerve!

Velleman:
The moment he sees that he can't win with words, he resorts to force with
  passion. What a mongrel......

Garlot:
Velleman, should we take care of them?

Velleman:
Go ahead, I've seen the extent of his worth. As I thought, I can't use him.

Garlot:
In short, you've picked us then!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Defeat the rebel army leader, Pandra!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
               Garlot dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Garlot:
I see their defenses are some improvised yet tough fortresses......

Pandra:
I'll make you regret insulting me!


------------------Mid Battle-----------------                        [Map16.03]
|-----------------|
|     CONTROL     |
|-Seized Control!-|
|-----------------|

--FIRST FORTRESS TAKEN WITH - GARLOT
| Garlot:
| Alright, this fortress is down!
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| This point has been secured! Now we just need to wait for one more group to
|   get control of the other one.
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| This fortress has fallen. Now we wait for the group on the other side to
|   advance.
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| The fortress has fallen. We will maintain this position.
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| The frontline fortress has fallen. We will wait here for further
|   instructions!
-----

  -----------------------------------------------------
|-----------------|
|     CONTROL     |
|-Seized Control!-|
|-----------------|

Garlot:
Next is the central fortress!

Pandra:
Those guys aren't half bad...

Rebel Soldier:
C- commander! If those guys break their way through here...

Pandra:
Relax. The guards at the central fortress are strong.
They won't let them pass so easily.

|-----------------|
|      SORTIE     |
|-Follow my Lead!-|
|-----------------|

  -----------------------------------------------------
|-----------------|
|     CONTROL     |
|-Seized Control!-|
|-----------------|

--CENTRAL FORTRESS TAKEN WITH - GARLOT
| Garlot:
| The central fortress has been secured!
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| Report to Garlot's group! Occupation of the central fortress is a success!
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| The central fortress has fallen as well. Now those guys are like trapped
|   rats.
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| The enemy's main force is now a stone's throw away. ...But this was
|   suspiciously quick.
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| The central fortress has surrendered. They had less resistance than I
|   expected...
-----

AFTERWARDS

Garlot:
Okay! Only a little left!

|    |
|    |             SECURED A FOOTHOLD
| /\ | Approaching the rebel army leader, Pandra!!
|/  \| 

Rebel Soldier:
C- commander! They're coming!

Pandra:
Calm down, panicking at a time like this leads to defeat.
...I know! Bring out that thing we bought the other day!

Rebel Soldier:
That thing...? You mean that gun you kept haggling and haggling over?

Pandra:
Yes that! Get it ready, quick!

|-----------------|
|      SORTIE     |
|-Follow my Lead!-|
|-----------------|

Garlot:
What is that thing? No way, is that a canon!?

  /--Victory--------------
 / Defeat the rebel army leader, Pandra!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
               Garlot dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

  -----------------------------------------------------
|-------------------|
|      BARRAGE      |
|-Fire in the Hole!-|
|-------------------|

Rebel Soldier:
Ufufufu... Did I load the shells correctly? I did, right? I read the manual,
  but......
Yeah, it'll be fine for sure. Eey, fire~!!

  -----------------------------------------------------
|-------------------|
|      BARRAGE      |
|-Fire in the Hole!-|
|-------------------|

Rebel Soldier:
Amazing! Such tremendous power! No one can get close like this!!
This is kind of exciting... Bang them up some more!!

  -----------------------------------------------------
|-------------------|
|      BARRAGE      |
|-Fire in the Hole!-|
|-------------------|

Garlot:
We went to all the trouble of taking this canon... It'd be nice if we could
  turn it on the enemy......
...But, how to put this, how does this thing work? Umm, maybe this......
Ah...

  -----------------------------------------------------
|-------------------|
|      BARRAGE      |
|-Fire in the Hole!-|
|-------------------|

Garlot:
It shoots quite well my way. ...Hm? That's some good damage.

Shiskia:
Hang on, Garlot! If you're shooting it recklessly you're just be wasteful! Give
  it here.
...Uum, hmm~? How do you use this...
Ah...

  -----------------------------------------------------
|-------------------|
|      BARRAGE      |
|-Fire in the Hole!-|
|-------------------|

Shiskia:
Ahaha, it shot so suddenly. Well, I think it worked out okay, no? Alright then,
  at this rate...

Jenon:
Wait, Shiskia. A canon is a boorish weapon. It's not something that girls
  should be operating.
I've read books on canons before. I've got a general idea of how to use it. Um,
  I believe...
Ah...

  -----------------------------------------------------
|-------------------|
|      BARRAGE      |
|-Fire in the Hole!-|
|-------------------|

Medoute:
What do you guys think you're doing! That thing can be very dangerous if you
  don't know how to use it!!

Shiskia:
It's not dangerous! Here, you try it, Medoute. It feels great!!

Medoute:
I- I can't use this thing! Hey, let go, Shiskia!!
Ah...

  -----------------------------------------------------
|-------------------|
|      BARRAGE      |
|-Fire in the Hole!-|
|-------------------|

Medoute:
...............
(It does feel nice. This is really thrilling...)
Eh, what are you waiting for? Don't stop, load the next shell! Now, fireee!!

Shiskia:
Hey... Now Medoute's the most involved...

-----------------After Battle----------------                        [Map16.04]
Pandra:
These damned noble's dogs! For brats you're too damned excitable!!

|    |
|    |          ENEMY HELD OUT A SIEGE
| /\ | Pandra has holed up inside the fortress!!
|/  \| 

|-------------------------|
|         RUN AWAY        |
|-Only I Should be Saved!-|
|-------------------------|

Pandra:
I lead the rebel army for a noble cause! Do you expect me to die in a place
  like this!

Garlot:
Pandra ran into the castle! He won't get away!

  -----------------------------------------------------
Garlot:
...That's strange. I'm sure Pandra ran inside, you really can't find him?

Medoute:
See, look. What an astounding guy. There's a secret escape passage here.

Velleman:
He's abandoned his subordinates. This is something the rebel army knew of its
  leader.
But because they are such people, we were able to advance this far.
Truly there are problems on this side of the empire.
You could even say that a certain portion is decaying.

Jenon:
You say such things, count?

Velleman:
Hm? You mean criticizing the empire? If it's in front of you I don't mind.

Shiskia:
But Pandra hoisted the flag of revolt with these things in mind.
Doesn't that mean he's like us?
They say that an enemy of an enemy is a friend. If we cooperate with each other
  we may be able to defeat the empire.

Velleman:
Defeating the empire might not be the best way. Reform is still possible.

Jenon:
Sooner or later, reform with too much bloodshed will end up failing.

Velleman:
Whatever may be, as I understand, the flag they hoisted will lead astray and
  derail self-righteous people.
We will likely end up fighting with these men for a while.

Garlot:
...Velleman. Will the flag we're flying lead people astray as well?

Shiskia:
!!

Velleman:
I do not know. I cannot perfectly predict the future.
Do you understand, Garlot? No matter the principle, it can be corrupted. That
  is the way of people.
The chance is still great that you can become as corrupt as Pandra.

Medoute:
Huu......

Velleman:
My principles are the same as well. My means and goals might change at any
  time.
Because of that one must constantly remind oneself to keep that from happening.
You could say that this too is a fight.

Medoute:
That's true that it's fight.
In a way, it's a fight you may be very bad at, Garlot.

Garlot:
Me...?

Medoute:
You're pure. Yet you feel too much resentment in the world as it is now.
From now on, as captain you will be pressured by various decisions.
And, one by one, these decisions will weigh on you.
And the differences between your ideals and reality will try to crush you.

Garlot:
...............

Shiskia:
It'll be okay, Garlot!
Don't think too much over it! Up to now we managed to get here through
  fighting.
Besides, you'll always be you.
And I'll always be with you too! Right?

Jenon:
Yep. And you have excellent friends to make up for everything you're lacking
  in!

Garlot:
And what exactly am I lacking in?

Jenon:
To put it bluntly, you're not too smart, and you have no understanding of a
  woman's heart.

Garlot:
Keep talking, Jenon.

Medoute:
...............

Aegina:
One moment, sir Jenon. I'll say this because you brought it up, but you've the
  same problem.
That is... the point about understanding girls.

Jenon:
Ah, r- really?

Aegina:
Moreover, master Garlot is by no means unintelligent!
It is true that he attacks brazenly without thinking, and uses force before
  using words......
But despite all that his heart is in the right place! Do you not think so?

Garlot:
...............

Shiskia:
Ahaha... Right in front of the captain, everyone's so mean~

Garlot:
Why are you guys so mean.
That's it, I've made up my mind. You're all fired!

Velleman:
Sigh, such noisy company. Given a chance they act like children.

Medoute:
Huh, that's right.
(Up until now you've overcome things with the help of your friends.)

Garlot:
Medoute! Say something, tell them.

Medoute:
Sorry Garlot. I'd love to help you, but I've been fired, I believe.
Didn't you say so just now? We're all fired?

Garlot:
Hey! All of you! Aagh!

Medoute:
(And I too am one of these friends......
No, this isn't a bad feeling. Not bad at all.)


---------------------Vs.---------------------                        [Map16.05]
--Garlot vs. Pandra
| Pandra:
| Hey commander, I see you made it up here no problem.
|
| Garlot:
| A leader that lies around inside is pathetic......
|I'll beat you up!
|
|---VICTORY
| Garlot:
| What's wrong, commander! Are you done already!?
|
| Pandra:
| Tch...! You're like a runaway horse. Didn't know you could take reckless
|   courage to such an extreme.
|
|---DEFEAT
| Garlot:
| Damn, I'm being pushed back......
|
| Pandra:
| Still green. You can't beat me if that's all you've got!
-----

--Shiskia vs. Pandra-----------------------------------
| Pandra:
| Oo, now there's a woman. So young and well filled out! Nice, nice!
|
| Shiskia:
| Don't stare at me! I'll put an arrow between your eyes!!
|
| Pandra:
| Oho, so scary......
|
|---VICTORY
| Pandra:
| Huu... you always dress this flashily? I might just cop a feel like this.
|
| Shiskia:
| I can't stand this kind of objectifying attitude!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Pandra:
| Oh, my bad. But I did leave your pretty face unscratched.
|
| Shiskia:
| You're making fun of me...!!
-----

--Jenon vs. Pandra-------------------------------------
| Jenon:
| Pandra, supreme commander of the rebel army, I presume. The rumors have
|   reached as far as Tiera.
|
| Pandra:
| ...Eeh, that makes me happy. What do the girls think of these rumors? Did I
|   gain any fans?
|
| Jenon:
| It doesn't feel like we get along......
|
|---VICTORY
| Jenon:
| You're like a trapped rat. Why not stop this pointless resistance and
|   surrender?
|
| Pandra:
| There's nothing to fear. I haven't shown my whole hand yet.
|
|---DEFEAT
| Jenon:
| No, I misinterpreted that break!?
|
| Pandra:
| Heh, heh, heh... Get ready before the fight, brat!
-----

--Medoute vs. Pandra-----------------------------------
| Pandra:
| Woohoo, what a woman! Such a perfect, toned figure!! Are you inviting me?
|
| Medoute:
| The leader of the rebel army is a contemptuous man who lusts after his
|   opponent on the battlefield...... Has the rebel army sunk this low?
|
| Pandra:
| Hey now, that's cold! It's not that!
|
|---VICTORY
| Medoute:
| You may have power, but your technique is full of holes.
|
| Pandra:
| Don't you know? It's the ones with such holes that get all the girls!
|
| Medoute:
| What a worthless man......
|
|---DEFEAT
| Pandra:
| What a big axe, gees... It's nothing but a pain to use.
|
| Medoute:
| You use too much foul language...
-----

--Aegina vs. Pandra------------------------------------
| Pandra:
| Oh, what a pretty little lady. You may be a bit childish, but that air of
|   nobility is irresistible!!
|
| Aegina:
| What a laid back man... Come near me and I will strike you down!
|
| Pandra:
| Oho, such a strong-willed woman. You'll be well worth it to tame......
|
|---VICTORY
| Pandra:
| Make that cute face, and strike!
|
| Aegina:
| That's enough already...... I will close that mouth of yours!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Aegina:
| Kh... I can't continue at this rate. I must regroup......
|
| Pandra:
| Take your time now, I'll wait. Giving a girl time to get dressed is one of
|   the world's courtesies.
|
| Aegina:
| ...Don't patronize me!!
-----


------------------Locations------------------                        [Map16.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
Steep mountain towering over the eastern end of the western area

   --東砦 - Eastern Fortress
One of the stronghold's frontline fortresses. Made to work with the western
fortress

   --西砦 - Western Fortress
One of the stronghold's frontline fortresses. Made to work with the eastern
fortress

   --トキノ中央砦 - Tokino Central Fortress
Fortress located in the center of the stronghold. Has more defensive force than
the two at the front

   --パンドラ砦 - Pandra Fortress
A fortress given the name of the rebel army leader. Can be taken as an example 
of Pandra's vanity


--------------------On Map-------------------                        [Map16.07]
--墓標なき墳墓 - Unmarked Grave
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|   Letter Home   |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| Mn? Something's fallen here...
| A letter? It looks like it's addressed to the writer's family...
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| ...What's this?
| A letter? What's it doing in a place like this?
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| A letter's lying here. Looks like it's addressed to the family of the
|   writer...
| ...From the contents, it looks like it was written when the writer deserted
|   the rebel army.
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| Hm, this letter...
| It's addressed to the writer's family. ...How stupid, getting involved with a
|   rebellion while you still have somewhere to return to.
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| What's this? Looks like something is covered in dirt here...
| A letter. It's addressed to the writer's family...
-----

--亡骸の眠る土 - Land of Sleeping Corpses--------------------
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|   Rusted Sword  |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| ...A worn-out sword's been tossed here.
| I think the owner's name was carved here into the handle... Looks like it's
|   got some sort of history.
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| Wah, a worn out sword...
| It may not be a useful weapon, but I'll hold on to it for now.
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| Oh, a sword's fallen here...
| ...It's all rusted. Is this where the rebel army disposes of their weapons?
|   There's only one though, I wonder why...
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| Hm? This sword over here...
| ...It's damaged in places. It's been exposed to wind and rain for some time
|   now.
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| Oh? There's something fallen here...
| A worn-out sword? It can't be used anymore.
-----

--呪い巨岩 - Cursed Crag-----------------------------------
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|    Aran Doll    |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| What's with this rocky spot... there's an eerie aura in the air.
| Is it because of this doll? ...It's kinda creepy.
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| Uuuh... what is that? My skin's all tingly...
| I- Is it because of this doll? It gives me a bad feeling.
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| What's that? There's something lying dead center in this rocky spot...
| ...What a creepy doll. But it has a likeness to some sort of god as well...
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| I feel a presence... What's going on?
| ...Is this doll the source of that presence?
| A doll having such a presence gives me a bad feeling.
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| ......Hii!? I feel shivers down my back...
| What is this eerie doll...? For a simple doll it's got an awful presence...
-----


---------------------Loss--------------------                        [Map16.08]
Defeat - Out of Cards (1st)

While running an attack on the rebel army that had secluded themselves on Mount 
Tokino, Gram Blaze was scattered due to a flaw in tactics, and was forced to 
disband...

Defeat - Garlot Defeated (2)---------------------------

In the clash with the main force of the rebel army on the summit of Mount 
Tokino, Gram Blaze's captain, Garlot, lost his life, and Gram Blaze vanished 
from history's stage...


========================================================================[Map17]
大切な物は何処
Where is the Treasured Item
Duke Barin's Territory


--------------------Intro--------------------                        [Map17.01]
Gram Blaze, commanded to guard Count Velleman while on business to a city in 
Duke Barin's domain, encountering no bandits, safely reached the Duke's domain.

However, during their stay, Count Velleman suddenly ordered them to locate a 
man by the name of "Mizer the Barefoot."

Mizer is said to be the leader of a gang of pickpockets that have been causing 
trouble for the surrounding towns.

It appeared that the Count too had lost something important to Mizer the 
Barefoot.

On orders from an unusually upset Count Velleman, Garlot and company began 
their search for Mizer.


----------------Before Battle----------------                        [Map17.02]
Velleman:
Make sure you find Mizer, you got it? Make sure of it!!

Garlot:
We know, we know. Leave the rest to us, Velleman.

Aegina:
That's right, count. Please, wait at the inn.

Velleman:
......I've lost my composure.

Medoute:
It's unusual for the count to be so upset.

Shiskia:
Well I bet whatever was stolen is very important to him.
Maybe it's a love letter!

Garlot:
What is that.

Shiskia:
Or maybe an exchange journal!

Aegina:
But wouldn't it be better to leave this to the police......

Shiskia:
It's because this is something important!
I know! It must be a music box he got from his first love!!

Medoute:
Eh, it's alright to help Velleman in his personal business once in a while.

Shiskia:
Hmm, or maybe it's a portrait of an unrequited love......

Medoute:
Do you want to stop now?

Shiskia:
Not really.
But it really has to be something from a love affair!

Medoute:
I said enough, Shiskia.

Shiskia:
That's different from what you said, Medoute. You've cared about him for a
  while now, right?

Medoute:
Mn?

Shiskia:
Why else would you speak so formally only with him?

Medoute:
Hey now, isn't that perfectly normal? He is our employer, not to mention a
  nobleman.

Shiskia:
Let's leave the nobleman thing out of this.
But when you talk to him you get more like a dirty old man that usual.

Medoute:
D- dirty old man...!?

Aegina:
I would agree that it's hard to say it's appropriate for your age.

--HAVE BAIFU
| Baifu:
| Medoute is a dirty old man. Baifu has learned another thing!
-----

Medoute:
N- no way......

Jenon:
Sorry I'm late. I got a poster of Mizer.
Hm? What's wrong, Medoute? Your face is all red.

Medoute:
It's- it is...... nothing.

Garlot:
Huh, he's a wanted man, though the bounty is low. What? 'Mizer the Barefoot'?
  ...What a lame nickname.

Jenon:
He's always barefoot. Anyways, he's a fast guy from the looks of it.

Aegina:
It would be a nuisance if he were to run.

Jenon:
I found out that he was seen in this town this morning, so I don't believe he's
  that fast.

Garlot:
I see...... Alright then, let's start looking for Mizer!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Find Mizer the Barefoot!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
               Garlot dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Garlot:
He shouldn't have been able to get too far yet.
Let's split up and ask around the towns and villages.


------------------Mid Battle-----------------                        [Map17.03]
|---------------------|
|       ENCOUNTER     |
|-Enemies Just Ahead.-|
|---------------------|

Cerica:
Aaah! You guuuys!!

Garlot:
Hey, isn't that Cerica?

Cerica:
Ha hah, now you've come to conquer Cerica's secret base!
Is there no end to your cowardice! Cerica will turn the tables on you!

Garlot:
We've got no business with you today.

Cerica:
WHAT WAS THAT! That's super rude!!
I'll kill you!

  -----------------------------------------------------
Cerica:
No way, could Cerica seriously have lost to your cowardice today!!

|------------------|
|      RETREAT     |
|-Time to Regroup.-|
|------------------|

Cerica:
Cerica will make you eat dirt! Next time! It'll happen next time!

Garlot:
How long is she gonna keep following me around!

Jenon:
I'm not happy with that remark......

  -----------------------------------------------------
|---------------------|
|       ENCOUNTER     |
|-Enemies Just Ahead.-|
|---------------------|

--REACH GROFF - GARLOT
| Garlot:
| Hay, wait up!
|
| Mizer:
| Hm? Who're you?
|
| Garlot:
| You're Mizer the Barefoot, right? There's something we want to talk to you
|   about.
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| A barefoot man...... Hmm, it could be someone else, though.
|
| Mizer:
| H- hey, who're you? Stop staring at me.
| It's kinda embarrassing......
|
| Shiskia:
| I'm right then, you're Mizer the Barefoot, right?
|
| Mizer:
| Huh? You wouldn't happen to be a fan of mine?
|
| Shiskia:
| You look much younger in real life than on the wanted poster.
|
| Mizer:
| Wanted poster? Mn......
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| Looks like I've got good luck. I've found you, Mizer the Barefoot.
|
| Mizer:
| Hm? Who're you?
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| It was easier to find you than I expected, barefooted man.
|
| Mizer:
| Huh? What's wrong with being barefoot? You're rude you know.
|
| Medoute:
| You're the man from the wanted poster, Mizer the Barefoot!
|
| Mizer:
| What's going on...!?
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| A barefoot man, how suspicious.
|
| Mizer:
| Huh? What's wrong with being barefoot? You're rude you know.
|
| Aegina:
| I've found the man from the wanted poster, Mizer the Barefoot.
|
| Mizer:
| What's going on...!?
|
|---SLEIP
| Sleip:
| Uuh hic... Hm? Hey you, your feet are dirty~
|
| Mizer:
| What's with this undine, she stinks of alcohol. Is she a drunk?
|
| Sleip:
| Hic... Hey, aren't you barefoot?
|
| Mizer:
| So what......
-----

|    |
|    |                  ENCOUNTERED THE TARGET
| /\ | Encountered the pickpocket master, Mizer the Barefoot!!
|/  \| 

Mizer:
Uah, what's this, army troops!? You think I'll let you guys catch me!

Garlot:
Hey, stop!

Mizer:
Do you think I'm stupid enough to stop just 'cause you said so!

Garlot:
Just listen to what we have to say!

Mizer:
Listen? Then it's simple. Try and catch me!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Capture Mizer the Barefoot!!
/----------------

          ----------------------Defeat--/
                       Garlot dies...  /
Mizer reaches the escape point flag.../
           Use up all your cards...  /
               ---------------------/

Garlot:
Damn, making fun of me...!!
Somebody stop Mizer!


-----------------After Battle----------------                        [Map17.04]
Mizer:
No way, some army guys caught me......
I must be losing my touch...

|    |
|    |                        CAUGHT THE TARGET
| /\ | Successfully caught the pickpocket master, Mizer the Barefoot!!
|/  \| 

Mizer:
Hah! Do your worst! Boil me, burn me, do whatever you want!!

Garlot:
That's some courage you've got. But we aren't after your life.

Mizer:
Huh? You guys didn't catch me so you could kill me...?

Garlot:
That's not what our job is. We just want to return something you stole.
Of course if you don't return it quietly, we may be ordered to kill you.

Mizer:
Tch, you just want me to return something!? I got it.

  -----------------------------------------------------
Mizer:
Hm?　I stole something from a sharp-eyed noble? I don't remember......

Garlot:
Really, in that case should we just seize everything you stole?

Shiskia:
Yeah, you got it illegally, in any case.

Mizer:
The law? You're talking about the law?
Then isn't it also illegal for nearby soldiers to take over when everyone's
  obeying?
If you look at the law, soldiers shouldn't be able to collect taxes.

Garlot:
We know about the problems with the soldiers.

Mizer:
Then why are you only judging me?
I don't steal from anyone unless they look rich, and then I give it out to the
  poor people.
I might do bad things, but I don't do anything I'd be ashamed of.

Garlot:
......You're a virtuous thief...

Medoute:
Enough of this talk. Our job is to return our employer's stolen possession.

Mizer:
I said I got it! I value my life after all...
My secret base is in the forest to the west of the town. All our spoils are
  there too.

Garlot:
Alright then, Mizer. You'll lead us there.
I'll make sure you stay safe. When we get back the stolen goods, I'll let you
  escape.

Mizer:
Really!

Shiskia:
W- wait, Garlot! You sure it's okay to promise that?

Garlot:
I say it's fine, so it's fine.

Medoute:
Is it because you feel you're alike?

Garlot:
It's not that simple, but I won't deny that I do feel that way.

Medoute:
If you understand that, you've grown.
Okay then, let's send a messenger to count Velleman.
No one aside from him knows what was stolen, after all.

Garlot:
That's right, now that you mention it......

Medoute:
I take back what I said before, you haven't grown at all.


---------------------Vs.---------------------                        [Map17.05]
--Garlot vs. Mizer
| Garlot:
| We've finally caught up! Get ready, Mizer the Barefoot!!
|
| Mizer:
| Get ready? Are you exaggerating? You haven't caught me yet!
|
|---VICTORY
| Garlot:
| Come on! Mizer the Barefoot!
|
| Mizer:
| Darn it! I hate this!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Garlot:
| You're good enough...
|
| Mizer:
|Heh, stay there and grovel. Buh-bye~.
-----

--Shiskia vs. Mizer------------------------------------
| Mizer:
| Whoops, I can't believe you caught up. You're pretty fast.
|
| Shiskia:
| Get ready now!
|
| Mizer:
| Hah, how about it!
|
|---VICTORY
| Mizer:
| Tch, I lost the match!!
|
| Shiskia:
| Huh, you're not bad... If you stopped pickpocketing, you could make a profit
|   being a mercenary.
|
|---DEFEAT
| Shiskia:
| I wasn't ready......
|
| Mizer:
| I'll get away easy at this rate!
-----

--Jenon vs. Mizer--------------------------------------
| Jenon:
| Hah hah, I finally caught up......
|
| Mizer:
| Ugh, you're here already?
|
|---VICTORY
| Jenon:
| We only want to talk, please calm down......
|
| Mizer:
| Shut up! I wouldn't trust anything the military says!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Mizer:
| Alright, let's take this chance and run!
|
| Jenon:
| I wasn't ready with such light equipment......
-----

--Medoute vs. Mizer------------------------------------
| Medoute:
| You may be quick darting about like that, but once pinned down...
|
| Mizer:
| Ueeh, that's some serious pressure!
|
|---VICTORY
| Medoute:
| We really don't have a reason to hand you over to the government. Listen to
|   what we have to say, Mizer the Barefoot.
|
| Mizer:
| I don't trust you guys!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Medoute:
| That's quite the nimble attack. Not what you'd expect from a simple
|   pickpocket.
|
| Mizer:
| What's this, you're calm even though you lost!
-----

--Aegina vs. Mizer-------------------------------------
| Aegina:
| I found you, Mizer the Barefoot!
|
| Mizer:
| What's this! Making fun of your opponent......
|
|---VICTORY
| Aegina:
| That's enough! Stop resisting us!
|
| Mizer:
| I'm not done yet!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Aegina:
| ...That ending was weak.
|
| Mizer:
| Hehe, don't overdo it, miss!
-----

--Sleip vs. Mizer--------------------------------------
| Mizer:
| What, you caught up already?
|
| Sleip:
| When I'm drunk, I get really smart...
| That's one toast to my father, and the second to my mother... Uurp...!
|
| Mizer:
| T- that's total crap......
|
|---VICTORY
| Sleip:
| Uuhic... What're you gonna do, kid? You gonna run again or are you gonna
|   fight?
|
| Mizer:
| I'm running of course! If I escape, I win!
|
| Sleip:
| ...Running away isn't victory. But if you choose to escape and it's connected
|   to victory, that's different. Hic...
|
| Mizer:
| W- what are you saying...?
|
|---DEFEAT
| Sleip:
| Whoops, you're not bad kid... hic!
|
| Mizer:
| Then you should show me some respect and let me escape!
|
| Sleip:
| That's not up for discussion. Ugweh......
|
| Mizer:
| Disgusting... What a filthy undine......
-----


------------------Locations------------------                        [Map17.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
A chain of towns on a belt of hilly land. It is governed by the influential 
Duke Barin

   --町外れの小屋 - Hut at the Outskirts
Remote house inhabited by a skilled blacksmith

   --ジェノマ砦 - Genoma Fortress
A large fortress located at the halfway point between the capital and the 
Ishnad stronghold

   --ワドニムの町 - Town of Wardneim
A town on an open plain. It is the heart of the area

   --フラウベ村 - Fraube Village
Home of a collector of jewels and, especially, rings

   --木こりの小屋 - Woodcutter's Hut
Hut where a woodcutter of Fraube Village lives

   --グロフの町 - Town of Groff
A town home to a small port establishment. Can reach the ocean by following the 
river

   --ロナリス砦 - Ronalis Fortress
Small fortress established to guard the eastern section

   --隠者の庵 - Hermitage
Hermitage connecting a hermit who has not cut ties to earthly life

   --ミゼル離脱地点 - Mizer's Escape Point
Mizer the Barefoot plans to escape through here. Prevent him!


--------------------On Map-------------------                        [Map17.07]
町外れの小屋 - Hut at the Outskirts

Blacksmith:
Mizer the Barefoot...? Yes, I know much about him.
The rougher looking people got forced out, and made a base in the Drominos
  Marsh...
Mizer is their boss. He might be young, but he's pretty good, really.
He may pickpocket, but he only goes after bad nobles and government officials,
  so everyone is okay with it.
......Where is he now? Hm, let's see...
The town of Wardneim is nearby, and they have a very strict guard.
Try the towns further east. He may be trying to earn some change there.

--ジェノマ砦 - Genoma Fortress - FIRST TIME-----------------
|
|--------------------|
|     ACQUISITION    |
|-Received Treasure!-|
|       Mantrap      |
|--------------------|
|
| Sentry:
| I- I finally got it... the tactics card that I wanted!!
| One day when I'm a great general I'll mow down enemy armies with this...!
| ......Really, it's the best. Just imagining it makes me quiver.
| ...Mmn! You there, what are you doing!
| Well, it doesn't really matter if you're suspicious or not, as long as I can
|   test out this card!
| Take this! 'Mantrap'!!
| I- impossible...! The skill didn't work!?
| ...What? This is a 'terrain skill' that's only effective when the enemy is on
|   a certain kind of terrain!?
| If you use 'mantrap' on an enemy that isn't standing on a poisonous marsh it
|   will only have a bit of power...
| Despite graduating the military academy I still made such an elementary
|   mistake. Boo-hoo-hoo...
| It's okay... I was mean to you, wasn't I?
| Please take this card as an apology.
| It was a sudden impulse. Sorry.
|
|---AFTERWARDS
| Sentry:
| When using 'terrain skills' on enemies not standing on specific terrain the
|   effect is diluted.
| In the case of 'mantrap' it's got extraordinary power when used on enemies in
|   poisonous marshes.
| But outside of that terrain the damage is minimal...
| If you study the terrain before battle you'll be able to demonstrate
|   considerable damage.
| But...... I'm really sorry about last time.
| Please keep it secret from my superiors. ...Okay?
-----

--ワドニムの町 - Town of Wardneim - FEMALE - FIRST TIME------
|
|--------------------|
|     ACQUISITION    |
|-Received Treasure!-|
|    Twilight Veil   |
|--------------------|
|
| Street Vendor:
| Excuse me, miss! Could you come here for a minute? My wares are quite cheap.
| Let's see, what I would recommend... How about this twilight veil?
| With the mysterious atmosphere it will give you can bring all the men down?
| Oh, you'll buy it? Hehe, you have a good eye!
| Here you go. Thank you for your business! Please come again!!
|
|---MALE - FIRST TIME
|
|--------------------|
|     ACQUISITION    |
|-Received Treasure!-|
|     Gold Badge     |
|--------------------|
|
| Street Vendor:
| Whoa there, sir! It must be destiny that led us to meet here. Won't you come
|   and buy something?
| ...Hm? Any talk of someone stealing? You're curious over some strange
|   things...
| But the guards here have gotten strict. A lot of those guys moved to the
|   east.
| But that's enough gossip! Won't you buy something now!
| Hm? The gold badge? Hehe, you have a good eye!
| Here you go. Thank you for your business! Please come again!!
|
|---AFTERWARDS
| Security Officer:
| Hey, you! You wouldn't happen to have seen a merchant working out here?
| We got a tip that that man made a profit selling stolen goods. It's an
|   unexpectedly small criminal.
| You haven't seen anything... I see. That's fine.
| If you happen to see anyone suspicious report it right away, got it!?
-----

川の流れの淀み - Slow Flowing Spot on the River - SLEIP-------

|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|   Pretty Ring   |
|-----------------|

Sleip:
Hah? Something's affecting the flow of the river here. It's stagnating, looks
  like...
Is there something at the bottom? Let's go and look around for a bit. Gulb
  gulb...
...............
A huge tree sunk to the bottom. Could the tree be the reason for the change in
  the current...
Eh, let's return it to normal. Hic...
Hm? What was that glint of light?
Wow, a ring. And it's pretty too...

--フラウベ村 - Fraube Village - FIRST TIME------------------
|
|------------------------|
|       ACQUISITION      |
|  -Received Treasure!-  |
|Pretty Ring -> Silk Hood|
|------------------------|
|
| Ring Collector:
| Ah!
| Hey, you have a ring with you, right!? And it's a really pretty one too!!
| Don't try to fool me! 
| You can't confuse a ring detective such as me!
| ...Ah...
| N- nice... What a beautiful ring... It's a really pretty ring...
| Um, if you could... Would you exchange that ring for something of mine?
| Ah! It's okay!? Thanks so much!
|
|---AFTERWARDS
| Ring Collector:
| I have a certain weakness for rings...
| It's not like a have a lot of money... But still, I really love rings.
| ...Am I a worthless woman?
|
| Little Girl:
| Daaw~.
|
| Ring Collector:
| Ah, that's my daughter.
| ...Am I a worthless woman?
|
| Little Girl:
| Daaw~.
|
|---NO PRETTY RING
| Little Girl:
| Daaw~.
|
| Young Woman:
| No no, don't go potty over your clothes.
| Sorry, mister soldier. This village may not have much, but please take care
|   and relax.
|
| Little Girl:
| Daaw~.
|
| Young Woman:
| No no, I said not to do that. Gees...
-----

--木こりの小屋 - Woodcutter's Hut - FIRST TIME---------------
|
|--------------------|
|     ACQUISITION    |
|-Received Treasure!-|
|         Fur        |
|--------------------|
|
| Woodcutter:
| Living in this out of the way place, food is certainly something of a worry.
| Though I wouldn't lose to anyone in my ability to chop down trees, trees
|   don't fill one's stomach.
| Going to town to buy things is troublesome, and I'm constantly thinking about
|   what to do if I can't get any food...
| But then it came to me! There's a forest right next to my home. I can hunt in
|   that forest!
| But fighting the animals? They aren't an opponent I'd like to face from the
|   front.
| So I made a bow from a curved tree branch.
| And every time I hunted an animal with my homemade bow, my skill with it
|   increased before my eyes.
| But while eating the animal meat I began to want some fish...
| Catching a fish with a bow is very hard. So then I took a firm tree, and
|   carved it into a spear.
| And every time I caught a fish with my homemade spear, my skill with it
|   increased before my eyes.
| But at that time I got tired of eating warmed fish and meat, so I started to
|   learn to cook.
| But to cook, one needs a knife. So then I sharpened a stone, and made myself
|   a knife.
| And every time I prepared a fish with my homemade knife, my skill with it
|   increased before my eyes.
| ......Then I noticed.
| With my ability to use an axe, a bow, a spear, and a sword well, I would make
|   an excellent soldier!
| But, well, I hate fighting, so a soldier is something I could never be.
| ...Ah well, I haven't had a chance to talk to anyone for a while, so I ended
|   up talking your ear off.
| Thanks for listening to me. It was fun.
| I'd like to give you this as thanks.
