| This is the fur from a beast that I've cooked.
| It's okay, don't worry about it. I have so many furs I don't know what to do
|   with them.
|
|---AFTERWARDS
| Woodcutter:
| The story I told you doesn't end there...
| So that the furs didn't go to waste I started using them.
| Every time I made something out of a fur, my sewing skill increased before my
|   eyes.
| ...I'm fine now with not being a woodcutter anymore.
| If I keep doing so many different things with my hands like this, I bet one
|   day I'll reach the sky.
-----

--ロナリス砦物置 - Ronalis Fortress Storeroom - HIGH % - FIRST TIME--
|
|--------------------|
|     ACQUISITION    |
|-Received Treasure!-|
|     Hyper Drill    |
|--------------------|
|
| Sentry:
| It's not here... Where could it be?
| My commanding officer said that there's a map of the surrounding area here,
|   but I can't find it.
| Sorry to bother you, but could you help me search for a bit?
| ...Eh, what do you get out of it? You sure know how to take advantage of a
|   situation!
| Okay, how about this! I'll give you one piece of equipment from this
|   storeroom!
| Ah, you'll do it! Thanks, it's a big help.
| Phew, found it at last...
| ...Ah, right, your compensation. You can take whichever piece you want.
| ...The drill? That's a strange thing to desire... I don't mind, go ahead and
|   take it.
| Thanks for helping me out. Now I won't get yelled at by my commander.
|
|---HIGH % - AFTERWARDS
| Sentry:
| Mizer the Barefoot? I caught sight of him heading for Groff.
| The policing around Wardneim to the west is pretty strict, so I heard he
|   shifted eastward.
| You're planning to catch him, right? Be careful. He really fast when he runs
|   away.
| Eh? You want to know we're okay with not having caught him?
| Mizer's targets are all rich government officials. It's refreshing to see.
| That's surprising for a civilian militia? Really? Remote soldiers and such do
|   think like this sometimes.
| Aren't you guys like that too?
-----

--隠者の庵 - Hermitage - HIGH % - FIRST TIME---------------
|
|--------------------|
|     ACQUISITION    |
|-Received Treasure!-|
|      Evil Eye      |
|--------------------|
|
| Hermit:
| To tell you the truth, around ten years ago I sold my soul to a demon.
| However, not all my attachments from when I was a good citizen were severed.
| Though everyone from town calls me a hermit, I do want to go back there.
| If I could go back to town, I'd get to eat warm soup. I haven't eaten it in
|   so long. Doesn't it sound tasty?
| But, well, this isn't something that can be backed out of...
| After all, even if I get angry, I can't go back to being a human again...
| ......Eh? Why not stop the long winded talk and go back, you say?
| Ah, well, honestly... umm...
| ......Perhaps I've been waiting for someone to come and say that to me. Yes I
|   think so.
| Very well! I will go back to town! Yes, it's decided!
| Thank you for giving me a push! You can be my patron. Yes, why not.
| Oh! I would like to offer you the demonic goods the demon gave me!
| It's okay, it's okay! I truly feel so! How about it, please take them!
|
|---HIGH % - AFTERWARDS
| Hermit:
| Well now, no time like the present. Let's get ready to go back at once...
| Oh yes! Let's start with getting rid of these demonic goods!
| Aah! Patron! What good timing!
| I was thinking of giving you the rest of my demonic items!
| ...Ah, huh? Where are you going? Please wait~, my lord!
-----


---------------------Loss--------------------                        [Map17.08]
Defeat - Out of Cards (1st)

Gram Blaze moved to capture Mizer, but they were scattered due to a flaw in 
tactics, and forced to disband...

Defeat - Flag Reached (2nd)----------------------------

Mizer:
Are you guys dozing? Hey, over here~!

Garlot:
Damn it, hold still!

Mizer:
I'm not stupid enough to stop when told to!
The name's Mizer the Barefoot! Don't forget it, you blockheads!

|    |
|    |             IMPEDIMENT FAILED
| /\ | Mizer the Barefoot has left the battlefield!
|/  \| 

The private army moved to capture Mizer, but with his unexpected speed he ran 
circles around them, and slipped away...


========================================================================[Map18]
はだしのミゼル
Mizer the Barefoot
Drominos Marsh


--------------------Intro--------------------                        [Map18.01]
Through a search of Duke Barin's territory, Gram Blaze, led by Garlot, 
encountered the master pickpocket, Mizer the Barefoot, and apprehended him 
after a pursuit battle.

With Mizer's guidance, they made their way to the Drominos Marsh, the location 
of Mizer's secret base where they kept their loot.

Drominos Marsh is known as a dangerous region full of poisonous swamps, steered 
clear of even by bandits due to its miasma.

Is the item Count Velleman is looking for really in Mizer's stockpiled loot!? 
Gram Blaze set foot into this devilish marsh......


----------------Before Battle----------------                        [Map18.02]
Shiskia:
Uuuuhhh, it's hard to breathe here......

Medoute:
That's because of the swamp's miasma. Be careful. Touching the toxin will
  blister your skin.

Shiskia:
Gah, really...... I should have worn something else.

Jenon:
I'd like to avoid a battle here. The soldiers are exhausted.

Velleman:
How long until we get there?

Mizer:
Just a little further.
By the way...... that guy there's the noble you work for?

Velleman:
That's correct, Mizer the Barefoot.

Mizer:
Yeah... I don't recognize him at all. Such a vigilant guy... I couldn't have
  stolen something from him.

Velleman:
I'll believe that after I inspect your spoils.

Mizer:
Feh... What a discourteous guy, er, noble.

Velleman:
...............

Shiskia:
......Garlot, there's an ambush ahead of us on the right!

Garlot:
They caught us off guard! Watch out for arrows! Raise the shields!!

|-----------------------|
|         VOLLEY        |
|-Thousand Arrow Storm!-|
|-----------------------|

Medoute:
Did you plan this, Mizer!!

Mizer:
Eh, you could say I had a feeling this would happen!

Mizer's Follower:
Boss! You alright!?

|-----------------------|
|       TREACHERY       |
|-Betrayed the Comrade.-|
|-----------------------|

Mizer:
Good work guys! Now, let's show them how we fight!

Garlot:
I trusted you. You betrayed us......

Mizer:
Huh? I didn't betray anyone. You trusted me because it was convenient.

Garlot:
I won't forgive you, Mizer!!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Corner Mizer the Barefoot!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
               Garlot dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Garlot:
They're in the forest! We might not see them now, but they're definitely
  there!!
It sucks, but they've got the terrain advantage. Remember to be cautious!


------------------Mid Battle-----------------                        [Map18.03]
|---------------------|
|        AMBUSH       |
|-Unexpected Enemies!-|
|---------------------|

Mizer: 
Now! Attack!

Garlot:
There you are!

  -----------------------------------------------------
|    |
|    |            DRIVEN BACK THE ENEMY
| /\ | Successfully forced Mizer's gang to retreat!!
|/  \| 

Mizer:
What's with these guys, it's like the terrain disadvantage doesn't even slow
  them down......
Let's retreat for a bit and regroup!

Mizer's Follower:
Got it, boss!

|------------------|
|      RETREAT     |
|-Time to Regroup.-|
|------------------|

Garlot:
That was some speed to their escape.

  /--Victory--------------
 / Corner Mizer the Barefoot!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
               Garlot dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Garlot:
Don't let Mizer escape! After them!

  -----------------------------------------------------
|---------------------|
|        AMBUSH       |
|-Unexpected Enemies!-|
|---------------------|

Mizer:
I'll make you regret coming this far!

Garlot:
Don't think you can use the same trick every time!!

  -----------------------------------------------------
|    |
|    |            DRIVEN BACK THE ENEMY
| /\ | Successfully forced Mizer's gang to retreat!!
|/  \| 

Mizer:
What the heck, they're seriously strong.
Pull back deeper into the forest. We'll make it a priority to merge with the
  guys that fell behind!

Mizer's Follower:
Boss, these guys are something else. It's dangerous to keep going.

Mizer:
I know...... But there's nothing else we can do!

|------------------|
|      RETREAT     |
|-Time to Regroup.-|
|------------------|

Garlot:
Their morale has dropped considerably. Get them in one strike!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Corner Mizer the Barefoot!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
               Garlot dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Garlot:
Those guys' ability to run and hide must be the best in the world.

  -----------------------------------------------------
|---------------------|
|        AMBUSH       |
|-Unexpected Enemies!-|
|---------------------|

Mizer:
We've got nothing to lose like this! Third time's gotta be the charm, let's go!

Garlot:
Let's settle this!


-----------------After Battle----------------                        [Map18.04]
Mizer:
G- Kh... Darn it~ You got us, you got us!

|    |
|    |            DRIVEN BACK THE ENEMY
| /\ | Successfully forced Mizer's gang to retreat!!
|/  \| 

Mizer:
I surrender! I surrender completely!
As the leader the responsibility is mine. Please spare my followers......

Mizer's Follower:
B- boss...!

Garlot:
Everyone drop your weapons! No sudden moves!

|---------------------|
|       CAPTURE       |
|-Where is the Crime?-|
|---------------------|

  -----------------------------------------------------
Garlot:
Answer me, are you really a virtuous thief?

Mizer:
Keh, we're a pickpocket gang. We don't bully the weak though.
We target the rich and the nobles.
However, I hate the title of 'virtuous thief'. Those are words to deceive
  yourself.

Garlot:
...............

Mizer:
When I was a kid we were so poor we couldn't afford to buy shoes......
That's why I can understand the feelings if everyone who's been oppressed.
So that I don't forget those feelings, I don't wear shoes now.

Velleman:
That is why you're called Mizer the Barefoot?

Jenon:
Did you find what you were looking for, Count?

Velleman:
Yes, my pendant was in their mountain of spoils.
Just......

Medoute:
Looks like the count dropped it while in the marsh, and then Mizer's followers
  picked it up.

Shiskia:
Eh? Then, Velleman was mistaken that Mizer robbed him?

Velleman:
It seems so.
I apologize for thoughtlessly assuming things. At the time... at any rate, I
  lost my composure.

Mizer:
It's okay. I'm a pickpocket. I'm used to people being suspicious.
When you say pendant, you don't mean one with a portrait of a ten year old
  girl, do you?

Velleman:
......Hn.

Mizer:
That's yours, old man? It's not too admirable of a preference.

Shiskia:
Eh... What? Velleman, you wouldn't have a problem with age limits by any
  chance?

Velleman:
Hear me, Mizer the Barefoot! This may be abrupt, but I've a proposition for
  you!!
Actually I came here previously to look for the group operating in the forest!
How about it! Won't you join my private army and fight with us to change this
  country!!

Mizer:
Uh... Huh?

Garlot:
(A distraction......)

Jenon:
(He's distracting......)

Medoute:
(A distraction, huh......)

Shiskia:
(He's distracting with such a forceful proposal......)

Aegina:
...............

--Have Baifu
| Baifu:
| (Humans beings have troubles too.)
-----

Velleman:
Why are you looking at me like that?

Garlot:
Ah, well, how to say this...... It feels like I saw a surprising side of you.

Velleman:
It looks like there's been a misunderstanding. This is a picture of my
  daughter.

Garlot:
Daughter? Hang on, you don't have a wife......

Velleman:
We've separated six years ago.
The pendant is from back then. ......This conversation is over.

Shiskia:
Hmm, there are all kinds of people. Well, in retrospect this seems obvious.

Mizer:
Hey, old man. Can you tell me more about what you said before?

Velleman:
I said this conversation is over!

Mizer:
Ah? No, not that. About joining your private army. I'll be paid, right?

Velleman:
That depends on your work.

Garlot:
Hey, you sure it's okay?

Velleman:
What I said before was not meant to deceive.

Mizer:
Whenever I got lost I always picked the way that would earn money.

Velleman:
I don't refuse those with power and purpose. Join if you want.

Mizer:
Alright, I'll help you out! I'll take everyone in one hit!

Jenon:
One hit, you say.

Mizer:
But I draw the line at bullying the weak.


------------------Locations------------------                        [Map18.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
A stretch of marshland to the west of Duke Barin's domain. A strong miasma 
comes from it poisonous swamp

   --橋守りの小屋 - Bridge Keepers' Hut
The brothers who watch over the nearby Girgid Bridge live here

   --ビスタ川の集落 - Village on Bister River
A strange village where most of the inhabitants are said to be children

   --ミゼルの隠れ家 - Mizer's Secret Base
Mizer the Barefoot's hideout. It's filled to the brim with loot.

   --マーロイの集落 - Maloy Town
A village, hugged by the forest, where the residents make a very poor living

   --日記マニアの家 - Diary Maniac's House
The home of a person needing special attention who likes to read the journals 
of other people

   --モザレフの村 - Mossaref Village
A village avoiding the fumes from the poisonous swamps


--------------------On Map-------------------                        [Map18.07]
--日記マニアの家 - Diary Maniac's House - FIRST TIME
|
|-------------------------------|
|          ACQUISITION          |
|      -Received Treasure!-     |
|A Girl's Diary -> Marchen Wings|
|-------------------------------|
|
| Diary Maniac:
| Ah, a guest... You wouldn't happen to keep a journal, would you?
| ...You don't, I see. Sigh, too bad...
| ......? Y- you don't keep one, but you have one?
| No way! You have the same hobby as me!? There's someone besides me with this
|   commendable hobby, how surprising!!
| Uum, if it's possible... could you give me the journal you have?
| ...Wah, thank you so much! Then as thanks I'll give you a copy of my favorite
|   journal...
| Eh, you don't need it? I see... It's a very funny one, oh well.
| Then, will you at least take this?
| Looks like I won't be bored for a while. Today's a good day!
|
|---AFTERWARDS
| Diary Maniac:
| ...............
| Ah, you're the guest from before...
| This journal... it's so moving... I've cried all my tears out...
| This is so epic. ...Sniff......
|
|---NO GIRL'S DIARY
| Diary Maniac:
| Ah, a guest... You wouldn't happen to keep a journal, would you?
| ...You don't, I see. Sigh, too bad...
| Ah, sorry, it's my hobby to read people's journals.
| So whenever someone comes to visit I ask.
| ......Hah, I want to read a journal. I haven't read a new one in three
|   days...
| ...I want to read one...
-----

モザレフの村 - Mossaref Village------------------------------

Woman:
Are you having a scuffle with Mizer?
Mizer is a good boy. He may do naughty things, but he shares food with
  everyone.
Mizer's friends aren't like the other thieves. They don't hurt towns and
  villages.
Really, thanks to Mizer there are fewer thieves and ruffians.
So please don't fight. Listen to what Mizer has to say.

--マーロイの集落 - Maloy Town - FIRST TIME--------------------
|
|--------------------|
|     ACQUISITION    |
|-Received Treasure!-|
|      Egg Shell     |
|--------------------|
|
| Poultry Farm Girl:
| Sigh... Why am I so unlucky?
| Born in this gloomy forest, wasting my life away surrounded by chicken...
| I- I'm not happy with this life, no matter what anyone thinks!!
| Eh? What kind of life would make me happy?
| Well, let's see... First I'd be born to a family in the capital. I don't want
|   to aim too high from the start.
| ...Then one day, through a small mistake I'd wander into high society.
| Finally I'd dance at a ball with a handsome young nobleman, and end up
|   marrying into a rich family...
| ...Ahaha, that's nice. Well, pretty good, don't you think?
| Hah... Compared to that I'm really unhappy...
| ......Hm?
| Ah~! A baby chick came out of Pippi's egg!
| I'm so glad, Pippi! May your eggs always be big, and sell right away!
| I'm glad, Pippi... I really am...
|
|---AFTERWARDS
| Poultry Farm Girl:
| Farm life isn't something I'd leave behind.
-----

--ミゼルの隠れ家 - Mizer's Secret Base------------------------
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|    Medusa Eye   |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| By any chance... Is this Mizer's base? As I thought, they've stored up lots
|   of different things.
| Hm, let's see what they've got...
| ...A tactics card. I'll hang on to it until we settle things with them.
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| No way, is this Mizer's base?
| Ah! I bet what Velleman's looking for is here somewhere.
| It's a just cause, so let's look through this stuff~
| All I found was a tactics card. Tch, that was boring.
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| What a strange hut... so many useless things stashed in the forest.
| Ah, could this be Mizer's secret base or such?
| ...We can expect them to come here to restock. Let's deal with that problem
|   right now.
| Aside from this tactics card there's nothing of use worth mentioning here...
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| Could this place be Mizer's base?
| They built a hut above the trees... Well, if you can see movement in the
|   forest, it's not something I disagree with.
| Ooh, a tactics card? Getting it from an enemy base I feel no sense of duty to
|   return it.
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| Huh? Everything hung up around here has the same emblem as Mizer the
|   Barefoot...
| Then that means this is Mizer's base, right?
| With so much stuff stashed here, it has to be.
| Is this a tactics card?
| ...We'll have trouble if Mizer uses this. It might be stealing, but I will
|   take it.
-----

--ビスタ川の集落 - Village on Bister River - FIRST TIME-------
|
|----------------------|
|      ACQUISITION     |
| -Received Treasure!- |
|Beads -> Bead Bracelet|
|----------------------|
|
| Girl:
| Ah? Mister soldier, mister soldier. Do you have some beads?
| ...Wow, such pretty beads...
| Hey, can I make an accessory out of them?
| ...I can? Thank you! Hold on a sec, I'll make it right away!
| There! Here you go! How is it? I think I did a good job.
| Take care of it!
|
|---AFTERWARDS/NO BEADS
| Woman:
| The Drominos March is dotted with jobs that require men to do.
| Filling the spots the miasma comes from with mud, building a bridge across
|   the rapids, and much more.
| My husband and his brother guard the bridge from across the river.
| All these things take them away from home. That's why there are so few men in
|   this village.
| They come by occasionally, but I can't help but worry...
-----

--橋守りの小屋 - Bridge Keepers' Hut - FIRST TIME------------
|
|-------------------------------------|
|             ACQUISITION             |
|         -Received Treasure!-        |
|Caged Butterfly -> Good Luck Talisman|
|-------------------------------------|
|
| Bridge Keeper:
| Oh? You don't see that type of butterfly around here...
| Could you give me that butterfly? I want to show it to my daughter.
| You sure it's okay? I owe you one.
| This is my thanks. Take it, it should come in handy.
|
|---AFTERWARDS
| Bridge Keeper:
| Thanks for the butterfly.
| My daughter's got an interest in plants and insects. I'm sure she'll be
|   overjoyed.
| Our home? It's the village beyond the river.
| It's not that far away, still, the time we spend away from our families is
|   lonely.
|
|---NO CAGED BUTTERFLY
| Bridge Keeper:
| My brother and I stand guard over the Girgid Bridge from this hut.
| If this bridge were to fall, trade with the eastern part of the empire would
|   stagnate...... Isn't that what bandits would think?
| Of course, Mizer's gang's territory is around here, so the bandits tend to
|   behave themselves.
| So we brothers keep a lookout in shifts, with the other returning home during
|   their time off.
| Our home? It's the village beyond the river.
| It's not that far away, still, the time we spend away from our families is
|   lonely.
-----

--沼地の片隅 - Corner of the Swamp--------------------------
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|    Gold Lump    |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| Damn, it's hard to walk with my feet getting stuck in the mud...
| ...Hm? My toe hit something... Is there something at the bottom?
| Wow, a gold lump. ...Though why is it in a place like this?
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| Uugh! It's nasty underfoot... Let's get this over with quick, then I'll wash
|   myself top to bottom. Gees.
| Uagh, I stepped on something. What now!
| ...A gold lump...
| W- well, looks like the swamp's not all bad. I'll have to rethink my opinion
|   of it.
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| What an outrageous place to build a base, Mizer.
| Hm? My shoe bumped into something.
| Wow, a gold lump... What an amazing find.
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| No matter how many times I do it, I never enjoy walking through deep
|   swamps...
| ...Hm? What's this, something at the bottom of the swamp...
| This shape and firmness... A gold lump? We won't be able to tell unless we
|   wash it, though.
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| It's unpleasant to be attacked here. Let's get through the marsh quickly...
| Ah? What's this...
| Wow, a gold lump! ...Did Mizer the Barefoot drop this?
|
|---BAIFU
| Baifu:
| Ugeh... the swamp is fickly. Baifu doesn't like it.
| Oh? Something's touching the sole of Baifu's paw... What is it?
| Th- this is a gold lump. Is it okay for Baifu to take it?
-----


---------------------Loss--------------------                        [Map18.08]
Defeat - Garlot Defeated (1st, 2nd, 3rd)

In the battle with Mizer who had a terrain advantage in the marshlands, Gram 
Blaze's captain, Garlot, lost his life, and Gram Blaze vanished from history's 
stage...


========================================================================[Map19]
輸送船襲撃作戦
Raid on a Transport Ship
Duke Barin's Domain - North Shore


--------------------Intro--------------------                        [Map19.01]
East of the capital, in the domain of the influential Duke Barin, cargo was 
secretly brought into the country along the river by ship.

Though the contents of the cargo were unknown, it appeared to be a tribute from 
Duke Barin to the Emperor.

Count Velleman ordered the ship to be attacked, and the cargo destroyed. The 
objective being to destroy faith in Duke Barin who was presently Velleman's 
greatest competitor.

Feeling resentment at Duke Barin for trying to curry favor from the Emperor at 
a time of heavy taxes, Garlot and company set a trap at the part of the 
transport route near the mouth of the Art River.


----------------Before Battle----------------                        [Map19.02]
Shiskia:
Everything's ready here! The action squad at the mouth of the river is in
  place.

Jenon:
If we stick to the plan, the ship will be flooded, and we can stop it
  completely.

Garlot:
Now we just have to wait for it to get here...

Jenon:
It'll be bad if it gets out that we work for count Velleman, you hear.

Medoute:
We can't leave any witnesses. The enemy must be completely annihilated......

Garlot:
Yeah... I got it.

Shiskia:
But you know, nobles are really free in their trade.
This tribute is pretty much a bribe, isn't it? To that nasty emperor.
And I bet he's trying to do it using the taxes he collected from everyone too.
Agh, just thinking about it makes me sick!

Garlot:
That's right, we can't just let this go. That's why we're gonna stop it.

Aegina:
In any case, what would they be bringing in specifically from the ocean?

Jenon:
Since it's a bribe or some such thing, wouldn't it be some treasures of gold or
  silver? 
Otherwise, maybe something like beautiful girls from all over the world.

Shiskia:
Enough, you're thinking like this again!

Jenon:
H- hold on, Shiskia. That was just a normal assumption......

Medoute:
Well, whatever it is, there's no mistake that it's something special.
They did buy it across the ocean.

Shiskia:
...Across the ocean, huh.

Medoute:
There are many countries in the world. Every culture is different. And they
  have various special products......

Garlot:
How many countries are there?

Medoute:
No one knows the exact number, But I've been to roughly thirty different
  countries.

Shiskia:
T- thirty! No way!

Medoute:
Some of the countries I've been to are small.

Jenon:
Huh... Then, have you been to the Lost Aries as well?

Medoute:
Lost Aries......
No, I've not visited the Lost Aries in my travel......

Jenon:
Huh, that's surprising.
You've traveled so much, I thought you'd have gone there.

Medoute:
...............

Scout:
...Lady Shiskia. The target ship has come into sight.

Shiskia:
Garlot!

Garlot:
Everyone, take your positions! Depending on if they're moving, begin to
  advance!!

|-----------------|
|      SORTIE     |
|-Follow my Lead!-|
|-----------------|

  /--Victory--------------
 / Annihilate the transport ship troops!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
               Garlot dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Sailor:
The bottom of the ship is flooding!

Transport Leader:
Have we been stranded?

Sailor:
No... We shouldn't be...... Not around here.
C- could it be...

Transport Leader:
That's right, we're being attacked!

Aegina:
The ship has stopped moving.

Garlot:
Good, annihilate the crew of the ship! Advance!

Sailor:
Commander! There are bandits!!

Transport Leader:
We must protect the cargo at all costs! All units proceed with caution!

Abrupt Magical Girl:
Hey, look at me! Over here!

Garlot:
What? What does that weird girl want...

Abrupt Magical Girl:
That ship's cargo has been called for by the Great Pamela!
Got it!? It's fine if human society is piled up in stacks! First come first
  served!

Garlot:
What is that girl talking about?

Pamela:
Okay then. I said what I wanted, so my stress is at zero. I'm going ahead to
  take what's mine~
Dimensional spirits, weaving the world... Illuminate my path through your
  eyes...

--HAVE BAIFU
| Baifu:
| Ah? Baifu's master used that as well! That girl casts that incantation so
|   easily!
-----

Garlot:
What the hell!? Someone explain what's happening here......


------------------Mid Battle-----------------                        [Map19.03]
Transport Leader:
It looks like these aren't ordinary bandits as I first thought......
Everyone! Protect the cargo to your deaths!!

Sailor:
B- but......

Transport Leader:
You know what happens if you run, right?

Sailor:
H- hii! As you wish!!

--PAMELA REMAINING
| Pamela:
| Okey dokey, my chant is done! There's nothing else I need here! Adios! Hasta
|   luego!
|
|------------------|
|      RETREAT     |
|-Time to Regroup.-|
|------------------|
|
| Garlot:
| That weirdo left. What the hell......
-----

  -----------------------------------------------------
PAMELA RETREAT

Pamela:
Mkii! Anger at 120%! What's with these guys!! Interrupting the Great Pamela's
  chanting!
A-aah, This is getting kinda annoying!
I know! I'll go home, lie on the couch, and eat some potato chips~

|------------------|
|      RETREAT     |
|-Time to Regroup.-|
|------------------|

Garlot:
Was this a good thing?


-----------------After Battle----------------                        [Map19.04]
Transport Leader:
Lord Barin, please forgive my weakness......

|-----------------------|
|    KILLED IN ACTION   |
|-A Warrior has Fallen.-|
|-----------------------|

|    |
|    |         THE EVIL FALLS BY ALL MEANS!
| /\ | Successfully annihilated the transport crew!!
|/  \| 

Garlot:
Quickly now! Mop up inside the transport!

  -----------------------------------------------------
Medoute:
Were there any leaks?

Garlot:
I think we're okay. There's a separate force of Shiskia's at the mouth of the
  river.

Medoute:
It doesn't look like the land route will be problematic. All that's left is to
  take care of the troops on the ship......

Garlot:
Shiskia and Jenon went on board. They should be back any time now...

Shiskia:
Garlot, big trouble! In the ship... The ship...

Garlot:
What happened, Shiskia?

Shiskia:
So many undines... they're all... all dead...

Medoute:
Undines!?

Shiskia:
Tied up in chains... and children covered in bruises too......
I- I can't...

Jenon:
They obviously endured cruel treatment.

Medoute:
They, you mean the cargo the ship was carrying...

Jenon:
Probably the undines......

Garlot:
Hold on. Why would they give the emperor undines as a tribute?

Medoute:
Undines from the ocean are rare. Even their bodies are up there with gold and
  silver in value.

Aegina:
......I can't believe this.

Shiskia:
Just how arrogant can nobles be!

Garlot:
I'm in the mood to break that Barin noble's neck right now.

Medoute:
If we could I'd like to as well.
But that can't happen the way Gram Blaze is right now.

Garlot:
We still don't have enough power...... That's what you're saying?

Medoute:
Yes. Power, wisdom. And also we don't have enough of a reason.

Scout:
Lady Shiskia! We found a survivor among the undines on the ship!!

Shiskia:
...Ah? Really!
Is she conscious? What about her injuries?

Scout:
That's...

Survivor:
...Hic. Uueh, I'm here!

Medoute:
Uuh, she smells like alcohol. Hey, are you drunk?

Survivor:
Don't say something so silly...... I haven't even started yet. Hic.

Jenon:
Hey, do you even understand what happened to your friends!

Survivor:
......I understand.
They've all gone. To the world where I can't reach them...... Hic.
Are you telling me to stop drinking! Gees, humans are so gloomy......

Shiskia:
...Thank goodness. She's okay.

Survivor:
I'm Sleip. ...Hic. Who're you guys?

Garlot:
I'm Garlot. We came here to sink the ship.
We didn't think that the cargo would be undines.

Sleip:
...Hic. Well, it's not like it's your fault that my friends are dead.
I wanna thank you, hic, for saving me. Uueh.
Everyone went away... Even if I return to the sea, there's no one there...

Shiskia:
Garlot, isn't there anything we can do for her?

Garlot:
Yeah, we can do something.

Sleip:
...Hm? You'll take me with you? Hic...

Garlot:
That's right.

Sleip:
Whoo! I'll do whatever job you want. Hic. More importantly! You! You'll join me
  in a drink!

Garlot:
Me? Ah, well, sake is a little...

Sleip:
What!? Are you saying, hic, that my sake isn't good enough for you!

Medoute:
These guys are still kids. If you want, I'll join you.

Sleip:
Tch, a girl......

Shiskia:
......Thank goodness, she seems cheerful.

Jenon:
She's faking it, I'd bet.

--PAMELA JOINING
| Pamela:
| Hey, wait up!!
|
| Garlot:
| You again. Who are you.
|
| Pamela:
| As I said before, the great Pamela saw the ship's cargo first!
| I object this usurpation! Such dishonesty! Tyranny!
|
| Garlot:
| By cargo do you mean the undines?
|
| Pamela:
| That's right! What about it?
|
| Garlot:
| The undines were killed by the transporters
| And Sleip here is gonna come with us.
| We're not giving her to someone suspicious like you!
|
| Pamela:
| Mmmn... This is a problem~
| Oh yeah! Let's do it this way then! I'll go with you guys too!
| Then I'll be close enough to study the undine! So it's settled.
|
| Garlot:
| No way, I won't allow it!
|
| Pamela:
| Yay, as I thought you're so generous, captain! That's really thoughtful of
|   you!
|
| Garlot:
| H- hey!
|
| Pamela:
| In which case, I am the great Pamela! Greatest magician of the era. Pleasure
|   to meet you~
-----


---------------------Vs.---------------------                        [Map19.05]
--Garlot vs. Pamela
| Pamela:
| Hey, you! Do you need something from the great Pamela?
| Aah! You're scheming to study the great Pamela's chant of life, I bet!
| ...Yep, I don't show this to the public often, but I'll show you just this
|   once~.
|
|---VICTORY
| Garlot:
| I won in the end......
|
| Pamela
| Mkii!! I'm angryyyy...!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Pamela:
| Easy, easy!!
|
| Garlot:
|What's all this nonsense of hers......
-----

--Shiskia vs. Pamela-----------------------------------
| Shiskia:
| Who's this woman... Is she a magician? No way, she looks too childish to be a
|   magician...
|
| Pamela:
| That's nonsense for a girl as underdressed as you! Could you not stand in the
|   same ring as me?
|
| Shiskia:
| I get it. You're one of those bothersome girls......
|
|---VICTORY
| Pamela:
| You act really brave for a young lady... Don't take me lightly!
|
| Shiskia:
| I don't get it......
|
|---DEFEAT
-----

--Jenon vs. Pamela-------------------------------------
| Jenon:
| And who would you be?
|
| Pamela:
| What, what? If you don't know the face of the great Pamela, you can stay
|   ignorant! Come back again!
|
|---VICTORY
| Jenon:
| Sorry, I don't like to hurt girls.
|
| Pamela:
| Girl? If you call me that like that it's totally okay~
| ...That's something I've got no reason to say! That really hurt!!
| It's time for your punishment!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Jenon:
| What terrifying skill.
| If I don't refine my strategy I'll be annihilated easily......
-----

--Medoute vs. Pamela-----------------------------------
| Medoute:
| A magician?
|
| Pamela:
| You don't know of the great witch Pamela? Ooooh!
|
|---VICTORY
| Medoute:
| If this has nothing to do with you leave!
|
| Pamela:
| Mkiii!! I won't let this slide!!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Medoute:
| That appearance is just for show. She's got real strength...
|
| Pamela:
| Mwufufu... I'm not gonna be like some commoner who's all show!
-----

--Aegina vs. Pamela------------------------------------
| Aegina:
| Who are you?
|
| Pamela:
| When someone asks I answer! I am the greatest witch of the era, the great
|   Pamela!!
| No autographs, please! My service ends at handshakes! Speeches are
|   negotiable!!
|
| Aegina:
| ......Um, who are you?
|
| Pamela:
| I just said!
|
|---VICTORY
| Pamela:
| I might have underestimated you... This resentment should be cleared away.
|
|---DEFEAT
| Aegina:
| S- strong......
|
| Pamela:
| I will make you regret opposing the great Pamela even more!
-----

--Mizer vs. Pamela-------------------------------------
| Pamela:
| ...Hey, why are you barefoot?
|
| Mizer:
| This is my policy. It's the same as your weird appearance!
|
| Pamela:
| We're nothing alike!
|
|---VICTORY
|
|---DEFEAT
| Pamela:
| As expected of the great Pamela! Even against bows I come out on top!
|
| Mizer:
| ...This is really aggravating!
-----

--Baifu vs. Pamela-------------------------------------
| Baifu:
| That was some advanced magic just now. ...Are you a famous magician?
|
| Pamela:
| Ah hah, the people who know me, know me~
| ...But, you're not a person, right. Well, the creatures who know me know me~
|
|---VICTORY
|
|---DEFEAT
-----


------------------Locations------------------                        [Map19.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
A plain through which the Art River flows, connecting Duke Barin's territory to 
the ocean


--------------------On Map-------------------                        [Map19.07]
--ほの暗い森の只中 - Middle of a Gloomy Forest
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|   Powershroom   |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| This place is musty...
| Oh, a mushroom is growing here.
| ...Is it eatable? I'll ask Medoute when we're done here.
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| Phew, it sure is wet in this forest...
| Ah, a mushroom. I don't know if it's eatable or anything, but let's pick it
|   up first.
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| This place is hot and musty...
| Oh, isn't that a mushroom? I've seen one that looks like this in an
|   encyclopedia before. It's a powershroom.
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| ...Oh? What's growing over here...
| I thought it might be a powershroom. There's no harm in eating this kind.
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| Phew, this forest has high humidity.
| Ah, a mushroom. ...But there are many that have poison, so we should be
|   careful...
|
|---MIZER
| Mizer:
| ...The moonlight doesn't reach this place.
| Oh, a mushroom. This kind can be eaten without worry of poison.
-----

--橋脚のふもと - Base of a Bridge Support--------------------
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|   Foreign Coin  |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| This really is a large bridge to let ships pass under it.
| Oh? There's a coin. I've never seen this design before......
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| What a big bridge...
| If we make it fall the ship heading upstream will be stopped completely.
| Hm... Someone dropped a coin. What a strange pattern.
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| This bridge is arched...
| I see. With this construction it's easy for the ship to go upstream.
| Oh? This coin has an unusual design. Could this be from a different country?
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| If we use this we can go after the ship from both banks.
| Ah? Isn't this a coin from a country beyond the sea?
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| Such a big bridge.
| Ah, a coin fell on the ground. Let's pick it up.
|
|---MIZER
| Mizer:
| Hm~ I smell money. But were... There, huh!!
| Yeah, I got a coin! I don't know if it can be used anywhere, but I got it!
-----

--柔らかな木立 - Gentle Grove--------------------------------
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|  Killer Beehive |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot: 
| Hm? Something's falling from the tree...
| Isn't this a beehive! Crap, you can't fight bees with a spear!
| ...............
| ...There aren't any bees... Phew, what a rush.
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| Ah? Something's falling...
| Guah, a beehive!? No way, I gotta get out of here...
| ...W- what? It's empty... Aah, that was startling.
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| Oh? Something above...
| A- A beehive!? This is bad, I can't fight back against a swarm of bees!
| ...They're not coming out. That scared me, sheesh...
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| Hm? Something's falling...
| Uwah, a beehive!! This is bad, I need to get out of here quick...
| ...Wait, none of them are coming out. Is it not being used anymore?
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| Ah? Something from the top of the tree...?
| ...This is a beehive!? Angry bees is not something one can fight against!
| They aren't attacking... Looks like it's been abandoned. Thank goodness...
|
| ---MIZER
| Mizer:
| Aeh? Something's falling...?
| Gyah! A beehive!! And not just any beehive, but one of super brutal killer
|   bees! Crap!!
| ...They're not attacking? What, is this hive abandoned? That was startling...
-----

--座礁船の傍 - Beside the Stranded Ship---------------------
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|   Rusted Chain  |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| So this is the transport ship. First we need to deal with the enemies
|   outside...
| Hm? What's this chain...
| Is it for anchoring the ship? No, it's too short for that...
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| Once we beat the enemy we should promptly board the ship...
| Ah? What's this chain?
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| The transport's cargo... We've been told that it's a bribe for the emperor,
|   but what exactly is it?
| Oh? That's this chain? It's too short for anchoring a ship...
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| ...This is the transport ship?
| There's a chain in the ground. Is this used on board?
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| Let us be quick in destroying the guards. We must stop the ship completely...
| Ah? There is a chain on the ground. What is this for?
|
|---MIZER
| Mizer:
| This ship's full of bribes for the emperor, huh... We totally have to stop
|   it.
| Hm? Why's there a chain in a place like this?
-----


---------------------Loss--------------------                        [Map19.08]
Defeat - Out of Cards (1st)

Having met with unexpected resistance from the ship's protection squad, Gram 
Blaze was scattered due to a flaw in tactics, and was forced to disband...


========================================================================[Map20]
庇護の対価
The Price of Protection
Marquis Albert's Dominion - Rural Lands


--------------------Intro--------------------                        [Map20.01]
The lands of Marquis Albert who lost his life in a conflict with the Divine 
Order have been without a ruler for some time.

However, the guardian of Marquis Albert's adopted daughters, Count Velleman, 
through loud and continued insistence was finally able to claim their 
inheritance.

Garlot, on Count Velleman's orders, went to the Marquis's lands in Velleman's 
place to collect the taxes for this vacant period.


----------------Before Battle----------------                        [Map20.02]
Shiskia:
Aagh, I can't believe that our job's collecting taxes this time. I don't feel
  like doing it......

Garlot:
Yeah, I've no idea how we ended up on the side that collects taxes.

Aegina:
I understand your feelings.
However, if we don't have taxes we can't hire soldiers, and can't protect the
  citizens.

Medoute:
And things such as flour mills and public facilities are built with tax money
  too.
So unconditionally declaring all taxation evil is not good.

Garlot:
Well, Velleman did promise not to make the taxes high, so I can at least agree
  with that part.

Shiskia:
That's if a noble can use them justly.
You can't expect nobles to use them for anything other than their own
  indulgences!

Medoute:
You really hate nobles, don't you, Shiskia.

Shiskia:
There's no way I could ever like them.

Aegina:
...............

Shiskia: 
Aah, but you're different, Aegina. You're a friend.

Aegina:
...Will the townspeople really accept us?

Shiskia:
Don't worry about it. You and Luciana are the lord's adopted children after
  all, right?

Luciana:
That's true, but we were living in hiding. There was no official announcement
  of us.

Medoute:
So you're saying that this will be the first time your existence will be made
  public?

Aegina:
Yes.

|-----------------|
|      SORTIE     |
|-Follow my Lead!-|
|-----------------|

Citizen:
Get out of our town!! We don't need any lord other than the late Lord Albert!

Citizen:
I've never heard anything about Lord Albert having any children!
It's nothing but a tall tale made by your noble so he could get taxes from us!

Luciana:
It's just as we feared......

Garlot:
This sucks......

Citizen:
We'll govern this city ourselves! We'll build the greatest city with no taxes!
  You nobles don't interfere!

Medoute:
They want to govern themselves? They do have ideals, but...... Realizing them
  will be difficult.

Shiskia:
Really? I'm okay with this. We should discuss it with Velleman.

Jenon:
This town lies between Tiera and the capital. The bandit's won't leave it
  alone.

Medoute:
That's right. Moreover, the Empire would never approve of self-government. It's
  just a matter of time before they send troops.

Citizen:
Quiet! We've made up our minds!! If you oppose us you're our enemies!

|---------------------|
|        AMBUSH       |
|-Unexpected Enemies!-|
|---------------------|

Jenon:
An ambush? They were waiting for us...!

Aegina:
No! Master Garlot! We've been surrounded!!

Garlot:
Damn, our opponents are normal townspeople. What should we do......

Medoute:
We don't have time to worry, Garlot. Their equipment is not that of normal
  civilians!
Here they come!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Scatter the armed militia!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
               Garlot dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Garlot:
Why do we have to fight with these people!

Militia:
They're scared! We can do it, we can defeat them!


------------------Mid Battle-----------------                        [Map20.03]
Garlot:
Listen up! Avoid fatally injuring anyone!
Capture the militia and confine them in one place! Do not pursue them!


-----------------After Battle----------------                        [Map20.04]
|------------------|
|      RETREAT     |
|-Time to Regroup.-|
|------------------|

Militia:
W- why you...!

Garlot:
Drop your weapons! If you surrender we'll spare your lives!

Militia:
......I- I understand.

|------------------------|
|        SURRENDER       |
|-Their Will was Broken.-|
|------------------------|

|    |
|    |          THE VICTORY WITH SORROW
| /\ | A division of the militia has given up...!!
|/  \| 

Garlot:
What am I fighting for here... damn.

  -----------------------------------------------------
Aegina:
Master Garlot, the scattered militia are gathering in the center of the city
  with reinforcements.

Shiskia:
Are they still trying to resist......

Garlot:
...............

Jenon:
Garlot, I understand that you don't want to do this, but listen to what I have
  to say.
I don't think that their equipment is what normal militia should have.
There's something else going on here.

Garlot:
Someone's stirring up rebellion, is that what you're saying?

Medoute:
There were some well trained guys mixed in with the militia. That possibility
  should be fully considered.

Jenon:
It could be someone who doesn't like Gram Blaze and the Count. Is that the
  position we're in?

Medoute:
That or someone attempting to sow chaos among the Empire's regions......

Garlot:
Either way, those guys are the real culprits, right?
They're the guys inciting the townspeople to fight. I won't forgive them, no
  matter who they are!

Aegina:
......I will not forgive them either.

Luciana:
Disturbing these townspeople's peaceful life......

Medoute:
They may still be hiding in the city somewhere.

Garlot:
Let's head for the heart of the city!

Jenon:
In theory, wouldn't their headquarters be the lord's mansion?
Seizing it should be our first priority!


------------------Locations------------------                        [Map20.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
An area of farmland forming the southern section of Marquis Albert's domain

   --デシの家 - Apprentice's Home
The home to the youth studying under the blacksmith

   --ムンバール農村 - The Farming Village of Moonbell
A village toiling away on the farmland


--------------------On Map-------------------                        [Map20.07]
水門の傍 - Beside the Floodgate - SLEIP

|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|   Upola Statue  |
|-----------------|

Sleip:
Looks like this bridge turns into a floodgate at the bottom...
It regulates the amount of water flowing through the canal to the west
  depending on the rainfall... What a well made mechanism. Hic!
Oh? Something's stuck in the floodgate... Let's take a look.
......What's this thing? A sculpture? It's weird...

--ムンバール農村 - The Farming Village of Moonbell - FIRST TIME
|
|--------------------|
|     ACQUISITION    |
|-Received Treasure!-|
|      Straw Hat     |
|--------------------|
|
| Farm Woman:
| Are you our new lords...?
| Although everyone invited me to join the revolt I chose to remain here.
| I hate fighting. It's scary.
| I have no power, so I can't fight. If one has no power they can be oppressed.
|   I can't do anything about that......
| That's why I don't resist. It can't be helped.
| ...............
| That's not true, you say? Hm...
| ...You are very kind. Not like any soldiers I've met before.
| ...It's not much, but please take this with you. Though I doubt it will be of
|   use.
| I wear this hat while working around the farm. It's what I wore trying to do
|   my best despite my weakness while the others were fighting.
| It's fine. I want you to have this little bit of strength of mine.
|
|---AFTERWARDS
| Farm Woman:
| ...............
| If possible, please don't hurt the others.
| I know that what I'm saying is selfish, but if you could...
-----

--ココリ林 - Kokori Grove----------------------------------
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|    Kokorinut    |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| Hm? What's scattered over there...
| These are kokorinuts... Let's gather some up.
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| Ah? I've eaten these tree nuts before...
| That's right. Let's gather some.
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| Oh? Could these scattered here be...
| Kokorinuts, as I thought. These are perfect for rations. I'll gather some up.
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| ...Some nuts have fallen here.
| These are kokorinuts. In which case it's not a bad idea to take some along.
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| There sure are quite the number of kokori trees growing around here...
| And there are nuts on the ground. These are tasty. He he...
|
|---SLEIP
| Sleip:
| Hmm, there's a lot of nuts on the ground...
| I've never tried these before, do they taste good? I'll get some for now.
-----

排水溝 - Beside the Floodgate - SLEIP---------------------

|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|      Dozeu      |
|-----------------|

Sleip:
This spot is where the farm water is let off to the river. Hic!
Mmn? Something's moving...
Hm, let's see if I can catch it a bit. ...Gulb gulb...
Oh, a dozeu... These are tasty cooked. Hic!!

デシの家 - Apprentice's Home-------------------------------

Apprentice:
...The previous lord, Lord Albert was a really good man.
I think that's why it's hard to trust our new lord, and you guys by extension.
...............
To tell you the truth, although I've gotten orders from the townspeople for
  weapons, I've rejected them.
I didn't want to see everyone getting armed to fight and then getting hurt.
There's no way I can become a master blacksmith...


---------------------Loss--------------------                        [Map20.08]
Defeat - Out of Cards (1st)	

In the midst of an unwanted fight with the rebelling militia, Gram Blaze was 
scattered due to a flaw in tactics, and was forced to disband...


========================================================================[Map21]
扇げば揺れる麦の穂
Swayed Wheat
Marquis Albert's Dominion - Downtown


--------------------Intro--------------------                        [Map21.01]
When Gram Blaze came to collect taxes for Count Velleman, waiting for them was 
an attack by an armed militia.

For the people it was an uprising for self-government, but for Garlot it was no 
more than an unwanted battle.

However, Garlot, thinking of the citizens' mysteriously solid armor, felt the 
presence of a secret plot behind the uprising.

To prevent any more pointless bloodshed and to find the ringleader Gram Blaze 
continued their march to the center of the city.


----------------Before Battle----------------                        [Map21.02]
Jenon:
I'd like to head straight for the lord's manor, but I'd bet the militia are
  lying in wait for us.

Aegina:
The roads in town are not very wide. We will likely not be able to avoid
  battle......

Garlot:
I'd like to hurt the townspeople as little as possible. If you can, please
  don't kill anyone.

Medoute:
But, Garlot, they will be fighting seriously.

Garlot:
I understand that it's difficult, but please...
I know it's a personal obsession for me......
But I don't want have anyone innocent die. That's the only thing I really want.

Shiskia:
Garlot......

Jenon:
Sigh, your obsession is manipulating us.
But I bet that obsession is mysteriously everyone's obsession.

Medoute:
Then, let's go over the plan. The first priority is to occupy the lord's manor,
  which we believe to be their center of operations, is that right?

Garlot:
Yes. Once we're there, we ask for a ceasefire.

Jenon:
After that we just have to find the agitator of this revolt.

Garlot:
That's right, now let's go!

   /--Victory--------------
  / Gain control of the lord's manor!!
 / (Move a unit onto the manor!)
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
               Garlot dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Garlot:
Our target is the lord's manor! Keep the militia injuries at a minimum!


------------------Mid Battle-----------------                        [Map21.03]
|    |
|    |  FREED A TOWN RULED OVER
| /\ | Occupied the lord's manor!
|/  \| 

Militia:
T- the command center has been taken...

Garlot:
This is a proclamation to all citizens! We didn't come here to rule this city
  through armed force!
However, if you point your weapons at us, we've no choice but to fight back!
That's why I ask you to put down your weapons. I don't want to have to kill
  anyone.

Militia:
......And what about the taxes?
I expect as punishment for our rebellion you'll raise our taxes even higher!

Luciana:
What if we make a vow. To never use these taxes for our own profit.

Militia:
!!

Luciana:
We will vow to only use them for the development of the city!
I am Luciana Art Albert.
As my father has done before me, I will see to this.

Militia:
...............

Garlot:
Please, lower your weapons.

Militia
......I see. Very well.

|------------------------|
|        SURRENDER       |
|-Their Will was Broken.-|
|------------------------|

Shiskia:
Everyone lowered their weapons......

Garlot:
Did Luciana's words get through?

Medoute:
It looks that way.

Garlot:
Medoute, I will never forget this day.
The day I found out that words too can have such power......

|-----------------|
|      SORTIE     |
|-Follow my Lead!-|
|-----------------|

Blond Mercenary:
Tch, this is why they say not to rely on militia.
If you had more money you could have hired many hard working mercenaries. Like
  my stingy client did...

Militia:
S- Sir Inzaghi!

Garlot:
Are you the one inciting the townspeople!?

Inzaghi:
Eh, I'm not really liking this job, but it's not like I can go against the
  orders of my client.

Medoute:
I recognize this guy. He's the mercenary Inzaghi, a man that would do anything
  for money.

Garlot:
Hey you! Tell us the name of your employer!

Inzaghi:
Hey now, I'm a pro. I'm not gonna give away my employer's identity.

Garlot:
I see. That's fine; we'll just make you talk!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Defeat Inzaghi!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
               Garlot dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Garlot:
Capture that mercenary! Make him spill everything!!


-----------------After Battle----------------                        [Map21.04]
Inzaghi:
Ack! Who are these guys!!
Heh, so long as you're alive there's hope... Guys, retreat! Retreat!!

|------------------|
|      RETREAT     |
|-Time to Regroup.-|
|------------------|

Garlot:
H- hey, wait!

|    |
|    |   THE EVIL FALLS BY ALL MEANS!
| /\ | Repulsed the agitator, Inzaghi!!
|/  \| 

Garlot:
Inzaghi. I won't forget that name.
And I'll find the one behind this that hired him. You can count on that......

  -----------------------------------------------------
Citizen:
Lady Luciana, Lady Aegina, everyone, please forgive us......

Citizen:
This all happened because we were tricked by that man, Inzaghi.
He told us that our coming lord was a tyrant.

Citizen:
And he provided us with weapons, telling us that we should take action.

Luciana:
I see......

Shiskia:
That Inzaghi and his employer...... I'll never forgive them!

Citizen:
That Inzaghi... He used us like tools!

Garlot:
Enough!
Everything is his fault you say? No it isn't! You gave him a chance to take
  advantage of you, and this is the result!
Accept some responsibility!

Shiskia:
Garlot?

Garlot:
Blood was spilled that didn't have to be. I won't acknowledge that you're that
  weak!

Citizen:
...In that case what should we have done?

Garlot:
Fight for your own reasons! Fight with everyone's feelings in mind!

Citizen:
But we are weak. After all, we lost to you in the end.

Garlot:
Don't complain that you're weak!
That's what we're here for. The weak are the ones Gram Blaze fights for!!

Citizen:
......Master Garlot.

Citizen:
Master Garlot......

Citizen:
I see, I see. We were being foolish.

Aegina:
Master Garlot, I too shall devote my life to the citizenry, and to these
  ideals.

Medoute:
(He really is an interesting guy.
Perhaps I am witnessing the birth of a great man...)


---------------------Vs.---------------------                        [Map21.05]
--Garlot vs. Inzaghi
| Garlot:
| You were the one inciting the people! I won't forgive you!!
|
| Inzaghi:
| Don't strain over it. We've got our own reasons.
|
|---VICTORY
| Garlot:
| What's wrong! Is that all!?
|
| Inzaghi:
| Damn you! That's some force you've got!!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Inzaghi:
| That was close. What a reckless way of fighting...
| But because of that there are openings I can exploit!
|
| Garlot:
| Openings......!
-----

--Shiskia vs. Inzaghi----------------------------------
| Shiskia:
| You're the one behind this!
|
| Inzaghi:
| I'm nothing more than hired help. If you want to blame someone, blame my
|   employer.
| Of course, I don't plan on telling you who that is.
|
| Shiskia:
| In that case we'll capture you and make you tell us!
|
|---VICTORY
| Shiskia:
| Who hired you? Spit it out!!
|
| Inzaghi:
| I'm not gonna talk. I'm a pro......
|
|---DEFEAT
| Shiskia:
| I messed up...... But I'm not gonna back down!
|
| Inzaghi:
| What a vengeful brat. Hey, run along home now.
-----

--Jenon vs. Inzaghi------------------------------------
| Jenon:
| You do anything for money, huh... That's not very admirable.
|
| Inzaghi:
| Who needs admiration. I fight so I can eat. That's just how I live.
|
|---VICTORY
| Jenon:
| Do you want money that badly?
|
| Inzaghi:
| That's right! You wanna say something? I'm just honest about it!
| No matter what you look like, underneath you're just like me!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Inzaghi:
| I didn't get this far worrying about appreciating what's around me!
|
| Jenon:
| In that case we just have to change that thought.
-----

--Medoute vs. Inzaghi----------------------------------
| Inzaghi:
| A dark skinned woman with a large axe... You're Medoute, aren't you!?
|
| Medoute:
| That's right! You can tell of this axe's strength in hell!
|
|---VICTORY
| Medoute:
| What a worthless man. I can't see any value in killing you...
|
| Inzaghi:
| Say whatever you want!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Inzaghi:
| Heheh, still gonna fight?
|
| Medoute:
| Of course. Not only did I decide to fight, I do not give up!
|
| Inzaghi:
| Eeh, what a tiring personality......
-----

--Aegina vs. Inzaghi-----------------------------------
| Aegina:
| I will not forgive you! Die!!
|
| Inzaghi:
| I couldn't care less whether you guys forgive me or not!!
|
|---VICTORY
| Aegina:
| How dare you do this to the townspeople...
|
| Inzaghi:
| Shut up! It's their own fault getting tricked!!
| It's because they weren't thinking of anyone but themselves that I took
|   advantage of them.
|
| Aegina:
| What did you say!!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Aegina:
| Why you. Why you...!
|
| Inzaghi:
| She's really ticked off... It sucks to have to keep fighting her.
-----

--Sleip vs. Inzaghi------------------------------------
| Sleip:
| Uuhic... Mercenaries on land are willing to do anything, eh... Don't you have
|   anything of yourself?
|
| Inzaghi:
| What's with her, she stinks!!
|
|---VICTORY
|
|---DEFEAT
-----


------------------Locations------------------                        [Map21.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
The territory of marquis Albert, located north of Tiera

   --領主の館 - Lord's Manor
Manor of the previous feudal lord, believed to be the militia's headquarters

   --中枢都市ダーム - Central City Darm
Composed of garrison offices, the city is a place of gathering for the 
territory's important organizations

   --鍛冶屋オヤカタ - Master Blacksmith
Shop built by a blacksmith who sold his name

   --デシの家 - Apprentice's House
The home to the youth studying under the blacksmith


--------------------On Map-------------------                        [Map21.07]
--西マーケット - Western Market
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|     Aquarius    |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| Hm? This is...
| It's a strangely shaped jewel. I don't know much about accessories...
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| Ah, this is...
| This gem is an unusual shape. It's quite pretty, though...
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| Oh? What's over there...
| It's a jewel in the shape of a spiral shell. I wonder where it was made.
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| As expected, the market is deserted...
| ...Ah. I believe this gem is something the undines use in battle. 
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| Ah? This is...
| What an unusually shaped gem. It's like an art piece made in the shape of a
|   spiral shell from the ocean...
-----

--中枢都市ダーム - Central City Darm - 1ST PART---------------
| Citizen:
| ......!! You're one of the new lord's subordinates!
| The only lord this town needs is the late Lord Albert! We won't accept your
|   rule!!
| Get out!!
|
|---2ND PART
| Citizen:
| Uh, you are our new lord's subordinate...
| I didn't want to believe that we were being manipulated by Sir Inzaghi.
| Though seeing the way things have turned out I have no choice but to believe
|   it.
| I apologize for our uprising.
| But if you could allow us just one thing, please understand our anxiety.
| This uneasy country, the state of affairs, the era... Standing in the face of
|   such an adverse wind is difficult for us.
| So we revolted, fighting to sweep away those worries.
| I realized just now. Fighting is a lot easier than just waiting......
-----

--東マーケット - Eastern Market------------------------------
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|   Item Manual   |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| Hm? What's this thick book...
| ...It's blank in some spots. What's that all about?
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| This is a really big book...
| Mmn, it's heavy to hold! Can someone take it please, someone strong,
|   anyone...
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| This binding and thickness... Could this really be!?
| I was right, it's an item manual! Wow, it really exists!!
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| That's a thick book. I wonder what's written in it...
| Ah, it's blank in places... No, that's not it! Could it be that this book
|   records things automatically!?
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| This book is not just big, it's massive.
| Wow... All the items we've seen up until now are recorded here......
-----

--デシの家 - Apprentice's Home - FIRST TIME----------------
|
|--------------------|
|     ACQUISITION    |
|-Received Treasure!-|
|  |
|--------------------|
|
| Apprentice:
|
|---AFTERWARDS
| Apprentice:
|
|---NO GOLD LUMP - 1ST PART
| Apprentice:
| ...Sorry, but I'm not making weapons.
| Sorry for the weapons that everyone is using that I made...
| And sorry for having to swing your weapons and injure everyone.
|
|---NO GOLD LUMP - 2ND PART
| Apprentice:
| I've heard what happened. That someone was urging everyone to revolt...
| What a horrible person. Rather than fighting himself, he made other people
|   fight.
-----

--鍛冶屋オヤカタ - Master Blacksmith - FIRST TIME-------------
|
|--------------------|
|     ACQUISITION    |
|-Received Treasure!-|
|     Ice Javelin    |
|--------------------|
|
| Master:
| I'm not making weapons anymore.
| Ah, don't misunderstand. It's not that I particularly want to get in your
|   way.
| I didn't make weapons for my comrades in the city who asked either.
| Why? I didn't want to see my comrades cut down others with my weapons...
| And in the same way, I don't want to see any of my comrades cut down with my
|   weapons...
| ......What? There's someone stirring up the townspeople?
| ...You want to defeat the ringleader and avoid pointless fighting...
| ...............
| You've got thousand year snow. Give it here.
| Here, take this.
| But remember one thing. I did not make this weapon to fight the
|   townspeople...!
|
|---AFTERWARDS
| Master:
| I cannot fight. I've no other talent than weaponsmithing.
| That's why I don't entrust my weapons to anyone aside from those I can
|   entrust the fighting to...
| ...Sigh. Blindly making weapons does not make one a blacksmith.
| I entrust you with this.
|
|---NO THOUSAND YEAR SNOW - 1ST PART
| Master:
| I'm not making weapons. Sorry, but please leave.
| This shop is closed. We're not open for business now......
|
|---NO THOUSAND YEAR SNOW - 2ND PART
| Master:
| I've heard what happened. That bastard Inzaghi was stirring up the guys in
|   town.
| What a dirty bastard...
| ...What? You're saying you're gonna make him pay his dues, eh?
| ...............
| I see... Sorry to have to leave this to you.
| I've no talent other than weaponsmithing. So please...
-----


---------------------Loss--------------------                        [Map21.08]
Defeat - Garlot Defeated (1st)

In the midst of an unwanted battle with a rebelling militia, Gram Blaze's 
captain, Garlot, lost his life, and Gram Blaze vanished from history's stage...

Defeat - Out of Cards (2nd)----------------------------

In the battle with the mercenary Inzaghi who incited revolt, Gram Blaze was 
scattered due to a flaw in tactics, and was forced to disband...


               ================================================
                   ***            Chapter 4             ***
                               預言者の瞳は何を見る
                   ***   What Do a Prophet's Eyes See   ***
               ================================================


========================================================================[Map22]
懊悩の殉教者
Martyr of Anguish
Outskirts of Tiera - Private Army Housing


--------------------Intro--------------------                        [Map22.01]
When times are peaceful, the members of Gram Blaze rest at their base at the 
outskirts of Tiera as they wait for orders.

Though constantly going from one fight to another felt like business as usual, 
there were course days with no duties.

On this day Garlot headed to Tiera, having a reason for his absence, and 
everyone else enjoyed a moment's peace. None of them knew at the time, that 
silently drawing close to them was an armed group.


----------------Before Battle----------------                        [Map22.02]
Shiskia:
I can't sit still when we don't have a mission. I know that peace is best, but
  I've got mixed feelings about it.

Jenon:
Then, shall we go shopping? We did get paid yesterday.
The Nibel scarf shop got new fabrics recently.

Shiskia:
Nibel, huh... Isn't that the noblemen's district? I don't really feel like
  going there.
And besides... If I think about the villagers we've seem up 'til now I don't
  feel like buying things like a scarf.

Jenon:
I understand. We've seen so many people suffering from taxes and bandits.
It makes one not want to waste money on luxuries.

Shiskia:
Yeah, that's exactly it, Jenon!
(A scarf made of a new fabric...... Which store was it? I want to go! But I
  can't ask about it anymore...)

Jenon:
Ah, Luciana! You're in a good mood today. Have you gotten your hair cut?

Luciana:
No, I haven't.

Jenon:
Ah, really.

Shiskia:
How is your leg feeling?

Luciana:
It's doing well, thank you. I can't wait until I can walk without a crutch.
I think I'll try to start rehabilitation soon.

Aegina:
Sister, don't push yourself too hard.

Eudy:
Haah, I want to shoot a cannon. I want to smell gunpowder smoke and have it
  cover me from head to toe...
But if I test fire it now and damage the outer wall Velleman will yell at me.

Garlot:
Yo, I'm back.

Luciana:
Welcome back, Master Garlot.

Garlot:
Looks like your leg is doing much better.

Luciana:
Yes, it's doing well. I'm fighting hard, just like Aegina.

Shiskia:
...! Garlot! Everyone, get down!!

|-------------------|
|       SNIPED      |
|-A Technical Shot!-|
|-------------------|

Garlot:
An enemy raid!?

Zilva:
......I missed.

|----------------------------------|
|         SURPRISE ATTACK          |
|-Bewildered by a Surprise Attack!-|
|----------------------------------|

Aegina:
Is that Zilva!?

Garlot:
It's the Divine Order!

Jenon:
They're after Luciana and Aegina. Let's get them inside!

Aegina:
I will not run. I will fight to protect my sister!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Drive away the Divine Order assassins!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
     Garlot or Aegina dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Zilva:
...I will take the sisters' heads, and restore the faith I have lost.


------------------Mid Battle-----------------                        [Map22.03]
|--------------|
|    ATTACK    |
|-Under Siege!-|
|--------------|

Golem:
Guoooooh!!

Divine Order Soldier:
......Looks like you're having trouble. I've been given orders to act as your
  rear guard.

Zilva:
......Rear guard? I've heard nothing about this.

Divine Order Soldier:
That is merely because the Order has lost faith in you.
This is a message from our founder. Think of this as your last chance.

Zilva:
This is... my last...


-----------------After Battle----------------                        [Map22.04]
Zilva:
Is this all I can do......

Garlot:
Now, capture their commander!!

|---------------------|
|       CAPTURE       |
|-Where is the Crime?-|
|---------------------|

Zilva:
Kh... Let go! Let go of me!

|    |
|    |           CAUGHT THE TARGET
| /\ | Apprehended the Divine Order assassin!!
|/  \| 

  -----------------------------------------------------
Zilva:
......Be resolute and kill me.

Garlot:
No. There are things I want to ask you.
What is the Divine Order? Why are you after the twins?

Zilva:
Why?
That is my question. Why do you keep interfering!
Originally you should have had no connection to the sisters.
What happened that you protect them!

Shiskia:
Of course we protect them, they're our companions!!

Zilva:
...And what do these companions give you.
With companions you share goals and enemies... That is all they exist for.

Shiskia:
Zilva, you're... What do you fight for?

Zilva:
I am merely a tool of the Divine Order. One does not ask 'why' in the Order.

Garlot:
...Hmm. I thought you were a quiet person, but you're surprisingly chatty.

Zilva:
...!?

Garlot:
I'm glad. You do have some human qualities to you.

Zilva:
Enough, kill me. I will not tell you anything you wish to know.

Divine Order Soldier:
Master Zilva! Please escape!!

Shiskia
Watch out, Garlot!

Medoute:
There was still someone left alive?

Shiskia:
There!

|-------------------|
|       SNIPED      |
|-A Technical Shot!-|
|-------------------|

Divine Order Soldier:
Master Zilva...... Please, go now......

Zilva:
...Next time we meet, I will have the sisters' lives.

|------------------|
|      RETREAT     |
|-Time to Regroup.-|
|------------------|

Shiskia:
Are you okay, Garlot!?

Garlot:
Yeah, ouch. That was some tackle.
But if you hadn't pushed me, I'd have definitely been shot.
Thanks, Shiskia.

Shiskia:
Aah, you let your guard down too much!

Aegina:
She got away.

Garlot:
Yeah, it looks like.

Luciana:
She had such lonely eyes.

Shiskia:
Yeah.


---------------------Vs.---------------------                        [Map22.05]
--Garlot vs. Zilva
| Zilva:
| If you didn't get in the way, my strategy would have gone perfectly. But
|   now......!
|
| Garlot:
| She's not acting normally......
| The way she's talking, it's like she's desperate.
|
|---VICTORY
| Zilva:
| As always, you stand in my way, Red.
|
| Garlot:
| I have to protect them. That's why I fight.
|
|---DEFEAT
| Garlot:
| She's fighting like it's the end...... I can even feel her madness.
|
| Zilva:
|The next shot will end this!
-----

--Shiskia vs. Zilva------------------------------------
| Zilva:
| Why... Why do you help those sisters!
|
| Shiskia:
| That should be obvious! They're our friends!!
|
| Zilva:
| F- friends......
|
|---VICTORY
| Zilva:
| Do not get in my way!
|
| Shiskia:
| We will always protect them!!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Shiskia:
| It's not over!
|
| Zilva:
| Where do you get such strength...?
-----

--Jenon vs. Zilva--------------------------------------
| Jenon:
| Those eyes are so full of sadness.
|
| Zilva:
| Just what do you think you understand!
|
|---VICTORY
| Zilva:
| Kh...!
|
| Jenon:
| I don't want to injure you beyond this. Haven't you been hurt enough?
|
| Zilva:
| Don't speak as if you understand!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Jenon:
| Well, I had to go easy on you this much.
|
| Zilva:
| You aren't skilled as you keep claiming.
-----

--Medoute vs. Zilva------------------------------------
| Zilva:
| When I'm ordered to kill I kill, when told to guard something I put my life
|   on the line to guard it...
| That is how I live. I will kill those sisters!!
|
| Medoute:
| And what comes out of such a way of life?
| Wake up! You're nothing but brainwashed!
|
| Zilva:
| Brainwashed? You're wrong! You're wrong!!
|
|---VICTORY
| Zilva:
| F- fast!!
|
| Medoute:
| You used to be so precise before, but now you're just sloppy. You cannot win
|   against me this way.
| Do you understand, you're doubting yourself......
|
| Zilva:
| S- shut up......
|
|---DEFEAT
| Medoute:
| You may have your speed but I can tell you're faltering! I won't lose next
|   time!
|
| Zilva:
| So persistent...!
-----

--Aegina vs. Zilva-------------------------------------
| Zilva:
| I will kill you!
|
| Aegina:
| I will not go down without a fight!
|
|---VICTORY
| Zilva:
| W- why you!
|
| Aegina:
| Retreat, Zilva. I do not wish to kill you when you are acting this way.
|
| Zilva:
| Ridiculous! I hope you are more prepared to die than you are to kill.
|
| Aegina:
| That will not happen to me next time!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Zilva:
| This is the end! You are cornered!
|
| Aegina:
| I will not be cornered! I will not leave my sister alone in the world!
-----

--Eudy vs. Zilva---------------------------------------
| Eudy:
| You too are generally persistent. Is it fun to live that way?
|
| Zilva:
| This is neither fun nor tedious. I merely fight, nothing more.
|
| Eudy:
| Oh yeah?
|
|---VICTORY
| Zilva:
| Why? Why can't I win?
|
| Eudy:
| It's impossible the way you are now.
|
|---DEFEAT
| Eudy:
| Oww, I've been outsmarted...
|
| Zilva:
| Keep going!! Make an opening!
-----


------------------Locations------------------                        [Map22.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
Gram Blaze's housing, established at the outskirts of Tiera


---------------------Loss--------------------                        [Map22.08]
Defeat - Aegina Defeated (1st)

Before the fierce and desperate might of the Devine Order's Zilva, Aegina's 
life was lost. The Gram Blaze, crushed one by one, was annihilated...


========================================================================[Map23]
終わり無き復讐
Unending Vengeance
Outskirts of Tiera - Western Highway


--------------------Intro--------------------                        [Map23.01]
Gram Blaze, through the fruits of their battles around the country and Count 
Velleman's fame, rose in rank within the noble circle.

However, Count Velleman was not yet content.

There was a lack of someone experienced in drafting and debating tactics in 
Gram Blaze, in other words, someone to be the Count's right hand man.

In Crade Forest west of Tiera lived a prophet who held great power. When Count 
Velleman heard rumors of him, he dispatched Garlot to recruit him.


----------------Before Battle----------------                        [Map23.02]
Shiskia:
So, this person Velleman wants us to find, what's he like?

Garlot:
There are rumors of him being a prophet. It looks like long ago he traveled
  around the country and showed off his foresight into the future.
However, at the time, the people thought it was nothing more than a show.

Aegina:
You're saying that these predictions have been coming true, then?

Shiskia:
That sounds fairy-taleish. I mean, it sounds so made up.

Medoute:
I've heard about this. He's said to have predicted the death of the previous
  Emperor.

Jenon:
Predicting the future, huh...... I agree with Shiskia. This story is hard to
  believe.

--HAVE EUDY
| Eudy:
| The Magical Academy too is of the opinion that the future is uncertain.
|
|---DON'T HAVE EUDY
| Aegina:
| Because the future is uncertain it is said that, even with magic, one cannot
|   make a reliable prediction.
-----

Garlot:
Velleman too said that this is the power to see the future rather than a
  prediction or magic.

Medoute:
I see. If that's true it would be a very valuable asset for us.

Jenon:
But unless we meet him we won't know what kind of person he is, right?
He might be an awful fraud.

Garlot:
Seeing as he lives hiding in a forest I've no doubt that he's someone
  eccentric.

Medoute:
As long as we don't run into trouble, it looks like this will be an easy
  mission.

Shiskia:
Yeah, that's not gonna happen......

Jenon:
Hm? What's wrong, Shiskia?

Shiskia:
Trouble, see there. Look.

|---------------------|
|        AMBUSH       |
|-Unexpected Enemies!-|
|---------------------|

Garlot:
It's the idiot again......

Jenon:
Yep, looks that way.

Cerica:
Hold on, hold on, hold on! Cerica heard that!!
You called Cerica stupid again!

Garlot:
Give me a break.

Cerica:
This time Cerica will take revenge for Commander David!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Drive away the revenge obsessed Cerica!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
               Garlot dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Cerica:
Cerica has a good feeling about today! Have you prepared?
That's right, did you wash your neck well?

Garlot:
I don't know if it's motivation or what......
But her persistence is astounding......
There's nothing to be done but break through.


------------------Mid Battle-----------------                        [Map23.03]
Cerica:
Hehehe, stupid, stupid! You fell for it!
Now, now, the foundation of victory is, of course, a pincer attack!

|---------------------|
|        AMBUSH       |
|-Unexpected Enemies!-|
|---------------------|

Cerica's Unit:
Hehehe, Miss Cerica, everything went according to plan!

Cerica:
What will you do now, Garlot? Do you feel cornered yet?
Well, if you bow down and apologize right now, Cerica might still let you be
  part of her gang.

Garlot:
Cerica, you really are stupid.
If you split that few forces into two groups, you will all be completely
  crushed.

Cerica:
You underestimate Cerica!

|-------------------|
|  REINFORCEMENTS   |
|-Help has Arrived.-|
|-------------------|

Blond Mercenary:
Here we are! So, what about if a group of this size were behind you?

Cerica:
Cerica will make you regret calling her stupid again!

--SHISKIA IS ON THE MAP
| Shiskia:
| When has her small group gotten this big......
-----

Blond Mercenary:
You read too much into the front group! You weren't paying attention!
Hm? What's this, you guys are the ones she wants revenge on?

--SHISKIA IS ON THE MAP
| Shiskia:
| Ah! That man!! He's the one who was stirring up rebellion in Luciana and
|   Aegina's city!!
-----

Garlot:
You're that mercenary, Inzaghi! You were after us!

Inzaghi:
No way. This is just a coincidence. My employer today is that girl.
This is unexpected, but I do think I have a chance to pay you back for the
  other day!

Garlot:
Today you're working for Cerica, huh. You sure are busy going from one employer
  to the next.

Cerica:
Hey! Inzaghi! You've been paid, so stop slacking off and get to work!

Inzaghi:
Yeah, yeah......
Tch, this is why I hate being on the same battlefield as my employer... Stupid.

Cerica:
Did you say something!?

Inzaghi:
I was just getting myself psyched up!


-----------------After Battle----------------                        [Map23.04]
Cerica:
How could this be...!

|    |
|    |  THE FIRE YET BURNS BRIGHTLY!
| /\ | Successfully drove off Cerica!!
|/  \| 

Cerica:
Why, why won't Cerica's feelings reach!?
If you stretch out your hands you should be able to reach... Cerica just wants
  revenge for commander David, nothing else!

Garlot:
Cerica......

Cerica:
The only thing Cerica want is your life! She doesn't need your pity!
Don't forget! So long as Cerica lives, she won't stop hunting you!

|------------------|
|      RETREAT     |
|-Time to Regroup.-|
|------------------|

--INZAGHI REMAINING
| Inzaghi:
| The hell!? My employer ran away!!
| Tch, that's it! We're outta here!
-----
