Garlot:
...............

  -----------------------------------------------------
Jenon:
Garlot, here's the battle's injury report.

Garlot:
......Okay.

Jenon:
Since we're still not far from Tiera we can make a fresh start if we return to
  the army housing once......

Garlot:
Yeah......

Jenon:
What should we do, Garlot?

Medoute:
This amount of casualties is not significant enough to warrant heading back.
We should make a separate group and have them escort those with the most
  serious wounds.

Jenon:
Is that alright, Garlot?

Garlot:
Yeah, you guys can handle it.

Medoute:
......Sigh.

Garlot:
...............

Shiskia:
Garlot, is what happened with Cerica troubling you?

Garlot:
You could say that. I've been thinking about the reason Cerica fights us.

Shiskia:
It's revenge, right.
I can understand that idiot's feelings, but she's got no good reason for her
  resentment.
We did defeat David, but he was truly an awful person.

Garlot:
I don't have any reason to doubt our beating David either.
But Cerica's resentment is real. And it is true that we killed David.
How should we have fought to spare her feelings?

Shiskia:
......You're really kind, Garlot.

Garlot:
That's not it.
Besides just continuing the fighting we ended up hurting somebody.
And as the scale of this gets larger, the number of dead will keep increasing.
And that includes our allies too......
Rationally I understood this, but this really brought it home.
Someday...... I might lose someone I care about too.

Shiskia:
...............
What are you saying, Garlot!
We'll be fine. We've got you to protect us.
When I'm troubled by something you're there for me, so when something's
  bothering you I'm there for you too.

Garlot:
Huh? Well, I guess.

Shiskia:
There, now, chin up! Captain!

Garlot:
...Keh, stop acting so self-important.

Shiskia:
Eh, if something worries you again, come talk to me, Garlot.

Garlot:
Whatever you say, really.

Shiskia:
I might just be one member of our group, but I'm your friend too.

Garlot:
Yeah, thanks, Shiskia. You're really a dependable friend.
Now let's head back. We've got a prophet to find.

Shiskia:
Yep, we do, don't we.
(A dependable friend, huh.
A friend, that's right, I suppose......)


---------------------Vs.---------------------                        [Map23.05]
--Garlot vs. Cerica
| Cerica:
| There you are, Garlot! Don't go anywhere!
|
| Garlot:
| Be smart and give up!
|
|---VICTORY
| Garlot:
| Stand down, Cerica! You can't beat me!
|
| Cerica:
| Stop messing with Cerica!!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Cerica:
| Alright! Your head is mine, Garlot!!
|
| Garlot:
| Don't get cocky just because you won once!!
-----

--Shiskia vs. Cerica-----------------------------------
| Shiskia:
| You're here too, you annoying scank! Still sticking to the boys? Agh, how
|   disgusting!!
|
| Shiskia:
| Is that all you wanted to say?
|
|---VICTORY
| Shiskia:
| Fighting, winning, killing Garlot... Will that really solve anything?
|
| Cerica:
| You think you're so smart!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Shiskia:
| Cerica, you should withdraw.
|
| Cerica:
| Don't look at Cerica with those eyes!
-----

--Jenon vs. Cerica-------------------------------------
| Jenon:
| I can understand your grief, Cerica.
|
| Cerica:
| Agh, people who say things like that annoy Cerica the most!
|
|---VICTORY
| Jenon:
| Let's stop this. Nothing good will come of this fight.
|
| Cerica:
| Shut up! That's fine with Cerica! Cerica just wants to kill that man!
|
|---DEFEAT
-----

--Medoute vs. Cerica-----------------------------------
| Medoute:
| What do you plan to do once you get your vengeance?
|
| Cerica:
| Cerica will think about that once she has! What are you stupid?
|
|---VICTORY
| Medoute:
| Enough, Cerica. What is the point to continuing this fight?
|
| Cerica:
| Shut up! Cerica wants that man's head!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Cerica:
| How's that, big axe girl! That's what you get for annoying Cerica!
|
| Medoute:
| Whatever you say!
-----

--Aegina vs. Cerica------------------------------------
| Aegina:
| If you plan to chase Master Garlot to the end expect no mercy from me!
|
| Cerica:
| Another girl hanger-on... That's so annoying, go away!
|
|---VICTORY
| Cerica:
| Ouch! Now Cerica's really mad!!
|
| Aegina:
| Come near me and I shall strike you down.
|
|---DEFEAT
-----

--Eudy vs. Cerica--------------------------------------
| Eudy:
| Revenge, huh... Well, do as you like.
|
| Cerica:
| What the, such infuriating behavior!!
| Aha, were you dumped by a guy recently?
|
| Eudy:
| ......Wow. How did you come to that conclusion?
|
|---VICTORY
| Cerica:
| Ugh......
|
| Eudy:
| There, it's not like you can't speak. Why not give up?
|
| Cerica:
| Cerica will not give up! Ever!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Cerica:
| How's that!! Cerica'll shut that self-important mouth of yours right now!
|
| Eudy:
| Really, so childish... Unbelievable.
-----


------------------Locations------------------                        [Map23.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
A trade road facing the provincial city Tiera from the west

   --荒野の村 - Desert Village
A desolate settlement facing the Istraka wilderness

   --朽ち果てた神殿 - Crumbling Temple
Though once a building to worship the gods, it is now merely a shadow of its 
former self...

   --リーブルの町 - Rible Town
A town where those headed for the western region stop to rest


--------------------On Map-------------------                        [Map23.07]
--朽ち果てた神殿 - Crumbling Temple - FIRST TIME
|
|--------------------|
|     ACQUISITION    |
|-Received Treasure!-|
|    Lost Material   |
|--------------------|
|
| Temple Hand:
| Do you know of something called the 'Lost Material' said to have existed in
|   prehistory?
| Because it is an unknown material it conceals limitless possibilities.
| If given to a master craftsman it could be made into an item that exudes
|   tremendous power.
| ...............
| My 'core'... the part that in a human would be the heart, is the 'Lost
|   Material.'
| You may have it. My flesh and blood...
| Hm? There's no need to hesitate.
| As a living being, the time has come for me to die. However, as a material I
|   do not die... Therefore I wish to entrust this to you......
| ......Farewell......
| ...............
|
|---AFTERWARD
| Traveler:
| Huh, that's strange...
| When I came here previously there was a weird golem. It talked about
|   materials or something.
| ...I wonder where it went.
-----

--リーブルの町 - Rible Town - FIRST TIME---------------------
|
|--------------------|
|     ACQUISITION    |
|-Received Treasure!-|
|    Gaudy Turban    |
|--------------------|
|
| Grandfather:
| Oh, young one. That's a fine expression you have.
| But then, I should not compare you to myself when I was young. Hmhm, should I
|   tell you?
| When I was young I was an adventurer... My skill with the sword was
|   unsurpassed, and I excelled at escaping danger.
| If there was word of treasure in the east I'd fly there on my horse. If a
|   treasure map pointed to the west I would ready a ship.
| If I were 50 years younger I could stand with you and fight. It's
|   regrettable...
| Oh, yes. If you could take this at least.
| It is a turban I used when I was young. Think of me when you use it.
| You don't need to thank me. As I can't fight with you, it's enough if you
|   just think of me in exchange.
|
|---AFTERWARD
| Grandfather:
| When I was an adventurer I had many assuring friends.
| And grandma was one among them...
| She was so beautiful when she was young... When I get home I can't figure out
|   how a woman changes.
-----

--石窟前 - Grotto Entrance--------------------------------
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|  Soul Crucible  |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| The rock is gouged out here... How did that happen?
| Hm? What's this small bottle? There's a lot of shining beads floating in
|   it...
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| This grotto is quite old. When was it made?
| Hm... There's a small bottle buried in the ground. What is it?
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| I've read about this before... The story of a general who dug a grotto here
|   and hid his soldiers.
| Oh, what's this little bottle? Its contents seem to be shining...
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| The stone is gouged out... I don't see any other caves aside from this clean
|   cut looking one.
| Mn, What's this small bottle... I distinctly feel something like a life force
|   from it...
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| This is a fine grotto... I wonder what purpose was it dug for.
| Ah? This little bottle has light trapped inside it. There sure are mysterious
|   things out there...
|
|---EUDY
| Eudy:
| This is a large grotto...With our current technology this would not be an
|   easy task.
| This must have been made by a wildly creative genius...
| Hm? What's this small bottle... There's light sealed within it.
-----

荒野の村 - Desert Village----------------------------------

Man:
The majority of the people of the Bronquian Empire live between Tiera and the
  capital... In other words, they are concentrated in the eastern region.
In the other direction, to the west of Tiera are little, sparsely scattered
  towns...
Particularly, as one goes west across the continent, they become more isolated
  from the capital. The Emperor's rule does not reach to these lands.
That's why the people of these towns are self-aware that they each stand alone.
This atmosphere of being beyond the capital's rule for so long has built a
  tendency for independence.
If the people of these towns were to join together, they would gain strength
  from it, and if that strength were to turn into military force...
The capital would be a formidable enemy... A clash would be unavoidable.
Eh? Why am I telling you this, you ask?
If the strength of the west were to gather, the ones it would collide against
  would be the frontline of the east, the provincial city Tiera.
I've been thinking about this. About the fighting that could occur and the
  enemy you would face.

--街道と砂漠の只中 - Between the Highway and Desert------------
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|   Rokon Skull   |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| Crossing a desert's not easy... If you stand still you'll totally dry up.
| ...And this is the end result of something that's dried up, huh. Let's hurry
|   ahead so we don't end up like this.
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| There's a place like this just a little out of Tiera... There are so many
|   things that I don't know about, huh.
| ...We'll need to be careful so as to not end up like the owner of these
|   bones.
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| The highway has been eroded by the desert sands in places.
| ...These are animal bones. It's because the rain doesn't fall; they can't
|   return to the earth either.
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| No matter how many times I cross the desert, it's still difficult...
| ...These are the bones of a living creature. Well, being alive is preferable.
|   That's what this says to me.
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| It's would be hard to say that this part of the highway is being
|   maintained...
| These don't look like human bones, but it may very well be us next. Let us
|   proceed with care.
|
|---EUDY
| Eudy:
| I thought Tiera was hot, but there's a desert right next to it. No wonder...
| Huh, there are animal bones lying here.
| There's no one to collect the bodies of the dead... That's a bit too cruel.
|   Let's at least gather the bones.
-----


---------------------Loss--------------------                        [Map23.08]
Defeat - Garlot Defeated (1st)

In the hostilities with Cerica who was still enraged with vengance, Gram 
Blaze's captain, Garlot, lost his life, and Gram Blaze vanished from history's 
stage...


========================================================================[Map24]
試練は屍を越えて
Trial - Get Past the Corpses
Crade Forest - Prophet's Mansion


--------------------Intro--------------------                        [Map24.01]
On the way to search for the prophet, Gram Blaze encountered and drove back 
Cerica's group, who was still after Garlot for revenge.

Their fight, which they branded as for a greater cause, will result in people 
getting injured. Having closely learned this truth, Garlot, after being cheered 
up by Shiskia, began to see the value of the friends that stood with him in a 
new light.

Seeking the man rumored to be a prophet, the party forced their way into the 
depths of Crade Forest......


----------------Before Battle----------------                        [Map24.02]
Aegina:
What an awfully deep forest. The sunlight is so sparse.

Jenon:
This prophet must be very eccentric to live in a place like this.

--HAVE EUDY
| Eudy:
| At any rate, this place is too remote. Is this guy touched in the head?
|
| Garlot:
| You're one to talk, getting absorbed in your experiments on that mountain.
-----

Medoute:
You seem to have a terribly negative attitude regarding him, Jenon.

Shiskia:
Aah~ no way, Jenon! Are you thinking that if this prophet joins us you'll lose
  your spot?

Jenon:
...Are you saying I'm jealous? Stop it. That's not it at all.

Medoute:
Garlot, The scout has reported in. Just a short walk from here is an ancient
  looking mansion.

Garlot:
That's probably it. Let's go check it out.

Shiskia:
Here? Uuh, it's spooky.

Blindfolded Man:
You must be the ladies and gentlemen of Gram Blaze. I have been expecting you.

Garlot:
!!
Who're you! How do you know about us!?

Blindfolded Man:
Who am I, you ask? How disappointing; I had thought that you came here looking
  for me.

Shiskia:
Is that a prediction!?

Jenon:
Is there any reason for someone to come here besides to meet him? That's not a
  prediction, just a deduction. 

Blindfolded Man:
That may be.
And how would you explain my knowing that you're Gram Blaze? 

Jenon:
...That's a... a guess.

Garlot:
Right now we can't rule out that option.

Blindfolded Man:
Very well.

Amy:
Huh, aren't you Miss Shiskia?

Shiskia:
You're... The young lady from before!?

Amy:
It's not 'young lady,' I'm Amy.

Shiskia:
Ehehe, sorry, Amy. Why are you here?

Amy:
I'm in the middle of my journey to find my brother.
I heard about a prophet who knows everything and came here.

Shiskia:
I see, then your goal is the same as ours. 
(They always say kids have so much energy...)

Blindfolded Man:
Were you acquaintances? What a marvelous coincidence.

Amy:
You know, Mister Nessiah is so amazing! He knows everything!
He was just about to tell me about my brother!

Nessiah:
Concerning that...... The prediction has come to me, Lady Amy.
I am sorry to say, but it looks like meeting your brother would be difficult
  right now. 

Amy:
Oh... Really...?

Nessiah:
Your brother is locked behind an intricate barrier and cannot get free.

Garlot:
(An intricate barrier? What's he talking about?)

Nessiah:
However, if you are with these people you will be reunited before long.

Garlot:
What's with that prediction!?  Why would that happen!

Nessiah:
Strictly speaking it is not a prediction. These are the words engraved inside
  my eyelids.

Medoute:
......This prediction is absolute?

Nessiah:
A small detail can fall out of place. However, I expect it is difficult to
  change the larger flow.
Please, think of it as the flow of a river......

Jenon:
I don't believe in it. If that's true then it's deniable that people have free
  will.

Nessiah:
Well, each person has his own beliefs. I too do not know which is the truth.

Amy:
So! Is it okay if I go with you, Miss Shiskia? I want to meet my brother!

Shiskia:
I don't mind, but...... Here, ask that mister with the red hair.
He's captain. That means he's really important!

Garlot:
What are you talking about, important!

Amy:
Then, mister captain... Is it okay if I go with you?

Garlot:
That decision isn't up to me, but I will ask our employer.

Amy:
Yay! Thanks so much, mister captain! Now I can meet my brother!

Garlot:
Hold on, I have a name you know, I'm called Garlot......

Amy:
Nice to meet you, mister captain!

Garlot:
This pipsqueak hasn't heard a thing I said......

Shiskia:
That's a good nickname, mister captain.

Jenon:
I agree, mister captain.

Garlot:
You two-!

Amy:
Hah... I hope I meet Gulcasa soon.

Nessiah:
Now, that settles Lady Amy's matter. Next would be Sir Garlot.

Garlot:
What, you even know my name!

Shiskia:
You just said it just now......

Nessiah:
Your business?

Garlot:
Oh, oh yeah, right. 
We think that if you're a talented and useful person we'd like you to join us.

Nessiah:
Oh? Right to the point. And, which is it? Do you think I am useful?

Garlot:
Honestly, I don't really know you. It's a little hard to judge based merely on
  your predictions.

Nessiah:
If one is part of a private army, having fighting strength should be enough.

Garlot:
Arms alone is not power. We'd like to add your wisdom and experience to our
  force.

Nessiah:
If it is power you want, you must win it...

|----------------------|
|        SUMMON        |
|-Allies Called Forth!-|
|----------------------|

Corpse Warrior:
...............

Medoute:
...He called forth soldiers with magic!? Though, I can't feel any life force in
  them.

Nessiah:
A necromancer, commander of the dead. That is yet another identity of mine.

Medoute:
......A corpse army.

Nessiah:
My wisdom and experience are likely the best in the world. I assure you of
  that.
If I were to join you, Gram Blaze would further obtain great power.
That is why it is not for you to decide whether I would be useful or not.
I will be the one deciding here. On whether you are adequate for me to grant my
  power to you.

Garlot:
That's some confidence you've got.

Nessiah:
And you as well.
Then, please, just think of this as a test of mine.

Garlot:
I see, sounds interesting. We'll take you on!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Cut down the corpse army controlled by Nessiah!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
               Garlot dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/
Corpse Warrior:
Keke-, ke!

Garlot:
First take care of both flanks of the corpse army! Everyone advance!!


------------------Mid Battle-----------------                        [Map24.03]
|-----------------------------------|
|              REPELLED             |
|-Foiled the Strategy of the Enemy!-|
|-----------------------------------|

|-----------------------|
|        PURIFIED       |
|-The Chain was Broken!-|
|-----------------------|

Corpse Warrior:
Keke-, ke...

Garlot:
The power to freely call up corpses to fight, huh. That sure is some
  frightening power.

|    |
|    |  THE MISSION CONTINUES ON
| /\ | Crushed Nessiah's vanguard!!
|/  \| 

Garlot:
We've crushed both the flanks!

Nessiah:
I see, or rather, well done.

|----------------------|
|        SUMMON        |
|-Allies Called Forth!-|
|----------------------|

Nessiah:
Now, let us begin the second act.

Garlot:
Tch, there are still more of them!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Show your power to Nessiah!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
               Garlot dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Garlot:
There's no end to this! Destroy Nessiah's main force! Everyone, keep it up!


-----------------After Battle----------------                        [Map24.04]
Nessiah:
Splendid... The overflowing power of your offence is beyond what I imagined!

|-----------------------------------|
|              REPELLED             |
|-Foiled the Strategy of the Enemy!-|
|-----------------------------------|

|    |
|    |               AHEAD OF A CORPSE
| /\ | Successfully finished the prophet Nessiah's test!!
|/  \| 

Nessiah:
Wonderful!
While there is an unrefined edge to them, the qualities you possess are
  substantial.
That there are people like you in this world does not seem possible when one
  lives a secluded life like mine.

  -----------------------------------------------------
Nessiah:
I honestly did not anticipate that you could break through my trial.

Garlot:
When I heard that you're a prophet I imagined you'd be some wrinkly old guy...
  But you actually can fight, huh.

Nessiah:
Fufufu... Thank you for that assessment.
My interest in you has grown as well.

Medoute:
But Garlot. What Count Velleman wants is someone to be the brains of this
  operation.
What we need is someone who can read tactics and form a strategy for battle.

Nessiah:
A prediction showing the future... It may or may not be true.
Truly at present it is hard to put faith in my predictions.
But even assuming my predictions are not true, I believe I can help you.

Garlot:
I think I agree with that.

Jenon:
Really, Garlot.

Nessiah:
Please, do not worry, Sir Jenon. I highly value the tactics of a strategist of
  your caliber.

Jenon:
!!

Nessiah:
Now, let us hurry. It won't be long until the rebel activity in the west shall
  grow to a larger scale.
And the time comes for a leap in civil unrest. This is your opportunity to work
  on pressing higher and higher.

Garlot:
......I got it. But first we need to check in with Velleman.

Nessiah:
Very well. And on the way I may get a chance to show my own skills......

Garlot:
Alright, let's get back to Tiera!

Medoute:
...............

Shiskia:
...Huh, Medoute? Is something wrong?

Medoute:
No, it's nothing. Let's go.

Shiskia:
.........?

Amy:
Miss Shiskia! Let's go, hurry up!


---------------------Vs.---------------------                        [Map24.05]
--Garlot vs. Nessiah
| Garlot:
| Why am I feeling uneasy all of the sudden...
|
| Nessiah:
| You've come... Now, please, show me what you can do!
|
|---VICTORY
| Garlot:
| How's this! This is our strength!!
|
| Nessiah:
| That is some overwhelming power. Again, I can see how you would make a name
|   for yourself.
| However, it looks as if you have not yet become aware of the true power
|   sleeping within you.
|
|---DEFEAT
| Garlot:
| He's good!!
|
| Nessiah:
| It seems your defense is a little weak.
-----

--Shiskia vs. Nessiah----------------------------------
| Shiskia:
| Making us fight dead people... it's kinda hard to stomach.
|
| Nessiah:
| What is required of a militial force is not the method or process, but
|   results.
|
|---VICTORY
| Nessiah:
| ...Hmm. You seem to be an ordinary human with nothing special worth
|   mentioning.
|
| Shiskia:
| Wouldn't you say the same of everyone?
|
| Nessiah:
| ...That gives the group the illusion of being individual. I see, that really
|   is typical of humans.
|
| Shiskia:
| What's this guy talking about?
|
| Nessiah:
| Fufufufufu......
|
|---DEFEAT
| Shiskia:
| This is a little creepy...
|
| Nessiah:
| Fufufu...
-----

--Jenon vs. Nessiah------------------------------------
| Jenon:
| Let's go, prophet!  Face me in battle!
|
| Nessiah:
| The tactician stands on the front lines...... That is not admirable.
|
|---VICTORY
| Nessiah:
| I see. You do seem to have skill with the sword.
| However, your true desire should be that wisdom and tactics...
|
| Jenon:
| Maybe, but isn't it better to be able to fight?
|
| Nessiah:
|I'm afraid I do not understand.
|
|---DEFEAT
| Nessiah:
| I see. You pay attention to how those around you see you.
| If you merely direct others your companions will be dissatisfied with you...
|   That is why you stand in battle.
|
| Jenon:
| What's with this all of the sudden......
-----

--Medoute vs. Nessiah----------------------------------
| Medoute:
| I've known of the existence of techniques that control the dead, but seeing
|   it work on a force of this scale is astonishing......
|
| Nessiah:
| This amount is merely the beginning.
|
|---VICTORY
| Medoute:
| Troops of lifeless corpses, huh... They certainly are troublesome to face,
|   but they are not invulnerable!
|
| Nessiah:
| It seems that for a human you hold talents high above the rest. Though the
|   nature of that power is different from your esteemed captain...
|
|---DEFEAT
| Nessiah:
| You are quite the fighter. Fufufu...
|
| Medoute:
| What is this foreboding feeling... Hey you, have we met somewhere before?
|
| Nessiah:
| Hmm, I wonder... I've no recollection of something like that. Fufufu...
-----

--Aegina vs. Nessiah-----------------------------------
| Aegina:
| You must be Lady Aegina... It is a pleasure to be able to meet you......
|
| Aegina:
| .........?
|
| ---VICTORY
| Nessiah:
| That sword technique. Mm hmm, I see. Fufufu...
|
| Aegina:
| What does that mean! If you have something to say, say it plainly!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Nessiah:
| You are hiding a secret that you wish for your companions to never find out.
| It is clear to me.
|
| Aegina:
| .........!?
|
| Nessiah:
| You dread that that secret could well end up killing your companions in Gram
|   Blaze.
| Am I wrong?
|
| Aegina:
| ...............
-----

--Eudy vs. Nessiah-------------------------------------
| Eudy:
| Are you really a magician? Aren't you a little too different from me?
|
| Nessiah:
| Resemblance in not something you can help, don't you think so? Fufufu...
|
|---VICTORY
| Eudy:
| You really are different... What exactly are you?
|
| Nessiah:
| I am what you see before you. There is no more to me than that.
|
|---DEFEAT
| Eudy:
| S- strong!
|
| Nessiah:
| Come now, you are quite good yourself. Fufufu...
-----


------------------Locations------------------                        [Map24.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
Deep forest where the sunlight doesn't reach through the foliage

   --ラーゼス廃村 - Deserted Town Rhazes
Long ago this deserted village too was inhabited by people...

   --妖精の村 - Fairy Village
There is said to be a fairy village in a forest so deep that sunlight doesn't 
reach...

   --預言者の館 - Prophet's Mansion
A western style mansion in the center of the forest where the prophet Nessiah 
lives


--------------------On Map-------------------                        [Map24.07]
--岩場の影 - Shadow of a Rock Wall
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|   Hero's Coin   |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| Hm? Something's fallen here...
| A coin with a strange pattern. This image... It looks kind of like Medoute's
|   axe.
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| Ah, there's a coin over here.
| Who would drop a coin in such a deserted forest? I don't get it...
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| Hm, what is that over there...
| It's a coin with an emblem I've not seen before. Is that a long handled farm
|   tool? Could it be an axe?
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| Hm, something's fallen here...
| This crest...... I can't believe it, seeing something like it here...
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| Ah, something's fallen here.
| This is an unusual coin. Can it be used anywhere?
|
|---EUDY
| Eudy:
| Hm? I just saw light shine off of something... I wonder what.
| This is another antique coin... What era is it from?
-----

--木々の牢獄 - Prison of Trees------------------------------
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|  Dragon Killer  |
|-----------------|
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| Hm? What? It's hard to get through here. The trees and branches get in the
|   way...
| Ah, that's a tactics card. Aren't we lucky finding it in a forest like this?
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| The way the trees and branches overlap is strange... Generally they grow this
|   thick on their own.
| Did someone do this intentionally...?
| ...A tactics card. Is there something special about this card?
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| The trees and branches here overlap in a line. By any chance is this...
| ...A dragon killer tactics card, huh. I see, that's what it is.
| I got really unlucky.
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| The trees are in the way, but I got through somehow.
| This looks like a tactics card. The forest protected it.
-----

--妖精の村 - Fairy Village - HIGH % - FIRST TIME-----------
|
|--------------------|
|     ACQUISITION    |
|-Received Treasure!-|
| Item -> Dark Matter|
|--------------------|
|
| Fairy:
| Looks like some humans have wondered in, how unusual. Can we play a prank on
|   them? Giggle~
|
| Fairy:
| But they're our first guests in ages... The normal welcome won't be enough.
|   You have any ideas?
|
| Fairy:
| ...Ah, I know! How about we take the things they haven't used and mix them
|   up?
|
| Fairy:
| Hehe, got it~
|
| Fairy:
| ...Welcome to the fairy forest! You must be a brave human to have come so
|   deep into the forest~
| We'd like to repay that courage. Take this!
| This is a rare substance produced in the underworld. I wonder if you'll have
|   a use for it. Giggle~
|
|---LOW % - FIRST TIME
|
|---AFTERWARDS
| Fairy:
| Oh no, the humans are here again...
|
| Fairy:
| Did our present make you that happy?
|
| Fairy:
| What is it? Do you want more presents?
|
| Fairy:
| Whatever you want, you're being greedy. Go away already.
-----

--ラーゼス廃村 - Deserted Town Rhazes - NIGHT - FIRST TIME---
|
|---AFTERWARDS
|
|---OTHER - SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| What's with this village... It gives me the creeps. Scary...
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| What's this, I feel a chill. ...I'm not very superstitious, but...
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| A town of no people... Must be a ghost town.
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| There is no trace of life in this village. Is it deserted?
-----


---------------------Loss--------------------                        [Map24.08]
Defeat - Garlot Defeated (1st)

In the battle with a swarm of corpses controlled by the prophet Nessiah, Gram 
Blaze's captain, Garlot, lost his life, and Gram Blaze vanished from history's 
stage...

Defeat - Out of Cards (2nd)----------------------------

Before the death blow unleashed by the prophet Nessiah, Gram Blaze was 
scattered due to a flaw in tactics, and was forced to disband...


========================================================================[Map25]
天意の名の下に
In the Name of God
Istraka Wilderness


--------------------Intro--------------------                        [Map25.01]
Gram Blaze, having met with the prophet Nessiah in the depths of Crade Forest, 
broke through his bizarre trial to defeat a corpse army, and gained his
support.

They were also reunited with Amy, the girl Garlot and his friends rescued 
before. Due to Nessiah's prediction that if she is with the private army, she 
can meet her brother, Amy too joined Gram Blaze.

Gram Blaze started their journey back to the provincial city Tiera, but on the 
way they ran into a certain armed group.

They were a unit if the group that relentlessly pursued Luciana and Aegina - 
the Divine Order.

However, luckily this unit was not yet aware of the presence of Garlot and the 
others.

Jenon, seeing the opportunity, proposed to spring a surprise attack and 
confront the Divine Order.


----------------Before Battle----------------                        [Map25.02]
Shiskia:
...Over here, Garlot. There are the Divine Order guys.

Garlot:
...Yeah, I see them. But they're acting differently today.

Shiskia:
I don't see Zilva. She was always there when they attacked us.

Jenon:
Looking at their movements it feels like they're after something.
They could be after something else. Maybe they're chasing another target.

Nessiah:
The Divine Order...... An underground organization with might that reaches
  beyond country borders.

Garlot:
You know of them, Nessiah?

Nessiah:
They perform all kinds of dirty jobs, running the black market, spying,
  assassination, and control history from the shadows.
I did not catch he whole story, but it seems that their dogma is wrapped up in
  mystery...
And they hold enough power to sway the entire country.

Medoute:
That's very detailed, nicely done. Did you divine that as well?

Nessiah:
This is merely information one can get if they know where to look.

Aegina:
...............

Garlot:
They may be an underground organization, but it's true that they disrupt Aegina
  and Luciana's lives.
This time we'll take the offense.

Aegina:
That is a kind offer, Master Garlot, but the dispute with the Divine Order is
  the problem of us sisters.

Garlot:
Stop there, Aegina.
We're friends. You being hurt is the same to me as me being hurt.

Aegina:
But......

Shiskia:
Don't worry about it. We're friends, right.

Aegina:
...Thank you, Shiskia, everyone.

Garlot:
That settles that. All units take your positions!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Take the Divine Order by surprise!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
     Garlot or Aegina dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Private Army Soldier:
Preparations are complete.

Garlot:
Okay! Now!

Order Soldier:
Those troops...... Is that Gram Blaze!?

Garlot:
Let's go! All units, commence attack!


------------------Mid Battle-----------------                        [Map25.03]
|------------------|
|      RETREAT     |
|-Time to Regroup.-|
|------------------|

Order Soldier:
...W- we failed!

|    |
|    |           OCCUPIED THE FORT
| /\ | Successfully ambushed the Divine Order!!
|/  \| 

Garlot:
That was kinda too easy...... It feels like we scattered rather than beat them.

Shiskia:
Garlot! A messenger's here from the party that went on ahead!! They've spotted
  a different Divine Order unit!
The ones that fled from here merged with them.

Garlot:
A different unit...? What's going on?

Jenon:
As I thought, their goal this time is elsewhere.

Garlot:
Anyway, let's go after the remnant soldiers.

Zilva:
......Hah ......hah.

Garlot:
That's Zilva! Is she the leader of the other unit!?

Aegina:
Wait, their movements don't look right for that. It looks as if Zilva is the
  one being chased.

Order Soldier:
Gram Blaze! What timing......
However, our goal is to carry out God's will...... No one is allowed to
  interfere.

|----------------------|
|         PURGE        |
|-We Give Death to You-|
|----------------------|

Zilva:
......Ugh!

Order Soldier:
Failing time and again to capture the sisters, only to scurry back after each
  time...
You have dragged the pride of the Order through the mud! Atone through death!!

Zilva:
.........!

Garlot:
Looks like they really are after Zilva!

Aegina:
Master Garlot, I know this is selfish of me......
But please, allow us to rescue Zilva.

Garlot:
But they...!

Aegina:
Being thrown away because you're not needed... Being killed because you're in
  the way...
Even if Zilva targeted us, I cannot forgive something like this!

Garlot:
I see. Okay, Aegina. We'll save her!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Drive off the assassins and rescue Zilva!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
     Garlot or Aegina dies...  /
         Zilva is crushed...  /
   Use up all your cards...  /
       ---------------------/

Nessiah:
Oh? Is that what you have chosen......


-----------------After Battle----------------                        [Map25.04]
Order Soldier:
Gh... ...That woman's death... is the will... of God......

|    |
|    |  THIS LIFE TOO CAN BE SAVED
| /\ | Succeeded in rescuing Zilva!!
|/  \| 

Order Soldier:
You heathens... have disobeyed God. Fufufu... You will regret that.
One day... judgment will come...

Aegina:
Enough!
Even if our deaths were a part of God's will, we will defy it and survive!
Your fate is not decided for you! You yourself decide how you live and die!

|------------------------|
|      LOSS OF LIFE      |
|-One Mere Common Death.-|
|------------------------|

Order Soldier:
What an... awe inspiring... sight... Guah, glory to the Divine Order!!

Zilva:
...............

  -----------------------------------------------------
Shiskia:
You got lucky, despite being surrounded so many enemies you escaped with so few
  wounds.

Zilva:
...............

Shiskia:
Hang on a sec, I'll treat them for you.

Zilva:
......Why did you save me. I am your enemy.

Shiskia:
Isn't that wrong now?
The Divine Order was after you too. And the enemy of an enemy is a friend.

Zilva:
An enemy is always an enemy, no matter the situation.
...Up until now I have lived knowing no other life than with the Divine Order.
The Order gave me everything. Food, lodging, equipment. And the skills to
  kill......
And now I've been expelled from the Order. I have no reason to live...

Shiskia:
You want to die?

Zilva:
Yes, that's fine. Kill me.

Shiskia:
...There, all done.

Zilva:
Didn't you hear me? Do you hesitate because I am wounded?
If so, I beg you. Please, kill me.

Shiskia;
...Hey, Zilva.
Maybe up until now the Order really has been everything for you.
But our lives from this point forward are much longer that up until now.
And besides, there's got to be a lot of things in this world that you don't
  know yet!
Look for your reason for living, and change yourself.

Zilva:
...............

Shiskia:
The person I really like changed himself. He used to be really lonely and
  violent... but now he values his friends.

Zilva;
...You're saying that if he could change, so can I?

Shiskia:
I can't say for sure, but there is one thing I do know.
If you don't try to change, then you never will.

Zilva:
......I.

Garlot:
Yo, did you finish the treatment?

Shiskia:
Ah, Garlot. I just got done.

Zilva:
Redheaded man, what do you plan to do with me?
......Will you kill me?

Garlot:
No, go wherever you want. This is where we part.

Zilva:
What?

Garlot:
As of right now you're being chased by the Order. We have no reason to kill you
  anymore.

Zilva:
I won't die...
...Are you saying that now that I am no longer an Order member, I have no
  meaning or value?

Garlot:
That's not it.
Stop clinging to others for a reason to live or die. Look for your own meaning
  in life.

Zilva:
......Those words are the same.
...Woman, was the one you spoke of earlier this redheaded man?

Garlot:
Hm? What are you talking about?

Shiskia:
W- where did that come from all of the sudden! Really, geez...

Zilva:
I see, I suppose I'll try to find it... the meaning to my existence.

Garlot:
Yeah. Go for it.

Zilva:
You saved my life. I know I should thank you for that, but...
I will leave it unspoken. The way I am now I know there will be no feeling in
  it.
My name is Zilva. It would make me happy if you were to remember it.

Shiskia:
...She left.

Medoute:
Did we do the right thing?

Aegina:
Yes......
I think I understand how she feels.
The Divine Order was like a guardian to her. Having one you believed in try to
  take your life... It must be difficult.

Jenon:
I'm concerned that she not become another person constantly after us, like
  Cerica.

Medoute:
Eh, I don't think that will happen.

Jenon:
Why do you think that?

Medoute:
I don't know, but the way Garlot is now, I think it'll be fine.

Jenon:
Huh? What do you mean?

Medoute:
Just call it a hunch.


------------------Locations------------------                        [Map25.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
A vast beltway of exposed rock located northwest of Tiera


--------------------On Map-------------------                        [Map25.07]
--荒原の岩陰 - Shade of a Rock
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|   Skull Stone   |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| There are rocks scattered about... I wonder if they split and fell off the
|   mountain.
| ...There's one in here that looks like a skull. Though I don't think it was
|   made naturally...
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| There are a lot of rocks scattered here.
| Uah, a skeleton! That scared me... but why is something like this here?
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| Not much rain falls here. Because of this aridity so many rocks are scattered
|   here...
| Hm? This looks like a skeleton's head, but I'm sure it's man made.
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| This wasteland is completely dry, huh. It reminds me of my home town
|   somewhat.
| A strange shaped stone. It looks it was made by someone, but...
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| It's different from a desert, but this land is somehow dry too...
| Hii!! A- a skeleton!? ...T- that startled me. Somebody made something like
|   this, really...
|
|---NESSIAH
| Nessiah:
| Oho, this is...
| I feel negative energy from this. It is not an ordinary work. Fufufu...
|
|---EUDY
| Eudy:
| This is a large slab of rock... There's no cover either, it's the perfect
|   place to test out my cannons.
| Ah, is this a skeleton? It's made out of rock... Hmm, fascinating.
-----


---------------------Loss--------------------                        [Map25.08]
Defeat - Aegina Defeated (1st)

Encountering unforeseen resistance during the surprise attack on the Divine 
Order, Aegina's life was lost. The Gram Blaze, crushed one by one, was 
annihilated...

Defeat - Zilva Defeated (2nd)--------------------------

|-----------------------|
|    KILLED IN ACTION   |
|-A Warrior has Fallen.-|
|-----------------------|

Zilva:
......I return to nothingness. That is all.

|    |
|    |         RESCUE FAILED
| /\ | Zilva dies in the Order's purge!
|/  \| 

In the battle to rescue Zilva from the Divine Order, her life was lost to the 
blade of the purge, and the strategy ended in defeat...


                    ========================================
                        ***        Chapter 5        ***
                                  希望の名の下に
                        ***    Fallen Battle Flag   ***
                    ========================================


========================================================================[Map26]
戦士達の休息-Girl's Side-
Soldiers' Vacation -Girls' Side-
Outskirts of Tiera - Northern Highway


--------------------Intro--------------------                        [Map26.01]
Count Velleman, together with the Archduke, left to visit a foreign country, 
and for that period Gram Blaze had been furloughed.

Not knowing what to do with the free time, Shiskia, with a comment of a girl 
only shopping trip, gathered up the girls and went to the city.

Walking around town, the girls fully enjoyed the time they had to themselves 
that they hadn't had in so long.

However, off duty the girls were not attentive. A group of young women was an 
attractive target to the gangs of thugs spread rampant through the city......


----------------Before Battle----------------                        [Map26.02]
Aegina:
You've certainly bought a lot, Shiskia.

Shiskia:
I didn't have any chance to spend my salary before.
So I decided, I will use it all up in one day!

Medoute:
And so you bought ten or twenty strips of cloth.

Shiskia:
They're not strips of cloth! They're scarves!!

Medoute:
Jenon was right. When the topic turns to scarves you totally change.

Shiskia:
Mmn, what was that! Are you looking down on me!!

Luciana:
And what did you get, Lady Medoute?

Medoute:
Let's see, I got a short sword, training gloves...

Shiskia:
Oh wow, what elegant tastes.

Medoute:
You understand, huh, Shiskia. Look at this, these loves are a work of art.

Shiskia:
What a serious response.
You're a girl; you're supposed to buy things like clothing and accessories!

Medoute:
Even if I bought them, I wouldn't wear them. It would just be a waste.

Shiskia:
You should enjoy shopping more!

Medoute:
I am enjoying it.
Oh yeah! I found this really exciting thing just now!

Aegina:
Hm... What was it?

Amy:
I wanna know too. What was it, what did you get?

Medoute:
Rations that will stay good for 90 days. I just got six at a discount.

Shiskia:
...Medoute, I'm putting a stop to this for us girls.

--HAVE EUDY
| Eudy:
| Really, please stop!!
-----

Medoute:
S- shut up!

--HAVE EUDY
| Medoute:
| And what about you? I bet you bought nothing but gunpowder.
|
| Eudy:
| No way, don't lump me in with you. I came along to buy glasses.
-----

Amy:
You can buy a cute frilly outfit like mine. I'm sure it'll look good on you!

Medoute:
Ah... I doubt that.

Shiskia:
Kh... Khuhu... that's great! It'll look great! Let's go buy it!

Medoute:
Cut it out with the jokes!

Amy:
What did you buy, Miss Aegina?

Aegina:
I bought sweets for Big Sis.

Luciana:
Ah, I'm so happy.

???:
Yo, girls! You look like you're having fun......

Aegina:
Did someone say something?

???:
Over here! Hey! Here! Here!!

|---------------------|
|       ENCOUNTER     |
|-Enemies Just Ahead.-|
|---------------------|

Shiskia:
...What? Do you need something?

Thug A:
How about it, come have tea with me? I know a good place.

--HAVE EUDY
| Eudy:
| Are they hitting on us? If something like this happens you're supposed to
|   ignore them. Ignore, ignore.
-----

Luciana:
...............

Thug B:
Don't be like that. We'll even treat you, how 'bout it?

Medoute:
Thugs like you don't suit us. Try again with someone else.

Thug C:
Hey now. Won't you at least talk to us for a while...

Medoute:
You're sure persistent. You're all eyesores, so go away, skirt chasers.

Thug A:
...Guaaaagh! That was crap! How dare you mock us, damn it!
Beat them up! And bring every single one back with us!!

Shiskia:
Wow, someone added fuel to the fire. Could you be in a bad mood, Medoute? Is it
  my fault?

Medoute:
That's it, enough...... I'll take this out on you.

  /--Victory--------------
 / Chastise the overeager thugs!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
  Even one person is taken...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Thug A:
Don't go easy on them guys!

Thug B:
I want the one with the long blond hair, we'll be great together!

Thug C:
Don't be stupid, she's mine! You can go with the one with the big axe!!

Thug A:
Stop! No fighting!! Fighting in our brotherhood makes big bro real sad!!
I'll put an end to this fight! I'll take the one with the long blond hair!

Thug B:
Bro, that's mean!

--UNKNOWN CONDITIONS
| Aegina:
| H- hideous...! Disgusting!
|
| Thug A:
| Heh heh heh, One night with me and you'll never want to leave.
-----

--UNKNOWN CONDITIONS
| Thug B:
| Hey, little bro, Which one do you want? Hm?
|
| Thug D:
| Me... the fluttery red haired... little one...
|
| Amy:
| ...............
|
| Thug B:
| Tha... Even for you, that...... No, go for it. You must seize your own path!
-----

Thug A:
Alright, let's go! Everyone charge!


------------------Mid Battle-----------------                        [Map26.03]
Thug A:
Nuooohooohooohooo! These girls are strong!

Medoute:
Don't think we're easy just because we're girls!

Thug A:
R- ruuuuuun!

|    |
|    |     CHASTISED
| /\ | Punished the thugs!
|/  \| 

Thug A:
Damn iiiiiiiiiiit! But! I will not give up. You will be mine!

Aegina:
...No, I don't think so.

|-------------------------|
|         RUN AWAY        |
|-Only I Should be Saved!-|
|-------------------------|

Thug A:
We'll regroup this one time! But! We're leaving because we want to. We are not
  running away!

Medoute:
Hmph... They sure are playboys. Worthless men.

--UNKNOWN CONDITIONS
| Shiskia:
| But, uh, were they really all brothers? They did sorta say that, but...
|
| Medoute:
| I don't care; they can be whatever they want.
-----

|-----------------|
|      SORTIE     |
|-Follow my Lead!-|
|-----------------|

Thug E:
Hold it right there! You won't escape! Now that the Bixcen Brothers have fled
  we have the power to pick up girls!
"So, how about we go for tea?" Hm, that'll do it......

Medoute:
Hey, what's this about?

Shiskia:
......Who knows?

Aegina:
Perhaps we have another fight on our hands?

Shiskia:
Things do seem to be going that way......

  /--Victory--------------
 / Chastise the thugs, whatever it is they want!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
  Even one person is taken...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Thug E:
What, I can't believe it. My charms didn't get any girls......
Ah, I get it. You want me to take you by force? Is that what you like!?

Medoute:
So wrong. Something's really wrong here......

  -----------------------------------------------------
|------------------|
|      RETREAT     |
|-Time to Regroup.-|
|------------------|

Thug E:
Nuooohooohoooo! These girls are strong!

|    |
|    |     CHASTISED
| /\ | Punished the thugs!
|/  \| 

Thug E:
Damn... I won't give up. I will nooooooot!
After all this time, I've finally met up with the girl of my dreams......

Shiskia:
Huh, that's surprisingly pure hearted. Incidentally, which of us are you
  talking about?

Thug E:
...............
Hmmm, which one should I pick?

Medoute:
...Enough, die already.

Thug E:
Hyaaaaaaa...... Is there nothing I can do but admit defeat?

Thug A:
No! You mustn't give up!

|----------------------------------|
|               RESCUE             |
|-Valiant Blade Delivers its Lord.-|
|----------------------------------|

Thug E:
Y- you're... the Bixcen Brothers!

Thug A:
There is a line that men must not retreat behind, and that is the line of
  manliness.
Are you okay with crossing it? Are you okay with losing your pride and rock
  solid heart?

Thug E:
...! No- no way. Just a bit more and I would have broken the line of manliness.
That's right... I can do it. Watch me, mommy.

Thug A:
That's it! That's how a man acts!! How 'bout it? In the neighboring peach
  orchard shall we exchange vows of the Noble Brotherhood?

Thug E:
Really? I'm so moved!!

Thug A:
Yes. Together we will strive to become the best ladies men!

Thug D:
...You will be the new little bro. Then I too... can be someone's big bro...
  Fufu...

Medoute:
...I've had enough of this.
Let's go back to the army housing. I don't expect they'll follow us all the way
  to an armed garrison.

Shiskia:
And if they do?

Medoute:
Then we'll just dump hot water on them from the top of the castle walls.

  /--Victory--------------
 / Lose the thugs and return to the garrison!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
  Even one person is taken...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Thug A:
Everyone charge! Gather the power of the Noble Brotherhood, and make the girls
  give in!

Thug E:
Big Bro! I'll follow you for the rest of my life!

Medoute:
Stupid men are endless in number and resilience. Don't engage them, just head
  back quick.

  -----------------------------------------------------
|---------------------|
|       ENCOUNTER     |
|-Enemies Just Ahead.-|
|---------------------|

Black Haired Beauty:
You gentlemen there. May I have a minute of your time?

Thug A:
What do you want! We're in the middle of charming girls! If you get in the
  way......
Nuah! Mnnmn, such beauty!! I think I'll actually take her.

Black Haired Beauty:
Ah, what a fervent approach. Are you sir strong, by any chance?

Thug A:
W- well. Despite my current appearance, I am the handsome man that won the
  sixth place prize in Tiera's Manly Spirit Tournament five years in a row!

Black Haired Beauty:
That's good, right... I am searching for a strong gentleman. Please tell me of
  your heroic deeds so that I may write songs of them.

Thug A:
Heroic deeds? Would those be my deeds in the daytime? Or are you interested in
  the ones at night? Well, which do you want to hear about?

Black Haired Beauty:
Ah, what is that awful stench? It's gotten a little stronger than before......

Thug A:
Hm? Stench?

Black Haired Beauty:
Don't get near me! It's you! You're the source of that smell!
Ah, I'm sorry. Even if you are a strong gentleman, I am afraid if you don't
  take a bath every day I will have to restrain myself.

Thug A:
Huo...? Bath? What's that? Can you eat it? Anyways, about my heroic deeds......

Black Haired Beauty:
I'm sorry, it seems I did not get my meaning across. I will try once again...
Just breathing around you makes me feel ill. Please, get out of my sight.

Thug A:
W- what what what what! You were so cute I let you get me excited!!

Shiskia:
Who's this gothic girl? It looks like she's goading those guys into a fight...

Medoute:
Yeah, honestly I don't get it, but we were the ones who made them mad
  originally.
We should help her out.

|    |
|    |   THE MISSION CONTINUES ON
| /\ | Rescue the black haired girl!!
|/  \| 

  /--Victory--------------
 / Annihilate the thugs and save the girl!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
  Even one person is taken...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Black Haired Beauty:
Ah, what a scary face. Why are you angry?

Thug A:
Hey hey hey! Just how long do you plan to play with our hearts before you're
  satisfied!?
We'll make you cry and beg for forgiveness!


-----------------After Battle----------------                        [Map26.04]
RETURN

Medoute:
Is everyone present? Let's get away from this gathering of idiots. 

|    |
|    |             ESCAPED DANGER SOMEHOW
| /\ | Successfully took refuge at the army housing!!
|/  \|

Thug A:
H- hey, isn't this Gram Blaze's base......?
Were those girls members of Gram Blaze!?
No wonder they were so strong, mommy!

|-------------------------|
|         RUN AWAY        |
|-Only I Should be Saved!-|
|-------------------------|

  -----------------------------------------------------
Medoute:
Sheesh, we got tangled up with some annoying guys.

Shiskia:
Yeah! We finally got to go shopping and have some fun, only to have it ruined
  at the last moment...

Medoute:
...By the way, where are our guys?

Aegina:
I wonder......

Luciana:
They left somewhere while we were getting ready to go shopping.

Amy:
I bet they ran away. They must have thought we were gonna make them carry our
  bags.

Medoute:
Well, we can't do much about them. We finally got a break. I want to have a
  chance to enjoy our shopping.

Amy:
Huh, but Miss Medoute brought it up...


-----------------After Battle----------------                        [Map26.04]
Remain

Thug E:
Enough... I just can't understand what girls are thinking! I give up!

|    |
|    |                   CHASTISED
| /\ | Succeeded in rescuing the black haired girl!!
|/  \| 

Thug E:
Really, manly camaraderie is better than a woman's love!

Thug A:
...You're on to something there! Hey, how 'bout we go drinking!?

Thug E:
Eh, yeah, let's go!! And with the spirit of drunkenness we can graffiti the
  rocks!!

|---------------------|
|      WITHDRAWAL     |
|-Escaped from Peril!-|
|---------------------|

Medoute:
Finally they left. Geez, what tough guys.

  -----------------------------------------------------
Black Haired Beauty:
Kind ladies, I wish to thank you for saving me.

Medoute:
It's okay, we were the ones who made them mad in the first place anyways.
Sorry for getting you involved in this.

Black Haired Beauty:
I am called Eater. I am a minstrel.

Shiskia:
I'm Shiskia. All of us here are member of Gram Blaze.

Eater:
Wow...! Those rumors are of you ladies? Such heroic fighting style... I see, I
  see.

Amy:
You're really strong too, Miss! So cool, beating up the enemies with your
  singing!

Eater:
...I have seen only ladies so far. Are there no gentlemen in your group?

Aegina:
We're off duty today, so they aren't here.

Eater:
Ah, ah, ah... These off duty gentlemen, are they strong and lovely and
  handsome?

Shiskia:
Well, I don't know about lovely, but everyone here is strong.

Eater:
...... Ah, sorry. I would like to meet them once. Could you introduce them to
  me, by any chance?

Shikia:
Eh!? Why?

Eater:
I am a minstrel. I am journeying to search for material for my songs.
Every night I...... Ah, sorry. What I meant was that I am quite certain I would
  like to write a song about Gram Blaze.

Medoute:
The sun is setting. Instead of standing around talking, why don't we continue
  inside?

Eater:
Yeah, that's sensible. Well, don't keep me waiting.  Aagh, what an irritating
  outfit...
Of yeah, you have anything to eat, huh? I'm starved. Aren't you? Huh?

Shiskia:
Who're you?

Eater:
What're you saying, stupid. I just told you, I'm Eater.

Luciana:
Could she maybe have a split personality?

Eater:
Ah, my bad, my bad. I totally forgot. I turn into a guy at nighttime. Nice. To.
  Meet'cha.

Shiskia:
Huh?

Eater:
A guy! When it's night, I turn into a man. Okay? You get it? Aagh, this
  clothing sucks, suuucks...

Medoute:
We've gotten yet another freak......


------------------Locations------------------                        [Map26.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
Trade road connecting Tiera and the capital. Directly next to it is the army 
housing


---------------------Loss--------------------                        [Map26.08]
Defeat - Taken (All)

|---------------------|
|       CAPTURE       |
|-Where is the Crime?-|
|---------------------|

--SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| Kyaah! What are you doing!! Don't get near me, stupid! Pervert! Pervert!!
| Stop it! No way! Aah, let go I said!! No! Noooooooo~~!
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| Agh, I'm so mad! To think that these kind of cockroaches can do this to me
|   pisses me off!! To me!!
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| W- what are you doing! Wait, you can't......
| S- s- stop! ...S- someone, heeeeelp!!
|
|---EATER
| Black Haired Beauty:
| Aah, I did not think I could be hurt like this.
| ...W- what is it you are doing! You are filthy, let go of me!
-----

|    |
|    |                  IMPEDIMENT FAILED
| /\ | A young girl is in the dirty hands of the thugs!!
|/  \| 

The girl that was taken returned after three days. There was no life in her 
eyes, and her formerly cheerful disposition was completely gone ...

Defeat - Out of Cards (All)----------------------------

Medoute:
No! We're out of tactics cards...
We can't survive on the war front like this. Did I make an error......?

|    |
|    |    OUT OF CARDS
| /\ | Strategy failed...!
|/  \| 

Several girls were captured by the thugs... Medoute was haunted by her tactical 
error, and disappeared from the private army forever...


========================================================================[Map27]
戦士達の休息-Boy's Side-
Soldiers' Vacation -Boys' Side-
Outskirts of the Capital - Arc of Triumph


--------------------Intro--------------------                        [Map27.01]
Count Velleman, together with the Archduke, left to visit a foreign country, 
and for that period Gram Blaze had been furloughed.

The boys, wary at the girls' enthusiasm to go shopping, signed up to 
participate in a tournament held at the outskirts of the capital which would 
also give some actual combat experience to the new recruits.

Can Garlot and company make it to the end and win the tournament?


----------------Before Battle----------------                        [Map27.02]
Jenon:
Honestly, I would have preferred to stay behind. I wanted to go shopping with
  the girls.

Garlot:
Don't say that. You'd have just ended up carrying their bags.
And besides, doesn't this look interesting? It's a good chance for us to show
  what we're made of.

Nessiah:
The captain is correct. If we can make it to the end, Gram Blaze's reputation
  will rise all the more.
Not to mention that this is Emperor Soltier's home territory, the capital
  Flarewerk.
The reputation granted to the victor will be all the greater.

Jenon:
I wanted us to strengthen our friendship with everyone.

Garlot:
Rather, you wanted to strengthen your friendship with the girls, right?

Jenon:
Oh, come now......

Soltier:
Hm. The high prize money drew in a substantial amount of people.

Lapis:
Your highness... What was your goal in setting up this competition?

Soltier:
I want to see what kind of power these privately operating bastards have.
And if they can be recruited or are strong enough to need watching should they
  turn their swords on the empire...

Lapis:
...And if some are talented?

Soltier:
I will consider enlisting them. But that's only if there are useful ones.

Lapis:
I see......

Soltier:
...Hm? That red haired one, I've seen him somewhere before.

Lapis:
He is one of Count Velleman's private army.
I believe they are called Gram Blaze...

Soltier:
Gram Blaze. Raging flame......

Lapis:
It is almost time for the competition to commence.

Imperial Soldier:
This competition will be a held in the form of a tournament. The goal is to
  last until the end.
Don't over think it. You merely lead a unit and defeat your opponents one by
  one.
Only the leader needs to be defeated. Targeting only the leader is a valid
  tactic.
Now let's start the contest. In the first match, Garlot's unit!! Step forward!

Garlot:
Huh, we're up all of the sudden...

Imperial Soldier:
Against them, Inzaghi's mercenary unit!

|-----------------|
|      SORTIE     |
|-Follow my Lead!-|
|-----------------|

Inzaghi:
Gah, it's these guys...

Garlot:
If it isn't Inzaghi. Did you enter this tournament to win some pocket change?

Inzaghi:
Didn't you do the same? I bet your wages are pathetic!

Garlot:
This is the perfect opponent for a warm up. Let's go!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Defeat the opponent before you and advance!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
               Garlot dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Inzaghi:
You guys really have some time on your hands. Coming out here for the
  tournament.
Sorry to spoil your plans, but I'm going to be the victor! I'll teach you that
  firsthand!!


------------------Mid Battle-----------------                        [Map27.03]
|------------------|
|      RETREAT     |
|-Time to Regroup.-|
|------------------|

Inzaghi:
Dhaaaaaa! Dammit, I lost again!!

|    |
|    |            DRIVEN BACK THE ENEMY
| /\ | Defeated Inzaghi! Got through the first round!!
|/  \|

Imperial Soldier:
The victors are Garlot's unit!

Garlot:
That was easy. Isn't there anyone stronger!?

Imperial Soldier:
Hold on, don't leave! According to the competition's overcrowded schedule, you
  are up next!

Garlot:
What!? Isn't this a tournament?

Imperial Soldier:
Your opponent is Cid! Your next opponent will be... Th- the imperial guard
  leader, lady Lapis!?

Garlot:
What!?

Lapis:
Eeh!?

Soltier:
I entered you.
I've not seen your strength in quite a while. Go on, Lapis.

Lapis:
Y- yes. As you wish......

Soltier:
...Now, what have you got, Red?

|-----------------|
|      SORTIE     |
|-Follow my Lead!-|
|-----------------|

Garlot:
We've met her once before...... Is she really gonna come?

  /--Victory--------------
 / Defeat this difficult opponent and advance!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
               Garlot dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Lapis:
Why am I fighting in this tournament...... My sword exists only to protect his
  highness.

  -----------------------------------------------------
Lapis:
I lost......
I will acknowledge that there was bitterness between us. But, Gram Blaze......
  You have gotten stronger than before.

Soltier:
Lapis, enough. Return to me.

Lapis:
Yes...... My humblest apologies.

|--------------------|
|     WITHDRAWAL     |
|-Forced to Retreat.-|
|--------------------|

|    |
|    |              DRIVEN BACK THE ENEMY
| /\ | Defeated Lapis! Got through the second round!!
|/  \| 

Imperial Soldier:
The victors are Garlot's unit!

Garlot:
As expected of the imperial guard leader...... That was close.

Imperial Soldier:
Alright, only one match left! Garlot's unit, come forward!

Garlot:
What, we're fighting three times in a row!? Is that allowed?

Imperial Soldier:
You fought for so long that all the other matches have already ended!

--DON'T HAVE EUDY
| Imperial Soldier:
| Then, the final match will now begin. The next opponent will be... hm?
| ...G- g- general Baldus!?
|
| Garlot:
| General!? This competition is something else......
|
| |-----------------|
| |      SORTIE     |
| |-Follow my Lead!-|
| |-----------------|
|
| Baldus:
| Do they expect real soldiers like us to fight with all our strength in a
|   silly little contest......?
|
|   /--Victory--------------
|  / Repel the last opponent and claim victory!!
| /----------------
|
|   ----------------------Defeat--/
|                Garlot dies...  /
|     Use up all your cards...  /
|         ---------------------/
|
| Garlot:
| We've made it this far... We've gotta make it to the end now.
-----

--HAVE EUDY--------------------------------------------
| Imperial Soldier:
| The final opponent will be Zilva's free fighting group!
|
| Garlot:
| Zilva? You mean that Zilva!?
|
| |-----------------|
| |      SORTIE     |
| |-Follow my Lead!-|
| |-----------------|
|
| Zilva:
| Red... What a coincidence meeting you here.
|
| Garlot:
| You too. Why are you...
|
| Zilva:
| The way I am now, I cannot find meaning or value in life aside from battle.
|   And because of that...
| Am I wrong to do this?
|
| Garlot:
| No, I'm glad you're alive.
|
| Zilva:
| ...............
| Red, let's have a good battle...
|
|   /--Victory--------------
|  / Repel the last opponent and claim victory!!
| /----------------
|
|   ----------------------Defeat--/
|                Garlot dies...  /
|     Use up all your cards...  /
|         ---------------------/
|
| Garlot:
| Come on, Zilva!
-----

-----------------After Battle----------------                        [Map27.04]
BALDUS

Baldus:
......I was defeated.
Excellent training. I commend you, young man.

|    |
|    |       DRIVEN BACK THE ENEMY
| /\ | Magnificent victory in the finals!!
|/  \| 

Garlot:
He went easy on us. I kinda feel cheated......

Imperial Soldier:
G- general Baldus was beaten......
T- the champions are Garlot's unit!!

  -----------------------------------------------------
Jenon:
I can't believe we ended up winning...

Garlot:
What are you talking about? Isn't that the entire reason we came here?

Nessiah:
It is much better than losing. Quite well done, captain.
Now Gram Blaze's fame is likely to increase more and more.

Jenon:
Yeah, about that......
When you entered us did you write us in as 'Garlot's unit?'
They didn't call us Gram Blaze once during the whole competition.

Garlot:
Ah......

Jenon:
That's it. This plan's a failure then?

Nessiah:
Well then, only the captain's fame will grow from this. Fufufu...

Garlot:
Damn it... What should we do...?

Jenon:
There's nothing we can do about this anymore.


-----------------After Battle----------------                        [Map27.04]
ZILVA

Zilva:
Though this is a mock battle, in the fight with you I recalled something about
  reluctance.
I've not had any feelings before. I feel that this will in turn grow within me.
...Would this mean that something inside me has changed...

|    |
|    |       DRIVEN BACK THE ENEMY
| /\ | Magnificent victory in the finals!!
|/  \| 

Imperial Soldier:
The victors are Garlot's unit!

Garlot:
You okay? Need a hand, Zilva?

Zilva:
......Thank you.

  -----------------------------------------------------
Zilva:
......Red, can I have a moment?

Garlot:
Sure, I don't mind. Did you come to make excuses for your loss?

Zilva:
No, I didn't.
While fighting with you again I realized there are things that I don't
  understand.
And that's companions. I don't understand why these companions fight alongside
  you.
When I fought for the Divine Order they existed for nothing more than to share
  goals and enemies.
But it looks like it's different for you. What are companions to you?

Jenon:
The definition of a companion, huh. That is a difficult subject matter.

Garlot:
Sorry, I've no idea.

Zilva:
Huh?

Garlot:
Each time you puzzle over it you get a different answer, don't you think?
It's not something you know, it's something you feel.

Zilva:
...Do you think I too can be one of your companions?

Garlot:
That's......

Zilva:
I know it's selfish. I've tried to kill you many times.
I realize it's a difficult request.
But I feel that if I am with you I will be able to find my purpose in life.

Garlot:
It's not hard at all. Sure, let's be friends.

Zilva:
...............

Jenon:
That's right. I doubt there'll be any problems. I don't think that Aegina or
  Luciana hate you personally.

Zilva:
......You have my gratitude, Red.
Or rather, if we are companions that's not a good way of addressing you.

Garlot:
You can call me whatever you want.

Jenon:
Yeah, how about 'big bro'?

Zilva:
B- big bro?

Garlot:
Cut that out! Zilva might take you seriously!!

Zilva:
Big bro...

Jenon:
Doesn't that sound nice, big bro!

Garlot:
Enough, cut it out!!

Zilva:
...Is this what it's like to have companions...... It feels so warm.


------------------Locations------------------                        [Map27.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
The main gate to the capital of Flarewerk. Military drills often take place 
here.


---------------------Loss--------------------                        [Map27.08]
Defeat - Out of Cards (1st)

While participating in a competition, Garlot's group was scattered due to a 
tactical error, and were eliminated in the first round...

Defeat - Garlot Defeated (2nd)-------------------------

While participating in a competition, Garlot lost his life in an unfortunate 
accident in the second round...

Defeat - Out of Cards (3rd)----------------------------

While participating in a competition, Garlot's group was scattered due to a 
tactical error, and were eliminated in the final round...


========================================================================[Map28]
火の粉は集い、大火へと
Sparks Gather into a Roaring Fire
Western Region - Kernuga Farming Community


--------------------Intro--------------------                        [Map28.01]
As the empire's control was slowly waning in the western part of the empire, 
the rebels' influence spread tremendously.

The core group of that rebel army did not hesitate to rob and torment the 
citizenry of the empire and beyond.

Nessiah, having thought of that, decided with Count Velleman to confront them, 
urging that suppressing the rebel influence will be a quick way to fame.

Gram Blaze sent soldiers to the rebel controlled agricultural city of Kernuga, 
only to find a familiar face among the rebels facing against them......


----------------Before Battle----------------                        [Map28.02]
Medoute:
They built a fortress in front of the bridge. It looks sturdy despite being
  built so quickly.

Jenon:
Looks like the advance guard is deployed in the fortress.

Garlot:
It's so that we can't get into Kernuga. They must have all the strategic points
  covered......

Shiskia:
According to my scout's report they've been exploiting the citizenry for
  supplies......

Jenon:
So what are they trying to protect from what?

Nessiah:
...That's enough talking about that for now. They can have any idealism they
  wish.
What is important is to destroy the fortress and liberate the city... In other
  words, this is a matter of methodology.

Shiskia:
Hmm, okay, let's hear your methodology then.

Nessiah:
...Up until a few months ago the rebel army's movements were merely sporadic.

--PLAYED BF 16
| Garlot:
| That's true...... We've fought then once before, but they didn't leave a big
|   impression.
|
| Medoute:
| Their leader Pandra was always ready to run away, so that's understandable.
-----

Nessiah:
Coming here, they have shown a shift in organization.
Particularly, they have shown an astonishing increase in the training of their
  troops.
I believe they have recruited a talented person... That is, an ace.

Medoute:
I see. If we destroy this ace, there won't be any reason to fear them.

Garlot:
So then, does anyone have any idea who this ace is?

Nessiah:
Not yet.
However, guessing from the current situation, I believe he may have been a
  former military man or an expert mercenary.

Shiskia:
What, can't you foresee who or what kind of guy this ace is?

Nessiah:
Unfortunately, I cannot foresee everything.
Moreover, as I said before even in a prediction something can fall out of
  place.
Let us get back to the matter at hand. What I was speaking of was the general
  framework on our objective... the strategy.
If we set a strategy, the tactics within the battle will also go our way.
We will also be able to pay close attention to the ace.

Medoute:
......I see.

Jenon:
Finding out who the rebel army's ace is and where he came from...
It's the duty of Shiskia's squad to patrol and scout for that information.

Shiskia:
...That is true.

Garlot:
Shiskia is our eyes and ears. She always spots danger ahead of anyone else.

Shiskia:
Okay, leave it to me.

   /--Victory--------------
  / Gain control of the Kernuga fortress!!
 / (Move a unit to the fortress!)
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
    Garlot  or Shiskia dies... /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Garlot:
First up we get past the fortress and enter Kernuga!


------------------Mid Battle-----------------                        [Map28.03]
---FORTRESS TAKEN - GARLOT
| Garlot:
| This fortress is ours!
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| I guess I'm first here!
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| We've taken the fortress! Let's advance to this position!
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| The fortress is captured! Please report to Garlot.
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| The fortress is secured! But this is only the start of the real fight...
|
|---NESSIAH
| Nessiah:
| If we take this bridgehead, we can invade Kernuga...
|
|---ZILVA
| Zilva:
| Objective complete. Waiting for the remaining troops...
|
|---EUDY
| Eudy:
| Hah, this fortress is already ours.
-----

|    |
|    |            SECURED A FOOTHOLD
| /\ | Secured a position in liberating Kernuga!!
|/  \|

Garlot:
That was too easy... Shiskia, any signs of an ambush?

Shiskia:
We're fine over here. I sent out scouts and they're checking out the inside of
  the city... 

Spy:
L- Lady Shiskia! An enemy knight squad is stationed in the center of the city!
  And their commander is......

Leon:
Ha, it's sure been a while. Don't tell me you forgot me!

Garlot:
That's... Leon!?

Leon:
That shaming defeat that surpasses even the scar on my forehead...... I will
  clear it away right now!!
All units take up your spears!! This is a death match! Are you ready!?

Shiskia:
Why is that guy in the rebel army?

Lazy, Leaderlike Man:
What's this? You guys know each other?

--PLAYED BF 16
| Garlot:
| You're Pandra! The rebel army leader is here too?
-----

Lazy, Leaderlike Man:
Haha, you're the guys he spoke of. Crush them with all your strength.

Leon:
Shut it, Pandra! Stop ordering us around self importantly like you're above us!

Pandra:
Tch. Such a hot blooded bastard. I'm lending you soldiers, you gotta be more
  respectful to me......

Leon:
Keep babbling! Just watch... I'll beat these brats up!!

Garlot:
Leon, huh. We've got a troubling opponent......
Hm? Oh yeah, the ace Nessiah was talking about, would it be him, Leon?

   /--Victory--------------
  / Gain control of all three towns!!
 / (Control all three towns of Barudar, Lila, and Kernuga!)
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
    Garlot  or Shiskia dies... /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Leon:
Come on! I'll show you that the victory you stole from me last time was nothing
  but a fluke!

Nessiah:
Our utmost priority should be to liberate the three towns.
Remember, we do have the choice to avoid a head on collision with Leon.

  -----------------------------------------------------
--CONTROL THE FIRST TOWN
|
|-----------------|
|     CONTROL     |
|-Seized Control!-|
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| Okay, we've seized this town! Let's hurry and take the other two!
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| Phew, we managed somehow. Two more left...
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| First one down. Two left, let's press ahead.
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| This town is secure. Two left... Let's buckle down and go!
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| We've gained control somehow... Two towns left.
|
|---NESSIAH
| Nessiah:
| We have gained control here. Two more left. Fufufu...
|
|---ZILVA
| Zilva:
| This point has fallen. Two left, use all your strength to take them down.
|
|---EUDY
| Eudy:
| We've taken this town. But there's two more... How about we just leave them
|   to the other guys?
-----

  -----------------------------------------------------
--CONTROL THE SECOND TOWN
|
|-----------------|
|     CONTROL     |
|-Seized Control!-|
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| One more left! Let's take it in one shot!
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| One left... Let's take advantage of our victory and take it!
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| Second one down! We'll put all our effort into felling the last one!
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| We have gained control! One left... Don't let your guard down and attack!
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| This town is occupied. Let's hurry to gain control of the one remaining.
|
|---NESSIAH
| Nessiah:
| We are in control of the second town. Only one left now.
|
|---ZILVA
| Zilva:
| This point has fallen. One left. Let's go...
|
|---EUDY
| Eudy:
| We've gained control of the second town. They've only one left, can't they
|  just give it up already.
-----

  -----------------------------------------------------
LEON RETREAT

Leon:
Damn it! Isn't there anything I can do besides retreat......
Remember this, Red! It won't be long before I skewer you with this spear!

|--------------------|
|     WITHDRAWAL     |
|-Forced to Retreat.-|
|--------------------|

  -----------------------------------------------------
PANDRA RETREAT

Pandra:
Guaaah! They got me... damn it! You really think I can I die in a place like
  this!?
My life's important to the rebel army. I'm heading back to the base!

|--------------------|
|     WITHDRAWAL     |
|-Forced to Retreat.-|
|--------------------|


-----------------After Battle----------------                        [Map28.04]
--CONTROL THE FINAL TOWN
|
|-----------------|
|     CONTROL     |
|-Seized Control!-|
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| This is the last one! Everyone rejoice!!
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| The final town has fallen! Report to the main troop.
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| The last town has finally fallen! Now the rebel army should withdraw from
|   Kernuga.
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| And with this we're done!
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| We've gained control of the final town, but there may still be some
|   resistance left. ...Don't let your guard down!
|
|---NESSIAH
| Nessiah:
| This is the final town. Captain, please announce the liberation of Kernuga.
|
|---ZILVA
| Zilva:
| The final target has fallen. Contact the main troop, we await orders...
|
|---EUDY
| Eudy:
| This place has finally fallen. I hate stubbornness like this, sheesh.
-----

AFTERWARDS

Garlot:
The fight is over! In the name of Gram Blaze, Kernuga is free!

|    |
|    |          FREED A TOWN RULED OVER
| /\ | Liberated the Kernuga farming community!!
|/  \|

--LEON REMAINING
|
|--------------------|
|     WITHDRAWAL     |
|-Forced to Retreat.-|
|--------------------|
|
| Leon:
| That bastard, Pandra! Running away alone in the midst of battle, what a
|   coward...
-----

  -----------------------------------------------------
Shiskia:
The rebel army fled to the north. Their destination is probably the mountain
  town Sharminel.

Garlot:
And it looks like Leon's become one of their members.

Medoute:
Pandra used Leon and his desire for revenge.

Shiskia:
But those two look like they're on bad terms with each other. How long can they
  really stick together?

Nessiah:
That is a good point of focus.

Shiskia:
Huh?

Nessiah:
If relations between the two of them deteriorate, the rebel army will
  inevitably weaken.

Jenon:
But that's difficult while he's hung up on us.

Nessiah:
Let's return to the topic of strategy.
On the precipitous mountain road there is snow and a fort... That is why
  Sharminel is called a natural stronghold.

Medoute:
I've been there once before. It really is a difficult location to assault.

Garlot:
What's worse, Leon will be there... It won't be easy to capture.

Nessiah:
......That is true.

--HAVE EUDY
| Nessiah:
| ...Lady Eudy, may I have a moment?
|
| Eudy:
| What is it?
|
| Nessiah:
| For this fight...... surely... like so......
|
| Eudy:
| Uh huh...... I see. The terrain is... Mm hm.
| ...............
| Okay! Hey, you're not bad. I can, really? Kyahahaha!
|
| Shiskia:
| Eh? What, what?
|
| Eudy:
| Captain, sorry but I'm heading back to Tiera for a bit.
|
| Garlot:
| What's this about!?
|
| Nessiah:
| I will explain this later. I have asked Lady Eudy to do something that only
|   she can.
| This should resolve the issue of assaulting Sharminel.
|
