| Eudy:
| Kyahahaha, see you later then!
-----

--DON'T HAVE EUDY
| Garlot:
| However, we can't just leave them to take care of themselves. Let's set out
|   for Sharminel at once.
|
| Shiskia:
| Yeah, once you make up your mind, you can only get moving!
|
| Nessiah:
| But we do not have a plan......
|
| Garlot:
| You worry too much, Nessiah. Even if Leon is there, we'll manage somehow.
|
| Nessiah:
| ...............
-----


---------------------Vs.---------------------                        [Map28.05]
--Garlot vs. Leon
| Leon:
| I knew it. I knew that if I joined the rebels I could fight you again! Red!!
|
| Garlot:
| Leon...... This guy's tough...
|
|---VICTORY
| Garlot:
| How was that!
|
| Leon:
| Tch, you've gotten better, Red! But I expected you to!!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Leon:
| I'll have your head!
|
| Garlot:
| I'm not that easy to take down! This is just the beginning!!
-----

--Shiskia vs. Leon-------------------------------------
| Shiskia:
| Why are you with the rebel army?
|
| Leon:
| I'm here to destroy Red for wounding my pride!
|
| Shiskia:
| Eh? That's all?
|
| Leon:
| A woman wouldn't understand!
|
|---VICTORY
| Shiskia:
| What daunting physical force... I barely managed to make it.
|
| Leon:
| Why you! Next time it won't end like this!!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Leon:
| Hmph, you just stay there quietly and watch as I skewer Red!
|
| Shiskia:
| I won't let you!
-----

--Jenon vs. Leon---------------------------------------
| Jenon:
| That's surprising, you joined the rebel army?
|
| Leon:
| Who the hell are you?
|
| Jenon:
| I'm Gram Blaze's strategist, Jenon!!
|
| Leon:
| ......Feh.
|
|---VICTORY
| Jenon:
| Phew... Somehow I stopped his momentum.
|
| Leon:
| This won't happen again! Get ready!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Jenon:
| Gkh! ...He's really strong!
|
| Leon:
| Cling to your planning and face death!
-----

--Medoute vs. Leon-------------------------------------
| Medoute:
| Hey you, is your sister okay with this?
|
| Leon:
| That's none of your business!
|
|---VICTORY
| Medoute:
| You cause her to worry about you when you fight so much. You need to act more
|   responsibly.
|
| Leon:
| Tch!! Preaching as always!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Leon:
| Kuku, that was disappointing!
|
| Medoute:
| ...His charge really is a menace, but a return strike penetrates easily...
|   Aim for that. Got it?
-----

--Aegina vs. Leon--------------------------------------
| Aegina:
| I feel a tremendous fighting spirit, not like anything I've felt before......
|
| Leon:
| I've got an objective now! I will kill Red!!
|
|---VICTORY
| Aegina:
| I will not be beaten so easily!
|
| Leon:
| Little girl, look around you!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Leon:
| It seems you've improved, but it may as well be nothing before the knight
|   battalion I've tempered!
|
| Aegina:
| Still a fool... We too are different from before!
-----

--Nessiah vs. Leon-------------------------------------
| Nessiah:
| You would be the Black Knight Leon. I have heard of you from the Count.
|   Fufufu...
|
| Leon:
| What a creepy bastard...... My lance will send you to hell!
|
|---VICTORY
| Nessiah:
| Very good. But it would be appropriate to call that strength of yours
|   foolhardy!
|
| Leon:
| Why you... Next time it won't end like this!!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Leon:
| Take that! Look away and it won't end in mere wounds!!
|
| Nessiah:
| Your valor is terrific! My my, the progress of humans amazes me...
-----

--Zilva vs. Leon---------------------------------------
| Zilva:
| They say that you are the rebel army's ace.
| In that case, if I defeat you, victory will be ours.
| Let's go......
|
| Leon:
| ......Hm. You seem a little different from Red's flunkies.
| Come on! Woman!!
|
|---VICTORY
| Leon:
| ...!!  What precise aim. If there wasn't anyone to take that hit for me, I
|   wouldn't have been able to get close.
|
| Zilva:
| Maintain a constant speed of fire. Keep up the volley while they have troops
|   and finish them off.
|
|---DEFEAT
| Zilva:
| An error. Retreat for a moment and regroup.
|
| Leon:
| ...Her retreat has no flaws. I'm hesitant to go after them.
-----

--Eudy vs. Leon----------------------------------------
| Eudy:
| What's this? A hot tempered brainless man...
|
| Leon:
| Woman... You're better off not making me mad. Do you want to die while you've
|   got your looks!
|
| Eudy:
| Hah, looks like you need to be taken down a notch...
|
|---VICTORY
| Eudy:
| That's some power! Aah, if only I had my cannon. Shell explosions would be
|   wonderful!
|
| Leon:
| That's not a thing to be talking so merrily about! Crazy woman!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Leon:
| How's that, magician! Is that all the strength you've got?
|
| Eudy:
| ...I really want to shoot my cannon at him. I'm so mad.
-----


------------------Locations------------------                        [Map28.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
One of the western region's major cities. Ships crops all over the country

   --ケルヌガ砦 - Kernuga Fortress
On a map, it is referred to as the region of Kernuga rather than a fortress

   --街外れの小村 - Small Village at the Outskirts
Small village dealing particularly in forestry, outside the Kernuga city sphere

   --バルーダー市 - Barudar
The secondary town of the agricultural city Kernuga. Transports the harvest out 
along the waterways

   --リラ市 - Lila
The tertiary town of the agricultural city Kernuga. It is the center of 
engineering research

   --ケルヌガ市 - Kernuga
The primary town of the agricultural city Kernuga. It is dotted with large-
scale granaries


--------------------On Map-------------------                        [Map28.07]
--高床の穀倉 - Raised Floor Granary
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|   Golden Wheat  |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| Uwah, is it all full of grain? There's so much...
| Hm? This is the only head that's sparkling...
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| This storehouse is full of grain... Wow, that's what you'd expect in a place
|   called an agricultural town.
| Ah? There was a flash of light just now. Is there something special?
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| The grain here is packed tightly. If that was all, it's unlikely that the
|   rebel army would have trouble with provisions.
| Oh? A head of wheat shone just now...
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| ...This is a great amount. Does this granary feed everyone around here?
| ...One of the heads is shining. Is it something rare?
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| ...The granaries lined up here, are they all full from the harvest?
| Ah? A head of wheat shone just now. Was it this one...?
|
|---NESSIAH
| Nessiah:
| Is this a granary? There is more stored here than I expected...
| Whoops, this sure is a treasure. We should take good care of it. Fufufu...
|
|---ZILVA
| Zilva:
| This is a grain storehouse.
| ...This is rare... It won't hurt to retrieve it.
|
|---EUDY
| Eudy:
| Wow, all this is from the harvest. It's not called an agricultural community
|   for nothing.
| ...As expected of an agricultural community, they even have golden wheat.
-----

--道具小屋 - Tool Shed-------------------------------------
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|  Mowing Scythe  |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| This building looks to be storage for farm tools.
| ...Isn't this a weapon? It does look like it could be used in a fight as
|   is...
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| Is there something in here?
| ...Hm~ the form of this farm tool is pretty brutal.
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| ...This is storage for farm tools, huh. They do say that soldiers and farmers
|   are of one body; can any of this be used in battle?
| ...Is this a scythe for cutting weeds?
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| Looks like a farm tool storehouse. Is there anything inside?
| This looks like a grass cutting sickle. I believe it's treated a little
|   differently than my axe...
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| Is this a place for storing farm tools? Is there anything here?
| A mowing scythe? Does somebody use it?
|
|---NESSIAH
| Nessiah:
| Oh my, is this a farm tool storehouse? Shall we take a quick look?
| This is an excellent classical tool. Shall we take it with us...?
|
|---ZILVA
| Zilva:
| Storehouse located. We will try to set up an ambush from here.
| I see a sharp edged weapon on the narrow end. ...Confiscating.
|
|---EUDY
| Eudy:
| Isn't there anything useful in here?
| A scythe, huh. A bit savage in my opinion.
-----

--街外れの小村 - Small Village at the Outskirts - FIRST TIME - HIGH %
|
|--------------------|
|     ACQUISITION    |
|-Received Treasure!-|
|   World Tree Leaf  |
|--------------------|
|
| Young Woman:
| In the forest to the north of Kernuga is a spot where the trees open up, like
|   a wide open plaza.
| And in the center is a single gigantic tree... It's my favorite place to be.
| When I gaze at that tree mysteriously I feel at peace.
| This is a leaf of that tree. I offer it to you.
| ...Please defeat the rebel army.
| Those people, in order to make weapons, will cut down the forest tree by
|   tree.
| At this rate, they will chop the forest down all the way to that tree.
|   Please, do something...
|
|---FIRST TIME - LOW %
|
|---AFTERWARDS
| Young Woman:
| ...Please defeat the rebel army.
| Those people, in order to make weapons, will cut down the forest tree by
|   tree.
| At this rate, they will chop the forest down all the way to that tree.
|   Please, do something...
-----


---------------------Loss--------------------                        [Map28.08]
Defeat - Out of Cards (1st)

Clashing in the rebel occupied Kernuga, Gram Blaze was scattered due to a flaw 
in tactics, and forced to disband...

Defeat - Shiskia Defeated (2nd)------------------------

Before the power of the rebel army, which included the Black Knight Leon, 
Shiskia lost her life. The private army, having lost their eyes and ears, 
became lackluster and collapsed...


========================================================================[Map29]
戦火に立つ修羅
Carnage Amid the Flames
Western Region - Mountain Town Sharminel


--------------------Intro--------------------                        [Map29.01]
Gram Blaze, having succeeded in liberating Kernuga, chased after the retreating 
rebel army and advanced to the mountain town Sharminel, located in the Jiccard 
mountain range.

With precipitous mountain roads and hard to traverse snowdrifts, Sharminel was 
a naturally fortified city.

Gram Blaze trekked to the mountain region where the rebel army lay in wait. 
Waiting for them there was a violent battle the likes of which they had not yet 
seen......


----------------Before Battle----------------                        [Map29.02]
Shiskia:
There it is! That's Sharminel.

Jenon:
The town areas are within the frontline fortifications ... And I see enemy
  troops on the mountain road.

Garlot:
This place does look hard to assault. The city certainly is fortress-like.

Medoute:
The real problem lies with Leon rather than Pandra.
I doubt he's the type to take up position inside the fortress and wait. He's
  sure to come pick a fight.

Pandra:
What's wrong, nobleman's dogs!? Did you get scared of us? If you're gonna run,
  now's your chance!!

Garlot:
...If you're going to talk like that, why don't you come out here!

Pandra:
I'm the leader of the rebel army! I've a duty and a mission to protect this
  city! My life is the rebel army!
Now come on! This time it'll be your bloodbath!

--HAVE EUDY
| Garlot:
| By the way, Nessiah, I didn't see Eudy... When is she coming back?
|
| Nessiah:
| Worry not, she will return shortly. When she does the enemy's line of defense
|   will crumble away.
-----

   /--Victory--------------
  / Gain control of the Sharminel fortress!!
 / (Move a unit onto the fortress!)
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
               Garlot dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Garlot:
I don't see Leon anywhere. Where is that guy!?


------------------Mid Battle-----------------                        [Map29.03]
Garlot:
Advance in one go!

Pandra:
Damn, as always force is the one thing these guys have going for them!
And that bastard is late. What the hell is he doing!

Leon:
There, now! Charge!

|---------------------|
|        AMBUSH       |
|-Unexpected Enemies!-|
|---------------------|

Garlot:
You're here, Leon! All units prepare to attack Leon!!

Pandra:
Hey, finally showed up, huh... Were you thinking of running away, Leon!

Leon:
Kukuku, so a panicking commander knows how to beg well enough.

Pandra:
...Shut up in front of the soldiers. Listen up, you'd better clear your status
  as a sore loser right now!

Leon:
Look who's talking! Get ready, Red!

  -----------------------------------------------------
Garlot:
This pressure is intense! If we don't turn the tables somehow......

Leon:
Weaklings! Curse your own stupidity for coming here with no plan!

--HAVE EUDY
| Eudy:
| Then, what about if I come in with a round of heavy fire? 
|
| Leon:
| What!?
|
| |-------------------|
| |  REINFORCEMENTS   |
| |-Help has Arrived.-|
| |-------------------|
|
| Garlot:
| Eudy, here at last!
|
| Leon:
| Is that... a cannon?
|
| |-------------------|
| |      BARRAGE      |
| |-Fire in the Hole!-|
| |-------------------|
|
| Eudy:
| Yeees... I'll show you the power of my new and improved "Excellent Cannon"!
|   Kyahahaha!
|
| Leon:
| Guaaaagh!
|
| Pandra:
| You're kidding! How is it that strong!! Did a corner of the mountain just
|   crumble?
| ...Hey, measure its range! It can't reach this far, right!?
|
| Eudy:
| Don't make light of my long years of research. How about I smash a cannonball
|   right through your face?
|
| Garlot:
| No, don't, Eudy! The townspeople might get caught up!
|
| Eudy:
| It should be fine, really. Our captain gets stubborn in the strangest of
|   situations.
| Oh well, I guess I'll have to restrain myself to blowing up the fortress...
| Yeah, let's start off with a blast! Kyahahahahaha~
|
|  -----------------------------------------------------
| |-------------------|
| |      BARRAGE      |
| |-Fire in the Hole!-|
| |-------------------|
|
| Eudy:
| Aahn, nice, nice...... Okay, bang them up more!
| Go, fly apart!!
-----

  -----------------------------------------------------
--FORTRESS TAKEN - GARLOT
| Garlot:
| We've taken the fortress! From here we can make a straight assault on
|   Pandra's stronghold!
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| We've gained control. Don't let down your guard, now!
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| I've taken this point. Now, let's move on to the next stage!
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| The fortress is ours! We'll secure it and wait for the others!
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| The fortress has fallen!
|
|---NESSIAH
| Nessiah:
| We have gained control here. However, the true battle is only beginning...
|
|---ZILVA
| Zilva:
| Fortress under control. We will secure it and wait for the remaining troops.
|
|---EUDY
| Eudy:
| We've taken control! It's all thanks to my canon!
| Was this achievement big? I'll have to petition for a raise in my research
|   funds.
-----

|    |
|    |        SECURED A FOOTHOLD
| /\ | Secured a position in liberating Sharminel!!
|/  \|

Garlot:
The fortress has fallen! Now, the target is Pandra's head!

--LEON REMAINING
| Leon:
| Hold on, what about settling things with me!?
-----

  /--Victory--------------
 / Defeat the rebel army leader, Pandra!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
               Garlot dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Pandra:
Damn, why? Why won't things go according to plan!?
Hey, all you guys! Protect Sharminel from the empire's tyrant until the end!
Got it, gather your fighting spirit! Defend to the last!!

Rebel Soldier:
Uooohh!!

Pandra:
(Though, their momentum won't be stopped that easily... I should secure an
  escape route.)

  -----------------------------------------------------
LEON RETREAT

|--------------------|
|     WITHDRAWAL     |
|-Forced to Retreat.-|
|--------------------|

Leon:
My unit can't sustain itself anymore...!
Red! This match is yours! But only because I will kill you one day!!


-----------------After Battle----------------                        [Map29.04]
Pandra:
Guah...! We've taken damage!!

|    |
|    |        FREED A TOWN RULED OVER
| /\ | Mountain town Sharminel liberated!!
|/  \|

Garlot:
Surrender quietly. There's nowhere to run in these mountains!
Depending on what Velleman says, there may still be a way for you to live.
  Think it over!

Pandra:
You've got to be kidding...... There's no way I'd ever consent to being paraded
  around the empire!

Garlot:
Paraded around the empire? What are you talking about?

Pandra:
...In the past when I was enlisted, I rose to success in my strength alone.
But then a new Emperor was crowned. That was the previous Emperor, Soltier's
  younger brother.

Garlot:
Soltier's brother?

Pandra:
The late Emperor, announcing military disarmament, dissolved the army and
  ordered the soldiers to return to farming. I was fired.
But in Soltier's age, the military was moved to expand again...... More than
  anything, the heavy taxes are proof of it.
Recruited again, then farming again... I'm sick of the country's see-sawing
  policies!

Rebel Soldier:
Sir Pandra! The preparations for the retreat are ready!

Garlot:
Retreat? What? Huh, is that a ship? You're using the river to escape!?

Pandra:
Hahahahaha!! All because you were absorbed in a trivial conversation! You've
  got many openings!

Garlot:
Hold on, Pandra! That story...

Pandra:
It wasn't a lie. There's no merit to protecting this country... Nor to you for
  trying to do so!

Garlot:
You're wrong! It's not the country I want to protect.

Pandra:
I don't care about your opinions. I want to see it ruined. This country won't
  be changed for us.

|--------------------|
|     WITHDRAWAL     |
|-Forced to Retreat.-|
|--------------------|

Pandra:
Make no mistake I will be back. Until then!

--LEON REMAINING
| Leon:
| That bastard... He ran again! Tch, retreat!!
|
|--------------------|
|     WITHDRAWAL     |
|-Forced to Retreat.-|
|--------------------|
-----

  -----------------------------------------------------
Shiskia:
Aah, they're gone... That man's a master at running away.

Garlot:
Pandra... He's a victim too in a way......

Medoute:
I guess. But the truth is that under their umbrella of a just cause they go
  around pillaging.

Jenon:
Most likely Pandra too became corrupt at some point.
I'm sure that back when he started out he had aspirations much like our own.

Medoute:
It is possible. He is surprisingly popular.

Nessiah:
In any case, we have accomplished our goal of liberating Sharminel from the
  rebel army.
We should send a messenger to report to Count Velleman and stay until the order
  is restored.

Garlot:
Oh, yeah, right......

Nessiah:
Sigh......

Medoute:
Then, Shiskia, check on how the towns are doing. And Jenon, see to wounded.

Jenon:
Got it.

Garlot:
...............

Medoute:
What's wrong, Garlot?

Garlot:
I was just thinking. I wanted to speak with Pandra some more.

Medoute:
That man is too good at using truths and lies. If you take him seriously,
  you'll end up being deceived.
You understand from his conversations with Leon, right?

Garlot:
I suppose......

Medoute:
Garlot, you need to have more confidence in yourself.
Particularly, in front of other soldiers you can't act like this...... Everyone
  will worry.

Garlot:
Yeah, I know.

Medoute:
That's how you get when you're down. Even normally you're so frank.
(Although, that is something that everyone idolizes about you.)

Garlot:
But... no matter what I do, I can't control my feelings. Despite understanding
  that.

Medoute:
(But will you be able to change the world at this rate?)
Let's head back. We'll be chewed out by Shiskia if we don't get to work.

Garlot:
...That would be bad. Truly.


---------------------Vs.---------------------                        [Map29.05]
--Garlot vs. Pandra
| Garlot:
| Pandra!! The road ends here!
|
| Pandra:
| Tch, you sure advance fast!! Made it all the way over here already!?
|
|---VICTORY
| Garlot:
| Surrender! You have no chance of winning!!
|
| Pandra:
| Don't be ridiculous, this is far from over!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Garlot:
| I messed up......
|
| Pandra:
| You see that, this is how strong I am!
-----

--Shiskia vs. Pandra-----------------------------------
| Shiskia:
| This is the end of the rebel army!
|
| Pandra:
| Eeh, wait until you've beaten us to say that.
|
|---VICTORY
| Shiskia:
| Okay, I can do it at this rate!
|
| Pandra:
| Clever little lady as always.
|
|---DEFEAT
| Shiskia:
| Was I sloppy...!?
|
| Pandra:
| Alright, break through the enemy line! All of you, follow me!
-----

--Jenon vs. Pandra-------------------------------------
| Jenon:
| This is a nice place. It certainly is a natural stronghold......
| However, holing yourself up this far doesn't make any sense.
|
| Pandra:
| You mean that we're like rats in a trap? But wouldn't the cornered rat bite
|   the cat?
|
|---VICTORY
| Pandra:
| You fight that well!?
|
| Jenon:
| Do you get it at last?
|
|---DEFEAT
-----

--Medoute vs. Pandra-----------------------------------
| Medoute:
| Stirring up rebellion through made up lies... You are a despicable man.
|
| Pandra:
| Hmph, say whatever you want.
| If they aren't invested in something, people won't fight. Whether that's
|   duty, dreams, pleasures or family.
| I do no more that give them a push to notice their reason for fighting. 
|
| Medoute:
| ...Really. Your excuses have matured too, geez.
|
|---VICTORY
| Pandra:
| Damn it, she's strong!
|
| Medoute:
| We'll take you in one hit! The rebel army will be rooted out here!!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Medoute:
| I've been pushed back......?
|
| Pandra:
| Well, it looks like you've got some openings too.
-----

--Aegina vs. Pandra------------------------------------
| Aegina:
| Get ready! Pandra!!
|
| Pandra:
| Don't get so worked up. It spoils your beauty, don't you think?
|
| Aegina:
| Have you no restraint......
|
|---VICTORY
| Pandra:
| Hey, we're being pushed back! Where's all our fighting spirit!
|
| Aegina:
| I will take you down!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Aegina:
| They stopped my attack!?
|
| Pandra:
| We have the advantage here. Now calm down and let us crush you!
-----

--Nessiah vs. Pandra-----------------------------------
| Nessiah:
| This is a considerable amount of troops... It says that there intent to rebel
|   among the people of the empire.
|
| Pandra:
| You really get it? You could say that I am the mouthpiece of the people, eh?
|
| Nessiah:
| Fufufu, I suppose that's fine...
|
|---VICTORY
| Pandra:
| What the hell is this guy? He's got some freaky magic powers... Is he really
|   human...?
|
| Nessiah:
| Fufufu... You are still excellent having understood that.
|
|---DEFEAT
| Pandra:
| No resistance...... What is this?
|
| Nessih:
| Fufufufufu......
-----

--Zilva vs. Pandra-------------------------------------
| Zilva:
| Assemble the troops! Ready to fire......
|
| Pandra:
| Heh, you wanna fight? You might hit the townspeople.
|
| Zilva:
| I am not one to miss a target from point blank range.
|
|---VICTORY
| Pandra:
| Tch! That's some accuracy!! What the hell is she?
|
| Zilva:
| I am now a member of Gram Blaze.
|
|---DEFEAT
| Pandra:
| I won't lose to such a weak bow!!
|
| Zilva:
| His is good at his fighting style......
-----

--Eudy vs. Pandra--------------------------------------
| Eudy:
| KYAHAHAHA! I got to show everyone the fruits of my research! I couldn't be
|   happier!
|
| Pandra:
| You're that woman with the cannon... Damn, you ruined my plans!
|
|---VICTORY
| Pandra:
| Things look bleak...
|
| Eudy:
| Isn't this trivial. I don't even need my cannon for something like this.
|
|---DEFEAT
| Pandra:
| What's wrong? Is that all you've got!?
|
| Eudy:
| Aagh, this is annoying! You're the type girls can't stand.
-----


------------------Locations------------------                        [Map29.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
One of the western region's major cities. Its hot spring is famous

   --シャーミネル砦 - Sharminel Fortress
A fortress with considerable defenses meant to repel invaders

   --シャーミネル市 - Sharminel
Central city of the mountain town Sharminel

   --リヴィア市 - Rivia
Town popular for its fabrics where many famous fur craftsmen live

   --サルバ市 - Sarba
It's believed that fairies live in the great tree of this town

   --遥か深き雪の町 - Distant Snowy Town
A town of stifling hot air not at all expected in the snowy mountains...

   --ユーディの大砲 - Eudy's Cannon
"Excellent Cannon" of heaping improvements (named by Eudy)


--------------------On Map-------------------                        [Map29.07]
--マロゥの森 - Morow Forest
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|   Pepes Fruit   |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| There's fruit on the ground... Are they from this tree...?
| They might be eatable. I'll take some back.
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| Ah, so much fruit...
| It's a waste that they just keep falling, I'll take some with us.
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| There's so much fallen fruit...
| Let's take some, I'd hate to just leave it all. They have a healthy color.
|   I'm sure they're eatable.
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| These are Pepes fruits... They are very nutritious.
| There are so many, if we only take a few we shouldn't incur any wrath.
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| So many fruits have fallen. They do look eatable...
| Medoute would know what kind of fruits they are. I'll ask her afterwards.
|
|---NESSIAH
| Nessiah:
| ...Oho? There are fruits tumbling underfoot.
| If I remember correctly, these are the highly nutritious Pepes fruits. Shall
|   we take some?
|
|---ZILVA
| Zilva:
| Fruit... We should be able to use it for food.
| Let's gather some.
|
|---EUDY
| Eudy:
| Ah, aren't these fruits? I believe they're nutritious...
| Let's pick a few up.
-----

--リヴィア市 - Rivia - FIRST TIME---------------------------
|
|--------------------|
|     ACQUISITION    |
|-Received Treasure!-|
|   Fur -> Fur Coat  |
|--------------------|
|
|---AFTERWARDS
|
|---NO FUR
| Fur Craftsman:
| The rebel army, right?
| Concluding that the empire is evil, they take young ones for soldiers... I
|   can't stand it, right.
| Sharminel is so far from the capital, the country has no control here, right.
|   It's always like that, right.
| We've been plenty happy up until now, right.
| No one should have the right to intrude on that happiness, right. Not the
|   country, not the rebels, right...
| Well, all I want, right, is prepared fur, just to make things out of, right.
|   Sheshe!
-----

--サルバ市 - Sarba - FIRST TIME----------------------------
|
|----------------------------|
|         ACQUISITION        |
|    -Received Treasure!-    |
|Elemina Mint -> Fermata Bell|
|----------------------------|
|
| Light Mannered Fairy:
| ...Sniff sniff... Hm? This smell is...
| ...Mister soldier, by any chance, do you have an Elemina Mint?
| Our fellow fairies that live in the snowy lands to the east collect these.
| If you give it to me I'll give you my special thing in exchange~ So...
| ...Huh? You'll trade? Yay! I love humans who understand!
| The tone of this bell has a special power to lower an enemy's fighting
|   spirit.
| If you give it to someone who can play musical instruments they can use it
|   all they want!
|
|---AFTERWARDS
| Light Mannered Fairy:
| ...Hm? The fairies in the snowy lands to the east I spoke of earlier?
| Strictly speaking they are a different race from us, but, well, we are all
|   fairies, so we're on good terms with each other...
| They run a business for humans in a town deep in the snow. For fairies it's
|   in bad taste.
| Humans have this trait of enjoying taking a bath in hot water, yes?
| The guys in the east provide that hot water.
| Really, if you heat up water you can have a bath anywhere, how they managed
|   to make that into a business...
| Humans really are strange creatures~ Like they say, their happiness is in
|   their heads.
| ...Ah, aren't you a human, mister soldier? Sorry, sorry, please pretend I
|   didn't say that last part~
|
|---NO ELEMINA MINT
| Light Mannered Fairy:
| Ah? Are you a soldier? And that standard... You are a different group from
|   the rebel army.
| Umm, there's something I want to discuss, could you listen for a bit?
| Actually, the rebel army is trying to cut down these Trees. They need the
|   lumber or something.
| But this Tree, the one that's out home? It'll be really bothersome if it gets
|   cut down!
| So, we want you to drive off the rebel army~ Do you mind doing that...?
| ...Eh? You planned to do that from the start?
| Then it's no problem! Beat them up all you want!
-----

--遥か深き雪の町 - Distant Snowy Town - NOON------------------
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| Uah, what's going on! The fog's setting in, I can't see a thing...
| ...This fog is hot. Aah, this is steam.
| Ah, this is a hot spring! I've heard about them, but really, this whole thing
|   is hot water. Wow...
| ...I'd like to take a bath, but we're in the middle of battle right now. It's
|   just not possible.
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| W- the air is warm. Is there something here?
| ...Could this be Sharminel's famous hot spring? All this water stays hot
|   naturally!?
| Uuh, I want to take a bath. But we are in the middle of a fight......
| ...............
| ...No one's watching, so I'll just take a quick dip!
| Aah, that feels so good! My body is getting so warm. Phew...
| Hehe. Sorry everyone, but this is most enjoyable alone! I could make a habit
|   of it.
|
| Garlot:
| ...Uaaaagh! Such a strong enemy...!! Someone, give me a hand!
|
| Shiskia:
| ...............
| I should get going soon...
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| Hm...? What's this, there's warm air all of the sudden...
| ...Wow! Is this really Sharminel's famous hot spring!?
| Amazing... I'm sure a hot bath would feel wonderful in this cold weather.
| This place can expect to attract a lot of customers. When we return to Tiera
|   I'll report about it to Count Velleman.
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| Is this the hot spring I've heard rumors of? It looks wonderful, but......
| No, hold on. Everyone's fighting for their lives out there. I can't enjoy
|   this by myself...
| ...............
| ...If I get in and out quick no one will know. So in that case...
| ...Aah, that's so nice on my skin. It's like it's caressing my whole body...
| This is nice, my body is heating up from the core......
|
| Garlot:
| ...Uaaaagh! Such a strong enemy...!! Someone, give me a hand!
|
| Medoute:
| ...............
| I really need to get back now......
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| ...What thick steam. This is Sharminel's famous hot spring!
| I do want to try it once, but... I can't do that when everyone's fighting...
|
| Luciana:
| Ah? Aegina! Perfect timing, let's bathe together~
|
| Aegina:
| Ah, Big Sis? Why are you here... Kyaah!!
|
| Luciana:
| What do you mean, why... I decided that I want to go to the hot spring with
|   my cute little sister!
|
| Aegina:
| T- that's not what I mean... Were you not supposed to stay and watch over the
|   army housing?
|
| Luciana:
| This hot spring seems like it would be good for my leg. So, accidentally...
|   Aah, this feels nice......
|
| Aegina:
| This was no accident!! Why in the world would you come on such a far away
|   journey...
| Your leg is injured... Aah! That's, aagh......
|
| Luciana:
| ...Hey, Aegina, Aren't yours bigger than mine?
|
| Aegina:
| Aagh, no...... You're more shapely, Sis......
|
| Luciana:
| The stone you found looks cool, Aegina. But, why are there stones in the
|   water...?
|
| Aegina:
| That's true, I am a little confused as well...
|
| Garlot:
| ...Uaaaagh! Such a strong enemy...!! Someone, give me a hand!
|
| Aegina:
| ...Ah, no! I must hurry back!!
|
|---NESSIAH
| Nessiah:
| ...Oh? What is this feeling?
| Is this the hot spring I've heard rumors of? The hot air stands like a wall.
| I do not particularly understand the feelings of humans for wanting to soak
|   in hot water...
| ...It looks like there is nothing particularly special around here aside from
|   the hot spring. Let's return to the battle.
|
|---ZILVA
| Zilva:
| Mn? A fog has set in...
| ...No. This fog is laced with warm air. It's steam...
| What is this? A large amount of hot water has been accumulated here... ...For
|   what purpose?
| Could this be a trap the rebel army is arranging? Are they planning to drop
|   boiling water on us...?
| ...I need to get away quickly. I cannot see through what they're planning
|   here...
|
|---EUDY
| Eudy:
| ...Ah? What's all this warm air?
| This is steam, huh... Could this be the hot spring I've been hearing rumors
|  of?
| Phew, I wanted to see it~ ...er, I'd like to say that, but...
| My glasses are al fogged up, I can't see anything...
| And if I take them off, my vision is even worse... There's nothing I can do
|   but leave, huh. Too bad.
|
|---NOON - AFTERWARDS----------------------------------
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| Uuh...
| I must have succumbed to temptation or something last time...
| Going to have fun in the middle of battle really is unprofessional... Sorry,
|   I've thought it over...
| Haah... No one needs to hear my excuses... Let's hurry back to the front...
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| ...What did I do? Abandoning the commander on the battlefield and visiting a
|   hot spring...
| I thought myself a diligent person, but I am unexpectedly not...
| And, bathing in the middle of battle... Someone with common sense would not
|   do that...
| ...But it did feel nice...
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| ...............
| Even if Sis forcibly lured me into the bath... How could I...!
| ...And then, what was sister doing this deep in the mountains with an injured
|   leg when she should have been at the army residence...?
|
| Luciana:
| Aegina-?
|
| Aegina:
| S- Sis!?
| ...............
| N- no one is there...?What was that just now...? Was I seeing things?
| ...Could Big Sis have been an illusion back when we entered the baths? Could
|   I have made her up!?
| ...Then, in deep my heart, bathing in the hot spring was my own desire!?
| ...............
| No way... That couldn't be, right? I'm a reliable person. Ha ha ha...
|
|---EVENING--------------------------------------------
| Fairy Lookout:
| Ah? You guys are humans?
| Sorry, but we have to decline your business. I understand that you came this
|   far in the cold, but please leave...
| ...Eh? You came here without knowing what's here? You sure are strange...
| Well, if you don't know you don't know. In any case, please leave.
| ...Still, when is the next lookout coming to relive me?
| Let them see what it's like to stand watch over the water around the clock,
|   really...
| A~ah... if I don't take a nap somewhere I won't be able to make it, geez...
|
|---NIGHT
| Fairy Lookout:
| Ghuu...
| ...when is the replacement lookout gonna come, huh...? ...When will it
|   happen...
| ......Ghuu...
|
|---NIGHT - EATER
|
|---NIGHT - EATER - AFTERWARDS
-----


---------------------Loss--------------------                        [Map29.08]
Defeat - Out of Cards (All)

In the clash with the rebel army occupying Sharminel, Gram Blaze was scattered 
due to a flaw in tactics, and was forced to disband...


========================================================================[Map30]
物欲のなせる罠
A Trap for Greed
Ether Canyon - Western Part of the Plank Road


--------------------Intro--------------------                        [Map30.01]
The bandits infesting the trade route between Tiera and the capital had grown 
numerous in the past several months. Not seeing a sign of soldiers to 
exterminate them the Empire's stability declined all the more.

With the route bringing them nothing but losses the merchants withdrew one by 
one and the Empire's economy froze suddenly.

The commerce city Tiera was at a time of crisis, so Count Velleman ordered Gram 
Blaze to suppress the bandits and restore public order.

Garlot and the others deciding to lure out all the bandits together formulated 
a plan to spreading false information about a transport of gold bars......

----------------Before Battle----------------                        [Map30.02]
Shiskia:
Aagh, I don't get this job either.
The army should be the ones exterminating bandits.

Jenon:
I understand how you feel. But by doing this we can protect everyone's lives
  and property.

Shiskia:
Bandits are bandits. They can attack the army instead of the merchants!

Medoute:
It's a problem of risks and returns. If they attack soldiers their losses will
  be heavy, and the things to steal won't be worth very much.

Shiskia:
I guess that's true, but......
Hm? Hang on, then, since we're armed won't the bandits not come attack us?

Nessiah:
It is for that reason that we have spread information that we are transporting
  gold.
With the recent halt in trade the bandits must have become quite anxious.

Medoute:
Because they have lost the means to sustain themselves.

Garlot:
Looks like they are pretty anxious. They showed up right away.

|--------------|
|    ATTACK    |
|-Under Siege!-|
|--------------|

Bandit Leader:
You with the wagon, stop right there!
To cross the Ether Plank Road you have to pay a toll.

Jenon:
A toll? To you? No matter how you look at it, you guys are bandits.

Bandit Leader:
Enough talk. Hurry up and hand over the gold you've got!
...Oh? Looks like aside from gold you've also got some pretty ladies. Heh heh
  heh......

Shiskia:
Aagh, I can't stand them. Let's take care of them already!

Garlot:
Yeah.
It's been a while since we've fought someone so obviously evil!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Repel the bandits!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
               Garlot dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Bandit Leader:
Kill the men, but don't hurt the girls too badly! And as always, don't hold
  back!

Garlot:
I wonder, will that really be enough?

Bandit Leader:
Aeh?

Garlot:
All troops prepare for battle! Don't hold back, got it!

Bandit Leader:
W- what's with these guys? Aren't they just an escort unit......


------------------Mid Battle-----------------                        [Map30.03]
Bandit Leader:
G- guaaaagh!

|-----------------------|
|    KILLED IN ACTION   |
|-A Warrior has Fallen.-|
|-----------------------|

|    |
|    |               DRIVEN BACK THE ENEMY
| /\ | Successfully suppressed the Ether Canyon bandits!!
|/  \|

Garlot:
Huh...... That was easier than I expected.
Hopefully now order will be restored in the surrounding areas, though...

???:
Gheeh! It's over already!!

|--------------|
|    ATTACK    |
|-Under Siege!-|
|--------------|

Cerica:
Hang on, Inzaghi! This is totally not what we discussed!!

Garlot:
Oh no, it's Cerica again......

Cerica:
Wasn't the plan to surround them and beat them up while they were still engaged
  with the bandits!?

Inzaghi:
As usual you're full of complaints... Plans never work out, you know......
But we did manage to set up a pincer attack. Can't that be enough for you?

Cerica:
Cerica is your employer, right? She doesn't appreciate that tone of voice!

Inzaghi:
Gees...... Sorry, Miss Cerica!

Cerica:
Get ready Garlot! This time there's nowhere for you to run!!

Garlot:
It's you who's always running away.

Cerica:
Today...... Yeah, today Cerica will do it!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Drive away the revenge obsessed Cerica!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
               Garlot dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Garlot:
It's like she's made it her life's work to chase me around...

Cerica:
Cerica will do it! This time Cerica will surely have her revenge!


-----------------After Battle----------------                        [Map30.04]
Cerica:
Why...... Why did it end like this!?

|------------------|
|      RETREAT     |
|-Time to Regroup.-|
|------------------|

|    |
|    |   THE FIRE YET BURNS BRIGHTLY!
| /\ | Successfully drove back Cerica!!
|/  \|

Cerica:
In that case... Cerica will take you down with her......

Garlot:
Give it up, Cerica! You can't beat me.

Cerica:
That's not true! As long as you don't quit you can't lose!!
The one who survives to the end is the winner! The one who still has fangs that
  bite wins! Commander David said so!
No matter the means, as long as you stay alive you can attain victory!

Garlot:
But, Cerica......

Cerica:
Don't say Cerica's name so lightly! It's her favorite name in the world that
  Commander David gave her!

|----------------------------------|
|         SURPRISE ATTACK          |
|-Bewildered by a Surprise Attack!-|
|----------------------------------|

Garlot:
Woah, careful!

Cerica:
Ah!

Cerica's Unit:
M- Miss Cerica! Miss Cerica fell down the cliff!

Garlot:
What an idiot, really......

Shiskia:
G- Garlot!? Why are you jumping in!?

  -----------------------------------------------------
Cerica:
...............
Hah, where is this? Where did Garlot go!?
That's right...... Cerica fell down the cliff while lunging at Garlot......

Garlot:
You truly are an idiot.

Cerica:
Garlot! You're...! O- owwww!!

Garlot:
Hold still. That leg is probably broken.
I treated it as best I could, but you won't be walking for a while.

Cerica:
C- coward! Are you going to finish Cerica off while she can't move?

Garlot:
Stupid, if I were I wouldn't have treated it.

Cerica:
...Again with your pity... Cerica hates it!

Garlot:
If I finish you off I'm a coward, if I offer sympathy you hate it. What do you
  want me to do?

Cerica:
There's nothing Cerica will accept from the one who murdered Commander David!

Garlot:
I see...
I stole someone important from you. That is true.
No, not just from you. Everyone I've killed up until now had surely had family
  and friends.
Because of their hate and sadness the things I've done weigh heavily on me.
There are times when I want to run away from them, but I can't stop fighting.
  There are things that I need to accomplish.

Cerica:
...Just what are you trying to say?

Garlot:
Why do you act like a mercenary or a thief?

Cerica:
That's just how it is! There was no other way for Cerica to live besides that!

Garlot:
You don't have parents?

Cerica:
Shut up!

Garlot:
I want to change the world and make it so that those who choose to live the way
  you do don't show their faces.

Cerica:
What are you talking about... Cerica doesn't get it...

Garlot:
Until I make a way for that I can't allow myself to die.
But when I no longer have a reason to fight, at that time, I will give you my
  life.
Not just for David. To cleanse all the things I've done, I will gladly accept
  your judgment.

Cerica:
You're not playing fair......

Garlot:
I'm leaving. ......Later then.

Cerica:
Wait......

Garlot:
...............

Cerica:
Thanks for your help.
Cerica's decided to stop chasing you for a while.
But she will kill you one day...
Until then you can't die.

Garlot:
Yeah, I'll do my best.


---------------------Vs.---------------------                        [Map30.05]
--Garlot vs. Cerica
| Garlot:
| You've been fighting with us for a long time now...
|
| Cerica:
| That's right! And this time Cerica will put an end to it!
|
|---VICTORY
| Cerica:
| No way! Cerica will never ever give up!
|
| Garlot:
| How many times have we had this exchange now...
|
|---DEFEAT
| Cerica:
| Cerica is superior! We're pushing you back!
| Today Cerica will make you stop breathing!
|
| Garlot:
| I'm not planning to die so easily.
-----

--Shiskia vs. Cerica-----------------------------------
| Shiskia:
| Hey, Cerica. Aren't you tired, or something like that, of this revenge?
|
| Cerica:
| Sh......
| Sh- shut up! Something like that can't happen!
|
| Shiskia:
| ...............
|
|---VICTORY
| Shiskia:
| There's something I've been thinking about. Killing David originally might
|   have been a mistake.
| ...But, no matter how much I think about it, I don't think it was.
|
| Cerica:
| What does that matter! At the very least, Cerica needs Commander David!
|
| Shiskia:
| ...I know. I completely understand.
| That's why I've decided. As long as we hold on to our righteousness, we'll
|   take you up on your revenge!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Cerica:
| There, how's that! Cerica can win at this rate! Cerica is not tired of this!
|
| Shiskia:
| ...I wouldn't say that.
-----

--Jenon vs. Cerica-------------------------------------
| Jenon:
| Each time we fight your pain will only grow. It's bitter to think about.
|
| Cerica:
| What happened to Cerica is bitter! None of you have any reason to feel like
|   that!
| Villains should just laugh scornfully! Don't make that irritating face!
|
|---VICTORY
| Jenon:
| Continuing to fight is bitter. I understand that...
|
| Cerica:
| Bitter, painful... Spending a night without someone you care about is awful!
|
|---DEFEAT
-----

--Medoute vs. Cerica-----------------------------------
| Medoute:
| We've known each other for a while now... How long do you plan continuing to
|   seek revenge for?
|
| Cerica:
| Cerica will keep going until she succeeds! 
|
|---VICTORY
| Medoute:
| You're truly miserable. You will only be able to rest when you stop this...
|
| Cerica:
| Do you really expect Cerica to stop...!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Cerica:
| Commander David... Cerica will have revenge for you, definitely!
|
| Medoute:
| You talk to the dead while grieving for them. If that makes you happy, I...
-----

--Aegina vs. Cerica------------------------------------
| Aegina:
| Enough of this revenge! Nothing ever comes from revenge...
| ...Er, I am not someone qualified to say that. After all I...
| I...
|
| Cerica:
| What are you mumbling about! Cerica will defeat you this time, get ready!
|
|---VICTORY
| Aegina:
| I am not one who is qualified to denounce revenge...
| ...Then at least, as a companion of Master Garlot I will satisfy your revenge
|   with all my strength!
|
| Cerica:
| Ouch...
|
| Aegina:
| Come, Cerica! I will neither run nor hide before Master Garlot!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Cerica:
| This time Cerica will kill you...
|
| Aegina:
| ...I am not qualified to stop anyone's revenge. However, there should be no
|   reason that I must die...
| Therefore, I should be qualified to wield my sword!
-----

--Nessiah vs. Cerica-----------------------------------
| Nessiah:
| You would be the young lady who was deeply affected by the founding of our
|   private army, yes?
|
| Cerica:
| And what if I am!
|
| Nessiah:
| What. Nothing for now. Fufufu...
|
|---VICTORY
| Nessiah:
| Fighting gives rise to sadness, sadness nurtures a vengeful heart, and
|   vengeance spurs people into fighting...
| What ironic creatures, humans. Just like a greedy angel somewhere far away!
|
| Cerica:
| What's that, are you making fun of Cerica? What are you trying to say!!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Nessiah:
| Tch, how could a lowly human out for vengeance...!
|
| Cerica:
| Huh? Human? Cerica doesn't get what you're talking about!
-----

--Zilva vs. Cerica-------------------------------------
| Zilva:
| ...Revenge. If I were to turn my blade on one who bears resentment, the Order
|   would become my enemy...
|
| Cerica:
| What are you muttering about? You're one of Garlot's gang, right? Then you're
|   Cerica's enemy!
|
|---VICTORY
| Zilva:
| Why are you trying to kill the captain?
|
| Cerica:
| That's... Just for killing Commander David he deserves it!
|
| Zilva:
| ...I see. Ordinarily people kill each other just for that reason.
|
|---DEFEAT
| Zilva:
| ...This is what revenge feels like. To me, having been entwined with killing,
|   it doesn't feel strange at all.
| I cannot deny that.
| Nonetheless... these people are companions that I have finally found.
-----

--Eudy vs. Cerica--------------------------------------
| Eudy:
| Is this revenge thing fun for you?
|
| Cerica:
| This has nothing to do with fun! Still, Cerica must have revenge on that man!
|
|---VICTORY
| Eudy:
| What if I had killed you? I've got a hunch that you'd prefer that.
|
| Cerica:
| If that were to happen, even if we were to kill each other, Cerica would...!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Cerica:
| Go away! Cerica is only after Garlot's head!
|
| Eudy:
| I took you lightly. ...Should I burn you to a crisp?
-----


------------------Locations------------------                        [Map30.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
A key route connecting the imperial capital to Tiera, overlooking the Ether 
Canyon

   --桟道の食事処 - Plank Road Eatery
Insistent shop building up business by targeting the travelers crossing the 
plank road

   --魔女の庵 - Witch's Hermitage
Hermitage of a witch who lives in the mountains and came down to the plank road 
at a whim


--------------------On Map-------------------                        [Map30.07]
--桟道 - Plank Road
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
| Twin Blade Coin |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| Hm? A coin fell here.
| The pattern is of two lined up swords... Hm? I feel like I've seen it before.
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| Ah? This thing over here... could it be a coin?
| Hm? This crest... Is it the one of that nasty emperor?
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| Oh? Someone dropped a coin...
| The twin blade crest... Is this something connected to Emperor Soltier?
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| A coin is lying here. Did a traveler drop it?
| ...The crest of twin blades. These were minted to commemorate the crowning of
|   Emperor Soltier.
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| Ah, someone dropped a coin.
| Two lined up swords... is this a commemorative coin of some sort?
|
|---NESSIAH
| Nessiah:
| Oh? Something is on the ground here...
| It seems to be a coin. This is the crest of Emperor Soltier. Hmm...
|
|---ZILVA
| Zilva:
| I have found a coin on the ground.
| The emblem has a drawing of two swords... What significance does this have?
|
|---EUDY
| Eudy:
| Ah, this is a coin.
| This was commemorating the crowning of Emperor Soltier. I'll salvage it, I
|   suppose.
-----

--桟道の食事処 - Plank Road Eatery - FIRST TIME - HIGH %-----
|
|------------------------------|
|          ACQUISITION         |
|     -Received Treasure!-     |
|Shiny Coins -> Forbidden Fruit|
|------------------------------|
|
| Waitress:
| Ah? You've got something nice there, those sparkling coins.
| So, can you let me have them?
| ...Not just like that, huh? Mmmn... You're pretty stubborn, huh.
| Then... Would you trade for this thing a traveler left behind?
| ...Hehe, it's settled.
| Wow, these coins are so pretty...
| Thanks, I'll treasure them!
|
|---FIRST TIME - LOW %
|
|----------------------|
|      ACQUISITION     |
| -Received Treasure!- |
|Shiny Coins -> Banango|
|----------------------|
|
|---AFTERWARDS/NO SHINY COINS
| Waitress:
| Recently the bandits have grown too numerous and the travelers and merchants
|   have taken to using ships rather than the canyon road.
| It's thanks to the one waterway connecting Tiera to the capital that it's
|   grown into a commercial city.
| If you overlook the high price of fare, you could even say that traveling by
|   ship is pleasant.
| It eliminates the time and effort of walking across the plank road, so
|   transporting cargo is easier. And above all there are no bandits.
| Thanks to that we've had big losses! If the number using the plank road
|   decreases, our shop's patrons decrease just as much.
-----

--魔女の庵 - Witch's Hermitage - FIRST TIME----------------
|
|--------------------------------|
|           ACQUISITION          |
|      -Received Treasure!-      |
|Poison Viper                    |
|      +      -> Lacan's Medicine|
|Rokon Skull                     |
|--------------------------------|
|
| Witch:
| Ohoho, A soldier has come for a visit... Well, stay as long as you like.
|   Hyehehehe!
| Oh? You seem to have something quite interesting there.
| Let me see it here. What's wrong, I won't misuse it. Hyehehehe!
| This way it won't go to waste. If you hang on to it, it would just remain a
|   useless item.
| There, do this and that, and it's ready.
| Do not let youngsters take this. It is too stimulating for them.
| If they were to try it... well, nothing good will come of it. Hyehehehe!
|
|---AFTERWARDS/NO ITEM
| Witch:
| Ohoho, A soldier has come for a visit... Well, stay as long as you like.
|   Hyehehehe!
| Though there isn't anything particularly of interest here. Hyehehehe!
| If I had some materials like those I could mix some medicines...
| But it does not look like I have those items themselves. Hyehehehe!
-----


---------------------Loss--------------------                        [Map30.08]
Defeat - Out of Cards (1st)

In the battle with the bandits lured out with false information of gold, Gram 
Blaze was scattered due to a flaw in tactics, and was forced to disband...

Defeat - Garlot Defeated (2nd)-------------------------

In the clash with Cerica, who continued to loudly proclaim her revenge, Gram 
Blaze's captain, Garlot, lost his life, and Gram Blaze vanished from history's 
stage...


========================================================================[Map31]
戻ってきた戦士
Returning Soldier
Waterway Ship Landing


--------------------Intro--------------------                        [Map31.01]
The plan to lure out bandits through rumors of gold ended in a huge success.

Shiskia and the others worried over Garlot who fell into the canyon. They took 
up positions at the exit of the plank road, and dispatched a search party in 
order to meet up with him.

However, a clearly different force from the bandits was sneaking up ahead of 
them......


----------------Before Battle----------------                        [Map31.02]
Jenon:
It's no good, I still don't see Garlot anywhere.

Medoute:
It's not unusual for those who fall into the canyon to die. We have every
  reason to worry.

Shiskia:
...Don't say something like that, it'll jinx us!

Medoute:
Hm?

Jenon:
I'll send another messenger to Count Velleman.
Don't worry, Shiskia. Garlot's not that weak.

Shiskia:
...............

Medoute:
Shiskia, aren't you worrying a bit too much?

Shiskia:
...Sigh, sorry. The thing with Cerica is bothering me.
Why did he jump into the canyon to save someone like her......?
If it were me... Ah, but... Well...

Private Army Soldier:
Lady Medoute, what should we do until Sir Garlot returns?

Medoute:
Hm... right. Could I ask you to secure us some food?

Private Army Soldier:
Should we go hunting?

Medoute:
Yes. It looks like our stay here could get a little long.

Private Army Soldier:
As you wish.

Nessiah:
Yet the longer the time drags on as we search for the captain, the greater our
  problems get.

Medoute:
......What do you mean?

Nessiah:
While there are the problems of food and funds, the real trouble is the chance
  of our getting attacked by ruffians desiring gold.

Medoute:
You're saying that bandits could come for us a second or even third time......

Aegina:
But we've brought a considerable number of soldiers to search for Master
  Garlot.

Medoute:
Above all the problem is that Garlot, the heart of our group, is gone...

Jenon:
Shiskia! Medoute!! A large force of troops is heading this way!

Nessiah:
Our fears have come true......

Jenon:
From their appearance they don't look like bandits. Their equipment is well
  prepared. Could they be that rebel army...!?

|--------------|
|    ATTACK    |
|-Under Siege!-|
|--------------|

Medoute:
We're in a tight spot... There's nothing else to be done. I'll take command!
  Back me up you two!!

Shiskia:
You got it!

Jenon:
Gees...... You owe us one, Garlot.

  /--Victory--------------
 / Crush the rebel army!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
     Any of your units die...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Medoute:
Judging by their equipment they really are the rebel army.

Rebel Soldier:
That would be the gold carrying caravan. They have quite a strict guard.
I bet they're carrying a large amount of gold.

Medoute:
Sending troops to get gold... Is there no limit to stupidity?


------------------Mid Battle-----------------                        [Map31.03]
|------------------|
|      RETREAT     |
|-Time to Regroup.-|
|------------------|

Medoute:
If that's all they've got we'll manage even without Garlot.

|    |
|    |       DRIVEN BACK THE ENEMY
| /\ | Crushed the rebel army vanguard!!
|/  \|

Nessiah:
Let us stay vigilant to our surroundings. I doubt that it will end at
  this......

Shiskia:
Medoute! There's a ship on the river!! A ship of that size could......

|--------------------|
|      DISEMBARK     |
|-Landing Operation.-|
|--------------------|

Lazy, Leaderlike Man/Pandra:
Alright, operation Landing Strike was a success. Really, I didn't think a
  surprise attack would go this brilliantly!

--PLAYED BF 16
| Oh? I've seen your faces somewhere before. Aren't you the guys who attacked
|   our fortress before?
| You're escorting the gold transport? That's tough work. What happened to all
|   your justice watchamacallit?
|
|---HAVEN'T PLAYED BF 16
| You guys are the gold carrying caravan, yeah? Be good and hand over your
|   cargo!
| We'll put it to good use. It will become the funding for the rebellion.
-----

Medoute:
Gold? That was all a lie. It was meant to draw out greedy and petty criminals
  like yourself.

--HAVEN'T PLAYED BF 16
| If you really are a rebel army how about striking at the imperial armories?
-----

Lazy, Leaderlike Man/Pandra:
Aagh, don't bullshit me. I'm not one to give up from a speech like that.

Leon:
Hey Pandra! You blabber on too long. Get to the fighting already!!

Pandra:
Tch. Such a hot blooded bastard. I'm lending you soldiers, you gotta be more
  respectful to me......

Medoute:
Isn't that Leon!?

Pandra:
What's this? You guys know each other?

Leon:
Yeah, a worthless association. Gram Blaze...... I haven't forgotten the
  humiliation they've given me.

Pandra:
Humiliation...?
Haha, you're the guys he spoke of. Crush them with all your strength.

Leon:
Look who's talking. Kukuku...  This will be your blood bath.
Hm... I don't see Red around... Did he kick the bucket?
...Oh well. Let's get this started.

  /--Victory--------------
 / Defeat the rebel army's Pandra!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
     Any of your units die...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Medoute:
Taking down Leon without Garlot will be near impossible......
But there's no other choice!

  -----------------------------------------------------
Medoute:
They may just be a rebel army, but their soldiers are well trained. Has Leon
  been training them......?
Such a strong enemy, nonetheless...!

Leon:
Tch, this can't be all...! Where's Red? Don't tell me that he really did die.

--SHISKIA IS ON THE MAP
| Shiskia:
| There's no way that he's dead! He's alive, I'm sure of it!!
-----

Garlot:
What's this? You guys got into a fight while I was gone?
Hm? Is that Leon!?
Hey Medoute! What the hell's going on here!?

Leon:
Found you, Red! Hey, Red's my prey. No one else touch him!!

Medoute:
Be careful, Garlot! Leon's after you!!

Private Army Soldier:
Sir Garlot! You're alright!

Garlot:
Yo, sorry for the wait. I'm a little late, but I'll join this fight!

--SHISKIA IS ON THE MAP
| Shiskia:
| No, not 'yo'! We were all...!!
-----

  -----------------------------------------------------
LEON RETREAT

Leon:
...D- Damn it all!! Red! I'll let you have this battle!!

|-------------------------|
|         RUN AWAY        |
|-Only I Should be Saved!-|
|-------------------------|


-----------------After Battle----------------                        [Map31.04]
Pandra:
Guaaagh! I messed up... Damn it! I can't die in a place like this!!

|    |
|    |    WHAT BROUGHT FORTH THIS VICTORY?
| /\ | Crushed the rebel army leader, Pandra!!
|/  \|

--LEON REMAINING
| Leon:
| What the hell are you doing Pandra! Are you really such a coward that you,
|   the commander, would flee before your subordinates!!
|
| Pandra:
| ...The gold transport was a ruse. There's no reason to fight anymore. If you
|   want to keep fighting, fight on your own!
| My life's important to the rebel army. I'm heading back to the base!
| Isn't this the time to pull back? If you don't want to die hurry up and
|   retreat!!
|
| Leon:
| ...Damn it all!! Red! I'll let you have this battle!!
|
|------------------|
|      RETREAT     |
|-Time to Regroup.-|
|------------------|
-----

Pandra:
All of you, back to the ship!

|-------------------------|
|         RUN AWAY        |
|-Only I Should be Saved!-|
|-------------------------|

Medoute:
...Sigh. We beat them back somehow.

Garlot:
I'd like to go after them... But chasing after a ship is beyond pointless.

  -----------------------------------------------------
Garlot:
Was that the rebel army just now? Why was Leon helping them?

Medoute:
I can't say for sure, but from what they said he's borrowing troops from their
  leader, Pandra.
Mostly, it looks like Leon is still holding a grudge having lost to our private
  army.

Aegina:
You mean from that mock battle?

Jenon:
So he's someone that can't let things go. Just the kind of guy that girls hate.

Nessiah:
His has considerable brute strength. The one we should be weary of most is him
  rather than the leader Pandra.
I don't think I would be wrong to say that he played a role in the arrogance of
  the rebel army recently.

Medoute:
The source of our problems has grown......

Garlot:
Still, I'm glad that we managed to drive them back this time without any
  problems.
We'll think of a way to counter Leon when we get back to Tiera, alright?

Jenon:
You've got my support.

Nessiah:
It would be best to gather information relating to the rebel army once again,
  and reassess the situation.

Medoute:
Let's hurry back. Thanks to someone we're behind schedule.

Shiskia:
...............
...Garlot.

Garlot:
Hm? What's wrong, Shiskia?

Shiskia:
There's one thing we're forgetting.
You just jumped off the cliff, all on your own... We were all really worried.
  Why would you......

Garlot:
...Ah, well, that was...

Aegina:
No, Master Garlot's safety is first and foremost.

Jenon:
Worrying people is Garlot's special talent.
You owe us one for this.

Medoute:
What happened to Cerica?

Garlot:
She's fine. She injured her leg, though.

Jenon:
Did something happen?

Garlot:
...No, we just talked for a bit.

Shiskia:
...............

Medoute:
What is it, Shiskia?

Shiskia:
...Noooothiiing.


---------------------Vs.---------------------                        [Map31.05]
--Garlot vs. Leon
| Leon:
| You're here, Red! C'mon, fight me!!
|
| Garlot:
| We don't have the time to spare to keep him company...
|
|---VICTORY
| Garlot:
| How was that!
|
| Leon:
| Tch, you've gotten better, Red! But I expected you to!!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Leon:
| I'll have your head!
|
| Garlot:
| I'm not that easy to take down! This is just the beginning!!
-----

--Shiskia vs. Leon-------------------------------------
| Shiskia:
| You're a really vengeful guy. Don't you think others would find persistent
|   people annoying?
|
| Leon:
| How absurd! Do you think I care about how others see me!?
| All I care about is breaking Red for injuring my pride!
|
| Shiskia:
| Yeah, no way anyone likes you...
|
|---VICTORY
| Shiskia:
| What daunting physical force... I barely managed to make it.
|
| Leon:
| Why you! Next time it won't end like this!!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Leon:
| Hmph, you just stay there quietly and watch as I skewer Red!
|
| Shiskia:
| I won't let you!
-----

--Jenon vs. Leon---------------------------------------
| Jenon:
| You're intimidating as always... But we have improved!
|
| Leon:
| Oh? Interesting. Then this will make for entertaining match!
|
|---VICTORY
| Jenon:
| Phew... Somehow I stopped his momentum.
|
| Leon:
| This won't happen again! Get ready!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Jenon:
| Gkh! ...He's really strong!
|
| Leon:
| Cling to your planning and face death!
-----

--Medoute vs. Leon-------------------------------------
| Medoute:
| Hey you, is your sister okay with this?
|
| Leon:
| ...Elena has nothing to do with this! Now, take up your weapon!!
|
| Medoute:
| ...Sigh.
|
|---VICTORY
| Medoute:
| You cause her to worry about you when you fight so much. You need to act more
|   responsibly.
|
| Leon:
| Tch!! Preaching as always!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Leon:
| Kuku, that was disappointing!
|
| Medoute:
| ...His charge really is a menace, but a return strike penetrates easily...
|   Aim for that. Got it?
-----

--Aegina vs. Leon--------------------------------------
| Aegina:
| What sinister fighting spirit. It's certainly not an example I wish to
|   follow...
|
| Leon:
| Cut the chatter! Come on, let's go!
|
|---VICTORY
| Aegina:
| I will not be beaten so easily!
|
| Leon:
| Little girl, look around you!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Leon:
| It seems you've improved, but it may as well be nothing before the knight
|   battalion I've tempered!
|
| Aegina:
| Still a fool... We too are different from before!
-----

--Nessiah vs. Leon-------------------------------------
| Nessiah:
| You would be the Black Knight Leon. I have heard of you from the Count.
|   Fufufu...
|
| Leon:
| In that case this chat will be quick! Come on!
|
|---VICTORY
| Nessiah:
| Very good. But it would be appropriate to call that strength of yours
|   foolhardy!
|
| Leon:
| Why you... Next time it won't end like this!!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Leon:
| Take that! Look away and it won't end in mere wounds!!
|
| Nessiah:
| Your valor is terrific! My my, the progress of humans amazes me...
-----

--Zilva vs. Leon---------------------------------------
| Zilva:
| This man is the rebel army ace.
| If we stop their main force victory will be ours. ...That is my duty.
|
| Leon:
| ...Oh? Interesting. Take your best shot!
|
|---VICTORY
| Leon:
| ...!!  What precise aim. If there wasn't anyone to take that hit for me, I
|   wouldn't have been able to get close.
|
| Zilva:
| Maintain a constant speed of fire. Keep up the volley while they have troops
|   and finish them off.
|
|---DEFEAT
| Zilva:
| An error. Retreat for a moment and regroup.
|
| Leon:
| ...Her retreat has no flaws. I'm hesitant to go after them.
-----

--Eudy vs. Leon----------------------------------------
| Eudy:
| What's this? What a delinquent man...
|
| Leon:
| What!? You in the glasses! If you're not gonna fight get off the battlefield!
|
| Eudy:
| That's a sharp tongue he's got.  Someone needs to be taken down a notch...
|
|---VICTORY
| Eudy:
| That's some power! Aah, if only I had my cannon. Shell explosions would be
|   wonderful!
|
| Leon:
| That's not a thing to be talking so merrily about! Crazy woman!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Leon:
| How's that, magician! Is that all the strength you've got?
|
| Eudy:
| ...I really want to shoot my cannon at him. I'm so mad.
-----


------------------Locations------------------                        [Map31.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
Turnabout point on the waterway connecting Tiera and the capital

   --湖畔の村アセラ - Lakeshore Village Asera
A small village using the lake's products for provisions. Particularly artistic 
in the area of crafts

   --ゲンジの小屋 - Genji's Hut
The hut where Genji, the eldest of the three brothers who maintain the canal's 
flood controls, lives

   --ゲンゴの小屋 - Gengo's Hut
The hut where Gengo, the middle of the three brothers who maintain the canal's 
flood controls, lives

   --ゲンナの小屋 - Genna's Hut
The hut where Genna, the youngest of the three brothers who maintain the 
canal's flood controls, lives


--------------------On Map-------------------                        [Map31.07]
--ゲンナの小屋 - Genna's Hut - FIRST TIME
|
|--------------------|
|     ACQUISITION    |
|-Received Treasure!-|
|   Serpent Lancer   |
|--------------------|
|
| Genna:
| Ah? A soldier? ...Is there something you need?
| Huh? You are not from the imperial army, nor do you look like one of the
|   rebels...
| ...G- Gram Blaze? Really, is that true!?
| I have heard much of your efforts! Defeating evildoers and fighting all over
|   the country, am I right?
|
|--FIRST VISITED
|| That's right! Since you came all the way out here there's something I would
|| like to give you!
|| My eldest brother gathered the materials, and my other brother forged them
||   into a powerful harpoon!
|| ...Huh? Where did it go? I thought I left it on this shelf...
|| That's strange. I thought brother gave it to me earlier when I visited
||   him...
|| We three brothers each live in the huts on different sides of the river...
|| Where could it have gone? Huh...
||
||---SECOND/THIRD VISITED
|| ...Eh? You've met my brothers?
|| ...Aah, that harpoon! I'm the one who uses it to fish, and it's got amazing
||   power!
|| ...Is it in here? I'll see if I can find it...
||
||--SECOND VISITED
||| ...Yeah, I can't find it. Where did it go...?
|||
|||---THIRD VISITED
||| ...............
||| Ah! Here it is, here! This is the harpoon!
||| This harpoon has some real strength to it. I can guarantee that having used
|||   it!
||| Good luck. We're rooting for you!
||-----
|-----
|
|---AFTER ONE/TWO BROTHERS VISITED
| Genna:
| Where could it have gone? Huh...
| The harpoon my brothers made is really powerful.
| For some reason I'm the best at fishing, so they made a harpoon for me...
|
|---AFTER THREE BROTHERS VISITED
| Genna:
| This harpoon that my eldest brother gathered materials for, my other brother
|   made, and I, the youngest, use is the Serpent Lancer.
| It hardly has any resistance underwater, and lunges with intense power.
| We're all behind you what you're doing Gram Blaze!
-----

--ゲンゴの小屋 - Gengo's Hut - FIRST TIME--------------------
|
|--------------------|
|     ACQUISITION    |
|-Received Treasure!-|
|   Serpent Lancer   |
|--------------------|
|
| Gengo:
| Hm? A soldier... Do you need something?
| ...That equipment's not of the imperial army. Are you with the rebels?
| ...Eh? Gram Blaze!? Why didn't you say so before!
| I've heard all about you guys. Beating up and mowing down bandits! It's a
|   thrill to hear about!
|
|--FIRST VISITED
|| Ah, oh yeah! I'll give you something good!
|| I forged it out of the ore and timber that my big bro gathered! It would
||   make quite a good weapon!
|| ...Huh? That's weird. I'm sure it was around here somewhere... Where'd it
||   go?
|| That's strange... It was here when my bro stopped by though...
|| We three brothers all live in huts on different sides of the river...
|| Where did it go? I wanted to give it to you...
||
||---SECOND/THIRD VISITED
|| ...Hn? You met my brothers?
|| ...Ah, that harpoon! You're gonna use it as a weapon? It'd be perfect for
||   you!
|| ...Could it be in here? Let's see...
||
||--SECOND VISITED
||| ...Yeah, I can't find it. Where'd it go...?
|||
|||---THIRD VISITED
||| ...............
||| ...Oh, there it is! This is the harpoon!
||| I'm not sure if this is true, but I hear it's got quite the destructive
|||   power!
||| Keep it up, Gram Blaze! I'm rooting for you!
||-----
|-----
|
|---AFTER ONE/TWO BROTHERS VISITED
|
| Gengo:
| Hmmm. Where'd it go? That's strange...
| That harpoon is quite strong. It should be useful even in battle.
|
|---AFTER THREE BROTHERS VISITED
|
| Gengo:
| My big bro gathered the materials for this harpoon, I, the middle brother,
|   forged it, and my little bro is the one who uses it. This Serpent Lancer.
| Because it has almost no resistance in water, it can thrust powerfully even
|   in water!
| I'm praying for your efforts!
-----

--ゲンジの小屋 - Genji's Hut - FIRST TIME--------------------
|
|--------------------|
|     ACQUISITION    |
|-Received Treasure!-|
|   Serpent Lancer   |
|--------------------|
|
| Genji:
| Oh? You're a soldier, huh? Thanks for carrying out your duties, even all the
|   way out here.
| Though, that equipment... It doesn't look like that of the imperial army. Are
|   you by chance the rebel army that I've been hearing about?
| ...Aah, Gram Blaze!? The group that's always fighting some nasty guys or
|   other!?
| You guys are famous, you know? Well, I suppose it's possible that you
|   yourselves are not aware of it.
|
|--FIRST VISITED
|| Ah, oh yeah! I'll give you something good!
|| It's a harpoon made out of the wood and ore I gathered. It would make an
||   excellent weapon.
|| ...Huh? That's strange, I can't find it. Where could it have gone?
|| ...Ah, could I have left it at my brother's house when I was there?
|| We three brothers all live in huts on different sides of the river...
|| That's strange... Where did it go? I wanted you to have it...
||
||---SECOND/THIRD VISITED
|| ...Hm? You've met my brothers?
|| ...Aah, that harpoon! It certainly can be used as a weapon. It would be
||   perfect for you.
|| ...Is it somewhere in my house maybe? Let me look around.
||
||--SECOND VISITED
||| ...Ah? That's strange, I can't find it. Where could it have gone?
|||
|||---THIRD VISITED
||| Ah, I found it! This is it, this is the harpoon!
||| This thing's destructive power is a cut above the rest if I say so myself.
||| Good luck Gram Blaze! We're all behind you!
||-----
|-----
|
|---AFTER ONE/TWO BROTHERS VISITED
|
| Genji:
| Huh, that's strange... Where did it go?
| This harpoon is quite strong. I would think it can be used in battle.
|
|---AFTER THREE BROTHERS VISITED
|
| Genji:
| I, the eldest brother, gathered the materials, my younger brother forged it,
|   and our youngest brother uses it, this Serpent Lancer.
| Because of its shape it hardly gets any resistance in water so it has a
|   powerful thrust.
| I'm sure it will be useful to you.
-----

--湖畔の村アセラ - Lakeshore Village Asera - NO PRETTY SHELL--
| Craftsman:
| In Lake Asera next to the village there are many high quality shells to be
|   collected.
| When your policy is to make goods using those shells, you reach the level of
|   a craftsman.
| If you could get me some of those shells I could try to make something out of
|   them.
-----


---------------------Loss--------------------                        [Map31.08]
Defeat - Unit Death (1st)

Before the rebel army vanguard, Gram Blaze, lacking their captain, Garlot, lost 
a crucial member and never recovered...

Defeat - Unit Death (2nd)------------------------------

Before the fierce attack of Leon and the rebel army leader, Pandra, Gram Blaze 
lost a crucial member and never recovered...


========================================================================[Map32]
ソルトロード
Salt Road
Mount Tokino - Checkpoint


--------------------Intro--------------------                        [Map32.01]
Recently the price of salt entering Tiera from the west increased radically.

According to Count Velleman's investigation the imperial administrator 
responsible for the Tokino river checkpoint, conspiring with the salt
merchants, placed an exorbitant tax on the salt and was pocketing the profits.

The sudden price jump in the necessary to life salt dealt a serious blow to 
Tiera's economy, starting with the livelihood of the Nesar district residents.

On orders from Count Velleman, the private army headed to the Tokino checkpoint 
to investigate.


----------------Before Battle----------------                        [Map32.02]
Jenon:
The sudden price increase on the salt we've had recently has really been
  bothersome.

Medoute:
And based on the price of salt, the cost of all the other food staples is
  rising.

Jenon:
Because salt, together with water, is necessary for life.

Shiskia:
Really, nobles and bureaucrats are so selfish.
Search with all your might, and still you can't grab all the bad guys!

Nessiah:
Yes, but there is a somewhat baffling portion to this matter.

Garlot:
What do you mean?

Nessiah:
For a simple incident of an administrator filling his own pockets this is an
  unimaginable amount of money.

Shiskia:
Well then, I'm sure he's pocketing an unimaginable amount of money!

Nessiah:
I do not think that is the case. Would it not quickly come out and he be
  caught?

Medoute:
Then what is happening to this unjustly gotten gold?

Nessiah:
It could, for example, be a way to raise money for a kind of influential
  power......
In a word, he may be someone's financial backer. It could be favorable for the
  administrator that this organization grow large.

Medoute:
Hm. That's quite the bold theory.

Shiskia:
The Tokino checkpoint has come into view.
But... Doesn't something look a little off about it?

Jenon:
A unit's been deployed in front of the checkpoint...

Garlot:
And their numbers are something else.

Nessiah:
It seems they expected our arrival and deployed troops.

Garlot:
I guess we've got no choice.

   /--Victory--------------
  / Gain control of the Tokino checkpoint!!
 / (Move a unit to the west checkpoint!)
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
               Garlot dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Bureaucrat:
Uuaah, this isn't good! Count Velleman's subordinates are here!
H- hey! Will we be okay!?

Soldier:
We'll defend this location, so please, hurry and fix the books.

Bureaucrat:
I've heard that they can't be bribed......
Aah, yes! Should we just surrender instead?

Soldier:
If the imperial army learns of this we'll all get the death penalty. After that
  you can't retreat!

Bureaucrat:
Y- yes, of course. I know that... But still... Mumble mumble...

Garlot:
Everyone ready, advance!


------------------Mid Battle-----------------                        [Map32.03]
|-----------------|
|     CONTROL     |
|-Seized Control!-|
|-----------------|

|    |
|    |                SECURED A FOOTHOLD
| /\ | Occupied the fortress of the unjust administrator!
|/  \|

Garlot:
Are you the one in charge of the Tokino checkpoint?

Bureaucrat:
R- red hair! A- aren't you t- that infamous captain Garlot!?

Garlot:
What do you mean infamous! A filthy man like you has no right to say that!

Bureaucrat:
Filthy? W- what are you talking about... I haven't done anything.

Garlot:
We've finished investigating who was behind the high tax on salt long ago!
Who are you passing the money to?

Bureaucrat:
Wh- a- I- I don't know! I don't know anything!

Garlot:
It looks like you don't quite get the situation you've been put in.
Whether or not you live is based only on how generous I'm feeling.

Bureaucrat:
H- hold on! I'll talk, I'll talk! Pandra! I gave it to a man named Pandra!!

Garlot:
Pandra? Hang on... Are you talking about the rebel army's Pandra?

Pandra:
Aah, looks like we're too late...... What a mess, gees.
That's Gram Blaze's standard. Ugh, just how long do they plan to keep getting
  in my way?

Garlot:
You're a representative of the empire! What the hell are you doing financing
  the rebel army!!

Bureaucrat:
Do you expect me to keep managing this backwater checkpoint for the rest of my
  life...... I want to have a magnificent career in the capital.
If the rebel army takes the empire, a seat as the Minister of State awaits me,
  their financial backer!

Garlot:
Huh? Are you an idiot...? Did you seriously believe what Pandra told you...?

Pandra:
Achoooo!!
Aagh, someone's spreading rumors about me.
If so, since I'm such a great person, it must be the girls at the capital...
  Khehe.
Hah, I've been wanting to get my arms around a city girl for so long now. These
  village girls are, well...
...I guess I really do need those ledgers to make that come true. I better make
  sure those guys don't get their hands on them...
Alright, let's go!

Private Army Soldier:
Sir Garlot, it's the rebel army! The rebel army force has arrived!!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Defeat the rebel army's Pandra!!
/----------------

                   ----------------------Defeat--/
 The rebel army reaches the west checkpoint...  /
                               Garlot dies...  /
                    Use up all your cards...  /
                        ---------------------/

Bureaucrat:
Oh, Pandra! You've come to rescue me!

Pandra:
You've still got the ledgers, right?

Bureaucrat:
Yes, I have them. Please, hurry!

Pandra:
Alright, alright, I'm coming to help.

  -----------------------------------------------------
|-----------------|
|      SORTIE     |
|-Follow my Lead!-|
