|-----------------|

Inzaghi:
Oh. Oh. Looks like there's some commotion over here. This is a chance for
  business!
On one side is Pandra's rebel army. And on the other... Ah, it's Gram Blaze!!

Pandra:
Hey, if it isn't Inzaghi! You've come at a good time.
As you can see it's sword swinging time. C'mon, back me up here!

Inzaghi:
How much are you paying?

Pandra:
Are you nuts, we're in the middle of battle. This isn't the time for
  bartering!!

Inzaghi:
You're fighting Gram Blaze, right? My price is... Yeah, 3000 gold pieces.

Pandra:
Settle for 2000.

Inzaghi:
I've heard you've come into some cash lately. How about a deferred payment of
  2500?

Pandra:
Damn it, talk about taking advantage... I got it, I'll pay 2400.

Inzaghi:
Tch, such a stringy guy. Well, whatever, the negotiations are done.

Pandra:
......I would have been better off bringing Leon along.


-----------------After Battle----------------                        [Map32.04]
|    |
|    |           ENEMY OVERWHELMED!
| /\ | Repelled the rebel army commander Pandra!!
|/  \|

Pandra:
Hey, I give up! I don't care about the ledgers anymore! I'm getting out of
  here!
If you're dead there's nothing you can do anymore!

|--------------------|
|     WITHDRAWAL     |
|-Forced to Retreat.-|
|--------------------|

--INZAGHI REMAINING
| Inzaghi:
| Gheeh! That bastard Pandra ran away!
| All the jobs from him are like this, what the hell is he doing... Time for us
|   to go too!
|
| |------------------|
| |      RETREAT     |
| |-Time to Regroup.-|
| |------------------|
-----

  -----------------------------------------------------
Garlot:
No one else will come and save you! Give it up! Hand over the ledgers Pandra
  was talking about!

Bureaucrat:
Uwaaa... H- here they are!

Jenon:
Hm... This is......
Garlot, this is amazing! The contents of this ledger are outrageous!!
The names of the rebel army's financial backers, the flow of the money... This
  is all very detailed.
The western region's wealthy merchants, government officials, nobles... Here
  look.

Nessiah:
Wonderful... If we get this to Count Velleman he can put it to maximum use.

Garlot:
Then we have what we wanted. Velleman should be able to understand it too.

Jenon:
Hm? What, no way......

Medoute:
What's wrong, Jenon?

Jenon:
......It's nothing, don't worry.

Medoute:
Really, alright.

Shiskia:
...Jenon, your face is pale. And before, your voice suddenly sounded strained.
  Are you okay?

Jenon:
Well, maybe not, just a little... When I looked at the ledger before there was
  a name I knew.

Shiskia:
No way... It wasn't Velleman, was it?

Jenon:
Don't worry. It's not someone you or Garlot would know.

Shiskia:
Oh...

Jenon:
(After all, you did say that if the rebel army came into power you would gain
  an important office in the administration......
Just how foolish can you get, dad...)

Shiskia:
Let's get going. We'll meet up with Garlot and the others.

Jenon:
Yeah, you're right, Shiskia.


---------------------Vs.---------------------                        [Map32.05]
--Garlot vs. Pandra
| Pandra:
| Yo, Red. You're full of energy today. Came to get in my way again?
|
| Garlot:
| If you behaved I wouldn't need to bother you at all.
|
|---VICTORY
| Garlot:
| We have evidence of you conspiring in the distribution of salt!
|
| Pandra:
| Hmmm? I have no idea what you're talking about.
|
|---DEFEAT
| Garlot:
| No!
|
| Pandra:
| A victory in battle against a fellow commander... How nice. Our side's
|   fighting spirit will lift too.
-----

--Shiskia vs. Pandra----------------------------------
| Shiskia:
| Go back to whatever hole in the western region that you crawled out of!
|
| Pandra:
| Don't slander us country men... We don't appreciate that, don't you think?
|
|---VICTORY
| Shiskia:
| When you stir up trouble everyone in Tiera gets anxious!!
|
| Pandra:
| ...That's a tall order.
|
|---DEFEAT
| Shiskia:
| Kyah!
|
| Pandra:
| Oh, oh, that was a cute sound you made. Alright, let's go another round.
|
| Shiskia:
| Kh... You've got to be kidding me!
-----

--Jenon vs. Pandra-------------------------------------
| Pandra:
| Oh, it's the little strategist. You're doing good work, good job.
| ...Hey, have we met somewhere before this?
|
| Jenon:
| I don't remember you... Are you trying to alienate me?
|
|---VICTORY
| Jenon:
| How's this!
|
| Pandra:
| ...Ah, I remember! You're his youngest son of little resemblance.
| I heard you ran away from home... So you've been hiding out with a private
|   army.
|
| Jenon:
| What are you going on about...?
|
|---DEFEAT
| Pandra:
| I feel like I've met you somewhere...
|
| Jenon:
| ...Enough! Focus on the present!
-----

--Medoute vs. Pandra-----------------------------------
| Medoute:
| We can't just leave someone who evades the truth and wrecks havoc to do what
|   they want.
|
| Pandra:
| I never say anything but the truth. No matter what.
|
|---VICTORY
| Medoute:
| Scatter them in one shot!
|
| Pandra:
| As always such fighting ability... That's something I'd want in the rebel
|   army. And in such a beautiful woman as well...
|
| Medoute:
| ...............
| S- scatter them, in, in one shot!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Pandra:
| Yeah, we've got superior power. Press them back in one hit!
|
| Medoute:
| ...Kh! Don't you dare get closer to the checkpoint!
-----

--Aegina vs. Pandra------------------------------------
| Aegina:
| Again you assemble your army having learned nothing.
|
| Pandra:
| Kukuku, I'm not good at quitting. I'll come back no matter how much you knock
|   me down.
|
|---VICTORY
| Aegina:
| No matter how many times you return I will cut you down!
|
| Pandra:
| ...Tch. Talented as always.
|
|---DEFEAT
-----

--Nessiah vs. Pandra-----------------------------------
| Pandra:
| Hey, don't you bump into things when you walk down the street?
|
| Nessiah:
| Fufufu... My power is somewhat peculiar.
|
|---VICTORY
| Pandra:
| Kh, now you've done it...
|
| Nessiah:
| Even without eyes that can see there are plenty of techniques to butcher the
|   enemy before you.
|
|---DEFEAT
| Nessiah:
| ...I have already foreseen our victory. That means it is possible to correct
|   this situation.
-----

--Zilva vs. Pandra-------------------------------------
| Zilva:
| Target acquired...
|
| Pandra:
| ...Geh. Not even a hello before battle. That's cold...
|
|---VICTORY
| Zilva:
| Next.
|
| Pandra:
| Kh, I can't get close...
|
|---DEFEAT
| Zilva:
| ...Disperse for the moment. Make use of the pursuing unit and return.
|
| Pandra:
| Tch, what a silent retreat. You can't even follow them.
-----

--Eudy vs. Pandra--------------------------------------
| Eudy:
| It was mystifying how a rebel army full of little more than recklessness was
|   raising money...
| You were making a killing along with this bureaucrat. I see.
|
|---VICTORY
| Eudy:
| This is nothing. You're much more suited to sniffing out money than fighting.
|
| Pandra:
| Unfortunately we're shorthanded...
|
|---DEFEAT
| Pandra:
| Money's really important, don't you think?
|
| Eudy:
| I realize that. However often the rich have a meager understanding of
|   research and development.
| That's why even though I hate money I need it.
-----


------------------Locations------------------                        [Map32.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
Checkpoint established on the Lannecia River that serves as the entryway to the 
west

   --トキノの関所 - Tokino Checkpoint
Checkpoint on the east side of the bridge built on the river that flows from 
Mount Tokino

   --トキノの関所 - Tokino Checkpoint
West side checkpoint. The land westward is called the western region

   --狩人の家 - Hunter's House
Small home of a hunter who makes a living off of the prey he hunts

   --トカニク修道院 - Toccanic Monastery
Monastery standing in remote lands


--------------------On Map-------------------                        [Map32.07]
--トカニク修道院 - Toccanic Monastery - FIRST TIME - HIGH %
|
|--------------------|
|     ACQUISITION    |
|-Received Treasure!-|
|      Orihalcum     |
|--------------------|
|
| Priest:
| You are the ladies and gentlemen of Gram Blaze... I have been hearing rumors
|   of you for quite some time now.
| ...You've come to address the injustice of the checkpoint administrator? He
|   has been taking advantage commercializing the salt, you say...
| I see. You have been affected by the administrator's tyranny...
| ...I would like to give you this.
| It is an enigmatic crystal handed down from one priest to the next.
| ...Hm? There is no need for thanks. I've no strength to fight myself... The
|   least I can do is entrust this to ones who can.
|
|---FIRST TIME - LOW %
|
|--------------------|
|     ACQUISITION    |
|-Received Treasure!-|
|   Rosary of Hope   |
|--------------------|
|
|---AFTERWARD
| Priest:
| Those who have no power have no choice but to entrust their hopes to those
|   who do. They can do nothing but hope for stability.
| But what are we to do when those with power begin to disturb the order?
| Should we possibly acquire power ourselves?
| ...I myself cannot say.
-----

--狩人の家 - Hunter's House - FIRST TIME-------------------
|
|--------------------|
|     ACQUISITION    |
|-Received Treasure!-|
|  Trap -> Beastfang |
|--------------------|
|
| Hunter:
| ...Recently, even though I set up traps on the mountain, I have not caught
|   any game.
| My traps have been disappearing, and I'm sure that it's because someone's
|   been taking them... Could it be those rebel army bastards?
| Thanks to that my stock of traps has dwindled...
| It will be another month before a peddler stops by again... What am I
|   supposed to do if my stock is used up before then?
|
|--2ND PART + TRAP
|| ...Ah! You guys have a trap with you!
|| Do you mind giving it to me? Of course, I'm not saying just as is.
|| You're sure it's okay? Thanks! I want you to have this in return!
|| I cut it out of a huge beast that I caught. It should fetch a high price.
|-----
|
|---AFTERWARD
| Hunter:
| If you hold the fang I gave you earlier, a so called bestial nature will
|   reside within you.
| In exchange you will also gain the weaknesses that come with being a beast.
|   Make sure you are careful when using it.
-----


---------------------Loss--------------------                        [Map32.08]
Defeat - Out of Cards (1st)

While assaulting a checkpoint to expose an unfair administrator, Gram Blaze was 
scattered due to a flaw in tactics, and was forced to disband...

Defeat - Checkpoint Reached (2nd)----------------------

Pandra:
Alright! One side of the checkpoint is ours!
Everyone rush in together! Overwhelm Gram Blaze!

Garlot:
Damn, we didn't stop their momentum! Is there no way to fix this...

|    |
|    |              IMPEDIMENT FAILED
| /\ | The rebel army reached the western checkpoint!
|/  \|

Gram Blaze, clashing with the rebel army who moved to recover the ledgers, were 
unable to restrain Pandra's charge into the checkpoint, and their strategy 
ended in failure...


========================================================================[Map33]
帝都軍事演習
Flarewerk Military Exercise
Outskirts of the Capital - Arch of Triumph


--------------------Intro--------------------                        [Map33.01]
At the outskirts of the capital of Flarewerk, a large-scale military exercise, 
sponsored by the Emperor, was carried out.

It was called together under the pretext of gathering the regular army, nobles' 
armies, and independent defense groups in order to improve the quality of 
public security, but from Velleman and Nessiah's analysis its true purpose was 
to reveal any rebel elements.

The imperial decree, calling for the participation of Gram Blaze, reached Count 
Velleman as well. Anyone refusing this decree would be branded and judged as a 
traitor...

And so Garlot and the others left for Flarewerk to participate in the
exercises...


----------------Before Battle----------------                        [Map33.02]
Jenon:
That's the Empire's regular army, huh. Aside from Leon's border unit this is my
  first time seeing them up close.

Garlot:
That's a well arranged line. Nothing like how bandits are.

Velleman:
Look there, Garlot. That man leading the strongest steel knights in the Empire
  is General Baldus.

Baldus:
...............

Medoute:
That's Baldus, the God of War...... I've heard of him, but I've never seen him
  in person before.

Velleman:
For his long service supporting the imperial army he was given the name 'God of
  War'... He is the man at the peak of the army, so to speak.

Shiskia:
But he's really old too. Are you sure he can command the knights?

Velleman:
He worked his way up to his position crossing the battlefield and in constant
  battle. Do not take him lightly.

Medoute:
...Count Velleman. Do you think there's something more to these exercises?

Velleman:
Yes, I fear it is likely meant to gauge the power that nobles possess.
If we nobles have too much power it will make His Highness cautious.
It would be nice if we could score lower and Emperor Soltier did not need to be
  weary...

Garlot:
You mean if we held back? That depends on our enemy's ability and fighting
  style. It would be difficult in this case.

Velleman:
...Yes, that's true. With an opponent like the God of War...

Baldus:
These nobles' soldiers are to be our opponents... There is no chance that their
  training is on par with that of the steel knights.
Ah, Your Highness. Is everything proceeding as you wish?

Soltier:
Baldus. How are the nobles' soldiers looking?

Baldus:
If I could speak plainly, they are coming together.

Soltier:
How about Velleman's men? This Gram Blaze has been a cause of noise among the
  people.

--PLAYED BF 27 WITH BALDUS
| Baldus:
| I have crossed blades with that red haired young warrior once.
|
| Soltier:
| Ah, yes. They're the ones who beat you before.
|
| Baldus:
| With all due respect, that time was merely for entertainment. I did not use
|   my full strength.
|
|---HAVEN'T PLAYED BF 27 WITH BALDUS
| Baldus:
| ...That red haired young warrior is their captain, I believe.
| Compared with the others they appear to be slightly better.
|
| Soltier:
| But without actually fighting them you can't say how strong a group is. Am I
|   right, God of War?
|
| Baldus:
| ...As you say.
-----

Soltier:
Well, whatever. Draw out and gauge their real strength. Understood?

Baldus:
As you command.
Gram Blaze... That name is well known among the people. They are famed as a
  righteous army.
Maintaining order, cracking down on wrongdoers... I hear they take initiative
  and throw themselves into battles that we should normally be responsible for.
Knowing that they have still been summoned to these exercises...... I do not
  understand His Majesty's motives.

Lapis:
Your Highness... Is the true purpose of this exercise to reveal rebel elements?

Soltier:
That is one of the goals. The other is to gauge the strength of Gram Blaze
  who've been highly talked about.
Velleman as well, but I feel that in the near future it will be them who will
  stand in my way.

Lapis:
Your Highness......

Soltier:
Very well, begin the exercise. First up will be Velleman's army.

Garlot:
We're up first...! Velleman, as I said, holding back will be difficult.

Velleman:
It's fine, Garlot. Give it your all.

Garlot:
You sure, Velleman?

Velleman:
The God of War will be watching. If you hold back he will know.
More than anything I wish to see how you've grown.

Garlot:
You don't need to say anything. I'll show you, Velleman! Just don't fall over
  in shock!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Defeat the imperial army and show your strength!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
               Garlot dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Baldus:
...No, I will not face someone at the caliber of a noble's army.

Steel Knight Soldier:
Sir Baldus......

Baldus:
First battalion, advance. I will remain in the rear guard.
You should be able to scatter them yourselves. Ready?

Garlot:
What? The God of War isn't coming?


------------------Mid Battle-----------------                        [Map33.03]
Steel Army Knight:
...Are they really just a nobleman's army? They've had a considerable amount of
  training.

Garlot:
They're really strong. They won't be beaten by the usual means......

  -----------------------------------------------------
Steel Knight Soldier:
Sir Baldus...... My apologies, we must retreat!

|------------------|
|      RETREAT     |
|-Time to Regroup.-|
|------------------|

|    |
|    |            DRIVEN BACK THE ENEMY
| /\ | Victory versus the steel knight vanguard!!
|/  \|

Baldus:
Impossible! The steel knights that I personally brought up and trained have
  been beaten?
And the cause of it was my willingness to take a nobleman's pet army lightly...
A warrior should respond to any kind of battle directly and with valor. ...My
  conduct has been shameful.
Yet what a heroic private army, no a military force. A splendid army with the
  burning blood of warriors.

Garlot:
Huh? What's he mumbling about over there...?

Baldus:
Red haired youth!! I am Baldus! I'd like to ask what your name is.

Garlot:
I'm Gram Blaze's captain, Garlot.

Baldus:
Garlot, that's a fine name! Come, let us do battle!

Garlot:
Very passionate, God of War. I accept your challenge!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Crush the steel knight unit of Baldus, the God of War!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
               Garlot dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Soltier:
Time for the real battle. Lapis, how does it look to you?

Lapis:
...In experience, Baldus is superior.
In a group battle, the quality of tactics especially is clear in the results.
Currently I do not see that sort of thought process in Gram Blaze.

Soltier:
Looking at this theoretically your point is valid, Lapis.
However, Red...... I have a feeling that there is something more he can do.

  -----------------------------------------------------
Baldus:
Your attack is spirited. Not bad, Garlot!
I feel the sleeping warrior's blood within me burning again!!
However, you've yet to see the true meaning behind the steel knights. I,
  Baldus, will not be beaten easily...!

  -----------------------------------------------------
Baldus:
Both your attack and defense are splendid! I can see why the first battalion
  was beaten......
There are people like this outside the imperial soldiers...
Could His Majesty have known of this? Did he throw them at me due to that!?


-----------------After Battle----------------                        [Map33.04]
Baldus:
I have witnessed your valor. What marvelous power for ones so young...!
Treating you lightly on your appearance as a nobleman's army was my own
  mistake. You have my respect as a warrior.

Garlot:
Same here. I couldn't even feel your age in your movements.

Baldus:
I only ask that you not use that power for wrong.

Garlot:
Well of course. This power is for the people!

Baldus:
People...... Hm, such fine spirit.

|------------------|
|      RETREAT     |
|-Time to Regroup.-|
|------------------|

|    |
|    |          DRIVEN BACK THE ENEMY
| /\ | Victory versus Baldus, the God of War!!
|/  \|

Soltier:
It's over! The victory in this exercise goes to Gram Blaze!

Velleman:
Yes!

Garlot:
We did it, Medoute!

Medoute:
Yeah, we did......
(Even if it's just an exercise, we've beaten the God of War...
The way of society sees Gram Blaze will change. We won't be just a private army
  anymore...)

Garlot:
Hm? What's up, Medoute? Speak up, this isn't like you.

Medoute:
It's nothing. I just don't know how to say this......
I'm sure you know this, but before we met I was a traveler.
I had an interest in your struggle, and so I fought alongside you up until now.
And I ended up staying too long. I got too comfortable...... But it's about
  time I got going.

Garlot:
......You want to leave Gram Blaze? Is that what you're saying?

Medoute:
I don't mean right this moment.
But I... I am one who began my travels running away from various
  responsibilities.
When I think about them, I feel repulsed at taking up a new one.

Garlot:
......I see, okay. When that time comes tell me.

Medoute:
Thanks......
...Um, could you not tell Shiskia about this for a while?
If she tries to stop me I'm not sure I'll be able to stay firm. Shiskia's just
  too cute.

Garlot:
Hahaha, that's true. I got it, Medoute.

  -----------------------------------------------------
Baldus:
Your Majesty, I apologize for my disgrace...

Soltier:
I don't mind. It's over and done with. More importantly, tell me about Gram
  Blaze.

Baldus:
...First, their individual abilities are exceedingly high. The training they've
  had is at the level or higher than the regular army.

Soltier:
And Red?

Baldus:
He is called Garlot. He is a brave knight.
Again, he takes the lead, encouraging others, and exhibits considerable power.

Soltier:
Hm... Can they win in a real battle?

Baldus:
That would depend on the situation. Only, dealing with the steel knights with
  brute force is difficult.
If you were to tell us to defeat them we should be able to crush them with
  overwhelming force.

Soltier:
I see... That's all, leave us.

Baldus:
Your Highness, if I may, if they are planning to rebel, are you saying......

Lapis:
Baldus, His Majesty told you to leave.

Baldus:
As you wish.

Lapis:
The name of the God of War has been sullied. And while leading the steel knight
  elite as well......

Soltier:
Yet I had said so as well. There was only cavalry deployed this time.
And that if one realizes that, defeating them is not all that hard.
(But, what are you, Red? I can't help but think that you're still hiding your
  power...)
Lapis, look into Velleman. See what's happening behind closed doors. I'm sure
  there's something to find.
Then use that to set up a hearing and summon Velleman to the capital.

Lapis:
...I see. You want me to separate Velleman and Gram Blaze.

Soltier:
No, bring them together. We'll hold them at the capital for some time while we
  look into them.

Lapis:
......As you command.

Soltier:
It looks like no one aside from me notices Red's hidden power...
Now then, what's your next move, Velleman. And you too Red...


------------------Locations------------------                        [Map33.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
The main gate to the capital of Flarewerk. Military drills often take place
here


--------------------On Map-------------------                        [Map33.07]
--収容所跡地？ - Site of a Demolished Prison?
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|  Iron Shackles  |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| The ground here was arranged... Did there used to be something here?
| These are shackles meant to prevent prisoners from escaping... Then, was this
|   spot...?
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| Was there a building here? There are random things scattered around...
| ...Shackles. You can't run away wearing something like this...
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| According to the map looks like there used to be a prison here long ago.
| Are these shackles a relic of those days?
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| This atmosphere is heavy... Is there something strange about this plot of
|   land?
| Shackles with an iron ball... I bet there was a prison here.
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| What's this? I feel jittery...
| These are shackles... With these attached one cannot move their body.
|
|---NESSIAH
| Nessiah:
| Oh? Looks like something's fallen here...
| These are fetters. Attaching these sharply decreases mobility. Fufu...
|
|---ZILVA
| Zilva:
| ...Did there used to be a prison facility around here?
| Shackles, fetters... There are many items used in arrests scattered about.
|
|---EUDY
| Eudy:
| Something's on the ground here...
| Ah, these are fetters. With these on you can't run away.
| ...I'll take them with me.
-----

--処刑場跡地？ - Former Execution Site?----------------------
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|    Blindfold    |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| Hm? There's some kind of rag on the ground...
| ...Is it just a rag? It has a strangely repulsive air to it though...
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| Ah, something's fallen...
| It doesn't seem like anything out of the ordinary, so what's with this rag...
|   I feel nervous just holding it...
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| Oh? Something's fallen here.
| It looks like just a regular cloth... Does it have any use?
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| What's this, a rag is lying around.
| Is it just a typical rag...? It doesn't look like it for some reason.
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| Ah? There's something on the ground...
| A cloth. Did the wind blow it here?
|
|---NESSIAH
| Nessiah:
| Oho, this is... A cloth to cover the eyes of convicts.
| It is unnecessary for me. My eyes are already covered. Fufufu...
|
|---ZILVA
| Zilva:
| ...Mn. Something is tumbling around.
| A piece of cloth. It resembles a blindfold the Order used in torture.
|
|---EUDY
| Eudy:
| Hm? What's this, a cloth?
| ...Hahah, even better, it's a blindfold used when executing prisoners.
| ...Let's take it.
-----


---------------------Loss--------------------                        [Map33.08]
Defeat - Out of Cards (1st)

In the midst of the military exercise being held at the outskirts of the 
capital, Gram Blaze was scattered due to a flaw in tactics, and was
eliminated...

Defeat - Out of Cards (2nd)----------------------------

In the violent battle with Baldus, the God of War, Gram Blaze was scattered due 
to a flaw in tactics, and was eliminated...


========================================================================[Map34]
守るべきもの
The Ones to Protect
Outskirts of Tiera - Northern Highway


--------------------Intro--------------------                        [Map34.01]
Shortly after the military exercises at the capital, the Emperor's Imperial
Guard Leader, Lapis, came to Tiera leading troops.

She'd come saying that, on suspicion of rebellion, Count Velleman was to go
before Flarewerk's congress and explain himself.

Recognizing that refusal would justify the suspicion, Count Velleman decided to
obey the order and journey to the capital with his private army.

Yet, at that moment, a shadow of turbulence was approaching the Provincial City
Tiera......


----------------Before Battle----------------                        [Map34.02]
Shiskia:
Why do you have to bring Velleman in?

Garlot:
Is this because we beat Baldus?

Velleman:
Calm yourselves, this is not an arrest. It's a request to appear at a hearing.
I intend to go and prove my own innocence.

Nessiah:
That is correct. We have no reason to feel guilty. We will be able to return
  shortly.

Shiskia:
Then why are these guys here to guard us!?

Lapis:
Girl, speak out of line and I will not show mercy.
Defying me, the Imperial Guard Leader of His Highness, Emperor Soltier falls
  under treason.
Make enough of a fuss and I will judge you here and now!

Jenon:
Shiskia, we understand, but control yourself.

Shiskia:
Ugh, kh...

Velleman:
Lady Lapis, what will happen after we get to the capital?

Lapis:
That will be decided by the congress hearing.
If the charge clears you will be able to return. But if it doesn't... Well,
  please understand.

Velleman:
......Did His Majesty say anything?

Lapis:
He said he wishes to hear what you have to say. That is all.

Velleman:
I see......

Garlot:
Velleman... What should we do? If we were to make any move......

Velleman:
You mustn't move on your own, understand?
Don't worry Garlot...... I'm sure the Emperor will believe me.

Garlot:
......Alright.

Imperial Soldier:
L- Lady Lapis! Tiera is...!

Shiskia:
What about Tiera?

Lapis:
Quiet. This has nothing to do with you.

Shiskia:
Yes it does! If anything is happening with Tiera we've got to fight!

Nessiah:
It is faint, but I hear the sound of flaming arrows being fired.
An attack of this scale cannot be done by anyone other than the rebel army.

Aegina:
Tiera is being attacked? Is this true?

Lapis:
......There's no use hiding it anymore. That's right, the western section of
  Tiera, the Nesar District is under attack...

Garlot:
What!?

Lapis:
We've deployed guards on the Cattle Bridge.
The rebel army will not get into the Nibel District. You can depart without
  worry.

Shiskia:
You're only going to protect the nobles and merchants? What about everyone that
  lives in the Nesar District?

Lapis:
Many rebel soldiers have already made their way inside. It's too late for them.

Shiskia:
Garlot, let's go to the Nesar District. I'm sure we can still make it in time!

Lapis:
Wait! I will not allow that!! You are coming with me to the capital!

Garlot:
What are you saying! The rebel army is attacking the city. We can't just......

Lapis:
All troops! Disarm and arrest Gram Blaze! That is an order!!

Medoute:
Come at us if you want, we're ready as well!!

Velleman:
Everyone, listeeeen!!

Garlot:
......Velleman.

Velleman:
This is nothing short of a crisis for the Empire!

Lapis:
Crisis... for the Empire...?

Velleman:
You say that the insurgents cannot get into the Nibel District, but is that a
  sure fact?
More likely than not, the Nibel District will also fall into the hands of the
  insurgents!
The emergency food stores and wealth that the nobles and merchants have stocked
  are quite plentiful. And the insurgent force will gain all of it!
And the people struggling in poverty in the Nesar District will be taken into
  the rebel army.
And with Tiera in their hands the next target of the rebel army, with their
  abundance of funds and force of arms, is clear.
That's right, the Imperial Capital of Flarewerk!
I place the existence of the Empire above my own life......
Lady Lapis, if His Highness grants me death for my decisions here, I will
  accept!
Gram Blaze, move out! Go, Garlot!!

Garlot:
I accept your orders! Hear that everyone!

Lapis:
Th- this is Count Velleman......

  /--Victory--------------
 / Scatter and drive back all enemy forces!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
               Garlot dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

|---------------------|
|        AMBUSH       |
|-Unexpected Enemies!-|
|---------------------|

Inzaghi:
You've come, Gram Blaze! You're later than I expected.

Garlot:
It's that piece of trash who fights for money......

Inzaghi:
What's up, you in a bad mood today?

Garlot:
Get the hell out of our city! If you don't I'll cut you to pieces!!


-----------------After Battle----------------                        [Map34.04]
Inzaghi:
What's with you guys today...... Damn it......

|    |
|    |    THE EVIL FALLS BY ALL MEANS!
| /\ | Purged Inzaghi's mercenary squad!!
|/  \|

Garlot:
Trash, curse your own weakness!

Inzaghi:
H- hiii...... What's with their spirit......

|--------------------|
|     WITHDRAWAL     |
|-Forced to Retreat.-|
|--------------------|

Inzaghi:
H- hey, retreat! We're getting out of here!

  -----------------------------------------------------
Shiskia:
Garlot, should I send a scout?

Garlot:
We don't have time for that now. We march for the Nesar District as is!!

Velleman:
I've been waiting for you, Garlot. I am opening the gates to the city!

|---------------------------|
|        OPENING GATE       |
|-The Gate has been Opened!-|
|---------------------------|

Garlot:
Velleman, that speech you gave Lapis earlier was really worth listening to.

Velleman:
I merely had something I was passionate about.

Garlot:
What? What do you mean?

Velleman:
Hm...... It's frightening; how you've inspire me.
More importantly, hurry, Garlot. The Nesar District is going up in flames one
  building after another.
Even alone if you have to, rescue as many lives as you can!

Garlot:
Right.

Nessiah:
There is information confirming the presence of both Pandra and Leon.

Jenon:
It looks like this will be a trying battle.

Medoute:
Still, we've no choice but to fight......

--HAVE ZILVA
| Zilva:
| I fight to protect everyone......
-----

--HAVE EUDY
| Eudy:
| I should have brought the canon for this sort of situation.
-----


------------------Locations------------------                        [Map34.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
Trade road connecting Tiera and the capital. Directly next to it is the army
housing

   --グルメ館 - Gourmet's Residence
Mysterious residence where a young gourmet girl lives by herself

   --錬金術師の屋敷 - Alchemist's Estate
The estate where a man advocating for alchemy lives. The rumors of the place
are not good

   --飲んだくれ小屋 - Drunkard's Hut
Just as it sounds, the shanty hut where a drunkard lives

   --魔術師の家 - Magician's House
Isolated house where a magician who built up a wealth of knowledge lives


--------------------On Map-------------------                        [Map34.07]
--グルメ館 - Gourmet's Residence - NO BOTTLED DOZEU
| Gourmet Girl:
| Sigh. My palate for exotic foods has been drying up...
| ...I want to try a new menu with something that would satisfy my gourmet
|   wants.
| Should I pick some wild grasses and make an herb dish? Sigh, I don't know
|   what to do...
-----

--錬金術師の屋敷 - Alchemist's Estate - FIRST TIME------------
|
|---------------------|
|     ACQUISITION     |
| -Received Treasure!-|
|Weapon -> Blunt Sword|
|---------------------|
|
| Alchemist:
| ...Using this theory one should be able to rapidly increase the strength of
|   weapons... Mumble, mumble...
| All I need now is to prove it. Now about a sword to test it on...
| Mn? Aren't you soldiers!? You've got swords, don't you? Of course you do,
|   being soldiers and all!
| Oh! I knew you had one! Hm, this is a sharp sword...
| Allow me to borrow that sword for a moment. What? I won't do anything bad
|   with it.
| Now, let's begin at once...Do not be flustered; my theory is perfect. ...Here
|   I go!
| ...I- it's done... Success!
| With the strengthening technique from my perfect theory this sword has turned
|   into an even better one!
| Here, please accept it! The fruits of my alchemic power!
|
|---AFTERWARDS
| Alchemist:
| Wonderful......My long years of hardship, of study, have finally borne fruit!
| This is a glorious day!! I feel like raising a toast!
| Ten years spent completely devoted to study... I should now have
|   qualifications like that.
-----

--飲んだくれ小屋 - Drunkard's Hut - NOT SLEIP-----------------
| Drunkard:
| Uuugh... I drank so much today... Urk, hic!!
| I'm feeling sleepy... I wonder if I'll have some good dreams now...
| Hn? Who're you guys? Coming in here like you own the place...
| Nah, really, do whatever you want...
| Even drunk and hung over there are things I can't forget...
| Really it's best if I don't forget. But remembering is painful. I want to
|   forget. You've got things like that too, right? Right?
-----

--魔術師の家 - Magician's House - EUDY - FIRST TIME---------
|
|--------------------|
|     ACQUISITION    |
|-Received Treasure!-|
|    Alchemy Glass   |
|--------------------|
|
| Magician:
| Oh? That standard... Would you happen to be Gram Blaze? The rumors have
|   reached this far.
| Your aspirations cross mountains, and with a single raised voice roar through
|   the world... They speak with a force that would knock a bird down in
|   flight.
| And of course you are Gram Blaze's magician, Eudy...
| I have inquired much of you... Behind that ruthless smile lies madness.
|   ...Hmph, I myself find that well.
| ...Just as you adore firearms, I devote myself to research of spirit
|   expressing devices...
| If you put this on that madness of yours should be called on to increase all
|   the more.
| These are glasses I discovered by chance while investigating certain ancient
|   ruins.
| What, no need to be shy. I wish to see your efforts, pioneer of madness...
|
|---EUDY - AFTERWARDS
| Magician:
| If there are those who create there are those who use. This structure has not
|   changed at all from the time that people first began creating things...
| Those who create and those who use are driven onward by madness and
|   eventually crumble.
| I do not see this as a problem. Rather, with how much one hurries along in
|   madness... it is essential.
| And after the madness passes that which is made, which is used, it is all
|   beautiful...
| I wish to be touched by that beauty... That is my only wish.
|
|---NOT EUDY
| Magician:
| Oh? That standard... Would you happen to be Gram Blaze? The rumors have
|   reached this far.
| In any case, feel free to rest. Though there is not much here...
-----


---------------------Loss--------------------                        [Map34.08]
Defeat - Out of Cards (1st)

In the fight with Inzaghi, who moved to obstruct them, Gram Blaze was scattered
due to a flaw in tactics, and was forced to disband...


========================================================================[Map35]
ティエラ炎上
Tiera in Flames
Tiera - Nesar District


--------------------Intro--------------------                        [Map35.01]
At last, the rebel army gathered their courage and began a large scale invasion 
of Tiera.

It was a predicament Count Velleman and Nessiah had worried over for some time 
now.

Labeling the invasion as a crisis to the Empire, Count Velleman rejected the 
summons from the capital and instructed the private army to fight back.

In the burning city of Tiera, the curtain was rising on an all out clash 
between Gram Blaze and the rebel army......


----------------Before Battle----------------                        [Map35.02]
Aegina:
Aah, Tiera is burning......

--HAVE EUDY
| Eudy:
| It's like the world is ending. This is truly a sight that makes chills run
|   down one's back...
-----

--HAVE ZILVA
| Zilva:
| Ordinary citizens are being engulfed......
-----

Shiskia:
......What is ...this? What have the people of the Nesar District done to
  deserve this!?

Medoute:
They are the ever present innocent masses swallowed by the fires of war......

Garlot:
...............

Nessiah:
Captain, it does not seem as though the rebel army gains any benefit in
  destroying the Nesar District.
Their aim is to provoke us. They likely intend to settle things with us once
  and for all here.

Garlot:
Are you saying they set the city on fire just to lure us out!?
We'll vent our anger on them then!

Nessiah:
You will only be doing what they wish in that case.
When you fight emotionally your individual fighting power may rise, but the
  group's strength in battle falls 30 percent.
Mass battle consists of tactics, direction, and organized action. Please do not
  forget that.

Jenon:
As much as I hate to admit it, Nessiah's right.

Velleman:
Garlot, the priority right now is to rescue the citizens.
I will prepare the Nibel District to receive the refugees. You guide them.

Garlot:
......That's right. For a moment I let my anger control me and forgot myself.

Nessiah:
Well, that too is a good sign...

Garlot:
Hm? Did you say something?

Nessiah:
No, not at all.

Velleman:
...I leave this to you, Garlot.

Shiskia:
According to the people who got away, the refugees are gathered in the northern
  section.

Garlot:
Let's go! We'll smash the rebel army and open a path for the refugees!!

   /--Victory--------------
  / Secure a path for the refugees!!
 / (Move a unit to the northern section!)
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
               Garlot dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Rebel Army Soldier:
You're late, Gram Blaze.
This area is already under our control! The logistical advantage is ours!!

Garlot:
This is the city where I was born and raised. You've got no advantage here!

Rebel Army Soldier:
That's strange... Their marching is organized. Have they not lost their
  composure?


------------------Mid Battle-----------------                        [Map35.03]
|-----------------------|
|    KILLED IN ACTION   |
|-A Warrior has Fallen.-|
|-----------------------|

Rebel Army Soldier:
Ghah... N- no way...!

Garlot:
A path is now open! Let's get to the refugees!!

  -----------------------------------------------------
|    |
|    |            THIS LIFE TOO CAN BE SAVED
| /\ | Successfully rescued the Nesar District refugees!!
|/  \|

|----------------------------------|
|               RESCUE             |
|-Valiant Blade Delivers its Lord.-|
|----------------------------------|

Young Man:
Ah, it's Gram Blaze! Gram Blaze came to save us!!

Garlot:
The rebel vanguard has been exterminated. Escape before reinforcements arrive!

--SHISKIA IS ON THE MAP
| Shiskia:
| Everyone, get to the Cattle Bridge! They've prepared to receive you!!
|
| Young Man:
| We owe you, Shiskia...
-----

--JENON IS ON THE MAP
| Jenon:
| Don't panic! Stay calm and stay as far from burning buildings as you can when
|   moving.
-----

Young Woman:
My house burned down. But my baby's and my lives are alright.
As long as we are alive we can start over. We're grateful to you for saving us.
You are our pride!

Young Man:
Yes, hooray for Gram Blaze! Hooray for Garlot!

Young Woman:
Hooray for Gram Blaze! Hooray for Garlot!

Garlot:
Was that everyone? No one left behind?

Shiskia:
Yeah, we're good.

Medoute:
The people were praising Garlot and us...

Nessiah:
With this you have gained a kind of power that can change the world.

Garlot:
All troops, prepare for battle! Next up is exterminating the rebel army!

|-----------------|
|      SORTIE     |
|-Follow my Lead!-|
|-----------------|

Leon:
You're finally done accommodating for the refugees.
Now we can fight without reserve.
Pick up your spear, Red! Time to meet your death!!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Defeat the Black Knight unit led by Leon!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
               Garlot dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Rebel Army Soldier:
Master Pandra! Leon's unit has started preparing for battle!

Pandra:
Tch, he should have been moving out earlier. This is why it's hard to use guys
  with strange obsessions like him......

  -----------------------------------------------------
|    |
|    |    KEEP THE FORCE INTACT
| /\ | Superior to the rebel army!!
|/  \|

Leon:
The bastards! What worthless underlings...
No... I too am a worthless bastard.

Garlot:
Leon, you've lost! Drop your spear and surrender!!

Leon:
...Don't kid with me. I'm a warrior! You think I'm gonna get on my knees for
  anyone!?
The only time I'll get on my knees is at the moment of my death!
Even if my spear is broken, I'll fight on with my teeth! This is far from
  over!!

Pandra:
That bastard, Leon, that's it for him......
Well, whatever. I've got to give it to him for tiring them out.
Hey! All units advance to Cattle Bridge! We're storming into Tiera!
Those pathetic nobles' fortunes! Food! Booze! Women! Country! We, the rebel
  army, will take them all!

Rebel Army Soldier:
Yeah, Master Pandra! Where would we be without you!

|-------------------|
|         GO        |
|-Glory on the Way.-|
|-------------------|

Garlot:
Those guys...... They're no different from common thieves.

Leon:
Hey, Pandra!! I haven't lost yet! You're the leader, go back and boast at the
  fortress!!

Pandra:
I don't care in the slightest whether you've lost or not.
You're just a sacrificial pawn to lure Gram Blaze into the Nesar District and
  tire them out.
My goal was always the upper class Nibel District!

Leon:
.........!!

Pandra:
But I'm grateful to you Leon. For making the rebel army strong that is!

Garlot:
Are they planning to cross the Cattle Bridge!?

--JENON IS ON THE MAP
| Jenon:
| This can't... Right now the Nibel District would be in chaos with the Nesar
|   District residents......
| Pandra read that far ahead...?
-----

Garlot:
Like we'll let them!

Leon:
Wait, Garlot! You haven't settled things with me yet.

Garlot:
This isn't the time for this, don't you get it!

Leon:
...............

  /--Victory--------------
 / Defeat the rebel army's Pandra!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
               Garlot dies...  /
    Cattle Bridge is taken... /
   Use up all your cards...  /
       ---------------------/

Pandra:
After Tiera we'll be taking the country... We'll be busy from now on!!

Garlot:
Cut Pandra off! Don't let him cross the bridge!!

  -----------------------------------------------------
SHISKIA IS ON THE MAP

Shiskia:
Holding back someone heading for the bridge... It reminds me of that time with
  David...

Garlot:
Since then we've gained strength, wisdom, and honor.
We'll stop him for sure...... I won't let our past become meaningless.

Shiskia:
...Yeah, Garlot. We won't lose here!

  -----------------------------------------------------
PANDRA IS AT HALF MORALE

Pandra:
I sent Inzaghi to stop you, and Leon to divert and exhaust you, yet those tools
  had hardly any effect?

Garlot:
How can you call your subordinates tools!?

Pandra:
Hey, don't misunderstand, those two aren't subordinates.

  -----------------------------------------------------
Pandra:
What? No way...!
Shouldn't they have been exhausted after fighting Inzaghi and Leon!?

|    |
|    |           THE EVIL FALLS BY ALL MEANS!
| /\ | Don't let Pandra get away with burning the city!!
|/  \|

Garlot:
Pandra!! You who set the city on fire and hurt the people are not qualified to
  speak of rebellion!
I'm taking you prisoner! Don't move from there!!

Pandra:
E- eeeek!
...C- c- crap. These guys are bad news...!

Rebel Army Soldier:
What are you doing, Master Pandra!

Pandra:
E- eeeek---!!

Garlot:
He's using his subordinates as a shield to escape!

|------------------|
|      RETREAT     |
|-Time to Regroup.-|
|------------------|

Pandra:
...C- c- crap.

Garlot:
Wait, Pandra!!
Damn, he got away.
Damn it... How is using people struggling in poverty rebellion!

Leon:
It's just as you say, Red.

Garlot:
Leon...

Leon:
He... Pandra doesn't have the qualifications to lie that he's leading a
  rebellion.
Wielding words to intoxicate his subordinates, and then using them as pawns
  like that...
Defiant spirit, political power, food and clothing, women and liquor... He uses
  it all.

Garlot:
Why did you help someone like that?

Leon:
I don't know.
Maybe I was jealous of what you had, or maybe I wanted to wash away the
  humiliation of my loss. All I know is I hated you.
And at such a time I met him, borrowed soldiers, and made defeating you my
  life's goal.

Garlot:
...............

Leon:
Pick up your spear, Red. Let's settle this once and for all.

Garlot:
This fight is about you, then.

Leon:
That's right. Holding back is pointless. Let's go!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Bring the fated battle with Leon to an end!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
               Garlot dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Garlot:
Though, how will you fight with just one unit?

Leon:
I told you......So long as I have fangs I will fight to the bitter end.

Garlot:
I remember someone a lot like that.

Leon:
Hm?

Garlot:
Nothing, just talking to myself. I just thought that once again this fight
  can't be avoided.


-----------------After Battle----------------                        [Map35.04]
Leon:
Ugk...... W- well done......

|    |
|    |     WHAT BROUGHT FORTH THIS VICTORY?
| /\ | Victory versus Leon, the Black Knight!!
|/  \|

Garlot:
You too, as expected.

Leon:
...Red, I lost. But allow me beg for my life.

Garlot:
Huh?

  -----------------------------------------------------
Jenon:
If possible, tear down the buildings that aren't burning to prevent the fire
  from spreading!

Medoute:
It's possible that there are rebel army survivors remaining. Avoid moving
  around without anyone armed.

Leon:
...............

Garlot:
You said you wanted to beg for your life. But you can't go back to the rebel
  army.

Leon:
...I don't plan to go back to Pandra. But there's something I forgot at their
  base. I want to go back and get it.

Garlot:
Are you insane? If you go back you'll be killed.

Leon:
That's why I want to borrow your fastest horse. I want to get there before
  Pandra.

Garlot:
I can't believe you're that shameless.

Leon:
Please!! That thing is something I don't want to lose.
When I get it back I'll return and you can kill me. I promise.

Garlot:
Leon......
I get it. Take the horse called Haseo. Go.

|---------------------|
|      WITHDRAWAL     |
|-Escaped from Peril!-|
|---------------------|

Shiskia:
......You let him go?

Garlot:
Yeah.

Shiskia:
He's strong. If we end up fighting again......

Garlot:
I don't think it'll happen.
And besides, if it does happen I'll be happy to beat him up again.
But calling his little sister a thing... He's really quite rude.

Shiskia:
??


---------------------Vs.---------------------                        [Map35.05]
--Garlot vs. Leon
| Leon:
| The connection between us... My spear will bring an end to it today!!
|
| Garlot:
| That's fine with me, Leon! I too will fight with all my strength!!
|
|---VICTORY
| Garlot:
| Leon, this fight goes to me!!
|
| Leon:
| It's not over yet! Don't act cocky if that's all you've got!!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Leon:
| Your hits are lighter than I thought. Just that won't lead to a fatal
|   wound......
|
| Garlot:
| Leon's spear doesn't waver a bit. He really does intend to settle things
|   here.
-----

--Shiskia vs. Leon-------------------------------------
| Shiskia:
| Hey, were you waiting until everyone was evacuated?
|
| Leon:
| Red lets his trivial feelings dull his blade.
| I was merely waiting for the right time to settle things......
|
|---VICTORY
| Shiskia:
| Fighting isn't everything. Even you must know that, Leon!!
|
| Leon:
| Shut up! You and I are different!!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Shiskia:
| I can't lose here!
|
| Leon:
| I can see your fighting spirit, girl! You can keep going, right? Come on!
-----

--Jenon vs. Leon---------------------------------------
| Leon:
| Out of the way!! The one I want is Red!
|
| Jenon:
| And you think I'll let you pass because of that?
|
| Leon:
| In that case get ready to die and come on!
|
|---VICTORY
| Jenon:
| How could you do that to our city!!
|
| Leon:
| I knew nothing of the plan to use fire. But I will take all that anger!!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Leon:
| What's wrong! Is that all you've got?
|
| Jenon:
| This isn't over. I've still got power and wisdom remaining!!
-----

--Medoute vs. Leon-------------------------------------
| Medoute:
| So, this is your last stand, Mad Knight!
|
| Leon:
| I always fight as if it's my last stand! I'll smash up that large axe of
|   yours!!
|
|---VICTORY
| Leon:
| Really, your strength is quite something!!
|
| Medoute:
| You didn't just realize that, did you?
|
| Leon:
| Yeah, I knew. But I will fight on!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Leon:
| Hah! What's wrong!?
|
| Medoute:
| A moment's lapse could be fatal...... Get a hold of yourself, Medoute!!
-----

--Aegina vs. Leon--------------------------------------
| Aegina:
| I will not allow you to lay a finger on Master Garlot!!
|
| Leon:
| Sorry, but there's no way you could stop me.
|
|---VICTORY
| Leon:
| Tch!! Clever...... Attacking my weak points......
|
| Aegina:
| Lacking strength, that is how I fight!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Aegina:
| ...Not yet. I cannot lose!
-----

--Nessiah vs. Leon-------------------------------------
| Nessiah:
| This hellfire looks as if it could consume the heavens. Dear me, humans are
|   beyond redemption...
| Then again, one could say that humans that idolize murder are too beyond
|   redemption... Fufufu.
|
|---VICTORY
| Nessiah:
| You are disappointing. You raise battle on instinct, yet it is merely small
|   scale...
| You do not currently possess the capacity to move people.
|
| Leon:
| And why should I care!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Leon:
| Is that your real power? It doesn't seem so to me!
|
| Nessiah:
| Very insightful......
-----

--Zilva vs. Leon---------------------------------------
| Leon:
| Those are nice eyes; the eyes of a killer.
|
| Zilva:
| Silence, I am different now......
|
|---VICTORY
| Zilva:
| ...Those thoughts of yours when you face battle resemble mine. There is
|   nothing but battle in your eyes...
|
| Leon:
| And what are you trying to say about it?
|
| Zilva:
| It is lonely......
|
|---DEFEAT
-----

--Eudy vs. Leon----------------------------------------
| Eudy:
| You're itching for an all out fight, aren't you. ...I guess we have to get
|   ourselves fired up too.
|
| Leon:
| Get ready, mage!!
|
|---VICTORY
| Eudy:
| With a canon we would have stopped the rebel army much faster...
| Though setting off a cannon in your own town is bound to make someone mad...
|
|---DEFEAT
| Leon:
| Keep going, break them in one hit!
|
| Eudy:
| Agh, we're being pushed back. But we can't retreat either...
-----

--Garlot vs. Pandra------------------------------------
| Garlot:
| You think I'll let you pass! Pandra!!
|
| Pandra:
| You think you can stop me! It's useless; you've fallen into my trap!!
|
|---VICTORY
| Garlot:
| We'll protect Tiera to the end! You'll never take it!!
|
| Pandra:
| Damn! How do they still have strength left...!?
|
|---DEFEAT
| Pandra:
| There's no way for you to compete with our rested main force after facing
|   Inzaghi and Leon consecutively.
| You value your life, don't you? Beg for me to spear it, Red. If you do I
|   might let you go.
|
| Garlot:
| Who would beg anything of a man like you!
-----

--Shiskia vs. Pandra-----------------------------------
| Shiskia:
| What kind of coward are you! At least Leon faced us head on!!
|
| Pandra:
| Coward? What are you saying; this is strategy!
|
|---VICTORY
| Pandra:
| Damn. That bastard, Leon. If he'd stuck around longer this could have been
|   easy!
|
| Shiskia:
| We told you we'd stop you for sure!! We'll protect Tiera no matter what!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Shiskia:
| Kh!!
|
| Pandra:
| What's wrong? Aren't you gonna stop me?
| Hey, if you give up right now maybe I'll let you go.
|
| Shiskia:
| Shut up! I'll stop you no matter what!!
-----

--Jenon vs. Pandra-------------------------------------
| Jenon:
| The Nibel District is already full of the Nesar District people and is in
|   chaos...
| We can't let an armed group like the rebel army enter a place like that! They
|   must be stopped here!!
|
| Pandra:
| You can't, it's too late!!
|
|---VICTORY
| Pandra:
| Their fighting spirit still hasn't dropped? How could that be......
|
| Jenon:
| That's simple. It's because this is our city!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Pandra:
| You were Gram Blaze's strategist, right?
| This match ended the moment you couldn't read my plan. The loser ought to
|   leave!
|
| Jenon:
| Not yet...... I will protect everyone!! 
-----

--Medoute vs. Pandra-----------------------------------
| Medoute:
| What a cowardly act... Do you really think you can make history that way?
|
| Pandra:
| Yeah, I do. History's written by the victors. What the victor says becomes
|   justice.
|
| Medoute:
| Don't you dare speak of justice!!
|
|---VICTORY
| Pandra:
| Guaagh! How's she this strong!?
|
| Medoute:
| You misread things, Pandra.
| Having cast away Leon, your best force of strength, how could you possibly
|   defeat us?
|
|---DEFEAT
| Medoute:
| Damn......
|
| Pandra:
| What? Is that it?
-----

--Aegina vs. Pandra------------------------------------
| Aegina:
| Using powerless people as a shield... that is unforgivable!
|
| Pandra:
| I'm fine whether you forgive me or not. The ones with power swallow up the
|   ones without! That's the law of nature.
|
|---VICTORY
| Pandra:
| Kh...! How could...
|
| Aegina:
| The city of Tiera is the city all of us care about. That's why we'll protect
|   it with our lives!!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Pandra:
| We can win this!
|
| Aegina:
| Y- you will not get past......
-----

--Nessiah vs. Pandra-----------------------------------
| Nessiah:
| If you wish to gain control of the Nibel District you should make sure your
|   strategy is effective.
|
| Pandra:
| Are you saying there are flaws in my plan?
|
| Nessiah:
| You shall soon see the result yourself.
|
|---VICTORY
| Nessiah:
| Is that it then......
| After all, you would not even make a good pawn for me.
|
| Pandra:
| W- what was that......
|
|---DEFEAT
| Nessiah:
| In the end you push with force...... It shows your distorted pride as a
|   former military man.
| You have not turned completely to cunningness.
|
| Pandra:
| Save those lines for when you win against me!
-----

--Zilva vs. Pandra-------------------------------------
| Zilva:
| A fight to protect. This is the first time I fight for a thing like
|   that......
| I will stop this man!!
|
|---VICTORY
| Pandra:
| Ugh......
|
| Zilva:
| I see a path to victory......
|
|---DEFEAT
| Zilva:
| I did not evade the enemy's attack...
|
| Pandra:
| Today is my day!
|
| Zilva:
| I cannot lose. I must not...!
-----

--Eudy vs. Pandra--------------------------------------
| Pandra:
| Whoops, you here to get in my way?
|
| Eudy:
| I have no intention of calling you a coward or anything, but as you can see I
|   am quite attached to our group and this city.
|
|---VICTORY
| Eudy:
| It may be a poverty stricken townscape, but I've no hate for the Nesar
|   District.
| I may not like those without any money, but they are still better than those
|   who do not value money at all.
|
|---DEFEAT
-----

--Garlot vs. Leon--------------------------------------
| Leon:
| Red! Here I come!!
|
| Garlot:
| Come on, Leon!!
|
|---VICTORY
| Leon:
| Urk......
|
| Garlot:
| Is there no end to his stamina...?
|
|---DEFEAT
| Garlot:
| That Leon... It's like each time he attacks his strength grows......
|
| Leon:
| Excellent, Red! This is what a truly fierce battle should feel like! This is
|   when you feel most alive!!
-----

--Shiskia vs. Leon-------------------------------------
| Shiskia:
| You're fighting with just the one unit... Just what do you think you'll be
|   able to do!
|
| Leon:
| I want to settle things!
|
| Shiskia:
| What a tactless guy......
|
|---VICTORY
| Shiskia:
| H- he just keeps coming back...
|
|---DEFEAT
| Shiskia:
| Kyah......
|
| Leon:
| The one I want to fight now is Red! Those not involved should get out of the
|   way!!
-----

--Jenon vs. Leon---------------------------------------
| Jenon:
| No matter how much we defeat him, he keeps rising on willpower alone. It's
|   mad......
|
| Leon:
| Mad... Kukuku. As far as I'm concerned Mad Knight is my best nickname.
|
|---VICTORY
| Jenon:
| How about admitting that you've lost sometime soon?
|
| Leon:
| Sorry, I'll admit that I've lost only at the moment of my death!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Leon:
| Carve the strength of the Mad Knight on that body!
|
| Jenon:
| Just for a moment I had thought that even I could win......
-----

--Medoute vs. Leon-------------------------------------
| Medoute:
| I'll show my respect for that willpower of yours and show you my full
|   strength!!
|
|---VICTORY
| Medoute:
| What does your sister think of this?
|
| Leon:
| Elena...... That's none of your business!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Leon:
| That's all the power you've got? That's laughable!!
|
| Medoute:
| Leon's strong this time!
-----


------------------Locations------------------                        [Map35.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
A district in the western part of the provincial city Tiera, where the poor 
live huddled close together

   --北の区画 - Northern Section
The section where the refugees are gathered. Save them as soon as possible!

   --ショップマキナ - Makina Shop
Small shop in the Nesar District where a rare merchant conducts business

   --石組みの小屋 - Stone Hut
Residence of a wizard. His knowledge of items is abundant


--------------------On Map-------------------                        [Map35.07]
--石組みの小屋 - Stone Hut - NO ELEMENT/RUNE CRYSTAL - FIRST TIME
| Wizard:
| ...Damn, my experiment failed again! As I thought, without a pure element
|   it's useless...
| My stock of magical crystals has been used up too. Looks like this is it...
| ...Hm? Hurry and get to the Nibel District, you say?
| Don't be stupid. All the wisdom I spent half my life building up is gathered
|   in this room.
| The literature I scraped together, the raw materials, records of my
|   experiments' successes and failures. Every single thing is in here.
| What about the fire? Or the rebel army!? I've no fear of those things!!
| If you want me to escape bring me a pure element! If you can do that I'll
|   test it here and now...
| Hmph. The item I couldn't find despite my frantic searching. It's impossible.
| ...Leave. You've no need to feel responsible for my death. So leave.
| I will always be together with my dream. Even on the brink of death.
|
|---NO ELEMENT/RUNE CRYSTAL - AFTERWARDS
| Wizard:
| I will always be together with my dream. Even on the brink of death.
-----

ショップマキナ - Makina Shop----------------------------------

Shopkeeper:
Gram Blaze! I've always believed you'd come!
...Huh, hurry and get to safety? Sorry, but I can't do that.
There are still guys left in the southern section of the Nesar District who
  haven't managed to escape.
They need people to guide them who know the streets and alleys around here
  well! Right? That's where I come in!
Don't misunderstand me. I've no plans of losing my life here. I still have a
  girl I love, and drinks I want to drink!
You guys are holding the front lines. That's why I don't have to worry!

--路地裏 - Back Alley-------------------------------------
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|   Prank Sandal  |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| Hm? Something's on the ground...
| A toy sandal. I guess it fell out of someone's luggage when they ran.
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| Ah? Something's fallen...
| Isn't this a sandal that makes noise when you walk that used to be popular
|   long ago?
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| Oh, what's over here...
| It's a sandal. This is one that makes silly sounds, I believe.
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| Something's fallen...
| Footwear? It must have fallen out of a Nesar District resident's luggage when
|   they were fleeing...
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| Ah? This is...
| It's a sandal. For some reason the decorations on it look toy-like...
|
|---NESSIAH
| Nessiah:
| Oh? There is something here...
| This is a sandal... It must belong to a human of the Nesar District.
|
|---ZILVA
| Zilva:
| ...What is this?
| A sandal... It makes sounds with each step.
| It's... kind of cute. Hmhm...
|
|---EUDY
| Eudy:
| What is this?
| This sandal, isn't it a toy that used to be popular way long ago?
-----


---------------------Loss--------------------                        [Map35.08]
Defeat - Out of Cards (1st)

While making a path for the Nesar District refugees Gram Blaze was scattered 
due to a flaw in tactics, and was forced to disband...

Defeat - Garlot Defeated (2nd)-------------------------

In the fated showdown with the Black Knight Leon Gram Blaze's captain, Garlot, 
lost his life, and Gram Blaze vanished from history's stage...

Defeat - Bridge Taken (3rd)----------------------------

Pandra:
Too bad, Gram Blaze! I've taken that which you were supposed to protect!

Garlot:
Kh, Pandra!!

Pandra:
Howl all you want! Your food, your booze, your women, your country, I'm taking
  it all!!

Garlot:
...Damn it!!

|    |
|    |            IMPEDIMENT FAILED
| /\ | The rebel army has reached Cattle Bridge!
|/  \|

In the fierce fight with the Pandra led rebel army, the rebel army crossed 
Cattle Bridge and occupied Tiera taking possession of its wealth...

Defeat - Garlot Defeated (4th)-------------------------

In the life or death struggle with the Black Knight Leon who was full of 
determination, Gram Blaze's captain, Garlot, lost his life, and Gram Blaze 
vanished from history's stage...


========================================================================[Map36]
狂戦士の叫び
Mad Knight's Roar
Mount Tokino - Mountain Stronghold


--------------------Intro--------------------                        [Map36.01]
As Gram Blaze was assisting with Tiera's reconstruction an unexpected visitor 
appeared before them. It was the Black Knight Leon's younger sister, Elena.

Leon had gotten Elena out of the rebel army base, and together the two of them 
spied on the rebel army movements in secret.

According to the girl, it seemed the remnants of the rebel army were in the 
midst of gathering in the Mount Tokino stronghold.

In order to meet up with Leon who stayed to keep watch, and settle things with 
the rebel army, Gram Blaze hurried to Mount Tokino......


----------------Before Battle----------------                        [Map36.02]
Elena:
If you continue up this mountain path there's a fort.
Ever since brother joined the rebel army I've been under their protection here.

Medoute:
That's not protection; it's having a hostage to tie down Leon. That man is
  shrewd as always.

Garlot:
I see. Now I understand one of the reasons why Leon was used by the rebel army.

--PLAYED BF 16
| Shiskia:
| Huh? This is the place where the rebels' frontline base was......
| We should have dismantled it better the last time we were here.
-----

Elena:
That's strange. The plan was to meet up with brother around this area......

Nessiah:
We should take the worst case scenario into account. The rebel army may have
  already......

Elena:
!!

Jenon:
Nessiah! How can you say such a thing in front of Miss Elena!!

Nessiah:
Jenon, There is something I have been wanting to say to you.
You insert emotional arguments into your tactics. You cannot obtain the world
  that way.

Jenon:
What...... And how is that bad.

Garlot:
Enough, this is not the time to argue over such things.

Nessiah:
Yes, that's true.

Jenon:
...............

Elena:
I apologize, Sir Jenon. You were merely worrying about me.

Shiskia:
Garlot, the scout is back. It looks like Leon's been surrounded!

Elena:
Brother, is brother alright!?

Pandra:
Leon... You put a personal grudge above the plan during the invasion of Tiera
  and ran on your own judgment.
That is what led to our defeat. How about you pay for that now......

Leon:
You used me, made me fight, and now you're gonna pin the blame for your loss on
  me. Your talk is worthless, Pandra.

Pandra:
Shut it. You just can't die without getting the last word in, can you?
By the way, where did you send Elena off to? I wanted her.

Leon:
I'd never tell you bastard......

Pandra:
Oh well... All troops, take up your weapons! Execute Leon!!

Leon:
I'm fine with that, come at me. In the end a military man falls bravely!!
But come at me expecting to die. I'll be taking the lot of you with me.

Pandra:
Do it! The one who deals the killing blow to Leon will get 500 gold pieces!!

Medoute:
That man... Is he planning to die here?

Elena:
He can't be......

Shiskia:
Don't worry Elena. We're here, after all.

Garlot:
That's right. All troops, advance toward the mountain top! Rescue Leon!!

   /--Victory--------------
  / Rescue Leon's isolated unit!!
 / (Place a unit next to Leon!)
/----------------

   ----------------------Defeat--/
                Garlot dies...  /
            Leon is crushed... /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Leon:
The Emperor executed my parents, scared my forehead.
You've done nothing but use me...
Looking back I don't even know if I accomplished anything... Those days are
  empty.
But despite that... No, because of that! I fight, kill, as a warrior, and I'll
  die as a warrior too!!


------------------Mid Battle-----------------                        [Map36.03]
|----------------------------------|
|               RESCUE             |
|-Valiant Blade Delivers its Lord.-|
|----------------------------------|

|    |
|    |   THIS LIFE TOO CAN BE SAVED
| /\ | Successfully met up with Leon!!
|/  \|

Leon:
You! Why did you come here! Did you come to laugh at the way I die?

Garlot:
Don't hurry to your death, Leon! I came to tell you that!

Leon:
...Are you saying you're here to save me? Keh, I refuse. I've no desire to owe
  any debts.

Garlot:
And what will happen to Elena? She's lost her parents, how are you saying she
  should live having lost you too?

Leon:
...That doesn't concern me.

Garlot:
Don't act tough. If that was true why did you make her flee?

Leon:
......Damn, this is complicated. That's why I left her for you to take care of!

Garlot:
Enough already! Live for Elena's sake.

Leon:
What...?
Hey, shut it!

Pandra:
Hey, wait, Red. He's already decided to die.
So just let him die. And you can pull out your troops. Well? That way
  everyone's happy.

Leon:
You shut up, Pandra!!

Pandra:
Ngh......

Leon:
Garlot. No matter what you say, there's nothing for me but fighting. I can't
  live any other way.
...Take care of Elena for me.

Garlot:
My life used to be like yours, you know. I couldn't live without fighting.
Let's fight on. Elena will be with you, and so will we.

Leon:
...Wait, hang on.
I see, kukuku... That's right, fine.

Garlot:
Yeah.

Leon:
I see. You came to lend a hand and save me that way. You've got my thanks,
  Garlot.

Pandra:
W- what!? They're not supposed to come here to work together!!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Defeat the rebel army's Pandra!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
       Garlot or Leon dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Garlot:
Don't fall behind, Leon.

Leon:
I'm not listening to your arrogant talk......


-----------------After Battle----------------                        [Map36.04]
Pandra:
Damn iiiiit!! Money, power, prestige, womeeen!

|    |
|    | THE EVIL FALLS BY ALL MEANS!
| /\ |  Finally cornered Pandra!!
|/  \|

Garlot:
You've got nowhere to run this time, Pandra, I'm taking your life here!

Pandra:
...I won't let you kill me! I won't die in a place like this!

Leon:
Aren't you a former soldier? This is completely unmanly. Accept it already.

Pandra:
I will survive! Even if the God of Death raises his scythe I'll definitely find
  a way to survive......

Garlot:
And where are you gonna run? You're backed against a cliff. Give up.

Pandra:
I will liiiiiive!

|-------------------------|
|         RUN AWAY        |
|-Only I Should be Saved!-|
|-------------------------|

Leon:
Is he thinking of running down the cliff!?

Pandra:
Even if the chance is miniscule, I will always choose the way where I survive!!
Uaaaagh!!

  -----------------------------------------------------
Shiskia:
It's no use...... We couldn't find Pandra.

Medoute:
Either he escaped or he miscalculated and died on the way.

Leon:
To the end I still don't know whether he had any guts or not.

Elena:
Brother!

Leon:
......Elena.

Garlot:
This stage is over with.

Nessiah:
Now all that's left is to see if Count Velleman will be punished......
There is no replacement for refusing summons to the capital.

Shiskia:
But it would be nice if our dealing with the rebel army this time canceled it
  out...

Jenon:
Huh, that's unusual. Shiskia's worried about the Count.

Shiskia:
Huh... No, that wasn't what I meant.

Garlot:
Our first priority is rebuilding Tiera. The rest we'll have to speak to
  Velleman about.

Jenon:
It'll be difficult from now on to take missions fighting everywhere.

Shiskia:
...Huh, really. I wonder what will happen to us. The future got hard to see all
  of the sudden.
But you know, back before when we were the Blazing Outlaws we'd only be running
  around Tiera......
We've gotten quite famous.

Medoute:
Yes, you've gained strength. ...The time really has come.

Shiskia:
Hm? What was that?

Medoute:
...It's nothing.

Garlot:
...............
Anyway, there's no point starting any discussions right now.
Let's get back to Tiera.

--HAVE ZILVA
| Zilva:
| Um... Captain... There's something I wanted to talk about. Can you spare me a
|   few minutes?
|
| Garlot:
| Huh? Sure, what is it?
|
| Zilva:
| ...............
| ...The Divine Order movements have been worrying me a little.
| Ever since I left my contact with them has suddenly stopped. ...I cannot
|   understand the reason for this.
|
| Aegina:
| That's true, they even know the location of the army housing... That is
|   strange.
|
| Garlot:
| Maybe they don't have any more force of arms left?
|
| Zilva:
| That is not likely......
-----


---------------------Vs.---------------------                        [Map36.05]
--Garlot vs. Pandra
| Pandra:
| You! It's not fair joining forces like that!!
|
| Garlot:
| Like you have any room to talk about fairness. I can't believe you!
|
|---VICTORY
| Garlot:
| Pandra! You've unfairly incited rebellion, burned Tiera, and made people
|   suffer!
| I'll make you pay for those crimes!
|
| Pandra:
| Damn it!! Complain all you want!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Pandra:
| Huh, what? We can win!?
| Alright, the enemy's exhausted! Use that to our advantage!!
-----

--Shiskia vs. Pandra-----------------------------------
| Shiskia:
| Give up already!
|
| Pandra:
| Shut up! You've got to be kidding me! I don't give up easily!!
|
|---VICTORY
| Shiskia:
| You've got nowhere to run!!
|
| Pandra:
| Damn! It's not over, there has to be a way for me to be saved......
|
|---DEFEAT
| Pandra:
| What? The resistance is less than I thought?
|
| Shiskia:
| You don't have to say it!!
-----

--Jenon vs. Pandra-------------------------------------
| Pandra:
| Hey! You, join me!!
| Since Nessiah joined your position as the strategist has been in danger,
|   right? Well? You'll meet a nice girl!
|
| Jenon:
| ...............
| I have nothing to say to you.
|
|---VICTORY
| Jenon:
| How about you give up sometime soon? Tell your subordinates to surrender.
|
| Pandra:
| They're all nothing but sacrificial pawns for my escape! You can't make me
|   surrender!!
|
|---DEFEAT
-----

--Medoute vs. Pandra-----------------------------------
| Medoute:
| Surrender or prepare to die.
|
| Pandra:
| I refuse to surrender or die in battle! I will live! Definitely!!
|
|---VICTORY
| Medoute:
| Are you ready to die?
|
| Pandra:
| Hey, wait! Please! Let me go!!
|
| Medoute:
| I've no reason to let you go. If you don't want to die, surrender.
|
| Pandra:
| If I'm caught I'll just be executed. Surrender is just as impossible of a
|   choice for me......
|
|---DEFEAT
-----

--Aegina vs. Pandra------------------------------------
| Aegina:
| Accept and pay for your crimes!
|
| Pandra:
| I haven't done anything that I'd need to pay for!!
|
|---VICTORY
| Aegina:
| Next time I will bring you down!!
|
|---DEFEAT
-----

--Nessiah vs. Pandra-----------------------------------
| Nessiah:
| The end has already come for you.
| Soon the curtain will fall. At the very least please chose the manner of your
|   death.
|
| Pandra:
| You bastard, I ain't dying yet!!
|
|---VICTORY
| Nessiah:
| I must thank you.
| You were active enough of a target to allow him to grow.
|
| Pandra:
| W- what are you talking about......
|
|---DEFEAT
| Nessiah:
| ...Your struggling is pointless.
|
| Pandra:
| We'll see at the end if it was pointless or not!!
-----

--Leon vs. Pandra--------------------------------------
| Leon:
| I'm fine with you taking my life. But, you know, I'll be taking yours as
|   well!!
|
| Pandra:
| Wait, Leon. Let's talk this over!!
| How about I lend you more soldiers and we defeat red together!
|
| Leon:
| Pandra, today is the day of your death. I'll let you talk until you've had
|   your fill.
|
|---VICTORY
| Pandra:
| Leon! You traitor!!
|
| Leon:
| Tch, what a worthless bastard......
|
|---DEFEAT
| Leon:
| Huh, not bad... Have you remembered your days as a soldier?
|
| Pandra:
| I hit Leon back! I did, hahaha!!
| What, we can do it, huh!?
-----

--Zilva vs. Pandra-------------------------------------
| Zilva:
| There is no way out. Prepare.
|
| Pandra:
| It's not over yet! I can't give up!!
|
|---VICTORY
| Zilva:
| It is only a matter of time before you fall.
|
| Pandra:
| Way out, way out! Where's the way out......
|
|---DEFEAT
| Zilva:
| The enemy has not yet collapsed......
|
| Pandra:
| Is there really no way out...? Think, Pandra!
-----

--Eudy vs. Pandra--------------------------------------
| Eudy:
| Aah, would it have been better to bring a canon? This would have been over
|   with a single bang......
|
|---VICTORY
| Eudy:
| Ah, this is more than enough. We can win without a canon.
|
| Pandra:
| Say whatever you want!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Pandra:
| Yes, we can still push them back!!
|
| Eudy:
| The soldiers' exhaustion is something else.  Is it because of the fast paced
|   march?
-----


------------------Locations------------------                        [Map36.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
Steep mountain towering over the eastern end of the western area

   --東砦 - Eastern Fortress
One of the stronghold's frontline fortresses. Made to work with the western 
fortress

   --西砦 - Western Fortress
One of the stronghold's frontline fortresses. Made to work with the eastern 
fortress

   --トキノ中央砦 - Tokino Central Fortress
Fortress located in the center of the stronghold. Has more defensive force than 
to the two at the front

   --大要塞パンドラ - Grand Pandra Fortress
A fortress carrying the name of the rebel army commander. A somewhat upgraded 
version


--------------------On Map-------------------                        [Map36.07]
--西砦 - Western Fortress
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|   7 Star Sword  |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| Hm? This looks like an armory... The lock on the door is open. Should we look
|   inside?
| What's this sword... It feels special unlike the rest.
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| Ah? This is an armory. It's unlocked.
| ...What a gorgeous sword. Is this what they call a prized sword?
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| Oh, the lock on this door is opened. Let's look inside...
| This is... This sword's appearance is sublime.
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| This looks like an armory. It's unlocked too; let's peek inside.
| ...The best I found is this prized sword. We'll see if one of the sword users
|   can use it.
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| This is a stern door... What is this room for?
| Wow... This sword's appearance is quite divine.
|
|---NESSIAH
| Nessiah:
| Oh? This armory seems to be unlocked.
| Hoho, this sword... I see. Fufu...
|
|---LEON
| Leon:
| Eh? This fort is deserted.
| Even the lot guarding the armory fled. The rebel army has hit bottom, huh.
| But the weapons they left behind are blameless. Oh well, we'll take them.
|
|---ZILVA
| Zilva:
| The lock is confirmed damaged. We will infiltrate from here.
| I've confirmed numerous weapons. Proceeding to retrieve the one of most use.
|
|---EUDY
| Eudy:
| ...Ah? This armory appears to be unlocked.
| That's careless. They've got no room to complain if a burglar breaks
|   in. ...Hm, pardon me.
| ...Nothing relating to firearms, huh. And out of the weapons this prized
|   sword seems to be the best quality-wise.
-----

--トキノ中央砦 - Tokino Central Fortress---------------------
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|    Mana Stone   |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| The luggage is being grouped together. Was it carried out of the fortress...
| Hm? Something's shining...
| A gem? No, it's not. I feel an unusually strong power from this pebble.
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| That's a lot of wagons... Are they planning to run from this fortress?
| ...Wow. It's a jewel. Astonishing of a rebel army that touts its justice so
|   much...
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| There's luggage gathered outside the fort... I suppose they're vacating this
|   place.
| Oh, what an unusual gem. What was it called...?
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| This mountain of luggage... I suppose they're abandoning this fort...
| ...Mn. This is a Mana Stone, right?
| How rare. This is the first time I've actually seen one.
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| Why is there a mountain of luggage? Were they sweeping?
| ...What is this gem? Not only is it pretty, I feel a power from it.
|
|---NESSIAH
| Nessiah:
| ...I feel a strong pulse of magical energy. Is it coming from this mass of
|   luggage?
| This jewel, the Mana Stone, is the origin. Fufufu...
|
|---LEON:
| All these wagons... I suppose having gotten rid of me they planned on
