|   running.
| Hm? It's a gem.
| I've no interest in gems, but if I can lighten Pandra's pockets taking it
|   will amuse me.
|
|---ZILVA
| Zilva:
| This mountain of luggage... I believe they are planning to abandon this
|   fortress and escape.
| ...A jewel. It seems expensive; something about it is different from an
|   ordinary stone.
|
|---EUDY
| Eudy:
| Ah, this is a lot of luggage... They must have turned over the entire
|   fortress. It's like they're on the brink of fleeing in the night.
| ...Hm? This jewel, is it...?
-----

--東砦 - Eastern Fortress--------------------------------
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|  Elegant Spear  |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| Hey, there's an armory.
| I wonder if there's anything useful. Let's see...
| ...What a gaudy spear. Is it usable?
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| Ah, there's an armory at this fort. Is there anything inside?
| I found a strangely extravagant spear... Would Garlot use it?
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| Oh, it's an armory.
| Weapons are to be secured in enemy territory. Let's look around for a bit.
| A gaudy spear. I guess I'll take it.
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| Is there an armory at this fortress?
| We might find a good weapon. Let's look around for a bit.
| ...What a gaudy spear. I suppose we'll take it.
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| I see there's an armory here. I wonder if there are any useful weapons.
| It's a spear... I might not be able to use it, but let's take it.
| ...It's awfully extravagant though...
|
|---NESSIAH
| Nessiah:
| This is an armory. It would be nice if there were anything useful inside...
| Oh, it's a spear. The captain should be able to use it.
|
|---LEON
| Leon:
| That bastard Pandra. I know he stashed away weapons in this fortress...
| Oh, here they are. It's disgustingly fancy, but this spear is nice and sharp.
|   We'll use it.
|
|---ZILVA
| Zilva:
| ...An armory. We may be able to find useful weapons.
| There is a spear. Will the captain be able to use it?
|
|---EUDY
| Eudy:
| Ah, it's an armory.
| It's probably full of nothing but useless weapons, but let's look around just
|   in case.
| This is an expensive looking spear. Though, would it be useful in battle?
-----


---------------------Loss--------------------                        [Map36.08]
Defeat - Leon Defeated (1st)

|-----------------------|
|    KILLED IN ACTION   |
|-A Warrior has Fallen.-|
|-----------------------|

Leon:
Guaaah! How could I... In a place like this...!?

|    |
|    |              RESCUE FAILED
| /\ | Leon is exhausted by the rebel army assault!
|/  \|

In the battle with Pandra lying to purge Leon, Leon's life was lost. The Gram 
Blaze, crushed one by one, was annihilated...

Defeat - Leon Defeated (2nd)---------------------------

While picking a fight with Pandra together with Leon, Leon's life was lost. The 
Gram Blaze, crushed one by one, was annihilated...


========================================================================[Map37]
歴史は夜、動く
History Waivers in the Night
Tiera - Nibel District


--------------------Intro--------------------                        [Map37.01]
The private army hurried to Mount Tokino and saved Leon from being purged.

Pandra, being at a disadvantage, abandoned his troops and withdrew from the 
battlefield. Whether he lived or died remains unknown, but the rebel army 
collapsed then and there.

Once Garlot returned to Tiera he was given new orders.

He was instructed to guard the mansion while Velleman conducted a top secret 
meeting with a certain character.

As the anxiety ran high, helped by the scrutiny from the capital, a turbulent 
shadow ran through Tiera......


----------------Before Battle----------------                        [Map37.02]
Jenon:
You know, the rebel army came and attacked us this time, but......
I expected the Nibel District guys to refuse the refugees, but they accepted
  them without any trouble.
I honestly didn't see that coming.

Garlot:
Yeah, Velleman's a really good mediator......
But the Nibel District guys have started to change as well.

Jenon:
The rift between the Nibel District and the Nesar District has shrunk, you
  mean?
If that's true I'm glad.

Shiskia:
Could it be that the results of our fighting are starting to show......
I'm happy when I think about that, but honestly I don't really have much of a
  feeling about it.

Garlot:
Up until now we've been desperately rushing ahead. We hadn't had a chance to
  look back...

Aegina:
When you rush desperately, the faster you go the more brittle your feelings
  become, and your spirit breaks easily......

--HAVE EUDY
| Eudy:
| I can understand that. A canon is the same; if you shoot it continuously the
|   barrel becomes useless.
-----

Aegina:
But we've rushed this far without anyone breaking. To me that is a thing worth
  being proud of.

Shiskia:
I see, our fight's become a little for everyone's sake...
But you know, there's no way any of us could have made it this far alone.

Jenon:
That's right, everyone here supported each other.

Garlot:
But our work isn't over yet. From now on we'll be even busier.

Shiskia:
That's it in a word. Everyone, keep watching out for each other just as you
  have been!

Medoute:
...............

Leon:
Hey, Garlot. While you've been chatting away I've felt a sense of danger
  prickling at my skin.

--HAVE ZILVA
| Zilva:
| You're right... There is a concealed bloodlust. The presence of an
|   assassin......
-----

Garlot:
Can you tell how many or where from?

Leon:
How could I know something like that!

--HAVE ZILVA
| Zilva:
| I believe there are considerable numbers. They seem to be scattered as well.
-----

Jenon:
Garlot, why not split up into two units, one to search for the enemy and the
  other to continue keeping watch?

Nessiah:
Focus overly on protection and your defense will crumble, focus overly on
  searching and you leave yourself open to enemy attacks. That is a good idea,
  Jenon.

Garlot:
Alright, some of us will go search the surroundings, the rest will defend the
  mansion. Got that?

  /--Victory--------------
 / Don't neglect defending Velleman's mansion!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
               Garlot dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Garlot:
The enemy should be hiding somewhere around here. Don't let your guard down!


------------------Mid Battle-----------------                        [Map37.03]
|------------------------------|
|            ASSAULT           |
|-An Elite Battalion Appeared!-|
|------------------------------|

Assassin:
...............

Garlot:
They're here! They're the enemy!?

|    |
|    |            THE MISSION CONTINUES ON
| /\ | Crush the assassins approaching the mansion!!
|/  \|

Garlot:
No, wait; they could just be a diversion.
Keep some soldiers posted at the mansion while subduing all those that have
  shown themselves!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Prevent the assassins from invading the mansion!!
/----------------

             ----------------------Defeat--/
                          Garlot dies...  /
The enemy reaches Velleman's mansion...  /
              Use up all your cards...  /
                  ---------------------/

...............

  -----------------------------------------------------

Assassin:
...Failure.

|-----------------------|
|    KILLED IN ACTION   |

|-----------------------|

--NO ENEMY UNITS REMAINING

| These guys... They're well trained assassins.
| It doesn't seem like that's all of them. They must be sneaking around
|   somewhere else as well......
-----

  -----------------------------------------------------
|------------------------------|
|            ASSAULT           |
|-An Elite Battalion Appeared!-|
|------------------------------|

Assassin:
......Continue.

|    |
|    |            THE MISSION CONTINUES ON
| /\ | Crush the assassins approaching the mansion!!
|/  \|

Garlot:
Over here this time!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Protect the mansion from the assassins!!
/----------------

             ----------------------Defeat--/
                          Garlot dies...  /
The enemy reaches Velleman's mansion...  /

                  ---------------------/

Assassin:
...............

Garlot:
Getting moved around too much would be trouble. Strike only when they're in

  -----------------------------------------------------
UNDINE CLASS UNITS DEFEATED

Assassin:
Ugh......

|-----------------------|
|    KILLED IN ACTION   |
|-A Warrior has Fallen.-|
|-----------------------|

--NO ENEMY UNITS REMAINING
| Garlot:
| We beat them......
| And yet I still feel a presence remaining.
-----

  -----------------------------------------------------
|------------------------------|
|            ASSAULT           |
|-An Elite Battalion Appeared!-|
|------------------------------|

Assassin:
...............

Garlot:
Damn, they got this close without me realizing!

|    |
|    |            THE MISSION CONTINUES ON
| /\ | Drive back the assassins approaching the mansion!!
|/  \|

  /--Victory--------------
 / Clean up the assassin group!!
/----------------

             ----------------------Defeat--/
                          Garlot dies...  /
The enemy reaches Velleman's mansion...  /
              Use up all your cards...  /
                  ---------------------/

Garlot:
I bet they're the main force! Use everything you've got and drive them back!!

  -----------------------------------------------------
NECROMANCER CLASS UNITS DEFEATED

Assassin:
......Death to evil.

|-----------------------|
|    KILLED IN ACTION   |
|-A Warrior has Fallen.-|
|-----------------------|


-----------------After Battle----------------                        [Map37.04]
|    |
|    |        DRIVEN BACK THE ENEMY
| /\ | Successfully eradicated the assassins!!
|/  \|

Garlot:
The presence is gone...... Looks like that's all of them.

  -----------------------------------------------------
Velleman:
Good work. The meeting ended without incident.
Though it seems like there was some trouble out here......

Garlot:
A group of assassins attacked. They were organized too.

Velleman:
I see. One really can't say that things have gotten easier.

Garlot:
Velleman, about this current situation, can you tell us who you were meeting
  with?

--A ROUTE - 会談は各地の...
| Velleman:
| This meeting had representatives of the people from all regions of the
|   Empire.
| They were proposing forming an alliance against the Empire.
|
| Garlot:
| They're planning to start a rebellion?
|
| Velleman:
| Within the country's structure there are many who sympathize with rebellion.
|   Their strength is not like Pandra's though.
| That's right, this is about revolution.
| These are simply the people who did not agree with Pandra.
|
| Nessiah:
| Of course not. With such methods as his......
|
| Velleman:
| And a proposal came up to make Garlot the supreme commander of the
|   revolutionary army.
|
| Garlot:
| Me? Supreme commander!?
|
| Shiskia:
| Wow, Garlot!? Commanding a revolutionary army that surpasses Pandra's group?
| With us at the core that nasty emperor doesn't stand a chance!
|
| Garlot:
| Me......
|
|---B ROUTE - 会談の相手は...
| Velleman:
| The meeting was with an emissary of the Empire.
| It looks like the peace in the western region we thought we finished with is
|   deteriorating again.
|
| Nessiah:
| I suppose the former rebel army soldiers, having lost Pandra, have turned
|   into a mob.
|
| Velleman:
| It is unknown whether Pandra is dead or alive. It may very well be him using
|   this situation as a chance to return to power.
|
| Shiskia:
| Him again? Aagh, well, you can't say it's not either.
|
| Velleman:
| Gram Blaze has been issued an order to restore the peace.
| Concurrently, it is no longer necessary to attend a hearing.
|
| Shiskia:
| Ah, that's great.
|
| Velleman:
| I will use this as an opportunity. I want to go around the various cities in
|   the west and build connections with the influential people there.
|
| Jenon:
| While quelling rebellion in those areas, you mean.
|
| Velleman:
| That's right. As always Gram Blaze will accompany me as an escort.
| I'm counting on you, Garlot.
|
| Garlot:
| Okay, we'll return to the army housing and prepare for the journey at once.
|
|---C ROUTE - この話は...
| Velleman:
| I would like for you to keep what I'm about to say quiet. His Highness
|   Emperor Soltier has fallen ill.
| It is a life-threatening illness.
|
| Garlot:
| What, the Emperor?
|
| Velleman:
| For generations the Emperors of Bronquia have carried out a contract with the
|   demonic dragon Brongaa and governed the country in the name of its power.
| His highness's illness is a side effect of that contract.
| The uncertainty of our rejecting the hearing summons is one cause of the
|   deterioration of the Emperor's condition.
|
| Shiskia:
| That nasty Emperor is the one behind all the misgovernment, right? This has
|   to be divine retribution.
|
| Nessiah:
| This is a big problem. His Highness, the Emperor has not yet had an heir.
|
| Medoute:
| It's obvious that officials with an eye on their own interests will start
|   disputing over succession.
|
| Velleman:
| If another Pandra emerges from that, we will certainly see civil war. Our
|   country will fall into turmoil.
| We must prevent His Highness from dying of illness at all costs. And those
|   are the wishes of the capital as well.
|
| Nessiah:
| Yet, if this illness is entwined with the demon dragon a doctor will not be
|   able to cure it.
| We'll need a priestess or shaman with knowledge of the contract and of
|   techniques.
|
| Mysterious Woman:
| That would be why I was called here.
| Nice to meet you, members of Gram Blaze, and of course Captain Garlot.
|
| Garlot:
| ...............
|
| Mysterious Woman:
| I have heard rumors of you all.
|
| Shiskia:
| ......And you are?
| 
| Velleman:
| This is Lady Beatrine. She has been studying the demon dragon in the far
|   eastern lands of Lost Aries.
|
| Medoute:
| In Lost Aries......
|
| Velleman:
| I would like to introduce her at the capital as a healer for the Emperor.
| As always I'm counting on you to escort us on our journey there.
|
| Garlot:
| ......Yeah, okay.
|
| Beatrine:
| I am pleased to be working with you.
|
| Garlot:
| (I have this feeling like I've met her somewhere before......)
-----


------------------Locations------------------                        [Map37.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
District in the eastern section of Tiera where the wealthy live

   --ウェルマン邸 - Velleman's Mansion (x3)
The assassins invading here means failure... Be sure this point is obstructed!

   --豪奢な屋敷 - Luxurious Residence
A conspicuously large residence in the already extravagant Nibel district

   --東仮設街区 - Eastern Provisional Block
Provisional block offered to the residents of the burned down Nesar District

   --西仮設街区 - Western Provisional Block
Provisional block offered to the residents of the burned down Nesar District


--------------------On Map-------------------                        [Map37.07]
--西仮設街区 - Western Provisional Block - FIRST TIME
|
|----------------------------------|
|            ACQUISITION           |
|       -Received Treasure!-       |
|Commemorative Coins -> Snipe Glass|
|----------------------------------|
|
| Shopkeeper:
| Yo, Gram Blaze! It's me, from Makina shop!
| ...Hm? I don't look like it?
| Ha ha ha, that's for sure! A shopkeeper without a shop is like a crab without
|   a shell!
| ...What, don't worry about it! I can start a business even without a shop or
|   possessions!
| What, you don't believe me? Alright then! I'll show you my merchant's spirit!
| Ah, you guys have commemorative coins! Okay, we'll barter with those!
| ...Hm, with that many coins, maybe... Yeah, this should be even.
| I may be the one selling it to you, but trust me, it'll be useful!
| Now, keep doing your best Gram Blaze!
|
|---AFTERWARDS
| Shopkeeper:
| I hated the Nibel District guys, but I realized that if we talk to each other
|   we can understand each other.
| That's why I'm waiting to see if I'll be allowed to build another branch of
|   the Makina Shop in the Nibel District.
| Ah, you think they distrust me? No way, come on.
-----

--東仮設街区 - Eastern Provisional Block - FIRST TIME-------
|
|--------------------|
|     ACQUISITION    |
|-Received Treasure!-|
| Flute of Deception |
|--------------------|
|
| Nesar District Resident:
| Gram Blaze! I didn't get to tell you just how grateful I am last time...
| I was really afraid that we would die. Thank you so much.
| ...I know this isn't much, but will you accept it?
| I found it in a store room while getting ready to flee.
| I don't know if it'll be useful, but it should have at least some value...
|
|---AFTERWARDS
| Nesar District Resident:
| At first I really hated the idea of taking refuge in the Nibel District.
| I thought I'd rather sleep outside than living with these awful people.
| But... There's a surprising number of good people here, I was shocked.
|   Prejudice really is scary...
| I've heard they're even helping rebuild the Nesar District...
| When you cooperate you can do anything... That really is something amazing.
-----

--ウェルマン邸脇 - Beside Velleman's Mansion------------------
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|  Kiss of Death  |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| ...What's this? I feel a chill run down my back all of the sudden...
| A tactics card. Why is it in a place like this?
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| ...It's gotten chilly all of the sudden. What's up?
| Ah, isn't this a tactics card? Why is it lying around by Velleman's mansion?
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| Oh... What's this feeling? I suddenly felt a chill...
| Oh, a tactics card is lying here. Who would... something like this...
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| Mn. I feel dread run through me. There's something here...
| It's a tactics card... Is this the source of the presence?
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| Ah? What's this feeling...
| Wow, it's a tactics card. Who does it belong to? And why is it here...
|
|---NESSIAH
| Nessiah:
| ...Oh? This is...
| It's the tactics card of Vanessa, demon of pure darkness. I see. Fufufu...
|
|---LEON
| Leon:
| Hm... I feel a chill suddenly. What the hell is going on?
| It's a tactics card. Then the origin of that was...
|
|---ZILVA
| Zilva:
| Mn, what was that? There's something mixed in with the assassins' presence...
| It's this tactics card. Just what sort of thing is it?
|
|---EUDY
| Eudy:
| Hm... What's this, I feel a chill. Is this...
| This card is the source of that feeling. Looks like it's got some sort of
|   history...
-----

--豪奢な屋敷 - Luxurious Residence--------------------------
| HAVEN'T PLAYED BF 32 - NOT JENON - FIRST TIME
|
|--------------------|
|     ACQUISITION    |
|-Received Treasure!-|
|    Fairy Broach    |
|--------------------|
|
| Woman:
| Um, excuse me... May I have a moment of your time?
| I apologize for stopping you. It's just that I have a request I earnestly
|   wish fulfilled.
| I used to have a son, but many years ago he ran away from home, and has not
|   returned once since.
| My husband says that, assuming he is even alive, he will not return to this
|   house...
| But I do not believe that. I feel that he is always nearby...
| So please, for my child...
| I any of you end up meeting him anywhere, I wish you'd give him this.
| And then I wish you would tell him for me, to never regret his way of life.
| Please, if you could do just that...
|
|---HAVEN'T PLAYED BF 32 - NOT JENON - AFTERWARDS
| Woman:
| I regret that I could not see my son grow up with my own eyes.
| But I wish that my son, that Jenon, never regret anything.
| I want him to live his own way, without any guilt for running away. I have no
|   other desire...
|
|---HAVEN'T PLAYED BF 32 - JENON
| Jenon:
| ...What am I doing returning here...
| All I can do is watch from afar anyway. I don't have the courage or the
|   qualifications to go into that house...
| ...Hm? That person, is that... mom?
| ......Mom...
| ...No, stop, Jenon. You left that house of your own free will. And made up
|   your mind not to return.
| That's why I can't...
| ......Let's keep going. Coming here was a waste of time.
|
|---PLAYED BF 32 - NOT JENON - FIRST TIME
| Soldier:
| ......Ah! It's Gram Blaze! Thank you for all your hard work!
| ...Ah? You want to know what's going on here?
| Do you remember how earlier you put an end to the nobles' profiting off of
|   the salt and seized the legers?
| In those legers we found records indicating that the bureaucrat living in
|   this mansion participated in the salt distribution.
| With that we came here to investigate, but as you can see the place is pretty
|   much empty.
| Most likely they caught wind of our coming and fled. What underhanded
|   people...
| Right now we're in the middle of searching the house for evidence of anything
|   else. Excuse us!
|
|---PLAYED BF 32 - NOT JENON - AFTERWARDS
| Soldier:
| Looks like all that's here is documents relating to the salt distribution...
| Search more thoroughly! We must prevent Pandra from having power in the
|   western region again!
|
|---PLAYED BF 32 - JENON - FIRST TIME
| Jenon:
| ...What am I doing returning here...
| All I can do is watch from afar anyway. I don't have the courage or the
|   qualifications to go into that house...
| ......Hm?
| What's going on? There's a lot of commotion around the place...
|
| Soldier:
| ......Ah! It's Gram Blaze! Thank you for all your hard work!
| ...Ah? You want to know what's going on here?
| Do you remember how earlier you put an end to the nobles' profiting off of
|   the salt and seized the legers?
| In those legers we found records indicating that the bureaucrat living in
|   this mansion participated in the salt distribution.
| With that we came here to investigate, but as you can see the place is pretty
|   much empty.
| Most likely they caught wind of our coming and fled. What underhanded
|   people...
| Right now we're in the middle of searching the house for evidence of anything
|   else. Excuse us!
|
| Jenon:
| ...............
| Mom and dad have left the city... and it's our fault...
| ...No, it's not. They're the ones who committed a crime! Like they say, you
|   reap what you sow!
| Yes! Our side is the one that's right!
| ...Enough already.
| It doesn't matter if I regret it, am proud of it, or if I yell about it, mom
|   and dad aren't here anymore...
|
|---PLAYED BF 32 - JENON - AFTERWARDS
| Jenon:
| I won't be coming back here anymore either.
-----

--領主の館脇 - Beside the Lord's Residence------------------
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|  Platinum Badge |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| Hm... Did something sparkle on the road just now?
| ...Is this a badge made of silver? No, I know how silver feels and this is
|   not it...
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| Ah? Something's shining...
| It's a silver badge. Hm? This feels different from normal silver. What is it?
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| Oh? Something's lying here...
| A silver badge... No, this is platinum.
| As expected of a Lord's house, the things dropped are of value.
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| Mn? Looks like something's shining.
| The light is reflecting off of this badge. Is this silver? No, it's platinum.
|   How rare...
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| Ah? Something's fallen.
| Wow, This is a pretty badge... Is this silver?
|
|---NESSIAH
| Nessiah:
| Oh... Is there something here?
| A badge. Hmm.
|
|---LEON
| Leon:
| Oh? What's this; something's lying around...
| Tch, a child's toy.
|
|---ZILVA
| Zilva:
| Something is shining. What could...?
| A badge. Retrieved.
|
|---EUDY
| Eudy:
| Ah? Something's shining.
| Hmmm. This badge is made of some special metal. I'm sure it must be valuable,
|   but it doesn't catch my interest.
-----


---------------------Loss--------------------                        [Map37.08]
Defeat - Velleman's Mansion Reached (All)

Garlot:
What!? The enemy has snuck into the mansion!?
Damn! All units hurry to Velleman's mansion! Restrain the enemy!!

|    |
|    |              IMPEDIMENT FAILED
| /\ | The assassins have invaded Velleman's mansion!
|/  \|

In the covert battle with the assassins approaching Velleman's mansion Gram 
Blaze let the mansion be invaded and Count Velleman lost his life...


                    ======================================
                        ***       Chapter 6A       ***
                                   真実の代償
                        ***   The Price of Truth   ***
                    ======================================


========================================================================[Map38]
うつろう時の中で
In the Changing Times
Outskirts of Tiera - Private Army Housing


--------------------Intro--------------------                        [Map38.01]
Due to the battle with Gram Blaze Pandra fled, abandoning his army, and the 
rebel army suffered a definitive collapse.

But Pandra's army was not the only ones seeking to overthrow the Empire.

All over the country, volunteers waiting with bated breath began to rise up 
with the intent to form a new rebel alliance.

And among the candidates for supreme commander of the army, Garlot's name stood 
above the rest.

But Garlot was still deciding. He was wondering if, in accepting the position 
of leading the rebel alliance, he could really make the world that he 
wanted......


----------------Before Battle----------------                        [Map38.02]
Garlot:
...............

Shiskia:
What's up? You look down.
You know, once you start to worry you get all wrapped up all alone and get
  depressed.

Garlot:
...Yeah, I suppose.

Shiskia:
Is it about the rebel alliance?

Garlot:
......Yeah.

Shiskia:
Our group's gotten big, huh. Back when we started the Blazing Outlaws it was
  just the three of us.

Garlot:
You and me... And of course Jenon.

Shiskia:
But now we have so many companions! And the food and tools for weapon
  maintenance we had then don't even compare with what we've got now.

Garlot:
We've been lucky.

Shiskia:
And strong too!

Garlot:
Ha ha, can we really say so ourselves...

Shiskia:
...............
...Are you gonna take up the position?

Garlot:
I haven't decided yet. What should I do......

Shiskia:
You mean, you want to consult with me? I'm glad~

Garlot:
In all honesty I feel that if we keep fighting as a private army like this,
  eventually I'll achieve my goal.
And if we're with Velleman we can do things properly. I believe he's of the
  same opinion as well.

Shiskia:
Yeah. I used to think that nobles were awful too, in the beginning, but now I
  don't think so as much......
Ah, but only a bit! I really don't like them or anything!

Garlot:
This coming from someone who hates nobles. Velleman's really trustworthy, huh.

Shiskia:
Garlot?

Garlot:
What...?

Shiskia:
Um... I......

Garlot:
Huh? Yeah, what is it?

Shiskia:
Um, uum... So about the alliance then...

Garlot:
Oh, that. Yeah?

Shiskia:
Honestly, I'm scared.
I get this feeling that everything we've build up until now is gonna suddenly
  change.
But if you look at our goals, then it seems like forming a rebel army and
  destroying the Empire would work too.
But, you know, I don't know which is better. That's why I'm worried.

Garlot:
That's what's troubling me too.

Shiskia:
I see. ...Then I guess we're a pair of worriers.

Garlot:
Worriers? What?

Shiskia:
You know, someone who worries! That's common sense, isn't it?
Anyway! You're the one who has to decide, Garlot.
But, we're having a consultation. No matter what you choose I want to keep
  lending you strength.

Garlot:
...That's right. I'm happy to hear you say that.

Shiskia:
Leave it to me! After all I'm Shiskia, Captain Garlot's number one...
...............

Garlot:
...What is it, Shiskia?

Shiskia:
It's nothing...

Garlot:
No it's not, what's wrong?

Voice Echoing in the Night:
...Archers! Let loose your arrows!

|-----------------------|
|         VOLLEY        |
|-Thousand Arrow Storm!-|
|-----------------------|

Shiskia:
Kyaah!

Garlot:
Archers!? And so many too!?

Baldus:
Gram Blaze! For the crime of planning rebellion I will judge you right here!!

|--------------|
|    ATTACK    |
|-Under Siege!-|
|--------------|

Garlot:
That's... Baldus! Then that means they're the Imperial Army......

Baldus:
A rebel alliance army... If it comes into existence it would put the Empire in
  jeopardy.
And if you are at the center there will be more than just the usual
  gathering...
If I knock you over here and now that will be the end of it! I will bet my life
  on that!

Garlot:
...How did our plans get out?

Jenon:
Garlot! Shiskia! We've been surrounded.

Amy:
Miss Shiskia, it's dangerous there! Quickly get back inside!

Nessiah:
Let us barricade ourselves in here and buy time to think of another plan.

Garlot:
Okay. Come on Shiskia!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Survive Baldus's attack!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
               Garlot dies...  /
    Shiskia or Jenon dies...  /
   Use up all your cards...  /
       ---------------------/

Garlot:
If we're in a situation like this, then has Velleman already...
No, I'll trust that he got away.

Baldus:
Gram Blaze, such talented men like yourselves are a regrettable loss to the
  Empire.
But if you stand on the same battlefield as I as an enemy I will show no mercy!


------------------Mid Battle-----------------                        [Map38.03]
|-----------------------|
|    KILLED IN ACTION   |
|-A Warrior has Fallen.-|
|-----------------------|

Baldus:
The frontline troops have been annihilated...... But we mustn't panic. Our side
  has far more military force.
What wins a siege battle is not creativity but perseverance. Do not forget
  that......

|-----------------|
|      SORTIE     |
|-Follow my Lead!-|
|-----------------|

|    |
|    |           UNTIL THIS LIFE BURNS OUT
| /\ | The Imperial Army still maintains the offensive!!
|/  \|

Garlot:
There's no end to them... Is there no way to destroy them?

Jenon:
It's too dangerous. Our enemy is Baldus the God of War. He's not an opponent
  who'd allow that to happen easily.

Garlot:
I get that, but at this rate we'll be overcome by the difference in resources!

Nessiah:
There must be a good way to counterattack, or possibly a way to open an escape
  route... One of the two.

Shiskia:
In that case I'll make an escape route.

Jenon:
...Shiskia!?

Garlot:
Hang on, that's my role. I'll go!

Shiskia:
Calm down. I'm not gonna go through that large force; I'm not one to think I
  could handle that.

Garlot:
Then, what do you plan to do?

Shiskia:
There's a river running behind the building, right? And that river is
  surprisingly deep...

Jenon:
That's right! If we had a ship we could escape by the river.

Garlot:
Bu there's a chance that Baldus's troops are waiting in ambush. The probability
  is pretty high...

Shiskia:
That's why I'll be the one to go. I'm the eyes of our army, remember? Leave
  finding the hidden enemies to me.
And on top of that, since my unit's armor is light, our likelihood of being
  discovered by the enemy is low.

Jenon:
But that doesn't change the fact that it's dangerous. If they suspect anything
  they could cut off the escape route.
No matter what happens we should make at least some attempt at an attack at the
  enemy. Meaning that we'll be the diversion.

Shiskia:
And while you do that I'll secure an escape route. It's settled then!

Nessiah:
Take this amulet. After you have secured an escape route squeeze it tightly
  three times.
Once you do that the amulet I have will react.

Shiskia:
That's a handy thing to have.

Garlot:
Shiskia... Be careful.

Shiskia:
I know, thanks.
Once I secure a ship I'll make for the other bank of the river and scout ahead.
Let's rendezvous in the Istraka Wilderness to the north.
...I'll go on ahead and wait for you.

  /--Victory--------------
 / Buy time until Shiskia secures an escape route!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
               Garlot dies...  /
    Shiskia or Jenon dies...  /
   Use up all your cards...  /
       ---------------------/

Garlot:
Jenon! We won't let them place a foot past here!

Jenon:
Right! We won't budge an inch!

Baldus:
They have been driven into a corner, and yet their spirit is overflowing.
What determined conviction, such thirst for life. No matter how this goes they
  certainly won't give up.

  -----------------------------------------------------
Shiskia:
I have to stay alert... there may be enemies in the housing grounds as well.


-----------------After Battle----------------                        [Map38.04]
Shiskia:
Looks like I made it somehow. The river's current isn't far off, so I should be
  able to dive in and cross here.
There's a ship! I didn't have to search any longer.
So, I'm supposed to squeeze this amulet three times......
It's glowing dimly. Does that mean it's working?
Okay, I'm going on ahead. Everyone, stay safe......

|    |
|    |         THE BATTLE CONTINUES!
| /\ | Shiskia has reached the escape point!!
|/  \|

Nessiah:
Hm...... The amulet is reacting. Seems that the escape route has been
  successfully secured.

Jenon:
Phew, good......

Garlot:
Alright then, let's start the evacuation with those who have not joined the
  front lines so that the enemy doesn't notice.

Jenon:
First up are Luciana and Aegina. And Amy.

Aegina:
Sister, do not worry. I'll be right here.

Luciana:
Thank you Aegina... Shall we go, Amy?

Amy:
Miss Shiskia is waiting for us ahead, right?

Jenon:
We're the last ones, Garlot.

Garlot:
Now, what should we do? They could notice our movements here at any time......

Jenon:
Then, let's set these grounds ablaze. If we do that we can buy time.

Garlot:
That's a good idea. Let's do it!

|-----------------|
|      ABLAZE     |
|-Castle on Fire!-|
|-----------------|

Baldus:
They have set fire to the place......

Imperial Army Soldier:
What an inferno...

Baldus:
I see. They finally understand that it's the end. All troops fall back. Stand
  ready for an assault.
The final attack is always formidable......

  -----------------------------------------------------
Garlot:
The enemy has fallen back a bit. I guess they won't pursue us.
Your plan of using fire is working great so far, Jenon.

Jenon:
General Baldus is an honest soldier. If we start a fire he'll think that he
  should be vigilant of an attack.

Garlot:
What, really? That's all he'd plan for?

Jenon:
Yep......

Garlot:
Unbelievable......

Jenon:
That's rude, Garlot.

Garlot:
...............

Jenon:
The compound is burning...

Garlot:
I'm sure this is because we spent a lot of time here, but watching this scene
  stirs some deep emotion inside me.
Though of course, the most important thing is our friends. This time we made it
  through without losing anyone.

Jenon:
...Yeah, that's right.

Garlot:
Okay, let's get out of here. We shouldn't keep Shiskia waiting.

Jenon:
I wonder if Velleman is alright as well.

Garlot:
You know him. I'm sure by now he's gotten far away and is making plans for a
  counterattack.


------------------Locations------------------                        [Map38.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
Gram Blaze's housing, established at the outskirts of Tiera


---------------------Loss--------------------                        [Map38.08]
Defeat - Shiskia Defeated (1st)

In the fierce fight with Baldus who assaulted the army housing, Shiskia lost 
her life. The private army, having lost their eyes and ears, became lackluster 
and collapsed...

Defeat - Jenon Defeated (2nd)--------------------------

In the fierce fight with Baldus who assaulted the army housing, Jenon lost his 
life. The private army, having lost their brains, became lackluster and 
collapsed...


========================================================================[Map39]
別離
Parting
Istraka Wilderness


--------------------Intro--------------------                        [Map39.01]
Gram Blaze had been surrounded after the Imperial Army caught wind of the 
formation of the rebel alliance, and the army housing crumbled in flames.

Gram Blaze, in order to meet up with Shiskia who had gone on ahead, advanced to 
the Istraka Wilderness that lay northwest of Tiera.

However, on the way, communication with Shiskia had come to a stop.


----------------Before Battle----------------                        [Map39.02]
Jenon:
Haven't you found Shiskia yet?

Scout:
My apologies...... But although we've searched the agreed on location we have
  found no sign of a liaison.

Jenon:
There's no way that could be! You must have been in the wrong place!!

Medoute:
Jenon, calm down...... This problem won't be solved by hurrying.
Let's add more members to the search party. And look for foot trails. It may
  take time, but there is nothing else we can do.

Garlot:
But if we split ourselves up anymore we'll end up too scattered.

Jenon:
What are you saying, Garlot! Aren't you worried about Shiskia!! Well? Which is
  it!!

Garlot:
What? Are you kidding me! Of course I'm worried!!

Aegina:
Stop, you two! Fighting won't solve anything!!

Jenon:
...............
......Sorry, Garlot.

Garlot:
No, I snapped too.

Search Party:
Master Nessiah! We have found an armed body up ahead!

Nessiah:
From their equipment, can you tell whether it's an army or bandits?

Search Party:
Their equipment looks like that of an army.

Medoute:
If it's the Imperial Army, they've got the worst timing......

Search Party:
Their standard is not that of the Imperial Army. It's one I've not seen before.

Jenon:
Is there a chance that Shiskia's been caught by them?

Medoute:
We haven't found her just searching like this. That may be a possibility.

Garlot:
Medoute...

Medoute:
Sigh, I know, I know! We can't leave this until we've seen it with our own
  eyes.

Garlot:
Yeah......

Medoute:
At any rate it's essential that we advance carefully so they don't notice us.
We don't even know what they're after, much less their true colors.

Search Party:
That's them......

Medoute:
You were right; I've never seen that standard before. Where is this force from?

Jenon:
Look! On top of that hill! That's Shiskia!

Shiskia:
...............

Jenon:
She really was caught. We have to get her out somehow...

Medoute:
Hold on! Look next to Shiskia! That's...

Velleman:
...............

Garlot:
Velleman met up with Shiskia.
Really, don't scare me like that, Medoute.

Luciana:
Please take a closer look. Shiskia is being held at sword point by Count
  Velleman!

Velleman:
Garlot! I know from a scout's report that you're nearby. Show yourself!

Garlot:
Velleman! Explain yourself!!

Velleman:
Is an explanation really necessary? Do you not understand?

Garlot:
...............

Medoute:
Count Velleman, tell us then what you expect to accomplish with this!

Velleman:
Fight with us, Garlot, that is if you value Shiskia's life.

Jenon:
I don't understand! What are you trying to do, Count!!

Shiskia:
Jenon......
Garlot, everyone, I'm sorry. I- I got caught......

Nessiah:
Then you arranged everything. Is that not right?
The information leak of the rebel alliance, Baldus and the Imperial Army's
  dispatchment, and then Shiskia's capture......

Velleman:
You're wrong. I learned of the information leak and Baldus's dispatchment
  beforehand, nothing more.

Medoute:
But you didn't inform us of it. Meaning that you abandoned us?

Velleman:
......That is correct.

Garlot:
That's funny, Velleman. Gram Blaze is your private army. That was true past,
  present, and future!
And I was just about to decide to stick with you too! Damn it!!

Velleman:
That request over the position of the rebel alliance leader went to you.

Garlot:
That's... I wouldn't have just decided that on my own without talking to you
  about it!

Velleman:
That's not the point, Garlot. That may or may not be true this time, but what
  of the next? Or the one after that?
Gram Blaze's renown stands on its own now. And that is because of you.
And it is something I cannot deny.

Garlot:
That's not what I think. We got this far because you were with us.

Velleman:
You, Garlot, make me feel terror.
I live with the fear that one day you will grow too large and consume your
  master.
At times I had even wondered if you were human.
And now I have finally lost grasp of that fear.
That is why I decided to be rid of you. In the form of betrayal.

Garlot:
That's the reason......

Velleman:
Fight me, Gram Blaze!
Now that you're exhausted even I should be able to defeat you!!

Jenon:
Garlot, he's the enemy.

Garlot:
......Jenon.

Jenon:
That man is using Shiskia as a shield. I have no intention of letting anyone
  get away with something like that.

Velleman:
That's right, Jenon. There is no reason to forgive me.
I walked a bloodstained road to get here. I have no intention to try and be
  forgiven again.

Garlot:
But it's not like you just did whatever you wanted......

Velleman:
This conversation is over, Garlot. This is where you and I part.

Garlot:
Wait, Velleman! I... I!

Leon:
It's useless, Garlot! The fight is already starting.

Nessiah:
Sir Leon is correct. All that's left is to see which side dies.

Garlot:
......What the hell! Damn it!!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Crush Velleman!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
      Garlot or Jenon dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Shiskia:
I'm sorry, everyone......
If I hadn't messed up... This wouldn't be happening.


------------------Mid Battle-----------------                        [Map39.03]
|-----------------------|
|    KILLED IN ACTION   |
|-A Warrior has Fallen.-|
|-----------------------|

|    |
|    |        DRIVEN BACK THE ENEMY
| /\ | Part of Velleman's group is destroyed!!
|/  \|

Velleman:
That's enough, Garlot!
You fight like a lion or a demon dragon.
Honestly I wanted to fight and destroy Gram Blaze head on......
But I see now that, even though you should be exhausted, I can't.
I'd prefer not to, but I suppose I'll do it this way.

|--------------------------------|
|             THREAT             |
|-Throw Away the Weapon! Kneel!!-|
|--------------------------------|

Velleman:
Gram Blaze, drop all your weapons! You'll do it if you value this girl's life
  at all!!

Jenon:
Is this it...... God, if you're real, give me the strength to save Shiskia!

--AEGINA IS ON THE MAP
| Aegina:
| A pity......
-----

Velleman:
Now, Jenon! Use that sword and cut off Garlot's head!
If you do that I will not take Shiskia's or anyone else's lives. I promise you.

Shiskia:
!!
Garlot! Jenon! Medoute! Everyone!
I'm fine!! So keep fighting!

Jenon:
Shiskia!

Shiskia:
Please, keep fighting!! Get up, pick up your weapons!

--NESSIAH IS ON THE MAP
| Nessiah:
| ......Hm, I see. The time has come at last.
-----

Shiskia:
Gram Blaze made it this far to change the world!
Throwing that away just for someone like me is foolish!
Garlot! You're our captain! Pick up your weapon! Tell everyone!!
Tell them, Garlot! Please!

Garlot:
No way, I couldn't.

Shiskia:
...............

Garlot:
I do want to change the world, but if we have to sacrifice you I don't think
  that we can achieve it......

Shiskia:
......What are you talking about. I don't get it.
...............
Garlot, it'll be okay. Gram Blaze can definitely change the world......
And besides, I can't bear to see someone precious to me give up their life for
  my sake.

--LEON IS ON THE MAP
| Leon:
| Hey, wait. Is she planning to...!
-----

Velleman:
Hm?

Shiskia:
Thank you, for everything......
Goodbye, Garlot!!

Garlot:
Hey! Wait!

Jenon:
Shiskia!!

|---------|
| PLUMMET |
|-Fallen.-|
|---------|

Garlot:
......Shiskia.

Jenon:
...No way, this can't be real, come on...!!

--MEDOUTE IS ON THE MAP
| Medoute:
| Shiskia is......
-----

Velleman:
...............
Their final attack is coming. All troops, when you clash with them be prepared
  to die.
I myself am already prepared.

Garlot:
Shiskia...

Shiskia:
...............

Garlot:
...............
...............
Aaaaaaaaaaa!!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Give Velleman a final farewell!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
               Garlot dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Garlot:
I couldn't protect Shiskia.
Just what did I get stronger for? Wasn't it to destroy just this sort of
  senselessness?
......If I was stronger could I have protected Shiskia?
If I was stronger......

Garlot?:
Uaaaaaarg!

|-----------------------|
|       AWAKENING       |
|-Hidden Blood Boiling.-|
|-----------------------|

Garlot?:
Hah, hah, hah......

Medoute:
What is happening to Garlot? And this feeling prickling at my skin......
My feelings are jittery. I've never felt something like this in my life!

--NESSIAH IS ON THE MAP
| Nessiah:
| The power of the demon dragon has finally been set free. It is the source of
|   the bottomless power I have felt from the captain.
-----

Jenon:
What's happening to Garlot?

Velleman:
...Am I seeing an illusion?

Garlot?:
......Power is flowing through me. I won't lose to anyone like this.
If I had this power I would have surely been able to save Shiskia!!
Ugh!?
H- hah... hah...!

Jenon:
He's gone back to how he was before...... I don't get this at all.


-----------------After Battle----------------                        [Map39.04]
|-----------------------|
|    KILLED IN ACTION   |
|-A Warrior has Fallen.-|
|-----------------------|

Velleman:
I see, it ends here......

|    |
|    |         VICTORY AS REPARATION
| /\ | Crushed the former employer, Velleman!!
|/  \|

Garlot:
Velleman, there were times I'd thought I'd be happy to have had you as a
  father.
But you, you......

Velleman:
I am a weak person. I couldn't trust you.
I thought that if I could trust you things would work out, but it was useless.
The world of nobles is smeared with lies. I too have told my share of them.
And before I knew it I had turned into a person that does not trust others.
I realized it too late. If only I had met you a little sooner.
Resent me, Garlot. Me and my weakness......
I wish that your resentment towards me is a force that pushes you forward...

|------------------------|
|      LOSS OF LIFE      |
|-One Mere Common Death.-|
|------------------------|

Garlot:
I'll resent you, Velleman.
But I won't forget...... The way that you lived.

  -----------------------------------------------------
Shiskia:
...............

Aegina:
Shiskia... How could something like this......

Luciana:
Aegina... Let's see her off quietly.

Amy:
Hey, Miss Shiskia will wake up in the morning, right?
Everything will be okay, right? Right?

Medoute:
Hm? It's faint, but I feel a pulse......

Shiskia:
...Ugh......

Garlot:
Shiskia!

Shiskia:
Garlot... Everyone...

Jenon:
Someone, find a doctor!

Shiskia:
The battle is over, huh... Is Velleman...?

Garlot:
We beat him.

Shiskia:
...I see. I hate nobles, but... But Velleman, he was okay.

Garlot:
He was someone who would use you as a hostage. That's why we beat him. But it
  was hard for me too.

Shiskia:
I see, that's right......

Garlot:
It's okay, don't talk. You'll hurt yourself.
Medoute went to a nearby village to get a doctor. So until then......

Shiskia:
No, it's probably useless by now.

Garlot:
If you die here, who will I consult with?

Shiskia:
It's okay, you have everyone else......
Jenon... The three of us childhood friends will be two, huh... Sorry.
It'll be just you boys......

Jenon:
...Shiskia.

Shiskia:
...............
It's okay. I've had plenty of happiness...... just the way we were......
That's why, let me stay like this for a little while......
...............

Garlot:
Hey, Shiskia? Shiskia!?
Shiskia is... Shiskia is......

|------------------------|
|      LOSS OF LIFE      |
|-One Mere Common Death.-|
|------------------------|

Garlot:
...............

Jenon:
...............

Medoute:
If you're quiet we can't begin. Get a hold of yourself, captain.

Garlot:
...............

Medoute:
In that case I will speak.
We need to decide Gram Blaze's plans from here on out. If you have any
  comments, you are welcome to speak.

Garlot:
Everyone, before that, can I just say one thing?

Medoute:
Go ahead, Garlot.

Garlot:
I'll speak plainly. I believe I'm the one who put Shiskia in a situation where
  she died.

Jenon:
Garlot, that's...

Garlot:
Let me speak, Jenon.
Even though I was by Velleman's side, I couldn't sense his suffering.
And Velleman's suffering was the cause of the situation this time.
That's why I am also responsible. That's all I wanted to say.

Leon:
Are you planning to carry all your allies' deaths on your shoulders like this,
  bastard......

Garlot:
...............

Nessiah:
Then, concerning our plans from here on out, may I state my proposal?

Medoute:
Please, go ahead.

Nessiah:
First, to sustain our numbers we need vast quantities of provisions.
A quantity that we, having lost our sponsor, cannot obtain.
My suggestion is to get them from a number of sources.

Medoute:
......More specifically?

Nessiah:
Let us take up the banner of opposing the Empire.
With Master Garlot's fame, that alone should bring us offers of supplies.
Moreover, we will be able to gather many soldiers.

Garlot:
But, having lost Shiskia and parted with Velleman, are we really strong enough
  to overthrow the Empire?
I would agree if we had the power... But we weren't even strong enough to
  protect Shiskia.

Nessiah:
How about that power, then? The tremendous power you've shown us in this
  battle.

Garlot:
That power......

Medoute:
You mean when we say Garlot turn into something horrid in the fight with
  Velleman?

Nessiah:
That's right.

Garlot:
Back then I felt so much power welling up within me that even I couldn't
  believe it.
Yeah, if I could master that strength I bet even overthrowing the Empire would
  be possible.

Nessiah:
I believe that that power is of the demon dragon Brongaa that caused the world
  to fall into a dark age in the past.

Medoute:
.........!!

Garlot:
The demon dragon... Brongaa's?

Nessiah:
The emperors of Bronquia have for generations held tremendous power through a
  contract with Brongaa.
And in addition to that, it is said that there are those upon this earth who
  carry Brongaa's blood.
It is likely that that blood runs strongly through the captain's veins.

Garlot:
If I could obtain that power, I would be able to defeat the Empire?
I could make a new world without irrationality, like Shiskia wanted?

Medoute:
Hang on, Garlot...

Nessiah:
Yes, you could.
However, I believe the power of Brongaa's blood within you is sealed in some
  way.
If that seal was to be broken you should be able to control that power freely.

Garlot:
What should I do, Nessiah? Tell me how to break it!

Nessiah:
Let us go to Lost Aeries, the legendary land where the life and death struggle
  between the demon dragon and the hero Gill is said to have unfolded.
I hear there are many people gathering research regarding Brongaa's blood and
  related mystical techniques there.

Garlot:
Okay, then I will go to the Lost Aeries.
The other members, remain in the Empire and call for the formation of the rebel
  alliance and gather provisions.
Get ready at once, split up!

Medoute:
...............
Garlot's a descendant of the demon dragon? This has to be some sort of a
  joke......
If he is then is this the fate of my blood......


---------------------Vs.---------------------                        [Map39.05]
--Garlot vs. Velleman
| Garlot:
| Velleman......
|
| Velleman:
| Don't say anymore, Garlot!!
|
|---VICTORY
| Velleman:
| This is the strength of your spear. Just as I expected......
| You have always fought resolutely, and, even when everyone else had given up,
|   mustered up strength and won...
| To me that was magnificent, while at the same time......
|
| Garlot:
| What are you trying to say, Velleman!!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Velleman:
| What, is that everything, Garlot!
|
| Garlot:
| Damn it, why has my attack dulled......
-----

--Jenon vs. Velleman-----------------------------------
| Jenon:
| Why Count!
|
| Velleman:
| Jenon, the day will surely come when you understand my decision.
| That is... Garlot is different from us. That is why!!
|
|---VICTORY
| Velleman:
| I see...... Your sword does not waiver.
|
| Jenon:
| ...............
|
|---DEFEAT
| Velleman:
| Surely you must see that Garlot is turning into something terrifying!!
| Right now he can be stopped.
|
| Jenon:
| And this is why your methods are unacceptable.
-----

--Medoute vs. Velleman---------------------------------
| Medoute:
| I cannot see a reason behind doing things this way! Is your judgment clouded,
|   Count!!
|
| Velleman:
| Sigh, that's right...... You want to understand this.
| Though, Medoute, the one who caused this is none other than Garlot!!
| If you manage to defeat me here, do not forget these words!
|
|---VICTORY
| Velleman:
| Garlot's presence has surpassed me, and it will continue to grow greater!
| He must be stopped right now.
|
| Medoute:
| What are you trying to say!?
|
|---DEFEAT
| Velleman:
| Your swordsmanship has dulled!
|
| Medoute:
| Count...... No, Velleman.
| Would killing you here change anything?
|
| Velleman:
| What's wrong, Medoute. You understand that we are past the stage of
|   discussion.
-----

--Aegina vs. Velleman----------------------------------
| Aegina:
| You lied about being on the side of the people and the Empire and deceived
|   us, isn't that right!
|
| Velleman:
| You're wrong; I wish you'd believe me.
| My every action has the future of the Empire in mind.
| I will not regret this decision either!
|
|---VICTORY
| Aegina:
| I cannot understand why Master Garlot is unnecessary to the future of the
|   Empire......
|
| Velleman:
| Can you really not understand? Can you not see how large his power has
|   gotten?
| At this rate he may surpass his humanity.
|
| Aegina:
| What is this all of the sudden......
|
|---DEFEAT
| Velleman:
| I will not take you lightly. Know that that is my etiquette......
|
| Aegina:
| Aah, why are we heading towards sadness......
-----

--Nessiah vs. Velleman---------------------------------
| Nessiah:
| This is the decision you have made then, Count? Fufufu......
|
| Velleman:
| ...............
|
| Nessiah:
| Worry not... Gram Blaze will keep going. Though, without you amongst us.
|
|---VICTORY
| Nessiah:
| Count Velleman, you are a wonderful actor.
| Far surpassing my expectations of you. Fufufu......
|
| Velleman:
| No, you couldn't be......
|
| Nessiah:
| Fufufu......
|
|---DEFEAT
| Velleman:
| Why are you smiling......
| No, you couldn't have...!
|
| Nessiah:
| Fufufu......
-----

--Leon vs. Velleman------------------------------------
| Leon:
| The hell! Again I have no idea how we got to this mess!
| Eh, whatever. I just have to defeat the enemy in front of me.
|
|---VICTORY
| Leon:
| Hah, how's this!!
|
| Velleman:
| What destructive force... Garlot is truly terrifying to have subdued this
|   man!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Leon:
| Tch, I missed...
| But I won't give up with just this! Prepare for the next round!
-----


------------------Locations------------------                        [Map39.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
A vast beltway of exposed rock located northwest of Tiera


--------------------On Map-------------------                        [Map39.07]
崖の下 - Bottom of the Cliff

|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|  Maiden's Tear  |
|-----------------|

Shiskia:
...............
...............


---------------------Loss--------------------                        [Map39.08]
Defeat - Jenon Defeated (1st)

In the parting battle with Velleman's troops, Jenon lost his life. The private 
army, having lost their brain power, became lackluster and collapsed...

Defeat - Garlot Defeated (2nd)-------------------------

|-----------------------|
|    KILLED IN ACTION   |
|-A Warrior has Fallen.-|
|-----------------------|

Garlot:
It can't end like this... Shiskia...!!

|    |
|    |            DEATH OF A HERO
| /\ | Gram Blaze's captain, Garlot, has fallen!
|/  \|

Unable to hide his turmoil over the loss of Shiskia, Gram Blaze's captain, 
Garlot, lost his life, and Gram Blaze vanished from history's stage...


========================================================================[Map40]
呼び起こせ、魔竜の血
Awaken, Blood of the Demon Dragon
Temple of Brongaa


--------------------Intro--------------------                        [Map40.01]
Due to Velleman's betrayal and eternal parting, and Shiskia's death, Garlot had 
fallen deep into grief.

Garlot and the others, having lost their base, appealed for the formation of 
the rebel alliance, and instilled a policy of recruiting soldiers and 
soliciting supply contributions.

Garlot, on the other hand, took a portion of the group and headed to the land 
of the Lost Aries.

He went in order to break the seal holding back the power of the demon dragon 
that awakened in the battle with Velleman.


----------------Before Battle----------------                        [Map40.02]
Garlot:
This is the demon dragon's temple. All things considered it's a lonely looking
  place.
Is this really the place leading the research on Brongaa?
Hm... Someone's coming......

Temple Attendant:
When you're meeting someone you say hello. That's the word you use when you
  enter someone's home without asking, you know?
I can't believe this. This is why outsiders are...... Hm...?
A feel power. Are you a descendant of Brongaa?

Garlot:
It looks that way. Do you know anything about it? Could you tell me?
I need to find a way to be able to use it freely, no matter what. Please!

Temple Attendant:
But you... That power is......

Mysterious Woman:
I see we have a guest. I ask that you tell me your request.

Garlot:
You're... Why do I feel like I've met you somewhere before......

Mysterious Woman:
Allow me to introduce myself. I am Beatrine. I came to this temple to compile
  the research on the demon dragon.
You are here about the power of Brongaa's blood...?

Garlot:
That's right. Please tell me. I have that power sleeping inside me. I want to
  release it!

Beatrine:
I had anticipated that you would come here one day......
I had heard that since I had gone you endured much hatred from your father.
It must have been a pitiable childhood. No doubt you hate me, Garlot......

Garlot:
Hang on. I don't get what you're talking about. And also, how do you know my
  name?
Do you by any chance have the power to see into people's pasts?

Beatrine:
No I do not. These are merely things that I knew.
And I knew them because you are my son, born of my body.

Garlot:
You are... my mother...?

Beatrine:
I doubt you remember me... I had left you before you had any awareness of the
  things around you.
Ever since you were little you were an unusual child overflowing with the power
  of the demon dragon.
Uneasy of your power, I had sealed it with the knowledge I had at the time.

Garlot:
Why did you leave me and dad?

Beatrine:
The seal on you was not yet complete. Whenever you would get emotional it would
  temporarily unravel.
I had decided to research a way to perfect it. All for your sake......
But in order to continue that research I had no choice but to leave my role as
  a wife and mother behind.

Garlot:
Why did you seal the power of Brongaa's blood......?

Beatrine:
If it were known that you had power, you would surely be used by someone.
The power of Brongaa's blood brings sorrow to people... I hated the thought of
  seeing you unhappy.

Garlot:
So since you sealed the power of Brongaa's blood in me I I'm not unhappy now.
  Is that what you're saying!?
Abandoned by my mother, abused by my father, and even losing my best friend...
  And you say that I'm happy!!

Beatrine:
I came here to gather research intending to soften the suffering of being a
  carrier of Brongaa's blood...
But if I have caused your unhappiness as a result then I may not even have the
  qualifications to continue researching.

Garlot:
There's no point in you saying that......

Beatrine:
Hear me Garlot. There exists only a single way to break the seal.
And that is to kill the one who placed it in the first place; me.

Garlot:
.........!

Beatrine:
You who have been abandoned, who lived in unhappiness, have that privilege.
And I, having placed the seal, have the duty to guard it to the end.
You understand, Garlot. Fight with me.
Now, pick up your spear... That is, if you desire the demon dragon's power.

  /--Victory--------------
 / Defeat Beatrine and unseal the power!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
               Garlot dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Garlot:
By...... By killing my mother I attain power......

--MEDOUTE IS ON THE MAP
| Medoute:
| So Garlot really does carry the blood of Brongaa.
| I left home not wanting to be bound by things like fate or destiny...
| But in the end I end up meeting a descendant of the demon dragon like this.
| It feels like ill fate.
| But there's no way I will drag legends from hundreds of years ago into a
|   fight......
-----


------------------Mid Battle-----------------                        [Map40.03]
|    |
|    | HAS THE FIGHT ENDED WITH THIS?
| /\ |     Wounded Beatrine...!!
|/  \|

Garlot:
Did I get her?

Beatrine:
...............
Not yet, Garlot. You are still far from ready.

Garlot:
What......!?

Beatrine:
The power of the demon dragon you reach for is a power of aggression and
  sacrifices and destruction that spears no pleading or surrender of its
  enemies.
If you obtain it you will no longer be a person. And you are not yet ready for
  that.
And if you are not ready leave my sight and do not return.

Garlot:
Am I... ready?
I want the power to crush madness.
A tragedy like Shiskia's won't be repeated. I want power that can prevent
  something like that.
And beyond that should be the world Shiskia and I wanted. That's why...!

Beatrine:
In that case come at me with all your strength. And pierce through my heart
  with your spear.
As a rite of passage to gain power, and as my child, bathe in your mother's
  blood.
Once you abandon your humanity the seal will break!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Kill your mother and obtain the power of the dragon's blood!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
               Garlot dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Garlot:
If I obtain power...
If I can stride toward the world that Shiskia and I wanted... I can kill my
  mother!!


-----------------After Battle----------------                        [Map40.04]
Beatrine:
Guah......!

Garlot:
Uaaaaaaaaarg!!

|    |
|    |             THE VICTORY WITH SORROW
| /\ | With resolve, a spear pierces its owner's mother......
|/  \|

Garlot:
Hah... hah......

Beatrine:
I have witnessed... how determined you are......
Garlot... No, Gulcasa.

Garlot:
Gulcasa? That's......

Beatrine:
That's your true name. Garlot is an alias I gave you to seal the power of your
  blood.
From henceforth use the name Gulcasa.
As long as you keep calling yourself by your true name the power of the dragon
  blood within you will keep growing...
Goodbye, Gulcasa... Do not forget me when controlling your power.
And may you be able to create the world that you wish and your friend Shiskia
  dreamed of.
And take care of Amy, your little sister.

Garlot:
Mother, you're......

Beatrine:
Believing a child that has grown up and helping a child fulfill their dreams...
  that is the role... of a parent.
I will trust you......

|------------------------|
|      LOSS OF LIFE      |
|-One Mere Common Death.-|
|------------------------|

  -----------------------------------------------------
Garlot:
She said that the readiness to abandon your humanity will make the demon
  dragon's power stronger.
From now on the name Gulcasa will be my name.
Gradually we will forget my former name. It was a weak name......
One day I will be the strongest in the world... Once that happens I will erase
  all madness...
And there won't be anyone in this world who lives in sorrow like Shiskia,
  Jenon, and I did.
...Just a little longer, Shiskia. I'll show you a changed world! A new world we
  wished for...!

|--------------------|
|     ACQUISITION    |
|-Received Treasure!-|
|      Genocide      |
|--------------------|


------------------Locations------------------                        [Map40.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
The distant border lands where the hero Gill and the demon dragon Brongaa 
fought long ago


--------------------On Map-------------------                        [Map40.07]
祭壇 - Altar - GARLOT

|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|     Inferno     |
|-----------------|

Garlot:
There's something enshrined on that pedestal...
It's a scythe. I've never handled a scythe before, but... This one has such
  power.
It's like a brightly burning flame. A flame that burns everything away...
...............
...Why hesitate. The power to crush madness is right before my eyes.
Reach out your hand! And take that power!
With this power I...!


---------------------Loss--------------------                        [Map40.08]
Defeat - Garlot Defeated (1st)

In the battle with his mother to obtain the power of the demon dragon, Garlot 
lost his life. Before he was able to resolve his regret over Shiskia, his life 
came to an end...

Defeat - Out of Cards (2nd)----------------------------

In the battle with his mother to obtain the power of the demon dragon, Garlot's 
group was scattered due to a flaw in tactics, and was forced to disband...


========================================================================[Map41]
盾を破るのは矛なのか？
Is a Lance What Shatters a Shield?
Outskirts of the Capital - Arc of Triumph

--------------------Intro--------------------                        [Map41.01]
Having broken a taboo by killing his mother, Garlot awoke the power of 
Brongaa's blood, and obtained his true name, Gulcasa.

In the Empire, Nessiah's shocking strategy bore fruit and the rebel alliance 
rose up simultaneously all over Bronquia, forming an enormous ring around the 
capital.

The imperial army, having split its forces among all the rebel groups, decided 
to place Baldus the God of War in the path of Commander Gulcasa and his main 
force.

Thus the main force of both factions faced each other in front of Flarewerk's 
Arc of Triumph.


----------------Before Battle----------------                        [Map41.02]
Amy:
So, Mister Captain was big brother, huh. I never noticed even though you were
  so close.

Gulcasa:
I didn't mean to hide it in any way......

Amy:
No, it's okay. Amy's not my real name either. It's Emilia.

Gulcasa:
You knew your true name?

Emilia:
The strength of my blood is not as strong as brother's, so a weaker seal worked
  fine.
Miss Beatrine said so after she placed the seal on me.
I finally found you...... I was alone for so long... I wanted be with you,
  brother.
......Hey, brother.
Miss Shiskia went far away... But big brother won't go, right?

Gulcasa:
......Right, we'll always be together.
I will not part with even one more precious companion!

Jenon:
Amy could reunite with her brother, and Luciana's leg is steadily mending.
  Things haven't been completely bad.
Sadness does not last forever, I suppose......

Medoute:
Jenon...... What do you think of Garlot?

Jenon:
Huh... What's this all of the sudden?

Medoute:
Have you felt anything change when he took up the name Gulcasa?

Jenon:
Hmm, it's true that he's changed his appearance, and he's gotten tremendous
  spirit......
But that's only because he's gotten stronger. Gulcasa is Garlot. He himself
  hasn't changed.

Medoute:
......Yeah, I suppose.
Um, you know, I'm actually a descendant of Gill the dragon slayer. Though, only
  of a branch family.

Jenon:
The hero Gill? The one who is said to have defeated Brongaa in the dark age
  long ago...
Then, does that mean that the demon dragon's blood concerns you somehow?
Wait, then, Medoute! Does that mean that you knew from the beginning that
  Garlot has the blood of the demon dragon......

Medoute:
You're misunderstanding me. It was just a coincidence.
Or rather, I'd like to think that it's a coincidence......
I've always believed that there's no meaning in this dragon slayer lineage.
That's why I became a wanderer. I traveled around relying only on my physical
  strength, and denying my parentage.
But it's strange. When I look at Gulcasa my feelings get stirred up.
I hope I'm just reading too much into it, but......

Jenon:
I'm sure it'll be fine. The demon dragon plunging the world into terror is just
  an old story.

Gulcasa:
For the main gate into the capital there are far too few troops defending it.
This is all thanks to the large-scale diversion of the rebel alliance. ...Well
  done Nessiah.

Nessiah:
Think nothing of it. It was the simple matter of taking over Velleman's
  personal connections well.

Leon:
But... The ones defending the gate are the old man's unit of all people.

Baldus:
That ferocious red haired young warrior... Could it be that Garlot?
He is like a completely different man...! Even at this range I feel a
  terrifying amount of spirit relentlessly striking my skin.
If only I had killed him in the attack on their residence.

Gulcasa:
Now then, can you think of any strategy that would be effective against Baldus?

Nessiah:
That's right; the God of War should also have his own thoughts on the current
  rebellion.
So far the capital has overlooked the various injustices and rampant rebellion
  and treachery.

Gulcasa:
I see. You're saying he has a sort of dissatisfaction towards the Emperor......

Nessiah:
I believe he has come this far suppressing his own discontent for the sake of
  his devoted nature.
However, with the right jolt that discontent can be made to overflow...
Please, allow me to join this battle. Without doubt I will bring Baldus into
  our ranks.

  /--Victory--------------
 / Crush Baldus's steel knights!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
   Gulcasa or Nessiah dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Baldus:
Come, young one! You will not pass the Shield of Bronquia so easily!!


------------------Mid Battle-----------------                        [Map41.03]
Gulcasa:
He is strong...... No doubt he will not fall easily.

|    |
|    |              KEEP THE FORCE INTACT
| /\ | Baldus's defense force stubbornly holds the gate!!
|/  \|

Baldus:
If we buy just a little time the troops that went to quell rebellion will
  return to the capital.
Until then I will simply try to hold out to the end!!

Imperial Soldier:
Master Baldus! Help from Duke Barin's territory is heading this way!

Baldus:
Ah, they've come! Alright, make preparations for a pincer maneuver!

|-----------------|
|      SORTIE     |
|-Follow my Lead!-|
|-----------------|

Gulcasa:
No! At this rate we'll be caught in a pincer attack!!

Nessiah:
...No, this is fine.
Master Gulcasa, please turn the troops around and attack the reinforcements.
We will attack Baldus's spirit. Please, leave this to me......

  /--Victory--------------
 / Purge the incoming reinforcements!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
   Gulcasa or Nessiah dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Gulcasa:
Attack his spirit, huh...... Alright then, let's see that skill.

  -----------------------------------------------------
Imperial Army Soldier:
T- these guys are strong!

Imperial Army Soldier:
They're not made of the same stuff as the rebels we went up against......
Is even General Baldus being beaten by them......

Imperial Army Soldier:
The General ought to be alright though, right? But we definitely don't stand a
  chance......

Nessiah:
Now, Master Gulcasa! Call for their surrender!!

Gulcasa:
Hear me, soldiers of the Empire! Lower your weapons!! Surrender and your lives
  will be spared!

Imperial Army Soldier:
Hey, they're advising us to surrender...... Will they really spare our lives?

Imperial Army Soldier:
I've heard that Gram Blaze doesn't execute their prisoners!

Imperial Army Soldier:
Ah, I surrender! I'm not throwing my life away for the sake of the Empire!!

Imperial Army Soldier:
Me too! Don't kill me!!

|------------------------|
|        SURRENDER       |
|-Their Will was Broken.-|
|------------------------|

|    |
|    |     DRIVEN BACK THE ENEMY
| /\ | Assaulted the reinforcements!!
|/  \|

Baldus:
What weak-minded men! Have you no warrior's pride!?

Nessiah:
They are nothing but mish-mash soldiers, after all. ......That and this is the
  spirit of the age.
Weighing their lives against the country, they will always choose to save
  themselves.
They are not like us who have banded together under a common cause.

Gulcasa:
However, that will not work against Baldus's main force. The unit he leads is
  powerful.

Nessiah:
That is not true of their spirit... Having watched their reinforcements
  surrender, their fervor has been cut sharply.
That is true of Baldus as well. He should have begun to doubt if there is merit
  in protecting this country.

Gulcasa:
Then let's try this once more. Just spirit is not enough. We will shake them
  with our power as well!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Crush Baldus's steel knights!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
              Gulcasa dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Baldus:
I am a knight that has devoted my spear and power to the Bronquian Empire for
  generations.
And yet, what was that dreadful spectacle? Rebellion is now a frequent
  occurrence around the Empire, and even the regular army has become weak
  willed...
Is there really a point to devoting myself to this country...?

Nessiah:
Master Gulcasa. I think I would like to attack General Baldus's spirit one more
  time.
Please defeat all his subordinates and leave the main unit defenseless.

Gulcasa:
You want only the main unit left? Leave it to me!


-----------------After Battle----------------                        [Map41.04]
BALDUS IS KILLED

Baldus:
What power!
That man truly possesses considerable strength. He may be the chosen warrior.

|    |
|    |         ENEMY OVERWHELMED!
| /\ | Overwhelmed Baldus the God of War!!
|/  \|

Baldus:
Young man, no, Garlot. You were splendid!

Gulcasa:
My name is Gulcasa. I have left the name Garlot behind.
I carry Brongaa's blood in my veins and therefore am a successor to legitimate
  power.

Baldus:
The demon dragon's blood...... I see. That was the power I felt.
It may be possible for you to stop His Majesty......
Please bring this country to a magnificent end......

Gulcasa:
......Is that what you desire?

Baldus:
Do not misunderstand. As a General what I want to protect above my country is
  the people.
That is what the Shield of Bronquia desires. Please, if you could only think of
  the Bronquian citizens...

Gulcasa:
Of course, the country I am making is for the people.

|------------------------|
|      LOSS OF LIFE      |
|-One Mere Common Death.-|
|------------------------|

Baldus:
Hearing that I have no regrets left......

Gulcasa:
The Shield of Bronquia has shattered. All that's left is to slit the Emperor's
  throat!

  -----------------------------------------------------
BALDUS REMAINING

|    |
|    |                 KEEP THE FORCE INTACT
| /\ | Baldus's defense force is on the verge of destruction!!
|/  \|

Baldus:
......Young man, why have you stopped?

Gulcasa:
God of War, are you not a knight who has devoted his spear to Bronquia?
If you are anxious over the true country should you not pull out your troops?

Baldus:
Do not insult me! I am Baldus, the God of War, called the Shield of Bronquia!!
Do not lump me in with those weak soldiers! No matter what happens I will not
  surrender!!

Gulcasa:
Shield of Bronquia. Just what age was it when that name was your pride?

Baldus:
......What!?

Gulcasa:
A shield is something that protects that which is important, don't you agree?
Right now what is there in this country that you should put your life on the
  line for?

Baldus:
......There is His Highness.

Gulcasa:
He is the man who caused this country to fall into disorder. Is that what
  you're protecting?

Baldus:
......There are the people of the capital as well.

Gulcasa:
Do you think I would lay a hand on the citizens of the capital?

Baldus:
......No, I do not think so. I have heard that Gram Blaze have always fought
  with the people in mind.

Gulcasa:
In that case, concede to my side. That is not surrender or a change to your
  doctrine.
Let us once again make a country that you would want to protect from the bottom
  of your heart. A new Bronquian Empire.
Think carefully what you want your shield to protect.

Baldus:
What I want my shield to protect......
That is the people...... And a new Bronquian Empire...

  -----------------------------------------------------
--BALDUS REMAINING
| Gulcasa:
| That was a magnificent plan, Nessiah.
|
| Nessiah:
| Your words are too kind.
|
| Gulcasa:
| We have absorbed Baldus who inspired great confidence among the troops. With
|   this the imperial army is more or less finished.
-----

Gulcasa:
Now there is no one left to prevent us from passing through the Arc of Triumph.
It won't be long before the Empire is overthrown. Then we can make our dream
  come into fruition.

Jenon:
Hey, Garlot......

Gulcasa:
Stop calling me by that name. I am Gulcasa.

Jenon:
Gulcasa, can you tell me one thing. What do you plan to do once you defeat the
  Emperor and overthrow the Empire?

Gulcasa:
After that I will keep going until I've made a world with no senseless cruelty.
The injustice of the leaders, the discrimination against the powerless, the
  pointless violence, the enormous taxation...
I will shatter all such senselessness... And the world that will be after that
  is one that Shiskia wants as well.

Jenon:
...............
Garlot......

Gulcasa:
I told you to stop calling me that.

Jenon:
Rushing ahead, crushing senselessness and creating that world... Is that really
  possible to do?

Gulcasa:
With the power that I have anything is possible......
This is so that a tragedy like Shiskia's never happens again. You understand
  me, right Jenon?

Jenon:
Garlot......

Gulcasa:
......Sigh. How long are you gonna all me that?

Nessiah:
Sir Jenon, excuse me. It has not been long since Master Gulcasa awoke the
  dragon blood within him.
I think he needs to rest for a while. I ask that you leave this conversation
  until after that...... Is that alright?

Jenon:
Yeah, it's fine......
...............

Medoute:
...How did it go, Jenon?

Jenon:
He... He said he wants to make a world without senselessness. It's what he's
  spoken of since long ago.

Medoute:
Then you're saying that Gulcasa hasn't changed from how he was as Garlot?

Jenon:
......No, I think he has.
He isn't Garlot anymore. I can't explain it very well, but......
One thing I can say is that Garlot was a man that grew up and moved forward
  while having doubts.
But Gulcasa doesn't have those doubts.
In that way he is completely different......

Medoute:
Having no doubts is not a bad thing.

Jenon:
That's not what I mean. Doubting is a weakness, but having weaknesses is not a
  bad thing.
When you know what it's like to feel weak you will have thoughts and actions
  emerge from that.
And those thoughts and actions will never emerge from Gulcasa. That's what I
  think.


------------------Locations------------------                        [Map41.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
The main gate to the capital of Flarewerk. Military drills often take place 
here.


---------------------Loss--------------------                        [Map41.08]
Defeat - Nessiah Defeated (1st)

|-----------------------|
|    KILLED IN ACTION   |
|-A Warrior has Fallen.-|
