|-----------------------|

Nessiah:
Fufufu... I am dying... Fufu...

|    |
|    |   DEATH OF A HERO
| /\ | Nessiah has fallen!
|/  \|

In the battle with Baldus's defense force in front of the capital Nessiah lost 
his life. Having lost its tactical planner, the revolution ended in failure...

Defeat - Gulcasa Defeated (2nd)------------------------

|-----------------------|
|    KILLED IN ACTION   |
|-A Warrior has Fallen.-|
|-----------------------|

Gulcasa:
This is my limit...... What was this power for then...

|    |
|    |   DEATH OF A HERO
| /\ | Gulcasa has fallen!
|/  \|

In the battle with Baldus's defense force in front of the capital Gulcasa lost 
his life. Before he was able to resolve his regret over Shiskia, his life came 
to an end...

Defeat - Out of Cards (3rd)----------------------------

Gulcasa:
We cannot advance any further... This is the result of misreading the
  tactics...
The mistake of the route I chose...... Kh......

|    |
|    |    OUT OF CARDS
| /\ | Strategy failed...!
|/  \|

In the battle with Baldus's defense force in front of the capital, Gulcasa's 
unit was scattered due to a flaw in tactics, and was forced to disband...


========================================================================[Map42]
双竜激突
Clash of the Twin Dragons
Imperial Capital Flarewerk


--------------------Intro--------------------                        [Map42.01]
The main force of the rebel alliance led by Gulcasa broke through the Arc of 
Triumph defended by Baldus, achieving their invasion into the capital.

Their opponent, Emperor Soltier, moved to meet them, personally leading the 
army.

Together with the Imperial Guard Leader, Lapis, they began their defense of 
castle Flarewerk.

The Emperor who signed a contract with the demon dragon and Gulcasa who 
awakened the dragon blood sleeping within him.

The final battle to turn over the imperial rule was coming into fruition here 
and now......


----------------Before Battle----------------                        [Map42.02]
Gulcasa:
Hear me, citizens of the capital! I am Gulcasa, the leader of the rebel army!!
My objective is not the destruction of the city! It is to put an end to this
  rotten to the core imperial government!!
Before the fighting begins there is something I wish to ask you!
Up until now, what has the Empire done for you? And also, what has the Empire
  taken from you!?
The taxation has taken your savings, the conscription has taken the children
  you've raised, the disheveled public order has taken your peace of mind!!
And while taking so much it has not given its citizens anything in return......
  Is that something you will let it get away with!?
If you are smart you should understand! This sort of imperial government should
  not continue much longer!
Those without power are innocent!
Justice is on our side! We are here representing the powerless, and now we will
  defeat the Bronquian Empire!
People who see the justice with us! If you can, lend us a hand!

Lapis:
That man! How dare he spread such bile!
I should have judged him back when he first showed that rude attitude of
  his......

Soltier:
That speech is unbearable to hear...... It doesn't move the heart. Even
  Velleman was better.

Lapis:
Your Highness, please leave the task of defending this area to us and return
  inside the castle.

Soltier:
Don't make light of me, Lapis.
The only reason I entrusted the army to Baldus is because a capable general
  with seniority would have a greater control of the army alone.

Lapis:
I know well how capable Your Highness is as a military man......
However, this will be a defensive battle.
A violent attack like this will not stop where Your Highness will still be
  safe.

Soltier:
But isn't it your duty to protect me from such things?

Lapis:
Yes, it's true that it is, but......

Soltier:
I want to be at the front-most line. That is the duty an Emperor of Bronquia,
  the militaristic Empire, should carry out.

Lapis:
...By your will.

Imperial Soldier:
The rebel army has deployed in the center of Flarewerk!

Soltier:
......You've come, Red.
So he was a successor of the demon dragon's blood...
A carrier of the contract with Brongaa and a successor of Brongaa's blood.
  Interesting...... Let us test who is strongest.

Gulcasa:
Emperor Soltier has shown himself.

--HAVE BALDUS
| Baldus:
| His Highness... No, Soltier possesses much talent in military affairs.
| He is certain to have planned a rally point somewhere...
-----

Gulcasa:
He is the summit of this country. We defeat Soltier and we defeat the country.
  And the senseless cruelty should end......
That's why we will give it our all! We will collide with them to the limit of
  our strength, and that will determine whether this country breaks or not.

Leon:
The time has come to cross swords with that Emperor...... Thanks, Gulcasa!
Gulcasa! Give the order to attack!!

Aegina:
Master Gulcasa! Enemy soldiers are advancing from the castle gates!!

|-----------------|
|      SORTIE     |
|-Follow my Lead!-|
|-----------------|

Gulcasa:
So they've come. Attack! Do not leave even one remaining!!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Exterminate the capital's defense force!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
              Gulcasa dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Gulcasa:
As the representative of the oppressed I will not accept defeat!
Crush them until there's no one left! Show them what we can do!!


------------------Mid Battle-----------------                        [Map42.03]
|-----------------------|
|    KILLED IN ACTION   |
|-A Warrior has Fallen.-|
|-----------------------|

Gulcasa:
Is that all they have!? The Imperial Army is not even worth fearing!!

|    |
|    |        KEEP THE FORCE INTACT
| /\ | The capital is on the verge of collapse!!
|/  \|

Gulcasa:
The pain the people have suffered was not caused by rabble like this! Now,
  come, Soltier!!

Lapis:
...............
Your Highness... This is where we must part for a while.

Soltier:
Lapis......

Lapis:
If you were to retreat, I would risk my life to protect you, but I'm sure you
  would refuse.

Soltier:
Of course...I would choose death over the humiliation of fleeing.

Lapis:
My apologies, I meant no offence...... Please forgive me.
I will now go take position in front of the castle gate and intercept them.

Soltier:
You want to die, Lapis? Then what of your duty as the guard leader to protect
  me?

Lapis:
While it may be presumptuous, the only way of protecting Your Highness is to
  win.
One cannot grasp victory in a defensive battle...... Therefore the only way is
  to intercept them.

Soltier:
I see... You're right. Until the very end, there are still things I learn from
  you.

Lapis:
Such awe-inspiring words, Your Highness.

Soltier:
Alright then, this is an order to Imperial Guard Leader Lapis. ...Do not come
  back alive! Fight to the end and seize victory!

Lapis:
Without fail!

Soltier:
One cannot grasp victory in a defensive battle, huh......

|-----------------|
|      SORTIE     |
|-Follow my Lead!-|
|-----------------|

Lapis:
I am Lapis, Imperial Guard Leader of the Bronquian Empire! I will wager my life
  to halt you here!!

Gulcasa:
......That's fine, come one after another. We will destroy all of you!!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Strike down the Emperor and achieve revolution!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
              Gulcasa dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

  -----------------------------------------------------
LAPIS DEFEATED

Lapis:
Your Highness...... Have I... been a good vassal to you......?

|-----------------------|
|    KILLED IN ACTION   |
|-A Warrior has Fallen.-|
|-----------------------|

Soltier:
...............
Throw open the gates! All troops, charge. Teach them the terror of death!!

|-----------------|
|      SORTIE     |
|-Follow my Lead!-|
|-----------------|

Soltier:
Do not make Lapis's death in vain! Their troops are disorganized! Now is our
  chance!!

  -----------------------------------------------------
LAPIS IS AT HALF MORALE

Lapis:
I- I cannot die yet......

Gulcasa:
You're quite stubborn...... Fitting of the Imperial Guard Leader!
But is there any merit in risking yourself for the Emperor?

Lapis:
Of course there is merit! My devotion to His Highness is far above yours to
  your allies.
I will raise my sword for the protection of His Highness until my life runs
  out!

Gulcasa:
Protection? Could it be that you're here to hold us back while the Emperor
  escapes, then!?

Lapis:
What insolence! His Highness would never flee!!
His Highness's twin blades are the swords that grasp victory! There is not a
  single mark of cowardice upon them!!

Soltier:
Yes. Well said, Lapis.

|-----------------|
|      SORTIE     |
|-Follow my Lead!-|
|-----------------|

Soltier:
My twin blades exist to strike you down and drink your blood!!

Lapis:
Your Highness!!

Gulcasa:
You've opened the gates, then, Soltier! I see you're ready.

Soltier:
My twin blades merely wanted to remember their readiness to rend flesh!
And I will fight together with Lapis so that victory shall rest with us!
Come, join me, Lapis!

Lapis:
As you command, Your Highness!!

  -----------------------------------------------------
Soltier:
Gulcasa... I heard you woke the power of the demon dragon within you.
However, that way is the path of carnage and monstrosity. You've yet to notice
  the weight of it...

Gulcasa:
You can think what you want. But I accepted this power understanding
  everything.

Soltier:
The blood of the demon dragon brings sorrow to people......
In exchange for that power you've given up your humanity. The same as I have!

Gulcasa:
The same... as you? No, we're completely different!!

Soltier:
How are we different?
Look at the destructive force and the vigor of your charge since you took the
  name Gulcasa, and the amount of blood spilled.
That is the sweet power of darkness brought about by Brongaa's blood.
Sooner or later you begin to lose your own will, and start to be controlled by
  the demon dragon's.
Turn around! Look behind you! And when you're faced with the mountains of
  corpses scattered around you curse your decision!!

Gulcasa:
Silence! I'm not like you...... After this fight I will definitely make a new
  world without senselessness!

Soltier:
Hmph, don't make me laugh.

  -----------------------------------------------------
LAPIS DEFEATED

Lapis:
Your Highness...... Have I... been a good vassal to you......?

|-----------------------|
|    KILLED IN ACTION   |
|-A Warrior has Fallen.-|
|-----------------------|


-----------------After Battle----------------                        [Map42.04]
Soltier:
Ghuah...!!
......Is this where I fall? If my end has come it is a fickle thing.
But I'm fine with this. With this I gain true freedom.

|------------------------|
|      LOSS OF LIFE      |
|-One Mere Common Death.-|
|------------------------|

Soltier:
Gulcasa... I will be watching where you end up... from my place... in hell...

--LAPIS REMAINING 
| Lapis:
| Your Highness, I am so grateful that you took me, the daughter of your bitter
|   enemy, in and let me stay by your side.
| Please, sleep peacefully...
|
| |---------------------------------------|
| |                SUICIDE                |
| |-I Lived for You. I Shall Die for You.-|
| |---------------------------------------|
|
| Lapis:
| ......I too shall now return to your side.
-----

|    |
|    |           ACHIEVED REVOLUTION
| /\ | Gulcasa has overthrown the Emperor at last!!
|/  \|

Gulcasa:
I'm not like him... I will not become like him...!

  -----------------------------------------------------
Aegina:
Did we really win...?

Leon:
Yeah, an overwhelming victory! The rebellion allowed us to defeat the Emperor!
This is revolution! The Bronquian Empire has ended......
No, it will be reborn. In Gulcasa's hands!

Luciana:
It is the New Bronquian Empire.

Aegina:
Shiskia...... We have done it.
Please watch over us from now on if you can.

Gulcasa:
Uggh... Ghaaaaaaaa!!
What's happening... My body won't listen to me...!

Nessiah:
Master Gulcasa... Can you hear me? Brongaa's blood requires an offering.
There is no other way... We will have to sacrifice a soldier to it with
  Genocide's power.

Gulcasa:
N- no way... Are you telling me to sacrifice an ally? There's no way I......

Nessiah:
But now that the imperial government has been destroyed the people are mentally
  ready for the foundation of a new nation.
I cannot allow Master Gulcasa to be lost now...!

Gulcasa:
...............

Imperial Soldier:
...MASTER GULCASA. WE WILL GLADLY GIVE UP OUR LIVES FOR THE SAKE OF A NEW
  COUNTRY......

|-----------------------|
|       AWAKENING       |
|-Hidden Blood Boiling.-|
|-----------------------|

Gulcasa:
Gh... Uaaaaarg!!

Imperial Soldier:
Guaaaaaah!!

Gulcasa:
...............
...Fufufu... Hahaha! My body is heating up. It feels good.
I've gained yet more power. Even protecting the newly revived country shall be
  easy this way!!

Nessiah:
......Master Gulcasa. There are many other countries on this continent besides
  the Empire.
Do you not think that we should help out the poverty stricken, tyrannized
  people who live there?

Gulcasa:
If I ruled all the countries at once I could spread these ideals throughout the
  world!
Those who reject Shiskia's ideal world will not be allowed to surrender or beg
  for their lives! I will pass judgment upon them!!

Nessiah:
In that case it will be necessary to prepare for a foreign campaign while we
  establish the new Empire.

Gulcasa:
Yes, it will be!

Nessiah:
......Please, leave it to me. Without fail, the utopia that has allowed the
  Empire to prosper shall be spread throughout the land.

Gulcasa:
I leave it in your hands, Nessiah.
Fufufu... Just wait, Shiskia. It won't be long before the world changes. I will
  change it...!

Medoute:
...............


---------------------Vs.---------------------                        [Map42.05]
FIRST VICTORY VS. LAPIS

Lapis:
It will take more than this to kill me!
I am here to attain victory for His Highness! I will not break!!

--Gulcasa vs. Lapis------------------------------------
| Gulcasa:
| The one behind the factors corrupting the Empire is that Emperor!!
|
| Lapis:
| You'd best abstain from rash remarks!
|
|---VICTORY
| Lapis:
| Kh......
|
| Gulcasa:
| Weak! Do you really think you can protect the Empire with so little strength?
|
|---DEFEAT
| Lapis:
| There is still a chance to win this!?
-----

--Jenon vs. Lapis--------------------------------------
| Lapis:
| Gram Blaze... Truly it would have been best to crush you when we first met...
|
| Jenon:
| That is a self-righteous way of thinking. This is why the people will not
|   support you!!
|
| Lapis:
| Then you're saying that the way you act, rushing things and deploying troops,
|   will not lead to people's unhappiness!?
|
| Jenon:
| Th- That's mere sophistry......
|
|---VICTORY
| Lapis:
| Gram Blaze is strong......
|
| Jenon:
| You have no chance of success anymore. Give up and surrender.
|
|---DEFEAT
| Lapis:
| Improve your skills before you speak of sophistry.
|
| Jenon:
| Ugh......
-----

--Medoute vs. Lapis------------------------------------
| Lapis:
| What happened to that blonde girl, Shiskia?
| Is she possibly leading a detached force in some underhanded scheme of yours?
|
| Medoute:
| ......Could be.
|
|---VICTORY
| Medoute:
| The flame of the Empire is being extinguished. Why not acknowledge that?
|
| Lapis:
| If I acknowledge that I myself will vanish......
|
|---DEFEAT
| Lapis:
| I had heard a rumor that Shiskia had died. Is it true?
|
| Medoute:
| ...............
|
| Lapis:
| Your silence speaks for itself.
-----

--Aegina vs. Lapis-------------------------------------
| Lapis:
| Revolution is a ridiculous notion...... There is no need to trouble His
|   Highness!! I will stop you...!
|
| Aegina:
| We will win here and get revenge for Shiskia......
|
|---VICTORY
| Aegina:
| Accept what you deserve for ignoring the people!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Aegina:
| No, I cannot be beaten yet!
-----

--Nessiah vs. Lapis------------------------------------
| Nessiah:
| What wholehearted loyalty to protecting the Emperor. My, how loathsome.
|
| Lapis:
| Have you bastard no loyalty whatsoever!?
|
| Nessiah:
| What I serve is absolute power, and only that.
|
|---VICTORY
| Nessiah:
| Fufufufufu...... Is your loyalty any help now?
|
|---DEFEAT
| Lapis:
| Do you see; this is my country! And my convictions to His Highness!!
|
| Nessiah:
| Truly. Fufufufufu......
-----

--Leon vs. Lapis---------------------------------------
| Lapis:
| First the rebel army, then Gram Blaze. How quick to change sides.
|
| Leon:
| And what about it? I want to fight so I fight. That's all there is to it.
|
| Lapis:
| Mad Knight is truly a fitting name for you.
|
|---VICTORY
| Leon:
| If you've realized your own powerlessness, stop resisting and let me beat
|   you!
|
| Lapis:
| Gh... W- why you......
|
|---DEFEAT
| Leon:
| Good thrust, you haven't been slacking off!
|
| Lapis:
| What's this? Is that all the strength the Mad Knight has?
-----

--Baldus vs. Lapis-------------------------------------
| Lapis:
| Baldus, even you bastard have chosen to revolt!!
|
| Baldus:
| I am not revolting. What my shield protects is the same now and in the past.
|   And that is the country and its people!
| Lady Lapis, you must have noticed the impasse the Empire is at!
|
| Lapis:
| !!
|
|---VICTORY
| Lapis:
| Urk......
|
| Baldus:
| Lady Lapis, surrender......
|
|---DEFEAT
| Lapis:
| The exhaustion of continuous fight has dulled your strength.
|
| Baldus:
| No... I must have unconsciously held back......
| I must cut ties. If not......
-----

--Jenon vs. Soltier------------------------------------
| Jenon:
| If we defeat you everything we've lost in our fighting will be repaid.
|
| Soltier:
| Do you really think so? Hah, don't make me laugh!
| If you defeat me nothing will change.
| If you become the Emperor you will understand. This country is steered by a
|   will that is not human!
|
|---VICTORY
| Jenon:
| We will win and establish an ideal Empire!
|
| Soltier:
| Kh, as long as the demon dragon's will exists the Empire will not
|   change......
|
|---DEFEAT
| Soltier:
| I knew it; you're all talk......
| If you don't intend to fight get off the battlefield!!
-----

--Medoute vs. Soltier----------------------------------
| Soltier:
| When I cross blades with you I can feel Brongaa's power within me throbbing.
| Could it be that you're from that family......
|
| Medoute:
| I am no one but myself!
|
|---VICTORY
| Soltier:
| I was right. That blade is of a descendant of the dragon slayer......
|
| Medoute:
| So, what about it?
|
| Soltier:
| Eventually, when you least desire it, you will be taken in by your destiny.
|
| Medoute:
| Destiny doesn't exist! You yourself decide how you live!!
|
| Soltier:
| Hmph, it's futile...... If only I were like that.
|
|---DEFEAT
| Medoute:
| This roughness is the same as Gulcasa's... This is the demon dragon's power,
|   huh......
|
| Soltier:
| What's wrong? Haven't you come to hunt those with Brongaa's power?
|
| Medoute:
| ......!
-----

--Aegina vs. Soltier-----------------------------------
| Aegina:
| This man is the Emperor... The one who stands at the summit of Bronquia...
|
| Soltier:
| Scatter, Gram Blaze!!
|
|---VICTORY
| Soltier:
| Gh......
|
| Aegina:
| My strike connects! Our swords reach the Emperor!!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Aegina:
| The strength of his attacks is on par with Master Gulcasa's......
|
| Soltier:
| Throw away your weakness. If you do not the only thing waiting on the road
|   ahead of you is death!
-----

--Nessiah vs. Soltier----------------------------------
| Nessiah:
| Your Highness, we shall take your life as an offering.
|
| Soltier:
| Offering? Offering to who?
|
| Nessiah:
| Why, the new Emperor, Master Gulcasa, of course.
|
|---VICTORY
| Soltier:
| W- what kind of technique was that......
|
| Nessiah:
| Fufufu......
|
|---DEFEAT
| Soltier:
| Ever since you joined Gram Blaze has changed.
| What the hell are you? What are you after?
|
| Nessiah:
| ...Fufufu. What good would knowing that do you?
-----

--Leon vs. Soltier-------------------------------------
| Leon:
| It's been a while, Soltier!
|
| Soltier:
| Leon. I had anticipated it would come to this.
| Your eyes are just as those of a mad dog.
|
|---VICTORY
| Leon:
| What? Is that all the strength you've got?
|
| Soltier:
| Gh......
|
|---DEFEAT
| Soltier:
| Your attacks are as reckless as always. Incompetent, just like your
|   father......
|
| Leon:
| Shut the hell up......
-----

--Baldus vs. Soltier-----------------------------------
| Baldus:
| Ngh......
|
| Soltier:
| Are you hesitating, Baldus? How weak.
|
|---VICTORY
| Soltier:
| Just as I'd expected from the God of War. Such heavy hits......
|
| Baldus:
| Your Highness......
|
| Soltier:
| The shield is striking back.
|
|---DEFEAT
| Baldus:
| Ngh!!
|
| Soltier:
| Force them back in one strike!! We will smash the Shield of Bronquia and
|   bring the revolution's momentum to a halt!
-----


------------------Locations------------------                        [Map42.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
Bronquian Empire's capital holding steady at a break in a mountain belt

   --ノーセイユ区 - Noseu District
A section of the capital where the residential areas converge

   --南ヴェルク街 - South Werk Street
One of Flarewerk's central streets. The wealthy merchants build their mansions 
here

   --北ヴェルク街 - North Werk Street
One of Flarewerk's central streets. Home to large weapon workshops

   --アツサム通り - Atsam Avenue
Avenue lined with major shops outside of the city


--------------------On Map-------------------                        [Map42.07]
アツサム通り - Atsam Avenue

Wizard:
I have spent many long years watching the sky, but now a great star is
  swaying...
The time of the Empire's fall has come.
However, just before a star falls it is clad in powerful flames...
A hellfire that burns to ash everything it touches... Hero that fells stars,
  take caution...

--北ヴェルク街 - North Werk Street - FIRST TIME--------------
|
|------------------------------------------|
|                ACQUISITION               |
|           -Received Treasure!-           |
|Rusted Sword + Mana Stone -> Magical Sword|
|------------------------------------------|
|
| Weapon Craftsman:
| You're the rebel army from rumors... It's amazing that you're really invading
|   Flarewerk.
| You're beating the Emperor, right? ...In that case do you have strong
|   weapons?
| You have good materials. Give them to me for a minute.
| There, done. Here you go.
|
|---AFTERWARDS
| Weapon Craftsman:
| ...Hm? You want to know why I made you weapons?
| There are many people who think that this Empire may as well be destroyed...
| I'm just one of them.
|
|---NO RUSTED SWORD/MANA STONE
| Weapon Craftsman:
| You're the rebel army from rumors... It's amazing that you're really invading
|   Flarewerk.
| You're planning to crush the Empire, right? Don't lose focus until you finish
|   fighting.
-----

南ヴェルク街 - South Werk Street - FIRST TIME----------------
|
|--------------------|
|     ACQUISITION    |
|-Received Treasure!-|
| Ancient Sheet Music|
|--------------------|
|
| Nobleman:
| Mmn! You're the rebel army!? How have you gotten here already...
| Stop, I am no longer a noble. I've canceled all my appointments and am
|   returning to my home town.
| I am done talking; I am busy packing...
| ...Tch, what persistent brats! Nothing to be done. I'll give you this, so
|   hurry and leave!
| Now leave! Leave!
|
|---AFTERWARDS
| Nobleman:
| It's you again? Hurry and leave!
-----

ノーセイユ区 - Noseu District--------------------------------

Woman:
The man I love was drafted into the military. ...Conscription was obligatory,
  so there was nothing to be done, but it truly was scary.
Whenever I would get a letter in the mail I would be scared to look at its
  contents.
But he came back. And it's because when he fought you at the Arc of Triumph you
  allowed him to surrender.
Thank you. No matter what you wanted to tell me, or even if you stopped here by
  mistake...
You didn't kill him... I'm so grateful for that. Thank you so much.


---------------------Loss--------------------                        [Map42.08]
Defeat - Out of Cards (1st)

Clashing with the frontline troops of Flarewerk's defensive battalion, 
Gulcasa's unit was scattered due to a flaw in tactics, and was forced to 
disband...

Defeat - Gulcasa Defeated (2nd)------------------------

Performing in the final violent battle with Emperor Soltier and his troops 
Gulcasa lost his life. Before he was able to resolve his regret over Shiskia, 
his life came to an end...


========================================================================[Map43]
焔帝ガルカーサ
Blazing Emperor Gulcasa
Imperial Capital Flarewerk


--------------------Intro--------------------                        [Map43.01]
Gulcasa, having made his way into Flarewerk, slew Emperor Soltier, the symbol 
of the tyrannical rule, and proclaimed the creation of the New Bronquian Empire.

With his military power, the new Emperor, Gulcasa, reigned a country of strong 
men, where existed no oppressed people.

The rebel army soldiers and, after he achieved revolution, the citizens brought 
grief by the former imperial government as well, adored Gulcasa. The new
Empire, receiving wild support, seemed to have a smooth road ahead of it.

But in this reign and wild enthusiasm, there was still someone who felt 
uneasy......


----------------Before Battle----------------                        [Map43.02]
Gulcasa:
Hah, hah, hah......
The aching has finally stopped...... I think I can hold out for a little while
  longer.
This is the curse of Brongaa's blood, then. If I hadn't had the seal as a child
  I don't know if I'd have made it......
But I'm fine now. I'll manage to control this power somehow. My purpose in
  using it is clear as well......
I'm alright. I will be alright......

Medoute:
No, you aren't. It's already too late, Gulcasa.

Gulcasa:
It's you, Medoute. What is it?

Medoute:
I've come to stop you.
I've hid it until now, but I'm actually a descendant of the Dragon Slayer,
  Gill.
In other words, as you carry Brongaa's blood within you we are longtime
  enemies.

Gulcasa:
......And what? What do you mean you've come to stop me?

Medoute:
Ever since I was little I hated the customs and practices of being the
  descendant of the hero.
I am me. Not some old man who fought a dragon long ago that I know nothing of
  other than his name...
Thinking that I left home and wandered around all over believing that I can do
  something all on my own.
But then I met you...

Gulcasa:
Then by stopping me you mean that you, as a dragon slayer, plan to slay me?
That as I have inherited the dragon's blood you can't let me live?

Medoute:
I'm sure that that's what people will say...... That in the end Medoute too
  could not escape the curse of being a dragon slayer.
But that's not it. Neither the dragon blood nor the dragon slaying heritage
  have anything to do with this......

Gulcasa:
...Then why. I do not understand the reason you have turned your blade on me.

Medoute:
The fact that you don't understand is the answer. Gulcasa, you have changed.
I have seen it. That Genocide ritual.
That's when I decided. I will defeat you.

Gulcasa:
But that soldier was more than happy to sacrifice himself for me!

Medoute:
No he wasn't. I've no doubt that Nessiah was controlling that soldier's will.

Aegina:
Master Gulcasa! Has something happened...!?

Jenon:
Medoute!

Nessiah:
Lady Medoute is pointing her weapon at Master Gulcasa. Is this perhaps......

Medoute:
...............

Gulcasa:
Medoute says she intends to kill me. The same as Velleman had. We shall purge
  her!

Aegina:
She couldn't......

Nessiah:
I shall call the soldiers!

Aegina:
There has to be some mistake! Miss Medoute could not possibly betray us! Don't
  you agree, Sir Jenon!?

Jenon:
......Yeah, there has to be something wrong. I'll talk to her and find out.

Aegina:
Sir Jenon! Where are you going at a time like this......

Medoute:
There is something wrong. I think so as well. But...... Somebody has to right
  that wrong!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Purge the traitor!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
              Gulcasa dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Medoute:
Garlot, the leader of Gram Blaze, no longer exists.
What you are now is one enthralled by Brongaa's blood, the demon Gulcasa.

Gulcasa:
And is that bad!? Now that I have this power there are things that I can do!
You and Velleman are both just jealous of my power!
That's why, even to you, I will show no mercy!!


------------------Mid Battle-----------------                        [Map43.03]
Medoute:
I didn't want to fight for stupid reasons like destiny.

Gulcasa:
I am not bound by destiny. What I want... What I require, is the world.

Medoute:
Using what you desire as an excuse to throw away your past and distort your
  beliefs...
Isn't that the same as being bound by fate. What's different about it!

Gulcasa:
......You're wrong. What I want is the world Shiskia dreamed of!

  -----------------------------------------------------
Medoute:
Using your allies as sacrifices, prolonging the fighting...... That's something
  you would never do in the past.

Gulcasa:
......In violent battles sacrifices are unavoidable. That is something I
  understood now and in the past.

Medoute:
That may be true. But you weren't someone who could just say that as if it
  meant nothing!!
Why did you throw that kindness of yours that regretted having sacrifices!?
Why!?

  -----------------------------------------------------
Medoute:
I will state this...... You are only using Shiskia's death as an excuse to show
  off your power.

Gulcasa:
I'm telling you you're wrong! I just want to make the world Shiskia and I
  pursued a reality!!
Even if I have to stain my hands in the demon dragon's blood......

Medoute:
Do you think Shiskia would be happy seeing you this way!?

Gulcasa:
.........!?

Medoute:
You are not the only one to feel sadness at Shiskia's loss......
You say that having gained power staining your hands with the demon dragon's
  blood, you fight for the world you desire.
If so, that would be your fight. I would have no duty to stop you. I would
  merely take my leave.
But... Using Shiskia's name as justification to destroy and coerce sacrifices
  is not something I can forgive!!


------------------Locations------------------                        [Map43.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
Bronquian Empire's capital holding steady at a break in a mountain belt


---------------------Loss--------------------                        [Map43.08]
Defeat - Gulcasa Defeated (1st)

Having lost his friend as a result of having gained power Gulcasa died... That 
conclusion may very well have been the result granted by karma...


======================================================================[EndingA]
Medoute:
......As I thought, I wasn't strong enough.

|    |
|    |       SHE ALONE IS HERSELF
| /\ | Achieved purging the traitor......
|/  \|

Gulcasa:
Medoute, can't we start over?

Medoute:
I don't think that's possible......

Gulcasa:
...............

Nessiah:
Master Gulcasa, she has been a treacherous servant. She should be killed.
If you do not judge traitors you set a bad example to others right at the start
  of the new Empire.

Gulcasa:
...............
......That's right.

Jenon:
Wait, Garlot!!

Medoute:
Jenon......

Jenon:
I'm the one who drove Medoute to do this. The real traitor is me!
I'll bear the punishment, so please, let Medoute go.

Medoute:
What are you saying! There's no way anyone would buy a lie like that!!

Jenon:
It's not a lie, Garlot. Don't kill Medoute.
As your friend, that' my last request to you.
Please... Stop this...
It would upset Shiskia......

Medoute:
Jenon......

Gulcasa:
...............

Nessiah:
What an absurd drama. Let us judge them together......
If you try to resist then I...

Gulcasa:
No I will decide what to do with them.
Until then, lock them in jail.

Jenon:
......Garlot.

Medoute:
...............

  -----------------------------------------------------
Officer:
Quickly, hurry up! Master Gulcasa's address is starting! Form a line! Form a
  line!

Volunteer Soldier:
Hey, have you heard? Apparently a senior officer named Medoute was plotting
  insurrection.

Volunteer Soldier:
Huh? But I heard she died from an arrow wound she got in the attack on the
  capital......

Volunteer Soldier:
This is what I heard. The ringleader was the tactician Jenon who is supposedly
  a mild mannered man...

Volunteer Soldier:
That sounds suspicious~ Is this New Bronquian Empire of Master Gulcasa's really
  alright?

Volunteer Soldier:
It's gotta be better than Emperor Soltier's. If it gets worse than the previous
  government we can flee to a neighboring country.

Volunteer Soldier:
We're fine with anything as long as we're not in the country that's losing.

Officer:
Hey, you maggots! Cease your chatter!!

Aegina:
Silence!!
Master Gulcasa, the Blazing Emperor of the New Bronquian Empire is here to
  grace us with his words!

Gulcasa:
...............

Volunteer Soldier:
That's Master Gulcasa... This is the first time I'm seeing him, but even at
  this range his intensity is tremendous.

Officer:
......That is a true hero. That is what a hero acts like!
It is because of him that the government that no one could overthrow was
  overthrown!

Gulcasa:
Hear me, brave soldiers!!
The reason I stand here today is because of the great number of my comrades and
  their dreams, just like yourselves.
Borrowing your strength I was able to put an end to the corrupt Bronquian
  government......
But what I am after is a world where the weak are not oppressed. Not the
  country, the world!
In order to create a world without senseless cruelty I will unify all the
  countries together.
And after crossing these countries' fences, I will make a completely new world!
I ask that you lend me your strength! For the sake of creating a new world!
For the sake of making a world without injustice or discrimination, where no
  one suffers from senseless cruelty!!

Officer:
Hooray for Master Gulcasa! Hooray for the New Bronquian Empire!

Volunteer Soldier:
But can we really do something like changing the world...

Volunteer Soldier:
We'll be fine! After all, we'll have Master Gulcasa, the Blazing Emperor, with
  us!!

Volunteer Soldier:
That's right. I mean, up until now hasn't Master Gulcasa made the impossible
  possible!?

Volunteer Soldier:
Y- yeah, you're right!

Volunteer Soldier:
Hooray for Master Gulcasa, the Blazing Emperor!! Hooray for the New Bronquian
  Empire!!

Leon:
Oho... Unifying the world. That's starting off grand. Kukuku... I'm itching to
  begin!

Aegina:
I too will put in my efforts to succeed Shiskia's dying wish.
And once her leg heals, I'm sure Sis will lend us her strength as well.

Luciana:
Of course......
And one day we will conquer the Kingdom of Fantasinia.

--HAVE BALDUS
| Baldus:
| I have entrusted you with my life once. I will follow you to the ends of the
|   world!
-----

--HAVE MIZER
| Mizer:
| I'm gonna become a bounty hunter. I don't have the build for the Empire's
|   military.
-----

Emilia:
Is there anything I can do? I want to help big brother out too.

Luciana:
Your body will grow and you will become an adult, Emilia.
But more than anything, you are Master Gulcasa's sister. You could not possibly
  be powerless.

--HAVE EUDY
| Eudy:
| Today is a day to celebrate! We really should fire off a gun salute!!
-----

Gulcasa:
Everyone, we will be busy from here on... I ask that you continue to lend me
  strength. I am counting on you!

Nessiah:
By the way, Master Gulcasa. About those two we locked up in jail......

Gulcasa:
I told you I will decide what to do with them, Nessiah.
Do not bring up this matter again. I will not be lenient. Do you understand?

Nessiah:
Yes, as you wish......

Gulcasa:
...............
I am the Blazing Emperor Gulcasa! Successor of Brongaa's blood!!
I have discarded the name I used in the past... It is unnecessary.
I will fight and fight until the fighting is done! And then I will surely
  create a new world!!

  -----------------------------------------------------
Jenon:
Medoute, do you have any more water? My throat is dry.

Medoute:
Again? You've got surprisingly little endurance, Jenon.

Jenon:
Well, here, up until now we've always been watched by our subordinates. So I
  faked that I had endurance.
But now it's just you and me on a traveling around at ease. Don't tell me I
  have to be tougher.

Medoute:
......I can't believe this.
I suppose it can't be helped... Here's the canteen. Don't drink all of it.

Jenon:
You're a life saver, thanks!

Medoute:
...............
Right about now they should be having a commemoration ceremony of the New
  Bronquian Empire in Flarewerk.
I've heard that they've started calling Gulcasa the Blazing Emperor. Meaning an
  Emperor of flames.
They say he has tremendous support from the people......

Jenon:
Medoute, let's not talk about him.
Garlot and Gulcasa are different people.
He doesn't exist anymore. Just as Shiskia will never smile again.

Medoute:
But after locking us in jail he let us escape without killing us.
He may not have been taken over by the demon dragon's blood completely.

Jenon:
Even so, we don't have the power to stop him.

Medoute:
I wish I could have stopped him somehow. Because from now on he will surely
  lose a lot on his way forward.

Jenon:
But we can't stop him the way he is now. None of them will stop.
I expect that the people who find life in fighting will be enraptured by
  Gulcasa's power......

Medoute:
...That may be.

--HAVE SLEIP
| Sleip:
| Hic, Uuueih......
|
| Jenon:
| It's Sleip!
|
| Sleip:
| Jenon, Medoute... Hic... Imma goin' with you.
-----

Jenon:
Now then...... Shouldn't we get going? Where should we head this time?

Medoute:
Let's try heading south. How about boarding a ship and sailing to a different
  continent?

Jenon:
A different continent, huh. Why not. I wouldn't mind forgetting about this
  country a little.
...............
Medoute, do you have any more water? My throat is dry.

Medoute:
Enough, cut it out!

  -----------------------------------------------------
Gulcasa, having overthrown the former Empire and achieved revolution, 
established the New Bronquian Empire and took on the title of Blazing Emperor.

Many of his comrades took on important positions in the new imperial
government, and pledged to continue their efforts in order to unify the new 
Empire.

But those who were there at the start of the private army, Shiskia, Jenon, and 
Medoute, were no longer around.

After that the Bronquian Empire, under Blazing Emperor Gulcasa's good governing 
and military strength, and having flourished beyond what was expected right 
after the revolution, had become a threat to its neighboring countries......

Invading its neighbor, the Kingdom of Fantasinia, and achieving its shocking 
plan for conquest took a mere three years......


                      ===================================
                          ***      Chapter 6B     ***
                                     血と涙
                          ***   Blood and Tears   ***
                      ===================================

========================================================================[Map44]
悲劇
Tragedy
Outskirts of Tiera - Private Army Housing


--------------------Intro--------------------                        [Map44.01]
Due to Pandra's disappearance the remnants of the rebel army had formed a mob 
and stability in the western region deteriorated all the more.

To prevent Pandra's return and build personal connections, Count Velleman set 
out with the private army to patrol various cities in the region.

While restoring peace in each city Count Velleman and the others built strong 
personal connections and, after a month long trip, returned to Tiera.

All the members of Gram Blaze looked forward to the return to the residence, 
however......


----------------Before Battle----------------                        [Map44.02]
Garlot:
It looks like the unrest wasn't as bad as the rumors made it out to be. 

Nessiah:
Is it not possible that upon hearing of Gram Blaze's visit they quieted their
  activities?
Setting aside the suppression of bandits, Count Velleman felt the people
  respond on this trip.
While restoring peace he built distinct connections with the influential people
  of the various cities......
The Count is quite the negotiator. I have only praise for his skills.

Shiskia:
You really think so?
Well, I don't really get the difficult stuff, but...... In any case things
  worked out, right?

Jenon:
Yeah, it' fine not to understand the little details.

Shiskia:
...Hey Jenon, are you making me sound stupid?

Jenon:
Huh, what are you talking about...!?

Garlot:
Hey, not again. Enough of your lovers' quarrel.

Shiskia:
It's not a lovers' quarrel!!

Garlot:
Anyways, all of us made it back to Tiera in one piece. Isn't that what's most
  important?

Shiskia:
But that's not really satisfying...... ...Mumble, mumble...

Garlot:
And I bet Aegina wants to hurry and get back to Luciana, right?

Aegina:
Master Garlot...... I would like to speak to you on that topic for a moment.
My sister's leg is recovering well. That is all thanks to you and the others
  protecting us.

Garlot:
Enough of that. That's just what friends do.

Aegina:
I am sorry to trouble you with this, but as soon as sister's leg heals we may
  have to take our leave......

Garlot:
Hm?

Shiskia:
Eh, what? You want to leave Gram Blaze Aegina!?

Aegina:
Shh, Shiskia! Keep your voice down!!

Jenon:
Hmm, the two of you won't be around, then. It'll be lonely without you......

Aegina:
Because of your shouting, Shiskia, everyone gathered around!

Garlot:
Can you tell us why, Aegina? Are you unhappy being with us?

Aegina:
No, it's not that......

Medoute:
Then why?

Aegina:
There is something sister and I must accomplish.
A more personal problem, one that does not coincide with Gram Blaze's
  activities.
That is why, so as to not cause trouble for everyone, we would like to leave.

Garlot:
I see. If it's a reason like that then there's nothing we can do to stop you.

Shiskia:
Wait, hang on. Couldn't we help you out with what you want to do?

Medoute:
Leave it alone, Shiskia. Everyone has a thing or two in their past they want to
  leave hidden.

Shiskia:
Hmm, I suppose so......
Sorry, Aegina.

Aegina:
It's fine. We're the ones causing everyone trouble, after all.

Garlot:
But it's not like you're planning to leave right now, right?

Aegina:
That's right. I would like to thoroughly discuss it with my sister first......

Garlot:
Then we've still got time. There's no need to rush.

Shiskia:
But, Aegina... if something happens that really bothers you, you can talk to us
  any time.
Gram Blaze isn't all there is to us. There really are more important things.

Aegina:
Thank you, Shiskia......

Messenger:
Hah... hah... M- Master Garlot!

Garlot:
You're one of the soldiers in charge of the residence in our absence...

Messenger:
W- we've trouble! The residence is under attack...!!

Aegina:
Sis! Is sister alright!?

Leon:
How's Elena!?

Messenger:
My apologies, I barely managed to escape myself...

Leon:
You bitch, I'll kill you!! How dare you escape alone!

Medoute:
Control yourself Leon. She risked her life to get away and bring us this
  information.

Leon:
Tch!!

Garlot:
All troops, full speed ahead! Hurry to the residence!!

|--------------|
|    ATTACK    |
|-Under Siege!-|
|--------------|

Shiskia:
The housing is completely surrounded!

Zilva:
There's no doubt about it. It's the Divine Order.

Aegina:
Then their target really is sister. Those dirty......!!

Garlot:
Anyway, let's recapture the residence!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Recover the surrounded residence!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
     Garlot or Aegina dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Garlot:
Protecting the survivors is our top priority! Push as hard as you have to; open
  a way through their line!!

Divine Order Soldier:
It's the younger of the sisters. Die by God's will.

Aegina:
Come near me and I shall strike you down!


------------------Mid Battle-----------------                        [Map44.03]
Divine Order Soldier:
......Is this it.

|-----------------------|
|    KILLED IN ACTION   |
|-A Warrior has Fallen.-|
|-----------------------|

Divine Order Soldier:
Rear guard, hold back Gram Blaze's invasion. Advance guard, continue to search
  for the elder sister.

|--------------|
|    ATTACK    |
|-Under Siege!-|
|--------------|

|    |
|    |           UNTIL THIS LIFE BURNS OUT
| /\ | The Divine Order's ring is as strong as ever!!
|/  \|

Aegina:
Their forces are immense...... There is no end to them!!

Garlot:
There's nothing we can do but continue to attack! We'll have to trust in
  Luciana's quick thinking for the rest!

Luciana:
The pressure of their attack has lessened? Could Aegina and the others have
  come to rescue us...?
Even if we hide in this narrow hallway we'll be found sooner or later. We must
  find a way out!

Amy:
Are you okay? Aren't you scared?

Luciana:
......There are times in your life that you must overcome your fear.
Besides, compared to the enemy Aegina and I must fight they are nothing!
......Kh.

Amy:
Are you okay, Missy Luciana? What's wrong?

Elena:
Is your leg hurting? You really shouldn't be moving it so much...

Luciana:
I'm alright...
I'm sorry to have involved you in this...... It's my fault.

Amy:
It's okay, Missy Luciana.

Luciana:
In any case, it's dangerous here. We must get out of this ring of enemies
  somehow...

  /--Victory--------------
 / Rescue the isolated trio!!
/----------------

       ----------------------Defeat--/
          Garlot or Aegina dies...  /
  Luciana is lost while fleeing... /
        Use up all your cards...  /
            ---------------------/

Divine Order Soldier:
The elder should have an injured leg. Deal with finding her first.
Blocking Gram Blaze from saving her is enough.

  -----------------------------------------------------
|    |
|    |          THE BATTLE CONTINUES!
| /\ | Luciana has arrived at the escape point!!
|/  \|

Luciana:
There was supposed to be an emergency exit around here......

Amy:
Hey, Missy Luciana...... I have a bad feeling about this. Let's hide somewhere!

Luciana:
It's okay, Aegina and the others should be buying us time......

|---------------------|
|        AMBUSH       |
|-Unexpected Enemies!-|
|---------------------|

Elena:
Miss Luciana, watch out!

|-------------------|
|       SNIPED      |
|-A Technical Shot!-|
|-------------------|

Luciana:
!?
Aah...... Owww.

Amy:
Missy Luciana!!

Garlot:
Wasn't that Amy screaming!? Did something happen to Luciana?

Aegina:
Sister!

Amy:
Missy Luciana...! Missy Luciana!!

Luciana:
Cough, cough...! A- Amy, Elena, run... away......

Amy:
No, no! We have to get away together!!

Divine Order Soldier:
The elder one has been wounded fatally.

Amy:
Wha-!?

Elena:
No......!!

Divine Order Soldier:
Returning to the main force immediately.

Amy:
Th- they left......

  /--Victory--------------
 / Break the Divine Order's circle around the residence!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
     Garlot or Aegina dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Aegina:
If something has happened to Big Sis...... I will destroy the Divine Order... I
  will slaughter them all!


-----------------After Battle----------------                        [Map44.04]
Divine Order Soldier:
Ghuoo...!

|    |
|    |            THE VICTORY WITH SORROW
| /\ | The Divine Order is destroyed!! However......
|/  \|

Divine Order Soldier:
Ku, ku, ku, by the Divine Will the elder sister has lost her life.

Aegina:
What......!!

Divine Order Soldier:
Regret your foolishness of defying God's Will... as you mourn for your
  loss......!

|------------------------|
|      LOSS OF LIFE      |
|-One Mere Common Death.-|
|------------------------|

Divine Order Soldier:
...Oooh! Glory to the Divine Order!!

Aegina:
Big Sis! Luciana!!

  -----------------------------------------------------
Amy:
Missy Luciana! Please, open your eyes!!

Shiskia:
Aegina! Garlot! Over here!!

Garlot:
Are you three alright!?

Elena:
Amy and I are fine, but Miss Luciana......

Luciana:
Ugh... Aegina......

Medoute:
She's come to! Luciana!! Hang on, we'll treat you right now......

Luciana:
That is not necessary......
Aegina, I'm sorry... It looks like we won't be able to keep fighting for
  revenge together...

Aegina:
No, I don't want to be left alone, Sis!
I made it this far because we were together. I can't do it alone......

Luciana:
If you don't think you can do it you don't have to......

Aegina:
Huh...?

Luciana:
You can live here... together with Master Garlot......
Live the way you want... that is my wish...... Do what you wish... and
  smile......
...............

|------------------------|
|      LOSS OF LIFE      |
|-One Mere Common Death.-|
|------------------------|

Aegina:
Big Sis? Sis!? S- Sis!

Shiskia:
...This, this can't be! This isn't funny, Luciana, stop it......

Medoute:
...............
Losing a companion like this......

Zilva:
This is my fault...... it should have been my duty to keep track of the Divine
  Order's movements......

Shiskia:
Sorry, Zilva. This isn't your fault, but I'd rather not speak with you right
  now......

Garlot:
Damn it...! Just who are these Divine Order bastards!!
How is this God's will! It's all complete bull! Just what are they saying
  Luciana and Aegina did...!

Aegina:
The Divine Order is probably a secret organization of the Fantasinian Kingdom.

Leon:
Huh?

Aegina:
The only ones who have something to gain from our deaths are the bastards of
  the Fantasinian Kingdom. I've no doubt they're connected...

Jenon:
The Kingdom of Fantasinia is the large country next to ours, right? What would
  they want with you two......

Garlot:
This is everyone's problem now. Can you explain it to us?

Aegina:
...Very well. I will tell you everything.
Sister and I are twins who were born in the Kingdom.
Our father's name is Ordene......

Jenon:
Ordene? Isn't that the king!?

Aegina:
That is correct.

Shiskia:
If that's true... you two are princesses of the Kingdom?

Aegina:
But as soon as we were born we were targeted by assassins.
Back then we got lucky and escaped danger, but as you see, in the end......

Jenon:
But why were you targeted?

Aegina:
That is because we are twins. In the Kingdom they are hated children. That is
  how I understand it.

Shiskia:
That's the only reason?

Nessiah:
I see. If the firstborn are twins there is the possibility of complications
  arising around succession rights.

Aegina:
A certain old soldier was the one to save us... He is the one who took us out
  of the country.
And when we drifted to the Empire we were taken in and raised by Marquis
  Albert.

Shiskia:
So that's what happened......

Aegina:
I don't know who is behind the assassination attempts, but I am sure that the
  offender is someone from the Kingdom.

Shiskia:
This is why I hate nobles and royalty!
Going as far as killing babies in their lust for power. It's like they're not
  human, really!

Aegina:
At any rate, the Kingdom abandoned us. They are an enemy that earned their
  hatred.
They took away the place where we belong, targeted our lives, and killed
  Sis......
The flames of my hatred will not be extinguished.

Shiskia:
Aegina......

Amy:
I'm sorry, Missy Aegina. I couldn't protect Missy Luciana......

Aegina:
You've no need to apologize, Amy.

Shiskia:
That's right. The killers are the ones whose fault it is.

Amy:
But if I had the strength to fight I could have helped somehow......

Shiskia:
You're just a child, Amy. It can't be helped.

Amy:
But I... I......

Medoute:
Everyone, let's take some time and rest. We're all still tired from the
  expedition as well.

Aegina:
You're right.
But before that, please allow me to apply Sis's makeup one last time. Just
  the two of us......

Garlot:
Okay. I'd like to give you that.
We'll decide what to do from here on out, including how to deal with the Divine
  Order, in the morning.

Aegina:
...............


------------------Locations------------------                        [Map44.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
Gram Blaze's housing, established at the outskirts of Tiera


--------------------On Map-------------------                        [Map44.07]
--邸宅内部 - Within the Army Housing
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|   Blue Stinger  |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| Hm? This rapier...
| It looks similar to Aegina's weapon... Whose is it?
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| ...There's a rapier on the ground.
| ...Is it Aegina's? No, it couldn't be. She's fighting with us right now.
| But then who...?
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| There's a rapier on the ground...
| This is a well honed treasure. It doesn't look like something of an ordinary
|   soldier...
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| Mn... There's a rapier over there...
| Does it belong to a common soldier? The edge is too clear for that... Whose
|   is it?
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| ......! This rapier is...
| Big Sis's...
| ......Divine Order scum!!
|
|---NESSIAH
| Nessiah:
| Oh, this sword...
| ...I see. That's how it is.
|
|---LEON
| Leon:
| Hey, there's a rapier lying around.
| This isn't a bad sword. ...But it has an eerily beautiful blade.
|
|---ZILVA
| Zilva:
| A rapier is on the ground.
| This sharpened blue blade... I feel I've seen it before...
| Could it be Luciana's...?
|
|---MIZER
| Mizer:
|
|---SLEIP
| Sleip:
|
|---PAMELA
| Pamela:
|
|---BAIFU
| Baifu:
|
|---EATER
| Eater:
|
|---EUDY
| Eudy:
| Ah, isn't this a sword lying around?
| ...The blade is spotless. Even I can tell this is an excellent sword.
-----


---------------------Loss--------------------                        [Map44.08]
Defeat - Out of Cards (1st)

In a suicide attack to break through the Divine Order's line, Gram Blaze was 
scattered due to a flaw in tactics, and was forced to disband...

Defeat - Aegina Defeated (2nd)-------------------------

|-----------------------|
|    KILLED IN ACTION   |
|-A Warrior has Fallen.-|
|-----------------------|

Aegina:
Sister, I am sorry...! Looks like... this is it for me...

|    |
|    |  DEATH OF A HERO
| /\ | Aegina has fallen!
|/  \|

In a suicide attack to break through the Divine Order's line, Aegina's life was 
lost. The Gram Blaze, crushed one by one, was annihilated...

Defeat - Garlot Defeated (3rd)-------------------------

|-----------------------|
|    KILLED IN ACTION   |
|-A Warrior has Fallen.-|
|-----------------------|

Garlot:
Sorry Aegina, Luciana...! I can't... fight anymore...

|    |
|    |            DEATH OF A HERO
| /\ | Gram Blaze's captain, Garlot, has fallen!
|/  \|

In a suicide attack to break through the Divine Order's line, Gram Blaze's 
captain, Garlot, lost his life, and Gram Blaze vanished from history's stage...


========================================================================[Map45]
復讐
Revenge
Kanosa Highway


--------------------Intro--------------------                        [Map45.01]
A single night after Luciana's death Gram Blaze ran into another shock, the 
sudden disappearance of Aegina.

Controlled by her desire for vengeance, they could think of just one place she 
could have gone......

Garlot readied to chase after her, but Count Velleman had forbidden it.

The private army stirring up trouble with the royal army deviated far from 
Count Velleman's stance... And having discarded Aegina their battles with the 
Divine Order would quiet down...... That is why he said he would not approve 
Gram Blaze's dispatchment.

But Garlot ignored Count Velleman's order and decided on his own to chase after 
Aegina.


----------------Before Battle----------------                        [Map45.02]
Shiskia:
......Velleman sure is stubborn; telling us to abandon Aegina. Really, I'm so
  mad!

Medoute:
As far as Count Velleman is concerned Gram Blaze's actions are his own.
I can understand what he's saying. Different people have different positions.
  It can't be helped.

Garlot:
And as a result we came here without a word to Velleman......
It feels like we did something bad, but from here on out we'll decide things
  ourselves.

Amy:
...I'm sorry, Missy Shiskia. I'm just in the way. I can't fight with
  everyone......

Shiskia:
Don't say that! I couldn't fight when I was your age either, Amy.

Amy:
But I never do anything but house-sitting... Even after we've been driven out
  of the house...
I'm not useful to anyone. I want to be useful.

Garlot:
Don't cry. You want to be strong, right?
If you hate being useless think of a way to get stronger and take that path.

Amy:
Oh, yeah...

Shiskia:
Hang on! What are you telling a child!

Elena:
...............

Leon:
Don't you brood over it too much either, Elena.

Elena:
Yes, brother. I understand, just......

Jenon:
We should hit the Kingdom's border any time now.

Medoute:
The city of Karona is on the border. If we just approach as is we'll be spotted
  by the army border unit......

Leon:
Garlot! There's a royal army squad deployed straight ahead!!

Zilva:
From the looks of it they are engaged in battle. It looks like they've
  surrounded their adversary.

Garlot:
Surrounded!? Could it be Aegina?

Aegina:
Gkh...!

Royal Army Officer:
Tighten the ring!! Don't let her step on Kingdom soil!
Nevertheless, who is this girl? She fights like a demon.
And her appearance resembles Princess Yggdra... The soldiers are having some
  trouble.

Zilva:
There is no mistake; that is Aegina.

Medoute:
Let's go, Garlot! First let's save Aegina!!

Shiskia:
Amy, stay close to me!!

Amy:
O- okay......

   /--Victory--------------
  / Rescue the isolated Aegina!!
 /(Place a unit next to Aegina!)
/----------------

   ----------------------Defeat--/
                Garlot dies...  /
          Aegina is crushed... /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Royal Soldier:
Commander! Commander Russell!! An identified force has appeared from the
  direction of the Empire's border!

Russell:
That standard... Aren't they the ones the rumors spoke of; the ones suppressing
  rebels in the Empire, Gram Blaze!?
Could that girl be one of theirs......
This is bad! All troops, focus your attention in the direction of the Empire's
  border!!

Garlot:
Rescuing Aegina is top priority. Break through them!


------------------Mid Battle-----------------                        [Map45.03]
|----------------------------------|
|               RESCUE             |
|-Valiant Blade Delivers its Lord.-|
|----------------------------------|

Aegina:
Master Garlot!? Why are you here!?

Garlot:
We're here to save you, of course!

Aegina:
Your goal was to make the Empire into a place without senseless cruelty......
My revenge is a personal matter. That is why I left Gram Blaze and decided to
  fight!

Garlot:
If I ignore senseless cruelty happening right in front of me, how can I change
  the world!!
And besides, I will never abandon a friend! Never!!

Aegina:
Master Garlot......

|    |
|    |     THIS LIFE TOO CAN BE SAVED
| /\ | Successfully joined up with Aegina!!
|/  \|

Garlot:
Let's go, everyone!

Shiskia:
Of course!

Jenon:
Now, ladies and gentlemen of the royal army. Get ready!

Leon:
Ku ku ku, I'm itching to start.

Zilva:
Without doubt. We will save Aegina.

Eudy:
Let's make this flashy.

  /--Victory--------------
 / Crush the commander of the defense squad!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
     Garlot or Aegina dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Russell:
They've joined forces... That girl really was a member of Gram Blaze.

Commander:
It seems she has reinforcements... Can you win, Russell?

Russell:
I will hold them back somehow. If they get past, Karona will become a
  battlefield.
I will prevent that if nothing else.

  -----------------------------------------------------
RUSSELL RETREAT

Russell:
No...... They're strong!
Commander, I apologize...... I must retreat for the moment.

|------------------|
|      RETREAT     |
|-Time to Regroup.-|
|------------------|

Commander:
What robust soldiers...... If their goal is to invade our country then there is
  no mystery that Karona will be assaulted!
I will buy time here!
Russell, protect Karona! And my daughter Flone as well!!

|-------------------|
|  REINFORCEMENTS   |
|-Help has Arrived.-|
|-------------------|

Royal Soldier:
Hey, back up the others!

Garlot:
Tch, reinforcements...... Archers on the other side of the river will be a
  nuisance.

Aegina:
Is there a way to cross to the other side of the river somehow and attack them?
If we use that bridge...!

  -----------------------------------------------------
Commander:
We cannot let them cross the border!!

-----------------After Battle----------------                        [Map45.04]
Commander:
I could not... stave them off......

|    |
|    |    DRIVEN BACK THE ENEMY
| /\ | Crushed Karona's commander!!
|/  \|

Commander:
Invading bastards...... Don't think your advantage will last forever!
Russell, the rest is up to you......

|-----------------------|
|    KILLED IN ACTION   |
|-A Warrior has Fallen.-|
|-----------------------|

--RUSSELL REMAINING
| Russell:
| The main force has fallen...
| Continuing to hold the front line here will only lead to more casualties.
| I will take command in the Commander's place! All troops, retreat to Karona!!
-----

Aegina:
Invaders... Ones who intrude and assault the country... Fufu, I'm alright with
  that.
Invaders to smash up the Kingdom!! That's fine, that's just what I wanted!!
Just wait, Sis... I will carry out our revenge!

  -----------------------------------------------------
Shiskia:
Some of the scouts that went to check on the situation in Karona have returned.
It seems that that officer by the name of Russell set up a considerably strong
  defense......

Zilva:
It would be difficult to attack from the front.

Nessiah:
Everyone, may I have a minute?
We have come here without telling Count Velleman.

Garlot:
Velleman's probably furious.

Nessiah:
Furious? It would be wonderful if that were all.

Garlot:
But... Ah, well... I suppose...

Nessiah:
I would like to discuss what to do from here on out. Am I correct in saying
  that you plan to continue forcing your way into the Kingdom this way?

Aegina:
Yes, you are.
I am thinking of causing ruckus in the Kingdom while spreading my name to find
  the one behind my sister's murder.

Nessiah:
I see......

Shiskia:
Aha, did you get cold feet, Nessiah?

Nessiah:
That's not it, but due to the drastic shift in our policies many of our
  soldiers may be confused.

Garlot:
Yeah, Nessiah has a point. The right thing to do would be to decide on our
  plans and inform the soldiers before entering the Kingdom.
First let me say what I think. I want to help Aegina in her fight.
And this includes Luciana as well; I could never forgive the senselessness of
  someone trying to assassinate two young children.
But this has nothing to do with our previous goal of changing the Empire.
So those who want to leave the group speak up now. I won't turn back, so I
  won't blame anyone.

Shiskia:
I agree with Garlot. How about everyone else?

Aegina:
...............

Garlot:
...............

Shiskia:
...Hm?

Jenon:
No one is saying anything. Are they......

Medoute:
That's not it. They're saying that no matter what you choose they will go with
  you.

Leon:
Don't be stupid! I'm only along for this because messing up the Kingdom sounds
  fun!

Eudy:
Sigh, you're so predictable.

Leon:
Shut your mouth!!

Garlot:
Then it's settled.

Aegina:
Thank you so much, everyone.
But I have one request...... I would like to have the role of captain.

Shiskia:
Huh? Really?

Aegina:
From now on we will be seen as invaders by the Kingdom.
There is no need for Master Garlot to bear the stigma of being the captain of
  an invading army......

Jenon:
Hold on, hold on! The Royal Army already knows of Gram Blaze.
That won't change no matter who the captain is. And this will cause problems
  for the Count as well.

Garlot:
Velleman, huh......

Jenon:
That's right! It would be best if we show ourselves as having a just cause as
  we move forward.
Aegina is the Kingdom's princess, right? So let's emphasize the legitimacy of
  her right to the throne.
If their enemy is a princess of their own country the Royal Army should be
  shaken somewhat, and the Count can use the situation as well...
At least that's my idea. How about it?

Nessiah:
I see... And because we will be fighting for a just cause our morale should
  rise as well.
And if the legitimacy of her blood is clear, we may even receive aid.
I believe this is a very good plan, yes.

Medoute:
Well, the part about Count Velleman is desperate, though.

Jenon:
Hahaha......

Garlot:
Then from here on out Gram Blaze is Aegina's personal guard.

Medoute:
I can't believe this. And yet, I have no problems with it either.

Jenon:
As we expected, Karona's defense is strong. Getting past it will be difficult.
But if it's hard to pass, it would be nice if we could avoid it instead.

Shiskia:
Avoid it? How? We could if we could fly, but we can't.

Jenon:
With a ship we could go around over the sea. We could borrow a few merchant
  ships.

Nessiah:
Sigh, all the funds will be gone in one go......


------------------Locations------------------                        [Map45.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
Road straddling the border and connecting the Empire and Kingdom

   --寒村エラク - Meager Village of Erak
Small village on the border of the Kingdom and Empire


--------------------On Map-------------------                        [Map45.07]
--寒村エラク - Meager Village of Erak - FIRST TIME
|
|-------------------------|
|        ACQUISITION      |
|   -Received Treasure!-  |
|Dark Matter -> Dark Sabre|
|-------------------------|
|
| Magician:
| The Imperial Army? No, your equipment differs from that of the regular
|   army... Who are you?
| ...The private army of an imperial nobleman, Gram Blaze, then. Rumors of you
|   have reached even here.
| Hn? This feeling... Do you have dark matter?
| Hm... Allow me to borrow it.
| By tempering a substance of the spirit world, a weapon of the spirit world is
|   born...... Now, make use of it.
|
|---AFTERWARDS
| Magician:
| When I was young I was enrolled in the magical academy...
| But one day I glanced over a book on black magic at the library.
| It was as if my life had changed...
| Since then I have devoted myself to researching it alone in this border land.
|
|---NO DARK MATTER
| Magician:
| The Imperial Army? No, your equipment differs from that of the regular
|   army... Who are you?
| ...The private army of an imperial nobleman, Gram Blaze, then. Rumors of you
|   have reached even here.
| This is the border town of Erak... There is not much here, but feel free to
|   relax.
-----


---------------------Loss--------------------                        [Map45.08]
Defeat - Aegina Defeated (1st)

|-----------------------|
|    KILLED IN ACTION   |
|-A Warrior has Fallen.-|
|-----------------------|

Aegina:
I'm sorry, Sis... I cannot... go forward... anymore...

|    |
|    |                 RESCUE FAILED
| /\ | Aegina has lost her life in the violent battle!
|/  \|

Although Gram Blaze rushed to join up with Aegina, who was surrounded, her life 
was lost. The Gram Blaze, crushed one by one, was annihilated...

Defeat - Garlot Defeated (2nd)-------------------------

Although Gram Blaze fought hard to repel the approaching Royal Army, Gram 
Blaze's captain, Garlot, lost his life, and Gram Blaze vanished from history's 
stage...


========================================================================[Map46]
覚醒
Awakening
Southern Karona - Rodney Road


--------------------Intro--------------------                        [Map46.01]
Once everyone unanimously decided to march to the kingdom's capital and 
declared Aegina the heir to the throne, Garlot took on the role of the leader 
of her guard.

Despite the castle Karona, standing on the way to the capital of Paltina, being 
a great obstacle, thanks to Jenon's bold plan they procured a local ship to 
sail around and thus they made it through without a fight.

The group marched hurriedly to the capital. Meanwhile, Russell, having noticed 
their surprise attack on the capital, quickly organized a pursuit unit.

The two groups clashed on Rodney Road in southern Karona......


----------------Before Battle----------------                        [Map46.02]
Garlot:
Quickly, get to the capital!

Shiskia:
Don't be ridiculous, Garlot. It's not like everyone here is on horseback.

Jenon:
But once Karona's army notices that, instead of being right outside the castle,
  we've suddenly vanished they'll be quite surprised......
It's only a matter of time until they notice us. We have to hurry as much as we
  can.

Aegina:
Thank you so much, everyone.

Garlot:
It's nothing, Aegina. Er, no, Princess Aegina.

Aegina:
Please, there is no need to call me that......

Jenon:
Huh, that does have a ring to it. Princess Aegina.

Aegina:
...............

Jenon:
Whoops, I'm just digging a hole for myself, aren't I?

Shiskia:
By the way, Garlot. You let Amy ride on horseback, but is she really okay?

Garlot:
She doesn't look too well... But she was the one who asked to ride.

Amy:
I- I'm... okay. Perfectly fine. No... problem.

Shiskia:
I knew it... Wouldn't it have been better to leave her with someone?

Garlot:
Isn't that irresponsible? You wouldn't neglect someone who's like a little
  sister.
Besides the pipsqueak is strangely calm during battle. Is that because of all
  the time you sent traveling?

Amy:
Maybe...... While I've traveled I've seen people be robbed and die.
So I can fight! Even though I'm not as strong as Mister Captain.

Garlot:
You can, really?

Shiskia:
No, Garlot! Amy is still a child!!

Garlot:
...Oh, yeah, right.

Amy:
Mn! I'm not a child!

|---------------------|
|       ENCOUNTER     |
|-Enemies Just Ahead.-|
|---------------------|

Royal Soldier:
There they are! There's no doubt!! They're the ones who killed the commander!
Quickly, a messenger! Get word to commandeer Russell right away!!

Jenon:
No, we've been found!

Medoute:
We have to rout them and move on! We must get away from here before Karona's
  army catches up!!

Shiskia:
Amy, over here! It's too dangerous to be with the cavalry in battle!

Amy:
U- ugh......

  /--Victory--------------
 / Crush the scout unit and hurry to the capital!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
     Garlot or Aegina dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Royal Soldier:
Buy time until commander Russell arrives!

Garlot:
Hurry to the capital! All units attack!!


------------------Mid Battle-----------------                        [Map46.03]
Royal Soldier:
Kyaaaa!!

|    |
|    |           DRIVEN BACK THE ENEMY
| /\ | Crushed the scouts of Karona's defense unit!!
|/  \|

Royal Soldier:
We couldn't... join up with the reinforcements......

|-------------------|
|  REINFORCEMENTS   |
|-Help has Arrived.-|
|-------------------|

Russell:
No, your bravery was not for naught! You have done well!!

Royal Soldier:
Commander... Russell......

Garlot:
No...... Russell caught up with us.
Now we have to defeat them as well......

|-------------------|
|  REINFORCEMENTS   |
|-Help has Arrived.-|
|-------------------|

Baldus:
Are you truly capable of that?

Medoute:
That's Baldus, the God of War!? Why is an Imperial General in the Kingdom?

Baldus:
We've received word from Count Velleman that you have taken his soldiers and
  fled.
I've heard that you plan to start a conflict with the Kingdom and worsen our
  relations with them.

Garlot:
Velleman, why you......

--SHISKIA IS ON THE MAP
| Shiskia:
| That's a sad thing to say. I bet Velleman thinks that we betrayed him as
|   well.
|
|---JENON IS ON THE MAP
| Jenon:
| This isn't just Count Velleman being angry. We're the ones who up and left.
|   There was no avoiding this......
|
|---MEDOUTE IS ON THE MAP
| Medoute:
| If the Count had not said that he would have been punished as well.
|
|---THE THREE ABOVE ARE NOT ON THE MAP
| Aegina:
| I doubt Count Velleman had any choice but to say that......
-----

  /--Victory--------------
 / Survive the attack of the Royal and Imperial Alliance!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
     Garlot or Aegina dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Baldus:
Commander Russell, I would like to ask for the King's permission.
We the Imperial Army would like to assist in Gram Blaze's destruction.

Russell:
If you wish permission from His Highness one such as myself cannot give it.
But I also have the personal matter of avenging my commander.
I would like the judgment of their commander left to me.

Baldus:
Let us treat this delicately.

Garlot:
The Royal and Imperial armies have teamed up...... What do we do?

Amy:
Missy, Mister, I want to fight too...... I want to protect everyone too......

  -----------------------------------------------------
|    |
|    |               UNTIL THIS LIFE BURNS OUT
| /\ | Tough battle against Russell and Baldus's alliance!!
|/  \|

Garlot:
We're just barely surviving! Isn't there a way to break through?

Aegina:
Master Garlot...... Did I desire too much?

Garlot:
Aegina......

Aegina:
I've met such a strong and kind man such as yourself, and was blessed with so
  many friends......
And I wanted to carry out my revenge on top of that. I must have desired too
  much, right?

Garlot:
That's not true. You can't give up Aegina!!
If you don't give up and keep fighting you'll see your dream someday, so...!

Amy:
Don't give up and keep fighting......
That's right, I can't just say I have no power and give up...

Shiskia:
Amy?

Amy:
I won't give up, just like in my search for big brother...... I won't give up
  and I'll fight!

Shiskia:
H- hang on, Amy! Where are you going? It's dangerous!!

Amy:
My power is sealed together with my real name. That's what that person
  said......
So......

Royal Soldier:
......U- ugh...

Amy:
My real name is Emilia! Give me back my power with my name!!

Royal Soldier:
...Hm? W- what?

Emilia:
Uwaaaa!!

|-----------------------|
|       AWAKENING       |
|-Hidden Blood Boiling.-|
|-----------------------|

Emilia:
...............

Aegina:
Miss Amy...?

Shiskia:
A- Amy...... Why did you get on a griffon?
Get down! It's dangerous!

Garlot:
What's the pipsqueak doing...?

--MEDOUTE IS ON THE MAP
| Medoute:
| Amy... That child...!
| My feelings are jumbled up. This is the first time I've ever felt something
|   like this. What could it be?
-----

Emilia:
Hot...... The blood flowing around inside me is hot......
But I feel power rising up! I know I can fight now!

Russell:
What happened to that child? Mounting an abandoned griffon......

Baldus:
I feel a terrifying power from that young lady. What is she?

  /--Victory--------------
 / Destroy the Royal and Imperial alliance!!
/----------------

   ----------------------Defeat--/
      Garlot or Aegina dies...  /
          Emilia is crushed... /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

  -----------------------------------------------------
RUSSELL DEFEATED

Russell:
It can't be... Dying like this......
Karona is so far away... What is this. Everything is getting blurry...
F- Flo... ne......

|------------------------|
|      LOSS OF LIFE      |
|-One Mere Common Death.-|
|------------------------|

  -----------------------------------------------------
BALDUS DEFEATED

Baldus:
Ghuaah!
We the Steel Knights... were defeated... How could that... be......
R- regrettable......

|------------------------|
|      LOSS OF LIFE      |
|-One Mere Common Death.-|
|------------------------|


-----------------After Battle----------------                        [Map46.04]
|    |
|    |            ESCAPED DANGER SOMEHOW
| /\ | Broke through the crisis with Emilia's help!!
|/  \|

Emilia:
Look at that! Wow! Now I can fight too!
I can be part of Mister Captain's troops!
And I can help Missy Shiskia and Missy Aegina!
Ahaha! I should have just gone by my real name from the start!
Ahahahahaha!

Garlot:
She really surprised me. Amy's got that much power...

Aegina:
If we didn't have Miss Amy repelling the enemy would have been so much more
  difficult.
But, is this really for the best......

Shiskia:
Amy! That's enough, get down already!

Emilia:
Mis-sy Shiskia! It's not Amy, it's E-mi-li-a~!!

Shiskia:
Whichever, get down! It's really dangerous!

Emilia:
Ahahahaha! Ahahahahahahaha!

  -----------------------------------------------------
Medoute:
Garlot, do you have a moment?

Garlot:
Hm? It's you, Medoute. Is this about leaving Gram Blaze?

Medoute:
That's something that can be discussed once we've finished with Aegina's
  situation.
Right now I'd like to talk about Amy... rather, Emilia. Hasn't she been acting
  a bit odd?

Garlot:
That is true, but isn't that just her being happy because she's got power now?

Medoute:
That's not what I'm talking about. I have this feeling. It's like my blood is
  stirring......

Garlot:
Your blood is stirring? What does that mean?

Medoute:
To be honest, I'm a descendant of the dragon slayer Gill.

Garlot:
Dragon slayer Gill...... Oh, that guy that they say killed the demon dragon
  Brongaa, right?

Medoute:
Yeah, though I'm only distantly related.
Ever since I was born I've been taught about the lineage of the hero and of
  dragon slaying.
That part of me can feel it. Amy has the demon dragon's power.

Garlot:
Aren't you over-thinking it?

Medoute:
I hope that I am, but......

Garlot:
Though, if Emilia really does have Brongaa's blood, what are you gonna do?
Will you kill her because of your connection to Gill?

Medoute:
Of course not.
I wouldn't kill Amy for something like that.
Lineage is nothing important. It's- it's not.

Garlot:
In that case couldn't you just disregard that uncomfortable feeling?

Medoute:
That's true, you're right, but...
I hear that Brongaa's power changes people. Garlot, I'd like it if you could
  keep an eye on Emilia.

Garlot:
Medoute is a dragon slayer...... I had no idea.
Brongaa's power changes people, huh......

Emilia:
Missy Shiskia, wasn't I helpful?

Shiskia:
Yeah,... you were, I was just a little startled.
But how about you not do anymore dangerous stuff, okay?

Emilia:
I'll be fine! I'm strong now!

Shiskia:
But you know we'll still worry. So do you think you can listen to me?

Emilia:
...Oh, okay.

Garlot:
We're over thinking it. She wouldn't change just by getting some power.


---------------------Vs.---------------------                        [Map46.05]
--Garlot vs. Russell
|
| Russell:
| Are you the leader!? I will avenge the commander!
|
| Garlot:
| Yet another person swearing revenge on me...honestly I'm worried that I've
|   gotten a little used to this.
|
|---VICTORY
| Garlot:
| If you care about your life get outta here! That's my last warning!!
|
| Russell:
| If I lose it for the sake of the Kingdom, my life is not important to me!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Garlot:
| Kh, no......
|
| Russell:
| If you underestimate the strength of the Astral Fencer you will regret it!
-----

--Shiskia vs. Russell----------------------------------
| Russell:
| I prefer not to fight with girls... However, there are things I must protect!
|
| Shiskia:
