| Their situation is just like ours. The reason we're all fighting is the
|   same...... It's sad, but this is reality.
|
|---VICTORY
| Shiskia:
| The enemy is faltering! Now is our chance!!
|
| Russell:
| R- regroup!!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Russell:
| I will prevent you from getting to the capital!
|
| Shiskia:
| We'll do what we have to to break through...
-----

--Jenon vs. Russell------------------------------------
| Jenon:
| We went to such trouble to avoid fighting at Karona, and we did well too, and
|   yet we ended up fighting you anyway, sigh...
|
| Russell:
| Worry not, you will be defeated by us here. Your disgrace will not be
|   exposed.
|
|---VICTORY
| Russell:
| Why you...!
|
| Jenon:
| It's alright, I can still keep going......
|
|---DEFEAT
| Russell:
| I will offer your head at the commander's gave!
|
| Jenon:
| Give me a break.
-----

--Medoute vs. Russell----------------------------------
| Medoute:
| We will overcome this adversity and continue to the capital!
|
| Russell:
| We will not let you!
|
|---VICTORY
| Medoute:
| We've the advantage...... Alright, press them back at once!!
|
| Russell:
| Don't falter! Preserve our ranks!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Russell:
| Reorganize while fighting! Our side has the greater forces!!
|
| Medoute:
| They've capitalized on the terrain advantage and are crushing us with
|   numbers.
| But there's still a way to win......
-----

--Emilia vs. Russell-----------------------------------
| Russell:
| Do you really expect the addition of a single unit to turn things around!
|
| Emilia:
| Don't underestimate my power! I can do anything now...... I just know it!!
|
|---VICTORY
| Russell:
| W- what is this power!?
|
| Emilia:
| Hehe~! That's why I said not to underestimate me~
|
|---DEFEAT
| Emilia:
| O- ouchie!
| Next time will be different~!
-----

--Aegina vs. Russell-----------------------------------
| Russell:
| She's here! Surround her! Crush her in one shot!!
|
| Aegina:
| ...Once we overcome this hardship victory will be ours! Watch us, Big Sis!!
|
|---VICTORY
| Russell:
| We've the advantage in numbers! Don't falter! Push on!!
|
| Aegina:
| There is no end......
|
|---DEFEAT
| Aegina:
| They can't... I cannot be beaten yet...
-----

--Nessiah vs. Russell----------------------------------
| Nessiah:
| You've quite the skill with the sword. For a human that is. Fufufu...
|
| Russell:
| What an unsettling man...
|
|---VICTORY
| Russell:
| Is this unit immortal?
|
| Nessiah:
| I'll acknowledge that you've skill, but in your current state of mind you
|   cannot defeat us.
|
|---DEFEAT
| Russell:
| I cannot feel any response. Yet he should have been injured.
|
| Nessiah:
| Ah, it seems I've been hit. Fufufu...
-----

--Leon vs. Russell-------------------------------------
| Leon:
| It seems that you're at least a little capable, but, I will make you regret
|   pointing your sword at me.
|
| Russell:
| The one to regret will be you. The sword of the one known as the Astral
|   Fencer will cut you down!!
|
|---VICTORY
| Leon:
| Keh, Astral Fencer, huh. You're not worthy of that name......
|
| Russell:
| W- Why you......
|
|---DEFEAT
| Leon:
| Kh, that 'Astral Fencer' title's not just for show, huh?
| But, there won't be a next time!
|
| Russell:
| If that's all you've got, no matter how many times you try, the result will
|   be the same!
-----

--Zilva vs. Russell------------------------------------
| Zilva:
| I will make the way for Aegina to advance!
|
| Russell:
| What spirit... Everyone, stay on your guard!!
|
|---VICTORY
| Russell:
| Her aim is extremely precise...... Raise the shields, we retreat for the
|   moment!
|
| Zilva:
| Do not let them escape... Preserve the current distance and continue to fire.
|
|---DEFEAT
| Russell:
| Your aim may be true, but at this distance it is our side that has the
|   advantage!
-----

--Mizer vs. Russell------------------------------------
| Mizer:
|
|---VICTORY
|
|---DEFEAT
-----

--Sleip vs. Russell------------------------------------
| Sleip:
|
|---VICTORY
|
|---DEFEAT
-----

--Pamela vs. Russell-----------------------------------
| Pamela:
|
|---VICTORY
|
|---DEFEAT
-----

--Baifu vs. Russell------------------------------------
| Baifu:
|
|---VICTORY
|
|---DEFEAT
-----

--Eater vs. Russell------------------------------------
| Eater:
|
|---VICTORY
|
|---DEFEAT
-----

--Eudy vs. Russell-------------------------------------
| Russell:
| Taste my blade!
|
| Eudy:
| Agh, how annoying. If we had a canon we could take guys like this down in one
|   shot...
|
|---VICTORY
| Eudy:
| Looks like we can get them even without a canon. I must congratulate myself.
|
|---DEFEAT
| Russell:
| Surrender quietly! I promise to spear your subordinates' lives.
|
| Eudy:
| Meaning that you'll take mine then? Sorry but no!
-----

--Garlot vs. Baldus------------------------------------
| Garlot:
| This fight has nothing to do with the Empire! Take your troops and leave!!
|
| Baldus:
| I see you don't understand what you're saying when you, as citizens of the
|   Empire, proceed like this.
| Velleman too will be punished appropriately. You can die as an apology to
|   him!!
|
|---VICTORY
| Baldus:
| You charge like a lion, Garlot......
|
| Garlot:
| We have nothing to do with the Empire anymore! We'll choose our path
|   ourselves!!
|
| Baldus:
| I am envious of that youth. However, I must stop you.
|
|---DEFEAT
| Baldus:
| I see you've steadily grown in power. But that ends here!!
|
| Garlot:
| We won't be stopped here!
-----

--Shiskia vs. Baldus-----------------------------------
| Shiskia:
| Hang on! Why are you guys here?
|
| Baldus:
| Talkative traitor! I Baldus will stop you for certain!!
|
|---VICTORY
| Shiskia:
| We can do it! We can do it now!!
|
| Baldus:
| The right flank has been obliterated!! ......No!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Shiskia:
| We won't be beaten here... We'll clear the way for Aegina!
-----

--Jenon vs. Baldus-------------------------------------
| Jenon:
| Sigh, even the Imperial army's here. We've certainly gotten famous.
|
| Baldus:
| His drive is not mere youthful recklessness. I can feel an extraordinary
|   determination......
|
|---VICTORY
| Jenon:
| Okay, We've endured this. Let's muster our strength now!
|
| Baldus:
| Youth really is...
|
|---DEFEAT
| Baldus:
| My side has the advantage... And yet his drive has not changed. He is a well
|   trained soldier.
|
| Jenon:
| We have something we're fighting for! That's why we won't lose!!
-----

--Medoute vs. Baldus-----------------------------------
| Medoute:
| Our opponents are a skilled cavalry unit...... They will likely attack with
|   the momentum from their charge.
| All troops band together! We'll evade the momentum of their attack.
|
|---VICTORY
| Baldus:
| They compensate for their low numbers with superior tactics...... What a
|   skilled group.
|
|---DEFEAT
| Medoute:
| I guess cheap tricks really can't stop them......
-----

--Emilia vs. Baldus------------------------------------
| Emilia:
| Whee! The bad guys look like groveling ants from up here! Oka-y, atta-ck!!
|
| Baldus:
| A griffon! No! Keep your eyes on the sky!!
|
|---VICTORY
| Emilia:
| Ahaha, so easy~!
|
| Baldus:
| That was truly a casual attack... Yet the power behind it could be called
|   violently brave!
| Just who is that lass...?
|
|---DEFEAT
-----

--Aegina vs. Baldus------------------------------------
| Aegina:
| Sister, lend me strength......
|
|---VICTORY
| Aegina:
| I cannot lose......
|
|---DEFEAT
| Baldus:
| Traitors to the Empire deserve death!
|
| Aegina:
| I cannot be beaten, I must not......
-----

--Nessiah vs. Baldus-----------------------------------
| Baldus:
| Nessiah..., I hear you're a false prophet manipulating the human heart.
|
| Nessiah:
| I admit to manipulating human hearts, but one cannot call my prophesies
|   false.
| Let's see your power, God of War!
|
|---VICTORY
| Nessiah:
| Do you regret having called me a false prophet?
|
| Baldus:
| Ghnn!!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Baldus:
| He is not reacting at all......
|
| Nessiah:
| You are as powerful as expected. Fufufu......
-----

--Leon vs. Baldus--------------------------------------
| Leon:
| The Shield of Bronquia, huh. I'm surprised you came here personally.
| Honestly I'm glad I get the chance to cross blades with you.
| I'm the warrior, Leon! Here I come!!
|
| Baldus:
| I like your spirit!
|
|---VICTORY
| Leon:
| What's wrong, God of War!
|
| Baldus:
| What open bravery! I can feel it reach my heart!!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Leon:
| Tch! I failed...!
|
| Baldus:
| I see you have the tenacity to win. But you'd bet learn the difference in
|   experience in this match.
-----

--Zilva vs. Baldus-------------------------------------
| Zilva:
| I fight for Aegina......
|
| Baldus:
| This girl's eyes are full of aspiration!!
|
|---VICTORY
| Baldus:
| She chooses only those that stand out and shoots them down one after
|   another...
| Such sharp skill and composure, this is the first time I've met someone who
|   can make such a wonderful performance. Foe or not, well done!!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Zilva:
| So agile......
|
| Baldus:
| You won't get past this unit with that level of skill!
-----

--Mizer vs. Baldus-------------------------------------
| Mizer:
|
|---VICTORY
|
|---DEFEAT
-----

--Sleip vs. Baldus-------------------------------------
| Sleip:
|
|---VICTORY
|
|---DEFEAT
-----

--Pamela vs. Baldus------------------------------------
| Pamela:
|
|---VICTORY
|
|---DEFEAT
-----

--Baifu vs. Baldus-------------------------------------
| Baifu:
|
|---VICTORY
|
|---DEFEAT
-----

--Eater vs. Baldus-------------------------------------
| Eater:
|
|---VICTORY
|
|---DEFEAT
-----

--Eudy vs. Baldus--------------------------------------
| Eudy:
| I wonder if we can survive this situation?
|
| Baldus:
| Your answer is no!
|
|---VICTORY
| Eudy:
| Phew... I'm not very good at this sort of battles.
|
|---DEFEAT
| Eudy:
| This is why I'm bad at these things.
|
| Baldus:
| Don't let them escape! Catch and annihilate them at once!!
-----


------------------Locations------------------                        [Map46.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
Road tying the Capital of Paltina to Karona

   --錬金術師の屋敷 - Alchemist's Mansion
A plain mansion were the 'Stardust Alchemist' lives


--------------------On Map-------------------                        [Map46.07]
--メプルの木 - Mepple Tree
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|      Mepple     |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT:
| This is a big tree... There's fruit on it too.
| We're still a ways from the capital. Let's secure some food.
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| Ah, this tree is...
| I knew it, it's a Mepple tree. There's fruit on it too.
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| This is a big tree. Is it a Mepple?
| Oh, it's got fruit. I'll take some.
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| Oh, it's a Mepple tree. Does it have any fruit?
| I see some.  I'll pick a few.
|
|---EMILIA
| Emilia:
| Ah, there's fruit growing at the top of the tree~. I'll get some. There.
| Ehehe, got it~.
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| A large tree. Does it have fruit as well?
| Ah, there's some growing there.
|
|---NESSIAH
| Nessiah:
| This tree sure is large... How long has it stood here for, I wonder.
| As expected there is fruit on it. I can smell it. Fufufu...
|
|---LEON
| Leon:
| This is an especially huge tree.
| Oh, it's got fruit. Hey, someone bring some here.
| What, can't I do it myself, you ask? Stop complaining and get it down!
| ...You can climb a tree. It's not dangerous. Geez...
|
|---ZILVA
| Zilva:
| ...Mn. I see fruit up in that tree.
| Securing for emergency rations.
|
|---MIZER
| Mizer:
|
|---SLEIP
| Sleip:
|
|---PAMELA
| Pamela:
|
|---BAIFU
| Baifu:
|
|---EATER
| Eater:
|
|---EUDY
| Eudy:
| We've got to do something about the pursuit unit. If the battle continues I
|   can tell it'll be hard going for us, sigh.
| Ah, this tree... There's fruit growing on it. Let's take one.
-----

--ロドニー街道 - Rodney Road---------------------------------
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
| Griffon Feather |
|-----------------|
|
|---GARLOT
| Garlot:
| If only the griffon rider unit there hadn't found us...
| Ah, there are griffon feathers scattered around, huh.
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| Ah? The ground around here...
| There are lots of griffon feathers scattered around. Should I gather them up?
|
|---JENON
| Jenon:
| Being discovered by the griffon rider unit... We really messed that one up,
|   sigh.
| This is from that group. There are so many feathers...
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| I'd like to hurry and head for the capital, but we've got to deal with the
|   pursuit unit first.
| ...There's a large quantity of the scout unit's griffon's feathers scattered
|   around here.
|
|---EMILIA
| Emilia:
| Huh, there's lots of feathers here.
| I bet they're from the griffon unit at the start.
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| If only we hadn't been seen by the griffon unit...
| The feathers from those guys are scattered here...
|
|---NESSIAH
| Nessiah:
| So, Miss Emilia has awakened. This is getting interesting. Fufufu...
| Oh, these are griffon feathers. I will take them.
|
|---LEON
| Leon:
| The Empire and Kingdom have joined forces, huh... They must be the strongest
|   on the continent now.
| Well, there's no point grumbling about it. We'll smash them and hurry to the
|   capital!
| Oh, these are the scout unit's griffon feathers...
|
|---ZILVA
| Zilva:
| ...If we don't continue on this road and quickly push to the capital...
| Mn... The feathers from the scout unit are scattered on the ground.
|
|---MIZER
| Mizer:
|
|---SLEIP
| Sleip:
|
|---PAMELA
| Pamela:
|
|---BAIFU
| Baifu:
|
|---EATER
| Eater:
|
|---EUDY
| Eudy:
| Ah, there's a number of griffon feathers scattered around this area.
| Can they be used for anything? Let's take a few. There.
-----

--錬金術師の屋敷 - Alchemist's Mansion - FIRST TIME-----------
|
|---AFTERWARDS
|
|---NO ITEM
| Alchemist:
| It's gotten noisy outside...
| What? There's a battle going on? Hey, hey, is this really the time for you to
|   come to a place like this?
| ...A number of formidable foes have gathered, I see.
| I feel it may be destiny that brought us together. My skills in alchemy may
|   be able to help you somehow...
| ...............
| It does not seem like I can be of any help from the items you have on you.
| Sorry... It doesn't seem like I can contribute anything.
-----


---------------------Loss--------------------                        [Map46.08]
Defeat - Garlot Defeated (1st)

|-----------------------|
|    KILLED IN ACTION   |
|-A Warrior has Fallen.-|
|-----------------------|

Garlot:
Sorry Aegina, Luciana...! I can't... fight anymore...

|    |
|    |                  DEATH OF A HERO
| /\ | Aegina's personal guard leader, Garlot, has fallen!
|/  \|

Fighting to annihilate the royal scout unit they came in contact with, the 
group's commander, Garlot, died. Aegina's personal guard bore the stigma of 
invaders forever...

Defeat - Aegina Defeated (2nd)-------------------------

|-----------------------|
|    KILLED IN ACTION   |
|-A Warrior has Fallen.-|
|-----------------------|

Aegina:
Big Sis, I'm sorry...! I cannot... keep going...

|    |
|    |  DEATH OF A HERO
| /\ | Aegina has fallen!
|/  \|

Fighting hard to smash through the circle of Royal and Imperial army troops, 
Aegina's life was lost. Her personal guard too was annihilated...

Defeat - Emilia Defeated (3rd)-------------------------

|-----------------------|
|    KILLED IN ACTION   |
|-A Warrior has Fallen.-|
|-----------------------|

Emilia:
N-no! I haven't helped anyone yet... no......

|    |
|    |   DEATH OF A HERO
| /\ | Emilia has fallen!
|/  \|

Fighting hard to smash through the circle of Royal and Imperial army troops, 
Emilia lost her life. Having lost the advantage she brought, Aegina's personal 
guard was annihilated as well...


========================================================================[Map47]
帰郷
Homecoming
Capital of Paltina - Main Entrance


--------------------Intro--------------------                        [Map47.01]
Emilia took on her true name and took back the power sealed within her.

Thanks to her contribution the group escaped their predicament.

Emboldened by the addition of another powerful fighter, Gram Blaze moved toward 
the capital.

The group, having been hindered once, pressed on through a blitz assault Jenon 
suggested, and finally neared capital Paltina.

Under an enemy assault, the capital trembled.

But the group, with a great disadvantage in numbers, wanted to end the fighting 
before the chaos settled down. They wanted the battle to be swift.


----------------Before Battle----------------                        [Map47.02]
Shiskia:
Garlot! I've spotted a battalion deployed in front of the castle!

Jenon:
Their numbers are quite small, and I don't think it's due to them sending their
  best, either.

Medoute:
It looks like something's shaken them up, not at all like Karona's troops.
Did they get caught flat footed by our blitz?

Nessiah:
No, even on that point, this situation is not logical. Let us not neglect our
  caution.
That aside, the ones in front of us are a problem. One we must remove.

Aegina:
This is the royal capital Paltina...
Just a little longer, Sis......

Emilia:
Hey, Big Bro Captain, is the fighting starting again?

Garlot:
Yes, soon. Though if reinforcements come we'll be in trouble.

Emilia:
I want to hurry up and fight. We just have to beat up the enemy, right?
So let's start already!

Medoute:
...............

Eudy:
Ah? That man on top of the castle gate...... We've met him before.

Garlot:
Isn't he that Minister who showed up when we nabbed the Ur's Tear?

Zilva:
That man is the founder of the Divine Order.

Garlot:
Really?

Zilva:
Yes, though he does not make a habit of showing his face, I can tell from his
  mannerisms.

Aegina:
He is the mastermind!

Jenon:
Who's the other person with him? Looks like a young lady. She looks a little
  like Aegina......

Aegina:
What? Is it Princess Yggdra!?

Shiskia:
You mean... That's Luciana and Aegina's little sister?

Aegina:
She's no sister of ours! She is nothing more than a despicable brat who built
  her life on our sacrifices and took all the affection of the royal family for
  herself!!

Shiskia:
You don't have to yell like that......

Yggdra:
Whose troops are those?

Alanjame:
They are the Empire's troops, Princess.
That said, they are not the regular army, just some ruffian faction. Mere
  rebels, you could say.
Sigh...... If they want to raise a ruckus they should do it in their own
  country.

Yggdra:
Then, those troops have come to start war in our kingdom? How horrible!

Alanjame:
And moreover, it may not be a nice thing to bay, but they... No, it is too much
  for me to even say it.

Yggdra:
What is it? Please tell me, Alanjame.

Alanjame:
Well, honestly... they are using the name of your elder sister to make a claim
  for the throne of our royal family.

Yggdra:
To say such a thing... How cruel......
That deserves judgment. In the name of justice and the Holy Sword......

Alanjame:
Princess...... It is about time we return inside.
The fighting is about to begin. If you are hurt by a stray arrow His Highness
  would never forgive me.

Yggdra:
Very well...... please help us return to the days of peace as quickly as
  possible.

Alanjame:
Now, prepare the canon! Be gentle with it, gentle!!

Garlot:
No way, they're getting a canon ready!!

Eudy:
Ah? That canon... That's a high quality product.
I'm so jealous! The kingdom has such good understanding of firearms, not at all
  like the Empire.

Jenon:
This isn't the time to be so easygoing! We can't attack it up on the castle
  walls!

Emilia:
I'll do it! I can get up there easy!!

Garlot:
Ah, hey! Don't act without orders!

Shiskia:
But, you know, that really saves us. We can't cope with canon fire from above.

Jenon:
That's true. Let's leave the canon to Emilia and focus on breaking through the
  gate!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Annihilate the capital's defense force!!
/----------------

   ----------------------Defeat--/
      Garlot or Aegina dies...  /
         Emilia is crushed...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Aegina:
Will Miss Emilia be alright?

Garlot:
We'll have to trust her to be. We've gotta beat the forces here before the
  reinforcements arrive!!


------------------Mid Battle-----------------                        [Map47.03]
|-------------------|
|      BARRAGE      |
|-Fire in the Hole!-|
|-------------------|

Royal Soldier:
We will protect our capital!
Canon ready! Now, fire!!

  -----------------------------------------------------
Emilia:
A-hup, I made it~!

Royal Soldier:
Hm...! The enemy is here!? Are they after the canon?

|---------------------|
|        AMBUSH       |
|-Unexpected Enemies!-|
|---------------------|

Divine Order Soldier:
......Just as predicted. This too is God's Will.

Garlot:
Oh no! It's an ambush! The canon was a trap to distract Emilia!!

Zilva:
Those are Divine Order soldiers......
I may not have been informed, but it seems there really is a connection between
  the Kingdom and the Divine Order......

Emilia:
What's this~. There are so few of you. That's a bummer.

Divine Order Soldier:
.........?

Emilia:
And you don't react at all, that sucks too...... I'll take care of you quick.

  -----------------------------------------------------
|-------------------|
|      BARRAGE      |
|-Fire in the Hole!-|
|-------------------|

Royal Soldier:
They're still going strong! Don't let your guard down!!
Take aim! Fire---!!

  -----------------------------------------------------
Royal Soldier:
What is this kid...... How do we beat something like this......

|------------------------------|
|            ASSAULT           |
|-An Elite Battalion Appeared!-|
|------------------------------|

Royal Soldier:
Kyaaaaa!!

Emilia:
I got the canon~!

Medoute:
Emilia is really strong, despite her young age......

Emilia:
Big Bro Captain! I got the canon, right?

Garlot:
You did good, Emilia!! Leave the rest to us!

Emilia:
Oka~y!


-----------------After Battle----------------                        [Map47.04]
|    |
|    |       ENEMY OVERWHELMED!
| /\ | Annihilated Paltina's defense!
|/  \|

|-----------------------|
|    KILLED IN ACTION   |
|-A Warrior has Fallen.-|
|-----------------------|

Garlot:
Did we get everyone?

Aegina:
I see no reinforcements either. This is our chance if we are to break the
  gates!

Garlot:
Alright, put all you've got into it!!

|---------------------------|
|        OPENING GATE       |
|-The Gate has been Opened!-|
|---------------------------|

Aegina:
It's open! Now, into the castle!!

Garlot:
Wait, Aegina! Let's take a moment and regroup outside!

Jenon:
Yes. It's the enemy's castle after all. We can't be too careful.

Aegina:
...Alright.

  -----------------------------------------------------
Emilia:
I did it everyone! Praise me, praise me~!

Shiskia:
Good job, Emilia. Thanks to you a lot fewer people got hurt.

Emilia:
Ehehe~! I can help even more!

Garlot:
Somehow we made it all this way. Nessiah's planning and Jenon's tactics worked
  great.

Jenon:
Honestly I didn't expect that things would go as well as they did.

Shiskia:
That's not like you. Why aren't you cocky like always now that you're finally
  being praised?

Jenon:
I'm just surprised. Toppling a country with just a single plan like this, it's
  hard to believe right away.

Nessiah:
I too am worried about that. No matter what their circumstances were, they
  shattered too easily.
It's unthinkable that, under normal circumstances, this is all it would take to
  break through a castle gate.

Medoute:
Now that you mention it, common sense would say that this is too few troops to
  have in a defense squad.

Leon:
Couldn't they just be underestimating us?

Medoute:
Or, perhaps it's some kind of invitation.

Zilva:
......Captain.

Garlot:
What is it, Zilva?

Zilva:
Aegina is gone.

Garlot:
Aegina? Don't tell me she went alone...!


------------------Locations------------------                        [Map47.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
Main entrance of Fantasinia's capital, Paltina

   --王都の大砲 - Paltina's Canon
Canon on the castle walls. A 'high quality product' according to Eudy


---------------------Loss--------------------                        [Map47.08]
Defeat - Garlot Defeated (1st)

Though Aegina's personal guard began an attack that would have destroyed the 
Royal Capital's defenses, their captain, Garlot, was killed. Aegina's guard 
bore the stigma of invaders forever...


========================================================================[Map48]
再会
Reunion
Castle Paltina - Audience Chamber


--------------------Intro--------------------                        [Map48.01]
Garlot and the others, having broken through the gates of the capital, felt 
uneasy at the lack of resistance.

Just as the group was taking caution of an enemy trap, news of Aegina's 
disappearance struck them.

Aegina, filled with desire for vengeance against the kingdom, stormed into the 
castle, into the audience chamber. There, in the place she had struggled so 
hard to reach, her reunion with a certain person had come to pass.

Meanwhile Gram Blaze, wanting to know where Aegina was, advanced into the 
castle the Divine Order had vanished into...


----------------Before Battle----------------                        [Map48.02]
Aegina:
Castle Paltina. The castle we were born in and driven out of......
The castle where we were supposed to have lived.
Sis, I've returned!
I am not here for the crown! Only to fulfill our revenge!!
Princess Yggdra! Do you hear me!
While you were dressing up in dresses we were swinging our swords focused on
  nothing but achieving our revenge.
While you were being showered with love we were distracting ourselves from our
  misery with hatred.
I hate you, our replacement who lived so comfortably, to the point of killing
  you!
I will not put up with it any longer! All my patience was for this moment, the
  moment when I kill you!
Where are you Yggdra! I'll kill you here and now!

|-----------------|
|      SORTIE     |
|-Follow my Lead!-|
|-----------------|

Man in High Class Clothing:
You say some dangerous things, invader.

Aegina:
You're......

Man in High Class Clothing:
Fantasinia's 31st king, Ordene.

Aegina:
Ordene!? Then, you mean that you're my ...

Ordene:
Letting the enemy get this far...... It seems the responsibility of managing
  our defenses was a bit much for Alanjame.
If he had just asked for help there would be no need for me to come deal with
  this......

Aegina:
King Ordene. I......

Ordene:
Stop, invader. Invading by force is a thing I will not forgive, no matter what
  the reason.
It is my duty, as a king, to protect my country, and as a father, to protect my
  daughter.

Aegina:
As a king, and as a father......

Ordene:
Come, invader. I will be your rightful opponent.

  /--Victory--------------
 / Give King Ordene what he deserves!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
     Garlot or Aegina dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Aegina:
...That's right! I hate you as well!!
Why did you abandon us! Why didn't you protect us!!
Wasn't it you that tried to kill us because of some old custom!

Ordene:
What is this you speak of?

Aegina:
You still pretend you don't know! How cunning!
The swords are already drawn! Don't bother reaching out now......
Let's go, Ordene! My sword will cut you to pieces!!


------------------Mid Battle-----------------                        [Map48.03]
Ordene:
What a strong sword that is to stand up to the Gran Centurio... It does not
  seem to be an ordinary long sword.

Aegina:
My sister is always beside me. The weight of my blade is from our resentment.

Ordene:
Tell me, young lady!
Are you saying that you, a citizen of the Empire, have some sort of grudge
  against me, the ruler of this kingdom?

Aegina:
A citizen... of the Empire......
You're wrong! I am not from the Empire!!

Ordene:
Hm?

  -----------------------------------------------------
Ordene:
Tell me, why do you hate me and the Kingdom?

Aegina:
And now you try to placate me! After all this!

Ordene:
I am not!! I merely wish to know the reason!

Aegina:
Give me back my sister!!

  -----------------------------------------------------
Aegina:
We're all sisters, so what makes us different from Yggdra!

Ordene:
Sisters with Yggdra?

Aegina:
Answer me Ordene! Why!!

Ordene:
No, could you really be......

|----------------------------------|
|               RESCUE             |
|-Valiant Blade Delivers its Lord.-|
|----------------------------------|

Garlot:
Aegina, are you alright!?

Aegina:
Master Garlot...

|-----------------|
|      SORTIE     |
|-Follow my Lead!-|
|-----------------|

Royal Soldier:
Your highness! We're here to help!!

|    |
|    |         THE MISSION CONTINUES ON
| /\ | Royal army reinforcements have arrived!!
|/  \|

Ordene:
Aegina!?
Aegina...? No, how could...... How could that be......

  /--Victory--------------
 / Defeat King Ordene and achieve revenge!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
     Garlot or Aegina dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/


-----------------After Battle----------------                        [Map48.04]
|    |
|    |   HAS THE FIGHT ENDED WITH THIS?
| /\ | Aegina has achieved her revenge...!
|/  \|

Ordene:
Guah......

Royal Soldier:
Your highness!

Ordene:
Stand down!!
The battle is already decided...... Your interference is not needed!

Royal Soldier:
B- but...

Ordene:
I said stand down! There is something... cough...... I have to confirm with
  this lass...

Aegina:
Ordene......

|--------------------|
|     WITHDRAWAL     |
|-Forced to Retreat.-|
|--------------------|

  -----------------------------------------------------
Aegina:
Is this what victory feels like?
I've killed the father that abandoned me. That too was part of my revenge.
But now that I've succeeded I feel nothing but emptiness.
What did I gain from this? Tell me, Sis, Luciana......

Ordene:
......Luciana, Aegina. I've not heard those names in so long.

Aegina:
.........!!

Ordene:
Luciana, Aegina. The names of the two princesses that were born and died while
  I was away on campaign......
But the more I hear, the more I feel that you are Aegina......
Are you... a spirit?
Has Aegina, who died so young, been resurrected and come before her father to
  cleanse her anger...?

Garlot:
Hang on, what are you talking about?

Jenon:
We've been told that when they were born someone tried to assassinate them and
  they fled to the Empire......

Ordene:
Assassinate?
That's not true. The two were frail of body and died soon after they were born.

Aegina:
Don't lie! Didn't you try and kill us because twins were hated here!?

Jenon:
The stories don't match. One of the two, or perhaps a third party is lying.

Medoute:
King Ordene...... Could you tell us a little more about the twins' deaths?

Ordene:
Around the time the queen was due to give birth I had to leave to suppress a
  revolt of a savage tribe in the east.
Before battle I received word of the delivery and the infants' premature death.
When I returned, all I had to hold were two cold babes...

Shiskia:
Then, you mean, Luciana and Aegina had already died then?

Aegina:
That cannot be...
I know I am alive! And Sis was as well, until a few days ago......
That, that's a lie... You will not confuse me with it!

Jenon:
Calm down, Aegina. Let's hear the whole story.

Ordene:
...............

Jenon:
As I said, someone else is lying.

Medoute:
If that's the case it would have to be the one who reported the death of twins.

Nessiah:
That's right. The chance that Aegina is lying is exceedingly small.
That is because she continues to be relentlessly pursued by the Divine Order
  who act as the vanguard for the Kingdom.

Aegina:
And who killed Sis.

Ordene:
It can't be... Then who were the dead infants I held that day...?

Jenon:
I think they were likely replaced. Since the king was away they had a chance to
  make preparations.

Medoute:
But finding another pair of twins as a replacement is a difficult task. If this
  person did not have great power...

Shiskia:
And he's also the Divine Order's...

Jenon:
That's right, the Divine Order's founder. Alanjame!

|-------------------|
|       SNIPED      |
|-A Technical Shot!-|
|-------------------|

Ordene:
Ugh...

Jenon:
King Ordene!?

Medoute:
We're under fire! Everyone get down!! Shiskia, find the enemy!!

Garlot:
The mastermind has appeared......


------------------Locations------------------                        [Map48.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
Large chamber in the heart of castle Paltina.


---------------------Loss--------------------                        [Map48.08]
Defeat - Aegina Defeated (1st)

|-----------------------|
|    KILLED IN ACTION   |
|-A Warrior has Fallen.-|
|-----------------------|

Aegina:
My revenge is right in front of me...! How miserable...

|    |
|    |  DEATH OF A HERO
| /\ | Aegina has fallen!
|/  \|

In the death match with the kingdom's master swordsman, Ordene, Aegina lost her 
life. Having lost the one they had to protect her guard too was annihilated...


========================================================================[Map49]
黒幕
Mastermind
Castle Paltina - Audience Chamber


----------------Before Battle----------------                        [Map49.02]
Garlot:
...............

Medoute:
Is everyone alright!?

Jenon:
King Ordene! Please hang on...!!

Ordene:
Gkh...!

Aegina:
Where did... Where did this arrow come from......

Medoute:
No! Don't move!!

|--------------|
|    ATTACK    |
|-Under Siege!-|
|--------------|

Alanjame:
Oh my, it seems His Highness is not the only one here.
But not even a strong swordsman like you can evade an arrow while injured.

Ordene:
It was you, Alanjame... Why such violence......?

Alanjame:
My plan of twenty years is finally being realized.
Originally this plan was supposed to take a little more time to be ready......
But thanks to the ladies and gentlemen of this private army I was able to
  shorten it! I really must thank you.

Aegina:
Then the one who contributed to the attempts on our lives when we were young
  was......

Alanjame:
Yes, that was me. You were a hindrance to my plan. I thought you had better
  disappear.

Medoute:
A hindrance!?

Alanjame:
In my public role as the king's faithful minister... And behind the scenes as
  the head of the Divine Order I remove that which hinders me......
Honestly, my plan went quite smoothly. Thanks to the king's simpleminded
  honesty.

Ordene:
...............

Alanjame:
Honestly, the reason you had to die was not because you were the heir to the
  throne.
But twins were a problem...... With twins it was obvious that the question of
  succession would turn messy.
It would be the worst thing for the country if it were split by rising disputes
  caused by having twins as heirs.

Aegina:
And you tried to kill us for a ridiculous reason like that! You killed Sis for
  that!!

Alanjame:
Ridiculous reason? You just don't understand the greatness of my plans. Truly
  you are a second-rate princess.
On that point princess Yggdra is outstanding. Having grown up pampered in every
  way she has no reason to doubt my words.
And now she's my puppet. He he he!

Shiskia:
...............

Leon:
You're disgusting.

Zilva:
Toying with the lives of others, how terrible of the Order's founder. I am
  embarrassed to have served you......

Alanjame:
Oho...... Are you not that traitor who turned her back on God's Will and left
  the Divine Order.

Zilva:
God's Will? That's irrelevant! I do as I wish!

Alanjame:
You were also a poor puppet. All this foolhardy opposition......
Puppets should act as such and quietly do as I say!

Aegina:
We're not puppets! We'll survive God's Will, much less you deciding that we're
  unnecessary!!

Alanjame:
That's enough of that. It's time I send you to join your sister!

Garlot:
Being used like puppets...... Do you think we'd accept living like that?
You think I'd allow that kind of senselessness!?
There's no way! Your life is worthless!!

Alanjame:
Say whatever you want! There's only one thing left before my brilliant plan is
  realized!
Once you're all taken care of, everything can be explained with the king and
  the rebels having killed each other!

Jenon:
That's why the castle guard was so sparse. So that you could use us to achieve
  your coup d'etat!!

Garlot:
Just how low can you get!!

Alanjame:
With Yggdra, the only surviving member of the royal line, the country will be
  mine!!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Defeat the ringleader, Alanjame!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
               Garlot dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Garlot:
We'll put an end to this! We'll beat you and make everything right!!

Alanjame:
Protest all you want, puppets! The Divine Order I nurtured will tear you limb
  from limb!


-----------------After Battle----------------                        [Map49.04]
=====================================================================[EndingB1]
Alanjame:
Guah!!
I- it can't be...! My ambitions, my dreams... Is this where this all ends...!?
N- no... I don't want... to die...!!

Aegina:
You've killed countless people, yet you're afraid to die yourself......

Garlot:
In battle you'd better be as ready to be hurt as you are to hurt others...
You've got none of that! I'll teach you what pain feels like!

Alanjame:
Where, where is God's judgment!?

|    |
|    |           THE END OF VENGEFUL DREAMS
| /\ | Annihilated Alanjame, the culprit behind it all!!
|/  \|

Medoute:
...............
Is it all over now?

Aegina:
I think so. The fighting, my revenge, everything...

  -----------------------------------------------------
Ordene:
...Guah!!

Jenon:
King Ordene! Please hang on! We'll call for a doctor right away!!

Shiskia:
I- I'll go find one! This is a castle, there's gotta be one here, right?

Ordene:
No, this is fine......

Jenon:
But you can still make it if you're treated right away......

Ordene:
Aegina......

Aegina:
Huh, me......?

Ordene:
Aegina, I must apologize...... Be that it may that I did not know, it was my
  carelessness that allowed this to happen.
I was blind to not see through Alanjame's schemes...
I accept this as my punishment.

Jenon:
Is that why you refuse to be treated? That's stupid!

Shiskia:
That's right! Isn't it that minister who was evil?

Ordene:
I should have put my role as a father before my role as a king managing his
  retainers.
That's what made me give up on thinking about my daughters. I don't deserve to
  be called a father.

Aegina:
...............

Ordene:
I abandoned you girls and let Yggdra become Alanjame's puppet, leading everyone
  to misery.
I deserve to be punished......
A man like me... shouldn't be able to be a father.

Garlot:
...............
This isn't about whether you should be allowed or not.
Aegina doesn't hate you. She's gotten her revenge.

Aegina:
Master Garlot......

Ordene:
...I......

Aegina:
...............

Yggdra:
F- Father!?

Aegina:
.........!?

Yggdra:
You are those rebels, are you not...?
Insolent villains! Step away from father! If you do not......

Ordene:
Stop, Yggdra......

Yggdra:
Father, but...!

Ordene:
Yggdra... these people are not the enemy.
I've told you of them before. Of your sisters.

Yggdra:
S- sisters......?

Ordene:
They were alive... They fled from assassins' evil grasp.
Alanjame tried to seize the kingdom and arranged for the assassins... The
  culprit behind it all was..

Alanjame:
Guraaaaagh!!

Jenon:
No! He's still alive!?

Alanjame:
Both the princesses have arrived! This is the best chance to kill you all at
  once!!
This country belongs to me! If I can't have it, no one will!! Ha ha ha ha ha
  ha!!

Yggdra:
Huh... What? What is happening?

Aegina:
Kyaaaaaa......

Ordene:
Ugh...!!

Yggdra:
F- father! Father!!

Aegina:
He protected us. That's...!

Alanjame:
Cough, m- my final attack was...... Uwaaaaa!!

|------------------------|
|      LOSS OF LIFE      |
|-One Mere Common Death.-|
|------------------------|

Garlot:
Damn, he's dead.

Nessiah:
He used up the last of his strength. People's tenacity is tremendous. It is not
  something to take lightly.

Ordene:
Cough, cough......!!

Aegina:
Why go so far to...!

Ordene:
......I wanted to protect my daughters. That is all...

Aegina:
Daughters...?

Ordene:
Hear me, Yggdra... Make our country prosper and protect it... That is the duty
  of the royal family.
You must keep watch so that another man like Alanjame does not appear.
...Do you understand?

Yggdra:
Yes, father.

Ordene:
Aegina......

Aegina:
Y- yes.

Ordene:
You who have lived away from the royal family must have a different lifestyle.
  I cannot force you to remain in the kingdom.
But if you wish to stay I will not stop you. It would make me happy if you
  stayed and worked for the good of the Kingdom with Yggdra.

Aegina:
...............

Ordene:
You have companions... I'm sure they come to aid you when you lose your way.
You said your name was Garlot. Please take care of my daughter, Aegina......

Garlot:
I'd do that even if you didn't ask. Aegina's a friend.

Ordene:
I've said all I wanted to say.

Yggdra:
Father, please, let us find a doctor.

Jenon:
That's right!

Ordene:
No, it's already too late, it's already......

Yggdra:
Father......

Ordene:
And besides, there is another daughter who I do not wish to leave lonely.

Aegina:
You mean, Luciana...?

Ordene:
Aegina, trust and be trusted by your companions, and live!

Aegina:
F- father......

Ordene:
Farewell my beautiful, noble daughters who call me their father......

|------------------------|
|      LOSS OF LIFE      |
|-One Mere Common Death.-|
|------------------------|

Yggdra:
F- father......

Aegina:
F- father!!

Medoute:
...............

Jenon:
...............

Shiskia:
......This is a cruel fate.

Garlot:
Yeah......
But Aegina's fight is just beginning.
Let's all support her.

Medoute:
That's right. If you have no hope continuing to fight is difficult.
Aegina has regained her hope. Luciana should be happy too.

Shiskia:
All that's left is Aegina's feelings... It's okay. Everything will be okay.

Aegina:
...............

Yggdra:
......Father is gone. Dead.
What am I supposed to do?

Aegina:
...............

Yggdra:
Elder sister, please don't go!

Aegina:
Don't. A woman who tries to kill you cannot be a sister.
A sister is someone much kinder. There is no doubt about that.

Yggdra:
Father called you his daughter. Therefore you must be my elder sister.
I've lived my life not knowing anything about you......
I'm sure it must have been difficult for you. I understand if you cannot
  forgive me.

Aegina:
That's ridiculous...... I'm the one who has no right to be forgiven.
I thought of nothing but revenge and wanted to crush you completely. If anyone
  should be punished it's me...

Yggdra:
But it's too sad to part on these terms.
I'm sure mother too would......

Aegina:
Mother? Your- our mother is here!?

Yggdra:
Yes, I will introduce you.

Aegina:
Mother......

--CONTINUING TO BF 50
| Emilia:
| ...............
-----

  -----------------------------------------------------
NOT CONTINUING TO BF 50

After that, Princess Yggdra explained everything to her people...... Her 
sister's survival, her father's death, the scheming of their minister, Alanjame.

And the two princesses declared that they will support the kingdom from here on.

The two princesses were wildly greeted by the people.

Princess Aegina and Princess Yggdra, and next to the two princesses, remaining 
as their personal guard was Gram Blaze,

Holding hope in their hearts!


---------------------Vs.---------------------                        [Map49.05]
--Garlot vs. Alanjame
| Alanjame:
| You savages think too highly of yourselves! 
| I, the living God of the Divine Order, will be the new ruler of this
|   Kingdom!!
|
| Garlot:
| The crap you're blabbering makes no sense!!
|
|---VICTORY
| Alanjame:
| Aghaaa......!!
|
| Garlot:
| There's nothing godly about you...... You're just a messed up human being!!
|
| Alanjame:
| This, this won't happen again......
|
|---DEFEAT
| Alanjame:
| Well? This is the judgment of the God that is me!
| Now bow down before me and swear your allegiance! Do that and I will spare
|   your life.
|
| Garlot:
| Say what you want......
-----

--Shiskia vs. Alanjame---------------------------------
| Shiskia:
| Pay for what you did to Luciana and Aegina with your life!!
|
| Alanjame:
| Do you really think that a life can make up for someone's past? That's not
|   even laughable.
|
|---VICTORY
| Shiskia:
| I could never forgive someone like that......
|
| Alanjame:
| Why you... You think you can spread around your idiotic feelings and dirty my
|   sublime ambitions?
|
|---DEFEAT
| Alanjame:
| Yes! Grovel on the floor just like that!!
|
| Shiskia:
| Kh, he's stronger than I thought......
-----

--Jenon vs. Alanjame-----------------------------------
| Jenon:
| I will not allow you to treat people like dolls!
|
| Alanjame:
| But isn't that how everyone thinks? I'm merely speaking those things out
|   loud. If you can't understand that......
|
|---VICTORY
| Jenon:
| Don't think that everyone around you is the same as you are!
|
| Alanjame:
| That's right, I am God and everyone else is mere peasants......
|
| Jenon:
| What exactly do I do about something like this......
|
|---DEFEAT
| Jenon:
| Damn......
|
| Alanjame:
| Have you realized how foolish it is to stand against me? Well now, regret
|   having opposed me and die!
-----

--Medoute vs. Alanjame---------------------------------
| Medoute:
| Someone like you cannot be left alive!!
|
| Alanjame:
| Who do you think you are to decide who lives and who dies?
|
|---VICTORY
| Medoute:
| Atone for your sins!!
|
| Alanjame:
| And now you pass judgment...... worthless peasant!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Medoute:
| Kh......
|
| Alanjame:
| Oh my? Have you stopped resisting? Has your desire to talk big passed......
-----

--Emilia vs. Alanjame----------------------------------
| Emilia:
| Are you really God?
|
| Alanjame:
| Everything shows that to be the truth.
|
| Emilia:
| Huh, that's funny~!
|
|---VICTORY
| Emilia:
| Wow, God sure is weak~!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Emilia:
| Huh? That's funny~. I lost.
| Oh well. Next time I'll show him.
-----

--Aegina vs. Alanjame----------------------------------
| Aegina:
| Sister's murderer, Alanjame!! You will die by my hand!
|
| Alanjame:
| You will kill me? Kukuku...... Do you think God will allow that?
|
| Aegina:
| Even if God exists, he has no reason to care about you, much less protect
|   you!!
|
|---VICTORY
| Alanjame:
| O- ow! That hurts!!
|
| Aegina:
| Sister has suffered much more than that! Get ready!!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Aegina:
| W- why you......!!
|
| Alanjame:
| How is the light of judgment! This is the power of divine punishment that
|   will burn fools like you to ashes!
| Now be good and follow your sister into death!!
-----

--Nessiah vs. Alanjame---------------------------------
| Nessiah:
| There were arrogant humans before who had called themselves God.
|
| Alanjame:
| Say whatever you want. A mediocre person like you cannot fathom my divinity.
|
| Nessiah:
| Fufufufufu.........
|
|---VICTORY
| Nessiah:
| Well, my Lord. This is the power of a mere human.
|
| Alanjame:
| G- guah... That- that hurt......
|
|---DEFEAT

| That tactics card...
|
| Alanjame:
| That is what I was blessed with when the heavens told me of my divinity! You

|
| Nessiah:
| It's counterfeit, that card. What a curious gift.
|
| Alanjame:
| C- counterfeit!?
-----

--Leon vs. Alanjame------------------------------------

|

|
|---VICTORY

| Hey now, you call that judgment?
|
| Alanjame:
| I am not done yet......

-----

   --マップ概要 - Map Summary

---------------------Loss--------------------                        [Map49.08]
Defeat - Aegina Defeated (1st)

|-----------------------|
|    KILLED IN ACTION   |
|-A Warrior has Fallen.-|
|-----------------------|

Aegina:
I've come so far...... This can't be the end......

|    |
|    |  DEATH OF A HERO
| /\ | Aegina has fallen!
|/  \|

Struggling to destroy the mastermind, Alanjame, Aegina lost her life. Having 
lost the one they were supposed to protect, Gram Blaze too was annihilated...


========================================================================[Map50]
血
Blood
Castle Paltina - Audience Chamber


--------------------Intro--------------------                        [Map50.01]
With the defeat of the mastermind Alanjame and the death of Ordene, Aegina's 
revenge was complete.

Although her scars from the kingdom were deep, Aegina reconciliated with 
Princess Yggdra and her mother, the queen. She returned to the royal family and,
swearing to put her efforts into rebuilding the kingdom, pushed ahead.

The kingdom, despite grieving for the king it lost, tried to take a new step 
forward. To continue toward peace.

However, there was one who did not joyfully accept this......


----------------Before Battle----------------                        [Map50.02]
Aegina:
...............

Yggdra:
Elder sister... can you not sleep?

Aegina:
Not really......

Yggdra:
May I join you?

Aegina:
......Alright.

Aegina:
...............

Yggdra:
...............

Aegina:
...............

Yggdra:
Elder sister...

Aegina:
You don't have to address me like that, Yggdra. Just 'Sis' is fine.
That's what I used to call Luciana......

Yggdra:
Alright then, Sis.

Aegina:
Though, even though I asked you to call me that, hearing it out loud is kind of
  embarrassing.
Still, it's not bad.

Yggdra:
I think so too.
Sis. Will you live here with me and help me support the Kingdom?

Aegina:
I would like to live in this country. Together with Yggdra......
But sometimes I worry. Will Sis, will Luciana forgive me for being happy like
  this...
Can you forgive me, Sis......

Yggdra:
Remember what mother said. Familial bonds and happiness surpass time.
I'm sure if we're happy Sis Luciana will surely be happy as well......

Emilia:
Everyone keeps saying that. That they're happy that there's no fighting......

Aegina:
Ah, Emilia. What is it?

Emilia:
But it's because the fighting started that we got to know each other.

Aegina:
Fighting? The fighting's over now, so......

Emilia:
No, it's not over.
Because......
Because I'll start it again!!

Yggdra:
Ah......

Aegina:
Yggdra!?

Yggdra:
Aah... S- Sis...

Aegina:
Emilia! How could you...!

Emilia:
Giggle... See, now the fighting can continue.

Aegina:
E- Emilia?

Garlot:
Aegina! What's happened!!

Aegina:
M- Master Garlot... Emilia... Yggdra is...!

Garlot:
What?

Emilia:
Ah, Big Bro Captain. The fighting's starting again!
Let's fight more. That way I can be useful again.

Garlot:
What's wrong with you!

Emilia:
Let's fight! Let's fight! More, more, more, more!!
More, more, more, more, more, more, more, more, more, more, more, more, more,
  more, more

|-----------------------|
|       AWAKENING       |
|-Hidden Blood Boiling.-|
|-----------------------|

Emilia:
Let's fight some more~!!

Nessiah:
Hm, this is......

Garlot:
What's going on, you're...

Medoute:
Garlot! It's Brongaa's blood! The power in her blood has awakened fully!
She feared that if the fighting stopped now she would return to being a useless
  child...
And that fear worked as fuel for the corrosive power of Brongaa's blood to
  consume her.

Shiskia:
But killing Princess Yggdra isn't necessary for that!

Jenon:
No, now that King Ordene is dead, Yggdra, who the people know of, is essential
  for preserving the Kingdom...
Attacking Yggdra to start conflict in the Kingdom is all too precise of an
  action......

Aegina:
Yggdra, Yggdra......

|------------------------|
|      LOSS OF LIFE      |
|-One Mere Common Death.-|
|------------------------|

Yggdra:
...S- Sis...

Aegina:
Yggdra!!

Shiskia:
This can't be. No way!!

Emilia:
Ahahahaha! More and more~!!

Medoute:
Is this the end result of all who have Brongaa's blood in their veins......

Garlot:
Emilia, this is......

Medoute:
Garlot. There's no stopping her now. She will keep destroying until she dies.
She can't go back to the way she was before. To stop her, there's nothing we
  can do but finishing her off.

Garlot:
......There's nothing else?

Medoute:
No... I'm sorry......

  /--Victory--------------
 / Stop Emilia's rampage...!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
               Garlot dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Emilia:
Let's fight more and more! Ahahahahaha!

Garlot:
Emilia... You wanted power that much?
I wanted power too. But that was only because there was senseless cruelty
  before me that I couldn't defeat...
Was just being together with us not enough for you?
I just don't know......


=====================================================================[EndingB2]
Emilia:
Uwaaaaaaa!!
I believed too... That when I fought and won, I was useful to everyone,
  but...!!

Garlot:
Sorry, Emilia......
This is my fault for not noticing the pain you were in that made you break your
  seal......

|------------------------|
|      LOSS OF LIFE      |
|-One Mere Common Death.-|
|------------------------|

Emilia:
Aaaaa! Big... Bro...

|    |
|    |   RECKLESS DRIVING OF BLOOD
| /\ | Stopped Emilia's rampage......
|/  \|

Garlot:
...............

Jenon:
Shiskia, how's Aegina doing?

Shiskia:
It's not looking good......

Medoute:
It's only natural. After all she lost a sister who she just reconnected with.
And right in front of her, by Emilia's hand......

Jenon:
What will happen to the Kingdom of Fantasinia?

Garlot:
Aegina's the only heir to the throne they have now.

Medoute:
In the eyes of the Kingdom's people Aegina and us are outsiders.
And before that matter could be settled Yggdra died......

Shiskia:
I wonder what we should do.

Aegina:
...............

Shiskia:
Aegina... Are you okay now?

Aegina:
I'll feel nothing but sadness if I lock myself away with my pain.
And Sis and Yggdra certainly can't be happy.
I am here to let everyone know what I've decided.
I promised Yggdra that I will live here and support the Kingdom.
I will be this country's Princess.
I know it will not be easy. However, I wish to realize Gram Blaze's ideals in
  the Kingdom.
Everyone, I wish to ask of you to lend me your strength.

Shiskia:
Aegina, I've decided too. I'll live here with you.

Jenon:
I don't know how much help I'll be, but if you're okay with it...

Aegina:
Shiskia, Sir Jenon, thank you.

Zilva:
Is there... anything I can do?

Aegina:
Of course, Zilva. It's reassuring to have you stay.

Leon:
I'll live here, together with Elena. But I don't know if I'll be able to stop
  fighting.

Eudy:
As long as you fund my canon research I'll help you out.

Shiskia:
No one else would go as far as to say that......

Garlot:
Aegina. I've made my decision too. Can I speak?

Aegina:
Yes, of course.

  -----------------------------------------------------
Medoute:
...Whops. What is it? You stopped suddenly.

Garlot:
...............
...Ah, sorry, I was just remembering something.
About what started this whole journey.
Back then I got some power and felt like I could do something.
But in the end it led to my friends' blood and tears.
What exactly did I do with that power that I got......

Medoute:
You said you started to doubt what power really is.

Garlot:
Yeah, I think I've never thought very hard about what power means.
So, Medoute. What exactly is power?

Medoute:
I don't know. Don't ask me.

Garlot:
You're always like that......

Medoute:
Don't make it sound so trivial.
I'm not a philosopher, or some religious founder. Look for the meaning
  yourself!

Garlot:
Yes, yes.

Medoute:
I'm searching too, you know.

Garlot:
Hm? For what?

Medoute:
The meaning in my blood.

Garlot:
Huh. Do you think you found it?

Medoute:
I've been thinking about that lately.
I think it's not what you find that's important but the effort that you put
  into it, and the course you take.

Garlot:
Hm......
Hey, Medoute. If, say, I had Brongaa's blood in me, just like Amy did, what
  would you do?
Would you kill me once that power awakened? Seeing as you're of the dragon
  slayer's lineage.

Medoute:
Dragon slaying has nothing to do with it. What would determine that is you as a
  person and as a friend.

Garlot:
So, you haven't been caught yet, Medoute.

Medoute:
Hm, who knows.

Garlot:
If I'd noticed that, I'd have frantically rushed ahead.
But even with that being important too, there could be things I never learn of
  if I never let it go.

Medoute:
That's right. And that's why we're on this journey.
But we'd best return sooner than later.
Or Shiskia will be furious.

Garlot:
Why are you bringing up Shiskia with that?

Medoute:
You really don't get it, do you...

  -----------------------------------------------------
Garlot and Medoute's continue on their journey.

Its destination is not one that can be marked on a map.

Garlot's goal, Medoute's goal,

The answer to what power means, what blood means, and the way to get to that 
answer......

While exchanging thoughts on those topics, their journey does not stop.

What met them on that journey may well be told another time.

But for now all that is written is that the pair's journey has just begun.


------------------Locations------------------                        [Map50.06]
マップ概要 - Map Summary
Large chamber in the heart of castle Paltina.


---------------------Loss--------------------                        [Map50.08]
Defeat - Garlot Defeated (1st)

|-----------------------|
|    KILLED IN ACTION   |
|-A Warrior has Fallen.-|
|-----------------------|

Garlot:
Grk... What power...! I can't......

|    |
|    |                DEATH OF A HERO
| /\ | The captain of Aegina's Guard, Garlot, has fallen!
|/  \|

"This is the fate of one who wished for power and desired to fight..." These 
doubts in mind Garlot's life came to an early end at the hands of Emilia's
blade.


                      ====================================
                          ***     Chapter 6C      ***
                                  この世界を生きて
                          ***   Live this World   ***
                      ====================================


========================================================================[Map51]
はじまりのおわり
The End of the Beginning
Outskirts of Tiera - Private Army Housing


--------------------Intro--------------------                        [Map51.01]
Information regarding the fact that the Bronquian Empire's Emperor, Soltier, 
had fallen ill had reached Count Velleman.

The illness was a deadly one, brought about by a side effect of the contract 
with Brongaa which the Emperors had sustained for generations.

If the situation was left as is, the Emperor would die and without an heir the 
country will inevitably fall into civil war.

And if they were responsible for the Emperor's recovery, their influence within 
the Empire would surely rise.

And so, to treat the Emperor, Velleman called for a specialist on the demon 
dragon by the name of Beatrine from distant lands.

Beatrine informed them that unless she saw the patient first-hand she couldn't 
say is the treatment would work or not.

Gram Blaze returned to the residence and quickly prepared to leave for the 
capital.


----------------Before Battle----------------                        [Map51.02]
Shiskia:
Uuuuuh...... Really, I can't believe this.

Jenon:
Why we have to save the Emperor, right?
If the Emperor dies, though, we'll end up in the middle of a civil war.

Shiskia:
But isn't it the Emperor's fault in the first place that the country is in such
  a mess?
And despite that we're still gonna save him...

Beatrine:
I understand how you feel.
But it is that will that desired the Emperor's control that brought about the
  contract with Brongaa.
For generations the Imperial Family has drunk Brongaa's blood, carrying out the
  ritual and the contract.

Shiskia:
Brongaa's blood... really exists?

Velleman:
The demonic dragon Brongaa is dead, certainly. They shave off the remaining
  marrow and ingest that.

Shiskia:
Bleh......

Beatrine:
It's a powerful contract that immediately kills those who have no resistance to
  the blood and the contract.
It is likely that Emperor Soltier's body, though slowly, is being eaten away by
  the blood and the ritual.
This is in no way something he brought up on his own.

Shiskia:
Huh, really. But even then......

Medoute:
A side effect of the blood and the contract...?

Beatrine:
The true nature of Brongaa's blood is to destroy and victimize, and the power
  of aggression.
The more one uses that power, the more the they lose their humanity...... That
  is the kind of power it is.

Medoute:
......I see. Brongaa, huh.

Beatrine:
If the results of my research can free him from his suffering I will be happy.

Garlot:
......Makes sense.

Jenon:
And if the treatment is successful, our relationship with the Emperor might
  change.

Aegina:
It may be able to help Count Velleman enact change.

Shiskia:
Velleman is gonna be involved in national politics? So is he gonna make us work
  even harder for the sake of the Empire......

Nessiah:
No matter how much you gossip about the future, it is a wasted effort.

Garlot:
That's true... Let's hurry and get ready.

Medoute:
Though, the connection between the Bronquian Empire and the demon dragon runs
  deep.

|-----------------------|
|         VOLLEY        |
|-Thousand Arrow Storm!-|
|-----------------------|

Shiskia:
Uwa! What? What's going on!!

Jenon:
We're under attack! Shiskia, hurry and get inside!!

|-----------------|
|      SORTIE     |
|-Follow my Lead!-|
|-----------------|

Cerica:
Get out heeeere, Garlot!! Today we're definitely, definitely, settle things one
  and for all!

Garlot:
What, now of all times. She hadn't shown up for a while so I figured she'd
  given up......

Beatrine:
Is she an acquaintance?

Shiskia:
It would take too long to explain... But basically, she was a subordinate of a
  criminal we removed and since then she's been after us.

Beatrine:
...I see. Then, this will turn into a battle.
Please use this card. It will neutralize the enemy's strength.

|--------------------|
|     ACQUISITION    |
|-Received Treasure!-|
|   Oblivious Dawn   |
|--------------------|

Cerica:
It may have taken me a super long time, but I finally found your secret base!
  Now come fight me!

Garlot:
She really doesn't give up. I guess there's no way to avoid this......

  /--Victory--------------
 / Repel the revenge obsessed Cerica!!
/----------------

   ----------------------Defeat--/
                Garlot dies...  /
       Beatrine is crushed...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Garlot:
...Sorry for getting you mixed up in our problems. And just before we left too.

Beatrine:
I do not think this is something you could have affected.
And besides, there is no need for concern. I can defend myself.


-----------------After Battle----------------                        [Map51.04]
Cerica:
Aaaaah!

|-----------------------------------|
|              REPELLED             |
|-Foiled the Strategy of the Enemy!-|
|-----------------------------------|

|    |
|    |   THE FIRE YET BURNS BRIGHTLY!
| /\ | Succeeded in repelling Cerica!!
|/  \|

Cerica:
Grrrr... Why... why won't Cerica's feelings reach...

Garlot:
Cerica, let's stop this.

Cerica:
No way, no way--!! Cerica won't give up on getting revenge!

Garlot:
Gram Blaze rivals an army in size and power. There's nothing you could do to
  beat that.

Cerica:
Cerica said no! Cerica won't stop, no matter who tells her to!

Garlot:
In that case I really will have to kill you one day......

Cerica:
Bring it on then, Cerica'd like to see you try! C'mon! Cerica'll take you on!!

Beatrine:
Miss Cerica, why do you fight?

Cerica:
Cerica just told you! She's getting revenge for Commander David!!

Beatrine:
And why was he defeated by Gram Blaze? Have you thought of the reason?
Was it not because he was doing something that earned him his fate?

Cerica:
That's got nothing to do with this!

Beatrine:
That is not true.
I am not saying that it is wrong to feel sad and grieve for the dead......
But is it alright to turn to hostility and say that it's because you cannot
  overcome your sadness yourself?

Cerica:
W- what are you talking about......

Beatrine:
Please accept your sorrow. Since you focused on it, how many followers have you
  lost?
Your grief has drawn other people into misery.

Cerica:
......D- don't say that!

Beatrine:
Please overcome your companion's death. While you are only grieving......

Cerica:
But I can't help but be sad......
Commander David found me and raised me......
How am I supposed to live now......

Garlot:
Cerica......

Cerica:
Don't say anymore!
I get it, but there's nothing else I can do.

Beatrine:
Look behind you, Cerica. At the people who followed you all this way.
What would happen to them if they lost you?
Continuing to be bound by the chain of misery will not give you anything.
Please, live your life, Cerica. Find a man that you love and raise a child with
  him.
And wish the same of your followers. That is the chain of life.

Cerica:
......I'll retreat, Garlot.
But my resentment for you will never vanish.

Garlot:
I know.

Cerica:
But I'll stop trying to kill you. It won't make my sadness go away.

|------------------|
|      RETREAT     |
|-Time to Regroup.-|
|------------------|

Jenon:
Amazing... Making Cerica retreat like that.

Beatrine:
I merely spoke my own feelings frankly. She will surely overcome this. And
  choose to live.

  -----------------------------------------------------
Shiskia:
Wow, phew, that made me tear up a little.

Medoute:
Those were heartwarming words.

Jenon:
And they were particularly effective too. They had a motherly feel to them.

Shiskia:
Huh... So it felt like talking to mom.
Hey, Miss Beatrine, do you have any children?

Beatrine:
Yes, just one. But we were separated before he was old enough to have any
  awareness of the world around him......

Shiskia:
Oh, I... I'm sorry. I shouldn't have asked.

Beatrine:
......Don't let it worry you.

Amy:
Yaaawn, that was a good nap...

Shiskia:
Amy... Were you really asleep this whole time?

Amy:
Yeah, I was. Did something happen?
Ah, it's Miss Beatrine!

Beatrine:
Ah, it's been a long time. Miss Amy, was it not?

Amy:
Yep, Amy's right.

Garlot:
What, you two know each other?

Beatrine:
Just for a little while, while Miss Amy was much, much younger......

Amy:
Yep, she cast a magic spell on me!

Jenon:
Really? What a coincidence.

Shiskia:
Oh yeah, hey Amy. Big sis and everyone's gonna be away for a little while, so
  you're the lady of the house, okay?

Amy:
Yep! I got it. I'll be good and take care of things here!

Nessiah:
Seems this situation's become quite complicated...


---------------------Vs.---------------------                        [Map51.05]
--Garlot vs. Cerica
| Cerica:
| Now! Cerica will settle things once and for all!!
|
| Garlot:
| Didn't you give up?
|
| Cerica:
| Who would!!
|
|---VICTORY
| Cerica:
| It's not over Garlot! Even if we strike each other, Cerica will kill you!!
|
| Garlot:
| Cerica will not change her mind. In that case I should just......
|
|---DEFEAT
| Cerica:
| Die now! Garlot!!
|
| Garlot:
| Damn, I'm being driven back by her spirit?
-----

--Shiskia vs. Cerica-----------------------------------
| Shiskia:
| Do you really think that getting your revenge will give you peace?
|
| Cerica:
| Of course Cerica does! That's why... that's why...!!
|
|---VICTORY
| Shiskia:
| Of course we defeated David. He had it coming!
|
| Cerica:
| You're not the one who gets to decide what's right or wrong!!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Cerica:
| See, how was that! Cerica can still win! Cerica is not tired!
|
| Shiskia:
| I'm being pushed back?
-----

--Jenon vs. Cerica-------------------------------------
| Jenon:
| Doesn't your pain only increase as you fight more?
|
| Cerica:
| Hah! Every time! You talk like you know everything!! It makes Cerica sick!
|
|---VICTORY
| Jenon:
| Continuing to fight is hard. I know that......
|
| Cerica:
| Spending a night alone without the one you care about is what's hard!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Jenon:
| What spirit...... I can't be careless here, huh.
|
| Cerica:
| Feel the amazing Cerica's power!!
-----

--Medoute vs. Cerica-----------------------------------
| Medoute:
| Do you really think you can win with those numbers?
|
| Cerica:
| Shut up, shut up! Cerica will win!!
|
|---VICTORY
| Medoute:
| Why are you so obsessed with this? Why have you not looked for a reason to
|   live?
|
| Cerica:
| You killed the person who gave Cerica's life meaning!!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Cerica:
| Commander David, Cerica will surely have revenge!
|
| Medoute:
| She's completely controlled by her focus on one dead man......
| Looks like even in death you intend to rack up crimes, David.
-----

--Aegina vs. Cerica------------------------------------
| Aegina:
| I can understand the feelings of desiring revenge, of having a hole in one's
|   heart.
| I will be your opponent.
|
| Cerica:
| What was that! You're mumbling about things that make no sense! It's
|   unsettling!!
|
|---VICTORY
| Aegina:
| Where does that will of yours come from...?
|
| Cerica:
| How should Cerica know!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Cerica:
| This time Cerica will kill you!
|
| Aegina:
| I cannot be killed here!
-----

--Nessiah vs. Cerica-----------------------------------
| Nessiah:
| Your role has ended long ago. Disappear......
|
| Cerica:
| What are you talking about, 'role'?
|
| Nessiah:
| Fufufufufu......
|
|---VICTORY
| Nessiah:
| Fighting breeds pain, pain breeds vengeful spirit, and vengeance spurs people
|   to fight.
| That is why humans are beautiful. They are almost like fallen angels.
|
| Cerica:
| What are you trying to say.
|
|---DEFEAT
| Nessiah:
| How could a mere human......
|
| Cerica:
| Huh? You keep saying things that make no sense!
-----

--Leon vs. Cerica--------------------------------------
| Leon:
| Kukuku, interesting! You're burning to fight in the name of revenge. Put
|   everything you've got into this!!
|
| Cerica:
| That was Cerica's plan from the start!
|
|---VICTORY
| Leon:
| You lack experience, but I can definitely feel your fighting spirit!
|
| Cerica:
| Dammmn it! Cavalry is so annoying!!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Leon:
| Oh, not bad, woman!! The scar on my forehead is throbbing.
|
| Cerica:
| Then Cerica will smash her axe through it!
-----

--Beatrine vs. Cerica----------------------------------
| Beatrine:
| Your eyes are full of sorrow......
|
| Cerica:
| Of course they are!
|
|---VICTORY
| Beatrine:
| In the grand scheme nothing is destroyed by a single broken life.
|
|---DEFEAT
| Beatrine:
| What is it that you intend to do once you've won and this is behind you?
|
| Cerica:
| What? Cerica doesn't get it!
-----


------------------Locations------------------                        [Map51.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
Gram Blaze's housing, established at the outskirts of Tiera


---------------------Loss--------------------                        [Map51.08]
Defeat - Beatrine Defeated (1st)

|-----------------------|
|    KILLED IN ACTION   |
|-A Warrior has Fallen.-|
|-----------------------|

Beatrine:
Death is life...... The circle of life continues...... I feel no sadness.

|    |
|    |  IMPEDIMENT FAILED
| /\ | Beatrine has fallen!
|/  \|

In the conflict with Cerica who continued to be trapped by her desire for 
revenge, Beatrine lost her life. Without treatment the Emperor died and the 
world descended into chaos...


========================================================================[Map52]
残り火
Embers
Outskirts of the Capital - Arc of Triumph


--------------------Intro--------------------                        [Map52.01]
Beatrine, having reached the capital with Gram Blaze, spoke with Emperor 
Soltier and implied, from looking at certain abnormalities, that a magical 
operation to suppress the demonic blood may be necessary.

Though the Emperor refused the operation at first, with the persuasion from the 
Imperial Guard Leader, Lapis, he resolved to undergo it.

However, there was one person who spread word about the Emperor's illness, 
information that should have been top secret, and fanned the people's unrest.

Having survived, and with his masterful skill at persuasion, he once again 
gathered the rebel elements throughout the country, and marched on the capital.

While Beatrine was attending to the surgery, Gram Blaze awaited Pandra's forces 
in front of the Arc of Triumph......

The curtain was finally rising on the last bloody battle with the rebel army.


----------------Before Battle----------------                        [Map52.02]
Jenon:
I can't believe Pandra was alive......

Shiskia:
It's Pandra. You can't expect him to die from something like a fall off a
  cliff.
Sigh, it'd be nice if like with Cerica, he'd get scared off by Miss Beatrine
  and run away......

Medoute:
That's an interesting thought, but, well, it won't happen.

Jenon:
But he got back on his feet quite well. It hasn't been all that long since we
  dismantled the rebel army.

Nessiah:
As expected, his skill in persuasion along with his confident appearance is
  quite effective.

Medoute:
He probably spread the information of the Emperor's illness and gathered those
  dissatisfied once more.

Nessiah:
Emperor Soltier is a military man... If there is an uprising he might lead the
  army to come suppress it.
However, if the Emperor has become ill, that is a different matter.

Jenon:
I see... This is just the thing Pandra would do, what with his specialty at
  winning people over.

Aegina:
Yes, but, where could Pandra have obtained information of the Emperor's
  illness?

Velleman:
That I do not know. It may just be a halfhearted lie he came up with.

Beatrine:
Count Velleman, I have a request.

Velleman:
Ah, Lady Beatrine. What can I do for you?

Beatrine:
Due to the difficulty of this procedure I am somewhat worried to do it alone. I
  would like to ask for someone to assist me.
However, it cannot be just anyone.
I would ask for someone with knowledge in the magical arts, preferably someone
  with high proficiency......

Velleman:
I see......

Nessiah:
Shall I do it? I have some knowledge regarding the demon dragon as well.

Velleman:
That's right...... In that case we leave it to you, Nessiah.

Nessiah:
I will do my best to be of help.

Beatrine:
Thank you, Sir Nessiah.

Nessiah:
Then, shall we begin......

Shiskia:
So what exactly is a magical operation?

Jenon:
Isn't it when you open the patient's body up with some sharp tool?

Shiskia:
What!? That's painful to just hear. Don't say things like that!

Jenon:
That's normal of an operation.

Garlot:
...............

Medoute:
Garlot? What is it?

Garlot:
It's nothing, I just have this feeling like I've seen Beatrine somewhere
  before......

Shiskia:
Really? Looks like she knew Amy as well......

Garlot:
That's enough talk, they're here.

|-----------------|
|      SORTIE     |
|-Follow my Lead!-|
|-----------------|

Pandra:
The Arc of Triumph, how nostalgic......

Garlot:
That's a lot of troops...... It's like he gathered everyone he could.
But... For some reason I'm not scared or surprised. Is this what it means to
  become experienced?

Pandra:
Ah, if it isn't Gram Blaze......

Leon:
Pandra, you just don't learn, do you. You ready to run away with your tail
  between your legs?

Pandra:
I've never 'run away'. What I've done is just a tactic called retreating.

Leon:
As always, you do nothing but split hairs......

Pandra:
Hm? Leon, what are you doing? Were you trying to gather intel on them for me or
  something?

Leon:
Speak for yourself. There's no one in Gram Blaze who would fall for your
  practical jokes.

Pandra:
Keh, don't tell me you're being all buddy buddy with them. Pathetic, have you
  lost your fangs......

Garlot:
All troops prepare for battle! Attack the rebel army!!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Settle the score with Pandra!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
               Garlot dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Pandra:
In any case, I've already gave up my life once... I'm not scared this time.
You guys! Arrange yourselves however you want! Rush through the Arc of
  Triumph!!


------------------Mid Battle-----------------                        [Map52.03]
PANDRA DEFEATED

Pandra:
Tch! This is it, huh......

Garlot:
Aren't you gonna run, Pandra?

Pandra:
...We're different from the well trained army we were before, if I don't plunge
  ahead we won't build up any momentum.
This time I didn't have a chance to prepare an escape route.

Garlot:
What, are you joking?

Rebel Soldier:
M- Mister Pandra......

Pandra:
My unit is done for...... What are you doing! Force your way in!!
Don't you want to change the country!? Show them your spirit!!
Heh, heheheh...... I'm a hero! I will go down in history!!

|------------------------|
|      LOSS OF LIFE      |
|-One Mere Common Death.-|
|------------------------|

Garlot:
Under all that Pandra had that kind of strength......


-----------------After Battle----------------                        [Map52.04]
|    |
|    |      WHAT BROUGHT FORTH THIS VICTORY?
| /\ | Repelled the force brought back by Pandra!!
|/  \|

Rebel Soldier:
Whoa, I knew we couldn't do it!

Rebel Soldier:
There was no way we could beat the capital's army... Run!!

Rebel Soldier:
Damn! Mister Pandra tricked us......

|------------------|
|      RETREAT     |
|-Time to Regroup.-|
|------------------|

Leon:
Do we go after them, Garlot?

Garlot:
No, let them go.
We beat Pandra. They won't be able to raise a rebellion like that again.

  -----------------------------------------------------
Garlot:
That Pandra... He gave off a different impression from before.

Medoute:
Maybe because when he carried the flag, Pandra had firm intentions.

Leon:
This was the only time that bastard was serious. That's for sure.

Garlot:
If only we'd met him sooner, we could have ended up on different terms......

Velleman:
It seems they're finished.

Medoute:
Count Velleman. How did the operation go?

Velleman:
Everything went smoothly.

Nessiah:
Lady Beatrine was considerably exhausted and is resting at the inn.

Garlot:
Velleman, what will we be doing from now on?

Velleman:
We'll watch the Emperor's progress and if everything looks fine we'll return to
  Tiera.
Of course, we ought to wait for Lady Beatrine to awaken first...

Jenon:
Did she wear herself out that much?

Velleman:
I don't know. According to Nessiah she suddenly collapsed after the surgery.

Nessiah:
It was as if the tension was cut and her body staggered with weakness.
I caught her right away, but... It seems that she was far more exhausted than I
  first saw.
But I think that if she rests a little she should be alright.

Garlot:
Then we'll be staying in the capital until Beatrine wakes up...

Shiskia:
Velleman... So, we're fighting to change the world, right?

Velleman:
That's right. Why do you ask now?

Shiskia:
Pandra's army also fought to oppose the Imperial government.
But we fought to oppose them......

Velleman:
I understand your feelings.

Shiskia:
Do you really?

Jenon:
Shiskia, that's enough......

Velleman:
No, it's fine, Jenon.
Shiskia, it's foolish to just say that something is bad and then beat it down
  with force.
One that stands only for power will lose himself to it and will soon be
  defeated by power.
Let's believe that His Highness's problems stemmed from his illness.
And, once he recovers, build a fine country together.

Shiskia:
It's kinda strange. When you word things like that I don't want to complain.

Garlot:
Velleman, rather, Count Velleman. Could you forgive Shiskia.

Velleman:
Hm?

Garlot:
