She just doesn't like nobles. That's why she says things like this.

Shiskia:
Don't bring that up! This has nothing to do with me hating nobles!!

Velleman:
You are quite blunt. As you know, I too am a noble......

Shiskia:
No, you may be a noble, but, ah, well......

Velleman:
I'm only joking.

Shiskia:
...I hate nobles.


---------------------Vs.---------------------                        [Map52.05]
--Garlot vs. Pandra
| Pandra:
| All of you listen up! That red haired man is their leader!
| If you take his head this battle will be ours! Go after him like you're not
|   planning to come back!!
|
| Garlot:
| Not coming back, huh. Then you're serious this time.
|
|---VICTORY
| Pandra:
| As usual your attacks are ridiculously strong.
| But I won't lose so easily!
|
| Garlot:
| Pandra's fighting spirit is different this time. Is this what he's like when
|   he's serious......
|
|---DEFEAT
| Pandra:
| Alright, now! Break them in one strike!
|
| Garlot:
| That's good resolve there, Pandra!
-----

--Shiskia vs. Pandra-----------------------------------
| Shiskia:
| What promises did you bribe your soldiers with this time, Pandra? Money?
|   Food? Status? Maybe, girls?
|
| Pandra:
| Just me and my will.
|
| Shiskia:
| Huh?
|
| Pandra:
| I showed them my true heart and asked them to come with me. It felt good!
|
|---VICTORY
| Pandra:
| I can still fight! Come get me!!
|
| Shiskia:
| W- what? Is it that unbearable?
|
|---DEFEAT
| Shiskia:
| They've got momentum...... It's hard for an archer to fight back.
|
| Pandra:
| Yes, use the momentum and attack! Let's go!!
-----

--Jenon vs. Pandra-------------------------------------
| Pandra:
| Your tricks are pointless! Our numbers will crush you!!
|
| Jenon:
| Pandra is on the front lines. Is there something else to this? Or is he
|   really risking his life...?
|
|---VICTORY
| Pandra:
| Are we really being beaten by this girly man even...... My unit's really
|   poorly trained.
| But, if only today, we won't retreat!
|
| Jenon:
| Hey now, what's going on? This isn't like Pandra......
|
|---DEFEAT
| Jenon:
| I was brought down by Pandra!? My forces are inferior. If this continues
|   it'll be bad.
|
| Pandra:
| Push them back! Smash through the enemy line!
-----

--Medoute vs. Pandra-----------------------------------
| Pandra:
| They're strong! Don't expect to win if you lose focus, got it!
|
| Medoute:
| Huh, I see you've set your mind to fight, Pandra......
|
|---VICTORY
| Pandra:
| Tch! You're strong as always...!
| But don't expect me to quit! Everyone, regroup and follow me!
|
| Medoute:
| You've gained courage, Pandra. But it's too late now.
|
|---DEFEAT
| Pandra:
| Yes, good! Keep it up and we'll win!!
|
| Medoute:
| I can't let my guard down......
-----

--Aegina vs. Pandra------------------------------------
| Aegina:
| I shall be your opponent! Now come, let us do battle!!
|
| Pandra:
| Let's go! We'll show you our power.
|
|---VICTORY
| Pandra:
| Tch, we're losing......
| This isn't the time to lose heart! Wager your life and come forward! It will
|   be us who change the country!!
|
| Aegina:
| His spirit is amazing......
|
|---DEFEAT
| Aegina:
| No, I am being pushed back!
|
| Pandra:
| Alright, the enemy is faltering! Get in there!!
-----

--Leon vs. Pandra--------------------------------------
| Leon:
| Let's settle this Pandra! Kuku, will you run!?
|
| Pandra:
| There's nowhere to run now. That's why I've thought it over. Let's settle
|   this, Leon!!
|
|---VICTORY
| Leon:
| Weak as always, Pandra.
|
| Pandra:
| Geez, you're just too strong......
|
|---DEFEAT
| Leon:
| Hah, I didn't give you enough credit. You can do it if you try!!
|
| Pandra:
| Well, it's not like I've got any other option. This is what fighting for your
|   life is like......
-----


------------------Locations------------------                        [Map52.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
The main gate to the capital of Flarewerk. Military drills often take place 
here.


---------------------Loss--------------------                        [Map52.08]
Defeat - Garlot Defeated (1st)

|-----------------------|
|    KILLED IN ACTION   |
|-A Warrior has Fallen.-|
|-----------------------|

Garlot:
I just wanted to make a world... without senseless cruelty...!

|    |
|    |            DEATH OF A HERO
| /\ | Gram Blaze's captain, Garlot, has fallen!
|/  \|

In the fierce battle with Pandra's restored army, Gram Blaze's captain, Garlot, 
lost his life, and Gram Blaze vanished from history's stage...


========================================================================[Map53]
暴かれし瞳の奥
Within the Revealing Eyes
Outskirts of the Capital - Plank Road East End


--------------------Intro--------------------                        [Map53.01]
With the magical operation's success at suppressing Brongaa's blood, the danger 
to Emperor Soltier's life had been halted.

However, Beatrine was struck with terrible exhaustion, and finally awakened 
three days later, though her memory of what happened just before the end of the 
procedure was vague.

The Emperor awoke the next day, and, with his progress after the operation 
being favorable, gave Gram Blaze permission to return.


----------------Before Battle----------------                        [Map53.02]
Shiskia:
We stayed at the capital for way too long. I wonder if Amy will be mad......

Aegina:
And sister too. Do you think they're alright?

Shiskia;
Don't worry too much. Luciana likes to play pranks, right?
It'd be a miracle if those two haven't done some awful things with how long
  they've had the run of the place.

Aegina:
You mean like that time they put nails through the storm shutter?

Shiskia:
Huh, that was Luciana and Amy's doing?
I was talking about that time they covered your socks with wax.

Aegina:
Huh? Sister and Amy were responsible for that?
That was awful! The sweat didn't dry and my feet got so musty!

Beatrine:
Everyone is so interesting.

Velleman:
Noisy would be a better term. I wish they would not get so carried away in
  their conduct.

Beatrine:
Still, I wish to apologize. If I had not collapsed we would not have been held
  up.

Jenon:
Oh, yes, Miss Beatrine, what sort of thing do you do in a magical operation?

Shiskia:
Hang on, Jenon! I told you to stop talking about that!

Jenon:
But I'm curious. I've read anatomical books before, you know.

Beatrine:
What I do is completely different from medicine. It's much more like a magical
  ritual.

Jenon:
Really... That's very interesting. I should have went and watched.

Beatrine:
I cannot allow one with no magical knowledge to watch. It is too dangerous.
To tell you the truth I nearly lost my own mind to the power of the dragon
  blood......

Jenon:
Brongaa's blood steals the mind of those in the ritual?

Beatrine:
The power of destruction, victimization, and aggression... That is the true
  nature of the demon dragon's blood.
The blood desires destruction, victims, and aggression, and it makes other
  wills act towards its desire.
If one's ego is weak it will soon be consumed and one will fall under the
  dragon's control.

Shiskia:
So, could what you said about your memory from the ritual being fuzzy be
  because of that?

Beatrine:
I do not think so. I believe it is simply due to exhaustion.

Garlot:
So then, can anyone with Brongaa's power get like the Emperor?

Beatrine:
The potency of Brongaa's power varies greatly from person to person.
And the more potent, the easier it is to fall under Brongaa's control... Though
  if one's ego is strong, one can fight back.

Garlot:
I see.

Nessiah:
I too was very curious in the procedure.
I am honored to have been able to be a part, even as just an assistant.

Beatrine:
...By the way, Sir Nessiah.
After the operation, once I lost consciousness, was something done to the
  Emperor?

Nessiah:
...I am not sure I understand.

Beatrine:
I had dreamed of such a thing for three nights on end.
Begging your pardon, but I must ask again. Once I lost consciousness, was
  something done to the Emperor?

Nessiah:
What scandalous accusation...... Are you saying that I have done something?

Shiskia:
...Huh? What, what's going on?

Beatrine:
If you've no feelings of guilt you wouldn't mind me looking through your
  memories, would you?

Nessiah:
......This is an inconvenience. I've underestimated you.
I never expected to be suspected. Really, this is quite annoying......
I wish I had a little more time to prepare, but...

Garlot:
What are you talking about, Nessiah?

Nessiah:
So sorry, Captain. It's sooner than I planned, but I'm afraid we must part
  here.

|----------------------|
|        SUMMON        |
|-Allies Called Forth!-|
|----------------------|

Jenon:
It's Nessiah's corpse army!

Garlot:
Wait, Nessiah! What is this, explain yourself!!

Nessiah:
Those on death's doorstep need no explanations.

Garlot:
What?

Medoute:
...You were always a shifty guy, but I didn't expect you'd betray us this
  directly.

Nessiah:
Make no mistake. This is not betrayal. It is all according to the prediction I
  have written.
Though I did not think you would wait until we were out here to reveal my
  tricks.

Beatrine:
If I exposed you in the center of town you would use the citizens as a shield.

Nessiah:
I see...... You took it upon yourself to keep silent. You are quite the
  tactician.
Still, it doesn't matter. You will all disappear here. Well then, everyone.

  /--Victory--------------
 / Defeat the traitor, Nessiah!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
               Garlot dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Corpse Soldier:
...............

Garlot:
Nessiah! What are you trying to do!?

Nessiah:
Fufufu...


------------------Mid Battle-----------------                        [Map53.03]
|-----------------------------------|
|              REPELLED             |
|-Foiled the Strategy of the Enemy!-|
|-----------------------------------|

Nessiah:
Hm, you did well to defeat a dragon knight unit...
Well done, Captain. Fufufu...

|    |
|    |   THE MISSION CONTINUES ON
| /\ | Crushed Nessiah's vanguard!!
|/  \|

|----------------------|
|        SUMMON        |
|-Allies Called Forth!-|
|----------------------|

Corpse Soldier:
...............

Garlot:
What are you planning, Nessiah!

Nessiah:
Fufufu, very well. As a prize for surviving to this point I will tell you a
  little.
The Emperor is more convenient to me than you are. For creating a maelstrom of
  conflict, that is.
That is all. Now die!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Defeat Nessiah!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
               Garlot dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Garlot:
Creating a maelstrom of conflict? What in the world......


-----------------After Battle----------------                        [Map53.04]
Nessiah:
Mn... Gkh!

|    |
|    | AHEAD OF A CORPSE
| /\ | Crushed Nessiah!!
|/  \|

Nessiah:
Captain, considering you solely as a warrior, you possess magnificent
  capabilities...
That truly is your only value! You have no wants! No ambition! You do not fight
  for yourself!!
That is why I've moved on to Emperor Soltier.
He can still spur the Empire to action. The day war and destruction spread over
  the whole world is near!
Countless numbers will die! No one will be able to stop it... Fufufu...
Fufufu... Ahahahaha!!

|------------------------|
|      LOSS OF LIFE      |
|-One Mere Common Death.-|
|------------------------|

  -----------------------------------------------------
Garlot:
What the hell was that...
What in the world is the "maelstrom of conflict" about? And the "spurring the
  Empire to action" too...

Medoute:
Miss Beatrine, do you have any knowledge as to why Nessiah is doing this?

Beatrine:
All I had was something akin to a vague premonition, there were no concrete
  details.
All I saw in the dream was him standing next to the Emperor with an unnerving
  smile.

Velleman:
We shall return to the capital and see if anything has changed.
I will request an audience with His Highness.  He shouldn't mind so soon after
  the success of the surgery.

Lapis:
Unfortunately, that will not be so simple.

Velleman:
Ah, Lady Lapis. Has something happened?

Lapis:
His Highness is no longer at the capital.

Velleman:
So soon... Where has he gone?

Lapis:
He's headed towards Fort Ishnad.

Medoute:
Ishnad...... Isn't that the fort city on the border of the Fantasinian Kingdom?
Why has the Emperor gone to the front line...?

Lapis:
Once every two years Emperor Soltier and the King hold a meeting at that fort.

Aegina:
With Fantasinia's King......

Lapis:
This meeting is a very formal affair.
With His Highness still recovering from illness he should not overexert himself
  and go. I had pleaded with him to postpone the meeting......

Velleman:
And His Highness's response?

Lapis:
He rejected my suggestion, and... discharged me from his services.

Shiskia:
Discharged...... What? He fired you?

Lapis:
His Highness's orders are not to be disobeyed. I have left the castle.

Shiskia:
That was so stupid, and you're okay with this?

Lapis:
His Highness's orders are absolute. How many times must I tell you this, girl.

Shiskia:
But still, if you think there's something strange about it and you still follow
  it you're not a good servant!

Lapis:
You say this every time, girl. Though this time your remark strikes deep......
  It's a wonder you haven't been killed yet.

Velleman:
What are your plans from here on out, then?

Lapis:
Be as it may that I have been discharged, I am still worried about His
  Highness. I plan to head for Ishnad.
But before that I thought to enquire with Lady Beatrine regarding to the change
  in His Highness.

Garlot:
Velleman, Nessiah did mention creating a maelstrom of conflict...

Velleman:
Yes, and adding Lady Beatrine's premonition, it's reasonable to say that
  Nessiah planned this.

Lapis:
What is this? What exactly are you talking about?

Velleman:
If I may speak frankly, there was one called Nessiah present during the
  operation, and we suspect he may have drugged His Highness.

Lapis:
What insolence......! I will deliver the punishment for this disrespect right
  now, to you included!!

Velleman:
Nessiah has already been dealt with. But I worry about His Highness heading to
  Ishnad.

Lapis:
You're guilty of the same offence! Repent for it!!

Garlot:
This isn't the time for this!
The first priority should be to expose and undo Nessiah's plan!

Lapis:
Kh, I suppose you're right.

Jenon:
So, the Fantasinian Kingdom is the powerful country along our border......
If, say, His Highness were to kill the King during this meeting......

Leon:
Even I know what would happen. A war will break out, no doubt about it.

Shiskia:
No way, then the maelstrom of conflict Nessiah was talking about would be...!

Garlot:
Velleman, we'd better get to this Ishnad place right away.

Lapis:
I can't say I've fully absorbed the situation, but...... His Highness is being
  controlled by this Nessiah character?

Beatrine:
There is a high chance of that. Although it can't be affirmed.

Lapis:
But Nessiah has been killed, right?

Beatrine:
We think he may have used a powerful technique on the Emperor.

Lapis:
This is all hard to believe at once. Yet, I must stop His Highness as well. I
  will accompany you.

Velleman:
I see no problem with that. We are grateful.

Lapis:
I will say one thing. Don't think I believe you.
If I find a single flaw in your tale, I will kill you all.

Garlot:
That's fine.


---------------------Vs.---------------------                        [Map53.05]
--Garlot vs. Nessiah
| Nessiah:
| I had thought that when you got tired of the difference between your ideals
|   and reality you would stop fighting against your blood, but, well......
|
| Garlot:
| What? What are you talking about?
|
| Nessiah:
| Fufufu...... Now that this has happened, it does not matter.
|
|---VICTORY
| Nessiah:
| Truly, it's too bad about that power...... I would certainly like to make use
|   of it. That is, as one of my dead soldiers.
|
|---DEFEAT
| Nessiah:
| I had thought you had a little more skill......
| I suppose with the power of your blood sealed this is the full extent.
|
| Garlot:
| What "power of my blood"? What do you know about me!?
|
| Nessiah:
| Fufufufufu......
-----

--Shiskia vs. Nessiah----------------------------------
| Nessiah:
| I should have used you as a sacrifice. If I had, surely......
|
| Shiskia:
| Don't come near me! Traitor!!
|
|---VICTORY
| Shiskia:
| You won't get to start conflict! We'll stop you no matter what!
|
| Nessiah:
| Fufufu... In some ways ignorance is bliss.
| You can continue on not knowing the terror the future holds......
|
|---DEFEAT
| Shiskia:
| H- he's strong......
|
| Nessiah:
| Keep crushing them, my corpse army!!
-----

--Jenon vs. Nessiah------------------------------------
| Jenon:
| This is what I was afraid would happen......
|
| Nessiah:
| Afraid? Are you saying you foresaw this situation?
| Fufufu...... I would suggest you save your lies for ordinary humans, Jenon.
| The unease you feel toward me comes from your feelings of jealousy.
|
| Jenon:
| Kh......
|
|---VICTORY
| Nessiah:
| That was surprisingly well done. I suppose you still have some use.
|
|---DEFEAT
| Nessiah:
| Did you really think you could beat me with that?
|
| Jenon:
| ......Whatever you do I'll survive.
-----

--Medoute vs. Nessiah----------------------------------
| Medoute:
| Nessiah, did you join Gram Blaze so that you could use us to raise conflict!?
|
| Nessiah:
| Fufufu...... Let's leave that to speculation.
|
|---VICTORY
| Medoute:
| To think that the unease I felt towards you would take this form...
|
| Nessiah:
| Fufufu......
|
|---DEFEAT
| Medoute:
| You really are quite frightful as an opponent.
|
| Nessiah:
| Do you feel terror?
-----

--Aegina vs. Nessiah-----------------------------------
| Aegina:
| I will not forgive you for turning your blade on Master Garlot!
|
| Nessiah:
| Loyalty...... That too is a convenient point to control humans at. Fufufu...
|
|---VICTORY
| Nessiah:
| You are quite the hot-blooded individual. Please, entertain me some more.
|
| Aegina:
| W- what......
|
|---DEFEAT
| Aegina:
| He's strong...... However, I cannot afford to lose.
|
| Nessiah:
| Yes, keep thinking those thoughts! Assertions to fight will turn into fuel
|   for my cause!!
-----

--Leon vs. Nessiah-------------------------------------
| Leon:
| You've got some guts, Nessiah...... Are you ready!?
|
| Nessiah:
| Ready? Fufufu......
|
|---VICTORY
| Leon:
| Is that all you've got? For all your big talk...
|
| Nessiah:
| Fufufu ......
|
|---DEFEAT
| Leon:
| Damn, I'm really out of whack today.
|
| Nessiah:
| Is something wrong? That was honestly disappointing......
-----

--Beatrine vs. Nessiah---------------------------------
| Nessiah:
| Your capability is surprising. I should have carried out my plans sooner.
|
| Beatrine:
| One cannot bury their past. That is true of even such beings as fallen
|   angels.
|
| Nessiah:
| ...............
|
|---VICTORY
| Beatrine:
| You have not yet gathered enough power, have you?
|
| Nessiah:
| ...............
|
|---DEFEAT
| Nessiah:
| Now die!
-----


------------------Locations------------------                        [Map53.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
Point connecting the capital and Ether Canyon's plank road

   --妖精の集会場 - Fairy Gathering
The gathering place of the fairies that live in the rocky mountains. Could one 
get lucky and meet them?


--------------------On Map-------------------                        [Map53.07]
--妖精の集会場 - Fairy Gathering - BEATRINE
|
|--------------------|
|     ACQUISITION    |
|-Received Treasure!-|
|     Dragon Fang    |
|--------------------|
|
| Fairy:
| Ah? You use an unusual weapon.
| I think there's something like that in the treasure trove inside our
|   gathering place...
| Ah, here it is!
| It's alright, don't be shy. There aren't many people who can master a weapon
|   like this.
|
|---NOT BEATRINE - AFTERWARDS
| Merchant:
| Hmmm. Long ago I saw fairies somewhere around here.
| Mmmn. I guess they're gone... What could I do to meet them?
| ...Huh? You want more details on that encounter? Let's see...
| That time I was taking weapons to the west, and had many different things
|   with me.
| I remember because I had an unusual weapon with me. Was it, a scythe, I
|   think?
-----


---------------------Loss--------------------                        [Map53.08]
Defeat - Out of Cards (1st)

In the battle with the estranged Nessiah's army of corpses, Gram Blaze was 
scattered due to a flaw in tactics, and was forced to disband...

Defeat - Garlot Defeated (2nd)-------------------------

In the battle with the estranged Nessiah's army of corpses, Gram Blaze's 
captain, Garlot, lost his life, and Gram Blaze vanished from history's stage...


========================================================================[Map54]
その火蓋は切らせない
We Won't Let it Start
Near the Border - Canosa Highway


--------------------Intro--------------------                        [Map54.01]
Having said that he will create a maelstrom of conflict, Nessiah suddenly 
turned against Gram Blaze.

And, right after recovering from the operation, the Emperor suddenly discharged 
Lapis from her post......

Gram Blaze, feeling that something was wrong with Emperor Soltier, hurried 
after him to Ishnad, where his meeting with the king of Fantasinia was to take 
place.


----------------Before Battle----------------                        [Map54.02]
Shiskia:
And that's why! If the king comes here you can't let him in!!

Baldus:
And why is it that I must follow your orders?
I have been ordered by His Highness to secure our defenses outside and guide
  King Ordene.

Lapis:
Baldus. Can you not do this even by my request?

Baldus:
......My apologies. I've been told not to listen to you if you were to arrive.

Lapis:
I see......

Jenon:
He's like a steel wall. Just as you'd expect from someone called the "Shield of
  Bronquia."

Shiskia:
Ugh... We should have just charged until we broke through. We did beat him once
  before.

Lapis:
This is different from that mock battle. There are many troops around the
  fortress. A frontal assault is impossible.

Velleman:
While the situation may be grave, King Ordene is not inside Ishnad yet.
If the Imperial side won't listen, we'll appeal to the Royal side. We'll tell
  them that Ishnad is dangerous.

Medoute:
I just hope that goes smoothly...

Garlot:
Medoute, how do the surroundings look?

Medoute:
It looks like there are many hidden units deployed.
Canosa Road is the shortest route when crossing between the Kingdom and the
  Empire.

Garlot:
If he's headed to Fort Ishnad, the King will definitely pass by here.

Leon:
And these assassins are waiting just for that.

Velleman:
Our first task is to remove them.
Then we'll make contact with the King before he enters the fortress, and use
  the assassins' presence to make our point.

Jenon:
So the plan is to somehow stop the King before he enters the fortress.

Shiskia:
Will that really work out?
I can't really explain it, but I'm getting a really bad feeling from that
  fortress.
Shouldn't we place some people inside just in case?
Cause if we can't stop the King from going inside, there won't be anything we
  can do after that.

Jenon:
That may be true, but it's too dangerous.

Leon:
I agree with Shiskia's plan. It's better to be prepared.

Jenon:
Alright, then this is what we'll do. My unit and Shiskia's will sneak into the
  fortress.

Shiskia:
You, Jenon? As long as you don't get in the way...

Garlot:
Report if anything happens. And if you feel in danger, run. As long as you
  promise me to do this, you can go.

Shiskia:
Okay, roger.

Garlot:
Then, we'll find and deal with the assassins.

  /--Victory--------------
 / Uncover and annihilate the assassins!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
               Garlot dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Garlot:
Spread out as much as you can. That way we can cover the most ground in our
  search.

Medoute:
When you find the assassins kill them all. Everyone else, help if you can. Got
  it?


-----------------After Battle----------------                        [Map54.04]
|------------------------|
|      LOSS OF LIFE      |
|-One Mere Common Death.-|
|------------------------|

|    |
|    |          DRIVEN BACK THE ENEMY
| /\ | Successfully eradicated the assassins!!
|/  \|

Garlot:
That should be it for the assassins.
All that's left is to wait for the King to pass along this road and hope that
  we can stop him from going into the fortress.

  -----------------------------------------------------
Ordene:
...............

Velleman:
King Ordene, please listen to what we have to say.

Ordene:
Who would you be?

Velleman:
I am a Count of Bronquia's provincial city, Tiera. I am called Velleman.
If I may, I will get straight to the point. There is a troubling atmosphere
  inside Ishnad.
Would it not be possible for you to return to the Kingdom right away?

Ordene:
...I refuse.

Velleman:
You refuse?

Ordene:
That's right. From the perspective of the entire Empire, breaking my promise is
  an act of disloyalty from my country.
I do not intend to be such a fool as to be manipulated by such of information.

Medoute:
But we have already beaten countless assassins lying in wait outside the
  fortress.
From their placement and positions it is clear that you were their target, Your
  Highness.

Ordene:
I understand what you wish to say. However, just that information is not enough
  to make me turn back.
I do not know why it is that you protected me, but you have my thanks. I am in
  your debt.

Aegina:
...So what now that you have listened to another without complaint?

Ordene:
Hm, you look like...

Aegina:
...............

Ordene:
No, never mind. The resemblance must be coincidental.
Now, I must continue on. If you could let me by.

Aegina:
You are nothing if not stubborn......

Ordene:
Still, it is useless to try and stop me further. I must hurry on ahead.

Medoute:
He's gone......

Aegina:
What a difficult man! That rotten King would never listen to persuasion!!

Garlot:
...............
There's nothing to do but bet on those two now......
We're counting on you, Jenon, Shiskia.


------------------Locations------------------                        [Map54.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
Road straddling the border between the Kingdom and the Empire


---------------------Loss--------------------                        [Map54.08]
Defeat - Out of Cards (1st)

Though they were able to uncover the assassins, Gram Blaze was scattered due to 
a flaw in tactics, and was forced to disband...


========================================================================[Map55]
死闘、命果てるまで
Struggle to the Death, to the very End
Ishnad Fortress


--------------------Intro--------------------                        [Map55.01]
Gram Blaze killed the assassins secretly deployed on Canosa Road.

But King Ordene of Fantasinia, not knowing the truth about being targeted, said 
that he would not break the trust between the countries. He rejected Gram 
Blaze's plea and entered Fort Ishnad alone.

Garlot and the others, left on standby outside the fortress, entrusted the fate 
to Shiskia and Jenon, who had snuck inside.

But will Shiskia and Jenon be able to rescue King Ordene?


----------------Before Battle----------------                        [Map55.02]
Soltier:
Welcome, King Ordene. I am especially glad that you could make it with the
  workload you are currently under.

Ordene:
Pardon my tardiness. But, isn't that an unnecessarily excessive amount of
  troops for a simple meeting? Emperor Soltier.

Soltier:
This is the way we Bronquians express our utmost courtesy for the meeting, King
  Ordene.
Accept our welcome...... Begin.

Imperial Soldier:
Yes sir!

|---------------------|
|        AMBUSH       |
|-Unexpected Enemies!-|
|---------------------|

Ordene:
...What is the meaning of this?

Soltier:
Obviously, I am removing Your Highness's side, of course.
To be honest, I arranged for you to be taken care of on the Canosa Highway, but
  that fell through.
Likely due to Velleman's meddling.

Ordene:
Velleman. That Count. Then, he was telling the truth.
This will turn into war......

Soltier:
Yes, That's the plan.

Ordene:
I too have heard much of the lackluster state of the political affairs in the
  Empire.
That is why I had come here to lend a hand.
Are you trying to use a war to unite your people and lift up your country?

Soltier:
Whether you die here or not, the Kingdom will become extremely tense.
You're wrong. What I want is that blade. The Holy Sword, Gran Centurio......

Ordene:
...My sword? You, the head of your country, are starting a war over the want of
  a mere sword!?

Soltier:
That's right... What about it?

Ordene:
You are insane...... I see that continuing this discussion is pointless.
In that case, all I can do is go back the way I came. But, can I really get out
  of this place...!?

Soltier:
Do it.

|----------------------------------|
|               RESCUE             |
|-Valiant Blade Delivers its Lord.-|
|----------------------------------|

Jenon:
King Ordene! This way! Please hurry!!

Ordene:
Who might you be......

Shiskia:
We're with Gram Blaze. We can't have you dying here!
There'll be nothing but grief for everyone if a war were to start. We'll stop
  it at all costs!
That's why we're here to save you.

Ordene:
...............

Soltier:
Gram Blaze. I knew you'd come.
Still, sneaking into the fortress goes beyond what I expected.
Not that it matters, You won't make it out of here.
Shut all the gates to Ishnad! Do not let them escape!!

Shiskia:
Jenon, send a messenger out to Garlot!
Though honestly, I don't know if they can break in here to help us.

Jenon:
We should try and get past the main gate now that we've got His Royal Highness!

Shiskia:
Your Highness, over here! The main gate is straight to the east.

Jenon:
Maybe you should be a bit more careful in what you say. You're talking to the
  King, you know......

Shiskia:
This isn't the time for that!

Jenon:
I got it...... Then, I'll leave it to you to lead the King out.

Shiskia:
Okay. But what are you gonna do, Jenon?

Jenon:
Don't worry about it, just hurry.

Shiskia:
...You always make up plans and don't explain them. Confide in me for once.

Ordene:
Are you in the employ of that man I met outside, Velleman?

Shiskia:
Yeah, I'm Shiskia. And this snobby guy is Jenon.

Jenon:
Don't say that.

Ordene:
I regret I did not take Velleman's advice outside. I am grateful to you two.

Shiskia:
Then, Your Highness, once we're safe, I want 10 silk scarves as thanks. The
  ones that have the nice texture to them.

Ordene:
You certainly are not the most polite lass.

Shiskia:
My apologies, Your Highness. I do not speak in a way other than that very much.
But, please. We do not want a war. If we make it out of here......
Think of us and don't seek retribution on Bronquia.

Ordene:
But with the way Emperor Soltier is, that may be impossible.

Jenon:
The Emperor is like this right now only because he fell under the control of a
  certain magician. We will break him of it!

Shiskia:
So, please, Your Highness.

Ordene:
......I see.
If you are telling the truth, I will give you my word that I will not take
  action against Bronquia.

Shiskia:
Thank you so much, Your Highness.

Jenon:
...It won't be much longer until they catch up to us.

|--------------|
|    ATTACK    |
|-Under Siege!-|
|--------------|

Shiskia:
Wait, Jenon! You'll end up surrounded! Hurry up and get back over here...!!

Jenon:
...No, this is fine.

Shiskia:
Huh...?

Jenon:
Uaaaargh!

|------------------------|
|        COLLAPSE        |
|-The bridge has fallen.-|
|------------------------|

Imperial Soldier:
W- what...? He destroyed the road!?

Shiskia:
What are you doing, Jenon! With that bridge broken, you're...

Jenon:
Shiskia, this way I can buy time for sure.

Shiskia:
But then... You can't just...!

Jenon:
Now hurry up and go! Get His Royal Highness to safety, and then come back with
  everyone for me.
Don't worry, I'll hold out til then.

Shiskia:
Okay, Jenon. I'll be back!

Jenon:
Shiskia!

Shiskia:
Huh, what...

Jenon:
No, nothing. I'll tell you when you get back......

Shiskia:
What, you're acting all self-important again. Stupid!

Jenon:
...Alright then, ladies and gentlemen. I bet you think that someone with such
  detailed attention to style cannot possibly fight well, right?
But you need not worry. Even like this, I am the second most capable member of
  Gram Blaze.
Let us get started.

Imperial Soldier:
Master Baldus! We caught this character acting strangely coming out of the
  castle......

Baldus:
Hm?

Messenger:
Master Garlot!! The King is trying to get out with Lady Shiskia!!
They are heading for this gate! Master Jenon is fine as well!!

Baldus:
She is with Gram Blaze! Quickly, silence her!!

Messenger:
Mmph......

Garlot:
This gate is closed. There is only one way to rescue them...
Okay, we're going through Baldus!
Lapis, get ready!

Baldus:
Gram Blaze is saying that they will force their way through the gate. In that
  case you will face us first!
I, Baldus, will wager my life to stop you!!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Defeat Baldus and open the castle gates!!
/----------------

   ----------------------Defeat--/
       Garlot or Jenon dies...  /
     Ordene fails to escape... /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Shiskia:
We may have been pursued. We should proceed with caution.

Ordene:
...............


------------------Mid Battle-----------------                        [Map55.03]
Baldus:
They really are strong!! Still, I must not let them...!

Lapis:
Please, Baldus! Open this gate!
Emperor Soltier is...... His Highness is......

Baldus:
Lady Lapis...... What exactly has happened?

Lapis:
That's what I would like to learn myself! But it is certain that this situation
  is heading towards an awful end.
At this rate we could end up in a war with the Kingdom. So, before that
  happens......

Baldus:
...............
...Open the gates.

Lapis:
Baldus, you're...	

Baldus:
...Lady Lapis. I have pledged myself to His Highness as a military man and as a
  knight.
Still, loyalty does not mean that I will follow anything and everything my Lord
  says.
I prefer if one can say something if they feel that something just, and when
  something is wrong...
And I feel that is true of you as well, Lady Lapis.

Lapis:
...Thank you, I am in your debt.

|---------------------------|
|        OPENING GATE       |
|-The Gate has been Opened!-|
|---------------------------|

Garlot:
Go, the gate is open! Now we rescue the King!
Shiskia, Jenon, be safe!

|    |
|    |       THIS LIFE TOO CAN BE SAVED
| /\ | Secured a road for the King's escape!!
|/  \|

Garlot:
Your Highness! I'm glad you're safe.
Are you hurt, Shiskia?

Shiskia:
The King and I are okay...... But... Jenon is......

Jenon:
Hah... Hah...
Good, looks like Shiskia and the King made it out alright.
Now Garlot and the others will come to help.

Imperial Soldier:
We failed to capture the King because of a single man......

Jenon:
Heh, heheh... Well? I may look like a gentleman, but I'm not bad, huh?

|-----------------------|
|         VOLLEY        |
|-Thousand Arrow Storm!-|
|-----------------------|

Jenon:
Urk!!
...Huh, that's strange. That wasn't the strategy...

Imperial Soldier:
Die!

Jenon:
Ugh ......
Sh- Shiskia, live on. And remember... that there was a man like myself by your
  side...
Garlot! Protect Shiskia! If she's ever unhappy...... I will never forgive you!!

Shiskia:
That was Jenon's voice......

Imperial Soldier:
How can you still talk! You... Drop dead already!!

Jenon:
Uwaaaaaaa......

Shiskia:
J- Jenon!!

Garlot:
That idiot...... He's gotta act cool every time!

Imperial Soldier:
Don't let Ordene escape!

Garlot:
Damn they're persistent!
Velleman! Evacuate the King!!

Velleman:
What will you do?

Garlot:
We've gotta confirm whether or not the Emperor is really being controlled by
  Nessiah, right?
And...... Jenon has to be alive still. I am going to save him!

Velleman:
Alright. Leave the King to me, Garlot.

Garlot:
I'm counting on you......

  /--Victory--------------
 / Bring Emperor Soltier to his senses!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
    Garlot or Shiskia dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Garlot:
Let's go, Shiskia...!

Shiskia:
Garlot, Jenon's alright, right...?

Garlot:
As if he would die. I'm sure right now he's having a good laugh, all self
  absorbed.

  -----------------------------------------------------
--要塞内溝渠 - Channel in the Fortress - GARLOT
| Garlot:
| Hey, Jenon! Hm? He's not here.
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| Jenon! Jenon! Huh, no one's here?
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| Jenon! Say something if you're here!! There's no one here, and no body
|   either.
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| Sir Jenon! Sir Jenon! That's strange, there is no one here.
|
|---LEON
| Leon:
| Hey, girly man! Hm? There's no one here.
-----

AFTERWARDS

Shiskia:
If he's not here he must have gotten away. Agh, why are you making me worry
  like this.

  -----------------------------------------------------
Gatekeeper:
Ngh......

Garlot:
Hey you, where's Soltier? Tell me!

Gatekeeper:
H- His Highness... should be in the innermost quarters of the fortress.

|-----------------------|
|    KILLED IN ACTION   |
|-A Warrior has Fallen.-|
|-----------------------|

|    |
|    |   THE MISSION CONTINUES ON
| /\ | The way to Soltier is open!!
|/  \|

Soltier:
Gram Blaze! How dare you keep getting in my way!!

Shiskia:
Soltier!

Garlot:
Are you really Soltier? Or are you being controlled by a magician called
  Nessiah?

Soltier:
Who's that? Since my illness was cured my body's been feeling exceptionally
  well.
Like this I can make my dream of conquering the Kingdom, no, the whole world a
  reality. Hmhmhmhmhm......

Lapis:
Your Highness! Please come to your senses!!

Soltier:
Who are you? Hm, Lapis? Ngh I... I told you to go...

Lapis:
If conquering the world is really Your Highness's wish, I will follow you on
  that path!
But right now I do not think you are acting on your own will......

Soltier:
L- Lapis... is that you? Ngh... H- help me......

Garlot:
Lapis! Looks like the Emperor still has some of his own self left!!

Soltier:
Hm? Self? What are you saying? I am Soltier. I will kill you!!

Beatrine:
I have an idea. Please stop His Highness from moving.

Garlot:
Got it. We'll do our best.

  /--Victory--------------
 / Free Emperor Soltier from Nessiah's control!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
    Garlot or Shiskia dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Soltier:
Are you saying I'm being controlled? Me!? Preposterous......

Lapis:
Your Highness...


-----------------After Battle----------------                        [Map55.04]
|---------------------|
|       CAPTURE       |
|-Where is the Crime?-|
|---------------------|

Soltier:
U... ugh...!?

|    |
|    |         VICTORY AS REPARATION
| /\ | Soltier cannot fight due to an injury!!
|/  \|

Garlot:
We managed to stop his movements!

Shiskia:
Miss Beatrine!

  -----------------------------------------------------
Beatrine:
Please make His Highness take this pill.
If Nessiah is controlling him, this should neutralize that magic.

Lapis:
It will not harm His Highness?

Beatrine:
Please put your mind at ease. He will be alright.

Lapis:
I will give it to him.

Soltier:
Ugh......

Lapis:
Your Highness!

Medoute:
Now if he can regain himself...

Soltier:
Huh? Lapis......? Where am I?

Nessiah:
Fufufu, What a nuisance, breaking my spell without permission.

Shiskia:
Nessiah!?

Garlot:
No way... How could he be alive? We killed him for sure!

Nessiah:
You only cause yourself more troubles by putting me on the same scale as a
  human. Fufufufufu...

Soltier:
U- ugh...... Nessiah, what should I do?

Lapis:
Your Highness......

Nessiah:
Fufufu... And now His Highness is once again my doll.
This technique of mine gets stronger the more desires and wants the target has.
He is an easy tool.

Soltier:
Uuuugh...

Nessiah:
Now, Your Highness. Kill Ordene and take the Holy Sword, Gran Centurio.
And, through a blood covered conflict with the Kingdom, fill the Holy Sword
  with Power!
Then I will have my revenge!

Soltier:
...I see. That's what you wanted.

Nessiah:
...What's this?

Soltier:
Damn it, I hurt all over. Garlot, tch, are you guys responsible for these
  wounds?

Nessiah:
I- it can't be... How could he have regained his self and senses?

Soltier:
Hmph... Being controlled by you made me sick. That is, until I sent you off.

Lapis:
Your Highness... How wonderful......

Nessiah:
You are a meddlesome group of humans... Still, it's no trouble. Fufufu...
We will have a chance for a rematch... I will die once more.

|------------------------|
|      LOSS OF LIFE      |
|-One Mere Common Death.-|
|------------------------|

Aegina:
......Is it over?

Velleman:
I do not think so...... He was killed last time as well.

Medoute:
A man who does not die when killed... Last time it would have been impossible
  to know.

Garlot:
...Is Nessiah immortal?

Velleman:
We don't know anything about the extent of the strength that Nessiah possesses.
Just that he said a few worrying things.
About the Gran Centurio... A blood spattered conflict... and revenge...

Garlot:
Nessiah wants fighting. He said so earlier.

Velleman:
It's likely that the Holy Sword grows more powerful through the death of people
  in conflicts.
And he is trying to do something with the power the sword has gathered.
But back on topic. Is Nessiah really immortal?
Or possibly... Did he gain a power somewhere that can be mistaken for
  immortality?

Aegina:
Wait a minute, are you saying he uses the power the Holy Sword has gathered to
  revive himself?

Velleman:
This is only an assumption.

Garlot:
But if it's true, then as long as the Holy Sword exists we can't beat Nessiah,
  right?

Ordene:
I apologize for interrupting, but the Holy Sword, Gran Centurio, that you speak
  of is my sword.

Garlot:
That huge thing?

Ordene:
I agree with you that we can't just stand by and watch as war breaks out.
...If what you say is true then this sword should be forever sealed.
But the Gran Centurio is a symbol that's been passed down in the Kingdom for
  generations.
To seal it so simply...

Soltier:
That's a matter of terms.
How about this then. I will take the responsibility for the damages caused by
  this conflict and resign from my position as Emperor.

Baldus:
Your Highness!?

Lapis:
Y- you can't be serious!?

Soltier:
While I was being controlled I tried to take King Ordene's life.
If that can be overlooked with just this, I don't mind.

Lapis:
But... What will happen to the Bronquian Empire? You have no heir either...

Soltier:
There is one right here with excellent talent at managing political affairs.
Isn't that right, Velleman?

Velleman:
......Huh?
M- me?

Soltier:
We'll say you're a distant nephew. And I will handle all who dissent.
And you can take the role of Prime Minister.
How is that, King Ordene?

Ordene:
......Very well. I shall send a messenger to Paltina right away.
We do not know when that man will revive once more, so we should move with the
  utmost haste.

Lapis:
Your Highness... Is this really alright?

Soltier:
I've always felt like I was stumbling around in the dark concerning my duty for
  the Imperial Throne.
I did not control politics. Most likely it was the dragon blood that did that.
Instead the previous Emperors and I were given great wit for domination and
  military strength.
That's why the Empire was strong.
But maybe it's about time humanity was freed from this curse.


---------------------Vs.---------------------                        [Map55.05]
--Garlot vs. Soltier
| Garlot:
| To think you're being controlled by Nessiah. You, the Emperor who always
|   looked down on everyone......
|
| Soltier:
| Shut up! I'm not being controlled!
|
|---VICTORY
| Garlot:
| I can't believe you think you can take the world with sword skills like that.
|
| Soltier:
| Keep talking, worm.
|
|---DEFEAT
| Garlot:
| The Emperor's pretty skilled with his swords. I don't see any weak
|   points......
|
| Soltier:
| Gram Blaze! I was looking forward to crossing blades with you, but I suppose
|   this is the extent of your strength.
-----

--Shiskia vs. Soltier----------------------------------
| Shiskia:
| I used to think you were a nasty man, but the truth is you're just pathetic.
|
| Soltier:
| Keep talking, little girl!!
|
|---VICTORY
| Shiskia:
| My arrows are filled with thoughts of everyone who was oppressed under this
|   rule......
| The pain you feel is their feelings!
|
| Soltier:
| Is that all you wanted to say?
|
|---DEFEAT
| Soltier:
| Well!? With my power, conquering the world is an easy task!!
|
| Shiskia:
| And what about after you conquer the world? What then?
|
| Soltier:
| Afterwards... Ugh......
|
| Shiskia:
| Have you still not realized that that ambition was given to you by Nessiah's
|   technique?
-----

--Medoute vs. Soltier----------------------------------
| Medoute:
| Hurry up and open your eyes!
|
| Soltier:
| What are you talking about! My eyes are wide open!!
|
|---VICTORY
| Soltier:
| This skill with the blade is full of aggressive valor...... Each time our
|   blades come together my blood burns and dances!
| The battle has just started. Hmhmhmhm......
|
|---DEFEAT
| Medoute:
| His strikes are fast!!
|
| Soltier:
| I'll carve the strength of an Emperor on your body! Tremble in terror!!
-----

--Aegina vs. Soltier-----------------------------------
| Aegina:
| If we leave the Emperor as is, he will gather an army to utterly destroy the
|   Kingdom......
| Yet, I am trying to stop it......
| Is it really okay for me to be indirectly protecting the Kingdom?
|
| Soltier:
| What are you mumbling about over there? There is no room for doubt in
|   battle!!
|
| Aegina:
| That's true...... I have no time for doubts...
|
|---VICTORY
| Aegina:
| Something within me has changed...... Could I have found something more
|   important than revenge?
|
| Soltier:
| Not bad, Gram Blaze!!
|
| Aegina:
| Huh... That's it then. I am a member of Gram Blaze. Looking back, I've always
|   been among friends.
|
|---DEFEAT
| Soltier:
| What are you doing? I can feel your shaking through your sword.
|
| Aegina:
| I must rid myself of doubt......
-----

--Leon vs. Soltier-------------------------------------
| Soltier:
| If it isn't a familiar face... Come for revenge after all this time, Leon?
|
| Leon:
| Revenge? Don't bullshit with me! I just like to fight!!
|
|---VICTORY
| Soltier:
| You've gotten better.
|
| Leon:
| Way to state the obvious......
|
|---DEFEAT
| Leon:
| Damn, I messed up......
|
| Soltier:
| Is that the extent of your strength...... Then know that this is the end.
-----

--Beatrine vs. Soltier---------------------------------
| Soltier:
| You think that you can stop me? Interesting......
|
| Beatrine:
| You are completely under Nessiah's power. You must be stopped.
|
|---VICTORY
| Soltier:
| Is that it... I didn't even feel it.
|
| Beatrine:
| Nessiah's spell has considerable power......
|
|---DEFEAT
| Beatrine:
| I regret taking Nessiah to accompany me during the operation...
|
| Soltier:
| You're still bringing that up? I'm not being controlled.
-----


------------------Locations------------------                        [Map55.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
A well-built fortress on the border with the Kingdom

   --要塞内溝渠 - Canal Inside the Fortress
Jenon must have fallen into this channel......


--------------------On Map-------------------                        [Map55.07]
--兵員詰め所 - Guardroom - GARLOT
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|    Armory Key   |
|-----------------|
|
| Garlot:
| This looks like the place where the soldiers that serve here full time
|   gather. It seems everyone's out.
| Hm? ...What's this key?
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| Is this a guardroom for the soldiers? Though, there's no one here now...
| Ah, what is this a key to?
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| This looks like an office for the rank and file troops. There are no
|   particularly important documents...
| ...How careless. Leaving a key here.
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| This room is empty. It may be a standby room for the soldiers that are
|   fighting right now.
| Ah... What is this key used for?
|
|---LEON
| Leon:
| Hm? This is the soldiers' guardroom. It's sweltering as always.
| Oh, what's this key? Don't know what it opens, but I'll take it.
|
|---BEATRINE
| Beatrine:
| What is this small room?
| Oh, there is a key on the desk. What is...
| A key... It is a thing that opens a locked door. It can only be a help to
|   take it.
-----

--武器庫 - Armory - GARLOT--------------------------------
|
|-----------------|
|    DISCOVERY    |
|-Found Treasure!-|
|   Night Scope   |
|    Iron Spear   |
|-----------------|
|
| Garlot:
| This is a sturdy door. And it looks to be locked...
| Hm. Hey, could that key be...
| Yeah, it opened! It's like a mountain of weapons here.
| Alright, let's pick out anything valuable and gather it up!
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| What's this big door. It's locked too.
| ...Ah. Could that key be...
| It opened! Wow, this is an armory.
| Okay, let's gather whatever seems useful!
|
|---MEDOUTE
| Medoute:
| This is a big door. From the looks of it... Could this be the armory?
| If we had a key I could open it. Maybe...
| It opened. ...It is an armory, like I thought.
| I'll secure us some weapons. I'll do a thorough search for anything useful
|   and take that.
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| This door looks heavy. I'm curious about what's inside, but it's locked...
| Maybe this key...?
| Ah, it opened! This is an armory!
| Let us take whatever weapons look useful. But, there are so many...
|
|---LEON
| Leon:
| ...If I remember right from before I was a soldier, there was an armory
|   around here...
| If I'm right, this key should open it, right?
| Yes, I got it. ...It's just like I remember.
| Alright, bring those weapons out. We'll increase our equipment and reinforce
|   our strength! Hurry up!!
|
|---BEATRINE
| Beatrine:
| This is a big door. What is it that needs a frame of this size for
|   protection...
| Still, if there is a way to shut it, there must be an appropriate way to open
|   it. This key may show me the way.
| It opened. Now, what is it that lay concealed, protected behind this door?
| What, a pile of weapons?
| Madness makes people embrace weapons, and with weapons and madness people do
|   battle.* 
| But, again, fighting is the nature of man. I, as a member of mankind, too
|   have the ability to possess this madness...
| *(She does some wordplay here with madness and weapons both being kyouki.)*
-----


---------------------Loss--------------------                        [Map55.08]
Defeat - Jenon Defeated (1st)

In the middle of the plan to get the King out of the evil influence of the 
Empire, Jenon lost his life. The private army, having lost their brains, became 
lackluster and collapsed...

Defeat - Ordene Killed (1st)---------------------------

Shiskia:
...Hah... Hah...!
No, the gate isn't open... This looks grim.

|-------------------|
|       SNIPED      |
|-A Technical Shot!-|
|-------------------|

Ordene:
...Ugh!!

Shiskia:
K- King Ordene!?

Ordene:
Across the channel... We're targeted... from there... too...

|-------------------|
|       SNIPED      |
|-A Technical Shot!-|
|-------------------|

Shiskia:
Ow... u- uuuuuugh...

Jenon:
Shiskia!!

|    |
|    |            IMPEDIMENT FAILED
| /\ | King Ordene fell to the Emperor's tricks!
|/  \|

In the middle of the plan to get the King out of the evil influence of the 
Empire, Ordene lost his life. Here, the all out war between the Kingdom and the 
Empire began...

Defeat - Out of Cards (2nd)----------------------------

While trying to make their way into Fort Ishnad, Gram Blaze was scattered due 
to a flaw in tactics, and was forced to disband...

Defeat - Shiskia Defeated (3rd)------------------------

In the fierce fight with Emperor Soltier in the heart of the fortress, Shiskia 
lost her life. The private army, having lost their eyes and ears, became 
lackluster and collapsed...


========================================================================[Map56]
死の舞踏
Dance of Death
Near the Border - Ragnar Hill


--------------------Intro--------------------                        [Map56.01]
The battle of Fort Ishnad came to a close with Emperor Soltier being freed from 
Nessiah's control.

But a great price was paid in exchange.

Jenon, under attack by the enemy, fell into the waterway, and all contact with 
him was lost.

With the help of the Imperial Army, Gram Blaze searched frantically, but even 
after a week there was no sign of him.

Shiskia worried that he may have sacrificed himself for her, and felt that she 
was the most responsible for what happened.


----------------Before Battle----------------                        [Map56.02]
Shiskia:
...............

Garlot:
You okay, Shiskia?

Shiskia:
I wish I could say I am, but...

Garlot:
Let's not give up hope. He could still be alive.

Shiskia:
Yeah......

Garlot:
...............

Shiskia:
If I think about it, I've said nothing but mean things to him.

Garlot:
It's not only Jenon you've said mean things to. You've said things like that to
  me too.

Shiskia:
What, but you're... you're......
......I want to apologize to him... That's why...... I want him to be
  alive......

Garlot:
Shiskia...

Shiskia:
...Sorry, I'm acting strange, aren't I. I can't seem to stop crying...

Garlot:
Whenever you say something mean, I don't take it as you saying it to be cruel.
I'm sure he thinks the same. We're all friends, after all.

Shiskia:
Friends...... Yeah, you're right.

Garlot:
Still, he sure is late.

Shiskia:
Huh?

Garlot:
You know he always shows up late. And afterwards he says that he planned it all
  along.

Shiskia:
...............

Garlot:
When in reality he's just plain late, or he's running frantically to catch up.
So he'll show up soon. But you can't let him trick you, Shiskia.

Shiskia:
......Ahaha, that's right. You got it Garlot.

Garlot:
Yeah. So that's settled.

Shiskia:
I'm gonna keep looking around here a little longer.

Garlot:
Then I'm gonna search somewhere else.

Shiskia:
...............
Come back, Jenon.
It's just too sad to have the last thing I said to you be calling you stupid.
I got it, this is all part of your plan, isn't it?
Cut it out already, stop hiding, stupid!

???:
You're calling me stupid again, you really are mean, Shiskia.

Shiskia:
I'm mean? The person who just decided not to show up is who's mean!
Huh?

Jenon:
If you guys had just shown up a bit sooner to help me this wouldn't have gotten
  dragged out this far.

Shiskia:
Jenon?

Jenon:
Yes, that is my name.

Shiskia:
Wait, wait, hang on. I must be imagining this.

Jenon:
Imagining? Yeah, maybe. You look like you could use some more food and sleep.
The most important thing is, if you focus too much on your figure, you'll eat
  too little.
In that case, all you have to do is not stick your stomach out so much......

Shiskia:
...............

Jenon:
Hey.

Shiskia:
Jenon!!

Garlot:
Jenon, you're......

Jenon:
Sorry for worrying you, Garlot.

Garlot:
What have you been doing til now? Why didn't you hurry up......

Jenon:
It would have been stupid to have been found by the enemy because I was
  struggling against the current. So I ended up being carried out to the ocean.
And, after I washed ashore in Duke Barin's domain, I started gathering
  information.
So, is it true that the Emperor is abdicating?

Garlot:
It's true. They haven't made it official yet, but Velleman will take over as
  Prime Minister.

Jenon:
I see. That's good news.
By the way, Shiskia, have you told everyone yet? About me being fine.

Shiskia:
Not yet, you did just get here. I'll go call everyone......

Garlot:
Yeah, thanks.
I'm glad you're alright. You sure worried us.

Jenon:
I was worried too, strangely enough. I got very lucky.
Though, I still hurt here and there... Ouch......

Garlot:
Hey, you okay, Jenon...

Jenon:
I'm fine. My head is just... ow...

Garlot:
Come here a sec. Let me take a look.
Where does it hurt...?

Jenon:
...............

|----------------------------------|
|         SURPRISE ATTACK          |
|-Bewildered by a Surprise Attack!-|
|----------------------------------|

Jenon:
...Tch, I missed. You have good instincts, Garlot.

Garlot:
Jenon... What the hell......

Shiskia:
Garlot, I brought everyone...... Hm? Jenon, what are you doing?

Jenon:
......How unfortunate that everyone has arrived. Let's start over.

Aegina:
Wait, Sir Jenon!

Medoute:
Garlot, what happened?

Garlot:
I don't know, Jenon suddenly tried to stab me.

|-----------------|
|      SORTIE     |
|-Follow my Lead!-|
|-----------------|

Jenon:
It's not smart, but I've no other choice.

|----------------------|
|        SUMMON        |
|-Allies Called Forth!-|
|----------------------|

Corpse Warrior:
...............

Shiskia:
W- wait, Jenon! What are those troops......
What is going now? I don't understand this.

Nessiah:
......You still haven't realized. You humans are quite slow.
Or perhaps your worthless emotions of friendship and camaraderie have hindered
  your judgment?
In that case, this strategy has greater worth in its application.

Garlot:
Nessiah!!

Medoute:
You really have revived!
Then, Jenon is......

Shiskia:
N- no way...

Nessiah:
Have you finally noticed? He is already dead. That is a corpse.
He is now nothing more than a dead soldier of mine, who could not even lift a
  finger without my will.

Aegina:
No... How horrible......

Nessiah:
I would have preferred to kill you before you realized that your companion was
  dead...
Fufufu... But the strength of the captain's intuition spoiled it all.

Jenon:
...............

Nessiah:
Once I have dealt with you, smashing your worthless fantasy of sealing the Holy
  Sword will be simple.
I will not let my ambition end this way...
Go my corpse army! Trample Gram Blaze!

Medoute:
......Here they come!

|----------------------|
|        SUMMON        |
|-Allies Called Forth!-|
|----------------------|

Corpse Warrior:
...............

Garlot:
But, it's Jenon. He was talking about nonsense like always.

Shiskia:
...............

Medoute:
Shiskia, Garlot! That's not Jenon, that's the enemy! Focus on what's
  happening!!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Free Jenon's soul!!
/----------------

  ----------------------Defeat--/
    Garlot or Shiskia dies...  /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Garlot:
Isn't there something we could do, hey!

Shiskia:
Maybe he's not dead, but is just being controlled......


------------------Mid Battle-----------------                        [Map56.03]
NESSIAH IS AT 1 MORALE

Nessiah:
Fufufu, you humans are beings that have a limit on the conflict you could
  start.
It is impossible for you to defeat a semi-permanent being who gets their power
  from elsewhere, such as myself!

Garlot:
Damn, isn't there anything we could do?


-----------------After Battle----------------                        [Map56.04]
Jenon:
Ghrk, cough...!

Garlot:
Jenon...!

|    |
|    | PRAYERS OF DESIRE TO SEND A LIFE OFF
| /\ |  ...Is it impossible to free Jenon?
|/  \|

Jenon:
Kh... cough... cough...!

Shiskia:
...............
...S- stop, enough already!

Jenon:
.........!

Shiskia:
Why do we have to fight! This doesn't make sense!!
This isn't about which side is right or wrong... This is totally different, it
  has to be...

Garlot:
Shiskia...

Shiskia:
I don't get this... What am I supposed to do!

Jenon:
...............

Nessiah:
......Jenon?
Why have you stopped fighting? Raise your sword... You will fight! Fight I say!

Jenon:
...............

Shiskia:
...Jenon...

Jenon:
SHISKIA......

Nessiah:
It can't be. How could a will have survived after death... It's
  impossible......
A corpse possessing a will? Divine Guidance would not allow such a...

Jenon:
Shis...kia, Shis...kia... Gar...lot... Shiskia... Shiskia...

Nessiah:
Did I underestimate a human? No, that is impossible.
I will retreat for now.
But, I will not surrender. I will not allow the Holy Sword that I went through
  so much to make, to be sealed......

|------------------|
|      RETREAT     |
|-Time to Regroup.-|
|------------------|

  -----------------------------------------------------
Jenon:
Shiskia, Garlot, everyone...

Shiskia:
Jenon......

Garlot:
Are you really Jenon?

Jenon:
Cut it out, Garlot. I won't try to stab you this time.

Shiskia:
Thank goodness. You're really alive, Jenon.
It must have been awful to have been used by Nessiah.

Jenon:
...No, I'm grateful for your words, Shiskia, but, I'm not me anymore.

Shiskia:
??

Jenon:
I'm sure I've already died. I can't feel my heart beating.
I'm not really in pain. And it takes all have to just talk or blink or move my
  fingers.

Beatrine:
I can feel almost no life force from Sir Jenon now.

Jenon:
At any moment I could go back to being Nessiah's puppet and have to kill you
  with my own hands.

Shiskia:
...No.

Jenon:
...Hey, Garlot. As a friend, could you fulfill my last request.

Garlot:
Anything. Just ask.

Jenon:
Let me rest...... That's all I want.

Medoute:
...Do you want me to get this?

Garlot:
No, I'll do it. It's Jenon's final wish.

Shiskia:
Hey! What are you talking about? Tell me!

Medoute:
You're not a child, you understand what's happening.

Shiskia:
No I don't! How am I supposed to understand that we have to end Jenon's
  life......

Jenon:
Aside from that, could you give me and Shiskia a minute alone?

Medoute:
But......

Jenon:
I should be okay for a little bit. I'm confident about that.

Garlot:
C'mon, Medoute.

Shiskia:
Your hands are cold, Jenon......

Jenon:
Yeah, like I said... I'm already dead.

Shiskia:
Don't say anymore......

Jenon:
Shiskia. There was something I wanted to ask you about last time.

Shiskia:
Yeah......

Jenon:
Though, the reason I'm saying it at a time like this is because I'm a coward
  and didn't really want to say it.
Shiskia...... I...

Shiskia:
...............

Jenon:
No, not like this.
Shiskia, do you like Garlot?

Shiskia:
Huh...? ......Yeah, I do.

Jenon:
And I don't mean as just a friend.

Shiskia:
......Yeah, I understand.

Jenon:
I knew it. I'm a very observant guy.
But I was unsure, so I wanted to hear it.

Shiskia:
Really, that's what you wanted to talk about?

Jenon:
Yep, that's it.

Shiskia:
I see.

Jenon:
Ngh......

Shiskia:
Jenon! What's wrong!!

Jenon:
It's almost time for me to go.
Shiskia, live to your fullest for my sake too in the new world that Gram Blaze
  makes.
Live this world where Garlot and everybody is. And where you are.

Shiskia:
But... You won't be there, Jenon.

Jenon:
......I fought all I wanted and left my mark on the world.
And I made friends who remember that.
That's something to be grateful for.
I met you and Garlot. I'm grateful for that.

Shiskia:
Jenon...

Jenon:
I'm glad. I really am. I'm glad from the bottom of my heart.

Shiskia:
Jenon?

?
I'm glad......

|-----------------------|
|        PURIFIED       |
|-The Chain was Broken!-|
|-----------------------|

Shiskia:
Jenon......

Aegina:
Sir Jenon is disappearing......

Medoute:
Goodbye, Jenon...... I'll miss your lighthearted banter.

Aegina:
Goodbye, Sir Jenon. Rest easy.

Garlot:
Goodbye, Jenon. My best friend.

Leon:
You moron, what's the use in dying......

Shiskia:
......Goodbye, Jenon.

Medoute:
Shiskia, what did Jenon tell you?

Shiskia:
He said he was glad.

Garlot:
I see. Glad, huh.
Then, there is nothing else to be said. That's all we could hope for.

Shiskia:
...Yeah, you're right.

Garlot:
When I die I want to feel the same.


------------------Locations------------------                        [Map56.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
Gently sloping hillside along the border between the Kingdom and the Empire

   --メーテ武器工房 - Mete Workshop
Workshop of a blacksmith that is searching for the legendary ore 'Orihalcum'


--------------------On Map-------------------                        [Map56.07]
--メーテ武器工房 - Mete Workshop - FIRST TIME
|
|----------------------|
|      ACQUISITION     |
| -Received Treasure!- |
|Orihalcum -> Excalibur|
|----------------------|
|
| Weapon Craftsman:
| You are Gram Blaze; I've heard rumors of you.
| Not too long ago you were but a small group of noble thieves, but now you are
|   a great force......
| By comparison, my days are spent making mediocre weapons.
| ...To become a full fledged weapon craftsman, should I not be taking on
|   greater jobs and making great strides?
| When I look at you I cannot help but think that...
| Hmm!? That ore you've got there, isn't that the legendary Orihalcum!?
| Yes, that's it! Please! Let me have that Orihalcum!
| ...Thank you! This will surely make an excellent sword!
| ......It's finished. It's finished!! I've done it!
| Thank you... Having made this, I have also gained confidence in myself!
|
|---AFTERWARDS
| Weapon Craftsman:
| I have lived to work the legendary Orihalcum with my own hands...
| I am grateful. I am grateful to you for giving me this opportunity...
|
|---NO ORIHALCUM
| Weapon Craftsman:
| You are Gram Blaze; I've heard rumors of you.
| Not too long ago you were but a small group of noble thieves, but now you are
|   a great force......
| By comparison, my days are spent making mediocre weapons.
| ...To become a full fledged weapon craftsman, should I not be taking on
|   greater jobs and making great strides?
| When I look at you I cannot help but think that...
-----


---------------------Loss--------------------                        [Map56.08]
Defeat - Shiskia Defeated (1st)

|-----------------------|
|    KILLED IN ACTION   |
|-A Warrior has Fallen.-|
|-----------------------|

Shiskia:
What are friends? Friends couldn't do this......

|    |
|    |   DEATH OF A HERO
| /\ | Shiskia has fallen!
|/  \|

In the midst of an unwanted battle with Jenon, who was under Nessiah's control, 
Shiskia lost her life. The private army, having lost their eyes and ears, 
became lackluster and collapsed...


========================================================================[Map57]
人が勝ち得たもの
That which We have Won
Cape Lala - Altar of Sealing


--------------------Intro--------------------                        [Map57.01]
Gran Centurio, the Holy Sword, was also the source of Nessiah's power.

If this sword was sealed, Nessiah's ambitions would be crushed.

That ceremony was to be performed at the shrine honoring a Sea God of the 
Kingdom.

Nessiah was certain to come interfere.

Inside the protection of the Kingdom and the Empire, the day of the ritual drew 
closer.

Gram Blaze's battle wasn't over yet.


----------------Before Battle----------------                        [Map57.02]
Royal Soldier:
Your Highness! The Holy Sword has been placed on the pedestal.

Ordene:
Then let us start the ritual......

Royal Soldier:
Still, we have mixed feelings about this... The Holy Sword is a symbol of our
  country. When it comes to sealing it...

Ordene:
Is the country made by the sword? No. The country is made by the people.
The Empire is parting with the blood of Brongaa.
And we shall part with Gran Centurio!

Royal Soldier:
Yes sir!!

Medoute:
...The day of the ritual has come.

Garlot:
Yeah. We've lost a lot as well.

Medoute:
Hey, Garlot. Would you like to hear my secret?

Garlot:
Huh, what do you mean......

Medoute:
I'm a descendant of Gill, the Dragon Slayer. Although, only of the branch
  family.

Garlot:
Gill... I've heard of him. He was that hero who defeated Brongaa.

Medoute:
But, I doubted that that blood had any sort of meaning.
That's why I left and started on this journey. I wanted to know the meaning of
  my blood... I wanted to deny it.
I've met and battled various people.

Garlot:
...Did you find the answer?

Medoute:
Yeah, I found it. Blood is just a kind of excuse.

Garlot:
Excuse?

Medoute:
In the end, whether you fight or not you decide for yourself.

Garlot:
Because if for some reason you don't want to fight, you can run away.

Medoute:
But people fight thoughtlessly as well. As long as they can justify it to
  themselves.
Blood, ideology, religion. They're all reasons to justify that.
Just a kind of label. If they didn't have it, they'd be too scared to fight.
Or rather, perhaps they invent these labels so they can start a fight.

Garlot:
Then, are you saying we shouldn't fight?

Medoute:
No, I'm saying that using blood as a reason to fight is bad.

Shiskia:
I'm gonna fight for Jenon.
Of course, I don't mean I'm using Jenon's death as a reason to fight.
I've decided I'm gonna fight to make the world Jenon dreamed of a reality.

Medoute:
It's what you plan to accomplish after the fighting ends that you need to know.
  If you haven't thought of that, you shouldn't be fighting.

Garlot:
A reason to fight is not something others can choose for you.

Medoute:
Yes. That's what I wanted to say......

Velleman:
Garlot. The ritual is about to begin.

|----------------------|
|        SUMMON        |
|-Allies Called Forth!-|
|----------------------|

Corpse Warrior:
...............

Corpse Warrior:
...............

Corpse Warrior:
...............

Corpse Warrior:
...............

Corpse Warrior:
...............

Corpse Warrior:
...............

Leon:
Garlot, Nessiah's corpse army has finally come!!

Aegina:
And in such numbers too. Even with the support of the Royal and Imperial forces
  we will not have enough manpower!

Velleman:
Garlot! We must defend the altar to the last man.

Garlot:
Leave it to us, Count Velleman! We won't let Nessiah get the Holy Sword!!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Repel Nessiah's approaching army!!
/----------------

   ----------------------Defeat--/
                Garlot dies...  /
               Medoute dies... /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Nessiah:
A gathering of weak humans should not be able to match one born in Asgard such
  as I......
You humans are a stepping stone to my revenge! You should be dancing
  gracelessly within my hands!

Garlot:
We're not your puppets! Even dead, Jenon broke your technique with his will.
Do you still not get it, Nessiah?

Nessiah:
That was a mere coincidence! It changes nothing!!
I'll show you the difference between a human and an angel!


------------------Mid Battle-----------------                        [Map57.03]
Nessiah:
Kh... The humans......
Defeating me... Your absurdity can only go so far!

|    |
|    |    KEEP THE FORCE INTACT
| /\ | Doing well against Nessiah!!
|/  \|

Garlot:
Nessiah's forces are returning...... Is he using the Gran Centurio again!

Nessiah:
Fufufu... What lies within the blade of that sword is the will for conquest
  born from conflict between people!
Do you understand! Your fight to stop me is what gives me power!
If people abandon their desires they might be able to stop me... But people
  cannot do that.
Curse your folly for sustaining what you try to stop!
And forever sink into a bottomless bog of regret!!

Garlot:
Let's break the Holy Sword! If we can do that, Nessiah's power should disperse.

  /--Victory--------------
 / Break the Holy Sword and scatter Nessiah's power!!
/----------------

   ----------------------Defeat--/
                Garlot dies...  /
               Medoute dies... /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Beatrine:
The ritual to seal the Gran Centurio still needs ample time to be complete.
If the sword is broken, that power too should disperse.
However, the sword cannot be broken by ordinary strength.

Garlot:
The Holy Sword is on the altar!

  -----------------------------------------------------
PUT ANYONE BUT MEDOUTE ON ALTAR TILE

--GARLOT
| Garlot:
| This is the Holy Sword...... What tremendous power.
| I'll let it all out!!
| What? I can't do it?
| Then, is there only one person that can...!?
|
|---SHISKIA
| Shiskia:
| The Holy Sword... The source of Nessiah's power. If I could break this!
| I'm not strong enough to break it...... Is that it?
|
|---AEGINA
| Aegina:
| Gran Centurio, the symbol of the Royal family... If it is broken Nessiah will
|   be...!
| I cannot shatter it. It feels like that is what it is trying to tell me.
| I see. The one who can is......
|
|---LEON
| Leon:
| The Holy Sword of the Royal family...... I'll smash it!!
| Tch! It's not working. My spear is not pure enough... If my power was
|   purer...!
|
|---BEATRINE
| Beatrine:
| I cannot shatter the Holy Sword. I will leave this to her......
-----

  -----------------------------------------------------
PUT MEDOUTE ON ALTAR TILE

Nessiah:
Oh? Medoute. The descendant of the hero Gill.
Did you know? I was the one who trained Gill to be a hero.
The demon dragon Brongaa was in my way. So to take care of it, I offered my
  help.
So, you could say, you're from a long line of my dolls.

Medoute:
...............
And, so?
That has nothing to do with anything.
Listen well, fallen angel! I intend to stand against you. Blood is irrelevant!

|---------------------|
|      SHATTERED      |
|-Reduced to Nothing.-|
|---------------------|

Nessiah:
The Holy Sword, Gran Centurio, has been b- broken...... It can't be.

|    |
|    |                SACRED SWORD DESTROYED
| /\ | The Holy Sword, along with human weakness, is broken!!
|/  \|

Garlot:
Good job, Medoute!

Medoute:
You haven't surpassed me yet! Garlot!

Garlot:
Nessiah's power should be sealed now! Finish him off!!

  /--Victory--------------
 / Now, settle the score with Nessiah!!
/----------------

   ----------------------Defeat--/
                Garlot dies...  /
               Medoute dies... /
    Use up all your cards...  /
        ---------------------/

Nessiah:
H- how! How could a mere human break the Holy Sword?
Why would a human without a reason to fight, without the power to fight,
  without anything......

Garlot:
Think about it, Nessiah... While you've been looking away from the world, we've
  been advancing!
We've found our own reasons and power to fight.
And believing in our friends, we've found a way to gain power unconditionally!

Nessiah:
I- impossible... impossible!!


======================================================================[EndingC]
|--------------------|
|    EXTINGUISHED    |
|-It is not the end.-|
|--------------------|

Nessiah:
M- my body... is disappearing...!
H- how could... How could mere humans...

|    |
|    |        THE BEGINNING
| /\ | Nessiah's body is crumbling...
|/  \|

Medoute:
...............

Garlot:
......Is it over?

Medoute:
I think it may be.

Velleman:
...............

Garlot:
...............

Velleman:
Uuuu...

Garlot:
Why don't you just calm down a little like I said?

Velleman:
You don't have to tell me!

Garlot:
Are you really well enough to go through with your debut as prime minister?
  Make up your mind quick.

Velleman:
I don't think I've ever felt this nervous in my life.

Garlot:
...Sigh, you look like you're getting ill.

Shiskia:
Your movements are all stiff! Ah, you're moving your right arm and leg
  together.

Velleman:
Stop mocking me.

Soltier:
Yo, I've come to see the show.

Velleman:
Your Highness!

Soltier:
How many times must I tell you not to call me that? I'm not the Emperor
  anymore.

Velleman:
Yes, you're right, Your Highness.

Shiskia:
Pft...

Soltier:
I can already tell it'll be an uphill struggle with the Prime Minister, General
  Garlot.

Garlot:
...Yeah, I agree.

Shiskia:
Hey, you should side with your employer more.

Velleman:
Will you two focus on that's happening...

Garlot:
It's just a joke. Er, wait. I was merely joking, Sir.

Aegina:
Huh?

Garlot:
What? I thought I should speak more formally starting today.
There is no one but you who can lead this country, Sir.
So, since I'm gonna... Er, I will be here for you, you have nothing to worry
  about. Just focus on setting up a strong foundation... please?

Leon:
You suck at formal speech.

Velleman:
Yes, I feel quite nauseated by it as well.

Garlot:
What'd you say... ah, Sir!

Leon:
Ahahahahahahahahaha!

Garlot:
Damn, this is irritating.

Luciana:
By the way, how do you think Miss Medoute is doing?

Shiskia:
Yeah, what country is she at now?

Garlot:
If she was still nearby she'd split her sides laughing at our tense Prime
  Minister.

Velleman:
General Garlot. My tension is gone. Now, on to the inaugural speech!

Garlot:
As you wish, Prime Minister.

  -----------------------------------------------------
Under the leadership of Prime Minister Velleman, the Bronquian Empire signed a 
non-aggression treaty with the Kingdom of Fantasinia, and took a new step 
forward.

Garlot, having led Velleman's private army, Gram Blaze, and fighting countless 
battles all over the Empire, became its young general, and put his efforts into 
its continued stability.

And I have moved on from the Empire, and my companions.

I would be lying if I said that I had no regrets.

However, my life is one of a long journey. I will meet them again someday.

And when I do they will greet me with the same smiles and excitement.

That is what I gained in the Empire. The value of a thing raised with trust, 
and a grain of hope.


---------------------Vs.---------------------                        [Map57.05]
--Garlot vs. Nessiah
| Nessiah:
| The notion that you could destroy the Holy Sword is utter idiocy.
|
| Garlot:
| I can tell you're flustered, Nessiah. I can tell from how you're acting.
|   Without the Holy Sword you won't be able to reincarnate.
|
| Nessiah:
| Really, is that so......
|
|---VICTORY
| Garlot:
| We'll build our own future!
|
| Nessiah:
| That's quite the confidence for just a single victory......
|
|---DEFEAT
| Nessiah:
| Gran Centurio is the masterpiece I created in order to get revenge on the
|   heavens.
| You worthless humans could never seal it!
|
| Garlot:
| Then why did you come here? You're afraid of our power...... Isn't that
|   right, Nessiah!
-----

--Shiskia vs. Nessiah----------------------------------
| Shiskia:
| Watch us, Jenon...... We'll protect this world!
|
| Nessiah:
| What insolent words...... This world is nothing but a convenient stage for my
|   plans!
|
|---VICTORY
| Shiskia:
| Jenon told me...... To live this world.
| He loved this world. He loved his companions, his friends.
| And me too......
| That's why... I won't let you do whatever you want with it!
| This isn't about revenge, I'm fighting to protect something that can't be
|   replaced!
|
|---DEFEAT
| Nessiah:
| Humans are my pawns! And as such they should dance upon my stage!!
|
| Shiskia:
| Jenon was not a pawn! He did his best to fight against the position you
|   selfishly put him in......
| So I'll fight too! To the last drop of blood! Fate or no, I'll fight back!!
-----

--Medoute vs. Nessiah----------------------------------
| Medoute:
| I've always felt guilty about fighting before......
| Because of my lineage. Not knowing if the extraordinary valor I have is
|   because of my blood.
| But not anymore! If it means going against you, I will use this power without
|   mercy!
|
|---VICTORY
| Nessiah:
| You're just as monstrously strong as always.
|
|---DEFEAT
| Nessiah:
| This is the power of one from the heavens. Do you understand now?
|
| Medoute:
| That's soft, Nessiah......
| Do you think that's all it takes to scare us? You've misjudged humans!!
-----

--Aegina vs. Nessiah-----------------------------------
| Aegina:
| For the sake of Sir Jenon! And for the sake of the new world!!
| Not for revenge, but for a better future! That is why I wield this sword!!
|
| Nessiah:
| Silence! You have cheated death long enough!
|
|---VICTORY
| Aegina:
