| For Sir Jenon's sake as well, we must not lose!
|
| Nessiah:
| It was a mistake to let you become this strong of a swordsman.
|
|---DEFEAT
| Nessiah:
| Aegina, don't you think that you should be the one to have the Holy Sword?
|
| Aegina:
| Your words will not move me.
| My goal in life is no longer revenge! 
-----

--Leon vs. Nessiah-------------------------------------
| Leon:
| So, you moron came to be killed.
|
| Nessiah:
| Fufufu...... Humans are like this every time. You do not realize how stunted
|   your existence is......
|
|---VICTORY
| Leon:
| Well, how does the force of human anger feel!?
|
| Nessiah:
| Fufufu, this level of strength is insignificant......
|
|---DEFEAT
| Leon:
| Whoops, I messed up......
|
| Nessiah:
| Perhaps you've gotten weaker since you joined Gram Blaze?
-----

--Beatrine vs. Nessiah---------------------------------
| Beatrine:
| You can feel it too, the shift in the current. The end has come.
|
| Nessiah:
| Shift in the current? I know nothing of which you speak.
|
|---VICTORY
| Beatrine:
| You are flustered.
|
| Nessiah:
| Flustered? Me? Fufufu, I do not feel such emotions.
|
| Beatrine:
| It is useless to hide it.
|
|---DEFEAT
| Beatrine:
| I will stop you and return history into the hands of man......
-----


------------------Locations------------------                        [Map57.06]
   --マップ概要 - Map Summary
A ceremonial altar long present on Lala Cape in the Kingdom's territory


---------------------Loss--------------------                        [Map57.08]
Defeat - Medoute Defeated (1st)

|-----------------------|
|    KILLED IN ACTION   |
|-A Warrior has Fallen.-|
|-----------------------|

Medoute:
Of all places to be beaten...! Not cool at all...

|    |
|    |   DEATH OF A HERO
| /\ | Medoute has fallen!
|/  \|

In the decisive battle with the fallen angel Nessiah, Medoute lost her life. 
Nessiah, having recovered the Holy Sword, fanned the flames of war...

Defeat - Out of Cards (2nd)----------------------------

In the decisive battle with the fallen angel Nessiah, Gram Blaze was scattered 
due to a flaw in tactics, and was forced to disband...

Defeat - Garlot Defeated (3rd)-------------------------

In the decisive battle with the fallen angel Nessiah, Gram Blaze's captain, 
Garlot, lost his life, and Gram Blaze vanished from history's stage...


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Characters [PartC]
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Notes:
To search for different characters, put their names as written in the table of 
contents in [].

Everyone's in the order they're in in the extra contents.

A few possibly confusing quote descriptions:
Flash Attack: This is what happens in the normal part of battle when everything 
pauses, the character gives a quote, and attacks for extra damage.

Block Attack: The character blocks the charge, counter, or card effect.

Status Effect: Quote from getting hit by Poison Breath, Gravity Chaos, Item 
Break, Flame, Thunderbolt, Rock Fall, and Coma Karma.

Ready to go: Confirmation screen after selecting characters and cards.

Ready for Battle Screen: Confirmation screen when forming unions.

Head Death: Quote the character says when they get criticaled.

Lose Units Special: When the character loses units through a flash attack or an 
attack card.

Card Battle Quotes: If they have () it means you're getting attacked, if not, 
you're the one attacking.

<       Shiskia
<       Jenon
<       Medoute

<       Baifu
<       Eudy
<

<       Inzaghi
<       Pandra
<
<    Generic Enemies
<       Fencer
<       Valkyrie
<       Knight
<       Undine
<       Bandit
<       Griffon Rider
<       Hunter
<       Assassin
<       Necromancer
<       Witch
<       Axe Battler
<
<    NPC
<------------------------------------------------------------------------------


==PLAYER CHARACTERS====================================


=======================================================================[Garlot]
Garlot (ガーロット)
The young captain of the Blazing Outlaws. Having become a soldier in Count 
Velleman's employ, his battles take him all over the country.

O Flash attack compensation
O Better on roads and bridges
X Weak to griffon riders
X Worse in forest


Map - Beginning to 6
----------------Battle Quotes----------------
Charge                    | 喰らえっ！
                          | Eat this!
---------------------------------------------
Charge - Opponent's x2    | 逃しはしない！
                          | You won't escape!
---------------------------------------------
Counter                   | 俺を抜いてみろ！
                          | Try and get past me!

                          | ...Why you, don't underestimate me!
---------------------------------------------

                          | Damn, think you got me...!

Get Spoils                | Oh. This is... We'll take it.

Visit House at Night      | ...............
                          | Looks like everyone's asleep.
---------------------------------------------
Death                     | D- damn...!  I took them too lightly...
---------------------------------------------
蒼リンゴ                    | This apple... It looks poisonous from its
Blue Apple                |   appearance, is it really okay to eat?
                          | Gah, whatever!
                          | Uh... it tastes weird. I should really stop.
---------------------------------------------
エレミナミント                 | Hey, is this really eatable?
Elemina Mint              | It's got an interesting flavor... But it won't fill
                          |   your stomach.
---------------------------------------------
ガラスのビン                 | Damn, I can't defend with something like 
Glass Bottle              |   this......
---------------------------------------------
スウィートベリー               | This thing is the color of blood...
Sweetberry                | It tastes sweet and sour...... But the taste stays
                          |   in your mouth for forever. I don't much like
                          |   that.
---------------------------------------------
どくまむし                   | I've heard this is good for your health, is that
Poison Viper              |   really true?
                          | Yeah, it's bitter. Honestly speaking, it's bad...
---------------------------------------------
発芽プロテイモ               | This potato grew sprouts. Is it okay to eat......
Sprouting Protato         | Uegh! It's bitter! I'm not eating anymore of
                          |   it......
---------------------------------------------
パワーフルーツ               | They say that eating this fills you with
Power Fruit               |   strength... Is that true?
                          | Oh, I can feel it! My body is being filled with
                          |   power... This fruit is the best.
---------------------------------------------
プロテイモ                   | I think I'll have a meal first...
Protato                   | Munch, munch... Hm? Not bad for being raw.
---------------------------------------------
山葡萄                     | By the way, we had some grapes... I'll try them.
Mountain Grapes           | They taste sour as well as sweet. Quite good!
---------------------------------------------


======================================================================[Shiskia]
Shiskia - Siskier (シスキア)
Garlot's childhood friend. She is in charge of scouting and sets the mood for 
group.

O Evade criticals
O Better in streets and alleys
O Can move after battle

========================================================================[Jenon]
Jenon (ジェノン)
Garlot's childhood friend in charge of planning the strategies. Despite his 
cynical side, he has a soft spot for girls.

O Void lightning


----------------Battle Quotes----------------
Charge                    | まずは、この一撃で！
                          | We'll start with this!

---------------------------------------------
Visit House at Night      | ...............
                          | Looks like everyone's asleep. It's not good to
                          |   disturb the peace at night. I'll come back
                          |   another time.
---------------------------------------------
Retreat                   | Sorry but I have to pull out. As they say, the
                          |   smartest tactic in a tight spot is to retreat.
                          | It's an excuse and I hate it, but...
---------------------------------------------
Death                     | Damn it... I focused too much on planning... Can't
                          |   laugh this off...
---------------------------------------------
蒼リンゴ                    | Uuh, is this apple okay to eat......
Blue Apple                | .....Uuh, what's this? I can honestly say that it
                          |   tastes terrible.
---------------------------------------------
エレミナミント                 | A mint leaf? It's just a mouthful......
Elemina Mint              | ...Oh, it's pretty sweet! It makes one feel
                          |   refreshed too.
---------------------------------------------
ガラスのビン                 | Ouchhhhhh...... The bottle I was holding broke.
Glass Bottle              |
---------------------------------------------
白山羊のミルク               | There is some truth to saying that drinking milk
Goat Milk                 |   strengthens one's back. After all it makes bones
                          |   strong.
                          | Well... I can't make them any stronger now.
---------------------------------------------
スウィートベリー               | This is popular among the girls... I'll try it
Sweetberry                |   once so I'll have more to talk about with them.
                          | ...It's sweet. Really it would be popular among
                          |   girls.
---------------------------------------------
どくまむし                   | I have heard that a viper's organs have strong
Poison Viper              |   nourishing properties, but......
                          | ...Uuh, it doesn't taste good.
---------------------------------------------
発芽プロテイモ               | Aren't potato sprouts poisonous? Wouldn't it be
Sprouting Protato         |   better not to eat it?
                          | Yuck, even a mouthful is terrible...... This'll
                          |   definitely hurt my stomach. That's instinct, not
                          |   knowledge.
---------------------------------------------
パワーフルーツ               | Power fruit has a special enzyme that instantly
Power Fruit               |   reduces the feelings of tiredness.
                          | Yep, it's sour, but I understand why I feel like
                          |   I'm being filled of power. Now then, I'm full of
                          |   energy, let's go!
---------------------------------------------
プロテイモ                   | They have high nutritional value, and can
Protato                   |   withstand droughts. Potatoes are truly superior.
                          | Munch, munch... Yep, quite filling.
---------------------------------------------
山葡萄                     | Oh yeah, we got some grapes. Should I eat them
Mountain Grapes           |   right now?
                          | Wow! They're delicious!! These grapes are superb.
                          |   It might make good wine as well.
---------------------------------------------


======================================================================[Medoute]
Medoute (メデューテ)
A dark-skinned traveling warrior. With much experience and a large axe, she 
supports Garlot in battle.

O Better in wasteland
O Heavy counter chance up


----------------Battle Quotes----------------
Charge                    | 叩き潰す！
                          | I'll smash you up!
---------------------------------------------
Charge - Opponent's x2    | この勢いに乗れば...！
                          | If we keep up this momentum...!
---------------------------------------------
Counter                   | 甘いんだな。
                          | Weak.
---------------------------------------------
Counter - Own x2          | ......図に乗って！
                          | ......You're pushing your luck!
---------------------------------------------
Can't Counter             | ...チャンスは来るはずだ。
                          | ...My chance will come.
---------------------------------------------
Critical                  |  こじ開ける！
                          | Break them apart!
---------------------------------------------
Opponent Recovery         | まだ油断しないで！
                          | Don't take them lightly!
---------------------------------------------
Aggressive                | 見せてやるよ！
                          | Watch this!
---------------------------------------------
Passive                   | 反撃の時を待つ...
                          | I'll wait for a chance to counter...
---------------------------------------------
Victory                   | 損害を報告しなさい。
                          | Go report your loss.
---------------------------------------------
Victory - Head Only       | 勝ちは勝ち、だけどな。
                          | A win's a win, but...
---------------------------------------------
Loss                      | 油断した......！
                          | I was careless......!
---------------------------------------------
Flash Attack/1 on 1 Win   | せいっ！
                          | Sei!
---------------------------------------------
Flash Attack x3           | 今だ...！！
                          | Now!
---------------------------------------------
Using Card                | 全力だ、覚悟しろッ！
                          | This is my full strength, get ready!
---------------------------------------------
Card/Charging Interrupted | 止められるとは...！
                          | If you think you can stop me...!
---------------------------------------------
Card Fail                 | しくじったな。
                          | I made a mistake.
---------------------------------------------
Block Attack              | 軽いな...
                          | Trivial...
---------------------------------------------
Status Effect             | 取り乱すな！
                          | Don't bother me!
---------------------------------------------

------------Spoken Only and Misc.------------
Equip Item                | Oni ni kanabou da yo.
                          | With this I will be even stronger.
---------------------------------------------
Recover morale            | Kansha suru.
                          | Many thanks.
---------------------------------------------
Recover 1000 morale       | Uketotte oku kedo...
                          | I'll take this, but...
---------------------------------------------
Char select screen        | Yaru shika nai na!
                          | Let's do this!
---------------------------------------------
Ready to go               | やむを得ないだ...
                          | This is unavoidable...
---------------------------------------------
Ready for Battle Screen   | Kirikomu!
                          | I'll cut you up!
---------------------------------------------
Head Death                | Aa!!
---------------------------------------------
Lose Units Special A      | Yaru na...
                          | Don't do that...
---------------------------------------------
Lose Units Special B      | Hn...
---------------------------------------------
Level Up                  | Mata hitotsu, tsuyoku...
                          | That's another notch stronger...
---------------------------------------------
Quick Clear               | Sonna kanji daro.
                          | This is the feeling.
---------------------------------------------

--------------Card Battle Quotes-------------
Bloody Claw (Head death)  | ああっ！！
                          | Aa!!
---------------------------------------------
Shield Barrier            | この布陣、崩せるか！？
                          | Can you destroy this formation!?
---------------------------------------------
Mind Change               | よろしくな。
                          | It's a pleasure.
---------------------------------------------
Sanctuary                 | 勇気を奮い立たせろ！
                          | Regain your courage!
---------------------------------------------
Banshee's Cry             | さて、どう攻めてやるか...
                          | Well now, let's see how you do...
---------------------------------------------

---------------On Map Comments---------------
Get Spoils                | The spoils of war! We will gladly use them!
---------------------------------------------
Visit House at Night      | ...............
                          | I predict that if we were to visit this evening,
                          |   upon seeing these soldiers the residents will be
                          |   upset.
---------------------------------------------
Retreat                   | Kh! At this rate there will be nothing left of my
                          |   squad... I must retreat.
---------------------------------------------
Death                     | ......I had no idea that death was such a
                          |   terrifying thing...
---------------------------------------------
蒼リンゴ                    | This apple has a weak poison. Some people use it
Blue Apple                |   to lose weight I'd bet...
                          | H- huh? Why did I eat that? Disgusting......
---------------------------------------------
エレミナミント                 | Let's see what a mint tastes like. It may be
Elemina Mint              |   just a leaf, but herbs have many medicinal uses.
                          | I thought it might be a bit biller, but this mint
                          |   is pretty sweet.
---------------------------------------------
ガラスのビン                 | Why did I bring along a glass bottle? Of course
Glass Bottle              |   it ended up breaking.
---------------------------------------------
白山羊のミルク               | Come to think of it, we had milk. It's not 
Goat Milk                 |   possible to preserve it well, so I think I'll 
                          |   drink it now.
                          | Eh, it tastes a bit fermented, but it's quite good
                          |   this way too. This taste is something I can get
                          |   used to.
---------------------------------------------
スウィートベリー               | This thing is superbly sweet. I don't like it
Sweetberry                |   very much...
                          | Ueh so sweet...... I need water.
---------------------------------------------
どくまむし                   | A viper... It's not very pleasant, but it's good
Poison Viper              |   for your health.
                          | Yeah, it really is unappetizing...
---------------------------------------------
発芽プロテイモ               | Hay, hasn't this potato already sprouted...... Is
Sprouting Protato         |   it really eatable?
                          | Uuh... It does taste awful. I won't force myself to
                          |   eat it.
---------------------------------------------
パワーフルーツ               | A power fruit... I don't like to rely on these
Power Fruit               |   much but......
                          | I- It's sour! However my exhaustion is gone.
                          |   Alright, let's break through in one shot!
---------------------------------------------
プロテイモ                   | I believe we had a potato. I think I'll eat it
Protato                   |   now......
                          | Munch, munch...... A protato is quite tasty.
---------------------------------------------
山葡萄                     | By the way, we had grapes. Let's eat them now.
Mountain Grapes           | These are tasty... it's disappointing to eat them
                          |   all at once. Yeah, these are good......
---------------------------------------------


=======================================================================[Aegina]
Aegina (アイギナ)
A girl pursued by a mysterious organization. Having no place to go after the 
death of her foster father, she joined Velleman's army

O Strong against golems
O Void holy
X Weak to darkness


----------------Battle Quotes----------------
Charge                    | 切り込みます！
                          | I shall take the offense!
---------------------------------------------
Charge - Opponent's x2    | 遅れは取りません！
                          | Do not slow down!
---------------------------------------------
Counter                   | ただでは置きません！
                          | You will pay for this!
---------------------------------------------
Counter - Own x2          | 後悔しますよ！！
                          | You will regret that!
---------------------------------------------
Can't Counter             | 反撃は無理ですか...
                          | Countering is impossible...
---------------------------------------------
Critical                  | 切り崩しましょう！
                          | Split through them!
---------------------------------------------
Opponent Recovery         | このまま押しきります！
                          | Keep pressing the advantage!
---------------------------------------------
Aggressive                | 見せてあげます！
                          | I will show you!
---------------------------------------------
Passive                   | 力を蓄えましょう！
                          | Let us save our strength!
---------------------------------------------
Victory                   | 倒れはしません！
                          | I will not be defeated!
---------------------------------------------
Victory - Head Only       | 危ういところでした。
                          | This was a dangerous situation.
---------------------------------------------
Loss                      | 姉さん...、ごめんなさい...
                          | Sister... I'm sorry...
---------------------------------------------
Flash Attack/1 on 1 Win   | えいっ！！
                          | Ei!!
---------------------------------------------
Flash Attack x3           | たあっ！！
                          | Tah!!
---------------------------------------------
Using Card                | 駆け抜けてみせます！
                          | I will sweep through you!
---------------------------------------------
Card/Charging Interrupted | くっ、しまった...！
                          | Kh, no!
---------------------------------------------
Card Fail                 | ミスするなんて...
                          | I made a mistake...!
---------------------------------------------
Block Attack              | 効きません！
                          | Attacking will not have any effect!
---------------------------------------------

------------Spoken Only and Misc.------------
Equip Item                | Tsukawasete itadakimasu.
                          | I will put this to good use.
---------------------------------------------
Recover morale            | Watashi ni wa mottainai desu.
                          | I am not worthy of such a gift.
---------------------------------------------
Recover 1000 morale       | Hai...
                          | Thank you...
---------------------------------------------
Char select screen        | ご指示を！
                          | Your orders?
---------------------------------------------
Ready to go               | Omakase wo!
                          | Leave this to me!
---------------------------------------------
Ready for Battle Screen   | Makeraremasen!
                          | I will not be defeated!
---------------------------------------------
Head Death                | Kyaaa!!
---------------------------------------------
Lose Units Special A      | Yokumo!
                          | How dare you!
---------------------------------------------
Lose Units Special B      | Kh...
---------------------------------------------
Level Up                  | Togisumasarete iku!
                          | My skills have sharpened!
---------------------------------------------
Quick Clear               | Kouei desu!
                          | It is an honor!
---------------------------------------------

--------------Card Battle Quotes-------------
Bloody Claw (Head death)  | きゃあああ！！
                          | Kyaaa!!
---------------------------------------------
Shield Barrier            | これで凌ぎます！
                          | With this we can endure!
---------------------------------------------
Mind Change               | 戦いましょう、共に！
                          | Let us fight together!
---------------------------------------------
Revolution                | これが私の剣です！
                          | This is the strength of my sword!
---------------------------------------------
Sanctuary                 | お願いです。もう一度、力を！
                          | Please, lend me your strength once more!
---------------------------------------------
Fortune                   | 決着をつけましょう！
                          | Let us settle this!
---------------------------------------------
Banshee's Cry             | 力を封じました！
                          | I have sealed their strength!
---------------------------------------------

---------------On Map Comments---------------
Get Spoils                | Ah, spoils. Let us retrieve them!
---------------------------------------------
Visit House at Night      | ...............
                          | ...Everyone has fallen asleep. Let us not disturb
                          |   them at this hour...
---------------------------------------------
Retreat                   | I cannot keep going like this. My apologies, I must
                          |   retreat!
---------------------------------------------
Death                     | If I fall here... what of out revenge...?
---------------------------------------------
蒼リンゴ                   | This apple looks tasty... thank you for the meal.
Blue Apple                | ...It's tasty. Uh? It's tasty, yes? Ish tashty...
                          |   Yesh? Yesh?
---------------------------------------------
エレミナミント              | I'm not very full, but I believe that eating this
Elemina Mint              |   can be refreshing.
                          | Ah, it's delicious! And I feel much better.
---------------------------------------------
ガラスのビン                | Ouch...... I shouldn't have brought a glass bottle
Glass Bottle              |   along.
---------------------------------------------
スウィートベリー             | We went to so much trouble to get this, is it
Sweetberry                |   really alright for me to eat it?
                          | Mm~... It's tasty and sweet!
---------------------------------------------
発芽プロテイモ              | .........! There are sprouts growing... Is this
Sprouting Protato         |   really eatable?
                          | This tastes... quite bad...
---------------------------------------------
パワーフルーツ              | I will finish this fruit that we got.
Power Fruit               | I feel my strength building for some reason... I
                          |   bet it's because of this fruit!
---------------------------------------------
山葡萄                     | I will eat the grapes that we got at once.
Mountain Grapes           | Ah, they are delicious! And I feel stronger
                          |   somehow!
---------------------------------------------


=========================================================================[Leon]
Leon (レオン)
Black Knight leading a remote garrison. He is a stern man showing no mercy to 
either friend or foe, and is very strong.

O Better on roads and bridges
X Weak to griffon riders
X Worse in forest


----------------Battle Quotes----------------
Charge                    | 突破してやるぜ！
                          | I'll tear you apart!
---------------------------------------------
Charge - Opponent's x2    | 死にぞこないがァ！
                          | Think you escaped death!
---------------------------------------------
Counter                   | ケガだけじゃ済まないぜ！
                          | A mere scratch, too bad!
---------------------------------------------
Counter - Own x2          | 俺を怒らせたようだな......
                          | You're pissing me off......
---------------------------------------------
Can't Counter             | ちぃッ、待ちやがれ！
                          | Tch, just wait!
---------------------------------------------
Victory                   | フッ、他愛ないな！！
                          | Heh, childish!!
---------------------------------------------
Victory - Head Only       | ......弱者はいらねぇ。
                          | ......I've no use for weaklings.
---------------------------------------------
Loss                      | おのれ......！！
                          | Why you......!!
---------------------------------------------
Flash Attack/1 on 1 Win   | オラァオラァ！
                          | Take this!
---------------------------------------------
Using Card                | 死に晒せェ！！
                          | Meet your death!!
---------------------------------------------
Card Fail                 | クソったれめ！
                          | Damn it all!
---------------------------------------------
Status Effect             | 搦め手を...！
                          | Going for the weak points...!
---------------------------------------------

------------Spoken Only and Misc.------------
Ready for Battle Screen   | Kono ore ga katazukete yaru!
                          | I'll finish you off!
---------------------------------------------
Lose Units Special A      | Uagh!
---------------------------------------------

--------------Card Battle Quotes-------------
Bloody Claw (Head death)  | トドメと行くか。
                          | And now the finishing blow.
---------------------------------------------

Mizer (ミゼル)
Though he is wanted for his pickpocketing, he is a chivalrous thief who only

O Strong against griffon riders
O Better at noon
O Better in forest
X Weak to lightning

Pamela (パメラ)
An unknown energetic magical girl who does as she pleases! Her way of speech

Charge                    | うりゃーっ！！

Charge                    | 黙らせてあげる！

Counter                   | やるじゃない！
                          | Not bad!
---------------------------------------------
Counter - Own x2          | 数に頼るつもりね......
                          | Are you just going to rely on numbers......
---------------------------------------------
Can't Counter             | ふーん、当て逃げってワケか...
                          | Feh, do you just hit and run...
---------------------------------------------
Critical                  | 脆いわね！
                          | How fragile!
---------------------------------------------
Opponent Recovery         | さて、トドメと行こうかしら？
                          | Well, shall we finish this?
---------------------------------------------
Aggressive                | きゃはは、行くわよ！
                          | Kyahaha, let's go!
---------------------------------------------
Passive                   | ちょっと落ち着かなきゃね。
                          | Let's take it easy.
---------------------------------------------
Victory                   | フフ、当然の結果よ。
                          | Fufu, such an obvious outcome.
---------------------------------------------
Victory - Head Only       | ...まだまだね。
                          | ...I've still got a ways to go.
---------------------------------------------
Loss                      | こんなはずじゃ......
                          | Not like this......
---------------------------------------------
Flash Attack/1 on 1 Win   | くらいなさい！
                          | Take this!
---------------------------------------------
Flash Attack x3           | 倒れなさい！
                          | Surrender!
---------------------------------------------
Using Card                | きゃははは！覚悟なさい！！
                          | Kyahahaha! Get ready now!!
---------------------------------------------
Card/Charging Interrupted | 邪魔しないでよ！！
                          | Don't get in my way!!
---------------------------------------------
Card Fail                 | 失敗は成功の元よ...
                          | Failure is a step on the road to success...
---------------------------------------------
Block Attack              | お手柔らかすぎね。
                          | Too soft.
---------------------------------------------

------------Spoken Only and Misc.------------
Equip Item                | Warukunai wa ne.
                          | Not bad.
---------------------------------------------
Char select screen        | 派手に行くわよ！
                          | Let's start off with a bang!
---------------------------------------------
Ready to go               | Taihou nara ippatsu yo!
                          | This is one shot with a cannon!!
---------------------------------------------
Ready for Battle Screen   | Owarasechau wa ne.
                          | I'll finish this.
---------------------------------------------
Head Death                | Sonna!!
                          | No way!!
---------------------------------------------
Lose Units Special A      | Eha!
---------------------------------------------
Lose Units Special B      | Yaru wa ne...
                          | Not bad...
---------------------------------------------

--------------Card Battle Quotes-------------
Make Doll                 | 働いてもらうわよ！？
                          | Shall we get to work!?
---------------------------------------------
Bloody Claw (Head death)  | そんなぁ！！
                          | No way!!
---------------------------------------------
Shield Barrier            | 痛くないわねぇ。
                          | You can't hurt me.
---------------------------------------------
Mind Change               | 悪くないわね！
                          | Not bad!
---------------------------------------------

---------------On Map Comments---------------
Get Spoils                | Can we use this for something? I'll take it, I
                          |   suppose.
---------------------------------------------
Death                     | Aagh...! There are still... so many things... I
                          |   wanted... to test......
---------------------------------------------
蒼リンゴ                   | This blue apple... I think I'll try it.
Blue Apple                | Hmm? What is this? I think I feel ill......
                          |   Sigh......
---------------------------------------------
エレミナミント              | Aah, I'm not getting any ideas to customize my
Elemina Mint              |   canon...What should I do...?
                          | Phew... Should I take a break and eat a mint?
                          | Ah, it's sweet along with its scent... It's like an
                          |   afternoon snack.
---------------------------------------------
ガラスのビン                | Ouch... Why did I bring something like a glass
Glass Bottle              |   bottle onto the battlefield......
---------------------------------------------
スウィートベリー             | Ah, aren't these the berries that are popular
Sweetberry                |   with people when they're kids? Are they really
                          |   that good?
                          | ...They're a little too sweet for me.
---------------------------------------------
発芽プロテイモ              | Why do we have a sprouted potato; it needs to be
Sprouting Protato         |   eaten.
                          | It's obvious this doesn't taste good! There are
                          |   sprouts on it, any idiot can understand that!!
                          | ......Hah, this is ridiculous. Who am I getting
                          |   angry at.
---------------------------------------------
パワーフルーツ              | Oh yes, I believe we had a power fruit.
Power Fruit               | ......Aah, there, there, there! My body is being
                          |   filled with power...
---------------------------------------------
山葡萄                     | Come to think of it we had grapes. When I eat a
Mountain Grapes           |   sweet fruit my thoughts turn nice.
                          | Ah, this is good.
---------------------------------------------


==SPECIAL ENEMIES======================================


========================================================================[Nolan]
Nolan - Norn (ノルン)
A merchant from Tiera's Nibel district. Because of the unjust way he gives and 
collects loans he is feared by the people.

O Strong against skeletons
O Void darkness
X Weak to holy


----------------Battle Quotes----------------
Charge                    | 小僧の分際で！
                          | Miserable lowborn brats!
---------------------------------------------
Charge - Opponent's x2    | ウヒョヒョヒョヒョ！
                          | Uhyohyohyohyo!
---------------------------------------------
Counter                   | 痛いではないか！
                          | Does this sting!
---------------------------------------------
Counter - Own x2          | くっそー！！
                          | Daaammiiit!!
---------------------------------------------
Can't Counter             | うひょ！？
                          | Uhyo!?
---------------------------------------------
Critical                  | 逆らうからです！
                          | This is for your defiance!
---------------------------------------------
Opponent Recovery         | 跪くがいい！
                          | Kneel before me!
---------------------------------------------
Victory                   | 大人しくしていればよいものを
                          | It'd be best for you to behave yourself
---------------------------------------------
Victory - Head Only       | 生意気な連中だった。
                          | Impertinent brats.
---------------------------------------------
Loss                      | い...、痛いのはイヤじゃあ〜！！
                          | I- I hate pain!!
---------------------------------------------
Flash Attack              | とーう！
                          | Tou!
---------------------------------------------

-----------------Spoken Only-----------------
Ready for Battle Screen   | Sakarau ka!
                          | You dare defy me!
---------------------------------------------
Lose Units Special A      | Aa!
---------------------------------------------
Lose Units Special B      | Hii!
---------------------------------------------


========================================================================[David]
David (デイヴィド)
A mercenary troop leader. Vile enough to even murder his own employer, yet 
possesses real strength.

O Void lightning


----------------Battle Quotes----------------
Charge                    | 薙ぎ払え！
                          | Mow them down!
---------------------------------------------
Charge - Opponent's x2    | ガキどもが！
                          | You brats!
---------------------------------------------
Counter                   | こんなモンか？
                          | That all you've got?
---------------------------------------------
Counter - Own x2          | うるせぇんだよ！！
                          | Shut up already!!
---------------------------------------------
Can't Counter             | 目障りなんだよ...！
                          | Such an eyesore...!
---------------------------------------------
Critical                  | へっ、甘いんだよ！
                          | Heh, weaklings!
---------------------------------------------
Opponent Recovery         | まだやる気か？
                          | Still wanna fight?
---------------------------------------------
Victory                   | オトナは楽じゃねぇんだよ。
                          | Being a grownup is not as easy as you think.
---------------------------------------------
Victory - Head Only       | ふん、なかなかのモンだな。
                          | Phew, you weren't bad.
---------------------------------------------
Loss                      | こんな、ガキどもに......？
                          | How could these brats...?
---------------------------------------------
Flash Attack              | そらよっ！
                          | There!
---------------------------------------------
Using Card                | お仕置きの時間だ......
                          | Time for your spanking!
---------------------------------------------
Status Effect             | してやられたか！
                          | They actually hit!
---------------------------------------------

-----------------Spoken Only-----------------
Ready for Battle Screen   | Totto to owaraseyou ze.
                          | Let's finish this quick.
---------------------------------------------
Head Death                | Uoh!
---------------------------------------------
Lose Units Special A      | Gh!
---------------------------------------------
Lose Units Special B      | Yare yagaru...
                          | I'll get you back...
---------------------------------------------


=======================================================================[Cerica]
Cerica (セリカ)
Female mercenary in a ten-gallon hat. She is after Garlot for murdering David, 
whom she blindly followed.

O Better in wasteland
X Weak to ice


----------------Battle Quotes----------------
Charge                    | セリカ様の攻撃ーっ！
                          | The great Cerica attacks!
---------------------------------------------
Charge - Opponent's x2    | 集中攻撃っだっつーの！！
                          | Convergence attack!!
---------------------------------------------
Counter                   | 何すんのよ！バーカ！！
                          | What's that for, stupid!!
---------------------------------------------
Counter - Own x2          | 痛いっつーの、バーカ！
                          | That hurt, stupid!
---------------------------------------------

                          | Agh, that hurt!

Critical                  | おっしゃー！
                          | Osshaa!

                          | Urya!
---------------------------------------------

---------------------------------------------
Block Attack              | 甘いわ！
                          | Weak!
---------------------------------------------
Status Effect             | わっ、なんてことすんのよ！

---------------------------------------------

-----------------Spoken Only-----------------

                          | Did you get everything ready.

Head Death                | Iyaaa!!
                          | Nooooo!!

Lose Units Special B      | Uso darou! Mitomenai tte!

Fortune                   | くっ、何のマネよ！？
                          | Kh, what are you doing!?

======================================================================[Inzaghi]
Inzaghi (インザーギ)
A money loving mercenary that works to earn cash. Though he's a talented 
mercenary, he has bad luck with employers.

O Void lightning


----------------Battle Quotes----------------
Charge                    | 突っ込むゼ！
                          | Cut through them!
---------------------------------------------

                          | Don't let up!
---------------------------------------------
Counter                   | 傭兵をなめんな！
                          | Don't make fun of mercenaries!
---------------------------------------------
Counter - Own x2          | しつけぇ奴らだ！
                          | What a persistent guy!
---------------------------------------------
Can't Counter             | くそっ、チマチマと厄介だゼ！
                          | Damn, this smallfry is bugging me!
---------------------------------------------
Critical                  | おおいっ、こんなもんかよ！？
                          | Hey, is that all you've got!?
---------------------------------------------
Opponent Recovery         | これ以上の抵抗はムダだゼ！
                          | Continuing to struggle is pointless!
---------------------------------------------
Victory                   | 思い知ったかよ？
                          | Do you get it now?

                          | Phew, that was pathetic!

                          | I really messed up...!

Flash Attack              | くたばれよ！
                          | Shove it!

                          | Grit your teeth!
---------------------------------------------
Card Interrupted          | チッ、やりやがったな！！
                          | Tch, look what you did!
---------------------------------------------
Block Attack              | あぶねっ！
                          | Close one!
---------------------------------------------
Status Effect             | 何するんだよ！
                          | What was that for!
---------------------------------------------

-----------------Spoken Only-----------------
Ready for Battle Screen   | Totto to owaraseyou ze.
                          | Let's get this over with.

Lose Units Special A      | Ngh!
---------------------------------------------
Lose Units Special B      | Kono yarou!
                          | You bastard!

=======================================================================[Pandra]
Pandra (パンドラ)
A former soldier and the ringleader of the rebel army. Skillfully insiting 
those round him with words, he plans to expand the rebel movement

O Keep increasing frequency of flash attack


----------------Battle Quotes----------------
Charge                    | ぼちぼち行くぜぃ。
                          | Let's get this started.

                          | Back off!

                          | Don't think this'll be easy!

                          | You ain't bad...!

Critical                  | 大したことないな！
                          | You're nothing!

                          | Damn it all!!

                          | Hey!

                          | Deei!

=======================================================================[Fencer]

                          | Why you!

=======================================================================[Undine]
Undine (ウンディーネ)
A member of the undine species that live underwater. Her strength in water is 
matchless, but she does poorly in the desert.

O Better in water
O Void ice
X Worse in desert
X Weak to fire

=======================================================================[Bandit]

O Destroy village


Generic, Mercenary

O Strong against knights
- No terrain effects
X Weak to hunters
X Weak to ice


Generic

                          | Let's keep going!

Lose Units Special A      | Shimatta...
                          | I blundered...
---------------------------------------------
Lose Units Special B      | Kh!
---------------------------------------------


Divine Order
----------------Battle Quotes----------------
Charge                    | 攻撃、開始。
                          | Commence attack.
---------------------------------------------

                          | Continue the pursuit.
---------------------------------------------

                          | ...No one panic.
---------------------------------------------

                          | That hit true.
---------------------------------------------

                          | ...A revealing strike.
---------------------------------------------
Victory                   | 愚かさを棄てよ。
                          | Enough foolishness.
---------------------------------------------

                          | Foolish...
---------------------------------------------

                          | If this is God's will, I accept...
---------------------------------------------
Flash Attack              | はあっ！
                          | Hah!
---------------------------------------------
Flash Attack x3           | 逃がすか！
                          | Trying to run!?
---------------------------------------------
Using Card                | 行くぞ！
                          | Let's go!
---------------------------------------------

                          | I will succeed against you...
---------------------------------------------

                          | Useless.
---------------------------------------------
Lose Units Special B      | Kh!
---------------------------------------------

                          | Commence attack.

                          | Don't let up the offence.

                          | ...No one panic.
---------------------------------------------

                          | That hit true.
---------------------------------------------

                          | ...A revealing strike.
---------------------------------------------

                          | Is that who you are.
---------------------------------------------

                          | A fearsome foe...
---------------------------------------------

                          | Is this how it ends...
---------------------------------------------
Flash Attack              | はあっ！
                          | Hah!

Flash Attack x3           | 逃すか！
                          | Trying to run!?

==================================================================[Necromancer]
Necromancer (ネクロマンサー)
A master magician who controls the dead. Bending space at night, his advance 
takes the enemy by surprise.

O Strong against skeletons
O Void darkness
X Weak to holy


Generic
----------------Battle Quotes----------------
Charge                    | 退けい！
                          | Run!
---------------------------------------------
Charge - Opponent's x2    | 甘い連中だ...
                          | Weaklings...
---------------------------------------------
Counter                   | 効かぬ！
                          | Ineffective!
---------------------------------------------
Counter - Own x2          | 効くものか...
                          | Your attacks do nothing...
---------------------------------------------
Victory                   | さらば。
                          | Farewell.
---------------------------------------------
Victory - Head Only       | なかなかの手練れ...
                          | You have some skill...
---------------------------------------------
Loss                      | 使われる方に回るか...
                          | My usefulness comes and goes...
---------------------------------------------
Flash Attack              | はあっ！
                          | Hah!
---------------------------------------------
Using Card                | 死にも勝る苦痛を...！
                          | Feel a pain worse than death...!
---------------------------------------------

-----------------Spoken Only-----------------
Ready for Battle Screen   | Nakisakebe.
                          | Scream and cry.
---------------------------------------------
Head Death                | Shimatta...
                          | No...
---------------------------------------------
Lose Units Special A      | Shikujitta...
                          | Failure...
---------------------------------------------


Divine Order
----------------Battle Quotes----------------
Charge                    | 苦しかろう？
                          | Does this hurt?
---------------------------------------------
Charge - Opponent's x2    | 楽にしてやる！
                          | This will be easy!
---------------------------------------------
Counter                   | 許さない...！
                          | Unforgivable...!
---------------------------------------------
Counter - Own x2          | 天に逆らうつもりか？
                          | You plan to defy the heavens?
---------------------------------------------
Can't Counter             | なんと！
                          | What!
---------------------------------------------
Victory                   | 勝利など過程に過ぎぬ。
                          | Victory will not be lost in the process.
---------------------------------------------
Victory - Head Only       | 天意は絶対なのだ！
                          | Divine will is absolute!
---------------------------------------------
Loss                      | 裁きの時は近いッ！
                          | The time of judgment draws near!
---------------------------------------------
Flash Attack              | はあっ！
                          | Hah!
---------------------------------------------
Flash Attack x3           | 怨！！
                          | Malice!
---------------------------------------------
Using Card                | 時は来たり！
                          | The time comes!
---------------------------------------------
Card Interrupted          | 愚か者！
                          | Fool!
---------------------------------------------
Status Effect             | いかん...
                          | This can't...
---------------------------------------------

                          | Face God's wrath.

                          | Infidel!
---------------------------------------------

Shield Barrier            | 神の守護が...！
                          | Behold God's protection...!
---------------------------------------------


Rebel Army
----------------Battle Quotes----------------

                          | You see this?
---------------------------------------------

                          | The impossible is forbidden.
---------------------------------------------
Counter                   | こんなものか！
                          | Is that how you are!

---------------------------------------------

                          | What!
---------------------------------------------
Victory                   | 闇が迎えに来た。
                          | The darkness greets you.

                          | Not bad.

                          | My flame of life...!

                          | Hah!

========================================================================[Witch]
Witch (ウィッチ)
A witch excelling in the art of magic. Riding a broom that scatters flames, she 
speeds across the battlefield.


Generic
----------------Battle Quotes----------------
Charge                    | 覚悟なさい！
                          | Get ready!
---------------------------------------------
Charge - Opponent's x2    | 痛めつけてあ・げ・る！
                          | I will make, it, hurt!
---------------------------------------------
Counter                   | いらない！
                          | Unnecessary!
---------------------------------------------
Counter - Own x2          | このォ、あっちに行け！
                          | You... Go away!
---------------------------------------------
Can't Counter             | 冗談キツイわね！
                          | A tough joke!
---------------------------------------------
Critical                  | もういっちゃったの？
                          | Are you done already?
---------------------------------------------
Opponent Recovery         | あら、まだいたのね？
                          | Ah, still here?
---------------------------------------------
Victory                   | ご覧になりまして？
                          | Won't you look at this?
---------------------------------------------
Victory - Head Only       | やるじゃない...
                          | You're not bad...
---------------------------------------------
Loss                      | 及ばないなんて...！
                          | That wasn't enough...!
---------------------------------------------
Flash Attack              | ここか！
                          | Here!?
---------------------------------------------
Using Card                | これでどうかしら？
                          | What do you think of this?
---------------------------------------------
Status Effect             | ウソでしょ！？
                          | You're kidding!?
---------------------------------------------

-----------------Spoken Only-----------------
Ready for Battle Screen   | Shoubu nasai!
                          | Join me in battle!
---------------------------------------------
Head Death                | Ghaa!
---------------------------------------------
Lose Units Special A      | Uhaa!
---------------------------------------------
Lose Units Special B      | Uhu!
---------------------------------------------

--------------Card Battle Quotes-------------
Make Doll                 | 働いてもらうわよ？
                          | Work hard now.
---------------------------------------------
Mind Change               | 力を貸してね！
                          | Lend me strength!
---------------------------------------------


Rebel Army
----------------Battle Quotes----------------
Charge                    | こんなのはイカガ？
                          | How about this?
---------------------------------------------

                          | How about seconds!
---------------------------------------------

                          | Try that again!

                          | You fight too much!!
---------------------------------------------

                          | A tough joke!
---------------------------------------------

                          | Here!

==================================================================[Axe Battler]
Axe Battler - Ax Battler (アックスバトラー)
A rough-looking female warrior. Because of her light armor she is cheap to 
organize, and she is particularly good at raids.

O Good on Wasteland
X Weak to Ice


Generic, Mercenary
----------------Battle Quotes----------------
Charge                    | 攻撃よ！
                          | Attack!
---------------------------------------------
Charge - Opponent's x2    | 連続突撃〜！！
                          | Keep attacking!!
---------------------------------------------
Counter                   | タダじゃ済ませない！
                          | I won't leave things like this!
---------------------------------------------
Counter - Own x2          | もう怒ったよ！
                          | Agh, now I'm angry!
---------------------------------------------
Can't Counter             | 鬱陶しいわね！
                          | This is depressing!
---------------------------------------------
Victory                   | 勝負アリ、ってね！
                          | The match's decided!
---------------------------------------------
Victory - Head Only       | くっ、危なかったわ...
                          | Kh, that was dangerous...
---------------------------------------------
Loss                      | ミスったなぁ...
                          | I messed up...
---------------------------------------------
Flash Attack              | えへへ！！
                          | Ehehe!!
---------------------------------------------
Using Card                | ここからの本番よ！
                          | The true action starts now!
---------------------------------------------
Card Interrupted          | 女の子になんてコトを！
                          | You can't do that to a girl!
---------------------------------------------
Status Effect             | やたっ、やめてよ！
                          | No, stop it!
---------------------------------------------

-----------------Spoken Only-----------------
Ready for Battle Screen   | Shoubu shinasai!
                          | Let's fight!
---------------------------------------------
Lose Units Special A      | Yatta wa ne...
                          | I got hit...
---------------------------------------------
Lose Units Special B      | Gua...
---------------------------------------------

--------------Card Battle Quotes-------------
Shield Barrier            | 攻めてみたら？
                          | See what happens when you attack?
---------------------------------------------
Mind Change               | 一緒に攻めるのよ！
                          | We'll fight together!
---------------------------------------------
Banshee's Cry             | チャンス！！
                          | Chance!
---------------------------------------------


Cerica's
----------------Battle Quotes----------------
Charge                    | 今がチャ〜ンス！！
                          | Now's our chance!!
---------------------------------------------
Charge - Opponent's x2    | 待ってたよ！
                          | I've waited for this!
---------------------------------------------
Counter                   | 通すもんですか！
                          | I'll go through you!
---------------------------------------------
Counter - Own x2          | 軽いもんよ！
                          | I didn't feel a thing!
---------------------------------------------
Can't Counter             | 鬱陶しいわね！
                          | This is depressing!
---------------------------------------------
Critical                  | なに、楽勝じゃない！
                          | What, is it this easy!
---------------------------------------------
Opponent Recovery         | 容赦しないわよ！
                          | Show no mercy!
---------------------------------------------
Victory                   | セリカ姉さん、私やりました！
                          | Miss Cerica, I did it!
---------------------------------------------
Victory - Head Only       | このくらい、どうってこと...！
                          | This much is nothing...!
---------------------------------------------
Loss                      | セリカ姉さん...ごめんなさい...
                          | Miss Cerica, I'm sorry...
---------------------------------------------
Flash Attack              | これでどう！？
                          | How's this!?
---------------------------------------------
Using Card                | 本気、出すんだからね！
                          | Now I'm serious!
---------------------------------------------

-----------------Spoken Only-----------------
Ready for Battle Screen   | Saa, iku yo!
                          | Now, here I come!
---------------------------------------------
Lose Units Special A      | Makeru ka!
                          | I won't lose!
---------------------------------------------
Lose Units Special B      | Kono!
                          | You!
---------------------------------------------



==NPC==================================================


Luciana (ルシエナ)
Aegina's older twin sister. She was injured in an attack from the Divine Order, 
and has accepted protection from Velleman's army

Elena (エレナ)
Younger sister of the Black Knight, Leon. Knowing his loneliness as his only 
living relative, she gently watches over him despite her lack of power.

Yggdra (ユグドラ)
Princess of the kingdom of Fantasinia. She was brought up receiving all the 
affection from her father, the king.

Injured Soldier (負傷兵)
A soldier injured in battle. Those painful looking scars are reminders of 
heroic battles.

Spy (密偵)
Secretive character working outside the public eye. The information they 
provide from behind the scenes is the key to victory.

Man (一般人男 - Average Man)
A happy, worry-free citizen

Woman (一般人女 - Average Woman)
A happy, worry-free citizen

Young Man (青年)
A young man of strong convictions

Young Lady - Elder sister (お姉さん - Older Sister)
A beautiful young lady

Old Man (老人)
Old man with many years of knowledge and experience

Old Woman (老婆)
A woman of considerable age

Wizard (魔導師)
A suspicious-looking man

Nobleman - Aristocrat (貴族)
A prosperous upper-class man

Priest (神父)
A pious, deeply compassionate priest

Merchant (商人)
A merchant with the knowledge of toe ways on money and merchandise. Some sell 
in one spot, some wander.

Nomad (遊牧民)
A person who hunts and farms and such, living in accordance with nature.

Mother (母親)
A kind, gentle mother

Child (子供)
A child who is still very young

Fairy (妖精)
A fairy full of curiosity

Nesar's Man - Nether's man (貧民男 - Poor Man)
A citizen forced to live in poverty

Nesar's Woman - Nether's woman (貧民女 - Poor Woman)
A citizen forced to live in poverty


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Music [PartD]
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Notes:
These are in the order they are in the extras. 


  -----------------------------------------------------
いつの日かの物語 - The Story of Those Days
(Opening Theme) Memories of battles are the cross-threads of history

ブレイズ・ユニオン - Blaze Union
(Title Screen Theme) History is being crafted through people...

集いし者達 - The Gathered
(Demo Scene Theme) See the heroes galloping across the battlefield

理不尽の魔物 - Monster of Senselessness
Emperor Soltier's politics eroded the public order and destroyed the peace

闘争の気配 - Signs of Strife
Within the heart raising battle report, the fighting has drawn near...

いざ出撃！ - Now, to Battle!
Time to get ready for a straining fight. We face battle from unyielding ranks!

その絆、信じてる - I Believe in these Bonds
Form into unions! I believe in the comrades fighting beside me!

凱旋 - Triumph
Is the battle favoring victory or defeat? I pray this road continues toward the 
future

平和の匂い - Scent of Peace
Listening to the voices of the suffering people, what is this feeling in my 
heart...?

揺るぎない信念 - Unshakable Conviction
The one who holds convictions in their heart becomes a hero who triumphs over 
any hardship!

仇敵 - Sworn Enemy
The uneasy feeling drifting onto the battlefield... Could it be they're here 
again!?

侵された平穏 - Broken Tranquility
Unexpected development!　Break the tension and escape peril!

涙こぼれて - Overflowing Tears
At times tragedy appears within the senselessness, carrying away loved ones...

歴史のただ中で - Within History
Let us write this history that was fought for to the very end. Happiness, 
sadness, everything...

火花 - Sparks
(Advancement Theme) Not faltering, we press onward!

打開策 - Strategy to Beat the Odds
(Advancement Theme) With this strategy we will not accept defeat...

危地 - Peril
(Advancement Theme) Struggle! And in doing so, live!

誰がための力 - Power for Whose Sake
(Advancement Theme) For whose sake is this life...

兵は神速を貴ぶ - Soldiers Value Swiftness
(Advancement Theme) A slow advance may as well be defeat!

限界の果てに - At One's Limit
(Advancement Theme) Within the clash, find the way to victory!

堅固なる城砦 - Sturdy Fortress
(Advancement Theme) Break through these resilient gates, and sing of our 
victory!

決着の時、来たる - The Time to End This Comes
(Advancement Theme) Aside from legends, all is in the hands of the people

沸き立つ血肉 - Boiling Flesh
(Enemy Advancement Theme) Intercept the forceful Imperial Army!

貪欲なる衝動 - Impulse of Greed
(Enemy Advancement Theme) Show the enemy Gram Blaze's power!

Never
(Enemy Advancement Theme) We do not fight alone!

天意が示す道 - The Way of God's Will
(Enemy Advancement Theme) It is God's will that calls forth victory!

怒れる炎 - Angry Flames
(Garlot's Theme) Cut through the advance guard with dauntless courage!

せめて心に花を - At Least a Flower for My Heart
(Shiskia's Theme) Upset the enemy camp with splendor!

機知の行方 - Whereabouts of Wit
(Jenon's Theme) That wisdom is the key to victory!

強くある覚悟 - Fierce Determination
(Medoute's Theme) Wielding a battleaxe, make a way through!

幼さは罪を知らず - Youth Knows no Sin
(Amy's Theme) A young griffon ride joins the battle!

剣を振るう理由 - The Reason to Wield a Sword
(Aegina's Theme) Swear loyalty to Gram Blaze!

掌中の劇場 - A Play of Pawns
(Nessiah's Theme) A necromancer, and yet a threatening prophet!

価値観の問題 - Conflict of Values
(Cerica's Theme) Female mercenary hunting Garlot!

荒ぶれば勇ましく - Violence is Bravery
(Leon's Theme) No mercy, like it or not!

はためく軍旗 - Waving Banner
(Pandra's Theme) Take what you dream of, the pleasures of the world!

夜が走る - The Night Rushes By
(Zilva's Theme) Under the cover of darkness, an assassin storms in!

鬨の声 - Battle Cry
(Baldus's Theme) The shield of Bronquia heads for the battlefield!

威信に賭けて - Wager your Dignity
(Lapis's Theme) This sword exists to protect my lord!

頂 - Summit
(Soltier's Theme) These twin blades fearlessly prey on the enemy!

これで万事解決！？ - Will this Settle Things!?
(Mizer's Theme) A fugitive joins the private army!

酔っ払い最強伝説 - The Strongest Drunken Legend
(Sleip's Theme) Overcoming hardships through the power of alcohol!

魔女のダンス - Witch's Dance
(Pamela's Theme) Rampage of an odd magical girl!

NanTutTe
(Baifu's Theme) A beastman of bad puns from the north

強く儚く鮮やかに - Strong, Fleeting, Brilliant
(Eater's Theme) Such femininity! And masculinity!

飽くなき探求心 - Insatiable Searching Heart
(Eudy's Theme) Terrifying master magician wielding a cannon!

強欲のとりこ - Slave to Avarice
(Alanjame's Theme) The greed-stained courtier reaches for power!

魔剣は冴え渡り - Frozen Astral Sword
(Russel's Theme) The royal army's quick-witted officer appears!

王者の覇気 - A King's Desire
(Ordene's Theme) A proud king protects justice to the end!

無謬の叡智 - Flawless Wisdom
(Beatrene's Theme) A female technician of mystery finaly shifts!

侵食 - Corrosion
(Bronga's Theme) The blood of a demonic dragon desires battle!

逆らえばそれは罪 - Opposition is Sin
(Imperial Army Theme) Show these bandits the power of the Imperial Army!

害悪 - Harm
(Brigand Theme) Strength is the true justice!

祖国に捧ぐ - Devotion to the Homeland
(Royal Army Theme) You will never invade our homeland!

魔の魅惑 - Lure of Evil
(Divine Order Theme) Crush the enemy before God's will!

勝利の喜び - Joy of Victory
(Victory Theme) The battle continues, aim to win again!

辛酸 - Hardship
(Defeat Theme) Do not accept defeat, that is the way to victory!

勝利の凱歌 - Song of Victory
(Scenario Cleared Theme) Share the joy of victory with friends!

膝をついた戦士達 - Soldiers Brought to their Knees
(Scenario not Cleared Theme) Revise your strategy, and vow to fight again!

手にした力の意味 - The Meaning Behind this Strength
(Ending Theme) We wished for strength, but...

未来へと到る物語る - Story to Reach the Future
(Ending Theme) The story continues, to an unseen future...

戦いは続く... - The Battle Continues...
(Staff Roll Music) Thank you or playing!


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Items [PartE]
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Notes:
These are in the order they are in the extras, which also happens to be the 
Japanese alphabetical order. 


  -----------------------------------------------------
000. アーリードライヴ - Early Drive
An extremely powerful bow that breaks the sound barrier and pierces the enemy

  O Instant charge
  Bow users only

001. アイアンヘルム - Iron Helm
A helmet made of steel. Sturdily made, it does a good job of protecting the 
head

  O Evade criticals
  Males who can wear heavy armor

003. アイテム図鑑 - Item Manual
Large encyclopedia containing items of all times and places

  ! View item manual OK
  No one

004. 青リンゴ - Blue Apple
A bright blue apple containing a poisonous component

  X Eat LUK down
  Everyone

005. 開かずのカバン - Sealed Purse
A bag stolen by thieves, but discarded when it couldn't be opened

  - No effect
  Everyone

010. アラン人形 - Aran Doll
A doll in the shape of the protector god Aran. Has a bit of a burnt smell

  X Can't remove
  Everyone

011. ある少女の日記 - A Girl's Diary
A pretty, bound notebook. It looks to be a girl's from the handwriting

  O No zero reset
  Everyone

012. いにしえの楽譜 - Ancient Sheet Music
Sheet music recording tunes of mush happiness and sadness

  ! View sound mode OK
  No one

013. イブニングドレス - Evening Dress
Dress for evening balls. Makes one feel like an adult

  O Good at night
  Females only

014. 癒しのハーブ - Healing Herb
Mysterious herb that makes one feel relaxed

  O Cure ailments
  Everyone

015. インフェルノ - Inferno
Great sickle housing a fire demon. It reduces its opponents to ashes and eats 
their lives

  O Morale absorbed upon victory
  Gulcasa only

017. 海蛇のランサー - Serpent Lancer
The spear inherited from the three brothers living around the canal. Cuts 
through water with no resistance.

  O Strong to enemies in water
  Spear type only

018. エーテリオン - Etherion
Sacred clothes recomposing all energies into power

  O Gauge fills fast
  Lv 15 and up

020. エルフィンボウ - Elfin Bow
A hunting bow the people of the forest inherited from an elf spirit

  O Morale up when low
  Miser only

021. エレガントスピア - Elegant Spear
Magnificent spear that was stored in an armory

  O Experience + 3
  Spear type only

022. エレミナミント - Elemina Mint
Mint used for cosmetics said to make skin smooth when floated in bath water

  O Eat TEC up
  Everyone

024. エンドオブエイジ - End of Ages
Appearing in a world at war, this great sword of ancient times leads the demise 
of an era

  O Power 50% up
  Jenon only

025. オーガニウム - Ogrenium
Hardest material in the world. Used to make the best of arms

  - No effect
  No one

026. オーガブレード - Ogre Blade
Enormous blade that conceals the power to defeat giant ogres

  O Power 25% up
  Medoute only

027. 乙女の涙 - A Maiden's Tear
Crystallized tear that gives birth to pure emotions

  One time revival
  Everyone

029. ガーゴイルロッド - Gargoyle Rod
A staff with a gargoyle design on the stem

  O Good at night
  Staff type only

030. 貝殼の胸あて - Shell Breastplate
A breastplate made of shells. It's a tad embarrassing.

  O Evade criticals
  Sleip only

031. カゴの中の白い蝶 - Caged Butterfly
A white butterfly, having been caught, is in the cage

  - No effect
  No one

032. 家族への手紙 - Letter Home
A soldier from the rebel army wrote this letter to his family

  - No effect
  No one

033. カチューシャ - Hair Band
A simply made hair band, often used for decoration

  O Instant charge
  Females except Eater

034. ガトリングボウ - Gatling Bow
An instrument of magic. This bowgun will continue to fire true until it runs 
out of arrows

  O Gauge fills
  Shiskia only

035. ガラスのビン - Glass Bottle
Clear container made of glass. Handle with caution as it breaks easily

  X Foe critical 50%
  Not Baifu

036. 枯れた花束 - Withered Bouquet
Dried Meimel flowers. They've turned a brown color.

  - No effect
  No one

037. 皮のヘルメット - Leather Helmet
A simple helmet made of pieces of leather attached to each other

  O Evade panic
  Males except Baifu

038. ガントレット - Gauntlet
A snugly fitting gauntlet made of steel

  O Block counter
  Lv 8 and up

040. 絹のコルセットSilk Corset
A lovely corset of sheer silk

  O Block counter
  Females only

041. 希望のロザリオ - Rosary of Hope
Rosary given as an honor to the most zealous of believers

  O Block charge
  Everyone

042. キャッツアイ - Cat's Eye
A perfectly round gem that looks like the eye of a cat

  O Good at night
  Everyone

043. 凶刃ベルセルク - Berserk
An axe covered in blood. Drives its owner to madness

  - Always aggressive
  Medoute only

044. 教団のコイン - Religious Coin
Underground currency circulated within the Divine Order

  - No effect
  No one

045. 巨獣ロコンの骨 - Rokon Skull
Skull of the large beast Rokon, that has been living, unchanged, since ancient 
times

  - No effect
  No one

046. キラービーの巣 - Killer Beehive
Hive of killer bees known to be some of the most deadly and ferocious

  O Chance of heavy counter
  Everyone

047. きらきら金貨 - Shiny Coin
A coin made as a luxury item by the wealthy

  - No effect
  No one

048. キルトのスカーフ - Quilt Scarf
A scarf knitted like a quilt. It's well insulated

  O Block charge
  Shiskia only

050. きれいな貝殼 - Pretty Shell
Two pretty shells, faintly reflecting light

  - No effect
  No one

052. ギロチンウェポン - Guillotine Weapon
The terrible creation of a certain weapon maker. This cruel spear has been used 
as an execution tool

  O Critical 50%
  Leon only

053. 金塊 - Gold Lump
A gold bar that shines dazzlingly

  - No effect
  No one

054. 禁忌のロザリオ - Rosary of Taboo
A rosary with a red cross on a black stone secretly carried by a mad heretic

  X Morale down slowly
  Everyone

055. 禁断の果実 - Forbidden Fruit
I forbidden fruit said to be from the paradise of the gods

  O Eat all up
  Everyone

056. 金のドゼウ - Gold Dozeu
An extremely rare, gold colored dozeu. It's said that those who see it will 
have good fortune

  O Eat all up
  Everyone

057. 金のとっくり - Gold Wine
An extravagant wine. Too strong to drink, though...

  X Can't use skills
  Sleip only

058. 草刈り鎌 - Mowing Scythe
A sickle used by farmers to cut weeds

  O No battle penalty
  Scythe type only

059. 腐ったドゼウ - Rotten Dozeu
A dozeu that died and rotted. The smell is awfull...

  X Eat GEN down
  Those okay with strange foods

060. 朽ち果てた剣 - Rusted Sword
A once famous sword that has rusted away

  X Criticals 0%
  Sword type only

061. クマのぬいぐるみ - Teddybear
A stuffed toy pleasant to the touch. Girls love it!

  - No effect
  Females only

062. グランセンチュリオ - Gran Centurio
The holy sword passed down in Fantasinia for generations

  O Holy attack up
  Fantasinian royalty only

063. グランドクロス - Grand Cross
Robust armor that built up myths of invincibility through its many great 
battles

  O Void all attributes
  Males who can wear heavy armor

064. クリティカライザ - Criticalizer
A magical device that accurately pinpoints the enemy's weak spot

  O Criticals 50%
  Lv 9 and up

065. グリフォンの羽根 - Griffon Feather
A feather of a griffon from the Lost Aries

  O Morale up when moving
  Everyone

066. グリフグリル - Grilled Griffon
A steak of well cooked griffon meat

  O Eat GEN up
  Everyone

067. クルセイドランス - Crusade Lance
A cross shaped lance, symbolizing faith and loyalty

  O Strong against skeletons
  Spear type only

068. くるみパン - Walnut Bread
Bread with walnuts baked in

  O Eat GEN up
  Everyone

069. クローバーライト - Clover Light
A scythe with four shining blades of terrifying sharpness

  O Criticals 50%
  Gulcasa only

070. 黒ネコの耳飾り - Cat Ears
Headband made in the style of black cat ears

  O Morale up when moving at night
  Females other than Eater

071. 契約のリプロ - Contract Reproduction
13 volumes that are evidence of a contract with a fallen one of the underworld

  O Necrogate strength up
  Nessiah only

072. 毛皮 - Fur
A pelt stripped off of an animal and dried

  - No Effect
  No one

073. 毛皮のコート - Fur Coat
A coat made with treated fir of an animal, that protects against the cold

  O Void ice
  Everyone

074. ケモノのマント - Beast Cloak
A wild cloak made of animal hide cut to fit

  O Geo + 10
  Everyone

075. 賢者の石 - Sage's Stone
This stone holds a special power to make things into metal...

  - No Effect
  No one

076. 幻獣ヤーデのツノ - Yarde Horn
A horn if the mystical creature Yarde revered as used by the gods

  O Morale up when moving in evening
  Males only

077. 幸運のタリスマン - Good Luck Charm
A charm imbued with prayers in order to be blessed with fortune

  O Drop rate 100%
  Everyone

078. 豪槍一本鬼 - Ipponki
Simple and fierce. A hardy spear lacking any superfluous decorations

  X Can't use skills
  Male spear type only

079. ゴールデンスピア - Golden Spear
A shining gold colored spear made of a lump of gold

  O Lightning attack up
  Spear type only

080. ゴールドバッジ - Gold Badge
Luxury item of an average noble. Has an elegant feel

  O MVP chance compensation: medium
  Everyone

081. ゴーレムスーツ - Golem Suit
A full body golem suit. Incredibly heavy...

  X Move to slow
  Walk or warp type only

Credit, Legal, and Technical Stuff [PartF]

November 2012 - Version 0.25
     Chapters 1 and 2, characters of those chapters, a bit in music and items
March 2013 - Version 0.40
     Chapter 3 and characters, finished music
November 2013 - Version 0.80
     Chapter 6A finished
November 2014 - Version 0.90
     Chapter 6B finished
March 2015 - Version 1.00
     Chapter 6C finished
